papers.title: "Offloading" Undergraduate Research to the Graphics Processing Unit for Acceleration.
papers.abstract: Traditionally, research in physics and engineering involves formulating and solving partial differential equations—a task that can take years to master. However, by rethinking these problems as N-body simulations, students can engage with them using only a freshman-level understanding of mathematics, physics, and computer science—along with a fast computer and vivid imagination. In the past, such simulations required expensive, high-performance machines. But with the power of modern GPUs, a gaming desktop can now perform meaningful N-body computations, making advanced, independent research accessible to undergraduate students.
papers.abstract_zh: 传统上，物理和工程学研究涉及制定和求解偏微分方程，这项任务可能需要数年时间才能掌握。然而，通过将这些问题重新思考为 N 体模拟，学生只需使用对数学、物理和计算机科学的新生水平的理解，以及快速的计算机和生动的想象力就可以解决这些问题。过去，此类模拟需要昂贵的高性能机器。但凭借现代 GPU 的强大功能，游戏桌面现在可以执行有意义的 N 体计算，从而使本科生能够进行先进的独立研究。

papers.title: A Cache Interaction Graph for Data Locality Optimization.
papers.abstract: Optimizing cache efficiency is critical for mitigating the performance gap between CPUs and memory systems. However, the interaction between application data access patterns and the cache hierarchy complicates debugging cache performance. Existing profiling approaches can identify program performance bottlenecks but leave root-cause diagnosis of cache inefficiencies to programmer expertise. This paper presents an innovative approach that not only precisely captures where cache inefficiencies exist but also helps identify why they occur. Our methodology captures the causal relationship of cache interactions among array variables by tracking cache line evictions, while simultaneously measuring both temporal and spatial locality and classifying cache miss types. We use a new visualization technique (a Cache Interaction Graph), to correlate these metrics with detected interaction patterns to identify root causes and appropriate optimizations. Our Cachegrind extension provides variable-level data locality analysis with acceptable overhead. Our real-world cases demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 优化缓存效率对于缩小 CPU 和内存系统之间的性能差距至关重要。然而，应用程序数据访问模式和缓存层次结构之间的交互使调试缓存性能变得复杂。现有的分析方法可以识别程序性能瓶颈，但将高速缓存效率低下的根本原因诊断留给程序员的专业知识。本文提出了一种创新方法，不仅可以精确捕获存在缓存效率低下的位置，还可以帮助确定其发生的原因。我们的方法通过跟踪缓存行驱逐来捕获数组变量之间缓存交互的因果关系，同时测量时间和空间局部性并对缓存未命中类型进行分类。我们使用一种新的可视化技术（缓存交互图）将这些指标与检测到的交互模式相关联，以识别根本原因和适当的优化。我们的 Cachegrind 扩展提供了可变级别的数据局部性分析，且开销可接受。我们的真实案例证明了我们方法的有效性。

papers.title: A Compute Graph Simulation and Implementation Framework Targeting AMD Versal AI Engines.
papers.abstract: We present a framework for developing compute graph-based applications targeting the AI Engine (AIE) array of AMD Versal SoCs. This framework enables users to embed AIE-based dataflow graph prototypes directly within existing C++ applications and automatically transform them into deployable AIE graph projects. It thereby eliminates the need to manually separate host and accelerator codebases, as required by the standard AMD Vitis workflow. The framework comprises two core components: (1) a compute graph simulation library that can be linked into existing C++ programs, and (2) a Clang-based source-to-source translator that extracts simulator-defined graphs and prepares them for compilation with AMD’s AIE toolchain. We evaluate our framework using AMD’s official example graphs and show that our generated AIE code achieves performance comparable to hand-optimized Vitis implementations. Additionally, we demonstrate how C++ compile-time code execution can be leveraged to simplify the implementation of source-to-source translation and static source analysis.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个框架，用于开发针对 AMD Versal SoC 的 AI 引擎 (AIE) 阵列的基于计算图的应用程序。该框架使用户能够将基于 AIE 的数据流图原型直接嵌入到现有的 C++ 应用程序中，并自动将其转换为可部署的 AIE 图项目。因此，无需按照标准 AMD Vitis 工作流程的要求手动分离主机和加速器代码库。该框架包含两个核心组件：(1) 一个可以链接到现有 C++ 程序的计算图模拟库，以及 (2) 一个基于 Clang 的源到源转换器，用于提取模拟器定义的图并准备好使用 AMD 的 AIE 工具链进行编译。我们使用 AMD 的官方示例图评估我们的框架，并表明我们生成的 AIE 代码实现的性能可与手动优化的 Vitis 实现相媲美。此外，我们还演示了如何利用 C++ 编译时代码执行来简化源到源转换和静态源分析的实现。

papers.title: A Data-Size Adaptive Approach to I/O of Poorly Load Balanced In Situ Data Extracts.
papers.abstract: Efficient parallel I/O is essential for large-scale scientific workflows, particularly in in situ visualization pipelines where output sizes and data distribution can vary significantly over time. We present a new data-size based aggregation strategy for the ADIOS2 BP5 engine, designed to improve parallel I/O performance under load imbalance. Whereas existing aggregation strategies for ADIOS group writers based on compute node assignment, our approach dynamically balances subfile sizes according to the amount of data each process will write. We evaluate this strategy using a synthetic workload under low and severe load imbalance. Results show that the data-size based aggregation matches or outperforms existing strategies. These findings highlight the potential of adaptive aggregation strategies to improve I/O performance for imbalanced scientific workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 高效的并行 I/O 对于大规模科学工作流程至关重要，特别是在输出大小和数据分布随时间变化显着的原位可视化管道中。我们为 ADIOS2 BP5 引擎提出了一种新的基于数据大小的聚合策略，旨在提高负载不平衡情况下的并行 I/O 性能。 ADIOS 组写入器的现有聚合策略基于计算节点分配，而我们的方法根据每个进程将写入的数据量动态平衡子文件大小。我们使用低负载不平衡和严重负载不平衡下的合成工作负载来评估该策略。结果表明，基于数据大小的聚合匹配或优于现有策略。这些发现凸显了自适应聚合策略在提高不平衡科学工作负载的 I/O 性能方面的潜力。

papers.title: A GPU FFT Wrapper to Co-optimize Floating-Point Precision and Library Selection via Predictive Error Modeling.
papers.abstract: Approximate and low-precision computing are essential for modern applications, and effectively leveraging available precision options can deliver substantial gains in performance and energy efficiency. We focus on the Fast Fourier Transform (FFT), a representative function used in scientific computing, and propose a wrapper library to exploit these options. Using multiple GPU-accelerated FFT libraries, we observe that different libraries excel in different regions of the performance–accuracy space and that these sweet spots depend on transform size and input content. Guided by these insights, we propose a framework that selects the best kernel (library and precision) on the fly to minimize runtime or energy while satisfying a specified error threshold. A lightweight machine learning model predicts per-kernel error at runtime from sampled input features. Experiments show over 98% selection accuracy and mean speedups exceeding 40% compared to a double precision baseline. The framework integrates seamlessly with existing workflows as a wrapper library.
papers.abstract_zh: 近似和低精度计算对于现代应用至关重要，有效利用可用的精度选项可以显着提高性能和能源效率。我们专注于科学计算中使用的代表性函数快速傅里叶变换（FFT），并提出了一个包装库来利用这些选项。使用多个 GPU 加速的 FFT 库，我们观察到不同的库在性能精度空间的不同区域表现出色，并且这些最佳点取决于变换大小和输入内容。在这些见解的指导下，我们提出了一个框架，可以动态选择最佳内核（库和精度），以最大限度地减少运行时间或能量，同时满足指定的错误阈值。轻量级机器学习模型根据采样的输入特征在运行时预测每个内核的错误。实验表明，与双精度基线相比，选择准确度超过 98%，平均加速超过 40%。该框架作为包装库与现有工作流程无缝集成。

papers.title: A High Performance GPU CountSketch Implementation and Its Application to Multisketching and Least Squares Problems.
papers.abstract: Random sketching is a dimensionality reduction technique that approximately preserves norms and singular values up to some O(1) distortion factor with high probability. The most popular sketches in literature are the Gaussian sketch and the subsampled randomized Hadamard transform, while the CountSketch has lower complexity. Combining two sketches, known as multisketching, offers an inexpensive means of quickly reducing the dimension of a matrix by combining a CountSketch and Gaussian sketch.
papers.abstract_zh: 随机草图是一种降维技术，可以以高概率近似保留范数和奇异值，直至达到某个 O(1) 失真因子。文献中最流行的草图是高斯草图和二次采样随机哈达玛变换，而 CountSketch 的复杂度较低。组合两个草图（称为多重草图）提供了一种通过组合 CountSketch 和高斯草图来快速减小矩阵维度的廉价方法。

papers.title: A Model for Teaching Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Research Computing to Domain Scientists on HPC Resources.
papers.abstract: This paper presents outcomes and insights from a one-week workshop designed to teach biologists essential skills in high-performance computing (HPC), machine learning (ML), and deep learning (DL). Participants with little or no prior experience with HPC learned how to navigate file systems via a command-line interface, launch jobs with SLURM, and apply ML and DL techniques to real-world biological datasets. Hands-on activities were delivered with accessible technologies such as Jupyter Notebooks, graphical desktop interfaces (DCV), and software containers, all deployed on HPC systems with minimal user setup required. We propose this workshop model as an adaptable framework for training domain scientists how to effectively use HPC resources to advance scientific discovery, and we present survey data demonstrating its effectiveness in improving participant skills.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了为期一周的研讨会的成果和见解，该研讨会旨在向生物学家传授高性能计算 (HPC)、机器学习 (ML) 和深度学习 (DL) 方面的基本技能。之前很少或没有 HPC 经验的参与者学习如何通过命令行界面导航文件系统、使用 SLURM 启动作业以及将 ML 和 DL 技术应用于现实世界的生物数据集。实践活动是通过 Jupyter Notebooks、图形桌面界面 (DCV) 和软件容器等易于访问的技术进行的，所有这些都部署在 HPC 系统上，只需最少的用户设置。我们建议将此研讨会模型作为一个适应性框架，用于培训领域科学家如何有效地利用 HPC 资源来推进科学发现，并且我们提供的调查数据证明了其在提高参与者技能方面的有效性。

papers.title: A Modular, Responsive, and Accessible HPC Dashboard Built upon Open OnDemand.
papers.abstract: High-performance computing (HPC) has become a critical enabler of scientific advancement across many research domains. As the HPC user community continues to expand, there is an increasing need to reduce barriers to entry and improve accessibility for researchers with varying levels of computational expertise. This paper presents a modular, responsive, and user-friendly web-based dashboard built upon the Open OnDemand framework. The system integrates several redesigned functional pages, providing streamlined access to announcements, system status, job information, and resource usage. By consolidating these capabilities into an intuitive interface with a modern design, the dashboard enhances user experience, reduces reliance on command-line tools, and facilitates more efficient interaction with HPC resources.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 已成为许多研究领域科学进步的关键推动者。随着 HPC 用户社区的不断扩大，越来越需要减少进入壁垒并提高具有不同计算专业水平的研究人员的可访问性。本文介绍了一个基于 Open OnDemand 框架构建的模块化、响应式且用户友好的基于 Web 的仪表板。该系统集成了多个重新设计的功能页面，提供对公告、系统状态、工作信息和资源使用情况的简化访问。通过将这些功能整合到采用现代设计的直观界面中，仪表板增强了用户体验，减少了对命令行工具的依赖，并促进与 HPC 资源更有效的交互。

papers.title: A Nested Krylov Method Using Half-Precision Arithmetic.
papers.abstract: Low-precision computing is essential for efficiently utilizing memory bandwidth and computing cores. While many mixed-precision algorithms have been developed for iterative sparse linear solvers, effectively leveraging half-precision (fp16) arithmetic remains challenging. This study introduces a novel nested Krylov approach that integrates the FGMRES and Richardson methods in a deeply nested structure, progressively reducing precision from double-precision to fp16 toward the innermost solver. To avoid meaningless computations beyond precision limits, the low-precision inner solvers perform only a few iterations per invocation, while the nested structure ensures their frequent execution. Numerical experiments show that incorporating fp16 into the approach directly enhances solver performance without compromising convergence, achieving speedups of up to 1.65 × and 2.42 × over double-precision and double-single mixed-precision implementations, respectively. Furthermore, the proposed method outperforms conventional mixed-precision Krylov solvers, CG, BiCGStab, and restarted FGMRES, by factors of up to 2.47, 2.74, and 69.10, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 低精度计算对于有效利用内存带宽和计算核心至关重要。尽管已经为迭代稀疏线性求解器开发了许多混合精度算法，但有效利用半精度 (fp16) 算法仍然具有挑战性。本研究引入了一种新颖的嵌套 Krylov 方法，该方法将 FGMRES 和 Richardson 方法集成在深度嵌套结构中，从双精度逐渐降低精度到最内层求解器的 fp16。为了避免超出精度限制的无意义计算，低精度内部求解器每次调用仅执行几次迭代，而嵌套结构确保其频繁执行。数值实验表明，将 fp16 纳入该方法可直接增强求解器性能，而不会影响收敛性，与双精度和双单混合精度实现相比，分别实现高达 1.65 × 和 2.42 × 的加速。此外，所提出的方法优于传统混合精度 Krylov 求解器、CG、BiCGStab 和重新启动的 FGMRES，分别高达 2.47、2.74 和 69.10 倍。

papers.title: A Peak Performance Model for All-to-all on Hierarchical Systems and Its Applications.
papers.abstract: An accurate measure of communication performance is a key component of optimizing large scale high performance computing applications. This paper presents a model for the peak performance of all-to-all communication, in the context of systems composed of a hierarchy of interconnect bandwidths; a common trait of multi-GPU per node systems. We demonstrate an application of the model to distributed transposes, such as those encountered in distributed three-dimensional Fast Fourier Transforms. The model is validated on three different network architectures, using a variety of communication libraries, by measuring all-to-all and distributed transpose performance in a pseudo-spectral code for direct numerical simulations of 3D fluid turbulence. Both the model and the validation results provide insights into the impact of fast communication links located lower in the network hierarchy, the expected scaling for all-to-all bound problems, and performance considerations when selecting slab (1D) or pencil (2D) domain decompositions.
papers.abstract_zh: 准确测量通信性能是优化大规模高性能计算应用程序的关键组成部分。本文提出了一个在由互连带宽层次结构组成的系统背景下实现全对全通信峰值性能的模型；每节点多 GPU 系统的一个共同特征。我们演示了该模型在分布式转置中的应用，例如分布式三维快速傅立叶变换中遇到的转置。该模型在三种不同的网络架构上进行了验证，使用各种通信库，通过测量伪谱代码中的全面和分布式转置性能来直接数值模拟 3D 流体湍流。模型和验证结果都提供了对位于网络层次结构中较低位置的快速通信链路的影响、所有到所有边界问题的预期扩展以及选择平板（1D）或铅笔（2D）域分解时的性能考虑因素的见解。

papers.title: A Practical Quantum Solver for Multidimensional Partial Differential Equations.
papers.abstract: Quantum computing has the potential to transform computational problem-solving by leveraging quantum mechanical principles of superposition and entanglement. This capability is particularly important for the numerical solution of complex and/or multidimensional partial differential equations (PDEs). There are currently many quantum techniques available for solving PDEs, which are mainly based on variational quantum algorithms (VQAs). However, the existing quantum PDE solvers, particularly those based on VQAs suffer from limitations such as low accuracy, high execution times, and low scalability on both simulators as well as on real quantum devices. In this work, we propose an efficient and scalable algorithm for solving multidimensional PDEs. We present two variants of our algorithm: the first leverages finite-difference method (FDM), classical-to-quantum (C2Q) encoding, and numerical instantiation, while the second employs FDM, C2Q, and column-by-column decomposition (CCD). Both variants are designed to enhance accuracy and scalability while reducing execution times. We have validated our proposed algorithm by solving several practically useful PDEs such as Poisson, heat, Black-Scholes, and Navier-Stokes equations. Our results demonstrate higher accuracy, higher scalability, and faster execution times compared to VQA-based solvers on noise-free and noisy quantum simulators from IBM and achieved promising results on real quantum hardware.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子计算有潜力通过利用量子力学的叠加和纠缠原理来改变计算问题的解决方式。此功能对于复杂和/或多维偏微分方程 (PDE) 的数值求解尤其重要。目前有许多量子技术可用于求解偏微分方程，其中主要基于变分量子算法（VQA）。然而，现有的量子偏微分方程求解器，特别是基于 VQA 的求解器，在模拟器和真实量子设备上都存在精度低、执行时间长、可扩展性低等局限性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种高效且可扩展的算法来求解多维偏微分方程。我们提出了算法的两种变体：第一种利用有限差分法 (FDM)、经典到量子 (C2Q) 编码和数值实例化，而第二种采用 FDM、C2Q 和逐列分解 (CCD)。这两种变体都旨在提高准确性和可扩展性，同时减少执行时间。我们通过求解几个实际有用的偏微分方程（例如泊松方程、热方程、布莱克-斯科尔斯方程和纳维-斯托克斯方程）验证了我们提出的算法。与 IBM 无噪声和有噪声量子模拟器上基于 VQA 的求解器相比，我们的结果表明具有更高的准确性、更高的可扩展性和更快的执行时间，并且在真实量子硬件上取得了有希望的结果。

papers.title: A Query Engine for Scientific Data Exploration using Theory, Simulation, and Artificial Intelligence Models.
papers.abstract: Modern scientific discovery increasingly couples large-scale simulations, heterogeneous data, and AI models into interactive, iterative workflows. Yet existing systems rarely let scientists compose expressive queries that both retrieve massive, multi‑modal datasets and invoke complex computational models (simulations or AI inferences) with low turnaround time. We present the Intelligent Data Search (IDS) framework to bridge this gap. IDS builds on the Cray Graph Engine and combines a scalable in‑memory datastore (acting as a feature store, vector store, and knowledge graph) with a unified query engine that spans keyword, set‑theoretic, and linear‑algebraic operators. It also incorporates a model repository for User-Defined Functions (UDFs) and pre‑trained AI models, and a globally distributed, multi‑tier cache to stash intermediate and simulation outputs. We demonstrate IDS on a life‑sciences workflow developed in collaboration with the National Center for Natural Products (NCNPR). This effort integrates AI models such as AlphaFold with simulation codes like AutoDock Vina, and analytic functions such as the Smith–Waterman algorithm within a single query. In our evaluation, we show strong scaling on HPC systems, a complex “what‑could‑be” query that executes millions of similarity searches and thousands of model inferences. This executes in tens of seconds at scale, resulting in a 5–15x end‑to‑end improvement from the distributed cache. IDS enables scientists to pose and iterate model-driven “what‑if” questions over petascale datasets with far lower latency and less workflow fragmentation than prior approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代科学发现越来越多地将大规模模拟、异构数据和人工智能模型结合到交互式、迭代的工作流程中。然而，现有系统很少允许科学家编写表达性查询，既检索大量多模态数据集，又以较短的周转时间调用复杂的计算模型（模拟或人工智能推理）。我们提出了智能数据搜索（IDS）框架来弥补这一差距。 IDS 基于 Cray 图形引擎构建，并将可扩展的内存数据存储（充当特征存储、向量存储和知识图）与涵盖关键字、集合论和线性代数运算符的统一查询引擎相结合。它还包含用于用户定义函数 (UDF) 和预训练 AI 模型的模型存储库，以及用于存储中间和模拟输出的全球分布式多层缓存。我们在与国家天然产物中心 (NCNPR) 合作开发的生命科学工作流程上演示了 IDS。这项工作将 AlphaFold 等人工智能模型与 AutoDock Vina 等模拟代码以及单个查询中的 Smith–Waterman 算法等分析功能集成在一起。在我们的评估中，我们展示了 HPC 系统的强大扩展能力，这是一个复杂的“可能是什么”查询，可以执行数百万次相似性搜索和数千次模型推理。大规模执行只需数十秒，与分布式缓存相比，端到端性能提高了 5-15 倍。 IDS 使科学家能够在千万亿级数据集上提出并迭代模型驱动的“假设”问题，与以前的方法相比，延迟要低得多，工作流碎片要少得多。

papers.title: A RISC-V Vector Extension for Multi-word Arithmetic.
papers.abstract: Multi-word arithmetic plays a critical role in high-performance computing (HPC) as it enables arithmetic on operands exceeding a processor’s native word size. For example, many cryptographic kernels, such as number theoretic transform, rely on multi-word arithmetic to compute log 2(q)-bit integer arithmetic, accelerating mod-q polynomial multiplication in post-quantum cryptography. To mitigate carry-propagation bottlenecks in multi-word arithmetic, prior work proposed code-generation approaches targeting GPUs and domain-specific accelerators (DSAs) with native large-integer support. However, GPU-based approaches tend to be less energy-efficient, while DSA designs incur non-trivial non-recurring engineering. Therefore, our work evaluates the potential for RISC-V in HPC and explores multi-word arithmetic using RISC-V. We propose a general modeling-based multi-word extension on the RISC-V Vector (RVV) ISA. Furthermore, we develop comprehensive performance models to analyze performance consistency across host vector processing systems with diverse microarchitectural configurations. Our work demonstrates that targeted architectural extensions can further saturate the pipeline by enhancing RVV’s carry-propagation support.
papers.abstract_zh: 多字算术在高性能计算 (HPC) 中发挥着至关重要的作用，因为它可以对超过处理器本机字大小的操作数进行算术。例如，许多密码内核（例如数论变换）依赖多字算术来计算 log 2(q) 位整数算术，从而加速后量子密码学中的 mod-q 多项式乘法。为了缓解多字算术中的进位传播瓶颈，之前的工作提出了针对 GPU 和具有本机大整数支持的特定领域加速器 (DSA) 的代码生成方法。然而，基于 GPU 的方法往往能源效率较低，而 DSA 设计则需要非平凡的非重复性工程。因此，我们的工作评估了 RISC-V 在 HPC 中的潜力，并探索使用 RISC-V 的多字算术。我们在 RISC-V Vector (RVV) ISA 上提出了一种基于通用建模的多字扩展。此外，我们开发了全面的性能模型来分析具有不同微架构配置的主机矢量处理系统的性能一致性。我们的工作表明，有针对性的架构扩展可以通过增强 RVV 的进位传播支持来进一步饱和管道。

papers.title: A Sample-Free Compilation Framework for Efficient Dynamic Tensor Computation.
papers.abstract: Dynamic-shape tensor computation poses challenges for shape-specific compilation due to variable input dimensions. Existing compilers rely on shape samples, incurring high tuning costs and performance degradation on unseen inputs. We present Helix, a dynamic tensor compilation framework with sample-free compilation and architecture-guided optimization to achieve both compilation efficiency and shape-general performance. To avoid shape sampling, Helix constructs shape-agnostic compilation by decomposing computations across architectural layers. A bidirectional strategy combines top-down abstraction to align tensor computations with architectural hierarchies, and bottom-up kernel construction to build efficient execution strategies from reusable, architecture-aligned micro-kernels. A hybrid analyzer ensures accuracy through profiling at lower architectural levels, and achieves scalability through architecture-informed modeling at higher levels and runtime. This hierarchical design eliminates shape-specific tuning and enables shape-adaptive execution. Evaluations conducted on x86 CPUs, ARM CPUs, and NVIDIA GPUs demonstrate that Helix reduces compilation time by 174 × over the existing compilers and delivers 2.26 × and 3.29 × execution speedups over vendor libraries and dynamic-shape compilers, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于输入维度可变，动态形状张量计算对特定形状的编译提出了挑战。现有的编译器依赖于形状样本，这会导致高昂的调优成本和看不见的输入的性能下降。我们推出了 Helix，一种动态张量编译框架，具有无样本编译和架构引导优化功能，可同时实现编译效率和形状通用性能。为了避免形状采样，Helix 通过跨架构层分解计算来构建与形状无关的编译。双向策略结合了自上而下的抽象，使张量计算与架构层次结构保持一致，并结合自下而上的内核构造，从可重用、架构一致的微内核构建高效的执行策略。混合分析器通过在较低架构级别进行分析来确保准确性，并通过在较高级别和运行时进行基于架构的建模来实现可扩展性。这种分层设计消除了特定于形状的调整，并实现了形状自适应执行。对 x86 CPU、ARM CPU 和 NVIDIA GPU 进行的评估表明，与现有编译器相比，Helix 将编译时间缩短了 174 倍，并且与供应商库和动态形状编译器相比，执行速度分别提高了 2.26 倍和 3.29 倍。

papers.title: A Simulation Framework for Workload Management in Hybrid Quantum-HPC Cloud System.
papers.abstract: The convergence of quantum computing and high-performance computing (HPC) is giving rise to hybrid cloud platforms that coordinate workflows across classical and quantum resources. These heterogeneous environments introduce new challenges for workload management, including device variability, noise-prone quantum processors, and the need for synchronized orchestration across distributed systems. This survey reviews state-of-the-art techniques for scheduling, resource allocation, and workflow management in classical HPC, quantum clouds, and emerging hybrid infrastructures. A taxonomy is proposed to categorize workload management approaches by scheduling strategy, allocation model, orchestration mechanism, and performance metric. We present HybridCloudSim, a novel simulation framework designed to model hybrid quantum–HPC cloud environments and optimize resource usage under realistic constraints. HybridCloudSim is a conceptual foundation and a practical tool for advancing workload management in hybrid quantum–HPC systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子计算和高性能计算 (HPC) 的融合催生了混合云平台，可以协调经典资源和量子资源的工作流程。这些异构环境给工作负载管理带来了新的挑战，包括设备可变性、容易产生噪声的量子处理器以及跨分布式系统同步编排的需求。这项调查回顾了经典 HPC、量子云和新兴混合基础设施中调度、资源分配和工作流管理的最先进技术。提出了一种分类法，通过调度策略、分配模型、编排机制和性能指标对工作负载管理方法进行分类。我们推出了 HybridCloudSim，这是一种新颖的模拟框架，旨在对混合量子 HPC 云环境进行建模并在现实约束下优化资源使用。 HybridCloudSim 是一个概念基础和实用工具，用于推进混合量子 HPC 系统中的工作负载管理。

papers.title: A Streaming Collectives Interface Targeting Dataflow Acceleration and HPC Workloads.
papers.abstract: Dataflow accelerators can provide energy efficient and high-performance alternatives to current popular architectures. However, little work has been done to enable accelerator-initiated, scalable collective communication for these architectures. We develop a High Level Synthesis (HLS) interface to bridge this gap through software-hardware co-design. Given the tendency of dataflow applications to use reads and writes to streams to express data transfer, we develop a streaming interface implementing fine-grained transfers to the host processor. Data can then be communicated through MPI and transferred to the receiving accelerator. As a result, the interface uses few hardware resources for communication. As a case study, we enhance the HPL benchmark from HPCC_FPGA with our contributions. We evaluate our final design on up to 16 FPGAs, achieving up to 18% improvement in application throughput and 36% reduced latency in kernel execution. Additionally, we design a stencil benchmark that showcases superlinear speedup in a strong scaling scenario.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据流加速器可以为当前流行的架构提供节能和高性能的替代方案。然而，在为这些架构启用加速器发起的、可扩展的集体通信方面，几乎没有做任何工作。我们开发了一个高级综合（HLS）接口，通过软件-硬件协同设计来弥补这一差距。鉴于数据流应用程序使用对流的读取和写入来表达数据传输的趋势，我们开发了一个流接口，实现到主机处理器的细粒度传输。然后数据可以通过 MPI 进行通信并传输到接收加速器。因此，该接口使用很少的硬件资源进行通信。作为案例研究，我们通过我们的贡献增强了 HPCC_FPGA 的 HPL 基准。我们在多达 16 个 FPGA 上评估了我们的最终设计，实现了应用吞吐量高达 18% 的提升以及内核执行延迟降低了 36%。此外，我们设计了一个模板基准，展示了在强大的缩放场景中的超线性加速。

papers.title: A Study of Performance Portability of Low-bit Fused Matrix-Vector Multiplication Kernels in SYCL.
papers.abstract: Understanding the causes of performance gaps between a portable programming model and a vendor-specific programming model is important for improving performance portability. This paper studies performance portability of low-bit fused general matrix-vector multiplication kernels in SYCL on vendors’ graphics processing units (GPUs). This work introduces the use case, explains the kernel implementations in detail, evaluates the performance of the CUDA, HIP, and SYCL kernels on datacenter, desktop, and laptop GPUs, and investigates the causes of performance gaps. The results show that loop unrolling, kernel dispatch overhead, and sum reduction contribute to the gaps.
papers.abstract_zh: 了解可移植编程模型和特定于供应商的编程模型之间性能差距的原因对于提高性能可移植性非常重要。本文研究了 SYCL 中低位融合通用矩阵向量乘法内核在供应商图形处理单元 (GPU) 上的性能可移植性。这项工作介绍了用例，详细解释了内核实现，评估了数据中心、台式机和笔记本电脑 GPU 上的 CUDA、HIP 和 SYCL 内核的性能，并调查了性能差距的原因。结果表明，循环展开、内核分派开销和总和减少导致了差距。

papers.title: A Workflow for Error Analysis for Drug Response Prediction via Statistical Standardization and Distribution Analysis.
papers.abstract: Drug response prediction is a promising approach to apply machine learning to the development of drugs for a range of cancer types. This method can be used to pre-screen potential drugs, perform high-throughput screening of drug databases, or perform more generalized tasks in machine learning. In an idealized real-world clinical situation, the overall solution must produce a short list of the most promising drugs for a particular patient medical situation. Promising drugs for a given case, however, are very rare, making model performance in this space very difficult. Thus, a great deal of supporting infrastructure must be developed to make this possible, including obtaining and curating datasets, large cross-validation training studies, and post-training inference and analysis. Herein, we describe a new approach for dealing with the rare drug problem, and implement a portable workflow that explores one proposed strategy for addressing it, with results from the exascale supercomputer Aurora.
papers.abstract_zh: 药物反应预测是将机器学习应用于多种癌症类型药物开发的一种有前途的方法。该方法可用于预筛选潜在药物、对药物数据库进行高通量筛选或在机器学习中执行更通用的任务。在理想化的现实临床情况下，整体解决方案必须针对特定患者的医疗情况产生最有希望的药物的简短清单。然而，针对特定病例有前景的药物非常罕见，这使得该领域的模型表现非常困难。因此，必须开发大量的支持基础设施来实现这一点，包括获取和整理数据集、大型交叉验证训练研究以及训练后推理和分析。在此，我们描述了一种处理罕见毒品问题的新方法，并实施了一个便携式工作流程，利用百亿亿级超级计算机 Aurora 的结果探索解决该问题的拟议策略。

papers.title: Ab-initio Quantum Transport with the GW Approximation, 42, 240 Atoms, and Sustained Exascale Performance.
Accelerated Spatio-Temporal Bayesian Modeling for Multivariate Gaussian Processes.
papers.abstract: Multivariate Gaussian processes (GPs) offer a powerful probabilistic framework to represent complex interdependent phenomena. They pose, however, significant computational challenges in high-dimensional settings, which frequently arise in spatio-temporal applications. We present DALIA, a highly scalable framework for performing Bayesian inference tasks on spatio-temporal multivariate GPs, based on the methodology of integrated nested Laplace approximations. Our approach relies on a sparse inverse covariance matrix formulation of the GP, puts forward a GPU-accelerated block-dense approach, and introduces a hierarchical, triple-layer, distributed-memory parallel scheme. We showcase weak-scaling performance surpassing the state of the art by two orders of magnitude on a model whose parameter space is 8 × larger and measure strong-scaling speedups of three orders of magnitude when running on 496 GH200 superchips on the Alps supercomputer. Applying DALIA to an air pollution study over northern Italy spanning 48 days, we showcase refined spatial resolutions over the aggregated pollutant measurements.
papers.abstract_zh: 多元高斯过程 (GP) 提供了强大的概率框架来表示复杂的相互依赖的现象。然而，它们在高维设置中提出了重大的计算挑战，这在时空应用中经常出现。我们提出了 DALIA，一个高度可扩展的框架，用于基于集成嵌套拉普拉斯近似的方法在时空多元 GP 上执行贝叶斯推理任务。我们的方法依赖于 GP 的稀疏逆协方差矩阵公式，提出了 GPU 加速的块密集方法，并引入了分层、三层、分布式内存并行方案。我们在参数空间大 8 倍的模型上展示了超越现有技术两个数量级的弱扩展性能，并在 Alps 超级计算机上的 496 个 GH200 超级芯片上运行时测量了三个数量级的强扩展加速。我们将 DALIA 应用于意大利北部为期 48 天的空气污染研究，展示了聚合污染物测量结果的精细空间分辨率。

papers.title: Accelerating Advanced Light Source Science Through Multi-Facility HPC Workflows.
papers.abstract: Synchrotron light sources support a wide array of techniques to investigate materials, often producing complex, high-volume data that challenge traditional workflows. At the Advanced Light Source (ALS), we developed infrastructure to move microtomography data over ESnet to ALCF and NERSC, where CPU- and GPU-based algorithms generate 3D reconstructed volumes of experimental samples. We employ two data movement and reconstruction models: real-time processing as data streams directly to NERSC compute nodes, and automated file transfer to NERSC and ALCF file systems. The streaming pipeline provides users with feedback in under ten seconds, while the file-based workflow produces high-quality reconstructions suitable for deeper analysis in 20-30 minutes. This infrastructure enables users to utilize HPC resources without direct access to backend systems. We plan to extend this architecture to more endstations, supporting our beamline scientists and users.
papers.abstract_zh: 同步加速器光源支持多种材料研究技术，通常会产生挑战传统工作流程的复杂、大量数据。在高级光源 (ALS)，我们开发了基础设施，可通过 ESnet 将显微断层扫描数据移动到 ALCF 和 NERSC，其中基于 CPU 和 GPU 的算法生成实验样本的 3D 重建体积。我们采用两种数据移动和重建模型：实时处理数据流直接传输到 NERSC 计算节点，以及自动将文件传输到 NERSC 和 ALCF 文件系统。流式传输管道在 10 秒内为用户提供反馈，而基于文件的工作流程可在 20-30 分钟内生成适合更深入分析的高质量重建。该基础设施使用户能够利用 HPC 资源，而无需直接访问后端系统。我们计划将此架构扩展到更多终端站，为我们的光束线科学家和用户提供支持。

papers.title: Accelerating Gravitational N-Body Simulations Using the RISC-V-Based Tenstorrent Wormhole.
papers.abstract: Although originally developed primarily for artificial intelligence workloads, RISC-V-based accelerators are also emerging as attractive platforms for high-performance scientific computing. In this work, we present our approach to accelerating an astrophysical N-body code on the RISC-V-based Wormhole n300 card developed by Tenstorrent. Our results show that this platform can be highly competitive for astrophysical simulations employing this class of algorithms, delivering more than a 2 × speedup and approximately 2 × energy savings compared to a highly optimized CPU implementation of the same code.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管最初主要是为人工智能工作负载而开发的，但基于 RISC-V 的加速器也正在成为高性能科学计算的有吸引力的平台。在这项工作中，我们提出了在 Tenstorrent 开发的基于 RISC-V 的 Wormhole n300 卡上加速天体物理 N 体代码的方法。我们的结果表明，该平台对于采用此类算法的天体物理模拟具有很强的竞争力，与相同代码的高度优化的 CPU 实现相比，可提供超过 2 倍的加速和大约 2 倍的节能。

papers.title: Accelerating Intra-Node GPU Communication: A Performance Model for Multi-Path Transfers.
papers.abstract: Optimizing GPU-to-GPU communication is a key challenge for improving performance in MPI-based HPC applications, especially when utilizing multiple communication paths. This paper presents a novel performance model for intra-node multi-path GPU communication within the MPI+UCX framework, aimed at determining the optimal configuration for distributing a single P2P communication across multiple paths. By considering factors such as link bandwidth, pipeline overhead, and stream synchronization, the model identifies an efficient path distribution strategy, reducing communication overhead and increasing throughput. Through extensive experiments on various topologies, we demonstrate that our model accurately finds experimentally optimal configurations, achieving significant improvements in performance, with the average of less than 6% error in predicting the optimal configuration for very large messages.
papers.abstract_zh: 优化 GPU 到 GPU 的通信是提高基于 MPI 的 HPC 应用程序性能的一个关键挑战，尤其是在利用多个通信路径时。本文提出了一种在 MPI+UCX 框架内节点内多路径 GPU 通信的新颖性能模型，旨在确定跨多个路径分布单个 P2P 通信的最佳配置。通过考虑链路带宽、管道开销和流同步等因素，该模型确定了有效的路径分配策略，从而减少了通信开销并提高了吞吐量。通过对各种拓扑的大量实验，我们证明我们的模型准确地找到了实验上的最佳配置，实现了性能的显着改进，在预测非常大的消息的最佳配置时平均误差低于 6%。

papers.title: ACTINA: Adapting Circuit-Switching Techniques for AI Networking Architectures.
papers.abstract: While traditional datacenters rely on static, electrically switched fabrics, Optical Circuit Switch (OCS)-enabled reconfigurable networks offer dynamic bandwidth allocation and lower power consumption. This work introduces a quantitative framework for evaluating reconfigurable networks in large-scale AI systems, guiding the adoption of various OCS and link technologies by analyzing trade-offs in reconfiguration latency, link bandwidth provisioning, and OCS placement. Using this framework, we develop two in-workload reconfiguration strategies and propose an OCS-enabled, multi-dimensional all-to-all topology that supports hybrid parallelism with improved energy efficiency. Our evaluation demonstrates that with state-of-the-art per-GPU bandwidth, the optimal in-workload strategy achieves up to 2.3 × improvement over the commonly used one-shot approach when reconfiguration latency is low (<100 μ s). However, with sufficiently high bandwidth, one-shot reconfiguration can achieve comparable performance without requiring in-workload reconfiguration. Additionally, our proposed topology improves performance–power efficiency, achieving up to 1.75 × better trade-offs than Fat-Tree and 3D-Torus–based OCS network architectures.
papers.abstract_zh: 传统数据中心依赖于静态的电交换结构，而支持光电路交换 (OCS) 的可重构网络可提供动态带宽分配和更低的功耗。这项工作引入了一个用于评估大规模人工智能系统中可重构网络的定量框架，通过分析重新配置延迟、链路带宽配置和 OCS 布局之间的权衡来指导各种 OCS 和链路技术的采用。使用该框架，我们开发了两种工作负载内重新配置策略，并提出了一种支持 OCS 的多维全对全拓扑，该拓扑支持混合并行性并提高了能源效率。我们的评估表明，凭借最先进的每 GPU 带宽，当重新配置延迟较低（<100 μs）时，最佳工作负载策略比常用的一次性方法可实现高达 2.3 倍的改进。然而，如果带宽足够高，一次性重新配置就可以实现相当的性能，而无需在工作负载中重新配置。此外，我们提出的拓扑提高了性能-功率效率，实现了比基于 Fat-Tree 和 3D-Torus 的 OCS 网络架构高达 1.75 倍的更好权衡。

papers.title: Adapting Classic Scheduling Heuristics for Online Execution under Uncertainty.
papers.abstract: We present an automated framework for online task scheduling on heterogeneous distributed systems, building on a modular parametric scheduler that enables dynamic scheduling decisions based on evolving execution states. Inspired by classical list-scheduling strategies such as HEFT and CPoP, our online scheduler simulates real-time task scheduling using only partial task graph knowledge. We evaluate our online scheduler variants against both their traditional offline baselines and a naive online strategy using a large-scale benchmark suite of real-world scientific workflows. Experimental results across different estimation methods and compute-to-communication ratio (CCR) settings show that our adaptive online schedulers consistently outperform the naive approach, achieving performance within approximately 3–5% of an ideal offline scheduler that has full future knowledge (compared to the approximately 10% overhead for the naive baseline).
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个用于异构分布式系统上在线任务调度的自动化框架，该框架建立在模块化参数调度器的基础上，该调度器能够根据不断变化的执行状态进行动态调度决策。受到 HEFT 和 CPoP 等经典列表调度策略的启发，我们的在线调度程序仅使用部分任务图知识来模拟实时任务调度。我们使用现实世界科学工作流程的大规模基准套件，根据传统的离线基线和简单的在线策略来评估我们的在线调度程序变体。不同估计方法和计算通信比 (CCR) 设置的实验结果表明，我们的自适应在线调度程序始终优于朴素方法，其性能与具有完整未来知识的理想离线调度程序的性能相差约 3-5%（相比之下，朴素基线的开销约为 10%）。

papers.title: Adapting scientific streaming inference workflows for a deterministic tensor processing unit.
papers.abstract: The realization of real-time data processing near X-ray detectors presents ongoing challenges due to long ASIC development cycles and the limited computational capacity of near-detector FPGAs. We propose a hybrid solution that streams data directly to a deterministic tensor processing unit (i.e., Groq AI accelerator), enabling low-latency, high-throughput inference. This paper describes the system architecture, supporting software stack, and performance projections, demonstrating the advantages of this hybrid platform for future X-ray imaging systems. This integration shows promise for advancing real-time edge computing and enabling intelligent control in photon science experiments. A single inference on a 128 × 128 image, including image transfer time, completes in 156.06 μ s, enabling approximately 6.4 kHz processing with the edgePtychoNN model and improving experimental-in-the-loop computing. Using this system, we achieve a 3.6 × speedup over previous systems, highlighting the potential of this approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于 ASIC 开发周期长以及近探测器 FPGA 的计算能力有限，实现 X 射线探测器附近的实时数据处理面临着持续的挑战。我们提出了一种混合解决方案，将数据直接流式传输到确定性张量处理单元（即 Groq AI 加速器），从而实现低延迟、高吞吐量推理。本文描述了系统架构、支持软件堆栈和性能预测，展示了该混合平台对于未来 X 射线成像系统的优势。这种集成显示了推进实时边缘计算和在光子科学实验中实现智能控制的前景。对 128 × 128 图像的单次推理（包括图像传输时间）可在 156.06 μs 内完成，从而能够使用 edgePtychoNN 模型进行约 6.4 kHz 的处理，并改进实验在环计算。使用该系统，我们比以前的系统实现了 3.6 倍的加速，凸显了这种方法的潜力。

papers.title: Addressing Reproducibility Challenges in HPC with Continuous Integration.
papers.abstract: The high-performance computing (HPC) community has adopted incentive structures to motivate reproducible research, with major conferences awarding badges to papers that meet reproducibility requirements. Yet, many papers do not meet such requirements. The uniqueness of HPC infrastructure and software, coupled with strict access requirements, may limit opportunities for reproducibility. In the absence of resource access, we believe that regular documented testing, through continuous integration (CI), coupled with complete provenance information, can be used as a substitute. Here, we argue that better HPC-compliant CI solutions will improve reproducibility of applications. We present a survey of reproducibility initiatives and describe the barriers to reproducibility in HPC. To address existing limitations, we present a GitHub Action, CORRECT, that enables secure execution of tests on remote HPC resources. We evaluate CORRECT’s usability across three different types of HPC applications, demonstrating the effectiveness of using CORRECT for automating and documenting reproducibility evaluations.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 社区已采用激励结构来激励可重复性研究，大型会议会向满足可重复性要求的论文颁发徽章。然而，许多论文不符合这些要求。 HPC 基础设施和软件的独特性，加上严格的访问要求，可能会限制再现性的机会。在无法访问资源的情况下，我们相信通过持续集成 (CI) 进行的定期记录测试以及完整的来源信息可以作为替代方案。在这里，我们认为更好的符​​合 HPC 的 CI 解决方案将提高应用程序的可重复性。我们对可重复性计划进行了调查，并描述了 HPC 中可重复性的障碍。为了解决现有的限制，我们提出了一个 GitHub 操作 CORRECT，它可以在远程 HPC 资源上安全执行测试。我们评估了 CORRECT 在三种不同类型的 HPC 应用程序中的可用性，证明了使用 CORRECT 来自动化和记录再现性评估的有效性。

papers.title: Advancing Quantum Many-Body GW Calculations on Exascale Supercomputing Platforms.
papers.abstract: Advanced ab initio materials simulations face growing challenges as increasing systems and phenomena complexity requires higher accuracy, driving up computational demands. Quantum many-body GW methods are state-of-the-art for treating electronic excited states and couplings but often hindered due to the costly numerical complexity. Here, we present innovative implementations of advanced GW methods within the BerkeleyGW package, enabling large-scale simulations on Frontier and Aurora exascale platforms. Our approach demonstrates exceptional versatility for complex heterogeneous systems with up to 17,574 atoms, along with achieving true performance portability across GPU architectures. We demonstrate excellent strong and weak scaling to thousands of nodes, reaching double-precision core-kernel performance of 1.069 ExaFLOP/s on Frontier (9,408 nodes) and 707.52 PetaFLOP/s on Aurora (9,600 nodes), corresponding to 59.45% and 48.79% of peak, respectively. Our work demonstrates a breakthrough in utilizing exascale computing for quantum materials simulations, delivering unprecedented predictive capabilities for rational designs of future quantum technologies.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着系统和现象复杂性的增加需要更高的精度，从而提高了计算需求，先进的从头算材料模拟面临着越来越大的挑战。量子多体引力波方法是处理电子激发态和耦合的最先进方法，但由于昂贵的数值复杂性而常常受到阻碍。在这里，我们展示了 BerkeleyGW 包中先进 GW 方法的创新实现，从而能够在 Frontier 和 Aurora 百亿亿次级平台上进行大规模模拟。我们的方法展示了针对具有多达 17,574 个原子的复杂异构系统的卓越多功能性，以及跨 GPU 架构实现真正的性能可移植性。我们展示了对数千个节点的出色的强和弱扩展能力，在 Frontier（9,408 个节点）上达到 1.069 ExaFLOP/s 的双精度核心-内核性能，在 Aurora（9,600 个节点）上达到 707.52 PetaFLOP/s 的双精度核心-内核性能，分别相当于峰值的 59.45% 和 48.79%。我们的工作展示了利用亿亿级计算进行量子材料模拟的突破，为未来量子技术的合理设计提供了前所未有的预测能力。

papers.title: AERIS: Argonne Earth Systems Model for Reliable and Skillful Predictions.
papers.abstract: Generative machine learning offers new opportunities to better understand complex Earth system dynamics. Recent diffusion-based methods address spectral biases and improve ensemble calibration in weather forecasting compared to deterministic methods, yet have so far proven difficult to scale stably at high resolutions. We introduce AERIS, a 1.3 to 80B parameter pixel-level Swin diffusion transformer to address this gap, and SWiPe, a generalizable technique that composes window parallelism with sequence and pipeline parallelism to shard window-based transformers without added communication cost or increased global batch size. On Aurora (10,080 nodes), AERIS sustains 10.21 ExaFLOPS (mixed precision) and a peak performance of 11.21 ExaFLOPS with 1 × 1 patch size on the 0.25° ERA5 dataset, achieving 95.5% weak scaling efficiency, and 81.6% strong scaling efficiency. AERIS outperforms the IFS ENS and remains stable on seasonal scales to 90 days, highlighting the potential of billion-parameter diffusion models for weather and climate prediction.
papers.abstract_zh: 生成机器学习为更好地理解复杂的地球系统动力学提供了新的机会。与确定性方法相比，最近基于扩散的方法解决了光谱偏差并改进了天气预报中的集合校准，但迄今为止已证明难以在高分辨率下稳定扩展。我们引入了 AERIS（一种 1.3 至 80B 参数的像素级 Swin 扩散变压器）来解决这一差距，以及 SWiPe（一种通用技术），它将窗口并行性与序列和管道并行性组合到基于分片窗口的变压器中，而无需增加通信成本或增加全局批量大小。在 Aurora（10,080 个节点）上，AERIS 在 0.25° ERA5 数据集上维持了 10.21 ExaFLOPS（混合精度）和 1 × 1 patch 大小的 11.21 ExaFLOPS 峰值性能，实现了 95.5% 的弱扩展效率和 81.6% 的强扩展效率。 AERIS 的性能优于 IFS ENS，并且在 90 天的季节性尺度上保持稳定，凸显了十亿参数扩散模型在天气和气候预测方面的潜力。

papers.title: Agentic AI vs ML-based Autotuning: A Comparative Study for Loop Reordering Optimization.
papers.abstract: High Performance Computing (HPC) applications rely heavily on code optimizations to achieve good performance on modern CPU and GPU architectures. Traditional Machine Learning autotuning approaches have demonstrated success in exploring high-dimensional spaces, but they often require expensive compile-run evaluations and lack adaptability for large HPC applications. The recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) and Agentic AI systems raise intriguing questions about the potential of these approaches to address specific optimization methodologies. This work aims to answer an essential question for the HPC community: "How Agentic AI Systems Compare to Traditional ML Autotuning Techniques?" To address this question, we present a comparative analysis between a traditional ML-based optimization approach and an Agentic AI system, evaluating their respective capabilities and limitations for loop-level optimization. In addition, we introduced a new Agentic AI system named LoopGen-AI using three different Large Language Models: GPT-4.1, Claude 4.0, and Gemini 2.5.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 应用程序严重依赖代码优化来在现代 CPU 和 GPU 架构上实现良好的性能。传统的机器学习自动调整方法在探索高维空间方面已经取得了成功，但它们通常需要昂贵的编译运行评估，并且缺乏对大型 HPC 应用程序的适应性。大型语言模型 (LLM) 和代理人工智能系统的最新进展提出了一些有趣的问题，即这些方法解决特定优化方法的潜力。这项工作旨在回答 HPC 社区的一个基本问题：“Agentic AI 系统与传统 ML 自动调整技术相比如何？”为了解决这个问题，我们对传统的基于机器学习的优化方法和 Agentic AI 系统进行了比较分析，评估了它们各自的循环级优化能力和局限性。此外，我们还引入了一个名为 LoopGen-AI 的新 Agentic AI 系统，它使用三种不同的大型语言模型：GPT-4.1、Claude 4.0 和 Gemini 2.5。

papers.title: AGILE: Lightweight and Efficient Asynchronous GPU-SSD Integration.
papers.abstract: GPUs are critical for compute-intensive applications, yet emerging workloads such as recommender systems, graph analytics, and data analytics often exceed GPU memory capacity. Existing solutions allow GPUs to use CPU DRAM or SSDs as external memory, and the GPU-centric approach enables GPU threads to directly issue NVMe requests, further avoiding CPU intervention. However, current GPU-centric approaches adopt synchronous I/O, forcing threads to stall during long communication delays.
papers.abstract_zh: GPU 对于计算密集型应用程序至关重要，但推荐系统、图形分析和数据分析等新兴工作负载通常会超出 GPU 内存容量。现有的解决方案允许GPU使用CPU DRAM或SSD作为外部存储器，并且以GPU为中心的方法使GPU线程可以直接发出NVMe请求，进一步避免了CPU的干预。然而，当前以 GPU 为中心的方法采用同步 I/O，迫使线程在长时间通信延迟期间停止。

papers.title: AI Agents for Enabling Autonomous Experiments at ORNL's HPC and Manufacturing User Facilities.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a modular architecture for enabling autonomous cross-facility scientific experimentation using AI agents at ORNL’s HPC and manufacturing user facilities. The proposed system integrates a natural language interface powered by an LLM, a multi-agent framework for decision making, programmable facility APIs, and a provenance-aware infrastructure to support adaptive, explainable, and reproducible workflows. We demonstrate how AI agents can orchestrate and optimize additive manufacturing experiments through near real-time coordination between experimental and HPC resources. The architecture is evaluated through a realistic end-to-end workflow that employs a simulated version of the manufacturing facility, showing that the approach reduces coordination overhead and accelerates the scientific discovery process.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种模块化架构，用于在 ORNL 的 HPC 和制造用户设施中使用 AI 代理实现自主跨设施科学实验。所提出的系统集成了由法学硕士支持的自然语言界面、用于决策的多代理框架、可编程设施 API 和来源感知基础设施，以支持自适应、可解释和可重复的工作流程。我们演示了人工智能代理如何通过实验和 HPC 资源之间的近实时协调来编排和优化增材制造实验。该架构通过真实的端到端工作流程进行评估，该工作流程采用制造设施的模拟版本，表明该方法减少了协调开销并加速了科学发现过程。

papers.title: AMRaCut: Scalable Partitioning for Adaptive Mesh Refinement.
papers.abstract: Mesh partitioning is critical for scalable distributed PDE solvers. Traditional methods like spatial ordering and multi-level graph partitioning have significant tradeoffs between partition quality and parallel scalability. We present AMRaCut, a distributed-parallel mesh partitioner that bridges this gap using parallel label propagation and graph diffusion. It operates mostly locally on initial partitions, limiting inter-process communications to neighboring processes. This locality is especially effective in AMR, where mesh evolves dynamically with mostly local changes.
papers.abstract_zh: 网格划分对于可扩展的分布式 PDE 求解器至关重要。空间排序和多级图分区等传统方法在分区质量和并行可扩展性之间存在显着的权衡。我们提出了 AMRaCut，一种分布式并行网格划分器，它使用并行标签传播和图扩散来弥补这一差距。它主要在初始分区上本地运行，限制与相邻进程的进程间通信。这种局部性在 AMR 中尤其有效，其中网格随着大部分局部变化而动态演化。

papers.title: An elastic job scheduler for HPC applications on the cloud.
papers.abstract: The last few years have seen an increase in adoption of the cloud for running HPC applications. The pay-as-you-go cost model of these cloud resources has necessitated the development of specialized programming models and schedulers for HPC jobs for efficient utilization of cloud resources. A key aspect of efficient utilization is the ability to rescale applications on the fly to maximize the utilization of cloud resources. Most commonly used parallel programming models like MPI have traditionally not supported autoscaling either in a cloud environment or on supercomputers. While more recent work has been done to implement this functionality in MPI, it is still nascent and requires additional programmer effort. Charm++ is a parallel programming model that natively supports dynamic rescaling through its migratable objects paradigm. In this paper, we present a Kubernetes operator to run Charm++ applications on a Kubernetes cluster. We then present a priority-based elastic job scheduler that can dynamically rescale jobs based on the state of a Kubernetes cluster to maximize cluster utilization while minimizing response time for high-priority jobs. We show that our elastic scheduler, with the ability to rescale HPC jobs with minimal overhead, demonstrates significant performance improvements over traditional static schedulers.
papers.abstract_zh: 过去几年，越来越多地采用云来运行 HPC 应用程序。这些云资源的即用即付成本模型需要为 HPC 作业开发专门的编程模型和调度程序，以高效利用云资源。高效利用的一个关键方面是能够动态调整应用程序以最大限度地利用云资源。最常用的并行编程模型（例如 MPI）传统上不支持云环境或超级计算机上的自动缩放。虽然最近已经完成了在 MPI 中实现此功能的工作，但它仍处于初级阶段，需要程序员付出额外的努力。 Charm++ 是一种并行编程模型，通过其可迁移对象范例原生支持动态重新缩放。在本文中，我们提出了一个 Kubernetes 运算符，用于在 Kubernetes 集群上运行 Charm++ 应用程序。然后，我们提出了一个基于优先级的弹性作业调度程序，它可以根据 Kubernetes 集群的状态动态重新调整作业，以最大限度地提高集群利用率，同时最大限度地减少高优先级作业的响应时间。我们证明，我们的弹性调度程序能够以最小的开销重新调整 HPC 作业的规模，与传统静态调度程序相比，性能显着提高。

papers.title: An HPC-Inspired Blueprint for a Technology-Agnostic Quantum Middle Layer.
papers.abstract: We present a blueprint for a quantum middle layer that supports applications across various quantum technologies. Inspired by concepts and abstractions from HPC libraries and middleware, our design is backend-neutral and context-aware. A program only needs to specify its intent once as typed data and operator descriptors. It declares what the quantum registers mean and which logical transformations are required, without committing to gates, pulses, continuous-variable routines, or anneal backend. Such execution details are carried separately in a context descriptor and can change per backend without modifying the intent artifacts.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了量子中间层的蓝图，支持各种量子技术的应用。受到 HPC 库和中间件的概念和抽象的启发，我们的设计是后端中立和上下文感知的。程序只需将其意图指定为类型化数据和运算符描述符一次。它声明了量子寄存器的含义以及需要哪些逻辑转换，而无需使用门、脉冲、连续变量例程或退火后端。此类执行细节在上下文描述符中单独携带，并且可以根据后端进行更改，而无需修改意图工件。

papers.title: An Interactive Agentic HPC Tutor for Lesson Planning, Teaching, and Assessment.
papers.abstract: High-performance computing (HPC) education is at an inflection point, driven by agentic systems and “prompt-engineering” as a form of programming. We describe an interactive tutor built from autonomous LLM-based agents, each with a narrow role: planning lessons, explaining concepts, scaffolding code, and executing runs. Using open-source toolkits and locally hosted models on leadership-class supercomputers, the tutor lets educators generate and refine parallel-programming examples in real time without external APIs or subscription fees. Complex workflows are composed through structured prompts rather than traditional source code, while per-agent history summarization prevents context-window overflow and enables self-correcting code generation. Requiring no proprietary services, the platform is immediately deployable in institutional HPC environments and scales from single-user sessions to classroom labs. Beyond a teaching aid, it illustrates how prompt-driven, multi-agent software can deliver dynamic, personalized, and extensible learning experiences across technical domains.
papers.abstract_zh: 在代理系统和作为一种编程形式的“即时工程”的推动下，高性能计算 (HPC) 教育正处于拐点。我们描述了一个由基于 LLM 的自主代理构建的交互式导师，每个代理都有一个狭窄的角色：规划课程、解释概念、搭建代码和执行运行。该导师使用开源工具包和领先级超级计算机上的本地托管模型，让教育工作者可以实时生成和完善并行编程示例，而无需外部 API 或订阅费。复杂的工作流程是通过结构化提示而不是传统的源代码组成的，而每个代理的历史摘要可以防止上下文窗口溢出并实现自我更正代码生成。该平台无需专有服务，可立即部署在机构 HPC 环境中，并可从单用户会话扩展到课堂实验室。除了教学辅助工具之外，它还说明了提示驱动的多代理软件如何跨技术领域提供动态、个性化和可扩展的学习体验。

papers.title: An MLIR pipeline for offloading Fortran to FPGAs via OpenMP.
papers.abstract: With the slowing of Moore’s Law, heterogeneous computing platforms such as Field-Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) have gained increasing interest for accelerating HPC workloads. In this work we present, to the best of our knowledge, the first implementation of selective code offloading to FPGAs via the OpenMP target directive within MLIR. Our approach combines the MLIR OpenMP dialect with a High-Level Synthesis (HLS) dialect to provide a portable compilation flow targeting FPGAs. Unlike prior OpenMP FPGA efforts that rely on custom compilers, by contrast we integrate with MLIR and so support any MLIR-compatible front end, demonstrated here with Flang. Building upon a range of existing MLIR building blocks significantly reduces the effort required and demonstrates the composability benefits of the MLIR ecosystem. Our approach supports manual optimisation of offloaded kernels through standard OpenMP directives, and this work establishes a flexible and extensible path for directive-based FPGA acceleration integrated within the MLIR ecosystem. Code available in https://github.com/xdslproject/ftn/tree/main.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着摩尔定律的放缓，现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 等异构计算平台对于加速 HPC 工作负载越来越感兴趣。在这项工作中，据我们所知，我们首次通过 MLIR 中的 OpenMP 目标指令实现选择性代码卸载到 FPGA。我们的方法将 MLIR OpenMP 方言与高级综合 (HLS) 方言相结合，提供针对 FPGA 的可移植编译流程。与之前依赖自定义编译器的 OpenMP FPGA 工作不同，相比之下，我们与 MLIR 集成，因此支持任何与 MLIR 兼容的前端，此处通过 Flang 进行了演示。基于一系列现有 MLIR 构建模块进行构建，可显着减少所需的工作量，并展示 MLIR 生态系统的可组合性优势。我们的方法支持通过标准 OpenMP 指令手动优化卸载的内核，这项工作为集成在 MLIR 生态系统中的基于指令的 FPGA 加速建立了灵活且可扩展的路径。代码可在 https://github.com/xdslproject/ftn/tree/main 中找到。

papers.title: An Optimized Generalized Multi-Color Point Implicit Solver for Intel GPUs using OneAPI ESIMD.
papers.abstract: This paper presents an efficient implementation of a linear-solver kernel relevant to FUN3D, a suite of computational fluid dynamics software developed at NASA’s Langley Research Center. The linear solver is optimized for a range of block sizes commonly used in FUN3D. The implementation targets Aurora, the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility’s (ALCF) exascale machine featuring Intel Data Center Max 1550 GPUs. The linear solver’s performance is memory bandwidth-bound due to its low arithmetic intensity. The primary performance challenges stem from variable matrix row lengths and indirect memory access patterns inherent in unstructured-grid applications. Variable block sizes introduce additional complexity through differing levels of intra-block parallelism and the constraint of efficiently utilizing 512-bit vector registers. We propose an optimized implementation using ESIMD APIs that efficiently vectorize memory loads for block-sparse vector computations. We demonstrate that performance on the Intel 1550 GPU is within 10% of its bandwidth benchmark peak. We also compare the performance of the ESIMD kernels on Intel GPUs with CUDA-optimized implementations on NVIDIA GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了与 FUN3D 相关的线性求解器内核的有效实现，FUN3D 是 NASA 兰利研究中心开发的一套计算流体动力学软件。线性求解器针对 FUN3D 中常用的一系列块大小进行了优化。该实施针对 Aurora，阿贡领导计算设施 (ALCF) 的百亿亿次计算机，配备英特尔数据中心 Max 1550 GPU。由于算术强度较低，线性求解器的性能受到内存带宽的限制。主要的性能挑战源于非结构化网格应用中固有的可变矩阵行长度和间接内存访问模式。可变块大小通过不同级别的块内并行性以及有效利用 512 位向量寄存器的限制引入了额外的复杂性。我们提出了一种使用 ESMD API 的优化实现，该 API 可以有效地矢量化内存负载以进行块稀疏矢量计算。我们证明 Intel 1550 GPU 的性能与其带宽基准峰值相差不超过 10%。我们还比较了 Intel GPU 上的 ESMD 内核与 NVIDIA GPU 上的 CUDA 优化实现的性能。

papers.title: An RDMA-First Object Storage System with SmartNIC Offload.
papers.abstract: AI training and inference impose sustained, fine-grain I/O that stresses host-mediated, TCP-based storage paths. Motivated by kernel-bypass networking and user-space storage stacks, we revisit POSIX-compatible object storage for GPU-centric pipelines. We present ROS2, an RDMA-first object storage system design that offloads the DAOS client to an NVIDIA BlueField-3 SmartNIC while leaving the DAOS I/O engine unchanged on the storage server. ROS2 separates a lightweight control plane (gRPC for namespace and capability exchange) from a high-throughput data plane (UCX/libfabric over RDMA or TCP) and removes host mediation from the data path.
papers.abstract_zh: AI 训练和推理施加持续的细粒度 I/O，强调主机介导的、基于 TCP 的存储路径。在内核旁路网络和用户空间存储堆栈的推动下，我们重新审视以 GPU 为中心的管道的 POSIX 兼容对象存储。我们推出了 ROS2，这是一种 RDMA 优先的对象存储系统设计，可将 DAOS 客户端卸载到 NVIDIA BlueField-3 SmartNIC，同时在存储服务器上保持 DAOS I/O 引擎不变。 ROS2 将轻量级控制平面（用于命名空间和功能交换的 gRPC）与高吞吐量数据平面（基于 RDMA 或 TCP 的 UCX/libfabric）分离，并从数据路径中删除主机中介。

papers.title: Applying Surrogate Modeling to Decouple Data Collection and Analysis from Simulation for Accelerated In-Situ Analysis.
papers.abstract: Effective in-situ analysis of target variables in scientific simulations is often constrained by its tight coupling with simulation timesteps, which can degrade performance and limit adaptive control of analysis quality. This work presents a surrogate modeling approach that decouples data collection and analysis from simulation execution. The surrogate models of targeted variables are trained online using early-stage simulation data, and once well-trained, replace the simulation for targeted in-situ analysis, enabling asynchronous analysis and early termination decisions without pretraining or manual tuning. We evaluate it on various applications for different data analysis tasks. Considering training processes during early stages of the simulation, we still achieve speed-ups of 1.20 × –3.51 × compared to traditional in-situ tracking. At meantime, we keep accuracies of 83.33%–99.60% comparing with original simulation.
papers.abstract_zh: 科学模拟中目标变量的有效原位分析通常受到其与模拟时​​间步长紧密耦合​​的限制，这会降低性能并限制分析质量的自适应控制。这项工作提出了一种代理建模方法，将数据收集和分析与模拟执行分离。使用早期仿真数据在线训练目标变量的替代模型，一旦训练良好，就可以取代仿真进行有针对性的原位分析，从而无需预训练或手动调整即可实现异步分析和提前终止决策。我们在不同数据分析任务的各种应用程序上对其进行评估。考虑到模拟早期阶段的训练过程，与传统的原位跟踪相比，我们仍然实现了 1.20 × –3.51 × 的加速。同时，与原始模拟相比，我们保持了83.33%–99.60%的准确度。

papers.title: Architecting Tensor Core-Based Reductions for Irregular Molecular Docking Kernels.
papers.abstract: Tensor Cores (TCs) are specialized hardware units designed for efficient matrix multiplication and are widely utilized in deep learning workloads. However, their adoption in more irregular high-performance computing (HPC) applications remains limited. This paper presents a methodology for effectively integrating TCs into a representative HPC application: molecular docking with AutoDock-GPU. The irregular computational patterns and strict accuracy requirements of this application pose significant challenges for TC utilization. To address these, we adopt a twofold strategy: (i) accelerating sum reduction operations using TCs, and (ii) applying state-of-the-art numerical error correction (EC) techniques to maintain accuracy. Experimental evaluations on NVIDIA A100, H100, and B200 GPUs show that our CUDA-based implementation consistently outperforms the baseline while preserving algorithmic accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 张量核心 (TC) 是专为高效矩阵乘法而设计的专用硬件单元，广泛用于深度学习工作负载。然而，它们在更不规则的高性能计算 (HPC) 应用中的采用仍然有限。本文提出了一种将 TC 有效集成到代表性 HPC 应用中的方法：使用 AutoDock-GPU 进行分子对接。该应用的不规则计算模式和严格的精度要求给 TC 的利用带来了重大挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们采用双重策略：(i) 使用 TC 加速求和运算，(ii) 应用最先进的数值误差校正 (EC) 技术来保持准确性。对 NVIDIA A100、H100 和 B200 GPU 的实验评估表明，我们基于 CUDA 的实现始终优于基准，同时保持算法准确性。

papers.title: ASaP: Automatic Software Prefetching for Sparse Tensor Computations in MLIR.
papers.abstract: Sparse tensor computations suffer from irregular memory access patterns that degrade cache performance. While software prefetching can mitigate this, existing compiler approaches lack the semantic insight needed for effective optimization.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏张量计算会受到不规则内存访问模式的影响，从而降低缓存性能。虽然软件预取可以缓解这种情况，但现有的编译器方法缺乏有效优化所需的语义洞察力。

papers.title: ASCRIBE-XR: Extended Reality for Visualization of Scientific Images.
papers.abstract: We introduce ASCRIBE-XR, an immersive software application designed to accelerate the visualization and exploration of 3D dense arrays and mesh files from scientific experiments. Based on Godot and PC-VR technologies, the platform enables users to dynamically load and manipulate scientific records to dive into the structure of data. The novelty lies in the unique integration at the system level, combining disparate technologies, such as VR, HPC, and AI-driven object modeling for scientific visualization. Its integration with HPC resources grants remote processing of large-scale data with results streamed directly into the VR environment. The program’s multi-user capabilities, enabled through WebRTC and MQTT, allow multiple users to share data and visualize together in real-time, promoting a more interactive and engaging research experience. We describe the design and implementation of ASCRIBE-XR, highlighting its key features and capabilities. We also include examples of its application and discuss the potential benefits to the scientific community.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 ASCRIBE-XR，这是一款沉浸式软件应用程序，旨在加速科学实验中 3D 密集阵列和网格文件的可视化和探索。该平台基于Godot和PC-VR技术，使用户能够动态加载和操作科学记录以深入了解数据结构。新颖之处在于系统级别的独特集成，结合了不同的技术，例如 VR、HPC 和用于科学可视化的人工智能驱动的对象建模。它与 HPC 资源的集成可以远程处理大规模数据，并将结果直接传输到 VR 环境中。该程序的多用户功能通过 WebRTC 和 MQTT 实现，允许多个用户实时共享数据和可视化，从而促进更具互动性和吸引力的研究体验。我们描述了 ASCRIBE-XR 的设计和实现，重点介绍了其主要特性和功能。我们还提供了其应用示例，并讨论了它对科学界的潜在好处。

papers.title: AskHPC: A ChatBot for High Performance Computing User Support.
papers.abstract: High-Performance Computing (HPC) systems in the exascale era are increasingly heterogeneous, requiring users to navigate diverse tools, configurations, and best practices. However, essential information is often scattered across fragmented, multimodal documentation, making it difficult and time-consuming to locate. To address this, we present AskHPC, an intelligent question-answering ChatBot that delivers accurate, timely, and accessible information through a unified conversational interface. Built on a curated knowledge base integrating user guides, scheduler manuals, and programming documentation, AskHPC leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) within a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework. It employs two key techniques to improve HPC query responses: a modality-aware document parsing pipeline that preserves multimodal structure, and a dual-context strategy combining retrieved content (e.g., complete code blocks) with LLM-generated semantics. Evaluation, including a real-world user study, shows AskHPC outperforms direct LLM queries and vanilla RAG systems, enhancing user support and accelerating HPC software development.
papers.abstract_zh: 百亿亿次时代的高性能计算 (HPC) 系统越来越异构，要求用户使用不同的工具、配置和最佳实践。然而，重要信息通常分散在零散的多模式文档中，使得定位变得困难且耗时。为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 AskHPC，这是一种智能问答聊天机器人，可以通过统一的对话界面提供准确、及时且可访问的信息。 AskHPC 建立在集成用户指南、调度程序手册和编程文档的精选知识库之上，在检索增强生成 (RAG) 框架内利用大型语言模型 (LLM)。它采用两项关键技术来改进 HPC 查询响应：保留多模态结构的模态感知文档解析管道，以及将检索到的内容（例如完整代码块）与 LLM 生成的语义相结合的双上下文策略。包括真实用户研究在内的评估表明，AskHPC 的性能优于直接 LLM 查询和普通 RAG 系统，从而增强了用户支持并加速了 HPC 软件开发。

papers.title: Assessing a RISC-V Accelerator for Cross-Section Lookup in Chipyard.
papers.abstract: High-fidelity nuclear reactor simulations using Monte Carlo neutron transport face bottlenecks in neutron cross-section lookups. We designed a custom RISC-V accelerator for RSBench, integrated with a RocketCore in Chipyard. The pipelined design employs Humlíček’s 8th-order rational approximation to efficiently compute the Faddeeva function during Doppler broadening of multipole cross section data, which forms the inner loop of the program, achieving a 17× cycle reduction for Faddeeva computations and 34.2× for the loop compared to RISC-V software, with similar gains over Intel Core i5 Tiger Lake-U, yielding a 10× wall-clock time improvement. Chipyard’s software-based environment benefits the HPC community by enabling accelerator evaluation. These results highlight RISC-V’s potential for HPC through custom accelerators and code portability. Future work will optimize operating frequency and extend to additional simulation kernels.
papers.abstract_zh: 使用蒙特卡罗中子输运的高保真核反应堆模拟面临着中子截面查找的瓶颈。我们为 RSBench 设计了一个定制的 RISC-V 加速器，与 Chipyard 中的 RocketCore 集成。流水线设计采用 Humlíček 的 8 阶有理逼近法，在多极截面数据的多普勒展宽过程中高效计算 Faddeeva 函数，形成程序的内部循环，与 RISC-V 软件相比，Faddeeva 计算周期减少了 17 倍，循环周期减少了 34.2 倍，与英特尔酷睿 i5 Tiger Lake-U 相比，增益类似，挂钟时间缩短了 10 倍。 Chipyard 基于软件的环境通过支持加速器评估使 HPC 社区受益。这些结果凸显了 RISC-V 通过定制加速器和代码可移植性在 HPC 方面的潜力。未来的工作将优化运行频率并扩展到其他模拟内核。

papers.title: Assessing Page Reclamation Mechanisms for Linux.
papers.abstract: Page reclamation is critical for system performance. However, understanding and quantifying inner workings of reclamation policies remains challenging. In this work, we present a comprehensive analysis of Linux’s Two-Queue LRU (2QLRU) and Multi-Generational LRU (MGLRU) policies using a lightweight profiler that measures decision overhead and reclamation effectiveness. Across seven diverse applications under various memory constraints, we quantify how MGLRU achieves better reclamation decisions despite its higher decision making cost, while its performance benefits diminish under severe memory constraint. These insights provide guidance for future memory management optimizations.
papers.abstract_zh: 页面回收对于系统性能至关重要。然而，理解和量化填海政策的内部运作仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们使用轻量级分析器来衡量决策开销和回收有效性，对 Linux 的双队列 LRU (2QLRU) 和多代 LRU (MGLRU) 策略进行了全面分析。在各种内存限制下的七个不同应用程序中，我们量化了 MGLRU 如何实现更好的回收决策，尽管其决策成本较高，而其性能优势在严重的内存限制下会减弱。这些见解为未来的内存管理优化提供了指导。

papers.title: ATLAHS: An Application-centric Network Simulator Toolchain for AI, HPC, and Distributed Storage.
papers.abstract: Network simulators play a crucial role in evaluating the performance of large-scale systems. However, existing simulators rely heavily on synthetic microbenchmarks or narrowly focus on specific domains, limiting their ability to provide comprehensive performance insights. In this work, we introduce ATLAHS, a flexible, extensible, and open-source toolchain designed to trace real-world applications and accurately simulate their workloads. ATLAHS leverages the Group Operation Assembly Language (GOAL) format to model communication and computation patterns in AI, HPC, and distributed storage applications. It supports multiple network simulation backends and handles multi-job and multi-tenant scenarios. Through extensive validation, we demonstrate that ATLAHS achieves high accuracy in simulating realistic workloads (consistently less than 5% error), while significantly outperforming AstraSim, the current state-of-the-art AI systems simulator, in terms of both simulation runtime and trace size efficiency. We further illustrate ATLAHS’s utility via detailed case studies, highlighting the impact of congestion control algorithms on the performance of distributed storage systems, as well as the influence of job-placement strategies on application runtimes.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络模拟器在评估大型系统的性能方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，现有的模拟器严重依赖合成微基准或狭隘地关注特定领域，限制了它们提供全面性能洞察的能力。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 ATLAHS，这是一个灵活、可扩展的开源工具链，旨在跟踪现实世界的应用程序并准确模拟其工作负载。 ATLAHS 利用组操作汇编语言 (GOAL) 格式对 AI、HPC 和分布式存储应用程序中的通信和计算模式进行建模。它支持多个网络模拟后端并处理多作业和多租户场景。通过广泛的验证，我们证明 ATLAHS 在模拟实际工作负载方面实现了高精度（误差始终低于 5%），同时在模拟运行时间和迹线大小效率方面显着优于当前最先进的 AI 系统模拟器 AstraSim。我们通过详细的案例研究进一步说明 ATLAHS 的实用性，强调拥塞控制算法对分布式存储系统性能的影响，以及作业分配策略对应用程序运行时的影响。

papers.title: Augmenting Simulated Noisy Quantum Data Collection by Orders of Magnitude Using Pre-Trajectory Sampling with Batched Execution.
papers.abstract: Classically simulating quantum systems is challenging, as even noiseless n-qubit quantum states scale as 2n. The complexity of noisy quantum systems is even greater, requiring 2n × 2n-dimensional density matrices. Various approximations reduce density matrix overhead, including quantum trajectory-based methods, which instead use an ensemble of m ≪ 2n noisy states. While this method is dramatically more efficient, current implementations use unoptimized sampling, redundant state preparation, and single-shot data collection. In this manuscript, we present the Pre-Trajectory Sampling technique, increasing the efficiency and utility of trajectory simulations by tailoring error types, batching sampling without redundant computation, and collecting error information. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method with both a mature statevector simulation of a 35-qubit quantum error-correction code and a preliminary tensor network simulation of 85 qubits, yielding speedups of up to 106x and 16x, as well as generating massive datasets of one trillion and one million shots, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 经典模拟量子系统具有挑战性，因为即使是无噪声的 n 量子位量子态规模也可达 2n。有噪声的量子系统的复杂性甚至更大，需要 2n × 2n 维密度矩阵。各种近似减少了密度矩阵开销，包括基于量子轨迹的方法，该方法使用 m < 2n 个噪声状态的集合。虽然这种方法的效率显着提高，但当前的实现使用未优化的采样、冗余状态准备和单次数据收集。在这篇手稿中，我们提出了预轨迹采样技术，通过定制错误类型、无需冗余计算的批量采样以及收集错误信息来提高轨迹模拟的效率和实用性。我们通过 35 量子位量子纠错码的成熟状态向量模拟和 85 量子位的初步张量网络模拟来证明我们方法的有效性，分别产生高达 106 倍和 16 倍的加速，并分别生成一万亿和一百万次的海量数据集。

papers.title: Aurora Acceptance: A Collaborative Exascale Test Harness.
papers.abstract: The Aurora exascale system is the latest supercomputer deployed at the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility (ALCF). Successfully deploying a leadership class system is the result of years of effort both by the facility and the vendor. This extensive collaboration culminates with the successful completion of acceptance testing, a necessary step to prepare the system for general access, ensuring that the system is stable, accurate, and performant for scientific discovery.
papers.abstract_zh: Aurora exascale 系统是阿贡领导计算设施 (ALCF) 部署的最新超级计算机。成功部署领导级系统是设施和供应商多年努力的结果。这种广泛的合作最终以成功完成验收测试而告终，验收测试是准备系统进行一般访问的必要步骤，确保系统稳定、准确且高性能，可用于科学发现。

papers.title: Automated MCQA Benchmarking at Scale: Evaluating Reasoning Traces as Retrieval Sources for Domain Adaptation of Small Language Models.
papers.abstract: As scientific knowledge grows at an unprecedented pace, evaluation benchmarks must evolve to reflect new discoveries and ensure language models are tested on current, diverse literature. We propose a scalable, modular framework for generating multiple-choice question-answering (MCQA) benchmarks directly from large corpora of scientific papers. Our pipeline automates every stage of MCQA creation, including PDF parsing, semantic chunking, question generation, and model evaluation. As a case study, we generate more than 16,000 MCQs from 22,000 open-access articles in radiation and cancer biology. We then evaluate a suite of small language models (1.1B–14B parameters) on these questions, comparing baseline accuracy with retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) from paper-derived semantic chunks and from reasoning traces distilled from GPT-4.1. We find that reasoning-trace retrieval consistently improves performance on both synthetic and expert-annotated benchmarks, enabling several small models to surpass GPT-4 on the 2023 Astro Radiation and Cancer Biology exam.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着科学知识以前所未有的速度增长，评​​估基准必须不断发展以反映新发现，并确保语言模型在当前多样化的文献中得到测试。我们提出了一个可扩展的模块化框架，用于直接从大型科学论文语料库生成多项选择题回答（MCQA）基准。我们的管道自动执行 MCQA 创建的每个阶段，包括 PDF 解析、语义分块、问题生成和模型评估。作为案例研究，我们从 22,000 篇放射和癌症生物学领域的开放获取文章中生成了 16,000 多个 MCQ。然后，我们针对这些问题评估一套小语言模型（1.1B-14B 参数），将基线准确性与来自论文衍生语义块和从 GPT-4.1 中提取的推理轨迹的检索增强生成 (RAG) 进行比较。我们发现推理轨迹检索持续提高了综合基准和专家注释基准的性能，使多个小型模型在 2023 年 Astro 辐射和癌症生物学考试中超越了 GPT-4。

papers.title: Automatic Generation of Mappings for Distributed Fourier Operations.
papers.abstract: The Fourier transform is an ubiquitous mathematical operation used in a multitude of scientific applications. Most distributed Fourier transform libraries provide rigid implementations that force developers of high performance applications to mold their code around the Fourier computation, omitting opportunities for minimizing communication across the Fourier transforms and the surrounding computation. In this work, we introduce a new automatic approach to generate distributed mappings for multi-dimensional Fourier operations, offering a solution to this problem. Our approach decides how to decompose, map, and schedule the computation as smaller and lower-dimensional parallel operations. We design and implement a novel non-linear iterative formulation that optimizes across Fourier and linear algebra operations. Our scheme leverages the Z3 SMT solver to minimize the number of communication steps across key MPI collectives, while selecting the grid shape. We evaluate the effectiveness of our new scheme and demonstrate 2 × -31 × speedups over coupled heFFTe and COSMA solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 傅里叶变换是一种在多种科学应用中普遍使用的数学运算。大多数分布式傅里叶变换库提供严格的实现，迫使高性能应用程序的开发人员围绕傅里叶计算塑造他们的代码，从而忽略了最小化傅里叶变换和周围计算之间的通信的机会。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新的自动方法来生成多维傅立叶运算的分布式映射，为该问题提供了解决方案。我们的方法决定如何将计算分解、映射和调度为更小、更低维的并行操作。我们设计并实现了一种新颖的非线性迭代公式，可以优化傅里叶和线性代数运算。我们的方案利用 Z3 SMT 求解器来最大限度地减少关键 MPI 集合之间的通信步骤数，同时选择网格形状。我们评估了新方案的有效性，并证明了比耦合的 heFFTe 和 COSMA 解决方案提高了 2 × -31 × 的速度。

papers.title: Balanced and Elastic End-to-end Training of Dynamic LLMs.
papers.abstract: To reduce the computational and memory overhead of Large Language Models, various approaches have been proposed. These include a) Mixture of Experts (MoEs), where token routing affects compute balance; b) gradual pruning of model parameters; c) dynamically freezing layers; d) dynamic sparse attention mechanisms; e) early exit of tokens as they pass through model layers; and f) Mixture of Depths (MoDs), where tokens bypass certain blocks. While these approaches are effective in reducing overall computation, they often introduce significant workload imbalance across workers. In many cases, this imbalance is severe enough to render the techniques impractical for large-scale distributed training, limiting their applicability to toy models due to poor efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了减少大型语言模型的计算和内存开销，已经提出了各种方法。其中包括 a) 专家混合 (MoE)，其中令牌路由影响计算平衡； b) 模型参数的逐步剪枝； c) 动态冻结层； d）动态稀疏注意力机制； e) 当令牌通过模型层时提前退出； f) 深度混合 (MoD)，其中代币绕过某些区块。虽然这些方法可以有效减少总体计算量，但它们通常会在工作人员之间带来严重的工作负载不平衡。在许多情况下，这种不平衡非常严重，以至于这些技术对于大规模分布式训练来说不切实际，由于效率低下，限制了它们在玩具模型中的适用性。

papers.title: Batch Tiling on Attention: Efficient Mixture of Experts Training on Wafer-Scale Processors.
papers.abstract: Mixture of Experts (MoE) models face significant computational bottlenecks on wafer-scale processors due to conflicting batch size requirements between attention and MLP layers. While attention mechanisms demand smaller batch sizes due to memory constraints, routable MLP layers require larger batches to achieve optimal compute density on massively parallel architectures.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于注意力层和 MLP 层之间的批量大小要求存在冲突，专家混合 (MoE) 模型在晶圆级处理器上面临着严重的计算瓶颈。虽然由于内存限制，注意力机制需要较小的批量大小，但可路由 MLP 层需要更大的批量才能在大规模并行架构上实现最佳计算密度。

papers.title: Benchmark-driven Models for Energy Analysis and Attribution of GPU-Accelerated Supercomputing.
papers.abstract: As advances in energy-efficiency become the primary limiter to increases in power-constrained supercomputing and machine learning performance, it is imperative developers, architects, and practitioners understand how modern GPUs consume energy when running HPC and ML applications. Rather than opaque coarse-grained metrics, in this paper, we develop an extensible, microbenchmark-parameterized energy model capable of attributing application energy not only by functional unit (FPU, tensor core, integer ALU) and memory level (L1, L2, HBM), but can also differentiate control energy from datapath energy. We examine trends in energy per operation among four generations of GPUs and validate our results using supercomputing and ML/AI procurement workloads. Our insights and extrapolations can be used to drive the future of CMOS and memory technologies, computer architecture research, algorithmic innovation, optimizations for power-constrained and mobile environments, and data center operations.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着能源效率的进步成为功率有限的超级计算和机器学习性能提高的主要限制因素，开发人员、架构师和从业人员必须了解现代 GPU 在运行 HPC 和 ML 应用程序时如何消耗能源。在本文中，我们开发了一种可扩展的、微基准参数化的能量模型，而不是不透明的粗粒度指标，该模型不仅能够通过功能单元（FPU、张量核心、整数 ALU）和内存级别（L1、L2、HBM）来分配应用程序能量，而且还可以区分控制能量和数据路径能量。我们研究了四代 GPU 的每次操作能耗趋势，并使用超级计算和 ML/AI 采购工作负载验证我们的结果。我们的见解和推断可用于推动 CMOS 和内存技术、计算机架构研究、算法创新、功耗受限和移动环境的优化以及数据中心运营的未来。

papers.title: Benchmarking Cutting-Edge Scientific Error-Bounded Lossy Compressors on Correlation-Based Rate-Distortion.
papers.abstract: Scientific error-bounded lossy compressors are widely used to reduce storage and I/O costs in large-scale scientific computing tasks. As various designs and frameworks of scientific error-bounded lossy compressors exist, it is critical to benchmark those compressors to help data users better understand their performances. Nevertheless, when evaluating the decompressed data quality, existing benchmarks mainly focus on error-value-based data quality metrics such as PSNR, while correlational metrics such as SSIM, Error Autocorrelation, and the Pearson Coefficients are also important metrics evaluating the quality of the compressors. In this work, we benchmark seven compressors on six representative scientific datasets, evaluating diverse data quality metrics such as PSNR, SSIM (2 different configurations), Error Autocorrelation, and Pearson Coefficient. Our results show that each existing compressor exhibits diverged performances over different metrics, and no single compressor can be advantageous on all metrics in one dataset or across all datasets in one metric. Comparing the performances of compressors on different quality metrics, we deliver some important takeaways and suggestions on how to select scientific error-bounded lossy compressors based on user requirements for data quality.
papers.abstract_zh: 科学误差有限有损压缩器广泛用于降低大规模科学计算任务中的存储和 I/O 成本。由于存在科学误差有限有损压缩器的各种设计和框架，因此对这些压缩器进行基准测试以帮助数据用户更好地了解其性能至关重要。然而，在评估解压缩数据质量时，现有基准主要关注基于误差值的数据质量指标，例如PSNR，而SSIM、误差自相关和皮尔逊系数等相关指标也是评估压缩器质量的重要指标。在这项工作中，我们在六个代表性科学数据集上对七个压缩器进行了基准测试，评估了不同的数据质量指标，例如 PSNR、SSIM（2 种不同的配置）、误差自相关和皮尔逊系数。我们的结果表明，每个现有的压缩器在不同的指标上表现出不同的性能，并且没有任何一个压缩器可以在一个数据集中的所有指标或一个指标中的所有数据集上都具有优势。通过比较压缩器在不同质量指标上的性能，我们就如何根据用户对数据质量的要求选择科学的误差有限有损压缩器提供了一些重要的结论和建议。

papers.title: Benchmarking the Cerebras Wafer Scale Engine-2 Architecture.
papers.abstract: Cerebras CS-2 system, developed for training large-scale language models, is gathering attention to utilise it for scientific applications. The Cerebras CS-2 comes with the world’s largest chip, the wafer-scale engine 2 (WSE-2). The WSE-2 has new characteristics that distinguish it from other computers, such as a massive number of small processing elements, low-latency 2D mesh topology, and a unique distributed memory architecture. By understanding this unique architecture and optimising applications for it, scientific applications can be accelerated significantly. However, its sustained performance and characteristics have not yet been fully understood. In this study, we give a benchmark study focusing on WSE-2. The objective is to examine the various performance characteristics of WSE-2 in detail, including inter-PE communication. In this paper, benchmarks of the effective computational performance and memory bandwidth are conducted, the Byte/Flop value is calculated, and a roofline model for the WSE-2 is built. Additionally, the effective communication latency of two distinct PEs and the bi-section bandwidth are measured. Our results provide a deeper understanding of the WSE-2 architecture. These new findings will contribute to further optimisation of applications through improved computational performance. To the best of our knowledge, this study is the first attempt to understand the fundamental performance of the WSE-2 architecture.
papers.abstract_zh: Cerebras CS-2 系统是为训练大规模语言模型而开发的，将其用于科学应用正引起人们的关注。 Cerebras CS-2 配备了世界上最大的芯片，晶圆级引擎 2 (WSE-2)。 WSE-2 具有区别于其他计算机的新特征，例如大量小型处理元件、低延迟 2D 网格拓扑以及独特的分布式内存架构。通过了解这种独特的架构并优化其应用程序，可以显着加速科学应用程序。然而，其持续性能和特点尚未得到充分了解。在本研究中，我们针对 WSE-2 进行了基准研究。目的是详细检查 WSE-2 的各种性能特征，包括 PE 间通信。本文对有效计算性能和内存带宽进行了基准测试，计算了 Byte/Flop 值，并建立了 WSE-2 的屋顶线模型。此外，还测量了两个不同 PE 的有效通信延迟和二分带宽。我们的结果让我们更深入地了解 WSE-2 架构。这些新发现将有助于通过提高计算性能进一步优化应用程序。据我们所知，这项研究是了解 WSE-2 架构基本性能的首次尝试。

papers.title: Beyond End-to-End: Understanding the Limits of LLMs in Scientific Problem Solving.
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are now widely used across many applications, including scientific question answering that requires combining visual and textual inputs. However, existing benchmarks in this area are mostly end-to-end, making it difficult to pinpoint where models fail. To address this gap, we design an evaluation framework that decomposes scientific question answering into subtasks for fine-grained assessment. We evaluate two MLLMs, Gemini 2.5 Pro and Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct, on questions involving high-resolution visual data. Results show that accurate answers are unattainable without scripting or tool use. Although both models can solve individual subtasks, such as mapping cities to coordinates or computing pixel positions, they often fail to integrate these abilities in end-to-end reasoning, producing large deviations. Our findings highlight the importance of benchmarks that expose reasoning bottlenecks and suggest that agent-based or multi-model approaches may be required to achieve reliable performance on complex scientific tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 多模态大语言模型 (MLLM) 现在广泛用于许多应用程序，包括需要结合视觉和文本输入的科学问答。然而，该领域现有的基准大多是端到端的，因此很难查明模型失败的地方。为了解决这一差距，我们设计了一个评估框架，将科学问答分解为细粒度评估的子任务。我们针对涉及高分辨率视觉数据的问题评估了两个 MLLM：Gemini 2.5 Pro 和 Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct。结果表明，如果不使用脚本或工具，就无法获得准确的答案。尽管这两种模型都可以解决单个子任务，例如将城市映射到坐标或计算像素位置，但它们通常无法将这些能力集成到端到端推理中，从而产生较大偏差。我们的研究结果强调了暴露推理瓶颈的基准的重要性，并表明可能需要基于代理或多模型的方法才能在复杂的科学任务上实现可靠的性能。
