papers.title: Beyond Guess and Check: Quantifying the Fidelity of Proxy Applications.
papers.abstract: Proxy applications are targeted submodels of larger parent applications, designed to represent key characteristics such as the programming model, memory usage, or communication behaviors. Proxy applications are valuable for system design and optimization, offering a more manageable and privacy-preserving alternative to analyzing the full parent application, as long as they accurately capture the characteristics of the parent applications they represent.
papers.abstract_zh: 代理应用程序是较大父应用程序的目标子模型，旨在表示关键特征，例如编程模型、内存使用或通信行为。代理应用程序对于系统设计和优化非常有价值，只要它们准确地捕获它们所代表的父应用程序的特征，就可以为分析完整的父应用程序提供更易于管理和保护隐私的替代方案。

papers.title: Bine Trees: Enhancing Collective Operations by Optimizing Communication Locality.
papers.abstract: Communication locality plays a key role in the performance of collective operations on large HPC systems, especially on oversubscribed networks where groups of nodes are fully connected internally but sparsely linked through global connections. We present Bine (binomial negabinary) trees, a family of collective algorithms that improve communication locality. Bine trees maintain the generality of binomial trees and butterflies while cutting global-link traffic by up to \(33\%\). We implement eight Bine-based collectives and evaluate them on four large-scale supercomputers with Dragonfly, Dragonfly+, oversubscribed fat-tree, and torus topologies, achieving up to 5 × speedups and consistent reductions in global-link traffic across different vector sizes and node counts.
papers.abstract_zh: 通信局部性对于大型 HPC 系统的集体操作的性能起着关键作用，特别是在超额订阅网络上，其中节点组在内部完全连接，但通过全局连接稀疏连接。我们提出了 Bine（二项式负二元）树，这是一组改进通信局部性的集体算法。 Bine 树保持了二项式树和蝴蝶的通用性，同时将全局链路流量减少了高达 \(33\%\)。我们实现了八个基于 Bine 的集合体，并在四台具有 Dragonfly、Dragonfly+、超额订阅胖树和环面拓扑的大型超级计算机上对其进行了评估，在不同向量大小和节点数量上实现了高达 5 倍的加速和一致的全局链路流量减少。

papers.title: BioR5: A Three-Layer Architecture for Biological Reasoning in Scientific AI.
papers.abstract: Biological research requires diverse reasoning modes, from phylogenetic analysis to mechanistic understanding, each demanding specific methods and data types. Current AI systems typically employ single methodologies, limiting effectiveness in complex biological domains. We present BioR5, a three-layer architecture implementing eleven distinct biological reasoning modes with intelligent triage and specialized tool integration. Layer A provides parametric memory via large language models, Layer B incorporates specialized foundation models for multimodal data, and Layer C connects external databases and computational tools. Our system features an intelligent reasoning mode selection combining keyword matching with LLM analysis to choose appropriate strategies automatically. We demonstrate the framework through toxicology specialization, integrating TX-Gemma predictions with PubChem, ToxCast, and ChEMBL data. The open-source implementation supports dynamic registration of new reasoning modes and tools, enabling collaborative development and community-driven expansion. BioR5 represents an architecture-first approach to developing reasoning-mode-aware AI systems that scale easily with new biological use cases.
papers.abstract_zh: 生物学研究需要多种推理模式，从系统发育分析到机制理解，每种推理模式都需要特定的方法和数据类型。当前的人工智能系统通常采用单一方法，限制了复杂生物领域的有效性。我们推出了 BioR5，这是一种三层架构，通过智能分类和专业工具集成实现了 11 种不同的生物推理模式。 A 层通过大型语言模型提供参数存储，B 层包含多模态数据的专用基础模型，C 层连接外部数据库和计算工具。我们的系统具有智能推理模式选择，结合关键词匹配和LLM分析，自动选择合适的策略。我们通过毒理学专业化、将 TX-Gemma 预测与 PubChem、ToxCast 和 ChEMBL 数据相结合来展示该框架。开源实现支持新推理模式和工具的动态注册，从而实现协作开发和社区驱动的扩展。 BioR5 代表了一种架构优先的方法，用于开发推理模式感知的人工智能系统，该系统可以轻松地根据新的生物用例进行扩展。

papers.title: BLAZE: Exploiting Hybrid Parallelism and Size-customized Kernels to Accelerate BLASTP on GPUs.
papers.abstract: Basic Local Alignment Search Tool (BLAST/BLASTP) [3], often referred to as the Google of biological research [9], is widely used to query a large database to find homologous gene/protein sequences. Though there have been attempts to accelerate BLASTP, the protein sequence alignment tool, on GPUs, they remain slower than CPU/multicore-based multi-threaded implementations. In this paper, we introduce BLAZE, a GPU-accelerated drop-in replacement for BLASTP that produces identical results while achieving speedups over both multithreaded and GPU-accelerated implementations.
papers.abstract_zh: 基本局部比对搜索工具（BLAST/BLASTP）[3]，通常被称为生物研究的谷歌[9]，被广泛用于查询大型数据库以查找同源基因/蛋白质序列。尽管已经尝试在 GPU 上加速 BLASTP（蛋白质序列比对工具），但它们仍然比基于 CPU/多核的多线程实现慢。在本文中，我们介绍了 BLAZE，它是 BLASTP 的 GPU 加速直接替代品，可产生相同的结果，同时比多线程和 GPU 加速实现实现加速。

papers.title: BOER: Enhancing Resource Utilization for Deep Learning Inference with Hybrid Spatial GPU Sharing.
papers.abstract: Many inference systems leverage spatial multiplexing technologies, such as Multi-Process Service (MPS) and Multi-Instance GPU (MIG), to serve deep learning models concurrently on a single GPU. However, existing solutions suffer from interference under MPS and rigid partition sizes in MIG. To address these limitations, we propose BOER, a system that combines MPS atop MIG partitions to reduce interference and enhance GPU utilization. BOER identifies key challenges in integrating MPS with MIG and introduces a hierarchical scheduling framework that jointly determines model colocation, workload distribution, MIG partitioning, and MPS configurations, while minimizing resource fragmentation and MIG reconfiguration overhead. Since MPS interference is difficult to predict accurately, BOER avoids performance models and instead employs a Bayesian optimization with tailored acceleration strategies to efficiently explore the MPS configuration space. Evaluation on a real testbed demonstrates that BOER outperforms state-of-the-art spatial multiplexing solutions, improving inference throughput by up to 46.04%–77.19% while preserving Quality-of-Service requirements.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多推理系统利用空间复用技术，例如多进程服务 (MPS) 和多实例 GPU (MIG)，在单个 GPU 上同时提供深度学习模型。然而，现有的解决方案受到 MPS 下的干扰和 MIG 中的刚性分区尺寸的影响。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 BOER，这是一种将 MPS 结合在 MIG 分区之上的系统，以减少干扰并提高 GPU 利用率。 BOER 确定了 MPS 与 MIG 集成的关键挑战，并引入了分层调度框架，该框架共同确定模型托管、工作负载分配、MIG 分区和 MPS 配置，同时最大限度地减少资源碎片和 MIG 重新配置开销。由于 MPS 干扰难以准确预测，BOER 避免了性能模型，而是采用贝叶斯优化和定制加速策略来有效探索 MPS 配置空间。对真实测试台的评估表明，BOER 的性能优于最先进的空间复用解决方案，将推理吞吐量提高高达 46.04%–77.19%，同时保持服务质量要求。

papers.title: Boosting Scientific Error-Bounded Lossy Compression through Optimized Synergistic Lossy-Lossless Orchestration.
papers.abstract: As high-performance computing architectures evolve, more scientific computing workflows are being deployed on advanced computing platforms such as GPUs. These workflows can produce raw data at extremely high throughputs, requiring urgent high-ratio and low-latency error-bounded data compression solutions. In this paper, we propose cuSZ-Hi, an optimized high-ratio GPU-based scientific error-bounded lossy compressor with a flexible, domain-irrelevant, and fully open-source framework design. Our novel contributions are: 1) We maximally optimize the parallelized interpolation-based data prediction scheme on GPUs, enabling the full functionalities of interpolation-based scientific data prediction that are adaptive to diverse data characteristics; 2) We thoroughly explore and investigate lossless data encoding techniques, then craft and incorporate the best-fit lossless encoding pipelines for maximizing the compression ratio of cuSZ-Hi; 3) We systematically evaluate cuSZ-Hi on benchmarking datasets together with representative baselines. Compared to existing state-of-the-art scientific lossy compressors, with comparative or better throughput than existing high-ratio scientific error-bounded lossy compressors on GPUs, cuSZ-Hi can achieve up to 249% compression ratio improvement under the same error bound, and up to 215% compression ratio improvement under the same decompression data PSNR.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着高性能计算架构的发展，更多的科学计算工作流程正在部署在 GPU 等先进计算平台上。这些工作流程可以以极高的吞吐量生成原始数据，需要紧急的高比率和低延迟错误限制数据压缩解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了 cuSZ-Hi，一种优化的基于高比率 GPU 的科学误差有限有损压缩器，具有灵活、与领域无关且完全开源的框架设计。我们的新颖贡献是：1）我们最大限度地优化了GPU上基于插值的并行数据预测方案，实现了基于插值的科学数据预测的全部功能，适应不同的数据特​​征； 2）我们深入探索和研究无损数据编码技术，然后设计和整合最适合的无损编码管道，以最大化cuSZ-Hi的压缩比； 3）我们在基准数据集和代表性基线上系统地评估 cuSZ-Hi。与现有最先进的科学有损压缩器相比，cuSZ-Hi 的吞吐量与 GPU 上现有的高比率科学误差有界有损压缩器相当或更好，在相同误差范围下可实现高达 249% 的压缩比改进，在相同解压数据 PSNR 下可实现高达 215% 的压缩比改进。

papers.title: Breaking the System Noise Barrier at Exascale.
papers.abstract: To meet the increasing demands of parallel scientific applications, supercomputers continue to grow in both scale and complexity. The fastest supercomputer in the world, El Capitan, features over a million CPU cores and tens of thousands of GPUs. Applications running on such large-scale systems are particularly susceptible to system noise or interference caused by the operating system (OS) and other services running on the same compute nodes as the application.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了满足并行科学应用日益增长的需求，超级计算机的规模和复杂性不断增长。 El Capitan 是世界上最快的超级计算机，拥有超过 100 万个 CPU 内核和数万个 GPU。在此类大型系统上运行的应用程序特别容易受到操作系统 (OS) 和与应用程序在同一计算节点上运行的其他服务引起的系统噪声或干扰。

papers.title: Bridging FPGA and GPU over PCIe: A Low-Latency Communication Path using AVX-512.
papers.abstract: We introduce a communication mechanism bridging accelerators like GPUs and PCIe-based FPGA devices using Programmed I/O as an alternative to Direct Memory Access data transmissions: less than 2 microseconds one-way latency for small message transfers is achieved when the FPGA operates as Network Interface Card (NIC). Our prototype employs APEnetX, a custom FPGA-based NIC, and a CPU engine that atomically writes descriptors and payloads directly into the PCIe device Memory Mapped region using AVX-512 instructions. Additionally, a GPU peer-to-peer remapping technique enables the injections of data packets from the GPU memory into the NIC Memory Mapped aperture with no DMA-orchestrated data movements by the CPU. Microbenchmarks show lower latency than traditional RDMA for small packets with a simpler software stack. This method is not limited to APEnetX: it applies to any FPGA-based NIC or accelerator exposing a PCIe-mapped control aperture, provided the device can read and transmit data from memory.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种通信机制，使用编程 I/O 作为直接内存访问数据传输的替代方案，桥接 GPU 和基于 PCIe 的 FPGA 设备等加速器：当 FPGA 作为网络接口卡 (NIC) 运行时，小消息传输的单向延迟低于 2 微秒。我们的原型采用 APEnetX、基于 FPGA 的定制 NIC 和 CPU 引擎，该引擎使用 AVX-512 指令以原子方式将描述符和有效负载直接写入 PCIe 设备内存映射区域。此外，GPU 对等重新映射技术可以将数据包从 GPU 内存注入到 NIC 内存映射孔径中，而无需 CPU 进行 DMA 协调的数据移动。微基准测试表明，对于小数据包，具有更简单软件堆栈的延迟比传统 RDMA 更低。此方法不仅限于 APEnetX：它适用于任何基于 FPGA 的 NIC 或暴露 PCIe 映射控制孔径的加速器，前提是设备可以从内存读取和传输数据。

papers.title: Bridging Performance Portability and Scalability for Plasma Simulations on Heterogeneous Systems.
papers.abstract: Bridging portability and scalability is essential for HPC applications. The Vector Particle-In-Cell (VPIC) code, widely used in plasma physics simulations, historically required extensive platform-specific optimizations to achieve high performance. VPIC 2.0 addresses this challenge by adopting Kokkos for performance portability, enabling it to scale effectively across diverse architectures, including CPUs and GPUs. However, the abstractions introduced by Kokkos can obscure hardware-specific capabilities and introduce performance overhead. In this work, we mitigate these overheads by enhancing vectorization and optimizing memory access patterns through platform-targeted particle sorting in VPIC 2.0. These optimizations enable VPIC 2.0 to match the performance of the highly tuned, hardware-specific VPIC 1.2 on CPUs and to achieve superlinear scaling on GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: Bridging portability and scalability is essential for HPC applications.矢量粒子单元内 (VPIC) 代码广泛用于等离子体物理模拟，历来需要广泛的特定于平台的优化才能实现高性能。 VPIC 2.0 通过采用 Kokkos 实现性能可移植性来应对这一挑战，使其能够跨不同架构（包括 CPU 和 GPU）有效扩展。然而，Kokkos 引入的抽象可能会掩盖特定于硬件的功能并带来性能开销。在这项工作中，我们通过 VPIC 2.0 中针对平台的粒子排序来增强矢量化和优化内存访问模式，从而减轻这些开销。这些优化使 VPIC 2.0 能够与 CPU 上经过高度调优、特定于硬件的 VPIC 1.2 的性能相匹配，并在 GPU 上实现超线性扩展。

papers.title: Bridging Simulation and Silicon: A Study of RISC-V Hardware and FireSim Simulation.
papers.abstract: RISC-V ISA-based processors have recently emerged as both powerful and energy-efficient computing platforms. The release of the MILK-V Pioneer marked a significant milestone as the first desktop-grade RISC-V system. With increasing engagement from both academia and industry, such platforms exhibit strong potential for adoption in high-performance computing (HPC) environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于 RISC-V ISA 的处理器最近已成为功能强大且节能的计算平台。 MILK-V Pioneer 的发布标志着作为首款桌面级 RISC-V 系统的一个重要里程碑。随着学术界和工业界的参与不断增加，此类平台在高性能计算 (HPC) 环境中展现出巨大的采用潜力。

papers.title: Bridging Speed and Optimality in Job Scheduling: A Hybrid Ant Colony Optimization Approach for Distributed Systems.
papers.abstract: Efficient job scheduling in distributed systems faces exponential complexity growth as systems scale. While queue-based methods (e.g., FIFO) generate schedules rapidly but suboptimally, optimization tools achieve higher quality at significant computational cost. We propose a hybrid ant colony optimization (HACO) algorithm bridging this gap. HACO uses queue-based warm-start initialization for pheromone levels, constructs disjunctive graphs modeling precedence and resource constraints, and applies parallel local search on selected subgraphs to escape local optima. Our approach combines the speed of heuristics with optimization quality through strategic pheromone updates and OR-Tools integration. Experimental evaluation on job shop scheduling (JSSP), flexible job shop (FJSP), and synthetic large-scale problems demonstrates 3-5% deviation from optimality with 5-10x speedup over state-of-the-art solvers. Results show consistent performance across varying problem scales, making HACO compelling for large-scale distributed scheduling where computational efficiency is critical.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着系统规模的扩大，分布式系统中的高效作业调度面临着指数级的复杂性增长。虽然基于队列的方法（例如 FIFO）可以快速生成调度，但效果欠佳，但优化工具以显着的计算成本实现更高的质量。我们提出了一种混合蚁群优化（HACO）算法来弥补这一差距。 HACO 对信息素水平使用基于队列的热启动初始化，构造析取图来建模优先级和资源约束，并对选定的子图应用并行局部搜索以逃避局部最优。我们的方法通过战略信息素更新和 OR-Tools 集成将启发式的速度与优化质量结合起来。对作业车间调度 (JSSP)、灵活作业车间 (FJSP) 和综合大型问题的实验评估表明，与最先进的求解器相比，与最优性的偏差为 3-5%，加速速度为 5-10 倍。结果显示，不同问题规模的性能一致，这使得 HACO 对于计算效率至关重要的大规模分布式调度具有吸引力。

papers.title: Bridging the Gap Between Binary and Source Based Package Management in Spack.
papers.abstract: Binary package managers install software quickly but they limit configurability due to rigid ABI requirements that ensure compatibility between binaries. Source package managers provide flexibility in building software, but compilation can be slow. For example, installing an HPC code with a new MPI implementation may result in a full rebuild. Spack, a widely deployed, HPC-focused package manager, can use source and pre-compiled binaries, but lacks a binary compatibility model, so it cannot mix binaries not built together. We present splicing, an extension to Spack that models binary compatibility between packages and allows seamless mixing of source and binary distributions. Splicing augments Spack’s packaging language and dependency resolution engine to reuse compatible binaries but maintains the flexibility of source builds. It incurs minimal installation-time overhead and allows rapid installation from binaries, even for ABI-sensitive dependencies like MPI that would otherwise require many rebuilds.
papers.abstract_zh: 二进制包管理器可以快速安装软件，但由于严格的 ABI 要求（确保二进制文件之间的兼容性），它们限制了可配置性。源包管理器为构建软件提供了灵活性，但编译速度可能很慢。例如，安装具有新 MPI 实现的 HPC 代码可能会导致完全重建。 Spack 是一种广泛部署的、以 HPC 为中心的包管理器，可以使用源代码和预编译的二进制文件，但缺乏二进制兼容性模型，因此它无法混合未构建在一起的二进制文件。我们提出了拼接，它是 Spack 的一个扩展，它可以模拟包之间的二进制兼容性，并允许源代码和二进制发行版的无缝混合。拼接增强了 Spack 的打包语言和依赖解析引擎以重用兼容的二进制文件，但保持了源代码构建的灵活性。它会产生最小的安装时间开销，并允许从二进制文件快速安装，甚至对于像 MPI 这样的 ABI 敏感依赖项也是如此，否则需要多次重建。

papers.title: Bridging the Gap between Unstructured SpMM and Structured Sparse Tensor Cores.
papers.abstract: The acceleration of Sparse-dense Matrix Multiplication (SpMM) using Tensor Cores (TCs) in GPUs has recently garnered significant attention. TCs are designed for block-wise matrix multiplication, however, block partitioning of general unstructured sparse matrices often results in low-level density, causing a substantial waste of computational resources. Sparse Tensor Cores (SpTCs) can mitigate this issue by skipping 50% of zero values, however, SpTCs are limited to strict 2:4 or 1:2 structured sparsity. To bridge this gap, we propose MP-SpMM, a novel Matching and Padding approach that transforms general sparse matrices into structured sparsity, drawing inspiration from the maximum matching problem in graph theory. Moreover, we introduce a novel storage format and a highly optimized GPU kernel that fully exploits the capabilities of SpTCs. Extensive experiments on modern GPUs demonstrate that MP-SpMM outperforms state-of-the-art SpMM libraries, DTC-SpMM and RoDe, with an average speedup of 2.42 × (up to 7.65 ×) and 1.92 × (up to 8.60 ×).
papers.abstract_zh: 在 GPU 中使用张量核心 (TC) 加速稀疏密集矩阵乘法 (SpMM) 最近引起了广泛关注。 TC是为逐块矩阵乘法而设计的，然而，一般非结构化稀疏矩阵的块划分通常会导致低密度，导致计算资源的大量浪费。稀疏张量核心 (SpTC) 可以通过跳过 50% 的零值来缓解此问题，但是，SpTC 仅限于严格的 2:4 或 1:2 结构化稀疏性。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 MP-SpMM，这是一种新颖的匹配和填充方法，它将一般稀疏矩阵转换为结构化稀疏矩阵，从图论中的最大匹配问题中汲取灵感。此外，我们还引入了一种新颖的存储格式和高度优化的 GPU 内核，充分利用 SpTC 的功能。现代 GPU 上的大量实验表明，MP-SpMM 的性能优于最先进的 SpMM 库、DTC-SpMM 和 RoDe，平均加速比为 2.42 ×（高达 7.65 ×）和 1.92 ×（高达 8.60 ×）。

papers.title: Bridging the Gap: User-Centric Energy Monitoring for Policy-Driven Application Optimization in HPC Data Centers.
papers.abstract: Application energy optimization in HPC data centers face two critical gaps. Systematic methodologies that connect data center policies to application decisions and accessible monitoring tools that enable data-driven optimization. We address both gaps through two complementary pillars. First, we present a methodology based on extended weighted Energy Delay Product (EDP) to translate data center operational priorities and integrate energy considerations into the energy optimization workflow which starts from continuous monitoring through targeted optimization. Second, we present a user-space monitoring tool, Omnistat, that enables this methodology by providing developers with direct access to actionable energy telemetry. Through deployment on the Frontier supercomputer and case studies exploring performance-energy trade-offs, we show how these pillars help energy as an integral optimization target for developers as active participants in data center efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: HPC 数据中心的应用能源优化面临两个关键差距。 Systematic methodologies that connect data center policies to application decisions and accessible monitoring tools that enable data-driven optimization.我们通过两个互补的支柱来解决这两个差距。首先，我们提出了一种基于扩展加权能量延迟乘积 (EDP) 的方法，用于转换数据中心运营优先级，并将能源考虑因素整合到能源优化工作流程中，该工作流程从持续监控到有针对性的优化。 Second, we present a user-space monitoring tool, Omnistat, that enables this methodology by providing developers with direct access to actionable energy telemetry.通过在 Frontier 超级计算机上的部署和探索性能与能源权衡的案例研究，我们展示了这些支柱如何帮助能源成为开发人员作为数据中心效率积极参与者的整体优化目标。

papers.title: Bubble: Towards Scalable Evolving Graph Processing via Mini-Batch Sorting.
papers.abstract: Evolving graph processing has become a critical component in various applications and is gaining increasing attention. However, existing evolving graph systems suffer from cache contention and workload imbalance between threads, which leads to poor scalability and performance degradation on modern multi-core computers.
papers.abstract_zh: 不断发展的图形处理已成为各种应用程序中的关键组成部分，并受到越来越多的关注。然而，现有的不断发展的图系统面临着缓存争用和线程之间的工作负载不平衡的问题，这导致现代多核计算机上的可扩展性差和性能下降。

papers.title: Building n-Dimensional Trees for Resolution-Based Progressive Compression.
papers.abstract: Floating-point data is typically compressed at strict error bounds to reduce storage cost while facilitating scientific analyses. Unfortunately, this tends to yield large compressed files. In some cases, however, a user might not need the data at a high fidelity. Progressive compression addresses this issue by refactoring the data into a hierarchical series of increasing fidelity, allowing users to download the data at an initial fidelity and subsequently retrieve higher fidelities. This paper studies a resolution-based progressive compression approach that achieves competitive compression ratios against traditional compression methods. Furthermore, it studies how the progression of resolution affects the quality of the data.
papers.abstract_zh: 浮点数据通常在严格的误差范围内进行压缩，以降低存储成本，同时促进科学分析。不幸的是，这往往会产生很大的压缩文件。然而，在某些情况下，用户可能不需要高保真度的数据。渐进式压缩通过将数据重构为保真度不断增加的分层系列来解决此问题，允许用户以初始保真度下载数据并随后检索更高的保真度。本文研究了一种基于分辨率的渐进压缩方法，该方法可实现与传统压缩方法相比具有竞争力的压缩比。此外，它还研究分辨率的进展如何影响数据的质量。

papers.title: BurstEngine: An efficient distributed framework for training transformers On extremely Long sequences of over 1M tokens.
papers.abstract: Existing methods for training LLMs on long-sequence data, such as Tensor Parallelism and Context Parallelism, exhibit low Model FLOPs Utilization as sequence lengths and number of GPUs increase, especially when sequence lengths exceed 1M tokens. To address these challenges, we propose BurstEngine, an efficient framework designed to train LLMs on long-sequence data. BurstEngine introduces BurstAttention, an optimized distributed attention with lower communication cost than RingAttention. BurstAttention leverages topology-aware ring communication to fully utilize network bandwidth and incorporates fine-grained communication-computation overlap. Furthermore, BurstEngine introduces sequence-level selective checkpointing and fuses the language modeling head with the loss function to reduce memory cost. Additionally, BurstEngine introduces workload balance optimization for various types of attention masking. By integrating these optimizations, BurstEngine achieves a 1.2 × speedup with much lower memory overhead than the state-of-the-art baselines when training LLMs on extremely long sequences of over 1M tokens.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着序列长度和 GPU 数量的增加，尤其是当序列长度超过 1M 令牌时，用于在长序列数据上训练 LLM 的现有方法（例如张量并行性和上下文并行性）表现出较低的模型 FLOP 利用率。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 BurstEngine，这是一个高效的框架，旨在训练长序列数据上的法学硕士。 BurstEngine引入了BurstAttention，这是一种优化的分布式注意力机制，其通信成本比RingAttention更低。 BurstAttention 利用拓扑感知环通信来充分利用网络带宽并合并细粒度的通信计算重叠。此外，BurstEngine引入了序列级选择性检查点，并将语言建模头与损失函数融合以降低内存成本。此外，BurstEngine 还针对各种类型的注意力屏蔽引入了工作负载平衡优化。通过集成这些优化，在超过 1M 令牌的极长序列上训练 LLM 时，BurstEngine 实现了 1.2 倍的加速，并且内存开销比最先进的基线低得多。

papers.title: C.A.T.S.: Memory and Control Flow Tracing for Whole-Program Performance Analysis.
papers.abstract: Performance engineering often involves localized, bottleneck-based optimization, supported by a plethora of tools. When no apparent bottlenecks exist, engineers resort to coarser whole-program optimization, consisting of data layout, sparsity, allocation strategy, and algorithmic modifications, to name a few. In this work, we aim to codify whole-program optimization by providing three global views based on a single tracing format. The format, called C.A.T.S., captures information necessary for static and runtime analysis of large applications. Instead of call stacks and function annotations, C.A.T.S. uses control flow stacks and memory events to identify common performance anti-patterns and potential optimizations. We develop interactive timeline, dataflow, and access visualizations, and implement compiler analysis passes to extract C.A.T.S. traces statically and in seconds on consumer hardware. The visualizations and analyses are demonstrated on case studies including sparse computations, hydrodynamics and climate modeling, yielding 3 × memory footprint reduction, improvements in communication-computation overlap, code fusion, and data layouts.
papers.abstract_zh: 性能工程通常涉及局部的、基于瓶颈的优化，并由大量工具支持。当不存在明显的瓶颈时，工程师会采取更粗略的整个程序优化，包括数据布局、稀疏性、分配策略和算法修改等。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过提供基于单一跟踪格式的三个全局视图来编码整个程序优化。该格式称为 C.A.T.S.，捕获大型应用程序的静态和运行时分析所需的信息。 C.A.T.S. 取代了调用堆栈和函数注释。使用控制流堆栈和内存事件来识别常见的性能反模式和潜在的优化。我们开发交互式时间线、数据流和访问可视化，并实施编译器分析过程以提取 C.A.T.S.在消费类硬件上以秒为单位进行静态跟踪。可视化和分析在案例研究中进行了演示，包括稀疏计算、流体动力学和气候建模，从而减少了 3 倍的内存占用，改进了通信计算重叠、代码融合和数据布局。

papers.title: CAMEO: A Co-design Architecture for Multi-objective Energy System Optimization.
papers.abstract: Complex energy system co-design optimization requires sophisticated computational workflows that can orchestrate multiple interdependent components, handle diverse optimization paradigms, and scale across high-performance computing environments. Traditional approaches often rely on specialized, monolithic solutions that limit reusability, modularity, and scalability when addressing heterogeneous co-design problems involving multiple scenarios and optimization formulations. We introduce CAMEO (Co-design Architecture for Multi-objective Energy System Optimization), a modular workflow management framework that abstracts co-design problems as dag with standardized input-output interfaces between computational stages. The framework employs JSON-based workflow specifications that enable systematic decomposition of complex optimization problems into reusable, interchangeable components including data loaders, scenario generators, optimization solvers, and result summarizers. CAMEO’s software architecture supports multiple optimization paradigms through containerized execution environments and seamlessly integrates with high-performance computing infrastructure via Nextflow’s workflow orchestration capabilities. The framework’s plug-and-play design enables dynamic reconfiguration of optimization approaches without modifying workflow logic, while standardized interfaces ensure compatibility across diverse computational components and execution environments. We demonstrate CAMEO’s versatility and scalability through three comprehensive use cases: power grid expansion planning for data center integration, optimal battery design for variable generation installations, and secondary distribution network generation for counties in Virginia, USA. These implementations showcase the framework’s ability to handle varying computational scales and optimization paradigms while maintaining workflow reproducibility and portability across different computing environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 复杂的能源系统协同设计优化需要复杂的计算工作流程，可以协调多个相互依赖的组件，处理不同的优化范例，并在高性能计算环境中扩展。传统方法通常依赖于专门的整体解决方案，在解决涉及多个场景和优化公式的异构协同设计问题时，这些解决方案限制了可重用性、模块化和可扩展性。我们引入了 CAMEO（多目标能源系统优化协同设计架构），这是一种模块化工作流程管理框架，它将协同设计问题抽象为计算阶段之间具有标准化输入输出接口的 dag。该框架采用基于 JSON 的工作流规范，能够将复杂的优化问题系统地分解为可重用、可互换的组件，包括数据加载器、场景生成器、优化求解器和结果摘要器。 CAMEO 的软件架构通过容器化执行环境支持多种优化范例，并通过 Nextflow 的工作流程编排功能与高性能计算基础设施无缝集成。该框架的即插即用设计可以动态重新配置优化方法，而无需修改工作流逻辑，而标准化接口则确保了不同计算组件和执行环境之间的兼容性。我们通过三个综合用例展示了 CAMEO 的多功能性和可扩展性：数据中心集成的电网扩展规划、可变发电装置的优化电池设计以及美国弗吉尼亚州各县的二次配电网络发电。这些实现展示了该框架处理不同计算规模和优化范例的能力，同时保持跨不同计算环境的工作流可重复性和可移植性。

papers.title: Caracal: A GPU-Resident Sparse LU Solver with Lightweight Fine-Grained Scheduling.
papers.abstract: We address inefficiencies in task scheduling, memory management, and scalability in GPU-resident sparse LU factorization with a two-level approach of sequentially scheduled coarse-grained blocks containing multiple fine-grained blocks managed with a lightweight static scheduler enabling multi-stream parallelism. Additionally, we design an intelligent memory caching mechanism for the fine-grained scheduler, which retains frequently accessed data in GPU memory. To further enhance scalability, we introduce a distributed memory design that partitions the input matrix using a 1D block-cyclic distribution and optimizes inter-GPU communication via NVLink. The multi-GPU design reaches a computational throughput of 6.46 TFLOP/s on four A100 GPUs, demonstrating promising scalability. This is up to 7x speedup over the latest SuperLU_DIST with 3D communication, 94x speedup over PanguLU, 16x speedup over PasTiX, and 10x speedup over our own coarse-grained dynamic scheduling implementation while reaching up to 21% of the A100’s theoretical peak performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们通过顺序调度粗粒度块的两级方法解决了 GPU 驻留稀疏 LU 分解中任务调度、内存管理和可扩展性方面的低效率问题，其中粗粒度块包含多个细粒度块，这些细粒度块通过轻量级静态调度程序进行管理，从而实现多流并行。此外，我们为细粒度调度器设计了智能内存缓存机制，将经常访问的数据保留在GPU内存中。为了进一步增强可扩展性，我们引入了分布式内存设计，该设计使用一维块循环分布对输入矩阵进行分区，并通过 NVLink 优化 GPU 间通信。多 GPU 设计在四个 A100 GPU 上达到了 6.46 TFLOP/s 的计算吞吐量，展现了良好的可扩展性。与具有 3D 通信功能的最新 SuperLU_DIST 相比，速度提高了 7 倍；与 PanguLU 相比，速度提高了 94 倍；与 PasTiX 相比，速度提高了 16 倍；与我们自己的粗粒度动态调度实现相比，速度提高了 10 倍，同时达到了 A100 理论峰值性能的 21%。

papers.title: CaRDS: Compiler-aided Remote Data Structures.
papers.abstract: Far memory tiers improve memory utilization by enabling memory intensive applications to use idle memory from other machines over the network. Recently, compiler approaches to far memory have demonstrated how static analysis can be leveraged to automatically transform applications to make efficient use of remote memory tiers. However, policies in these compilers, e.g., the determination of whether objects should be remoted, prefetched, or evacuated are made conservatively at compile time or require profiling. While profiling can alleviate conservative policies, profile-guided systems can be expensive and may not work well for applications that have variation in their inputs. We propose CaRDS, system that combines both runtime and static analysis to determine far memory policies dynamically, at data structure granularity, and without profiling. CaRDS remoting policies can outperform prior automatic approaches by up to ∼ 2 × and are within 25% of profile-guided systems when the local memory is highly constrained.
papers.abstract_zh: 远内存层使内存密集型应用程序能够通过网络使用其他计算机的空闲内存，从而提高内存利用率。最近，远内存的编译器方法展示了如何利用静态分析来自动转换应用程序，以有效利用远程内存层。然而，这些编译器中的策略（例如，是否应远程、预取或疏散对象的确定）是在编译时保守地制定的，或者需要进行分析。虽然分析可以缓解保守的政策，但分析引导系统可能很昂贵，并且可能不适用于输入变化的应用程序。我们提出了 CaRDS，该系统结合了运行时和静态分析，以数据结构粒度动态确定远内存策略，并且无需进行分析。当本地内存高度受限时，CaRDS 远程处理策略的性能比之前的自动方法高出 ∼ 2 倍，并且与配置文件引导系统的差距在 25% 以内。

papers.title: CASSE: Targeted Threat Modeling for Data Management Libraries.
papers.abstract: Data management libraries (DMLs) such as HDF5, Zarr, and NetCDF are used heavily across domains. Despite their heavy usage, security of DMLs has been sparsely explored. Threat modeling is a method for analyzing the security of complex software systems; STRIDE is the most popular model used for evaluating security of software. In this study, we evaluate the application and effectiveness of STRIDE for DMLs. We identified three key shortcomings of STRIDE when applied to DMLs: the attack categorizations are often inapplicable, the attack categories provide little context, and current approaches do not analyze file structures used by DMLs. We propose CASSE as a novel threat modeling approach targeting DMLs to focus on these problems with a new attack taxonomy and including file structure diagrams. We evaluated CASSE by using it to model threats on three popular DMLs, HDF5, NetCDF, and Zarr. The application of CASSE to other DMLs is similar.
papers.abstract_zh: HDF5、Zarr 和 NetCDF 等数据管理库 (DML) 在各个领域中得到广泛使用。尽管 DML 的使用率很高，但对其安全性的探讨却很少。威胁建模是一种分析复杂软件系统安全性的方法； STRIDE 是用于评估软件安全性的最流行模型。在本研究中，我们评估了 STRIDE 在 DML 中的应用和有效性。我们发现了 STRIDE 在应用于 DML 时的三个主要缺点：攻击分类通常不适用、攻击类别提供的上下文很少、当前的方法不分析 DML 使用的文件结构。我们提出 CASSE 作为一种针对 DML 的新型威胁建模方法，通过新的攻击分类法并包括文件结构图来关注这些问题。我们通过使用 CASSE 对三种流行的 DML（HDF5、NetCDF 和 Zarr）上的威胁进行建模来对其进行评估。 CASSE 在其他 DML 中的应用是类似的。

papers.title: CGSim: A Simulation Framework for Large Scale Distributed Computing Environment.
papers.abstract: Large-scale distributed computing infrastructures such as the Worldwide LHC Computing Grid (WLCG) require comprehensive simulation tools for evaluating performance, testing new algorithms, and optimizing resource allocation strategies. However, existing simulators suffer from limited scalability, hardwired algorithms, lack of real-time monitoring, and inability to generate datasets suitable for modern machine learning approaches. We present CGSim, a simulation framework for large-scale distributed computing environments that addresses these limitations. Built upon the validated SimGrid simulation framework, CGSim provides high-level abstractions for modeling heterogeneous grid environments while maintaining accuracy and scalability. Key features include a modular plugin mechanism for testing custom workflow scheduling and data movement policies, interactive real-time visualization dashboards, and automatic generation of event-level datasets suitable for AI-assisted performance modeling. We demonstrate CGSim's capabilities through a comprehensive evaluation using production ATLAS PanDA workloads, showing significant calibration accuracy improvements across WLCG computing sites. Scalability experiments show near-linear scaling for multi-site simulations, with distributed workloads achieving 6x better performance compared to single-site execution. The framework enables researchers to simulate WLCG-scale infrastructures with hundreds of sites and thousands of concurrent jobs within practical time budget constraints on commodity hardware.
papers.abstract_zh: 全球大型强子对撞机计算网格 (WLCG) 等大规模分布式计算基础设施需要全面的仿真工具来评估性能、测试新算法和优化资源分配策略。然而，现有的模拟器面临可扩展性有限、硬连线算法、缺乏实时监控以及无法生成适合现代机器学习方法的数据集的问题。我们推出了 CGSim，这是一个用于大规模分布式计算环境的模拟框架，可以解决这些限制。 CGSim 基于经过验证的 SimGrid 仿真框架构建，为异构网格环境建模提供高级抽象，同时保持准确性和可扩展性。主要功能包括用于测试自定义工作流调度和数据移动策略的模块化插件机制、交互式实时可视化仪表板以及自动生成适合人工智能辅助性能建模的事件级数据集。我们通过使用生产 ATLAS PanDA 工作负载进行全面评估来展示 CGSim 的功能，显示整个 WLCG 计算站点的校准精度显着提高。可扩展性实验表明，多站点模拟可实现近线性扩展，与单站点执行相比，分布式工作负载的性能提高了 6 倍。该框架使研究人员能够在商用硬件的实际时间预算限制内模拟具有数百个站点和数千个并发作业的 WLCG 规模的基础设施。

papers.title: Characterizing Performance, Power, and Energy of AMD CDNA3 GPU Family.
papers.abstract: While historically used for graphics applications, Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) have become the most prominent hardware for accelerating parallel workloads, including HPC and AI/ML. As the demand for GPUs skyrockets, AMD released the CDNA3 architecture to accelerate HPC and generative AI. This paper serves as a comprehensive third-party evaluation of the AMD CDNA3 GPU, specifically the MI300X and MI325X, by characterizing their performance, power, and energy efficiency using microbenchmark and real-world applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 虽然图形处理单元 (GPU) 历史上用于图形应用程序，但它已成为加速并行工作负载（包括 HPC 和 AI/ML）的最重要的硬件。随着 GPU 需求的飙升，AMD 发布了 CDNA3 架构来加速 HPC 和生成式 AI。本文通过使用微基准测试和实际应用来表征 AMD CDNA3 GPU（特别是 MI300X 和 MI325X）的性能、功耗和能效，对 AMD CDNA3 GPU（特别是 MI300X 和 MI325X）进行了全面的第三方评估。

papers.title: Characterizing the Impact of GPU Power Management on an Exascale System.
papers.abstract: As GPU-accelerated high-performance computing (HPC) systems approach exascale performance, controlling energy consumption without compromising throughput is essential. Architectures such as the AMD MI250X-based Frontier supercomputer provide runtime mechanisms like frequency and power capping, enabling energy tuning without modifying application code. Although both target energy reduction, they operate via distinct hardware control paths and influence workloads differently. We present a comprehensive evaluation of these strategies on a leadership-class system using diverse HPC proxy applications representative of production workloads. Our study analyzes performance–energy trade-offs across multiple capping levels, node counts (1 and 32), and application profiles. Results show that frequency capping generally achieves higher energy efficiency and scalability, with gains of up to 13.2% without performance loss, while power capping is more effective for single-node runs or bursty GPU utilization. We also provide practical guidelines to help system administrators and users balance energy efficiency and performance in large-scale scientific workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着 GPU 加速的高性能计算 (HPC) 系统接近百亿亿次性能，在不影响吞吐量的情况下控制能耗至关重要。基于 AMD MI250X 的 Frontier 超级计算机等架构提供频率和功率上限等运行时机制，无需修改应用程序代码即可实现能量调整。尽管两者都以节能为目标，但它们通过不同的硬件控制路径进行操作，并对工作负载产生不同的影响。我们使用代表生产工作负载的各种 HPC 代理应用程序在领先级系统上对这些策略进行了全面评估。我们的研究分析了多个上限级别、节点数量（1 和 32）和应用程序配置文件之间的性能与能源权衡。结果表明，频率上限通常可以实现更高的能源效率和可扩展性，在不损失性能的情况下，增益高达 13.2%，而功率上限对于单节点运行或突发性 GPU 使用更有效。我们还提供实用指南，帮助系统管理员和用户在大规模科学工作负载中平衡能源效率和性能。

papers.title: Characterizing the Performance of Parallel Data-Compression Algorithms across Compilers and GPUs.
papers.abstract: Different compilers can generate code with notably different performance characteristics—even on the same system. Today, GPU developers have three popular options for compiling CUDA or HIP code for GPUs. First, CUDA code can be compiled by either NVCC or Clang for NVIDIA GPUs. Alternatively, AMD’s recently introduced HIP platform makes porting from CUDA to HIP relatively simple, enabling compilation for AMD and NVIDIA GPUs. This study compares the performance of 107,632 data-compression algorithms when compiling them with different compilers and running them on different GPUs from NVIDIA and AMD. We find that the relative performance of some of these codes changes significantly depending on the compiler and hardware used. For example, Clang tends to produce relatively slow compressors but relatively fast decompressors compared to NVCC and HIPCC.
papers.abstract_zh: 不同的编译器可以生成具有明显不同性能特征的代码——即使在同一系统上也是如此。如今，GPU 开发人员可以使用三种流行的选项来为 GPU 编译 CUDA 或 HIP 代码。首先，CUDA 代码可以通过 NVCC 或 Clang 为 NVIDIA GPU 编译。另外，AMD 最近推出的 HIP 平台使从 CUDA 到 HIP 的移植变得相对简单，从而可以针对 AMD 和 NVIDIA GPU 进行编译。这项研究比较了 107,632 种数据压缩算法使用不同编译器进行编译并在 NVIDIA 和 AMD 的不同 GPU 上运行时的性能。我们发现其中一些代码的相对性能根据所使用的编译器和硬件的不同而发生显着变化。例如，与 NVCC 和 HIPCC 相比，Clang 倾向于生成相对较慢的压缩器，但生成相对较快的解压缩器。

papers.title: ChatEED: An agentic retrieval assistant for accelerator operators.
papers.abstract: Scientists and operators at SLAC National Accelerator Laboratory rely on electronic logbooks (ELOGs) to record and share critical information surrounding accelerator operations. However, since creating log entries is time-consuming and complex, they are often brief, incomplete, filled with jargon, and inconsistently structured. With thousands of records spanning decades, this makes it difficult for operators to search for and interpret information. Through interviews with operators, we identified two critical gaps: the lack of automated shift summarization and the difficulty of real-time ELOG information retrieval. Therefore, we introduce ChatEED, a novel agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system that is operator-centric and addresses these two needs while also prioritizing security, modularity, efficiency, and transparency. In this paper, we analyze the operator needs and workflow that guide the system design, detail the system architecture and deployment, and outline future directions for expansion and evaluation. This ongoing work demonstrates the potential for AI systems to improve continuity, communication, and efficiency in high-performance science facilities.
papers.abstract_zh: SLAC 国家加速器实验室的科学家和操作员依靠电子日志 (ELOG) 来记录和共享有关加速器运行的关键信息。然而，由于创建日志条目既耗时又复杂，因此它们通常简短、不完整、充满术语且结构不一致。由于存在跨越数十年的数千条记录，这使得操作员很难搜索和解释信息。通过与操作员的访谈，我们发现了两个关键差距：缺乏自动班次总结和实时 ELOG 信息检索的困难。因此，我们引入了 ChatEED，这是一种新颖的代理检索增强生成 (RAG) 系统，该系统以操作员为中心，满足这两个需求，同时还优先考虑安全性、模块化、效率和透明度。在本文中，我们分析了指导系统设计的运营商需求和工作流程，详细介绍了系统架构和部署，并概述了未来扩展和评估的方向。这项正在进行的工作展示了人工智能系统在提高高性能科学设施的连续性、通信和效率方面的潜力。

papers.title: ChatHPC: Building the Foundations for a Productive and Trustworthy AI-Assisted HPC Ecosystem.
papers.abstract: ChatHPC democratizes large language models for the high-performance computing (HPC) community by providing the infrastructure, ecosystem, and knowledge needed to apply modern generative AI technologies to rapidly create specific capabilities for critical HPC components while using relatively modest computational resources. Our divide-and-conquer approach focuses on creating a collection of reliable, highly specialized, and optimized AI assistants for HPC based on the cost-effective and fast Code Llama fine-tuning processes and expert supervision. We target major components of the HPC software stack, including programming models, runtimes, I/O, tooling, and math libraries. Thanks to AI, ChatHPC provides a more productive HPC ecosystem by boosting important tasks related to portability, parallelization, optimization, scalability, and instrumentation, among others. With relatively small datasets (on the order of KB), the AI assistants, which are created in a few minutes by using one node with two NVIDIA H100 GPUs and the ChatHPC library, can create new capabilities with Meta’s 7-billion parameter Code Llama base model to produce high-quality software with a level of trustworthiness of up to 90% higher than the 1.8-trillion parameter OpenAI ChatGPT-4o model for critical programming tasks in the HPC software stack.
papers.abstract_zh: ChatHPC 通过提供应用现代生成式 AI 技术所需的基础设施、生态系统和知识，在使用相对适度的计算资源的同时快速为关键 HPC 组件创建特定功能，从而使高性能计算 (HPC) 社区的大型语言模型民主化。我们的分而治之的方法侧重于基于经济高效且快速的 Code Llama 微调流程和专家监督，为 HPC 创建一系列可靠、高度专业化和优化的人工智能助手。我们的目标是 HPC 软件堆栈的主要组件，包括编程模型、运行时、I/O、工具和数学库。借助人工智能，ChatHPC 通过促进与可移植性、并行化、优化、可扩展性和仪器仪表等相关的重要任务，提供了更高效的 HPC 生态系统。利用相对较小的数据集（KB 级），使用配备两个 NVIDIA H100 GPU 和 ChatHPC 库的一个节点在几分钟内创建的 AI 助手可以利用 Meta 的 70 亿参数 Code Llama 基础模型创建新功能，以生成高质量软件，其可信度比 1.8 万亿参数 OpenAI ChatGPT-4o 模型高出 90%，用于 HPC 中的关键编程任务软件堆栈。

papers.title: CIRE: LLVM Analysis for Floating-Point Rounding Error Affected by Precision and Optimizations.
papers.abstract: We present CiRE, a tool that computes floating-point rounding error for basic blocks of LLVM codes via static analysis. Using CiRE, programmers can explore different mixed-precision settings and compiler optimizations while improving performance and guarding against excessive error. Our studies using CiRE have yielded the following insights: (1) often, performance as well as accuracy can be improved; (2) compilers for different languages produce code with widely varying error, even for the same expression; (3) the choice of subexpressions to target for low precision allocation has a huge impact on error and performance. CiRE can analyze expressions with 105 or more operators, thus making it capable of analyzing basic blocks generated by unrolling loops.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 CiRE，这是一种通过静态分析计算 LLVM 代码基本块的浮点舍入误差的工具。使用 CiRE，程序员可以探索不同的混合精度设置和编译器优化，同时提高性能并防止出现过多错误。我们使用 CiRE 进行的研究得出了以下见解：(1) 通常，性能和准确性都可以得到提高； (2) 不同语言的编译器生成的代码存在很大差异的错误，即使对于相同的表达式也是如此； (3) 低精度分配目标子表达式的选择对错误和性能有巨大影响。 CiRE 可以分析具有 105 个或更多运算符的表达式，从而使其能够分析通过展开循环生成的基本块。

papers.title: Classification of Three-dimensional Electron Diffraction Data with a Large Language Model.
papers.abstract: Three-dimensional electron diffraction (3D ED) has become an essential technique for determining high-resolution molecular structures. It is particularly useful for extremely small crystals that cannot be analyzed using conventional X-ray diffraction. In typical 3D ED experiments, hundreds to thousands of molecular structures are reconstructed from a single sample. However, many of these structures are inaccurate due to factors such as low signal-to-noise ratios and the limited range of measurable angles in 3D ED. Traditionally, researchers have had to manually inspect each structure to identify valid ones, which is a time-consuming and labor-intensive process. We propose an LLM-centric automatic screening method to efficiently identify correct molecular structures from 3D ED outputs. The method begins by converting raw atomic coordinates into a topology-only language representation tailored to 3D ED data. Using this representation, the method proceeds through three stages: (1) rule-based filtering to eliminate clearly impossible candidates, (2) classification by a fine-tuned LLM trained on both correct and artificially-generated corrupted molecules, and (3) grouping to merge identical topologies. This combination allows diverse 3D ED datasets to be classified quickly and accurately. Experimental results obtained using seven real 3D ED datasets indicate that this method reduced the number of structures requiring manual inspection by an average of 95.8% while preserving every correct structure. This method substantially reduces the manual burden and enables efficient large-scale classification of 3D ED data.
papers.abstract_zh: 三维电子衍射（3D ED）已成为确定高分辨率分子结构的重要技术。它对于无法使用传统 X 射线衍射进行分析的极小晶体特别有用。在典型的 3D ED 实验中，从单个样品中重建数百到数千个分子结构。然而，由于信噪比低以及 3D ED 中可测量角度范围有限等因素，许多这些结构都是不准确的。传统上，研究人员必须手动检查每个结构以识别有效的结构，这是一个耗时且费力的过程。我们提出了一种以法学硕士为中心的自动筛选方法，可以从 3D ED 输出中有效识别正确的分子结构。该方法首先将原始原子坐标转换为针对 3D ED 数据定制的纯拓扑语言表示。使用这种表示，该方法将经历三个阶段：(1) 基于规则的过滤，以消除明显不可能的候选者，(2) 通过在正确分子和人工生成的损坏分子上训练的微调 LLM 进行分类，以及 (3) 分组以合并相同的拓扑。这种组合可以快速准确地对不同的 3D ED 数据集进行分类。使用七个真实 3D ED 数据集获得的实验结果表明，该方法将需要手动检查的结构数量平均减少了 95.8%，同时保留了每个正确的结构。该方法大大减轻了人工负担，实现了 3D ED 数据的高效大规模分类。

papers.title: cMPI: Using CXL Memory Sharing for MPI One-Sided and Two-Sided Inter-Node Communications.
papers.abstract: Message Passing Interface (MPI) is a foundational programming model for high-performance computing. MPI libraries traditionally employ network interconnects (e.g., Ethernet and InfiniBand) and network protocols (e.g., TCP and RoCE) with complex software stacks for cross-node communication.This paper presents cMPI, the first work to optimize MPI point-to-point communication (both one-sided and two-sided) using CXL memory sharing on a real CXL platform, transforming cross-node communication into memory transactions and data copies within CXL memory, bypassing traditional network protocols. We analyze performance across various interconnects and find that CXL memory sharing achieves 7.2 × -8.1 × lower latency than TCP-based interconnects deployed in small- and medium-scale clusters. We address challenges of CXL memory sharing for MPI communication, including data object management over the dax representation [50], cache coherence, and atomic operations. Overall, cMPI outperforms TCP over standard Ethernet NIC and high-end SmartNIC by up to 49 × and 72 × in latency and bandwidth, respectively, for small messages.
papers.abstract_zh: 消息传递接口 (MPI) 是高性能计算的基础编程模型。 MPI 库传统上采用网络互连（例如以太网和 InfiniBand）和网络协议（例如 TCP 和 RoCE）以及复杂的软件堆栈来进行跨节点通信。本文介绍了 cMPI，这是第一个在真实 CXL 平台上使用 CXL 内存共享来优化 MPI 点对点通信（单侧和双向）的工作，将跨节点通信转换为 CXL 内存内的内存事务和数据副本，绕过传统的网络协议。我们分析了各种互连的性能，发现 CXL 内存共享的延迟比中小型集群中部署的基于 TCP 的互连低 7.2 × -8.1 ×。我们解决了 MPI 通信的 CXL 内存共享的挑战，包括通过 dax 表示的数据对象管理 [50]、缓存一致性和原子操作。总体而言，对于小消息，cMPI 在延迟和带宽方面比标准以太网 NIC 和高端 SmartNIC 上的 TCP 分别高出 49 倍和 72 倍。

papers.title: Comparing Distributed-Memory Programming Frameworks with Radix Sort.
papers.abstract: Distributed-memory parallel processing addresses computational problems requiring significantly more memory or computational resources than can be found on one node. Software written for distributed-memory parallel processing typically uses a distributed-memory parallel programming framework to enhance productivity, scalability, and portability across supercomputers and cluster systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 分布式内存并行处理解决了需要比一个节点上多得多的内存或计算资源的计算问题。为分布式内存并行处理编写的软件通常使用分布式内存并行编程框架来提高超级计算机和集群系统之间的生产力、可扩展性和可移植性。

papers.title: Comparing Graph Algorithm Styles on NVIDIA and AMD GPUs.
papers.abstract: Graph algorithms are important for many domains, and GPUs can be used to accelerate them. Unfortunately, CUDA code can only be run on NVIDIA GPUs. In this study, we port the CUDA graph codes from the Indigo3 benchmark suite to HIP. This enables them to run on both AMD and NVIDIA GPUs. In addition, it allows the study of performance differences between compiled CUDA and HIP codes that are otherwise identical. Since the Indigo3 codes are written in a variety of different implementation and parallelization styles, this also allows us to study the performance of AMD GPUs on these styles and compare the results with the NVIDIA-based style trends.
papers.abstract_zh: 图算法对于许多领域都很重要，GPU 可用于加速它们。不幸的是，CUDA 代码只能在 NVIDIA GPU 上运行。在本研究中，我们将 CUDA 图形代码从 Indigo3 基准套件移植到 HIP。这使得它们能够在 AMD 和 NVIDIA GPU 上运行。此外，它还可以研究编译后的 CUDA 和 HIP 代码之间的性能差异，而这些代码在其他方面是相同的。由于 Indigo3 代码是以各种不同的实现和并行化风格编写的，这也使我们能够研究 AMD GPU 在这些风格上的性能，并将结果与​​基于 NVIDIA 的风格趋势进行比较。

papers.title: Compile-Time QoS Scheme for Deep Learning Inferences.
papers.abstract: With the proliferation of deep learning technologies across various service domains, the sharing of accelerators such as GPUs, TPUs, and NPUs for inference processing has become increasingly common. These accelerators must efficiently handle multiple deep learning services operating concurrently. However, inference requests, characterized by sequences of short-duration kernels, create significant challenges for online schedulers attempting to maintain Quality of Service (QoS) guarantees. This paper presents QoSlicer, a novel compile-time QoS management framework that employs kernel slicing to relieve the burden on schedulers. By generating multiple pre-determined slicing plans, QoSlicer enables more efficient, lightweight QoS scheduling while ensuring target latency requirements are met. Our approach incorporates a heuristic search algorithm to identify optimal slicing plans and implements robust performance estimation models to validate these plans. Our experimental evaluation across 75 diverse workload combinations demonstrates that QoSlicer improves throughput by an average of 20.2% compared to state-of-the-art scheduling techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着深度学习技术在各个服务领域的普及，用于推理处理的 GPU、TPU 和 NPU 等加速器的共享变得越来越普遍。这些加速器必须有效地处理同时运行的多个深度学习服务。然而，以短持续时间内核序列为特征的推理请求给试图维持服务质量 (QoS) 保证的在线调度程序带来了重大挑战。本文提出了 QoSlicer，这是一种新颖的编译时 QoS 管理框架，它采用内核切片来减轻调度程序的负担。通过生成多个预先确定的切片计划，QoSlicer 可以实现更高效、轻量级的 QoS 调度，同时确保满足目标延迟要求。我们的方法采用启发式搜索算法来识别最佳切片计划，并实施稳健的性能估计模型来验证这些计划。我们对 75 种不同的工作负载组合进行的实验评估表明，与最先进的调度技术相比，QoSlicer 的吞吐量平均提高了 20.2%。

papers.title: Complex Parsing for In-Network Acceleration of High-Energy Physics Experiments.
papers.abstract: This paper describes a novel application and evaluation of programmable networking in High-Energy Physics (HEP): a complete parser for the custom packet format used by Fermilab’s DUNE experiment. Notably, this parser is implemented on a Tofino programmable network switch and evaluated on the FABRIC testbed by using network traffic generated by the ICEBERG DUNE prototype. The parsed network traffic consists of Jumbo Ethernet frames that contain digitizations of sensor readings from ICEBERG’s detector.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文描述了高能物理 (HEP) 中可编程网络的新颖应用和评估：费米实验室 DUNE 实验使用的自定义数据包格式的完整解析器。值得注意的是，该解析器在 Tofino 可编程网络交换机上实现，并使用 ICEBERG DUNE 原型生成的网络流量在 FABRIC 测试台上进行评估。解析后的网络流量由巨型以太网帧组成，其中包含来自 ICEBERG 探测器的传感器读数的数字化。

papers.title: Compression Error Sensitivity Analysis for Different Experts in MoE Model Inference.
papers.abstract: With the widespread application of Mixture of Experts (MoE) reasoning models in the field of LLM learning, efficiently serving MoE models under limited GPU memory constraints has emerged as a significant challenge. Offloading the non-activated experts to main memory has been identified as an efficient approach to address such a problem, while it brings the challenges of transferring the expert between the GPU memory and main memory. We need to explore an efficient approach to compress the expert and analyze how the compression error affects the inference performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着专家混合 (MoE) 推理模型在 LLM 学习领域的广泛应用，在有限的 GPU 内存限制下高效服务 MoE 模型已成为一项重大挑战。将未激活的专家卸载到主内存已被认为是解决此类问题的有效方法，但它带来了在 GPU 内存和主内存之间传输专家的挑战。我们需要探索一种有效的方法来压缩专家并分析压缩误差如何影响推理性能。

papers.title: Compute4Biology: Taking Stock of High Performance Computing Needs for Foundation Models in Biological Sciences.
papers.abstract: Foundation models are driving a paradigm shift across the life sciences, yet their transformative potential is fundamentally coupled to the capabilities of high-performance computing (HPC). The computational workloads presented by different biology and allied domains, from genomics and transcriptomics to proteomics, chemistry, and biomedical literature, are remarkably diverse and create distinct challenges for HPC infrastructure. This paper presents the first systematic, cross-domain analysis of HPC needs for state-of-the-art foundation models in biological sciences. We move beyond a simple cost summary to characterize and compare the specific computational bottlenecks inherent to each domain: the massive I/O demands of genomic sequence data, the intense memory pressure from protein structure prediction, and the unique compute kernels required for molecular modeling. By analyzing these diverse workloads, we identify common patterns and trade-offs in hardware utilization, data management, and software stack design. We conclude by outlining a unified set of best practices and co-design principles for building the next generation of HPC systems capable of accelerating discovery across the full spectrum of AI-driven science. This is a running survey of HPC needs in the biological domain; we would maintain a project page at www.abc.xxx
papers.abstract_zh: 基础模型正在推动生命科学领域的范式转变，但它们的变革潜力从根本上与高性能计算 (HPC) 的功能相结合。不同生物学和相关领域（从基因组学和转录组学到蛋白质组学、化学和生物医学文献）所带来的计算工作负载非常多样化，给 HPC 基础设施带来了独特的挑战。本文首次对生物科学中最先进的基础模型的 HPC 需求进行了系统的跨领域分析。我们超越简单的成本总结来描述和比较每个领域固有的特定计算瓶颈：基因组序列数据的大量 I/O 需求、蛋白质结构预测带来的巨大内存压力以及分子建模所需的独特计算内核。通过分析这些不同的工作负载，我们确定了硬件利用率、数据管理和软件堆栈设计方面的常见模式和权衡。最后，我们概述了一套统一的最佳实践和协同设计原则，用于构建能够加速整个人工智能驱动科学领域的发现的下一代 HPC 系统。这是对生物领域 HPC 需求的持续调查；我们将在 www.abc.xxx 维护一个项目页面

papers.title: Computing the Full Earth System at 1km Resolution.
papers.abstract: We present the first-ever global simulation of the full Earth system at 1.25 km grid spacing, achieving highest time compression with an unseen number of degrees of freedom. Our model captures the flow of energy, water, and carbon through key components of the Earth system: atmosphere, ocean, and land. To achieve this landmark simulation, we harness the power of 8192 GPUs on Alps and 20480 GPUs on JUPITER, two of the world’s largest GH200 superchip installations. We use both the Grace CPUs and Hopper GPUs by carefully balancing Earth’s components in a heterogeneous setup and optimizing acceleration techniques available in ICON’s codebase. We show how separation of concerns can reduce the code complexity by half while increasing performance and portability. Our achieved time compression of 145.7 simulated days per day enables long studies including full interactions in the Earth system and even outperforms earlier atmosphere-only simulations at a similar resolution.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们首次以 1.25 公里网格间距对整个地球系统进行全球模拟，以前所未有的自由度实现了最高的时间压缩。我们的模型捕捉了地球系统关键组成部分（大气、海洋和陆地）的能量、水和碳的流动。为了实现这一具有里程碑意义的模拟，我们利用了 Alps 上的 8192 个 GPU 和 JUPITER 上的 20480 个 GPU 的强大功能，这是世界上最大的两个 GH200 超级芯片安装。我们使用 Grace CPU 和 Hopper GPU，在异构设置中仔细平衡地球的组件，并优化 ICON 代码库中可用的加速技术。我们展示了关注点分离如何将代码复杂性降低一半，同时提高性能和可移植性。我们实现了每天 145.7 天模拟的时间压缩，能够进行长期研究，包括地球系统中的全面相互作用，甚至在类似分辨率下优于早期的仅大气模拟。

papers.title: coMtainer: Compilation-assisted HPC Container Images with Enhanced Adaptability.
papers.abstract: The increasing interconnectivity of HPC systems has highlighted the need for efficient application migration across different environments. Containers, widely adopted for this purpose, simplify deployment but often fail to deliver optimal performance due to the separated build and execution container workflow. This leads to generic container images that miss out on system-specific software stack advantages, a challenge we define as the adaptability issue.
papers.abstract_zh: HPC 系统日益增强的互连性凸显了跨不同环境高效应用程序迁移的需求。为此目的而广泛采用的容器可以简化部署，但由于构建和执行容器工作流程是分开的，因此通常无法提供最佳性能。这导致通用容器镜像错过了特定于系统的软件堆栈优势，我们将这一挑战定义为适应性问题。

papers.title: Connected-Component Labeling Using HLS for High-Energy Particle Physics Instruments.
papers.abstract: Many instruments used in high-energy particle physics observations, e.g., gamma-ray telescopes, use FPGAs for front-end signal processing of raw sensor data. The use of high-level synthesis (HLS) to express the signal processing algorithms has the potential to significantly reduce development time for new instruments of this type. We describe our experience with one of the computational stages in the signal processing pipeline, island detection, exploring its implementation across multiple configurations: 1D versus 2D islands, and 4-way versus 8-way connected-component labeling (CCL) in the 2D configuration. We report resource usage and performance for both configurations of 2D island detection, including the required optimizations necessary for HLS to be effective. Results indicate that our implementation can perform 4-way CCL on 15k images per second even for 43 × 43 pixel arrays.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多用于高能粒子物理观测的仪器（例如伽马射线望远镜）都使用 FPGA 对原始传感器数据进行前端信号处理。使用高级综合（HLS）来表达信号处理算法有可能显着缩短此类新仪器的开发时间。我们描述了我们在信号处理管道中的计算阶段之一岛检测方面的经验，探索其跨多种配置的实现：1D 与 2D 岛，以及 2D 配置中的 4 路与 8 路连通分量标记 (CCL)。我们报告两种 2D 岛检测配置的资源使用情况和性能，包括 HLS 有效所需的优化。结果表明，即使对于 43 × 43 像素阵列，我们的实现也可以每秒对 15k 图像执行 4 路 CCL。

papers.title: Constraint-Driven Auto-Tuning of GEMM-like Operators for MT-3000 Many-core Processor.
papers.abstract: Optimizing deep learning (DL) operators, particularly GEMM-like operations, for emerging heterogeneous many-core processors like MT-3000 is challenging due to the large search space and hardware-specific constraints. Existing approaches - such as hand-crafted libraries or general-purpose auto-tuners - are either expensive to develop or deliver sub-optimal performance due to expensive search overheads. We present DynaChain, an operator-level optimization framework for MT-3000. DynaChain decouples the computation and data movement of operators, allowing each to be optimized independently and maximizing global data reuse across the operator schedule. To reduce the search space, DynaChain introduces constraint dependency chains that dynamically eliminate invalid scheduling options during exploration. It then applies an integer linear programming (ILP) based decomposition to handle irregular matrix dimensions, avoiding padding and improving hardware utilization. For low-level code generation, DynaChain offers a hardware-aware micro-kernel design optimized for the MT-3000’s VLIW+SIMD architecture, supporting irregular operations through improved register allocation and instruction pipelining. Experimental results on a range of representative DL operators demonstrate that DynaChain simplifies kernel development for heterogeneous many-core architectures while delivering performance on par with expert-optimized libraries.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于巨大的搜索空间和特定于硬件的限制，针对 MT-3000 等新兴异构多核处理器优化深度学习 (DL) 算子，尤其是类似 GEMM 的算子具有挑战性。现有的方法（例如手工制作的库或通用自动调优器）要么开发成本昂贵，要么由于昂贵的搜索开销而提供次优性能。我们推出了 DynaChain，一个适用于 MT-3000 的运营商级优化框架。 DynaChain 将算子的计算和数据移动解耦，允许每个算子独立优化，并在整个算子计划中最大化全局数据重用。为了减少搜索空间，DynaChain 引入了约束依赖链，可以在探索过程中动态消除无效的调度选项。然后，它应用基于整数线性规划 (ILP) 的分解来处理不规则的矩阵维度，避免填充并提高硬件利用率。对于低级代码生成，DynaChain 提供针对 MT-3000 的 VLIW+SIMD 架构优化的硬件感知微内核设计，通过改进的寄存器分配和指令流水线支持不规则操作。一系列代表性深度学习算子的实验结果表明，DynaChain 简化了异构多核架构的内核开发，同时提供与专家优化库相当的性能。

papers.title: Core Hours and Carbon Credits: Incentivizing Sustainability in HPC.
papers.abstract: Efforts to reduce the environmental impact of HPC often focus on resource providers, but choices made by users, e.g., concerning where to run, can be equally consequential. Here we present evidence that new accounting methods that charge users for energy used can incentivize significantly more efficient behavior. We first survey 300 HPC users and find that fewer than 30% are aware of their energy consumption, and that energy efficiency is a low priority concern. We then propose two new multi-resource accounting methods that charge for computations based on their energy consumption or carbon footprint, respectively. Finally, we conduct both simulation studies and a user study to evaluate the impact of these two methods on user behavior. We find that while only providing users feedback on their energy use had no impact on their behavior, associating energy with cost incentivized users to select more efficient resources, and use 40% less energy.
papers.abstract_zh: 减少 HPC 对环境影响的努力通常集中在资源提供者身上，但用户做出的选择（例如在哪里运行）也可能同样重要。在这里，我们提供的证据表明，向用户收取能源费用的新会计方法可以激励显着更高效的行为。我们首先调查了 300 名 HPC 用户，发现只有不到 30% 的人了解自己的能源消耗，并且能源效率并不是最重要的问题。然后，我们提出了两种新的多资源核算方法，分别根据能源消耗或碳足迹进行计算收费。最后，我们进行模拟研究和用户研究，以评估这两种方法对用户行为的影响。我们发现，虽然仅向用户提供有关其能源使用情况的反馈对他们的行为没有影响，但将能源与成本激励用户联系起来，以选择更高效的资源，并减少 40% 的能源使用。

papers.title: Cosmological Hydrodynamics at Exascale: A Trillion-Particle Leap in Capability.
papers.abstract: Resolving the most fundamental questions in cosmology requires simulations that match the scale, fidelity, and physical complexity demanded by next-generation sky surveys. To achieve the realism needed for this critical scientific partnership, detailed gas dynamics must be treated self-consistently with gravity for end-to-end modeling of structure formation. Exascale computing enables simulations that span survey-scale volumes while incorporating key astrophysical processes that shape complex cosmic structures. We present results from CRK-HACC, a cosmological hydrodynamics code built for extreme scalability. Using separation-of-scale techniques, GPU-resident tree solvers, in situ analysis pipelines, and multi-tiered I/O, CRK-HACCexecuted Frontier-E: a four trillion particle full-sky simulation, over an order of magnitude larger than previous efforts. The run achieved 513.1 PFLOPs peak performance, processing 46.6 billion particles per second and writing more than 100 PB of data in just over one week of runtime. Frontier-E marks a significant advance in predictive modeling for next-generation cosmological science.
papers.abstract_zh: 解决宇宙学中最基本的问题需要进行与下一代天空勘测所需的规模、保真度和物理复杂性相匹配的模拟。为了实现这一关键科学伙伴关系所需的真实性，必须将详细的气体动力学与重力进行自洽处理，以进行结构形成的端到端建模。百亿亿次计算可以实现跨越勘测规模体积的模拟，同时结合塑造复杂宇宙结构的关键天体物理过程。我们展示了 CRK-HACC 的结果，这是一种专为极端可扩展性而构建的宇宙流体动力学代码。使用尺度分离技术、GPU 驻留树求解器、原位分析管道和多层 I/O，CRK-HACC 执行了 Frontier-E：4 万亿粒子全天空模拟，比之前的工作大了一个数量级。该运行实现了 513.1 PFLOPs 峰值性能，每秒处理 466 亿个粒子，并在一周多一点的运行时间内写入超过 100 PB 的数据。 Frontier-E 标志着下一代宇宙学科学预测模型的重大进步。

papers.title: COSMOS: Performance Portable Graph Pattern Matching with Domain-Specific Software Distributed Shared Memory.
papers.abstract: Graph pattern matching (GPM) is essential in fields like circuit logic synthesis, anomaly detection, social network analysis, cheminformatics, recommendation systems, and classification systems. Its NP-completeness and the irregular nature of graph data make scaling to distributed systems challenging, especially for complex supercomputers. Although utilizing architecture-specific optimization can improve the performance of Graph Pattern Matching on large-scale data, such ad-hoc solution lacks performance portability that not only causes vendor lock-in but also complicates the parallel evolution of GPM software with hardware architectures. This paper proposes Cosmos, a domain-specific software distributed shared memory model (DSM) that shields diversity of supercomputers from users and developers, achieving both performance portability and performance. This approach enables the same code scaling to thousands of nodes across different supercomputers while maintaining performance comparable to manually optimized versions.
papers.abstract_zh: 图模式匹配（GPM）在电路逻辑综合、异常检测、社交网络分析、化学信息学、推荐系统和分类系统等领域至关重要。它的 NP 完整性和图数据的不规则性质使得扩展到分布式系统具有挑战性，特别是对于复杂的超级计算机。虽然利用特定于架构的优化可以提高大规模数据上图模式匹配的性能，但这种临时解决方案缺乏性能可移植性，不仅导致供应商锁定，而且使 GPM 软件与硬件架构的并行演进变得复杂。本文提出了 Cosmos，一种特定领域的软件分布式共享内存模型（DSM），它可以屏蔽用户和开发人员的超级计算机的多样性，实现性能可移植性和性能。这种方法可以将相同的代码扩展到不同超级计算机上的数千个节点，同时保持与手动优化版本相当的性能。

papers.title: Coupling Static and Dynamic MPI Correctness Tools to Optimize Accuracy and Overhead.
papers.abstract: The complexity of MPI programming led to the development of various correctness tools. Static tools may examine the entire source but yield false positives as they lack runtime context. Dynamic tools, detecting errors at runtime, offer higher precision but suffer from false negatives due to limited coverage and substantial overhead due to instrumentation requirements. This paper presents a coupled workflow that combines these approaches. Forwarding static tool reports to dynamic tools improves the overall accuracy and reduces the instrumentation overhead. A proposed generic exchange format enables interoperability between static and dynamic tools. The coupled workflow is tested through the integration of the tools CoVer, SPMD IR, and MUST for detecting MPI local data races. It eliminates static tool false positives, enables detection of previously missed races in dynamic tools, and reduces the runtime overhead through selective instrumentation up to an order of magnitude.
papers.abstract_zh: MPI 编程的复杂性导致了各种正确性工具的开发。静态工具可能会检查整个源代码，但会产生误报，因为它们缺乏运行时上下文。在运行时检测错误的动态工具可以提供更高的精度，但由于覆盖范围有限以及仪器要求带来的大量开销，因此会出现误报。本文提出了一个结合了这些方法的耦合工作流程。将静态工具报告转发到动态工具可以提高整体准确性并减少仪器开销。所提出的通用交换格式可以实现静态和动态工具之间的互操作性。通过集成 CoVer、SPMD IR 和 MUST 工具来测试耦合工作流程，以检测 MPI 本地数据竞争。它消除了静态工具误报，能够检测动态工具中之前错过的比赛，并通过选择性检测将运行时开销降低到一个数量级。

papers.title: CPU- and GPU-initiated Communication Strategies for Conjugate Gradient Methods on Large GPU Clusters.
papers.abstract: The Conjugate Gradient (CG) method is a key building block in numerous applications, yet its low computational intensity and sensitivity to communication overhead make it difficult to scale efficiently on multi-GPU systems. In light of recent advances in multi-GPU communication technologies, we revisit CG parallelization for large-scale GPU clusters.
papers.abstract_zh: 共轭梯度 (CG) 方法是众多应用中的关键构建块，但其计算强度低且对通信开销敏感，因此难以在多 GPU 系统上有效扩展。鉴于多 GPU 通信技术的最新进展，我们重新审视大规模 GPU 集群的 CG 并行化。

papers.title: DAGonStore: Reliable Data Management for Workflows on the Computing Continuum with DynoStore and DAGonStar.
papers.abstract: The computing continuum has emerged as a promising paradigm for decentralized data processing. This approach brings computation closer to data sources, reducing latency and enabling faster insights. However, managing such distributed systems introduces new challenges, particularly in ensuring the availability and reliability of data across heterogeneous and failure-prone environments. In this paper, we focus on addressing these challenges by introducing DAGonStore as a novel component of the DAGonStar workflow engine, integrating it with the DynoStore wide-area storage system to provide resilient and location-transparent data access. DAGonStore implements reliability and availability schemes based on erasure codes and utilization-aware load-balancing to guarantee that input and output data remain accessible and consistent, even in the presence of storage node failures or disconnections. We validate our approach through different tests, demonstrating that DAGonStore enables scalable and fault-tolerant workflow execution across the computing continuum with minimal user intervention.
papers.abstract_zh: 计算连续体已成为去中心化数据处理的有前途的范例。这种方法使计算更接近数据源，减少延迟并实现更快的洞察。然而，管理此类分布式系统带来了新的挑战，特别是在确保异构和容易出现故障的环境中数据的可用性和可靠性方面。在本文中，我们通过引入 DAGonStore 作为 DAGonStar 工作流引擎的新颖组件，将其与 DynoStore 广域存储系统集成，以提供弹性且位置透明的数据访问，重点解决这些挑战。 DAGonStore 实施基于纠删码和利用率感知负载平衡的可靠性和可用性方案，以保证输入和输出数据保持可访问和一致，即使存在存储节点故障或断开连接。我们通过不同的测试验证了我们的方法，证明 DAGonStore 可以在整个计算连续体中以最少的用户干预实现可扩展且容错的工作流程执行。

papers.title: DAS-ILU: A Distributed Asynchronous Parallel ILU Factorization Based on Domain Decomposition.
papers.abstract: This paper presents DAS-ILU, a Distributed Asynchronous parallel Incomplete LU factorization method based on domain decomposition. DAS-ILU partitions the computational domain into independently processed interior nodes and asynchronously updated separator nodes, thereby reducing cross-processor dependencies and halving the separator size compared to conventional methods. To further improve performance, it employs optimized data exchange patterns to minimize communication overhead and extends support to block-structured sparse matrices via exact block inversions. Comprehensive evaluations on a range of problem types—including structural mechanics, computational fluid dynamics, and reservoir simulation demonstrate the superior performance of DAS-ILU. Compared to state-of-the-art ILU implementations, DAS-ILU achieves solve time speedups of up to 2.07 × over Chow-Patel’s fine-grained parallel ILU and up to 4.11 × over HYPRE’s ILU. Moreover, DAS-ILU exhibits strong robustness when applied to challenging nonsymmetric and indefinite systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出DAS-ILU，一种基于域分解的分布式异步并行不完全LU分解方法。 DAS-ILU 将计算域划分为独立处理的内部节点和异步更新的分隔符节点，从而减少跨处理器依赖性，并将分隔符大小与传统方法相比减半。为了进一步提高性能，它采用优化的数据交换模式来最大限度地减少通信开销，并通过精确的块反转扩展对块结构稀疏矩阵的支持。对一系列问题类型（包括结构力学、计算流体动力学和油藏模拟）的综合评估证明了 DAS-ILU 的卓越性能。与最先进的 ILU 实现相比，DAS-ILU 的求解时间加速比 Chow-Patel 的细粒度并行 ILU 高达 2.07 倍，比 HYPRE 的 ILU 高达 4.11 倍。此外，DAS-ILU 在应用于具有挑战性的非对称和不定系统时表现出很强的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Data Management System Analysis for Distributed Computing Workloads.
papers.abstract: Large-scale international collaborations such as ATLAS rely on globally distributed workflows and data management to process, move, and store vast volumes of data. ATLAS’s Production and Distributed Analysis (PanDA) workflow system and the Rucio data management system are each highly optimized for their respective design goals. However, operating them together at global scale exposes systemic inefficiencies, including underutilized resources, redundant or unnecessary transfers, and altered error distributions. Moreover, PanDA and Rucio currently lack shared performance awareness and coordinated, adaptive strategies.
papers.abstract_zh: ATLAS 等大规模国际合作依靠全球分布式工作流程和数据管理来处理、移动和存储大量数据。 ATLAS 的生产和分布式分析 (PanDA) 工作流程系统和 Rucio 数据管理系统均针对各自的设计目标进行了高度优化。然而，在全球范围内一起运行它们会暴露出系统效率低下的问题，包括资源利用不足、冗余或不必要的传输以及错误分布的改变。此外，PanDA 和 Rucio 目前缺乏共同的绩效意识和协调的自适应策略。

papers.title: Data Race Detection through Vibe Translation.
papers.abstract: We propose a data race detection approach for code written in a source programming language, by means of AI-agent translation to a target language, followed by conventional tool-based detection in the target language. We evaluate this translate-then-check approach by translating the C/Fortran+OpenMP programs in DataRaceBench to the Go programming language, and using the Go data race detector to check for races. The translation is controlled through natural language prompts, similar to approaches popularized as vibe coding. Translate-then-check achieves 92.8% accuracy and 9 false negatives for the C programs in DataRaceBench, compared to 89.9% accuracy and 17 false negatives for Clang with ThreadSanitizer and Archer applied to the original C programs. We discuss the approach and its overall accuracy, and show examples where translate-then-check leads to false negatives or positives due to limitations of the Go data race checker or, in some cases, limitations of the translation.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种针对用源编程语言编写的代码的数据竞争检测方法，通过人工智能代理翻译为目标语言，然后在目标语言中进行基于传统工具的检测。我们通过将 DataRaceBench 中的 C/Fortran+OpenMP 程序翻译为 Go 编程语言，并使用 Go 数据竞争检测器来检查竞争来评估这种先翻译后检查的方法。翻译是通过自然语言提示控制的，类似于流行的振动编码方法。 Translate-then-check 在 DataRaceBench 中为 C 程序实现了 92.8% 的准确率和 9 个假阴性，而将 ThreadSanitizer 和 Archer 应用于原始 C 程序的 Clang 的准确度为 89.9%，并有 17 个假阴性。我们讨论了该方法及其整体准确性，并展示了由于 Go 数据竞争检查器的限制或在某些情况下翻译的限制而导致先翻译后检查导致误报或误报的示例。

papers.title: Deep Learning-Enabled Supercritical Flame Simulation at Detailed Chemistry and Real-Fluid Accuracy Towards Trillion-Cell Scale.
papers.abstract: For decades, supercritical flame simulations incorporating detailed chemistry and real-fluid transport have been limited to millions of cells, constraining the resolved spatial and temporal scales of the physical system. We optimize the supercritical flame simulation software DeepFlame—which incorporates deep neural networks while retaining the real-fluid mechanical and chemical accuracy—from three perspectives: parallel computing, computational efficiency, and I/O performance. Our highly optimized DeepFlame achieves supercritical liquid oxygen/methane (LOX/\(\ce {CH4}\)) turbulent combustion simulation of up to 618 and 154 billion cells with unprecedented time-to-solution, attaining 439/1186 and 187/316 PFlop/s (32.3%/21.8% and 37.4%/31.8% of the peak) in FP32/mixed-FP16 precision on Sunway (98,304 nodes) and Fugaku (73,728 nodes) supercomputers, respectively. This computational capability surpasses existing capacities by three orders of magnitude, enabling the first practical simulation of rocket engine combustion with >100 LOX/\(\ce {CH4}\) injectors. This breakthrough establishes high-fidelity supercritical flame modeling as a critical design tool for next-generation rocket propulsion and ultra-high energy density systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 几十年来，结合详细化学和真实流体传输的超临界火焰模拟仅限于数百万个细胞，限制了物理系统的解析空间和时间尺度。我们从并行计算、计算效率和I/O性能三个角度对超临界火焰模拟软件DeepFlame进行了优化，该软件结合了深度神经网络，同时保留了真实流体的力学和化学精度。我们高度优化的 DeepFlame 实现了多达 618 和 1540 亿个细胞的超临界液氧/甲烷 (LOX/\(\ce {CH4}\)) 湍流燃烧模拟，求解速度前所未有，在分别在 Sunway（98,304 个节点）和 Fugaku（73,728 个节点）超级计算机上实现 FP32/混合 FP16 精度。这种计算能力超出现有能力三个数量级，首次实现了使用 >100 个 LOX/\(\ce {CH4}\) 喷射器的火箭发动机燃烧的实际模拟。这一突破将高保真超临界火焰建模确立为下一代火箭推进和超高能量密度系统的关键设计工具。

papers.title: Demystifying the Resilience of Large Language Model Inference: An End-to-End Perspective.
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks are known to be resilient to random bitwise faults in their parameters. However, this resilience has primarily been established through studies of classification models. The extent to which this claim holds for large-language models remains under-explored. In this work, we conduct an extensive measurement study on the impact of random bitwise faults in commercial-scale language model inference. We first expose that these language models are not truly resilient to random bit-flips. While aggregate metrics such as accuracy may suggest resilience, an in-depth inspection of the generated outputs shows significant degradation in text quality. Our analysis also shows that tasks requiring more complex reasoning suffer more from performance and quality degradation. Moreover, we extend our resilience analysis to models with augmented reasoning capabilities, such as Chain-of-Thought or Mixture of Experts architectures.
papers.abstract_zh: 众所周知，深度神经网络对其参数中的随机按位故障具有弹性。然而，这种弹性主要是通过分类模型的研究建立的。这种说法对于大语言模型的适用程度仍有待探索。在这项工作中，我们对商业规模语言模型推理中随机位错误的影响进行了广泛的测量研究。我们首先揭示这些语言模型并不能真正适应随机位翻转。虽然准确性等聚合指标可能表明弹性，但对生成的输出的深入检查显示文本质量显着下降。我们的分析还表明，需要更复杂推理的任务更容易受到性能和质量下降的影响。此外，我们将弹性分析扩展到具有增强推理功能的模型，例如思想链或专家混合架构。

papers.title: Deploying Lightweight Input-Aware Selective Instruction Duplication in HPC Applications.
papers.abstract: Modern high-performance computing (HPC) applications are increasingly vulnerable to silent data corruptions (SDCs) caused by transient hardware faults. While selective instruction duplication (SID) offers an efficient software-level protection strategy, existing SID methods rely on SDC vulnerability profile derived from only the default reference input often found in application suites. However, they overlook the input-dependent nature of SDC propagation. This leads to significant SDC coverage loss when inputs vary. We present Protego, a novel input-aware SID protection framework that efficiently adapts protection to runtime inputs. Protego performs a one-time vulnerability-guided input exploration to identify a small number of input groups with distinct SID protection patterns. At runtime, Protego uses lightweight features derived from input arguments to select and deploy the appropriate SID protection. Our evaluation across 10 HPC applications demonstrates the effectiveness and efficiency of Protego in mitigating SDC coverage loss across diverse inputs, compared to existing SID techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代高性能计算 (HPC) 应用程序越来越容易受到暂时性硬件故障引起的静默数据损坏 (SDC) 的影响。虽然选择性指令复制 (SID) 提供了有效的软件级保护策略，但现有的 SID 方法依赖于仅源自应用程序套件中常见的默认参考输入的 SDC 漏洞配置文件。然而，他们忽视了 SDC 传播的输入依赖性。当输入变化时，这会导致 SDC 覆盖范围显着损失。我们推出了 Protego，一种新颖的输入感知 SID 保护框架，可有效地根据运行时输入调整保护。 Protego 执行一次性漏洞引导输入探索，以识别具有不同 SID 保护模式的少量输入组。在运行时，Protego 使用从输入参数派生的轻量级功能来选择和部署适当的 SID 保护。我们对 10 个 HPC 应用程序进行的评估表明，与现有的 SID 技术相比，Protego 在减轻不同输入的 SDC 覆盖损失方面的有效性和效率。

papers.title: Design and Implementation of a Custom Hardware Accelerator for SZx Compression in Chipyard.
papers.abstract: Data movement bottlenecks have emerged as a dominant performance limiter in modern computing systems. At the same time, scientific detectors are generating unprecedented data volumes: X-ray detectors may soon produce terabytes per second and high-energy physics experiments demand bandwidth on the order of petabytes per second. Streaming compression offers a promising path to reducing data movement overhead, and hardware accelerators can further improve data throughput, while the exploration of system-level hardware compressors remains largely unexplored. This paper presents a preliminary study toward enabling hardware evaluation of streaming compressors. We design and implement a custom hardware accelerator for scientific data compression using modern hardware description languages, providing a complete end-to-end hardware acceleration system for CPU-based platforms. Our prototype features a multi-stage state machine, parallel element processing, and optimized data transfers, achieving 1.45 × speedup over a software baseline with comparable quality, with 31% fewer cycles per element and 45% faster compression throughput.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据移动瓶颈已成为现代计算系统中主要的性能限制因素。与此同时，科学探测器正在生成前所未有的数据量：X 射线探测器可能很快就会产生每秒 TB 级的数据，而高能物理实验则需要每秒 PB 级的带宽。流式压缩为减少数据移动开销提供了一条有希望的途径，硬件加速器可以进一步提高数据吞吐量，而系统级硬件压缩器的探索在很大程度上仍未得到探索。本文提出了对流式压缩器进行硬件评估的初步研究。我们使用现代硬件描述语言设计和实现用于科学数据压缩的定制硬件加速器，为基于CPU的平台提供完整的端到端硬件加速系统。我们的原型具有多级状态机、并行元素处理和优化的数据传输，在质量相当的情况下，比软件基准实现了 1.45 倍的加速，每个元素的周期减少了 31%，压缩吞吐量提高了 45%。

papers.title: Destination Earth: The Climate Change Adaptation Digital Twin.
papers.abstract: We present the first digital twin framework that operationalizes the production of multi-decadal, global climate projections at kilometre-scale resolution, developed within the European Union’s Destination Earth initiative. Using three coupled Earth system models and selected impact-sector applications, we have built end-to-end workflows for both regular and on-demand climate projections on two EuroHPC supercomputers, LUMI and MareNostrum5. These workflows produced the first-ever multi-decadal simulations at 5 km resolution across all major Earth system components, using the same output parameters and grid, and achieving a production throughput of 0.6 simulated years per day and a climate data portfolio of 6.6 petabytes. We demonstrate the scalability of two of these Earth system models across both CPU and GPU-based systems at global resolutions up to 1 km, across atmosphere, ocean, land, and sea-ice, and report record-breaking full-machine performance on LUMI and MareNostrum5 of up to 97 simulated days per day at 1 km resolution.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个数字孪生框架，该框架可在欧盟“目的地地球”倡议中开发，以千米级分辨率实现多十年全球气候预测的生成。使用三个耦合的地球系统模型和选定的影响部门应用程序，我们在两台 EuroHPC 超级计算机 LUMI 和 MareNostrum5 上构建了定期和按需气候预测的端到端工作流程。这些工作流程使用相同的输出参数和网格，在所有主要地球系统组件中首次以 5 公里分辨率进行了多年代际模拟，并实现了每天 0.6 年模拟的生产吞吐量和 6.6 PB 的气候数据组合。我们展示了其中两个地球系统模型在基于 CPU 和 GPU 的系统上的可扩展性，全局分辨率高达 1 公里，跨越大气层、海洋、陆地和海冰，并报告了 LUMI 和 MareNostrum5 上破纪录的全机性能，在 1 公里分辨率下每天模拟多达 97 天。

papers.title: Determining Levels of Detail for Simulators of Parallel and Distributed Computing Systems via Automated Calibration.
papers.abstract: There are two sources of inaccuracy when simulating parallel and distributed computing systems: (i) a simulator implemented at an insufficient level of detail; and (ii) incorrectly calibrated simulation parameter values. Increasing the simulator’s level of detail can improve accuracy, but at the cost of higher space, time, and/or software complexity. Furthermore, evaluating the intrinsic accuracy of a simulator requires that its parameters be well-calibrated. Making decisions regarding the level of detail is thus challenging. We propose a methodology for instantiating the simulation calibration process and a framework for automating this process, which makes it possible to pick appropriate levels of detail for any simulator. We demonstrate the usefulness of our approach via two case studies for two different domains.
papers.abstract_zh: 在模拟并行和分布式计算系统时，不准确的原因有两个：（i）模拟器的细节程度不够； (ii) 错误校准的模拟参数值。增加模拟器的细节水平可以提高准确性，但代价是更高的空间、时间和/或软件复杂性。此外，评估模拟器的固有精度需要对其参数进行良好校准。因此，做出有关详细程度的决策具有挑战性。我们提出了一种用于实例化模拟校准过程的方法和一个用于自动化该过程的框架，这使得可以为任何模拟器选择适当的细节级别。我们通过两个不同领域的两个案例研究证明了我们的方法的有用性。

papers.title: Development of a performance portable distributed FFT interface on top of the Kokkos ecosystem.
papers.abstract: This paper presents the development of a performance portable distributed FFT implementation on top of the Kokkos ecosystem. Thanks to kokkos and kokkos-fft, we largely simplify the implementation details of distributed FFT with performance portability. We newly develop unique features like batched-distributed FFT and interfaces to vendor distributed FFT libraries.
