We demonstrate that our distributed-FFT works efficiently on NVIDIA A100 and AMD MI250X GPUs, while keeping a reasonable performance on CPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Kokkos 生态系统之上的高性能便携式分布式 FFT 实现的开发。感谢 kokkos 和 kokkos-fft，我们极大地简化了具有性能可移植性的分布式 FFT 的实现细节。我们新开发了独特的功能，例如批量分布式 FFT 以及与供应商分布式 FFT 库的接口。我们证明了我们的分布式 FFT 在 NVIDIA A100 和 AMD MI250X GPU 上高效工作，同时在 CPU 上保持合理的性能。

papers.title: DHAP: Towards Efficient OLAP in a Disaggregated and Heterogeneous Environment.
papers.abstract: Disaggregation of hardware resources and integration of heterogeneous accelerators are two emerging trends in datacenters. Existing data systems focus on either disaggregated systems with homogeneous CPU processors or incorporation of heterogeneous accelerators within traditional monolithic servers. None can adequately address the challenges posed by systems that are both disaggregated and heterogeneous.
papers.abstract_zh: 硬件资源的分解和异构加速器的集成是数据中心的两个新兴趋势。现有的数据系统要么侧重于具有同质 CPU 处理器的分解系统，要么侧重于在传统单片服务器中整合异构加速器。没有人能够充分解决分散且异构的系统带来的挑战。

papers.title: Diff-MoE: Efficient Batched MoE Inference with Priority-Driven Differential Expert Caching.
papers.abstract: The emerging Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model mitigates the high compute cost of large-scale LLMs by sparsely activating a subset of experts during inference. However, MoE requires storing massive expert parameters, creating a severe memory bottleneck on resource-constrained GPUs. Existing approaches offload parameters to host memory and prefetch activated experts to GPU memory with sophisticated policies, but these solutions are tailored to single-batch inference and suffer from communication bottlenecks at larger batch sizes, limiting throughput. We identify two forms of locality in expert activation: a small set of experts are frequently invoked across inference (global locality), while others recur within short decoding bursts (temporal locality). To exploit this, we propose Diff-MoE, which introduces a differential cache hierarchy in GPU memory. Globally hot experts reside in per-layer high-priority caches, locally hot ones are dynamically managed in per-layer medium-priority caches under a priority-driven replacement policy, and the remaining cold experts are cached temporarily and evicted on demand. Moreover, Diff-MoE incorporates a lightweight predictor that prefetches experts likely needed in the next MoE layer, overlapping migration with computation to further reduce latency. Our evaluation shows that Diff-MoE improves inference throughput by 2.74 ×, 2.22 ×, and 1.55 × over DeepSpeed, Pre-gated MoE, and MoE-Infinity, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 新兴的专家混合 (MoE) 模型通过在推理过程中稀疏地激活专家子集来降低大规模法学硕士的高计算成本。然而，MoE 需要存储大量专家参数，这对资源有限的 GPU 造成了严重的内存瓶颈。现有方法将参数卸载到主机内存，并使用复杂的策略将激活的专家预取到 GPU 内存，但这些解决方案是针对单批次推理而定制的，并且在较大批次大小时会遇到通信瓶颈，从而限制了吞吐量。我们确定了专​​家激活中的两种形式的局部性：一小组专家在推理过程中经常被调用（全局局部性），而其他专家则在短解码突发中重复出现（时间局部性）。为了利用这一点，我们提出了 Diff-MoE，它在 GPU 内存中引入了差异缓存层次结构。全局热专家驻留在每层高优先级缓存中，局部热专家根据优先级驱动的替换策略在每层中优先级缓存中动态管理，其余冷专家临时缓存并按需驱逐。此外，Diff-MoE 还包含一个轻量级预测器，可以预取下一个 MoE 层可能需要的专家，将迁移与计算重叠，以进一步减少延迟。我们的评估表明，与 DeepSpeed、Pre-gate MoE 和 MoE-Infinity 相比，Diff-MoE 的推理吞吐量分别提高了 2.74 ×、2.22 × 和 1.55 ×。

papers.title: Differential Testing for Sequential to Parallel Transformations.
papers.abstract: Many high-performance programs can benefit from parallelism creating orders of magnitude speedups in their performance. However, translating code into its parallel equivalent is challenging, time-consuming, and error-prone. In recent years there has been a move to automate this process, creating algorithms to perform translations. While automation removes the manual effort, it needs to be accompanied by strong validation to ensure the parallel program has the same behavior as the sequential one. Incorrect translation can lead to data races, poor performance, rounding problems, or unexpected behavior. In this paper, we present a dynamic validation approach called Seq2ParDiff that uses differential testing to check conformance of the parallel program to the original sequential program version. We evaluate Seq2ParDiff on two sets of benchmarks for OpenMP programs. In the first, we find 20 new faults, outperforming state of the art static techniques. In the second, we find many faults that other tools miss, however we are not as effective in finding some types of data races.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多高性能程序可以从并行性中受益，从而使性能提高几个数量级。然而，将代码转换为并行代码具有挑战性、耗时且容易出错。近年来，人们开始采取自动化这一过程的举措，创建算法来执行翻译。虽然自动化消除了手动工作，但它需要伴随强大的验证，以确保并行程序具有与顺序程序相同的行为。不正确的转换可能会导致数据争用、性能不佳、舍入问题或意外行为。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 Seq2ParDiff 的动态验证方法，该方法使用差异测试来检查并行程序与原始顺序程序版本的一致性。我们在 OpenMP 程序的两组基准上评估 Seq2ParDiff。在第一个中，我们发现了 20 个新故障，其性能优于最先进的静态技术。在第二种情况下，我们发现了其他工具遗漏的许多错误，但是我们在发现某些类型的数据竞争方面并不那么有效。

papers.title: DiOMP-Offloading: Toward Portable Distributed Heterogeneous OpenMP.
papers.abstract: High-performance computing faces rising core counts, increasing heterogeneity, and growing memory bandwidth. These trends complicate programmability, portability, and scalability, while traditional MPI + OpenMP struggles with distributed GPU memory and portable performance. We present DiOMP-Offloading, a framework unifying OpenMP target offloading with a Partitioned Global Address Space (PGAS) model. Built on LLVM-OpenMP and GASNet-EX, it centrally manages global memory and supports symmetric/asymmetric GPU allocations, enabling remote put/get operations. DiOMP also integrates OMPCCL, a portable device-side collective layer that harmonizes allocation lifecycles and address translation across vendor backends. By eliminating separate MPI + X stacks and abstracting replicated device memory and communication logic, DiOMP improves scalability and programmability. Experiments on large-scale NVIDIA A100, Grace Hopper, and AMD MI250X platforms show superior micro-benchmark and application performance, demonstrating that DiOMP-Offloading offers a more portable, scalable, and efficient path for heterogeneous supercomputing.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算面临着核心数量不断增加、异构性不断增加以及内存带宽不断增加的问题。这些趋势使可编程性、可移植性和可扩展性变得复杂，而传统的 MPI + OpenMP 则在分布式 GPU 内存和便携性能方面遇到困难。我们提出了 DiOMP-Offloading，这是一个将 OpenMP 目标卸载与分区全局地址空间 (PGAS) 模型统一起来的框架。它基于 LLVM-OpenMP 和 GASNet-EX 构建，集中管理全局内存并支持对称/非对称 GPU 分配，从而实现远程放置/获取操作。 DiOMP 还集成了 OMPCCL，这是一个便携式设备端集体层，可协调跨供应商后端的分配生命周期和地址转换。通过消除单独的 MPI + X 堆栈并抽象复制的设备内存和通信逻辑，DiOMP 提高了可扩展性和可编程性。在大规模 NVIDIA A100、Grace Hopper 和 AMD MI250X 平台上进行的实验显示出卓越的微基准测试和应用程序性能，证明 DiOMP-Offloading 为异构超级计算提供了一条更便携、可扩展和高效的路径。

papers.title: Distributed Cross-Channel Hierarchical Aggregation for Foundation Models.
papers.abstract: Vision-based scientific foundation models hold significant promise for advancing scientific discovery and innovation. This potential stems from their ability to aggregate images from diverse sources—such as varying physical groundings or data acquisition systems—and to learn spatio-temporal correlations using transformer architectures. However, tokenizing and aggregating images can be compute-intensive, a challenge not fully addressed by current distributed methods. In this work, we introduce the Distributed Cross-Channel Hierarchical Aggregation (D-CHAG) approach designed for datasets with a large number of channels across image modalities. Our method is compatible with any model-parallel strategy and any type of vision transformer architecture, significantly improving computational efficiency. We evaluated D-CHAG on hyperspectral imaging and weather forecasting tasks. When integrated with tensor parallelism and model sharding, our approach achieved up to a 75% reduction in memory usage and more than doubled sustained throughput on up to 1,024 AMD GPUs on the Frontier Supercomputer.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于视觉的科学基础模型对于推进科学发现和创新具有重大前景。这种潜力源于它们能够聚合来自不同来源的图像（例如不同的物理接地或数据采集系统），并使用 Transformer 架构学习时空相关性。然而，标记化和聚合图像可能是计算密集型的，当前的分布式方法尚未完全解决这一挑战。在这项工作中，我们介绍了分布式跨通道分层聚合（D-CHAG）方法，该方法专为具有跨图像模态的大量通道的数据集而设计。我们的方法与任何模型并行策略和任何类型的视觉转换器架构兼容，显着提高了计算效率。我们在高光谱成像和天气预报任务上评估了 D-CHAG。当与张量并行性和模型分片集成时，我们的方法可将内存使用量减少高达 75%，并将 Frontier 超级计算机上多达 1,024 个 AMD GPU 的持续吞吐量提高一倍以上。

papers.title: Distributed Sparse Tensor Computations in MLIR.
papers.abstract: MLIR (Multi-Level Intermediate Representation) is a popular framework for implementing domain-specific compilers for optimizing matrix/tensor computations. However, no support currently exists in MLIR for distributed sparse tensor computations. In this paper, we describe the design and implementation of a new MLIR dialect for high-level specification of distributed sparse tensor computations. This specification is then lowered to MPI-based code for distributed execution. We illustrate the expressiveness of the new dialect using a Graph Attention Network computation with multiple sparse tensor operators.
papers.abstract_zh: MLIR（多级中间表示）是一种流行的框架，用于实现特定领域编译器以优化矩阵/张量计算。然而，MLIR 目前不支持分布式稀疏张量计算。在本文中，我们描述了一种新的 MLIR 方言的设计和实现，用于分布式稀疏张量计算的高级规范。然后将该规范降低为基于 MPI 的代码以进行分布式执行。我们使用具有多个稀疏张量运算符的图注意力网络计算来说明新方言的表达能力。

papers.title: Do Large Language Models Speak Scientific Workflows?
papers.abstract: In this work, we conduct an experimental study to explore applicability of LLMs for configuring, annotating, and translating scientific workflows. We use three different workflow-specific experiments and evaluate several open- and closed-source language models using state-of-the-art workflow systems. Our studies reveal that LLMs often struggle due to a lack of training data for scientific workflows. We further observe that the performance of LLMs varies across experiments and workflow systems. We discuss the implications of our findings and draw attention to several approaches extending LLM capabilities for scientific workflows. Our findings can help workflow developers and users in understanding LLM capabilities in scientific workflows, and motivate further research applying LLMs to workflows.
papers.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们进行了一项实验研究，以探索法学硕士在配置、注释和翻译科学工作流程方面的适用性。我们使用三种不同的特定于工作流的实验，并使用最先进的工作流系统评估几种开源和闭源语言模型。我们的研究表明，法学硕士常常因缺乏科学工作流程的培训数据而陷入困境。我们进一步观察到法学硕士的表现因实验和工作流程系统而异。我们讨论了我们的研究结果的含义，并提请人们注意扩展法学硕士能力以实现科学工作流程的几种方法。我们的研究结果可以帮助工作流程开发人员和用户了解科学工作流程中的法学硕士功能，并推动将法学硕士应用于工作流程的进一步研究。

papers.title: DoCeph: DPU-Offloaded Messaging in Ceph for Reduced Host CPU Utilization.
papers.abstract: Ceph is a widely used distributed object store, but its messenger layer imposes substantial CPU overhead on the host. To address this limitation, we propose DoCeph, a DPU-offloaded storage architecture for Ceph that disaggregates the system by offloading the communication-intensive messaging component to the DPU while retaining the storage backend on the host. The DPU efficiently manages communication, using lightweight RPC for metadata operations and DMA for data transfer. Moreover, DoCeph introduces a pipelining technique that overlaps data transmission with buffer preparation, mitigating hardware-imposed transfer size limitations. We implemented DoCeph on a Ceph cluster with NVIDIA BlueField-3 DPUs. Evaluation results indicate that DoCeph cuts host CPU usage by up to 92% while sustaining stable throughput and providing larger performance benefits for object writes over 1 MB.
papers.abstract_zh: Ceph 是一种广泛使用的分布式对象存储，但它的信使层给主机带来了大量的 CPU 开销。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了 DoCeph，这是一种用于 Ceph 的 DPU 卸载存储架构，它通过将通信密集型消息传递组件卸载到 DPU 来分解系统，同时保留主机上的存储后端。 DPU 有效地管理通信，使用轻量级 RPC 进行元数据操作，使用 DMA 进行数据传输。此外，DoCeph 引入了一种管道技术，该技术将数据传输与缓冲区准备重叠，从而减轻了硬件施加的传输大小限制。我们在具有 NVIDIA BlueField-3 DPU 的 Ceph 集群上实现了 DoCeph。评估结果表明，DoCeph 将主机 CPU 使用率降低高达 92%，同时保持稳定的吞吐量，并为超过 1 MB 的对象写入提供更大的性能优势。

papers.title: Dori: User Centered HPC for Data Intensive Computing.
papers.abstract: Dori has been the Joint Genome Institute’s (JGI) primary high-performance-computing cluster since 2022. It has been serving a wide array of research and production workloads, processing petabytes of data. This paper presents the challenges of running a mixed production/research cluster, a governance and communications model that enables addressing user needs, and a suite of software tools that have been developed to address the diverse set of requirements that result from a user base that manages and processes large amounts of data.
papers.abstract_zh: 自 2022 年以来，Dori 一直是联合基因组研究所 (JGI) 的主要高性能计算集群。它一直服务于广泛的研究和生产工作负载，处理 PB 级数据。本文介绍了运行混合生产/研究集群、能够满足用户需求的治理和通信模型以及一套软件工具的挑战，这些软件工具是为了满足管理和处理大量数据的用户群产生的各种需求而开发的。

papers.title: DPAR: High-Performance, Secure, and Scalable Differential Privacy-based AllReduce.
papers.abstract: Secure, efficient, and scalable AllReduce-based data aggregation is essential for Artificial Intelligence (AI) and scientific applications on modern High-Performance Computing (HPC) and cloud infrastructures. As AllReduce is increasingly used across these distributed infrastructures, privacy has become a critical concern. State-of-the-art (SOTA) Homomorphic Encryption (HE)-based AllReduce solutions introduce high overhead, require secure key exchanges, and remain vulnerable to collusion. We propose DPAR, the first differentially private, collusion-resistant AllReduce framework optimized for large-scale HPC and AI workloads. DPAR introduces three key innovations: integrating Differential Privacy (DP) to eliminate collusion risks without key exchanges, scalable noise growth to preserve accuracy, and performance optimizations using a noise pooling mechanism. DPAR is a drop-in Message Passing Interface (MPI) AllReduce replacement, providing strong privacy with minimal performance cost. Evaluated on Delta and Frontier supercomputers with up to 8192 cores, DPAR outperforms the SOTA HE solution by up to 34.7% in modern AI workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 安全、高效且可扩展的基于 AllReduce 的数据聚合对于现代高性能计算 (HPC) 和云基础设施上的人工智能 (AI) 和科学应用至关重要。随着 AllReduce 越来越多地在这些分布式基础设施中使用，隐私已成为一个关键问题。基于最先进 (SOTA) 同态加密 (HE) 的 AllReduce 解决方案会带来较高的开销，需要安全的密钥交换，并且仍然容易受到串通。我们提出了 DPAR，这是第一个针对大规模 HPC 和 AI 工作负载进行优化的差分隐私、防共谋的 AllReduce 框架。 DPAR 引入了三项关键创新：集成差分隐私 (DP) 以在无需密钥交换的情况下消除共谋风险、可扩展的噪声增长以保持准确性以及使用噪声池机制进行性能优化。 DPAR 是一个嵌入式消息传递接口 (MPI) AllReduce 替代品，以最低的性能成本提供强大的隐私性。在具有多达 8192 个内核的 D​​elta 和 Frontier 超级计算机上进行评估，DPAR 在现代 AI 工作负载中的性能比 SOTA HE 解决方案高出 34.7%。

papers.title: DRIM-ANN: An Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search Engine based on Commercial DRAM-PIMs.
papers.abstract: Approximate nearest neighbor search (ANNS) is essential for applications like recommendation systems and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) but is highly I/O-intensive and memory-demanding. CPUs face I/O bottlenecks, while GPUs are constrained by limited memory. DRAM-based Processing-in-Memory (DRAM-PIM) offers a promising alternative by providing high bandwidth, large memory capacity, and near-data computation. This work introduces DRIM-ANN, the first optimized ANNS engine leveraging UPMEM’s DRAM-PIM. While UPMEM scales memory bandwidth and capacity, it suffers from low computing power because of the limited processor embedded in each DRAM bank. To address this, we systematically optimize ANNS approximation configurations and replace expensive squaring operations with lookup tables to align the computing requirements with UPMEM’s architecture. Additionally, we propose load-balancing and I/O optimization strategies to maximize parallel processing efficiency. Experimental results show that DRIM-ANN achieves a 2.46× speedup over a 32-thread CPU and up to 2.67× over a GPU when deployed on computationally enhanced PIM platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 近似最近邻搜索 (ANNS) 对于推荐系统和检索增强生成 (RAG) 等应用至关重要，但 I/O 密集型且内存要求高。 CPU 面临 I/O 瓶颈，而 GPU 则受到有限内存的限制。基于 DRAM 的内存处理 (DRAM-PIM) 通过提供高带宽、大内存容量和近数据计算，提供了一种有前景的替代方案。这项工作介绍了 DRIM-ANN，这是第一个利用 UPMEM 的 DRAM-PIM 进行优化的 ANNS 引擎。虽然 UPMEM 可扩展内存带宽和容量，但由于每个 DRAM 组中嵌入的处理器有限，它的计算能力较低。为了解决这个问题，我们系统地优化了 ANNS 近似配置，并用查找表取代了昂贵的平方运算，以使计算要求与 UPMEM 的架构保持一致。此外，我们还提出了负载均衡和 I/O 优化策略，以最大限度地提高并行处理效率。实验结果表明，当部署在计算增强型 PIM 平台上时，DRIM-ANN 比 32 线程 CPU 实现了 2.46 倍的加速，比 GPU 实现了 2.67 倍的加速。

papers.title: Dynamic Factor Graphs for Attack Preemption.
papers.abstract: Preempting attacks that target supercomputing systems before damage is done remains a top security priority. The main challenge is that noisy attack attempts and unreliable alerts often mask real attacks, resulting in permanent damage, such as system integrity violations and data breaches. This paper describes a security testbed embedded in the live traffic of a supercomputer at the National Center for Supercomputing Applications (NCSA). The objective is to demonstrate attack preemption, i.e., stopping system compromise and data breaches in petascale supercomputers. Deployment of our testbed at NCSA enabled the following key contributions:
papers.abstract_zh: 在造成损害之前先发制人针对超级计算系统的攻击仍然是安全的首要任务。主要挑战是嘈杂的攻击尝试和不可靠的警报常常掩盖真正的攻击，从而导致永久性损害，例如系统完整性违规和数据泄露。本文描述了嵌入在国家超级计算应用中心 (NCSA) 超级计算机实时流量中的安全测试平台。目的是演示攻击先发制人，即阻止千万亿级超级计算机中的系统泄露和数据泄露。在 NCSA 部署我们的测试平台实现了以下关键贡献：

papers.title: Dynamic Thread Coarsening for CPU and GPU OpenMP Code.
papers.abstract: Thread coarsening is a well known optimization technique for GPUs. It enables instruction-level parallelism, reduces redundant computation, and can provide better memory access patterns. However, the presence of divergent control flow - cases where uniformity of branch conditions among threads cannot be proven at compile time - diminishes its effectiveness. In this work, we implement multi-level thread coarsening for CPU and GPU OpenMP code, by implementing a generic thread coarsening transformation on LLVM IR. We introduce dynamic convergence - a new technique that generates both coarsened and non-coarsened versions of divergent regions in the code and allows for the uniformity check to happen at runtime instead of compile time. We performed evalution on HecBench for GPU and LULESH for CPU. We found that best case speedup without dynamic convergence was 4.6% for GPUs and 2.9% for CPUs, while our approach achieved 7.5% for GPUs and 4.3% for CPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 线程粗化是一种众所周知的 GPU 优化技术。它支持指令级并行，减少冗余计算，并可以提供更好的内存访问模式。然而，不同控制流的存在（在编译时无法证明线程之间分支条件的一致性的情况）会降低其有效性。在这项工作中，我们通过在 LLVM IR 上实现通用线程粗化转换，为 CPU 和 GPU OpenMP 代码实现多级线程粗化。我们引入了动态收敛——一种新技术，可以在代码中生成发散区域的粗化和非粗化版本，并允许在运行时而不是编译时进行一致性检查。我们在 HecBench 上对 GPU 进行了评估，在 LULESH 上对 CPU 进行了评估。我们发现，在没有动态收敛的情况下，GPU 的最佳加速率为 4.6%，CPU 的加速率为 2.9%，而我们的方法的 GPU 加速率为 7.5%，CPU 加速率为 4.3%。

papers.title: Dyninst on the RISC-V: Binary Instrumentation in Support of Performance, Debugging, and Other Tools.
papers.abstract: Binary instrumentation provides the ability to instrument and modify a program after the compilation process has completed. Operating on the binary level allows instrumentation of the program as it was produced by the compiler. In addition, it can operate on programs or libraries for which you may not have the source code. Binary instrumentation is the foundation for a wide variety of tools, including those for performance profiling, debugging, tracing, architectural simulation, and digital forensics. Dyninst is a free and open-source suite of toolkits for building binary analysis and instrumentation tools for architectures that include the x86, ARM, and Power. It is used in tools produced by industry, academia and research labs. This paper describes our efforts to port Dyninst to the RISC-V architecture. We discuss the challenges presented by the RISC-V, our approaches to solving them, and the status of Dyninst on the RISC-V.
papers.abstract_zh: 二进制检测提供了在编译过程完成后检测和修改程序的能力。在二进制级别上操作允许对编译器生成的程序进行检测。此外，它还可以运行您可能没有源代码的程序或库。二进制检测是各种工具的基础，包括性能分析、调试、跟踪、架构模拟和数字取证工具。 Dyninst 是一套免费的开源工具包，用于为 x86、ARM 和 Power 等架构构建二进制分析和检测工具。它用于工业界、学术界和研究实验室生产的工具。本文介绍了我们将 Dyninst 移植到 RISC-V 架构的努力。我们讨论 RISC-V 带来的挑战、解决这些挑战的方法以及 Dyninst 在 RISC-V 上的地位。

papers.title: EAS-Sim: A Framework and its Methodology for the Co-Design of Multi-Objective, Energy-Aware Schedulers for AI Clusters.
papers.abstract: The explosive growth of large-scale Deep Learning (DL) models has made energy consumption a first-order operational cost and constraint in modern High-Performance Computing (HPC) datacenters. Existing DL schedulers, however, are largely single-objective and energy oblivious, struggling to balance the competing demands of performance, fairness, and Quality of Service (QoS). To address this flaw, we propose a methodology for the co-design of multi-objective and energy-aware schedulers together with the associated simulation framework, the so-called EAS-Sim. Our methodology stands as a systematic approach to enhance State-of-the-Art (SOTA) scheduling heuristics with energy-efficiency objectives.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模深度学习 (DL) 模型的爆炸性增长使能源消耗成为现代高性能计算 (HPC) 数据中心的首要运营成本和约束。然而，现有的深度学习调度程序大多是单一目标且忽视能源，难以平衡性能、公平性和服务质量 (QoS) 的竞争需求。为了解决这个缺陷，我们提出了一种多目标和能量感知调度程序与相关模拟框架（所谓的 EAS-Sim）协同设计的方法。我们的方法是一种系统方法，可增强最先进 (SOTA) 调度启发法并实现能效目标。

papers.title: eCounter: Inline Per-IP Network Monitoring at Millisecond Resolution via eBPF.
papers.abstract: Scientific data acquisition (SciDAQ) systems are shifting from archive-based workflows to streaming paradigms, where real-time, fine-grained network monitoring becomes essential. While P4-enabled devices offer per-packet in-band observability, they require specialized switches and routers. Host-side tools like Prometheus exporters lack sufficient temporal granularity. To bridge this gap, we present eCounter, a lightweight, hardware-agnostic, inline telemetry agent built on extended Berkeley Packet Filter (eBPF). eCounter captures per-interface ingress and egress traffic, categorized by IP address and protocol, at millisecond to sub-millisecond resolution. In a 100 Gbps environment, it continuously exports up to 3,257 time-series bins per second with only 4% CPU utilization at a 35 KiB/s data rate. We evaluate eCounter across diverse NIC MTU settings, hook types, CPU architectures and operating systems, and observed negligible impact on concurrent high-throughput streaming applications. Complexity analysis confirms that it can be readily scaled to distributed SciDAQ deployments.
papers.abstract_zh: 科学数据采集 (SciDAQ) 系统正在从基于存档的工作流程转向流范式，其中实时、细粒度的网络监控变得至关重要。虽然支持 P4 的设备提供每个数据包的带内可观测性，但它们需要专门的交换机和路由器。像 Prometheus 导出器这样的主机端工具缺乏足够的时间粒度。为了弥补这一差距，我们推出了 eCounter，这是一种轻量级、与硬件无关的内联遥测代理，基于扩展伯克利数据包过滤器 (eBPF) 构建。 eCounter 以毫秒到亚毫秒的分辨率捕获每个接口的入口和出口流量，按 IP 地址和协议分类。在 100 Gbps 环境中，它每秒连续导出多达 3,257 个时间序列 bin，在 35 KiB/s 数据速率下，CPU 利用率仅为 4%。我们评估了不同 NIC MTU 设置、挂钩类型、CPU 架构和操作系统的 eCounter，并观察到对并发高吞吐量流应用程序的影响可以忽略不计。 Complexity analysis confirms that it can be readily scaled to distributed SciDAQ deployments.

papers.title: EDDE: Container Deployment Framework Beyond the Cloud.
papers.abstract: Containers, renowned for their lightweight nature and flexibility, have seen growing adoption for deploying edge services such as web applications. However, existing cloud-oriented container deployment frameworks fail to address the unique challenges of edge environments, including geographical distribution, device heterogeneity, and resource constraints. This oversight leads to suboptimal performance for latency-sensitive edge services like HPC/AI-powered autonomous driving and edge gaming, which demand rapid startup and immediate responsiveness.
papers.abstract_zh: 容器以其轻量级和灵活性而闻名，越来越多地用于部署 Web 应用程序等边缘服务。然而，现有的面向云的容器部署框架无法解决边缘环境的独特挑战，包括地理分布、设​​备异构性和资源限制。这种疏忽导致对延迟敏感的边缘服务（例如 HPC/AI 支持的自动驾驶和边缘游戏）性能不佳，这些服务需要快速启动和即时响应。

papers.title: Effective Node-Level Anomaly Detection in HPC Systems via Coarse-Grained Clustering and Fine-Grained Model Sharing.
papers.abstract: High-performance computing (HPC) systems are crucial for scientific advancement and engineering breakthroughs. Unexpected performance degradation or system failures can severely impact these endeavors. This paper introduces NodeSentry, a novel unsupervised anomaly detection framework tailored for compute nodes of large-scale HPC systems. NodeSentry leverages a combined approach of coarse-grained clustering and fine-grained model sharing to effectively address the challenges posed by the massive node scales, frequent job transitions, and complex patterns characteristic of modern HPC deployments. Evaluation on two real-world HPC datasets demonstrates NodeSentry’s superior performance, achieving an F1-score exceeding 0.876. This represents a 0.560 average improvement over existing best baseline methods, while simultaneously reducing training overhead by an average of 45.69%. Furthermore, to promote reproducibility and contribute to the broader research community, we open-source NodeSentry’s codebase and introduce a novel clustering adjustment and anomaly labeling tool specifically designed for HPC systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 系统对于科学进步和工程突破至关重要。意外的性能下降或系统故障可能会严重影响这些工作。本文介绍了 NodeSentry，这是一种专为大规模 HPC 系统的计算节点量身定制的新型无监督异常检测框架。 NodeSentry 利用粗粒度集群和细粒度模型共享相结合的方法，有效解决现代 HPC 部署的大规模节点规模、频繁的作业转换和复杂模式所带来的挑战。对两个真实 HPC 数据集的评估证明了 NodeSentry 的卓越性能，F1 分数超过 0.876。这比现有最佳基线方法平均提高了 0.560，同时平均减少了 45.69% 的训练开销。此外，为了提高可重复性并为更广泛的研究社区做出贡献，我们开源了 NodeSentry 的代码库，并引入了专为 HPC 系统设计的新型聚类调整和异常标记工具。

papers.title: Efficient Embedding Initialization via Dominant Eigenvector Projections.
papers.abstract: The embedding layer is essential in deep learning, transforming high-dimensional data into compact representations. However, growing datasets and model sizes pose challenges in training time, memory, and generalization. We propose a scalable method for embedding initialization via spectral dimensionality reduction using dominant eigenvector projections.
papers.abstract_zh: 嵌入层在深度学习中至关重要，它将高维数据转换为紧凑的表示。然而，不断增长的数据集和模型大小给训练时间、内存和泛化带来了挑战。我们提出了一种可扩展的方法，通过使用主特征向量投影的谱维数降低来嵌入初始化。

papers.title: eIM: GPU-Accelerated Efficient Influence Maximization in Large-Scale Social Networks.
papers.abstract: The influence maximization problem seeks to identify a subset of k vertices in a network that, when activated, maximizes the spread of influence under a given diffusion process. It is NP-hard to find the optimal set of influential vertices; thus, recent studies have focused on developing algorithms to find an approximate solution. The state-of-the-art parallel implementations leverage a sketch-based algorithm called influence maximization via martingales (IMM). However, IMM incurs significant memory overhead due to the storage requirements of graph traversal samples called random reverse reachable (RRR) sets. In this paper, we introduce efficient Influence Maximization (eIM), a novel GPU-accelerated IMM algorithm designed to improve the efficiency and scalability of IMM. Compared to two popular GPU implementations, eIM achieves similar accuracy with one to three orders of magnitude speedups while reducing the memory requirement to store network data and RRR sets up to 54%.
papers.abstract_zh: 影响力最大化问题旨在识别网络中 k 个顶点的子集，该子集在激活时会在给定扩散过程下最大化影响力的传播。找到影响力顶点的最优集合是 NP 困难的；因此，最近的研究重点是开发算法来寻找近似解。最先进的并行实现利用基于草图的算法，称为通过鞅影响最大化 (IMM)。然而，由于称为随机反向可达 (RRR) 集的图遍历样本的存储要求，IMM 会产生大量内存开销。在本文中，我们介绍了高效的影响最大化（eIM），这是一种新颖的 GPU 加速的 IMM 算法，旨在提高 IMM 的效率和可扩展性。与两种流行的 GPU 实现相比，eIM 实现了相似的精度，加速了一到三个数量级，同时减少了存储网络数据的内存需求，RRR 设置高达 54%。

papers.title: EMLIO: Minimizing I/O Latency and Energy Consumption for Large-Scale AI Training.
papers.abstract: Large-scale deep learning workloads increasingly suffer from I/O bottlenecks as datasets grow beyond local storage capacities and GPU compute outpaces network and disk latencies. While recent systems optimize data-loading time, they overlook the energy cost of I/O—a critical factor at large scale. We introduce EMLIO, an Efficient Machine Learning I/O service that jointly minimizes end-to-end data-loading latency (T) and I/O energy consumption (E) across variable-latency networked storage. EMLIO deploys a lightweight data-serving daemon on storage nodes that serializes and batches raw samples, streams them over TCP with out-of-order prefetching, and integrates seamlessly with GPU-accelerated (NVIDIA DALI) preprocessing on the client side. In exhaustive evaluations over local disk, LAN (0.05 ms & 10 ms round trip time (RTT)), and WAN (30 ms RTT) environments, EMLIO delivers on average up to 8.6 × faster I/O and 10.9 × lower energy use compared to state-of-the-art loaders, while maintaining constant performance and energy profiles irrespective of network distance. EMLIO’s service-based architecture offers a scalable blueprint for energy-aware I/O in next-generation AI clouds.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着数据集的增长超出本地存储容量以及 GPU 计算速度超过网络和磁盘延迟，大规模深度学习工作负载越来越受到 I/O 瓶颈的困扰。虽然最新的系统优化了数据加载时间，但它们忽略了 I/O 的能源成本——这是大规模的一个关键因素。我们推出了 EMLIO，这是一种高效的机器学习 I/O 服务，可共同最小化可变延迟网络存储中的端到端数据加载延迟 (T) 和 I/O 能耗 (E)。 EMLIO 在存储节点上部署一个轻量级数据服务守护进程，用于序列化和批处理原始样本，通过 TCP 进行乱序预取流式传输，并与客户端的 GPU 加速 (NVIDIA DALI) 预处理无缝集成。在对本地磁盘、LAN（0.05 ms 和 10 ms 往返时间 (RTT)）和 WAN（30 ms RTT）环境进行的详尽评估中，与最先进的加载器相比，EMLIO 的 I/O 速度平均提高了 8.6 倍，能耗降低了 10.9 倍，同时无论网络距离如何，都能保持恒定的性能和能源配置。 EMLIO 基于服务的架构为下一代 AI 云中的能源感知 I/O 提供了可扩展的蓝图。

papers.title: Enabling the syscall_intercept library for RISC-V.
papers.abstract: System call interception is a technique used to alter system call behavior, enable sandboxing, perform dynamic analysis, inject errors for testing, profile performance, and other similar use cases. The syscall_intercept library provides high-performance interception available on various architectures, including x86, PowerPC, and ARM. However, it was not available on RISC-V. In this paper, we describe the design decisions, implementation, and evaluation of a fully functional syscall_intercept port for RISC-V Linux systems, enabling interception from user space without requiring superuser privileges. This work fills a gap in RISC-V tooling, supporting broader adoption in research and system development.
papers.abstract_zh: 系统调用拦截是一种用于改变系统调用行为、启用沙箱、执行动态分析、注入测试错误、分析性能和其他类似用例的技术。 syscall_intercept 库提供可用于各种体系结构（包括 x86、PowerPC 和 ARM）的高性能拦截。然而，它在 RISC-V 上不可用。在本文中，我们描述了 RISC-V Linux 系统的全功能 syscall_intercept 端口的设计决策、实现和评估，无需超级用户权限即可从用户空间进行拦截。这项工作填补了 RISC-V 工具的空白，支持在研究和系统开发中更广泛的采用。

papers.title: Enabling Unstructured Sparse Fine-Tuning and Inference for Foundation Models on Wafer-Scale Engine.
papers.abstract: Foundation models, such as large language models, have become ubiquitous and are employed in many applications. These models are often adapted to a desired domain or downstream task through a fine-tuning stage. Cerebras, the wafer-scale AI accelerator, is a suitable platform for running foundation models. However, existing works utilizing sparse pre-training followed by dense fine-tuning result in dense models, failing to reduce the inference cost, measured in floating-point operations. This paper proposes Phoenix, a solution to enable sparse inference for downstream tasks on Cerebras. Phoenix features an innovative strategy that merges sparse weights with low-rank adapters to enable sparsity without losing accuracy, overcoming the limitations of previous approaches. Phoenix also leverages the Cerebras CS-2 wafer-scale engine to accelerate the inference process using unstructured sparsity methods. We evaluate multiple adaptation scenarios, models, and a range of sparsity levels to demonstrate the effectiveness of Phoenix. Phoenix maintains accuracy comparable to dense baselines even at 50–60% sparsity. Meanwhile, it achieves up to a near 2 × reduction in FLOPs and a 1.7 × improvement in inference throughput compared to a single NVIDIA A100 GPU during the inference stage.
papers.abstract_zh: 基础模型，例如大型语言模型，已经变得无处不在，并被用于许多应用程序中。这些模型通常通过微调阶段适应所需的领域或下游任务。 Cerebras 是晶圆级人工智能加速器，是运行基础模型的合适平台。然而，现有的工作利用稀疏预训练，然后进行密集微调，导致密集模型，无法降低在浮点运算中测量的推理成本。本文提出了 Phoenix，一种为 Cerebras 上的下游任务启用稀疏推理的解决方案。 Phoenix 采用创新策略，将稀疏权重与低秩适配器相结合，在不损失准确性的情况下实现稀疏性，克服了以前方法的局限性。 Phoenix 还利用 Cerebras CS-2 晶圆级引擎，使用非结构化稀疏方法加速推理过程。我们评估了多种适应场景、模型和一系列稀疏级别，以证明 Phoenix 的有效性。即使在 50-60% 的稀疏度下，Phoenix 也能保持与密集基线相当的精度。同时，在推理阶段，与单个 NVIDIA A100 GPU 相比，它的 FLOP 减少了近 2 倍，推理吞吐量提高了 1.7 倍。

papers.title: Energy-Aware HPC Scheduling with LLM-Based Power Prediction.
papers.abstract: As the increasing energy consumption of High-Performance Computing (HPC) systems places greater strain on electric grid infrastructure, operational strategies for load balancing become critically important. Energy-aware scheduling offers a promising solution by enabling HPC systems to function as actively managed loads within the energy grid. Despite extensive theoretical research on this strategy, practical implementations and real-system evaluations remain scarce. To bridge this gap, we introduce a systematic approach to developing, evaluating, and implementing energy-aware scheduling without modifications to Slurm’s core scheduler. Our method includes a novel mechanism for per-job power prediction based on Large Language Model embeddings of enriched job scripts, coupled with a lightweight, deployable scheduling strategy. Our predictor reduces per-job power MAE by 15% compared to the current state-of-the-art, and our simulated scheduler shifts 4.0 MWh onto on-site solar without throughput loss. These results demonstrate a clear and practical pathway to production deployment of energy-aware scheduling in HPC.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着高性能计算 (HPC) 系统能耗的增加给电网基础设施带来更大的压力，负载平衡的运营策略变得至关重要。能源感知调度提供了一种有前景的解决方案，使 HPC 系统能够充当能源网中主动管理的负载。尽管对该策略进行了广泛的理论研究，但实际实施和实际系统评估仍然很少。为了弥补这一差距，我们引入了一种系统方法来开发、评估和实施能源感知调度，而无需修改 Slurm 的核心调度程序。我们的方法包括一种基于丰富作业脚本的大型语言模型嵌入的每作业功率预测的新颖机制，再加上轻量级、可部署的调度策略。与当前最先进的技术相比，我们的预测器将每个作业的功率 MAE 降低了 15%，并且我们的模拟调度器将 4.0 MWh 转移到现场太阳能，而没有吞吐量损失。这些结果展示了 HPC 中能源感知调度的生产部署的清晰且实用的途径。

papers.title: Energy-aware performance portability with OpenMP dynamic variants.
papers.abstract: Performance portability in HPC and embedded systems is often limited by power and thermal constraints. The OpenMP programming model offers a compile-time mechanism known as variants, allowing different function specializations. Previous research extended this concept to the runtime level, enabling dynamic variant selection. We build on these foundations with an energy‑aware runtime that augments variant selection with low‑overhead power and temperature instrumentation and a multi‑criteria policy balancing power caps, thermal headroom, and performance. Implemented in LLVM and publicly available, our mechanism profiles per‑variant energy and thermal behavior, selecting specializations at runtime based on user‑defined thresholds and live system state. Validation on HPC and embedded platforms shows the runtime enforces dynamic power caps with 98% compliance on a workstation (versus 67% unconstrained). On thermally constrained edge devices, proactive CPU/GPU migration beats hardware throttling, cutting execution time by 39% while maintaining stability. In a simulated battery‑limited mission, energy‑aware selection extends battery lifetime.
papers.abstract_zh: HPC 和嵌入式系统中的性能可移植性通常受到功耗和热约束的限制。 OpenMP 编程模型提供了一种称为变体的编译时机制，允许不同的函数专门化。先前的研究将这一概念扩展到运行时级别，从而实现动态变体选择。我们在这些基础上构建了能源感知运行时，通过低开销功率和温度仪器以及平衡功率上限、热余量和性能的多标准策略来增强变体选择。我们的机制在 LLVM 中实现并公开可用，可分析每个变量的能量和热行为，并根据用户定义的阈值和实时系统状态在运行时选择专业化。 HPC 和嵌入式平台上的验证显示，运行时在工作站上强制执行动态功率上限，合规性为 98%（相对于不受约束的合规性为 67%）。在热受限的边缘设备上，主动 CPU/GPU 迁移击败了硬件限制，将执行时间缩短了 39%，同时保持了稳定性。在模拟电池有限的任务中，能源感知选择可以延长电池寿命。

papers.title: Engine-Agnostic Model Hot-Swapping for Cost-Effective LLM Inference.
papers.abstract: The widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) has led to an increased demand for large-scale inference services, presenting a unique set of challenges for the HPC community. These services are characterized by moderate-scale models that require dedicating expensive GPUs to handle bursty inference requests, leading to high costs and resource underutilization. In this paper, we propose SwapServeLLM — a novel engine-agnostic hot-swapping method for cost-effective inference. This model hot-swapping approach is enabled by recent driver capabilities for transparent GPU checkpointing. SwapServeLLM optimizes resource utilization by dynamically allocating GPU resources with two key mechanisms: (1) a demand-aware preemption leveraging information about concurrent requests, and (2) efficient request routing with memory reservation minimizing inference latency. Our evaluation demonstrates that SwapServeLLM optimizes model loading for state-of-the-art inference engines by 31 × compared to vLLM and up to 29% compared to Ollama, enabling cost-effective inference.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的广泛采用导致了对大规模推理服务的需求增加，为 HPC 社区带来了一系列独特的挑战。这些服务的特点是中等规模的模型，需要专用昂贵的 GPU 来处理突发的推理请求，从而导致成本高昂和资源利用不足。在本文中，我们提出了 SwapServeLLM——一种新颖的与引擎无关的热交换方法，用于经济高效的推理。这种模型热插拔方法是通过最新的透明 GPU 检查点驱动程序功能实现的。 SwapServeLLM 通过使用两种关键机制动态分配 GPU 资源来优化资源利用率：(1) 利用并发请求信息的需求感知抢占，以及 (2) 通过内存预留实现高效请求路由，最大限度地减少推理延迟。我们的评估表明，与 vLLM 相比，SwapServeLLM 将最先进推理引擎的模型加载优化了 31 倍，与 Ollama 相比高达 29%，从而实现了经济高效的推理。

papers.title: Enhancing ChatPORT with CUDA-to-SYCL Kernel Translation Capability.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong capabilities in general code translation. However, code translation involving parallel programming models remains largely unexplored. This work enhances the capabilities of code LLMs in CUDA-to-SYCL kernel translation with parameter-efficient fine-tuning. The resultant fine-tuned LLM, called ChatPORT, is an effort to provide high-fidelity translations from one programming model to another. We describe the preparation of datasets from heterogeneous computing benchmarks for model fine-tuning and testing, the parameter-efficient fine-tuning of 19 open-source code models ranging in size from 0.5 to 34 billion parameters and evaluate the correctness rates of the SYCL kernels by the fine-tuned models. The experimental results show that most code models fail to translate CUDA codes to SYCL correctly. However, fine-tuning these models using a small set of CUDA and SYCL kernels can enhance the capabilities of these models in kernel translation. Depending on the sizes of the models, the correctness rate ranges from 19.9% to 81.7% for a test dataset of 62 CUDA kernels.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在通用代码翻译方面表现出了强大的能力。然而，涉及并行编程模型的代码翻译在很大程度上仍未得到探索。这项工作通过参数高效的微调增强了代码 LLM 在 CUDA 到 SYCL 内核转换中的能力。由此产生的经过微调的法学硕士（称为 ChatPORT）旨在提供从一种编程模型到另一种编程模型的高保真转换。我们描述了用于模型微调和测试的异构计算基准数据集的准备，对 19 个开源代码模型（参数大小从 0.5 到 340 亿个参数）的参数高效微调，并通过微调模型评估 SYCL 内核的正确率。实验结果表明，大多数代码模型无法正确将 CUDA 代码转换为 SYCL。然而，使用一小组 CUDA 和 SYCL 内核对这些模型进行微调可以增强这些模型在内核翻译方面的能力。根据模型的大小，62 个 CUDA 内核的测试数据集的正确率范围为 19.9% 到 81.7%。

papers.title: Enhancing HPX with FleCSI: Automatic Detection of Implicit Task Dependencies.
EQSIM Agent: A Conversational AI for Interactive Exploration of Large-scale Earthquake Simulation Data.
papers.abstract: Large-scale earthquake simulations produce massive, high-fidelity datasets essential for seismic risk analysis, however, their volume and complexity create a barrier for researchers from various backgrounds who lack specialized knowledge and programming skills. To address this challenge, we used Large Language Models (LLMs) to develop the EQSIM Agent, a conversational AI designed for the interactive exploration of large-scale earthquake simulation data. The agent allows users to query data using natural language, receiving results such as text, images, videos, and maps. Beyond standard querying and visualization, it introduces novel features like a vision-based waveform similarity search and a Retrieval-Augmented Generation system that answers questions with facts from relevant publications. This paper details the agent’s implementation and evaluates the challenges of using LLMs in a scientific context. We also provide a practical analysis of various LLMs, evaluating their performance, tool-calling reliability, and cost, to guide the development of future scientific AI agents.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模地震模拟产生了地震风险分析所必需的大量高保真数据集，但其数量和复杂性给缺乏专业知识和编程技能的不同背景的研究人员造成了障碍。为了应对这一挑战，我们使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 开发了 EQSIM 代理，这是一种对话式 AI，专为大规模地震模拟数据的交互式探索而设计。该代理允许用户使用自然语言查询数据，接收文本、图像、视频和地图等结果。除了标准查询和可视化之外，它还引入了新颖的功能，例如基于视觉的波形相似性搜索和检索增强生成系统，该系统可以用相关出版物中的事实回答问题。本文详细介绍了该代理的实施，并评估了在科学背景下使用法学硕士的挑战。我们还提供对各种法学硕士的实用分析，评估其性能、工具调用可靠性和成本，以指导未来科学人工智能代理的开发。

papers.title: Error Analysis of Globally Distributed Workflow Management System.
papers.abstract: The management of data-intensive workflows in globally distributed computing systems, such as those used in high-energy physics, presents significant challenges in scalability, resource allocation, and fault tolerance. Workflow Management Systems (WMS) provide a critical framework for addressing these challenges by automating, monitoring, and optimizing the execution of complex computational tasks across heterogeneous resources. This paper introduces the Production and Distributed Analysis (PanDA) system, a sophisticated WMS developed for the ATLAS experiment at the Large Hadron Collider (LHC). PanDA is engineered to handle the immense data processing and analysis demands of ATLAS, operating on the Worldwide LHC Computing Grid (WLCG), one of the largest distributed computing infrastructures globally. However, faults or errors frequently occur when distributing and managing workloads on such a globally distributed computing grid. Errors can occur in various form across different sites. To understand and mitigate these errors, analysis is the first step. In this work, we analyze the errors that occurs across the globally distributed grid which will be the stepping stone towards designing effective mitigation strategies.
papers.abstract_zh: 全球分布式计算系统（例如高能物理中使用的系统）中数据密集型工作流程的管理在可扩展性、资源分配和容错方面提出了重大挑战。工作流管理系统 (WMS) 提供了一个关键框架，通过自动化、监控和优化跨异构资源的复杂计算任务的执行来应对这些挑战。本文介绍了生产和分布式分析 (PanDA) 系统，这是一个为大型强子对撞机 (LHC) 的 ATLAS 实验开发的复杂 WMS。 PanDA 旨在满足 ATLAS 巨大的数据处理和分析需求，在全球大型强子对撞机计算网格 (WLCG) 上运行，这是全球最大的分布式计算基础设施之一。然而，在这样的全球分布式计算网格上分配和管理工作负载时，经常会出现故障或错误。不同站点上可能会出现各种形式的错误。要了解并减轻这些错误，分析是第一步。在这项工作中，我们分析了全球分布式网格中发生的错误，这将成为设计有效缓解策略的基石。

papers.title: Evaluating Accuracy and Performance Tradeoffs in GPU Accelerated Single Cell RNA-seq Analysis.
papers.abstract: Single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) has rapidly become a big-data field, with experiments now profiling up to millions of cells in a single study. While GPU-accelerated pipelines (built on frameworks like NVIDIA RAPIDS and CuPy) promise to drastically reduce runtimes, questions remain about the fidelity and reproducibility of their outputs compared to traditional CPU-based workflows. We benchmarked matched CPU and GPU workflows on a public 1.3-million-cell dataset and systematically downsampled subsets. GPUs delivered a dramatic end-to-end speedup of over 10×, but this performance gain was accompanied by a measurable tradeoff in biological output. We found a consistent, moderate level of concordance between CPU and GPU clustering results (Adjusted Rand Index approximately 0.5) across all sample sizes. Furthermore, we demonstrated that clustering fidelity was relative to the platform used to generate the reference “ground truth.” We also found that fidelity did not strongly correlate with sample size, suggesting that platform-specific algorithmic differences and parameter choices, such as a fixed feature space, were more significant drivers of variability than cell number alone. Together, these results indicated that while modern GPUs enabled fast, large-scale scRNA-seq analysis, researchers needed to be aware of the inherent tradeoffs and consider the choice of computational platform as a critical variable impacting the final biological interpretation.
papers.abstract_zh: 单细胞 RNA 测序 (scRNA-seq) 已迅速成为一个大数据领域，现在的实验可在一项研究中分析多达数百万个细胞。虽然 GPU 加速管道（基于 NVIDIA RAPIDS 和 CuPy 等框架构建）有望大幅缩短运行时间，但与传统的基于 CPU 的工作流程相比，其输出的保真度和可重复性仍然存在问题。我们在公共 130 万个单元数据集上对匹配的 CPU 和 GPU 工作流程进行了基准测试，并系统地对子集进行了下采样。 GPU 提供了超过 10 倍的显着端到端加速，但这种性能增益伴随着生物输出的可衡量的权衡。我们发现所有样本大小的 CPU 和 GPU 聚类结果（调整后的兰德指数约为 0.5）之间具有一致、中等程度的一致性。此外，我们证明了聚类保真度与用于生成参考“地面实况”的平台相关。我们还发现保真度与样本大小没有很强的相关性，这表明特定于平台的算法差异和参数选择（例如固定的特征空间）是比单独的细胞数量更重要的变异性驱动因素。总之，这些结果表明，虽然现代 GPU 能够实现快速、大规模的 scRNA-seq 分析，但研究人员需要意识到固有的权衡，并将计算平台的选择视为影响最终生物学解释的关键变量。

papers.title: Evaluating HPC Scheduling Strategies for Urgent Workloads.
papers.abstract: Scientific computing centers increasingly face workloads with diverse urgency requirements, driven by applications that demand rapid or even immediate execution. Appropriately configured scheduling policies can significantly improve both user satisfaction and overall cluster utilization. In this work, we present a systematic analysis of scheduler configurations under scenarios where a fraction of jobs have urgent computing needs. We evaluate multiple job scheduling simulators, develop a lightweight job-submission emulation framework, and create tools to analyze and visualize the resulting scheduling data. Our study identifies key trade-offs between responsiveness, fairness, and efficiency, and offers a set of practical scheduling configurations (particularly for Slurm) that can be tailored to HPC environments supporting mixed-urgency workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 科学计算中心越来越多地面临着各种紧急要求的工作负载，这些工作负载是由需要快速甚至立即执行的应用程序驱动的。适当配置的调度策略可以显着提高用户满意度和整体集群利用率。在这项工作中，我们对部分作业有紧急计算需求的情况下的调度程序配置进行了系统分析。我们评估多个作业调度模拟器，开发轻量级作业提交仿真框架，并创建工具来分析和可视化生成的调度数据。我们的研究确定了响应性、公平性和效率之间的关键权衡，并提供了一组实用的调度配置（特别是 Slurm），可以针对支持混合紧急工作负载的 HPC 环境进行定制。

papers.title: Evaluating HPK for Running Cloud-Native Workloads on Slurm Clusters.
papers.abstract: The escalating complexity of applications and services encourages a shift towards higher-level data processing pipelines that integrate both Cloud-native and HPC steps into the same workflow. Cloud providers and HPC centers typically provide both execution platforms on separate resources. In this paper we explore a more practical design that enables running unmodified Cloud-native workloads directly on the main HPC cluster, avoiding resource partitioning and retaining the HPC center’s existing job management and accounting policies.
papers.abstract_zh: 应用程序和服务的复杂性不断上升，促使人们转向更高级别的数据处理管道，将云原生和 HPC 步骤集成到同一工作流程中。云提供商和 HPC 中心通常在不同的资源上提供两个执行平台。在本文中，我们探索了一种更实用的设计，可以直接在主 HPC 集群上运行未经修改的云原生工作负载，避免资源分区并保留 HPC 中心现有的作业管理和会计策略。

papers.title: Evaluating the Efficacy of LLM-Based Reasoning for Multiobjective HPC Job Scheduling.
papers.abstract: High-Performance Computing (HPC) job scheduling involves balancing conflicting objectives such as minimizing makespan, reducing wait times, optimizing resource use, and ensuring fairness. Traditional methods, including heuristic-based, e.g., First-Come-First-Served(FJFS) and Shortest Job First (SJF), or intensive optimization techniques, often lack adaptability to dynamic workloads and, more importantly, cannot simultaneously optimize multiple objectives in HPC systems. To address this, we propose a novel Large Language Model (LLM)-based scheduler using a ReAct-style framework (Reason + Act), enabling iterative, interpretable decision-making. The system incorporates a scratchpad memory to track scheduling history and refine decisions via natural language feedback, while a constraint enforcement module ensures feasibility and safety. We evaluate our approach using OpenAI’s O4-Mini and Anthropic’s Claude 3.7 across seven real-world HPC workload scenarios, including heterogeneous mixes, bursty patterns, and adversarial cases etc. Comparisons against FCFS, SJF, and Google OR-Tools (on 10 to 100 jobs) reveal that LLM-based scheduling effectively balances multiple objectives while offering transparent reasoning through natural language traces. The method excels in constraint satisfaction and adapts to diverse workloads without domain-specific training. However, a trade-off between reasoning quality and computational overhead challenges real-time deployment. This work presents the first comprehensive study of reasoning-capable LLMs for HPC scheduling, demonstrating their potential to handle multiobjective optimization while highlighting limitations in computational efficiency. The findings provide insights into leveraging advanced language models for complex scheduling problems in dynamic HPC environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 作业调度涉及平衡相互冲突的目标，例如最小化完工时间、减少等待时间、优化资源使用和确保公平。传统方法，包括基于启发式的方法，例如先来先服务（FJFS）和最短作业优先（SJF）或密集优化技术，通常缺乏对动态工作负载的适应性，更重要的是，无法同时优化 HPC 系统中的多个目标。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的基于大型语言模型（LLM）的调度程序，使用 ReAct 风格的框架（Reason + Act），从而实现迭代、可解释的决策。该系统采用暂存器存储器来跟踪调度历史并通过自然语言反馈完善决策，而约束执行模块则确保可行性和安全性。我们使用 OpenAI 的 O4-Mini 和 Anthropic 的 Claude 3.7 在七个现实世界的 HPC 工作负载场景中评估我们的方法，包括异构混合、突发模式和对抗性案例等。与 FCFS、SJF 和 Google OR-Tools（10 到 100 个作业）的比较表明，基于 LLM 的调度有效地平衡了多个目标，同时通过自然语言跟踪提供透明的推理。该方法在约束满足方面表现出色，并且无需特定领域的培训即可适应不同的工作负载。然而，推理质量和计算开销之间的权衡对实时部署提出了挑战。这项工作首次对用于 HPC 调度的具有推理能力的 LLM 进行了全面研究，展示了它们处理多目标优化的潜力，同时强调了计算效率的局限性。这些发现为利用高级语言模型解决动态 HPC 环境中的复杂调度问题提供了见解。

papers.title: Evaluating Trusted Execution Environment Performance for Genome Sequence Alignment: An AMD SEV Case Study.
papers.abstract: HPC systems are used for a variety of applications from different fields and user groups. These research areas include, among others, the life sciences and medicine, engineering, the humanities, and the natural sciences. Applications from these areas all have different characteristics and computational demands. An important requirement is the security and protection of data, especially when dealing with highly sensitive data such as the human genome. In order to facilitate the processing of actual patient data on HPC systems, it is imperative to implement robust protective measures, particularly given the prevalence of multi-tenancy models in such systems. In this paper, we focus in particular on in-memory encryption with AMD SEV and SME. We compare two micro benchmarks and the BWA-MEM2 algorithm as genome sequencing workflow against each other. Our evaluation matrix includes a SMP node, a VM with SEV and SME enabled and VM with only SME enabled, all assessed against varying thread counts and different file systems for the input data. Our analysis showed that the location of the input data has a minor impact on performance, while the encrypted file system causes the most overhead. Memory bandwidth seems to be the limiting factor as the bandwidth drops by approximately 50% with SEV and SME being enabled. Overall we observed that the overhead caused by the encryption for the genome alignment workload is adequate with 10.4% for SME and over 20.9% for SEV+SME using 32 threads, but the algorithm scales worse for larger thread counts compared to the native execution.
papers.abstract_zh: HPC系统用于不同领域和用户群体的各种应用。这些研究领域包括生命科学和医学、工程学、人文学科和自然科学等。这些领域的应用程序都有不同的特征和计算需求。一个重要的要求是数据的安全和保护，特别是在处理高度敏感的数据（例如人类基因组）时。为了促进 HPC 系统上实际患者数据的处理，必须实施强有力的保护措施，特别是考虑到此类系统中多租户模型的普遍存在。在本文中，我们特别关注 AMD SEV 和 SME 的内存加密。我们将两个微观基准和 BWA-MEM2 算法作为基因组测序工作流程进行相互比较。我们的评估矩阵包括一个 SMP 节点、启用了 SEV 和 SME 的虚拟机以及仅启用了 SME 的虚拟机，所有这些都针对输入数据的不同线程数和不同文件系统进行了评估。我们的分析表明，输入数据的位置对性能的影响较小，而加密文件系统造成的开销最大。内存带宽似乎是限制因素，因为启用 SEV 和 SME 后带宽会下降约 50%。总体而言，我们观察到，基因组比对工作负载加密造成的开销足够，对于使用 32 个线程的 SME 为 10.4%，对于 SEV+SME 超过 20.9%，但与本机执行相比，对于更大的线程数，算法的扩展性更差。

papers.title: Evaluation of Test-Time Compute Constraints on Safety and Skill Large Reasoning Models.
papers.abstract: Test-time compute scaling has demonstrated the ability to improve the performance of reasoning language models by generating longer chain-of-thought (CoT) sequences. However, this increase in performance comes with a significant increase in computation cost. In this work, we investigate two compute constraint strategies: (1) reasoning length constraint and (2) model quantization, and study their impact on the safety performance of reasoning models. Specifically, we explore two approaches to apply compute constraints to reasoning models: (1) fine-tuning reasoning models using a length-controlled policy optimization (LCPO) based reinforcement learning method to satisfy a user-defined CoT reasoning length, and (2) applying quantization to maximize the generation of CoT sequences within a user-defined compute constraint. Furthermore, we study the trade-off between the computational efficiency and the safety of the model.
papers.abstract_zh: 测试时计算扩展已证明能够通过生成更长的思想链 (CoT) 序列来提高推理语言模型的性能。然而，性能的提高伴随着计算成本的显着增加。在这项工作中，我们研究了两种计算约束策略：（1）推理长度约束和（2）模型量化，并研究它们对推理模型安全性能的影响。具体来说，我们探索了两种将计算约束应用于推理模型的方法：（1）使用基于长度控制策略优化（LCPO）的强化学习方法微调推理模型以满足用户定义的CoT推理长度，以及（2）应用量化以在用户定义的计算约束内最大化CoT序列的生成。此外，我们研究了模型的计算效率和安全性之间的权衡。

papers.title: Experience Deploying Containerized GenAI Services at an HPC Center.
papers.abstract: Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) applications are built from specialized components—inference servers, object storage, vector and graph databases, and user interfaces—interconnected via web-based APIs. While these components are often containerized and deployed in cloud environments, such capabilities are still emerging at High-Performance Computing (HPC) centers. In this paper, we share our experience deploying GenAI workloads within an established HPC center, discussing the integration of HPC and cloud computing environments. We describe our converged computing architecture that integrates HPC and Kubernetes platforms running containerized GenAI workloads, helping with reproducibility. A case study illustrates the deployment of the Llama Large Language Model (LLM) using a containerized inference server (vLLM) across both Kubernetes and HPC platforms using multiple container runtimes. Our experience highlights practical considerations and opportunities for the HPC container community, guiding future research and tool development.
papers.abstract_zh: 生成人工智能 (GenAI) 应用程序由专用组件构建，这些组件包括推理服务器、对象存储、向量和图形数据库以及用户界面，这些组件通过基于 Web 的 API 互连。虽然这些组件通常被容器化并部署在云环境中，但此类功能仍在高性能计算 (HPC) 中心不断涌现。在本文中，我们分享了在已建立的 HPC 中心内部署 GenAI 工作负载的经验，讨论了 HPC 和云计算环境的集成。我们描述了我们的融合计算架构，该架构集成了运行容器化 GenAI 工作负载的 HPC 和 Kubernetes 平台，有助于提高可重复性。案例研究说明了如何使用容器化推理服务器 (vLLM) 在 Kubernetes 和 HPC 平台上使用多个容器运行时部署 Llama 大型语言模型 (LLM)。我们的经验强调了 HPC 容器社区的实际考虑因素和机遇，指导未来的研究和工具开发。

papers.title: Experiences Integrating Database Support into the OLCF Test Harness.
papers.abstract: In 2005, the United States Department of Energy created the Oak Ridge Leadership Computing Facility (OLCF) to provide leadership computing resources up to 100 times more powerful than is currently available for researchers across academia, industry, and government. These leadership-class supercomputers are among the largest in the world and often diverge from conventional supercomputer architectures at the time of deployment, demanding flexible and thorough testing to ensure their functionality and performance. To support the required testing, OLCF developed the OLCF Test Harness (OTH) [7, 8]. The OTH has adapted through more than 20 years of novel architectures, including the arrivals of NVIDIA GPUs in Titan and AMD GPUs in Frontier. Unique challenges with each system provide opportunities for continuously improving the OTH. In the case of Frontier, OLCF’s latest leadership-class supercomputer deployed in 2022, one unique challenge was how to ensure the functionality of the more than 9,400 compute nodes. The OTH recently released version 3.0 [2], which implements support for logging test data to InfluxDB, and version 3.1, which adds support for Apache Kafka with the Apache Druid database. Grafana interfaces to these databases greatly improve the real-time monitoring capabilities and broader analysis capabilities for Frontier. The OTH is just one of many system testing frameworks available, but is among the first to explicitly enable and encourage database-based logging. Among three well-known testing frameworks surveyed (ReFrame, Ramble, and Pavilion2), ReFrame is the only framework that supports any form of database and documents features that could be extended for logging to other databases or formats. As such, we see an opportunity to openly discuss our experiences and lessons learned integrating database support into the OTH. In this work, we present a high-level description of the OTH and the database support within, and discuss the challenges, successes, failures, and future goals for the OTH.
papers.abstract_zh: 2005 年，美国能源部创建了橡树岭领先计算设施 (OLCF)，为学术界、工业界和政府的研究人员提供比目前可用的领先计算资源强大 100 倍的资源。这些领先级的超级计算机是世界上最大的超级计算机之一，在部署时通常与传统的超级计算机架构不同，需要灵活、彻底的测试以确保其功能和性能。为了支持所需的测试，OLCF 开发了 OLCF 测试工具 (OTH) [7, 8]。 OTH 已经适应了 20 多年的新颖架构，包括 Titan 中的 NVIDIA GPU 和 Frontier 中的 AMD GPU。每个系统的独特挑战为不断改进 OTH 提供了机会。就 OLCF 于 2022 年部署的最新领先级超级计算机 Frontier 而言，一个独特的挑战是如何确保 9,400 多个计算节点的功能。 OTH 最近发布了 3.0 版 [2]，它实现了对将测试数据记录到 InfluxDB 的支持，以及 3.1 版，它增加了对 Apache Kafka 和 Apache Druid 数据库的支持。 Grafana 与这些数据库的接口极大地提高了 Frontier 的实时监控能力和更广泛的分析能力。 OTH 只是众多可用系统测试框架之一，但它是第一个明确启用和鼓励基于数据库的日志记录的框架。在接受调查的三个知名测试框架（ReFrame、Ramble 和 Pavilion2）中，ReFrame 是唯一支持任何形式的数据库和文档功能的框架，这些功能可以扩展为记录到其他数据库或格式。因此，我们看到了一个公开讨论将数据库支持集成到 OTH 中的经验和教训的机会。在这项工作中，我们对 OTH 及其数据库支持进行了高级描述，并讨论了 OTH 的挑战、成功、失败和未来目标。

papers.title: Experiences of Porting Structured and Unstructured Stencil Applications to FPGA using SYCL.
papers.abstract: In this paper we explore a stencil application written in SYCL on both CPU and FPGA architectures. We prepare two versions of the application, using a structured grid and an unstructured grid, and then optimise these implementations for CPU and FPGA architectures, with a focus on maintaining portability between both. We benchmark the application on an AMD CPU and an Intel Stratix 10 FPGA, seeking to answer whether we can target FPGAs productively from a single-source code base. Our findings indicate that for low arithmetic intensity kernels FPGA performance is lacking compared to CPU performance, suggesting that FPGA architectures may be unsuitable for such kernels, or that significant platform-specific optimisations may be required to reduce the performance gap, at the expense of developer productivity.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探索了在 CPU 和 FPGA 架构上用 SYCL 编写的模板应用程序。我们使用结构化网格和非结构化网格准备了两个版本的应用程序，然后针对 CPU 和 FPGA 架构优化这些实现，重点是保持两者之间的可移植性。我们在 AMD CPU 和 Intel Stratix 10 FPGA 上对应用程序进行了基准测试，试图回答我们是否可以通过单一源代码库高效地定位 FPGA。我们的研究结果表明，对于低算术强度内核，与 CPU 性能相比，FPGA 性能较差，这表明 FPGA 架构可能不适合此类内核，或者可能需要进行重大的特定于平台的优化来缩小性能差距，但会牺牲开发人员的工作效率。

papers.title: Exploring and Mitigating Failure Behavior of Large Language Model Training Workloads in HPC Systems.
papers.abstract: The exponential growth of Large Language Model (LLM) training demands in HPC systems has exposed critical reliability challenges, particularly from transient faults. Unlike resilience studies in conventional DNN inference, the massive parameter scale and iterative updates in LLM training trigger more complex failure patterns. To address these challenges, we introduce LLMFI, a new fault injection tool, and reveal six distinct failure behaviors through 300K+ fault injection experiments (exceeding 5K GPU node-hours). Our key insight is that, while most injected faults are eventually masked by the training iteration mechanism, a critical subset leads to catastrophic failures or performance degradation. Further, we propose LLMFT, a novel machine-learning-based fault tolerance framework that implements closed-loop error control via heuristic feature extraction, fault detector, and dual recovery mechanisms. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that LLMFT achieves an average of 97.61% F1-score in fault detection with only 0.01%–0.05% additional GPU memory overhead, effectively mitigating LLM training failures.
papers.abstract_zh: HPC 系统中大型语言模型 (LLM) 培训需求的指数级增长暴露了关键的可靠性挑战，特别是来自瞬态故障的挑战。与传统 DNN 推理中的弹性研究不同，LLM 训练中的大量参数规模和迭代更新会引发更复杂的故障模式。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了新的故障注入工具 LLMFI，并通过 300K+ 故障注入实验（超过 5K GPU 节点时）揭示了六种不同的故障行为。我们的主要见解是，虽然大多数注入的故障最终被训练迭代机制掩盖，但关键子集会导致灾难性故障或性能下降。此外，我们提出了 LLMFT，一种基于机器学习的新型容错框架，通过启发式特征提取、故障检测器和双恢复机制实现闭环错误控制。广泛的评估表明，LLMFT 在故障检测方面平均达到 97.61% 的 F1 分数，而仅增加 0.01%–0.05% 的 GPU 内存开销，有效缓解了 LLM 训练失败。

papers.title: Exploring Distributed Vector Databases Performance on HPC Platforms: A Study with Qdrant.
papers.abstract: Vector databases have rapidly grown in popularity, enabling efficient similarity search over data such as text, images, and video. They now play a central role in modern AI workflows, aiding large language models by grounding model outputs in external literature through retrieval-augmented generation. Despite their importance, little is known about the performance characteristics of vector databases in high-performance computing (HPC) systems that drive large-scale science. This work presents an empirical study of distributed vector database performance on the Polaris supercomputer in the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility. We construct a realistic biological-text workload from BV-BRC and generate embeddings from the peS2o corpus using Qwen3-Embedding-4B. We select Qdrant to evaluate insertion, index construction, and query latency with up to 32 workers. Informed by practical lessons from our experience, this work takes a first step toward characterizing vector database performance on HPC platforms to guide future research and optimization.
papers.abstract_zh: 矢量数据库迅速普及，支持对文本、图像和视频等数据进行高效的相似性搜索。它们现在在现代人工智能工作流程中发挥着核心作用，通过检索增强生成将模型输出扎根于外部文献中，从而帮助大型语言模型。尽管矢量数据库很重要，但人们对驱动大规模科学的高性能计算 (HPC) 系统中的性能特征知之甚少。这项工作对阿贡领导计算设施中的北极星超级计算机上的分布式矢量数据库性能进行了实证研究。我们从 BV-BRC 构建了一个真实的生物文本工作负载，并使用 Qwen3-Embedding-4B 从 peS2o 语料库生成嵌入。我们选择 Qdrant 来评估最多 32 个工作线程的插入、索引构建和查询延迟。根据我们的实际经验教训，这项工作朝着表征 HPC 平台上的矢量数据库性能以指导未来的研究和优化迈出了第一步。

papers.title: Exploring Reduced Precision for Deep Learning Activation Functions.
papers.abstract: The increasing scale of deep neural networks heightens the need to optimize training and inference efficiency. Reduced-precision computation has emerged as a promising approach to improve memory usage, energy efficiency, and computational throughput. While formats such as FP16 and FP8 are increasingly supported by modern hardware for tensor operations, ultra-low-precision formats like FP4 and FP2 remain largely unexplored for non-linear activation functions, which play a critical role in model convergence and stability. This work introduces a PyTorch framework to emulate and train models where activation functions are computed using FP8, FP6, FP4, FP3, and FP2 representations throughout the training process. Through comprehensive experiments across multiple models and datasets, we demonstrate that piecewise-linear activations (ReLU variants) maintain acceptable AI accuracy even at FP2 (40-83% depending on model complexity), while smooth nonlinearities (Sigmoid, Tanh) suffer significant degradation. We identify FP4 as a practical lower bound for most activation functions, with FP6-FP8 closely matching FP32 performance across all tested configurations.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度神经网络规模的不断扩大提高了优化训练和推理效率的需求。降低精度计算已成为提高内存使用、能源效率和计算吞吐量的一种有前景的方法。虽然 FP16 和 FP8 等格式越来越多地受到用于张量运算的现代硬件的支持，但 FP4 和 FP2 等超低精度格式在很大程度上尚未针对非线性激活函数进行探索，而非线性激活函数在模型收敛和稳定性方面发挥着关键作用。这项工作引入了一个 PyTorch 框架来模拟和训练模型，其中在整个训练过程中使用 FP8、FP6、FP4、FP3 和 FP2 表示来计算激活函数。通过跨多个模型和数据集的综合实验，我们证明分段线性激活（ReLU 变体）即使在 FP2 下也能保持可接受的 AI 精度（40-83%，取决于模型复杂性），而平滑非线性（Sigmoid、Tanh）则显着下降。我们将 FP4 确定为大多数激活函数的实际下限，而 FP6-FP8 在所有测试配置中与 FP32 性能非常匹配。

papers.title: Extending MPI Correctness Benchmarking to the Fortran Language.
papers.abstract: MPI correctness benchmarks evaluate the implementation quality of MPI correctness tools on a standardized set of tests. However, existing correctness benchmarks are limited to C, neglecting support for Fortran, the only other language that the MPI standard supports. Consequently, past evaluations of correctness tools focused solely on C, although some support error-checking of Fortran MPI codes. To alleviate this, we port the test generation logic of the most recently introduced MPI correctness benchmark, MPI-BugBench, to Fortran. We explore language-specific porting challenges and perform a comparative accuracy evaluation of the dynamic MPI correctness tool MUST on both C and Fortran. Our results show that MUST’s accuracy is largely consistent across languages, with a notable exception in type checking due to a required software dependency not supporting Fortran. Additionally, we uncovered bugs in both the OpenMPI Fortran bindings, and the MPI-BugBench test case generator.
papers.abstract_zh: MPI 正确性基准评估 MPI 正确性工具在一组标准化测试上的实施质量。然而，现有的正确性基准仅限于 C，忽略了对 Fortran（MPI 标准支持的唯一其他语言）的支持。因此，过去对正确性工具的评估仅集中于 C，尽管有些工具支持 Fortran MPI 代码的错误检查。为了缓解这个问题，我们将最近引入的 MPI 正确性基准 MPI-BugBench 的测试生成逻辑移植到 Fortran。我们探索特定于语言的移植挑战，并对 C 和 Fortran 上的动态 MPI 正确性工具必须进行比较准确度评估。我们的结果表明，MUST 的准确性在不同语言中基本一致，但由于所需的软件依赖项不支持 Fortran，因此类型检查存在明显的例外。此外，我们还发现了 OpenMPI Fortran 绑定和 MPI-BugBench 测试用例生成器中的错误。

papers.title: Extending RAJA Parallel Programming Abstractions with Just-In-Time Optimization.
papers.abstract: The prevalence of heterogeneous computing systems – comprising both CPUs and GPUs – has led to the adoption of performance portability programming models, such as RAJA. These models allow developers to write portable code that compiles ahead-of-time (AOT), unmodified for different backends, thus improving productivity and maintainability. However, AOT toolchains lack access to runtime information, limiting their ability to perform context-specific optimizations.
papers.abstract_zh: 异构计算系统（包括 CPU 和 GPU）的盛行导致了性能可移植性编程模型的采用，例如 RAJA。这些模型允许开发人员编写可提前编译（AOT）的可移植代码，无需针对不同后端进行修改，从而提高生产力和可维护性。然而，AOT 工具链无法访问运行时信息，限制了它们执行特定于上下文的优化的能力。

papers.title: Extending THAPI with CXI Hardware Counter Sampling for High Resolution NIC Telemetry.
papers.abstract: High performance computing (HPC) applications are sensitive to network variability, yet existing tracing tools lack insight into low level network behavior. Modern network interface controllers (NICs), such as HPE’s Slingshot-11 Cassini, provide detailed hardware counters that can reveal conditions like congestion and retries, but remain underused due to limited integration with tracing frameworks. We extend the THAPI framework with a sampling plugin for Cassini’s CXI interface, periodically collecting NIC counters and integrating them into HPC trace timelines via the iprof tool. Data is visualized in Perfetto, enabling correlation between network telemetry and application events. Our approach imposes negligible overhead at typical sampling rates and exposes previously hidden performance factors, such as congestion delays and load imbalances. Case studies on point-to-point and collective patterns demonstrate new diagnostic capabilities. Contributions include the plugin’s design, integration into a state-of-the-art tracing toolchain, and evaluation highlighting opportunities for improved HPC communication performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 应用程序对网络变化很敏感，但现有的跟踪工具缺乏对低级网络行为的洞察。现代网络接口控制器 (NIC)，例如 HPE 的 Slingshot-11 Cassini，提供详细的硬件计数器，可以揭示拥塞和重试等情况，但由于与跟踪框架的集成有限，仍未得到充分利用。我们使用 Cassini CXI 接口的采样插件扩展了 THAPI 框架，定期收集 NIC 计数器并通过 iprof 工具将它们集成到 HPC 跟踪时间线中。数据在 Perfetto 中可视化，从而实现网络遥测和应用程序事件之间的关联。我们的方法在典型采样率下施加的开销可以忽略不计，并暴露了以前隐藏的性能因素，例如拥塞延迟和负载不平衡。点对点和集体模式的案例研究展示了新的诊断能力。贡献包括插件的设计、集成到最先进的跟踪工具链以及突出显示提高 HPC 通信性能的机会的评估。

papers.title: Extending the C++ Execution Control Library to Support Dynamic Parallel Runtime Systems.
papers.abstract: The release of the C++26 execution control library (senders and receivers) provides a uniform interface for coordinating asynchronous work on heterogeneous backends. That said, the standardization of senders and receivers is just a starting point toward structured parallelism and composable heterogeneous parallel programming. To evaluate these capabilities, we present a sender-based interface for the Qthreads user-level threading library. It shows that the execution control idioms apply even to cases where work is discovered and created dynamically and the degree of concurrency vastly surpasses available hardware resources. Here we provide an introduction to the C++26 standard execution control library and show how it can be used with dynamic runtime systems. We demonstrate that the new standard interface is extensible and motivate future work on similar runtime integration efforts. We show that this interoperability layer incurs low overhead and provides additional optimization opportunities, even when used in a fine-grained parallel setting.
papers.abstract_zh: C++26执行控制库（发送者和接收者）的发布为协调异构后端上的异步工作提供了统一的接口。也就是说，发送方和接收方的标准化只是结构化并行性和可组合异构并行编程的起点。为了评估这些功能，我们为 Qthreads 用户级线程库提供了一个基于发送者的接口。它表明执行控制习惯甚至适用于动态发现和创建工作并且并发程度远远超过可用硬件资源的情况。在这里，我们介绍了 C++26 标准执行控制库，并展示了如何将其与动态运行时系统一起使用。我们证明新的标准接口是可扩展的，并激励未来开展类似的运行时集成工作。我们表明，即使在细粒度并行设置中使用，该互操作层也会产生较低的开销并提供额外的优化机会。

papers.title: Fantastic Hardware Counters and How to Find Them: Automating the Detection of Noise-Resilient Performance Counters in HPC.
papers.abstract: Performance models allow examining the scaling behavior of an application and identifying performance bottlenecks at an early stage. However, application runtime measurements are often tainted by noise on HPC systems. To tackle this problem, hardware counters can be exploited. Yet, not all counters are equally suitable for performance modeling. Some are noise-sensitive, vary strongly during repeated runs, or are faulty on some systems. Thus, appropriate counters must be identified on the inspected systems, requiring extensive testing and complex setups. This paper presents an automated approach that identifies noise-resilient hardware counters on HPC systems. Our approach automatically builds the setup, runs experiments, analyzes and ranks counters based on noise resilience, and presents results via a graphical or console interface. We demonstrate our approach on two HPC clusters and show how the developed tool, alongside the proposed metrics, enables detecting noise-resilient hardware counters in HPC.
papers.abstract_zh: 性能模型允许检查应用程序的扩展行为并在早期阶段识别性能瓶颈。然而，应用程序运行时测量常常受到 HPC 系统上的噪声的影响。为了解决这个问题，可以利用硬件计数器。然而，并非所有计数器都同样适合性能建模。有些对噪声敏感，在重复运行期间变化很大，或者在某些系统上出现故障。因此，必须在被检查的系统上识别适当的计数器，这需要大量的测试和复杂的设置。本文提出了一种识别 HPC 系统上抗噪声硬件计数器的自动化方法。我们的方法会自动构建设置、运行实验、分析并根据噪声恢复能力对计数器进行排名，并通过图形或控制台界面呈现结果。我们在两个 HPC 集群上演示了我们的方法，并展示了开发的工具如何与建议的指标一起检测 HPC 中的抗噪声硬件计数器。

papers.title: Fast Linear Solvers via AI-Tuned Markov Chain Monte Carlo-based Matrix Inversion.
papers.abstract: Large, sparse linear systems are pervasive in modern science and engineering, and Krylov subspace solvers are an established means of solving them. Yet convergence can be slow for ill-conditioned matrices, so practical deployments usually require preconditioners. Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC)-based matrix inversion can generate such preconditioners and accelerate Krylov iterations, but its effectiveness depends on parameters whose optima vary across matrices; manual or grid search is costly. We present an AI-driven framework recommending MCMC parameters for a given linear system. A graph neural surrogate predicts preconditioning speed from A and MCMC parameters. A Bayesian acquisition function then chooses the parameter sets most likely to minimise iterations. On a previously unseen ill-conditioned system, the framework achieves better preconditioning with 50% of the search budget of conventional methods, yielding about a 10% reduction in iterations to convergence. These results suggest a route for incorporating MCMC-based preconditioners into large-scale systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型稀疏线性系统在现代科学和工程中普遍存在，而 Krylov 子空间求解器是解决这些系统的既定方法。然而，病态矩阵的收敛速度可能很慢，因此实际部署通常需要预处理器。基于马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗 (MCMC) 的矩阵求逆可以生成此类预处理器并加速 Krylov 迭代，但其有效性取决于其最优值因矩阵而异的参数；手动或网格搜索的成本很高。我们提出了一个人工智能驱动的框架，为给定的线性系统推荐 MCMC 参数。图神经代理根据 A 和 MCMC 参数预测预处理速度。然后，贝叶斯采集函数选择最有可能最小化迭代的参数集。在以前未见过的病态系统上，该框架以传统方法 50% 的搜索预算实现了更好的预处理，从而使收敛迭代减少了约 10%。这些结果提出了将基于 MCMC 的预处理器合并到大型系统中的途径。

papers.title: Fast on-demand Memory Mapping for Shared Memory and Disaggregated Systems.
papers.abstract: Efficient synchronization of memory mapping information is increasingly important as systems evolve toward greater resource disaggregation and heterogeneity. When memory is exported between processes, establishing shared mapping often requires costly page table walk and updates, particularly in fault-driven models. To study these costs, we implement an XPMEM-inspired shared-memory driver and evaluate techniques to reduce mapping overhead. Our approach combines parallel batched on-demand pinning, bypassing unnecessary cache-policy lookups in PFN mapping, and dynamic re-registration to expand registered regions without tearing down existing mappings. In our evaluation, these optimizations reduce cold-start memory copy by up to 13.22 × over XPMEM in multi-process workloads, with particular benefits for collective communication patterns and rapidly resizing buffers. While developed in a shared-memory context, the results highlight general strategies—avoiding redundant translation work, enabling parallel mapping operations, and preserving mapping state—that can inform the design of memory management in disaggregated systems, including GPU disaggregation and heterogeneous memory environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着系统朝着更大的资源分解和异构性发展，内存映射信息的有效同步变得越来越重要。当在进程之间导出内存时，建立共享映射通常需要昂贵的页表遍历和更新，特别是在故障驱动模型中。为了研究这些成本，我们实现了一个受 XPMEM 启发的共享内存驱动程序，并评估了减少映射开销的技术。我们的方法结合了并行批量按需固定、绕过 PFN 映射中不必要的缓存策略查找以及动态重新注册以扩展注册区域而不破坏现有映射。在我们的评估中，这些优化在多进程工作负载中比 XPMEM 减少了高达 13.22 倍的冷启动内存复制，特别有利于集体通信模式和快速调整缓冲区大小。虽然是在共享内存环境中开发的，但结果强调了一般策略（避免冗余转换工作、启用并行映射操作和保留映射状态），这些策略可以为分解系统（包括 GPU 分解和异构内存环境）中的内存管理设计提供信息。

papers.title: FaSTCC: Fast Sparse Tensor Contractions on CPUs.
papers.abstract: Sparse tensor contractions are a core computational primitive in scientific computing and machine learning. Effective optimization of such contractions through loop permutation/tiling remains an open challenge. Our work perform the first comprehensive comparative analysis of data access costs and memory requirements for loop permutations for sparse tensor contractions. Based on these insights, we develop FaSTCC, a novel hashing-based parallel implementation of sparse tensor contractions. FaSTCC introduces a new 2D tiled contraction-index-outer scheme and a corresponding tile-aware design. Using probabilistic modeling, our approach automatically chooses between dense and sparse output tile accumulators and selects suitable tile size. We evaluate FaSTCC across two CPU platforms and a range of real-world workloads, demonstrating significant speedups on benchmarks from FROSTT and from quantum chemistry.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏张量收缩是科学计算和机器学习中的核心计算原语。通过循环排列/平铺有效优化此类收缩仍然是一个开放的挑战。我们的工作对稀疏张量收缩的循环排列的数据访问成本和内存需求进行了首次全面的比较分析。基于这些见解，我们开发了 FaSTCC，一种新颖的基于哈希的稀疏张量收缩并行实现。 FaSTCC 引入了一种新的 2D 平铺收缩索引外部方案和相应的平铺感知设计。使用概率建模，我们的方法自动在密集和稀疏输出瓦片累加器之间进行选择，并选择合适的瓦片大小。我们跨两个 CPU 平台和一系列实际工作负载评估了 FaSTCC，证明了 FROSTT 和量子化学基准测试的显着加速。

papers.title: Fine-grained Automated Failure Management for Extreme-Scale GPU Accelerated Systems.
papers.abstract: As high-performance computing (HPC) systems scale in size, system wide hardware failure rates increase. Historical data from previous large-scale HPC installations illustrate this trend, with the mean time between failures (MTBF) decreasing steadily over the past decade. Recent studies from artificial intelligence and machine-learning (AI/ML) training extrapolate MTBF declining even further for future GPU accelerated systems. As MTBF decreases, mean time to repair (MTTR) becomes more pronounced, highlighting the need for efficient recovery strategies.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着高性能计算 (HPC) 系统规模的扩大，系统范围内的硬件故障率也会增加。之前大规模 HPC 安装的历史数据说明了这一趋势，平均故障间隔时间 (MTBF) 在过去十年中稳步下降。最近的人工智能和机器学习 (AI/ML) 训练研究推断，未来 GPU 加速系统的 MTBF 会进一步下降。随着 MTBF 减少，平均修复时间 (MTTR) 变得更加明显，凸显了高效恢复策略的必要性。

papers.title: First Practical Experiences Integrating Quantum Computers with HPC Resources: A Case Study With a 20-qubit Superconducting Quantum Computer.
papers.abstract: Incorporating Quantum Computers into High Performance Computing (HPC) environments (commonly referred to as HPC+QC integration) marks a pivotal step in advancing computational capabilities for scientific research. Here we report the integration of a superconducting 20-qubit quantum computer into the HPC infrastructure at Leibniz Supercomputing Centre (LRZ), one of the first practical implementations of its kind. This yielded four key lessons: (1) quantum computers have stricter facility requirements than classical systems, yet their deployment in HPC environments is feasible when preceded by a rigorous site survey to ensure compliance; (2) quantum computers are inherently dynamic systems that require regular recalibration that is automatic and controllable by the HPC scheduler; (3) redundant power and cooling infrastructure is essential; and (4) effective hands-on onboarding should be provided for both quantum experts and new users. The identified conclusions provide a roadmap to guide future HPC center integrations.
papers.abstract_zh: 将量子计算机纳入高性能计算 (HPC) 环境（通常称为 HPC+QC 集成）标志着提高科学研究计算能力的关键一步。在这里，我们报告了将超导 20 量子位量子计算机集成到莱布尼茨超级计算中心 (LRZ) 的 HPC 基础设施中，这是此类计算机的首批实际实施之一。这产生了四个关键教训：（1）量子计算机比传统系统具有更严格的设施要求，但在进行严格的现场调查以确保合规性的情况下，将其部署在 HPC 环境中是可行的； (2) 量子计算机本质上是动态系统，需要定期重新校准，并且由 HPC 调度程序自动控制； (3) 冗余电源和冷却基础设施至关重要； (4) 应为量子专家和新用户提供有效的实践指导。确定的结论提供了指导未来 HPC 中心集成的路线图。

papers.title: FIRST: Federated Inference Resource Scheduling Toolkit for Scientific AI Model Access.
papers.abstract: We present the Federated Inference Resource Scheduling Toolkit (FIRST), a framework enabling Inference-as-a-Service across distributed High-Performance Computing (HPC) clusters. FIRST provides cloud-like access to diverse AI models, like Large Language Models (LLMs), on existing HPC infrastructure. Leveraging Globus Auth and Globus Compute, the system allows researchers to run parallel inference workloads via an OpenAI-compliant API on private, secure environments. This cluster-agnostic API allows requests to be distributed across federated clusters, targeting numerous hosted models. FIRST supports multiple inference backends (e.g., vLLM), auto-scales resources, maintains "hot" nodes for low-latency execution, and offers both high-throughput batch and interactive modes. The framework addresses the growing demand for private, secure, and scalable AI inference in scientific workflows, allowing researchers to generate billions of tokens daily on-premises without relying on commercial cloud infrastructure.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了联合推理资源调度工具包 (FIRST)，这是一个跨分布式高性能计算 (HPC) 集群实现推理即服务的框架。 FIRST 在现有的 HPC 基础设施上提供对各种 AI 模型的类似云的访问，例如大型语言模型 (LLM)。该系统利用 Globus Auth 和 Globus Compute，允许研究人员通过符合 OpenAI 的 API 在私有、安全的环境中运行并行推理工作负载。这种与集群无关的 API 允许跨联合集群分发请求，针对众多托管模型。 FIRST 支持多个推理后端（例如 vLLM）、自动扩展资源、维护“热”节点以实现低延迟执行，并提供高吞吐量批处理和交互模式。该框架满足了科学工作流程中对私有、安全和可扩展的人工智能推理日益增长的需求，使研究人员能够每天在本地生成数十亿个代币，而无需依赖商业云基础设施。

papers.title: Frameworks for Large Language Model Serving in HPC Environments.
papers.abstract: We introduce open-source frameworks for deploying and running large language models (LLMs) within high-performance computing (HPC) environments. One such framework, AI-Flux, targets high-throughput batch inference, enabling users to submit LLM requests in an OpenAI-compatible format as traditional HPC jobs. Another framework is based on Ray Serve and it provides dynamic, on-demand allocation of HPC resources for interactive LLM serving via APIs, supporting applications such as chatbots and AI agents. The third framework, Illinois Chat, is a production-grade, always-on platform for real-time interaction, that relies on a dedicated GPU server for model inference. These frameworks are designed to abstract away underlying computer system complexities, allowing researchers to request and utilize GPU resources for model inference without manual environment setup. We describe these systems and report LLM-specific performance metrics. Results demonstrate that the proposed frameworks enable scalable and resource-efficient LLM serving across both batch and interactive workloads in support of a diverse user needs.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们引入了用于在高性能计算 (HPC) 环境中部署和运行大型语言模型 (LLM) 的开源框架。 AI-Flux 就是这样一个框架，它的目标是高吞吐量批量推理，使用户能够像传统 HPC 作业一样以 OpenAI 兼容格式提交 LLM 请求。另一个框架基于 Ray Serve，它通过 API 为交互式 LLM 服务提供动态、按需的 HPC 资源分配，支持聊天机器人和 AI 代理等应用程序。第三个框架，Illinois Chat，是一个生产级、始终在线的实时交互平台，依赖于专用 GPU 服务器进行模型推理。这些框架旨在抽象化底层计算机系统的复杂性，使研究人员能够请求和利用 GPU 资源进行模型推理，而无需手动设置环境。我们描述这些系统并报告法学硕士特定的绩效指标。结果表明，所提出的框架能够跨批处理和交互式工作负载提供可扩展且资源高效的 LLM 服务，从而支持不同的用户需求。

papers.title: Fringe-SGC: Counting Subgraphs with Fringe Vertices.
papers.abstract: Subgraph Counting (SGC) is a fundamental component of many important applications, including cybersecurity, drug discovery, social network analysis, and natural language processing. However, current SGC approaches can only handle very small patterns (aka subgraphs) because the computational load increases exponentially with the size of the pattern. To overcome this limitation for certain patterns, we introduce a new technique and algorithm called Fringe-SGC for counting the exact number of times a subgraph occurs in a larger graph.
