papers.title: Large-Message All-to-All Communication at Frontier Scale.
papers.abstract: Near the full scale of exascale supercomputers, latency can dominate the cost of all-to-all communication even for very large message sizes. We describe GPU-aware all-to-all implementations designed to reduce latency for large message sizes at extreme scales, and we present their performance using 65536 tasks (8192 nodes) on the Frontier supercomputer at the Oak Ridge Leadership Computing Facility. Two implementations perform best for different ranges of message size, and all outperform the vendor-provided MPI_Alltoall. Our results show promising options for improving implementations of MPI_Alltoall_init.
papers.abstract_zh: 在接近百亿亿级超级计算机的全部规模时，即使对于非常大的消息大小，延迟也可能会主导所有对所有通信的成本。我们描述了 GPU 感知的全对全实现，旨在减少极端规模下大消息大小的延迟，并使用橡树岭领先计算设施的 Frontier 超级计算机上的 65536 个任务（8192 个节点）来展示其性能。两种实现对于不同的消息大小范围表现最佳，并且都优于供应商提供的 MPI_Alltoall。我们的结果显示了改进 MPI_Alltoall_init 实现的有希望的选择。

papers.title: LCI: a Lightweight Communication Interface for Efficient Asynchronous Multithreaded Communication.
papers.abstract: The evolution of architectures, programming models, and algorithms is driving communication towards greater asynchrony and concurrency, usually in multithreaded environments. We present LCI, a communication library designed for efficient asynchronous multithreaded communication. LCI provides a concise interface that supports common point-to-point primitives and diverse completion mechanisms, along with flexible controls for incrementally fine-tuning communication resources and runtime behavior. It features a threading-efficient runtime built on atomic data structures, fine-grained non-blocking locks, and low-level network insights. We evaluate LCI on both Infiniband and Slingshot-11 clusters with microbenchmarks and two application-level benchmarks. Experimental results show that LCI significantly outperforms existing communication libraries in various multithreaded scenarios, achieving performance that exceeds the traditional multi-process execution mode and unlocking new possibilities for emerging programming models and applications. LCI is open-source and available at https://github.com/uiuc-hpc/lci.
papers.abstract_zh: 架构、编程模型和算法的发展正在推动通信向更高的异步性和并发性发展，通常是在多线程环境中。我们推出了 LCI，一个专为高效异步多线程通信而设计的通信库。 LCI 提供了一个简洁的接口，支持常见的点对点原语和不同的完成机制，以及用于增量微调通信资源和运行时行为的灵活控制。它具有基于原子数据结构、细粒度非阻塞锁和低级网络洞察力构建的线程高效运行时。我们使用微基准测试和两个应用程序级基准测试在 Infiniband 和 Slingshot-11 集群上评估 LCI。实验结果表明，LCI在各种多线程场景下显着优于现有通信库，实现了超越传统多进程执行模式的性能，并为新兴编程模型和应用释放了新的可能性。 LCI 是开源的，可从 https://github.com/uiuc-hpc/lci 获取。

papers.title: Learning to Schedule: A Supervised Learning Framework for Network-Aware Scheduling of Data-Intensive Workloads.
papers.abstract: Distributed cloud environments hosting data-intensive applications often experience slowdowns due to network congestion, asymmetric bandwidth, and inter-node data shuffling. These factors are typically not captured by traditional host-level metrics like CPU or memory. Scheduling without accounting for these conditions can lead to poor placement decisions, longer data transfers, and suboptimal job performance. We present a network-aware job scheduler that uses supervised learning to predict the completion time of candidate jobs. Our system introduces a prediction-and-ranking mechanism that collects real-time telemetry from all nodes, uses a trained supervised model to estimate job duration per node, and ranks them to select the best placement. We evaluate the scheduler on a geo-distributed Kubernetes cluster deployed on the FABRIC testbed by running network-intensive Spark workloads. Compared to the default Kubernetes scheduler, which makes placement decisions based on current resource availability alone, our proposed supervised scheduler achieved 34–54% higher accuracy in selecting optimal nodes for job placement. The novelty of our work lies in the demonstration of supervised learning for real-time, network-aware job scheduling on a multi-site cluster.
papers.abstract_zh: 托管数据密集型应用程序的分布式云环境通常会因网络拥塞、带宽不对称和节点间数据混洗而出现速度下降的情况。这些因素通常不会被传统的主机级指标（如 CPU 或内存）捕获。在不考虑这些条件的情况下进行调度可能会导致糟糕的放置决策、更长的数据传输时间和次优的工作绩效。我们提出了一种网络感知作业调度程序，它使用监督学习来预测候选作业的完成时间。我们的系统引入了一种预测和排名机制，该机制从所有节点收集实时遥测数据，使用经过训练的监督模型来估计每个节点的作业持续时间，并对它们进行排名以选择最佳位置。我们通过运行网络密集型 Spark 工作负载，在部署在 FABRIC 测试台上的地理分布式 Kubernetes 集群上评估调度程序。与仅根据当前资源可用性做出放置决策的默认 Kubernetes 调度程序相比，我们提出的监督调度程序在选择作业放置的最佳节点方面的准确度提高了 34-54%。我们工作的新颖之处在于演示了在多站点集群上进行实时、网络感知作业调度的监督学习。

papers.title: Lessons Learned: Template-Heavy C++ in Production HPC Runtime Systems.
papers.abstract: Modern HPC runtime systems increasingly rely on sophisticated C++ template metaprogramming to achieve zero-cost abstractions and type safety. This paper presents lessons learned from implementing the AllScale runtime system, a production HPC framework that makes extensive use of variadic templates, SFINAE, and template specialization for distributed data management. Through analysis of our template-heavy architecture for data items, automatic serialization, and type-safe requirement systems, we identify key challenges, performance implications, and best practices for template metaprogramming in HPC contexts. Our findings show that careful template design can maintain compile-time performance while enabling zero-cost abstractions that achieve 92-105% of hand-tuned MPI performance. We provide concrete recommendations for managing template complexity, compilation overhead, and debugging challenges in production HPC systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代 HPC 运行时系统越来越依赖复杂的 C++ 模板元编程来实现零成本抽象和类型安全。本文介绍了从实现 AllScale 运行时系统中吸取的经验教训，该系统是一个生产 HPC 框架，广泛使用可变参数模板、SFINAE 和分布式数据管理的模板专业化。通过分析数据项的模板密集型架构、自动序列化和类型安全需求系统，我们确定了 HPC 环境中模板元编程的关键挑战、性能影响和最佳实践。我们的研究结果表明，仔细的模板设计可以保持编译时性能，同时实现零成本抽象，从而实现 92-105% 的手动调整 MPI 性能。我们为管理生产 HPC 系统中的模板复杂性、编译开销和调试挑战提供具体建议。

papers.title: Lightweight CNN-Based Artifact Reduction for Scientific Error-bounded Lossy Compression.
papers.abstract: Lossy compression is widely used to reduce storage and transmission costs in large-scale scientific data, but it inevitably introduces artifacts that may compromise subsequent analysis. To address this issue, we propose a lightweight 3D convolutional architecture with a fixed-scale batch normalization strategy, ensuring stable training and fast inference. We further analyze the trade-offs related to network size and highlight an empirical relationship between the minimum achievable MSE loss and the corresponding training cost. We also validate the generalizability of the trained network.
papers.abstract_zh: 有损压缩广泛用于降低大规模科学数据的存储和传输成本，但它不可避免地会引入可能影响后续分析的伪影。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种具有固定规模批量归一化策略的轻量级 3D 卷积架构，确保稳定的训练和快速的推理。我们进一步分析与网络规模相关的权衡，并强调可实现的最小 MSE 损失与相应训练成本之间的经验关系。我们还验证了训练网络的通用性。

papers.title: LiquidGEMM: Hardware-Efficient W4A8 GEMM Kernel for High-Performance LLM Serving.
papers.abstract: Quantization is a critical technique for accelerating LLM inference by reducing memory footprint and improving computational efficiency. Among various schemes, 4-bit weight and 8-bit activation quantization (W4A8) offers a strong balance between accuracy and performance. However, existing W4A8 GEMM kernels fall short in practice due to inefficient dequantization on CUDA Cores, which cannot keep pace with the high throughput of Tensor Cores. In this paper, we present LiquidGEMM, a hardware-efficient W4A8 GEMM kernel for efficient LLM serving. LiquidGEMM designs two key techniques: LiquidQuant, a hardware-efficient quantization method that enables fast, overflow-safe dequantization using just two arithmetic instructions per four elements; and an implicit fine-grained pipeline that fully overlaps weight loading, dequantization, and MMA across warp groups without software synchronization or redundant memory traffic. Experimental results show that LiquidGEMM achieves up to 2.90x speedup over state-of-the-art W4A8 kernels and up to 4.94x end-to-end system-level speedup. Compared to various quantized GEMM kernels in NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, LiquidGEMM delivers 1.12-1.63x performance gains, and achieves up to 1.63x system-level speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 量化是通过减少内存占用和提高计算效率来加速 LLM 推理的关键技术。在各种方案中，4 位权重和 8 位激活量化 (W4A8) 在精度和性能之间提供了强有力的平衡。然而，由于 CUDA 核心上的反量化效率低下，现有的 W4A8 GEMM 内核在实践中存在不足，无法跟上 Tensor 核心的高吞吐量。在本文中，我们提出了 LiquidGEMM，这是一种硬件高效的 W4A8 GEMM 内核，用于高效的 LLM 服务。 LiquidGEMM 设计了两项关键技术：LiquidQuant，一种硬件高效的量化方法，每四个元素仅使用两个算术指令即可实现快速、溢出安全的反量化；隐式细粒度管道可跨扭曲组完全重叠权重加载、反量化和 MMA，无需软件同步或冗余内存流量。实验结果表明，LiquidGEMM 比最先进的 W4A8 内核实现高达 2.90 倍的加速，以及高达 4.94 倍的端到端系统级加速。与 NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM 中的各种量化 GEMM 内核相比，LiquidGEMM 提供 1.12-1.63 倍的性能提升，并实现高达 1.63 倍的系统级加速。

papers.title: LLM Agents for Interactive Workflow Provenance: Reference Architecture and Evaluation Methodology.
papers.abstract: Modern scientific discovery increasingly relies on workflows that process data across the Edge, Cloud, and High Performance Computing (HPC) continuum. Comprehensive and in-depth analyses of these data are critical for hypothesis validation, anomaly detection, reproducibility, and impactful findings. Although workflow provenance techniques support such analyses, at large scale, the provenance data become complex and difficult to analyze. Existing systems depend on custom scripts, structured queries, or static dashboards, limiting data interaction. In this work, we introduce an evaluation methodology, reference architecture, and open-source implementation that leverages interactive Large Language Model (LLM) agents for runtime data analysis. Our approach uses a lightweight, metadata-driven design that translates natural language into structured provenance queries. Evaluations across LLaMA, GPT, Gemini, and Claude, covering diverse query classes and a real-world chemistry workflow, show that modular design, prompt tuning, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enable accurate and insightful LLM agent responses beyond recorded provenance.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代科学发现越来越依赖于跨边缘、云和高性能计算 (HPC) 连续体处理数据的工作流程。对这些数据进行全面和深入的分析对于假设验证、异常检测、可重复性和有影响力的发现至关重要。尽管工作流来源技术支持此类分析，但在大规模情况下，来源数据变得复杂且难以分析。现有系统依赖于自定义脚本、结构化查询或静态仪表板，限制了数据交互。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种评估方法、参考架构和开源实现，利用交互式大型语言模型 (LLM) 代理进行运行时数据分析。我们的方法使用轻量级、元数据驱动的设计，将自然语言转换为结构化来源查询。对 LLaMA、GPT、Gemini 和 Claude 的评估涵盖了不同的查询类别和真实的化学工作流程，结果表明，模块化设计、即时调整和检索增强生成 (RAG) 可以实现超越记录来源的准确且富有洞察力的 LLM 代理响应。

papers.title: LLM-based Optimization Algorithm Selection for High-Performance Networks Orchestration.
papers.abstract: The rapid growth of Artificial Intelligence (AI) applications, particularly through the widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs), has caused an unprecedented growth in computing and network infrastructures. Current infrastructure expansion cannot keep pace, resulting in suboptimal performance. This creates an urgent need for network automation capable of dynamically orchestrating services and exploiting all available resources. Manual optimization processes are slow, error-prone, and unable to meet the requirements of complex, multi-domain, and data-intensive networks. A fundamental challenge is the absence of a universal optimization algorithm that performs effectively across all scenarios. In this paper, we present preliminary work on an LLM-based optimization algorithm selection framework for multi-domain, high-performance networks orchestration. The proposed framework utilizes LLM-generated descriptive embeddings of algorithms, network state logs, and service requests to identify the most suitable optimization method from a pool of algorithms, curating optimization to the current scenario.
papers.abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 应用的快速增长，特别是通过大型语言模型 (LLM) 的广泛采用，导致计算和网络基础设施出现前所未有的增长。当前的基础设施扩张无法跟上步伐，导致性能不佳。这就迫切需要能够动态编排服务并利用所有可用资源的网络自动化。手动优化过程速度慢、容易出错，无法满足复杂、多域、数据密集型网络的要求。一个根本的挑战是缺乏能够在所有场景下有效执行的通用优化算法。在本文中，我们提出了针对多域、高性能网络编排的基于 LLM 的优化算法选择框架的初步工作。所提出的框架利用 LLM 生成的算法描述性嵌入、网络状态日志和服务请求来从算法池中识别最合适的优化方法，从而针对当前场景进行优化。

papers.title: LLM4FP: LLM-Based Program Generation for Triggering Floating-Point Inconsistencies Across Compilers.
papers.abstract: Floating-point inconsistencies across compilers can undermine the reliability of numerical software. We present LLM4FP, the first framework that uses Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate floating-point programs specifically designed to trigger such inconsistencies. LLM4FP combines Grammar-Based Generation and Feedback-Based Mutation to produce diverse and valid programs. We evaluate LLM4FP across multiple compilers and optimization levels, measuring inconsistency rate, time cost, and program diversity. LLM4FP detects over twice as many inconsistencies compared to the state-of-the-art tool, Varity. Notably, most of the inconsistencies involve real-valued differences, rather than extreme values like NaN or infinities. LLM4FP also uncovers inconsistencies across a wider range of optimization levels, and finds the most mismatches between host and device compilers. These results show that LLM-guided program generation improves the detection of numerical inconsistencies. In practice, numerical software and HPC developers can use LLM4FP to compare compilers and select those that provide more accurate and consistent floating-point behavior, while compiler developers can use it to identify and address subtle consistency issues in their implementations.
papers.abstract_zh: 编译器之间的浮点不一致可能会破坏数值软件的可靠性。我们推出了 LLM4FP，这是第一个使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 生成浮点程序的框架，专门用于触发此类不一致问题。 LLM4FP 结合了基于语法的生成和基于反馈的变异来生成多样化且有效的程序。我们跨多个编译器和优化级别评估 LLM4FP，测量不一致率、时间成本和程序多样性。与最先进的工具 Varity 相比，LLM4FP 检测到的不一致数量是其两倍多。值得注意的是，大多数不一致涉及实值差异，而不是 NaN 或无穷大等极端值。 LLM4FP 还可以发现更广泛的优化级别之间的不一致，并找到主机和设备编译器之间最不匹配的地方。这些结果表明，法学硕士指导的程序生成改进了对数值不一致的检测。在实践中，数值软件和 HPC 开发人员可以使用 LLM4FP 来比较编译器并选择那些提供更准确和一致的浮点行为的编译器，而编译器开发人员可以使用它来识别和解决其实现中微妙的一致性问题。

papers.title: LLMTailor: A Layer-wise Tailoring Tool for Efficient Checkpointing of Large Language Models.
papers.abstract: Checkpointing is essential for fault tolerance in training large language models (LLMs). However, existing methods, regardless of their I/O strategies, periodically store the entire model and optimizer states, incurring substantial storage overhead and resource contention. Recent studies reveal that updates across LLM layers are highly non-uniform. Across training steps, some layers may undergo more significant changes, while others remain relatively stable or even unchanged. This suggests that selectively checkpointing only layers with significant updates could reduce overhead without harming training. Implementing such selective strategies requires fine-grained control over both weights and optimizer states, which no current tool provides. To address this gap, we propose LLMTailor, a checkpoint-merging framework that filters and assembles layers from different checkpoints to form a composite checkpoint. Our evaluation indicates that LLMTailor can work with different selective checkpointing strategies and effectively reduce checkpoint size (e.g., 4.3 times smaller for Llama3.1-8B) and checkpoint time (e.g., 2.8 times faster for Qwen2.5-7B) while maintaining model quality.
papers.abstract_zh: 检查点对于训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 的容错能力至关重要。然而，现有方法无论其 I/O 策略如何，都会定期存储整个模型和优化器状态，​​从而产生大量存储开销和资源争用。最近的研究表明，法学硕士各层的更新非常不均匀。在整个训练步骤中，某些层可能会发生更显着的变化，而其他层则保持相对稳定甚至不变。这表明仅对具有重大更新的层进行选择性检查可以减少开销而不损害训练。实施这种选择性策略需要对权重和优化器状态进行细粒度控制，而当前的工具还没有提供这一点。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 LLMTailor，一个检查点合并框架，可以过滤和组装来自不同检查点的层以形成复合检查点。我们的评估表明，LLMTailor 可以使用不同的选择性检查点策略，并有效减少检查点大小（例如，Llama3.1-8B 小 4.3 倍）和检查点时间（例如，Qwen2.5-7B 快 2.8 倍），同时保持模型质量。

papers.title: LowDiff: Efficient Frequent Checkpointing via Low-Cost Differential for High-Performance Distributed Training Systems.
papers.abstract: Distributed training of large deep-learning models often leads to failures, so checkpointing is commonly employed for recovery. State-of-the-art studies focus on frequent checkpointing for fast recovery from failures. However, it generates numerous checkpoints, incurring substantial costs and thus degrading training performance. Recently, differential checkpointing has been proposed to reduce costs, but it is limited to recommendation systems, so its application to general distributed training systems remains unexplored.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型深度学习模型的分布式训练经常会导致失败，因此通常采用检查点来进行恢复。最先进的研究重点是频繁的检查点以从故障中快速恢复。然而，它会产生大量检查点，产生大量成本，从而降低训练性能。最近，提出了差分检查点来降低成本，但它仅限于推荐系统，因此其在通用分布式训练系统中的应用仍有待探索。

papers.title: Lowering and Runtime Support for Fortran's Multi-Image Parallel Features using LLVM Flang, PRIF, and Caffeine.
lsCOMP: Efficient Light Source Compression.
papers.abstract: Light source facilities, which generate X-rays for probing microstructures and dynamic processes, produce intense data streams, reaching up to 250 GB/s and projected to exceed 1 TB/s by the end of this decade. Managing such massive data poses critical challenges due to limited local processing capacity and bandwidth constraints when offloading data to HPC systems. To address these challenges, we propose lsCOMP, a GPU compressor that operates within a single kernel. lsCOMP supports both lossless and configurable lossy compression, ensuring high compression ratios and preserved data quality across diverse light source applications. On a single NVIDIA A100 GPU, lsCOMP achieves compression throughputs of 380.89 to 509.21 GB/s in lossless mode, delivering up to 20 times higher performance than industry-leading GPU compressors while achieving superior compression ratios. In lossy modes, lsCOMP further improves throughput and ratios significantly. Additionally, lsCOMP demonstrates versatile performance across various integer datasets and supports TB/s-level random access throughput.
papers.abstract_zh: 光源设施产生 X 射线以探测微观结构和动态过程，产生密集的数据流，速度高达 250 GB/s，预计到本十年末将超过 1 TB/s。在将数据卸载到 HPC 系统时，由于本地处理能力有限和带宽限制，管理如此海量的数据面临着严峻的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 lsCOMP，一种在单个内核中运行的 GPU 压缩器。 lsCOMP 支持无损和可配置的有损压缩，确保高压缩比并在不同光源应用中保持数据质量。在单个 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上，lsCOMP 在无损模式下可实现 380.89 至 509.21 GB/s 的压缩吞吐量，其性能比业界领先的 GPU 压缩器高出 20 倍，同时实现卓越的压缩比。在有损模式下，lsCOMP 进一步显着提高吞吐量和比率。此外，lsCOMP 展示了跨各种整数数据集的通用性能，并支持 TB/s 级别的随机访问吞吐量。

papers.title: Make Updates Faster: A Fast Multi-Stripe Updates Framework in Erasure-Coded Storage Clusters.
papers.abstract: Erasure coding is widely adopted to maintain data reliability, yet it introduces a significant update penalty. We analyze real-world traces and observe several challenges that are not addressed by existing studies, which thereby restricts the performance gains. We propose FastUpdate, an efficient multi-stripe updates framework that assists existing update schemes for fast updates. FastUpdate comprises three key designs: (i) it perceives the update locality and carefully merges multiple update requests accessing the same stripe to reduce the incurred network traffic; (ii) it abstracts the existing update schemes into collector selection and tree construction, greedily generates the update solution for each stripe to balance the transmission load across nodes; (iii) it dynamically schedules appropriate stripes to update in heterogeneous and dynamic networks to fully saturate the bandwidth resources. Comprehensive evaluations verify the effectiveness of FastUpdate on Alibaba ECS. It can increase the update throughput by 16.15%-88.71% for various update schemes.
papers.abstract_zh: 纠删码被广泛采用来维护数据可靠性，但它会带来显着的更新损失。我们分析现实世界的痕迹并观察现有研究未解决的一些挑战，从而限制了性能的提升。我们提出了FastUpdate，一种高效的多条带更新框架，可以辅助现有的更新方案实现快速更新。 FastUpdate包括三个关键设计：（i）它感知更新局部性并仔细合并访问同一条带的多个更新请求，以减少产生的网络流量； (ii)将现有的更新方案抽象为收集器选择和树构建，贪婪地生成每个条带的更新方案以平衡节点之间的传输负载； (iii)它动态地调度适当的条带以在异构和动态网络中更新以完全饱和带宽资源。综合评估验证了FastUpdate在阿里巴巴ECS上的有效性。对于各种更新方案，它可以将更新吞吐量提高16.15%-88.71%。

papers.title: MANS: Efficient and Portable ANS Encoding for Multi-Byte Integer Data on CPUs and GPUs.
papers.abstract: Lossless compression is a classic technique for reducing data storage and transmission requirements. Asymmetric Numeral Systems (ANS) is a high-throughput, high-ratio lossless compression algorithm, but it lacks effective support for multi-byte data and cross-platform compatibility. To address this issue, we propose an Adaptive Data Mapping (ADM) scheme, which maps multi-byte integer data into single-byte space based on the data’s characteristics, improving the compression ratio of ANS while maintaining low encoding redundancy. We also optimize the ADM algorithm and the ANS encoder for GPU and CPU architectures, respectively, and combine them to create an efficient and portable ANS encoding method for multi-byte integer data, called MANS. Experimental results show that MANS improves compression ratios by an average of 1.24 ×, achieves 870.27MB/s throughput on CPUs, and delivers up to 288.45 × and 135.86 × speedups on an NVIDIA A100 and an AMD MI210 GPU compared to the CPU version—demonstrating its efficiency and portability across platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 无损压缩是降低数据存储和传输要求的经典技术。非对称数字系统（ANS）是一种高吞吐量、高比率的无损压缩算法，但缺乏对多字节数据的有效支持和跨平台兼容性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种自适应数据映射（ADM）方案，该方案根据数据的特性将多字节整数数据映射到单字节空间，提高ANS的压缩率，同时保持低编码冗余。我们还分别针对 GPU 和 CPU 架构优化了 ADM 算法和 ANS 编码器，并将它们结合起来创建了一种针对多字节整数数据的高效且可移植的 ANS 编码方法，称为 MANS。实验结果表明，与 CPU 版本相比，MANS 平均将压缩比提高了 1.24 倍，在 CPU 上实现了 870.27MB/s 的吞吐量，在 NVIDIA A100 和 AMD MI210 GPU 上提供了高达 288.45 倍和 135.86 倍的加速，展示了其跨平台的效率和可移植性。

papers.title: Matrix Is All You Need: Rearchitecting Quantum Chemistry to Scale on AI Accelerators.
MaverIQ: Fingerprint-Guided Extrapolation and Fragmentation-Aware Layering for Intent-Based LLM Serving.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are becoming ubiquitous across industries, where applications demand they fulfill diverse user intents. However, developers currently face the challenge of manually exploring numerous deployment configurations—combinations of parallelism and compression techniques that impact resource usage, latency, cost, and accuracy—to meet these intents. Previous works automate configuration selection and deployment, but, they (a) rely on expensive profiling, and (b) suboptimally utilize the fragmented resource availability in multi-tenant GPU clusters, inflating operational costs for the provider. Moreover, none of these solutions tailors deployment configuration decisions to diverse user intents.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在各个行业中变得无处不在，这些应用程序要求它们满足不同的用户意图。然而，开发人员目前面临着手动探索众多部署配置（影响资源使用、延迟、成本和准确性的并行性和压缩技术的组合）以满足这些意图的挑战。以前的工作自动化了配置选择和部署，但是，它们 (a) 依赖于昂贵的分析，(b) 未充分利用多租户 GPU 集群中的碎片资源可用性，从而增加了提供商的运营成本。此外，这些解决方案都没有根据不同的用户意图定制部署配置决策。

papers.title: MetoHash: A Memory-Efficient and Traffic-Optimized Hashing Index on Hybrid PMem-DRAM Memories.
papers.abstract: Persistent memory (PMem) brings new design considerations in realizing high-performance and scalable hashing indexes. We uncover that existing hashing indexes for PMem still suffer from traffic amplification and memory inefficiency. We present MetoHash, a memory-efficient and traffic-optimized hashing index on hybrid PMem-DRAM memories. MetoHash proposes a three-layer index structure spanning across CPU caches, DRAM, and PMem for data management. It aggregates the incoming key-value items in CPU caches for fast inserts, which are then arranged in DRAM and flushed to PMem, to eliminate traffic amplification. MetoHash also uses fingerprinting to reduce unnecessary probings over PMem and removes duplicate items during bucket relocations. We implement MetoHash on PMem with persistent and volatile CPU caches, and show that compared to state-of-the-art hashing indexes for PMem, MetoHash improves the throughput by 86.1–257.6% under various workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 持久内存（PMem）为实现高性能和可扩展的哈希索引带来了新的设计考虑。我们发现 PMem 的现有哈希索引仍然受到流量放大和内存效率低下的影响。我们推出了 MetoHash，这是一种基于混合 PMem-DRAM 内存的内存高效且流量优化的哈希索引。 MetoHash 提出了一种跨越 CPU 缓存、DRAM 和 PMem 的三层索引结构来进行数据管理。它将传入的键值项聚合在 CPU 缓存中以进行快速插入，然后将其排列在 DRAM 中并刷新到 PMem，以消除流量放大。 MetoHash 还使用指纹识别来减少对 PMem 的不必要的探测，并在存储桶重新定位期间删除重复的项目。我们在具有持久性和易失性 CPU 缓存的 PMem 上实现了 MetoHash，结果表明，与 PMem 的最先进的哈希索引相比，MetoHash 在各种工作负载下将吞吐量提高了 86.1–257.6%。

papers.title: Microcredentials for Open Hardware and HPC Workforce Development: The Openchip Approach with RISC-V Ecosystem.
papers.abstract: The semiconductor and high-performance computing (HPC) sectors face a parallel and urgent challenge: a widening skills gap amid rapid technological evolution, particularly with the rise of open hardware platforms such as RISC-V. As global initiatives like the EU Chips Act and national sovereignty strategies emphasize workforce development, traditional academic programs remain too rigid and slow to adapt. This paper presents a microcredential-based strategy for agile, modular, and industry-validated training focused on open hardware and full-stack HPC system design. Through the lens of Openchip's approach, we explore how co-designed curricula—especially around vector-based RISC-V architectures—can modernize education to reflect emerging HPC paradigms. We also examine curricular gaps, the potential alignment with the TCPP curriculum initiative, and propose a roadmap for embedding microcredentials into scalable, open, and sovereign HPC education ecosystems.
papers.abstract_zh: 半导体和高性能计算 (HPC) 行业面临着一个并行而紧迫的挑战：技术快速发展，特别是随着 RISC-V 等开放硬件平台的兴起，技能差距不断扩大。由于《欧盟芯片法案》和国家主权战略等全球倡议强调劳动力发展，传统的学术项目仍然过于僵化且难以适应。本文提出了一种基于微证书的敏捷、模块化和经过行业验证的培训策略，重点关注开放硬件和全栈 HPC 系统设计。通过 Openchip 方法的视角，我们探索共同设计的课程（尤其是围绕基于矢量的 RISC-V 架构）如何实现教育现代化，以反映新兴的 HPC 范式。我们还研究了课程差距、与 TCPP 课程计划的潜在一致性，并提出了将微证书嵌入可扩展、开放和主权 HPC 教育生态系统的路线图。

papers.title: Microscopic-Level Mouse Whole Cortex Simulation Composed of 9 Million Biophysical Neurons and 26 Billion Synapses on the Supercomputer Fugaku.
papers.abstract: Understanding the brain remains a major scientific challenge due to its complex structure and function. Unlike artificial neural networks, the biological brain features diverse biophysical properties essential to its function. Building an accurate digital replica using extensive anatomical and physiological data, which are available in standardized public databases, has emerged as a promising approach. In this study, a light-weight biophysical neuron simulator was developed and optimized to the supercomputer Fugaku. Good strong scaling was demonstrated in a benchmark model upto 152,064 compute nodes with 7.13 petaflops performance. In a more realistic scenario, a whole cerebral cortex of a mouse, consisting of 9 million biophysical neurons and 26 billion synapses, was simulated on the full-scale Fugaku with 145,728 nodes. These suggest that the present high-performance computing technology is ready to support the construction of a digital replica of the whole mammalian brain.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于其复杂的结构和功能，了解大脑仍然是一项重大的科学挑战。与人工神经网络不同，生物大脑具有对其功能至关重要的多种生物物理特性。使用标准化公共数据库中提供的大量解剖和生理数据构建准确的数字复制品已成为一种有前景的方法。在这项研究中，开发了一种轻量级生物物理神经元模拟器，并针对超级计算机 Fugaku 进行了优化。在高达 152,064 个计算节点和 7.13 petaflops 性能的基准模型中展示了良好的强大扩展性。在更真实的场景中，在具有 145,728 个节点的全尺寸 Fugaku 上模拟了由 900 万个生物物理神经元和 260 亿个突触组成的小鼠整个大脑皮层。这些表明，目前的高性能计算技术已经准备好支持构建整个哺乳动物大脑的数字复制品。

papers.title: Million-Atom Ab Initio Electron Dynamics: Discontinuous Galerkin Real-Time Time-Dependent Density Functional Theory.
papers.abstract: Over the past decades, first-principles real-time time dependent density functional theory(rt-TDDFT) simulations have been limited to systems with only thousands of atoms. We propose a novel method based on the discontinuous Galerkin adaptive local basis, significantly reducing global communication in rt-TDDFT. We further introduce a tensor compression technique that leverages basis locality to avoid repeated evaluation of multi-center integrals in hybrid functionals, greatly reducing computational cost. To overcome the projection bottleneck in our basis sets, we design a fused Gemm-Reduce operation that achieves several times higher floating-point efficiency than standard BLAS combination. Our implementation reaches 34.8% of theoretical peak performance on 524,288 CGs of the New Sunway supercomputer and simulates electronic dynamics of systems with over one million atoms for both local-semi-local and hybrid functionals. This work improves computational scale by two orders of magnitude, opening new possibilities for exploring ultrafast dynamics in large-scale materials and nanophotonic devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年里，第一原理实时依赖密度泛函理论（rt-TDDFT）模拟仅限于只有数千个原子的系统。我们提出了一种基于不连续伽辽金自适应局部基础的新方法，显着减少了 rt-TDDFT 中的全局通信。我们进一步引入了一种张量压缩技术，利用基局部性来避免混合泛函中多中心积分的重复计算，从而大大降低了计算成本。为了克服基组中的投影瓶颈，我们设计了一种融合的 Gemm-Reduce 运算，其浮点效率比标准 BLAS 组合高出数倍。我们的实现在 New Sunway 超级计算机的 524,288 个 CG 上达到了理论峰值性能的 34.8%，并模拟了具有超过 100 万个原子的系统的电子动力学，包括局部-半局部和混合泛函。这项工作将计算规模提高了两个数量级，为探索大规模材料和纳米光子器件中的超快动力学开辟了新的可能性。

papers.title: Minimizing Power Waste in Heterogenous Computing via Adaptive Uncore Scaling.
papers.abstract: High-performance computing (HPC) systems are essential for scientific discovery and engineering innovation. However, their growing power demands pose significant challenges, particularly as systems scale to the exascale level. Prior uncore frequency tuning studies have primarily focused on conventional HPC workloads running on CPU-only systems. As HPC advances toward heterogeneous computing, integrating diverse GPU workloads on heterogeneous CPU-GPU systems, it becomes imperative to revisit and enhance uncore scaling. Our investigation reveals that uncore frequency scales down only when CPU power approaches its thermal design power (TDP), which is rare in GPU-dominant applications. As a result, modern computing systems experience unnecessary power waste. In this study, we present MAGUS, a user-transparent uncore frequency scaling runtime for heterogeneous computing. MAGUS dynamically adjusts uncore frequencies according to distinct application execution phases, effectively minimizing power waste caused by consistently using maximum uncore frequencies. Our design incorporates several key techniques, including real-time monitoring and prediction of memory accesses, intelligent handling of frequent phase transitions, and leveraging vendor-provided power management features. We evaluate MAGUS with various GPU benchmarks and applications on multiple heterogeneous systems with different CPU and GPU architectures. Experimental results demonstrate that MAGUS achieves up to 27% energy savings compared to the default settings, while maintaining a performance loss of less than 5% and an overhead of under 1%.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 系统对于科学发现和工程创新至关重要。然而，它们不断增长的电力需求带来了重大挑战，特别是当系统扩展到百亿亿次级别时。之前的非核心频率调整研究主要集中在仅 CPU 系统上运行的传统 HPC 工作负载。随着 HPC 向异构计算发展，在异构 CPU-GPU 系统上集成不同的 GPU 工作负载，重新审视和增强非核心扩展变得势在必行。我们的调查显示，只有当 CPU 功率接近其热设计功率 (TDP) 时，非核心频率才会降低，这在 GPU 主导的应用中很少见。因此，现代计算系统会遭受不必要的电力浪费。在这项研究中，我们提出了 MAGUS，一种用于异构计算的用户透明的非核心频率缩放运行时。 MAGUS 根据不同的应用程序执行阶段动态调整非核心频率，有效减少持续使用最大非核心频率造成的功耗。我们的设计融合了多项关键技术，包括内存访问的实时监控和预测、频繁相变的智能处理以及利用供应商提供的电源管理功能。我们使用各种 GPU 基准测试和在具有不同 CPU 和 GPU 架构的多个异构系统上的应用程序来评估 MAGUS。实验结果表明，与默认设置相比，MAGUS 实现了高达 27% 的节能，同时保持了低于 5% 的性能损失和低于 1% 的开销。

papers.title: MISA-AKMC : Achieve Kinetic Monte Carlo Simulation of 20 Quadrillion Atoms on GPU Clusters.
papers.abstract: The Atomic Kinetic Monte Carlo (AKMC) method provides insights into the macroscopic behavior of materials through atomistic-level simulations and finds broad applications in materials science innovation. Improving simulation scale and performance remains a consistent focus in the development of parallel AKMC software. We port the AKMC software to GPU clusters. To alleviate the memory pressure in large-scale complex system simulations, we redesign the data layout and propose the Lattice Data Compression and Vacancy Data Decompression algorithms. Additionally, We propose a multi-level pipeline scheme combined with an on-demand communication forwarding and merging strategy to reduce data transfer and communication overhead. Compared to state-of-the-art KMC software, MISA-AKMC achieves a 10.41-fold improvement in computational throughput and a 52.07-fold expansion in simulation scale. We implement the first true micrometer-scale AKMC simulation involving 20 quadrillion atoms on GPU clusters. MISA-AKMC achieves 96.03% parallel efficiency in weak scaling and 85.29% in strong scaling on 16,000 GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 原子动力学蒙特卡罗 (AKMC) 方法通过原子级模拟提供对材料宏观行为的洞察，并在材料科学创新中得到广泛应用。提高仿真规模和性能仍然是并行 AKMC 软件开发的一贯重点。我们将 AKMC 软件移植到 GPU 集群。为了缓解大规模复杂系统仿真中的内存压力，我们重新设计了数据布局，并提出了格子数据压缩和空位数据解压缩算法。此外，我们提出了一种多级管道方案，结合按需通信转发和合并策略，以减少数据传输和通信开销。与最先进的KMC软件相比，MISA-AKMC的计算吞吐量提高了10.41倍，仿真规模扩大了52.07倍。我们在 GPU 集群上实现了第一个真正的微米级 AKMC 模拟，涉及 20 个万亿个原子。 MISA-AKMC 在 16,000 个 GPU 上，弱扩展时的并行效率为 96.03%，强扩展时的并行效率为 85.29%。

papers.title: Mixed-Precision Performance Portability of FFT-Based GPU-Accelerated Algorithms for Block-Triangular Toeplitz Matrices.
papers.abstract: The hardware diversity in leadership-class computing facilities, alongside the immense performance boosts from today’s GPUs when computing in lower precision, incentivizes scientific HPC workflows to adopt mixed-precision algorithms and performance portability models. We present an on-the-fly framework using hipify for performance portability and apply it to FFTMatvec—an HPC application that computes matrix-vector products with block-triangular Toeplitz matrices. Our approach enables FFTMatvec, initially a CUDA-only application, to run seamlessly on AMD GPUs with excellent performance. Performance optimizations for AMD GPUs are integrated into the open-source rocBLAS library, keeping the application code unchanged. We then present a dynamic mixed-precision framework for FFTMatvec; a Pareto front analysis determines the optimal mixed-precision configuration for a desired error tolerance. Results are shown for AMD Instinct™ MI250X, MI300X, and the newly launched MI355X GPUs. The performance-portable, mixed-precision FFTMatvec is scaled to 4,096 GPUs on the OLCF Frontier supercomputer.
papers.abstract_zh: 领先级计算设施中的硬件多样性，以及当今 GPU 在低精度计算时的巨大性能提升，激励科学 HPC 工作流程采用混合精度算法和性能可移植性模型。我们提出了一个使用 hipify 实现性能可移植性的动态框架，并将其应用于 FFTMatvec——一种使用块三角 Toeplitz 矩阵计算矩阵向量乘积的 HPC 应用程序。我们的方法使 FFTMatvec（最初是一个仅支持 CUDA 的应用程序）能够在 AMD GPU 上无缝运行，并具有出色的性能。 AMD GPU 的性能优化已集成到开源 rocBLAS 库中，保持应用程序代码不变。然后，我们提出了 FFTMatvec 的动态混合精度框架；帕累托前沿分析确定了实现所需误差容限的最佳混合精度配置。显示的是 AMD Instinct™ MI250X、MI300X 和新推出的 MI355X GPU 的结果。高性能便携式、混合精度 FFTMatvec 在 OLCF Frontier 超级计算机上扩展到 4,096 个 GPU。

papers.title: MLP-Offload: Multi-Level, Multi-Path Offloading for LLM Pre-training to Break the GPU Memory Wall.
papers.abstract: Training LLMs larger than the aggregated memory of multiple GPUs is increasingly necessary due to the faster growth of LLM sizes compared to GPU memory. To this end, multi-tier host memory or disk offloading techniques are proposed by state of art. Despite advanced asynchronous multi-tier read/write strategies, such offloading strategies result in significant I/O overheads in the critical path of training, resulting in slower iterations. To this end, we propose MLP-Offload, a novel multi-level, multi-path offloading engine specifically designed for optimizing LLM training on resource-constrained setups by mitigating I/O bottlenecks. We make several key observations that drive the design of MLP-Offload, such as I/O overheads during the update dominate the iteration time; I/O bandwidth of the third-level remote storage tier remains unutilized; and, contention due to concurrent offloading amplifies I/O bottlenecks. Driven by these insights, we design and implement MLP-Offload to offload the optimizer states across multiple tiers in a cache-efficient and concurrency-controlled fashion to mitigate I/O bottlenecks during the backward and update phases. Evaluations on models up to 280B parameters shows that MLP-Offload achieves 2.5 × faster iterations compared to the state-of-the-art LLM training runtimes.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于与 GPU 内存相比，LLM 大小增长更快，因此训练大于多个 GPU 聚合内存的 LLM 变得越来越有必要。为此，现有技术提出了多层主机存储器或磁盘卸载技术。尽管有先进的异步多层读/写策略，但此类卸载策略会在训练的关键路径中产生大量 I/O 开销，从而导致迭代速度变慢。为此，我们提出了 MLP-Offload，这是一种新颖的多级、多路径卸载引擎，专门设计用于通过减轻 I/O 瓶颈来优化资源受限设置上的 LLM 训练。我们进行了几个推动 MLP-Offload 设计的关键观察，例如更新期间的 I/O 开销主导了迭代时间；第三级远程存储层的I/O带宽仍未得到利用；而且，并发卸载引起的争用会加剧 I/O 瓶颈。在这些见解的驱动下，我们设计并实现了 MLP-Offload，以缓存高效且并发控制的方式跨多个层卸载优化器状态，​​从而缓解向后和更新阶段的 I/O 瓶颈。对高达 280B 参数的模型的评估表明，与最先进的 LLM 训练运行时相比，MLP-Offload 的迭代速度提高了 2.5 倍。

papers.title: mLR: Scalable Laminography Reconstruction based on Memoization.
papers.abstract: ADMM-FFT is an iterative method with high reconstruction accuracy for laminography but suffers from excessive computation time and large memory consumption. We introduce mLR, which employs memoization to replace the time-consuming Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) operations based on an unique observation that similar FFT operations appear in iterations of ADMM-FFT. We introduce a series of techniques to make the application of memoization to ADMM-FFT performance-beneficial and scalable. We also introduce variable offloading to save CPU memory and scale ADMM-FFT across GPUs within and across nodes. Using mLR, we are able to scale ADMM-FFT on an input problem of 2K × 2K × 2K, which is the largest input problem laminography reconstruction has ever worked on with the ADMM-FFT solution on limited memory; mLR brings 52.8% performance improvement on average (up to 65.4%), compared to the original ADMM-FFT.
papers.abstract_zh: ADMM-FFT是一种层层摄影重建精度高的迭代方法，但存在计算时间过长和内存消耗大的问题。我们引入了 mLR，它基于 ADMM-FFT 迭代中出现类似 FFT 操作的独特观察，采用记忆化来代替耗时的快速傅立叶变换 (FFT) 操作。我们引入了一系列技术，使记忆化在 ADMM-FFT 中的应用具有有益的性能和可扩展性。我们还引入变量卸载来节省 CPU 内存并在节点内和跨节点的 GPU 上扩展 ADMM-FFT。使用 mLR，我们能够在 2K × 2K × 2K 的输入问题上扩展 ADMM-FFT，这是在有限内存上使用 ADMM-FFT 解决方案处理过的最大输入问题层析成像重建；与原始 ADMM-FFT 相比，MLR 平均带来 52.8% 的性能提升（高达 65.4%）。

papers.title: Modeling and Optimizing Real-Time Telescope Interaction for Multi-wavelength Observation of Gamma-ray Bursts.
papers.abstract: Multi-wavelength observation of gamma-ray bursts (GRBs) requires real-time interaction among multiple telescopes. A gamma-ray telescope detects and localizes a GRB in the sky and must then communicate with an optical telescope to direct the latter toward the GRB as quickly as possible. We previously developed software for ADAPT, a suborbital gamma-ray telescope, to localize GRBs in real time, on a timescale shorter than that of the GRB itself. This work therefore studies progressive localization, in which ADAPT computes a series of increasingly accurate location estimates during a GRB to enable a partner instrument to more rapidly find it. We describe a modeling and optimization framework to decide when ADAPT should compute estimated GRB locations to minimize the time for the partner to find the GRB. Our framework can design progressive strategies that allow a partner telescope to find a GRB up to 42% faster than strategies using a single alert.
papers.abstract_zh: 伽马射线暴（GRB）的多波长观测需要多个望远镜之间的实时交互。伽马射线望远镜探测并定位天空中的伽马射线暴，然后必须与光学望远镜通信，以尽快将后者引导至伽玛射线暴。我们之前为亚轨道伽马射线望远镜 ADAPT 开发了软件，用于实时定位伽玛射线暴，其时间尺度比伽玛射线暴本身的时间尺度短。因此，这项工作研究渐进式定位，其中 ADAPT 在 GRB 期间计算一系列越来越准确的位置估计，以使合作伙伴仪器能够更快地找到它。我们描述了一个建模和优化框架来决定 ADAPT 何时应计算估计的 GRB 位置，以最大限度地缩短合作伙伴找到 GRB 的时间。我们的框架可以设计渐进策略，使合作伙伴望远镜发现GRB的速度比使用单一警报的策略快42%。

papers.title: Modeling the Carbon Footprint of HPC: The Top 500 and EasyC.
papers.abstract: Climate change is a critical concern for HPC systems, but GHG protocol carbon-emission accounting methodologies are difficult for a single system, and effectively infeasible for a collection of systems. As a result, there is no HPC-wide carbon reporting, and even the largest HPC sites do not do GHG protocol reporting.
papers.abstract_zh: 气候变化是 HPC 系统的一个关键问题，但温室气体协议碳排放核算方法对于单个系统来说很困难，并且对于系统集合来说实际上是不可行的。因此，没有 HPC 范围内的碳报告，甚至最大的 HPC 站点也不进行温室气体协议报告。

papers.title: Modelling Load Imbalance In Shared Memory Multicore Systems.
papers.abstract: Memory bandwidth has become the primary limiting factor of performance in many modern HPC applications, and it poses a limit to scalability because the achievable memory bandwidth only grows linearly with a small number of CPU cores. When the number of cores concurrently using the memory system exceeds a threshold, the aggregate memory bandwidth quickly saturates.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存带宽已成为许多现代 HPC 应用程序性能的主要限制因素，并且它对可扩展性造成了限制，因为可实现的内存带宽仅随着 CPU 核心数量的减少而线性增长。当同时使用内存系统的核心数量超过阈值时，聚合内存带宽很快就会饱和。

papers.title: ModuLair: Streamlining Python Virtual Environment Management for HPC.
papers.abstract: Managing Python environments on high-performance computing (HPC) systems presents unique challenges due to complex toolchains, file system constraints, and diverse user needs. We present ModuLair, a modular, metadata-driven Python virtual environment framework designed to simplify environment creation, activation, and management in HPC contexts. ModuLair supports both EasyBuild and non-EasyBuild module systems, automatically detecting to ensure reproducibility and compatibility across workflows. The framework integrates seamlessly with command-line and graphical interfaces, including the Texas A&M High Performance Research Computing (HPRC) User Support Dashboard, Drona Composer, and JupyterLab, enabling visual, intuitive environment management for both novice and experienced users.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于复杂的工具链、文件系统限制和多样化的用户需求，管理高性能计算 (HPC) 系统上的 Python 环境面临着独特的挑战。我们推出 ModuLair，这是一个模块化、元数据驱动的 Python 虚拟环境框架，旨在简化 HPC 环境中的环境创建、激活和管理。 ModuLair 支持 EasyBuild 和非 EasyBuild 模块系统，自动检测以确保跨工作流程的可重复性和兼容性。该框架与命令行和图形界面无缝集成，包括 Texas A&M 高性能研究计算 (HPRC) 用户支持仪表板、Drona Composer 和 JupyterLab，为新手和经验丰富的用户提供可视化、直观的环境管理。

papers.title: Modular Architecture for High-Performance and Low Overhead Data Transfers.
papers.abstract: High-performance applications necessitate rapid and dependable transfer of massive datasets across geographically dispersed locations. Traditional file transfer tools often suffer from resource underutilization and instability due to fixed configurations or monolithic optimization methods. We propose AutoMDT, a novel Modular Data Transfer Architecture, to address these issues by employing a deep reinforcement learning agent to simultaneously optimize concurrency levels for read, network, and write operations. This solution incorporates a lightweight network–system simulator, enabling offline training of a Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) agent in approximately 45 minutes on average, thereby overcoming the impracticality of lengthy online training in production networks. AutoMDT’s modular design decouples I/O and network tasks, allowing the agent to capture complex buffer dynamics precisely and adapt to changing system and network conditions quickly. Evaluations on production-grade testbeds show that AutoMDT achieves up to 8 × faster convergence and a \(68\%\) reduction in transfer completion times compared to state-of-the-art solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能应用程序需要在地理上分散的位置快速、可靠地传输大量数据集。传统的文件传输工具经常因固定配置或整体优化方法而遭受资源利用不足和不稳定的困扰。我们提出 AutoMDT，一种新颖的模块化数据传输架构，通过采用深度强化学习代理来同时优化读取、网络和写入操作的并发级别来解决这些问题。该解决方案采用了轻量级网络系统模拟器，平均可以在大约 45 分钟内完成近端策略优化 (PPO) 代理的离线训练，从而克服了生产网络中冗长在线训练的不切实际性。 AutoMDT 的模块化设计将 I/O 和网络任务解耦，使代理能够精确捕获复杂的缓冲区动态并快速适应不断变化的系统和网络条件。对生产级测试台的评估表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，AutoMDT 的收敛速度提高了 8 倍，传输完成时间缩短了 \(68\%\)。

papers.title: MoE-Inference-Bench: Performance Evaluation of Mixture of Expert Large Language and Vision Models.
papers.abstract: Mixture of Experts (MoE) models have enabled the scaling of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) by achieving massive parameter counts while maintaining computational efficiency. However, MoEs introduce several inference-time challenges, including load imbalance across experts and the additional routing computational overhead. To address these challenges and fully harness the benefits of MoE, a systematic evaluation of hardware acceleration techniques is essential. We present MoE-Inference-Bench, a comprehensive study to evaluate MoE performance across diverse scenarios. We analyze the impact of batch size, sequence length, and critical MoE hyperparameters such as FFN dimensions and number of experts on throughput. We evaluate several optimization techniques on Nvidia H100 GPUs, including pruning, Fused MoE operations, speculative decoding, quantization, and various parallelization strategies. Our evaluation includes MoEs from the Mixtral, DeepSeek, OLMoE and Qwen families. The results reveal performance differences across configurations and provide insights for the efficient deployment of MoEs.
papers.abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 模型通过在保持计算效率的同时实现大量参数计数，实现了大型语言模型 (LLM) 和视觉语言模型 (VLM) 的扩展。然而，MoE 引入了一些推理时间挑战，包括专家之间的负载不平衡和额外的路由计算开销。为了应对这些挑战并充分利用 MoE 的优势，对硬件加速技术进行系统评估至关重要。我们提出了 MoE-Inference-Bench，这是一项评估 MoE 在不同场景下表现的综合研究。我们分析了批量大小、序列长度和关键 MoE 超参数（例如 FFN 维度和专家数量）对吞吐量的影响。我们在 Nvidia H100 GPU 上评估了多种优化技术，包括修剪、Fused MoE 操作、推测性解码、量化和各种并行化策略。我们的评估包括来自 Mixtral、DeepSeek、OLMoE 和 Qwen 系列的 MoE。结果揭示了不同配置之间的性能差异，并为 MoE 的高效部署提供了见解。

papers.title: Mojo: MLIR-based Performance-Portable HPC Science Kernels on GPUs for the Python Ecosystem.
papers.abstract: We explore the performance and portability of the novel Mojo language for scientific computing workloads on GPUs. As the first language based on the LLVM’s Multi-Level Intermediate Representation (MLIR) compiler infrastructure, Mojo aims to close performance and productivity gaps by combining Python’s interoperability and CUDA-like syntax for compile-time portable GPU programming. We target four scientific workloads: a seven-point stencil (memory-bound), BabelStream (memory-bound), miniBUDE (compute-bound), and Hartree–Fock (compute-bound with atomic operations); and compare their performance against vendor baselines on NVIDIA H100 and AMD MI300A GPUs. We show that Mojo’s performance is competitive with CUDA and HIP for memory-bound kernels, whereas gaps exist on AMD GPUs for atomic operations and for fast-math compute-bound kernels on both AMD and NVIDIA GPUs. Although the learning curve and programming requirements are still fairly low-level, Mojo can close significant gaps in the fragmented Python ecosystem in the convergence of scientific computing and AI.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们探索新颖的 Mojo 语言在 GPU 上科学计算工作负载的性能和可移植性。作为第一种基于 LLVM 多级中间表示 (MLIR) 编译器基础架构的语言，Mojo 旨在通过结合 Python 的互操作性和类似于 CUDA 的语法来进行编译时便携式 GPU 编程，从而缩小性能和生产力差距。我们的目标是四种科学工作负载：七点模板（内存限制）、BabelStream（内存限制）、miniBUDE（计算限制）和 Hartree–Fock（原子操作计算限制）；并将它们的性能与 NVIDIA H100 和 AMD MI300A GPU 上的供应商基准进行比较。我们表明，对于内存限制型内核，Mojo 的性能与 CUDA 和 HIP 相当，而 AMD GPU 上的原子操作以及 AMD 和 NVIDIA GPU 上的快速数学计算限制型内核则存在差距。尽管学习曲线和编程要求仍然相当低，但 Mojo 可以弥补分散的 Python 生态系统在科学计算和人工智能融合方面的重大差距。

papers.title: Molten Chloride Small Modular Reactor Performance Characteristics for Data Center Operation.
papers.abstract: Small modular reactors (SMRs) require a smaller physical footprint than conventional large nuclear reactors while still providing high reliability in power generation and they are frequently discussed in the context of providing power for data centers. Molten chloride reactors represent a new type of SMR where a mixture of molten chloride and uranium serves as both reactor fuel and coolant. The approach is key to molten chloride fast reactor technologies being marketed commercially in SMRs for end users like data centers. This work leverages the open-source Multiphysics Object Oriented Simulation Environment (MOOSE) framework to simulate the behavior of a molten salt SMR with the control rods at 60% open exploring steady state behavior of an SMR while operating below maximum capacity to power a data center with a mismatched power rating.
papers.abstract_zh: 小型模块化反应堆 (SMR) 需要比传统大型核反应堆更小的物理占地面积，同时仍能提供较高的发电可靠性，并且在为数据中心供电的背景下经常讨论它们。熔融氯化物反应堆代表了一种新型小型堆反应堆，其中熔融氯化物和铀的混合物既充当反应堆燃料又充当冷却剂。该方法是熔融氯化物快堆技术在小型反应堆中面向数据中心等最终用户进行商业化销售的关键。这项工作利用开源多物理场面向对象仿真环境 (MOOSE) 框架来模拟熔盐 SMR 的行为，控制棒处于 60% 开放状态，探索 SMR 在低于最大容量运行时的稳态行为，为额定功率不匹配的数据中心供电。

papers.title: Moment: Co-optimizing Physical Communication Topology and Data Placement for Multi-GPU Out-of-core GNN Training.
papers.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are widely employed in applications like recommendation systems, social network analysis, and fraud detection, but training large-scale GNNs is challenging due to its memory limitations. Existing systems face a trade-off between throughput and monetary cost: Distributed systems require expensive memory scaling, while single-machine out-of-core systems are limited by GPU/PCIe throughput. To this end, we propose Moment, a physical communication topology and data placement co-optimizer to enable high-throughput and low-cost GNN training in a single multi-GPU machine. Moment addresses communication contention and GPU load imbalance issues by modeling the physical topology as capacity-constrained directed graphs and formulating communication scheduling as a max-flow problem. It also introduces a data-distribution-aware knapsack algorithm for optimized data placement. Experimental results show that Moment outperforms out-of-core systems by up to 6.51 × and distributed systems by up to 3.02 ×, with only 50% monetary cost.
papers.abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）广泛应用于推荐系统、社交网络分析和欺诈检测等应用中，但由于其内存限制，训练大规模 GNN 具有挑战性。现有系统面临着吞吐量和货币成本之间的权衡：分布式系统需要昂贵的内存扩展，而单机核外系统则受到 GPU/PCIe 吞吐量的限制。为此，我们提出了 Moment，一种物理通信拓扑和数据放置协同优化器，可在单个多 GPU 机器中实现高吞吐量和低成本的 GNN 训练。 Moment 通过将物理拓扑建模为容量受限的有向图并将通信调度制定为最大流问题来解决通信争用和 GPU 负载不平衡问题。它还引入了数据分布感知背包算法以优化数据放置。实验结果表明，Moment 的性能比核外系统高出 6.51 倍，比分布式系统高出 3.02 倍，而货币成本仅为 50%。

papers.title: MPI Collectives with Programmable Smart Switches.
papers.abstract: Programmable smart network devices are heavily used by cloud providers, but typically not for HPC. However, they provide opportunities for off-loading computations, in particular for collective operations, which are important for data intensive workloads in classic HPC and ML training. In this paper, we present a prototype called mpitofino to enable offloading MPI collectives (in particular reductions) onto smart switches over an Ethernet fabric. We target Intel’s programmable Ethernet switches equipped with a Tofino ASIC, and we use the P4 programming language to process collective packets on the chip’s low-latency data path. We demonstrate how the flexibility of P4 enables us to use RoCEv2 as protocol, utilizing RDMA hardware support on the nodes’ NICs. Furthermore, we implement mpitofino as a collective provider in Open MPI and discuss its desirable scaling characteristics. Finally, we demonstrate that mpitofino can achieve data throughput close to the 100GBit/s line rate.
papers.abstract_zh: 可编程智能网络设备被云提供商大量使用，但通常不用于 HPC。然而，它们提供了卸载计算的机会，特别是对于集体操作，这对于经典 HPC 和 ML 训练中的数据密集型工作负载非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 mpitofino 的原型，可以通过以太网结构将 MPI 集合（特别是缩减）卸载到智能交换机上。我们的目标是配备 Tofino ASIC 的英特尔可编程以太网交换机，并使用 P4 编程语言来处理芯片低延迟数据路径上的集体数据包。我们演示了 P4 的灵活性如何使我们能够使用 RoCEv2 作为协议，利用节点 NIC 上的 RDMA 硬件支持。此外，我们将 mpitofino 作为 Open MPI 中的集体提供者实现，并讨论其理想的扩展特性。最后，我们证明mpitofino可以实现接近100GBit/s线速的数据吞吐量。

papers.title: MPI Communication Performance on AMD MI300A: Microbenchmarks and Applications.
papers.abstract: AMD’s MI300A integrates CPU and GPU chiplets around a shared HBM3 pool, removing the traditional host-device boundary and changing assumptions in GPU-aware MPI. Despite early deployments, there is little guidance on how mainstream MPI libraries behave on this architecture. This evaluation paper presents a comparative study of MVAPICH-Plus, Open MPI, MPICH, and Cray MPICH on MI300A APU nodes. We measure point-to-point performance on CPU and GPU buffers, reporting intra-node and inter-node latency, unidirectional bandwidth, and bidirectional bandwidth across various message sizes. We then examine collectives, covering reduction-based and data-movement-based operations, and analyze scaling behavior. Finally, we connect microbenchmark trends to application results using OpenFOAM and Distributed training of a large language model (LLM) with PyTorch. The study distills practical guidance and highlights opportunities for MI300A-aware optimizations in MPI.
papers.abstract_zh: AMD 的 MI300A 在共享 HBM3 池周围集成了 CPU 和 GPU 小芯片，消除了传统的主机设备边界并改变了 GPU 感知 MPI 的假设。尽管已经进行了早期部署，但关于主流 MPI 库如何在此架构上运行的指导很少。本评估论文对 MI300A APU 节点上的 MVAPICH-Plus、Open MPI、MPICH 和 Cray MPICH 进行了比较研究。我们测量 CPU 和 GPU 缓冲区的点对点性能，报告节点内和节点间延迟、单向带宽和各种消息大小的双向带宽。然后，我们检查集体，涵盖基于缩减和基于数据移动的操作，并分析扩展行为。最后，我们使用 OpenFOAM 和 PyTorch 对大型语言模型 (LLM) 进行分布式训练，将微基准趋势与应用结果联系起来。该研究提炼了实用指南，并强调了 MPI 中 MI300A 感知优化的机会。

papers.title: MPPI - Type safe C++ Datatypes for MPI.
papers.abstract: MPI provides a flexible C-API to communicate data of various types between a set of distributed processes over high-speed interconnects in HPC systems. Data buffers are described using MPI-Datatypes, which specify the type and layout of the data to be transmitted. To construct these datatypes, users must manually describe the memory layout of buffer elements via the MPI-API. However, modern applications are typically written in object-oriented C++, which offers significant advantages over C, including type safety and metaprogramming capabilities.
papers.abstract_zh: MPI 提供了灵活的 C-API，可通过 HPC 系统中的高速互连在一组分布式进程之间传送各种类型的数据。数据缓冲区使用 MPI 数据类型进行描述，它指定要传输的数据的类型和布局。要构造这些数据类型，用户必须通过 MPI-API 手动描述缓冲区元素的内存布局。然而，现代应用程序通常是用面向对象的 C++ 编写的，与 C 相比，它具有显着的优势，包括类型安全和元编程功能。

papers.title: MT4G: A Tool for Reliable Auto-Discovery of NVIDIA and AMD GPU Compute and Memory Topologies.
papers.abstract: Understanding GPU topology is essential for performance-related tasks in HPC or AI. Yet, unlike for CPUs with tools like hwloc, GPU information is hard to come by, incomplete, and vendor-specific.
papers.abstract_zh: 了解 GPU 拓扑对于 HPC 或 AI 中与性能相关的任务至关重要。然而，与具有 hwloc 等工具的 CPU 不同，GPU 信息很难获得、不完整且特定于供应商。

papers.title: Multiscale Light-Matter Dynamics in Quantum Materials: From Electrons to Topological Superlattices.
papers.abstract: Light-matter dynamics in topological quantum materials enables ultralow-power, ultrafast devices. A challenge is simulating multiple field and particle equations for light, electrons, and atoms over vast spatiotemporal scales on Exaflop/s computers with increased heterogeneity and low-precision focus. We present a paradigm shift that solves the multiscale/multiphysics/heterogeneity challenge harnessing hardware heterogeneity and low-precision arithmetic. Divide-conquer-recombine algorithms divide the problem into not only spatial but also physical subproblems of small dynamic ranges and minimal mutual information, which are mapped onto best-characteristics-matching hardware units, while metamodel-space algebra minimizes communication and precision requirements. Using 60,000 GPUs of Aurora, DC-MESH (divide-and-conquer Maxwell-Ehrenfest-surface hopping) and XS-NNQMD (excited-state neural-network quantum molecular dynamics) modules of MLMD (multiscale light-matter dynamics) software were 152- and 3,780-times faster than the state-of-the-art for 15.4 million-electron and 1.23 trillion-atom PbTiO3 material, achieving 1.87 EFLOP/s for the former. This enabled the first study of light-induced switching of topological superlattices for future ferroelectric ‘topotronics’.
papers.abstract_zh: 拓扑量子材料中的光物质动力学使超低功耗、超快的设备成为可能。一项挑战是在 Exaflop/s 计算机上模拟广阔时空尺度上的光、电子和原子的多个场和粒子方程，并增加异质性和低精度聚焦。我们提出了一种范式转变，利用硬件异构性和低精度算法解决多尺度/多物理/异构性挑战。分而治之的重组算法不仅将问题划分为空间子问题，还划分为小动态范围和最小互信息的物理子问题，这些子问题被映射到最佳特性匹配的硬件单元上，而元模型空间代数则最大限度地减少了通信和精度要求。使用 Aurora 的 60,000 个 GPU，MLMD（多尺度光物质动力学）软件的 DC-MESH（分治麦克斯韦-埃伦菲斯特表面跳跃）和 XS-NNQMD（激发态神经网络量子分子动力学）模块分别比最先进的 1540 万电子和 1.23 倍快 152 倍和 3,780 倍。万亿原子PbTiO3材料，前者达到1.87 EFLOP/s。这使得首次对拓扑超晶格的光诱导开关的研究成为可能，以用于未来的铁电“拓扑电子学”。

papers.title: MXBLAS: Accelerating 8-bit Deep Learning with a Unified Micro-Scaled GEMM Library.
papers.abstract: Micro-scaling General Matrix Multiplication (MX-GEMM), which leverages 8-bit micro-scaling format (MX-format) inputs, represents a significant step forward in accelerating deep learning workloads. The MX-format space is diverse, encompassing various scaling patterns and granularities. However, current MX-GEMM implementations typically adopt a model-oriented approach, where format customization is tailored to individual models. This results in three key limitations: rigid problem-kernel coupling, inefficient promotion operations, and overlooked quantization overhead.
papers.abstract_zh: 微缩放通用矩阵乘法 (MX-GEMM) 利用 8 位微缩放格式（MX 格式）输入，代表着在加速深度学习工作负载方面向前迈出了重要一步。 MX 格式空间是多种多样的，包含各种缩放模式和粒度。然而，当前的 MX-GEMM 实现通常采用面向模型的方法，其中格式定制是针对单个模型定制的。这导致了三个关键限制：严格的问题-内核耦合、低效的提升操作以及被忽视的量化开销。

papers.title: Network Replay and Consistency Across Testbeds.
papers.abstract: Shared network testbeds are critical for systems and networking research. However, their shared hardware can introduce variability—like increased jitter or loss—that may impact experiment fidelity or reproducibility.
papers.abstract_zh: 共享网络测试台对于系统和网络研究至关重要。然而，他们的共享硬件可能会引入可变性（例如抖动或丢失增加），这可能会影响实验保真度或再现性。

papers.title: NNQS-SCI: Tackling Trillion-Dimensional Hilbert Space with Adaptive Neural Network Quantum States.
papers.abstract: Neural Network Quantum States (NNQS) offer a powerful variational Monte Carlo (VMC) approach for quantum many-body problems, balancing polynomial scaling with high expressive power. However, scaling NNQS to large chemical systems faces challenges in preserving accuracy with exact energy and managing vast configurations efficiently. In this work, we introduce NNQS-SCI, a high-performance Selected Configuration Interaction (SCI) based NNQS method designed to overcome these limitations. NNQS-SCI employs highly parallelized Slater-Condon rules for fast local energy evaluations, avoiding accuracy loss, while its adaptive SCI engine dynamically manages billions of configurations without space explosion or arbitrary cutoffs that plague other NNQS-CI approaches. Optimized for extreme scalability via multi-level parallelism and memory compression, NNQS-SCI successfully simulates systems up to 152 spin orbitals, tackling Hilbert space dimensions exceeding 1014 and demonstrating significant advances in scale and efficiency. NNQS-SCI thus provides a robust and scalable path towards high-accuracy quantum chemistry on high-performance computing platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经网络量子态 (NNQS) 为量子多体问题提供了强大的变分蒙特卡罗 (VMC) 方法，平衡多项式缩放与高表达能力。然而，将 NNQS 扩展到大型化学系统面临着保持准确能量和有效管理大量配置的挑战。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 NNQS-SCI，这是一种基于高性能选择配置交互 (SCI) 的 NNQS 方法，旨在克服这些限制。 NNQS-SCI 采用高度并行的 Slater-Condon 规则进行快速局部能量评估，避免精度损失，同时其自适应 SCI 引擎动态管理数十亿个配置，而不会出现困扰其他 NNQS-CI 方法的空间爆炸或任意中断。 NNQS-SCI 通过多级并行性和内存压缩进行了极端可扩展性的优化，成功模拟了多达 152 个自旋轨道的系统，解决了超过 1014 个希尔伯特空间维度的问题，并展示了规模和效率方面的显着进步。因此，NNQS-SCI 为高性能计算平台上的高精度量子化学提供了一条稳健且可扩展的路径。

papers.title: Numerical Performance of the Implicitly Restarted Arnoldi Method in OFP8, Bfloat16, Posit, and Takum Arithmetics.
papers.abstract: The computation of select eigenvalues and eigenvectors of large, sparse matrices is fundamental to a wide range of applications. Accordingly, evaluating the numerical performance of emerging alternatives to the IEEE 754 floating-point standard, such as OFP8 (E4M3 and E5M2), bfloat16, and the tapered-precision posit and takum formats, is of significant interest. Among the most widely used methods for this task is the implicitly restarted Arnoldi method, as implemented in ARPACK.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型稀疏矩阵的选择特征值和特征向量的计算是广泛应用的基础。因此，评估 IEEE 754 浮点标准的新兴替代方案（例如 OFP8（E4M3 和 E5M2）、bfloat16 以及锥形精度 posit 和 takum 格式）的数值性能具有重要意义。此任务最广泛使用的方法之一是隐式重新启动的 Arnoldi 方法，如 ARPACK 中实现的那样。

papers.title: Numerical Properties and Scalability of s-Step Preconditioned Conjugate Gradient Methods.
papers.abstract: s-step Preconditioned Conjugate Gradient (PCG) variants for iteratively solving large sparse linear systems reduce the number of global synchronization points of standard PCG by a factor of \({\mathcal {O}}(s)\). Despite improving scalability on large-scale parallel computers, they have worse numerical properties than standard PCG. Choosing a suitable basis type for the s-step basis matrices is known to potentially improve numerical stability strongly. The s-step method proposed first in the literature was designed to only use the monomial basis. We generalize this method to support arbitrary basis types, denoting our new method as sPCG.
papers.abstract_zh: 用于迭代求解大型稀疏线性系统的 s 步预条件共轭梯度 (PCG) 变体将标准 PCG 的全局同步点数量减少了 \({\mathcal {O}}(s)\) 因子。尽管提高了大规模并行计算机的可扩展性，但它们的数值属性比标准 PCG 更差。众所周知，为 s 步基矩阵选择合适的基类型可以极大地提高数值稳定性。文献中首先提出的 s-step 方法被设计为仅使用单项式基。我们将此方法推广到支持任意基础类型，将我们的新方法表示为 sPCG。

papers.title: ODOS-MPI: HPC-Friendly SmartNIC Offloading of Computation/Communication Kernels.
papers.abstract: The increasing complexity and scale of high-performance computing (HPC) workloads demand innovative approaches to optimize both computation and communication. While OpenMP has been widely adopted for intra-node parallelism and MPI for inter-node communication, emerging SmartNICs introduce new opportunities for offloading communication-intensive tasks. In this work, we extend OpenMP to support MPI kernel offloading to SmartNICs. Our implementation integrates Open MPI communication offloading into the LLVM compiler while utilizing DOCA SDK for efficient interaction with Nvidia BlueField DPUs. Leveraging OpenMP eliminates the need for direct low-level programming, lowering the entry barrier for domain scientists. We demonstrate our framework’s versatility by implementing a SmartNIC-enabled version of the MPI OSU micro-benchmarks and improving the execution time of an atmospheric weather simulation by over 18%, thanks to concurrent computation and communication.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 工作负载的复杂性和规模不断增加，需要创新方法来优化计算和通信。虽然 OpenMP 已广泛用于节点内并行性，MPI 已广泛用于节点间通信，但新兴的 SmartNIC 为卸载通信密集型任务带来了新的机会。在这项工作中，我们扩展了 OpenMP 以支持 MPI 内核卸载到 SmartNIC。我们的实现将 Open MPI 通信卸载集成到 LLVM 编译器中，同时利用 DOCA SDK 与 Nvidia BlueField DPU 进行高效交互。利用 OpenMP 无需直接进行低级编程，从而降低了领域科学家的进入门槛。我们通过实施支持 SmartNIC 的 MPI OSU 微基准版本来展示我们框架的多功能性，并通过并发计算和通信将大气天气模拟的执行时间提高 18% 以上。

papers.title: OmniFed: A Modular Framework for Configurable Federated Learning from Edge to HPC.
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is critical for edge and High Performance Computing (HPC) where data is not centralized and privacy is crucial. We present OmniFed, a modular framework designed around decoupling and clear separation of concerns for configuration, orchestration, communication, and training logic. Its architecture supports configuration-driven prototyping and code-level override-what-you-need customization. We also support different topologies, mixed communication protocols within a single deployment, and popular training algorithms. It also offers optional privacy mechanisms including Differential Privacy (DP), Homomorphic Encryption (HE), and Secure Aggregation (SA), as well as compression strategies. These capabilities are exposed through well-defined extension points, allowing users to customize topology and orchestration, learning logic, and privacy/compression plugins, all while preserving the integrity of the core system. We evaluate multiple models and algorithms to measure various performance metrics. By unifying topology configuration, mixed-protocol communication, and pluggable modules in one stack, OmniFed streamlines FL deployment across heterogeneous environments. Github repository is available at https://github.com/at-aaims/OmniFed.
papers.abstract_zh: 联合学习 (FL) 对于边缘和高性能计算 (HPC) 至关重要，因为数据不集中且隐私至关重要。我们推出了 OmniFed，这是一个模块化框架，围绕配置、编排、通信和训练逻辑的关注点的解耦和清晰分离而设计​​。其架构支持配置驱动的原型设计和代码级覆盖按需定制。我们还支持不同的拓扑、单个部署中的混合通信协议以及流行的训练算法。它还提供可选的隐私机制，包括差分隐私 (DP)、同态加密 (HE) 和安全聚合 (SA) 以及压缩策略。这些功能通过明确定义的扩展点公开，允许用户自定义拓扑和编排、学习逻辑和隐私/压缩插件，同时保持核心系统的完整性。我们评估多种模型和算法来衡量各种性能指标。通过在一个堆栈中统一拓扑配置、混合协议通信和可插拔模块，OmniFed 简化了异构环境中的 FL 部署。 Github 存储库位于 https://github.com/at-aaims/OmniFed。

papers.title: On the Compressibility of Floating-Point Data in Posit and IEEE-754 Representation.
papers.abstract: The IEEE 754 floating-point standard is the most used representation for real numbers in modern computer systems, despite issues in accuracy for certain applications. The posit format, which has several advantages, has been proposed as a direct drop-in replacement for IEEE floats. Many works compare the use of posits to floats in a wide range of scientific computing domains. However, there has not been any work looking into the compressibility of posit data. In this paper, we compare the compression ratios of different algorithms when the input is encoded in IEEE format and in posit format. We evaluate 5 lossless general-purpose compressors as well as several new compression algorithms synthesized by our LC framework on 14 single-precision inputs from the SDRBench suite, encoded in float and posit format. Our results show that that 4 of the 6 compressors yield an average of 2.59% reduction in compression ratio on posit data, whereas bzip2 provides a 1.74% increase in compression ratio, with XZ providing the highest ratios for both encodings.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管某些应用程序存在精度问题，但 IEEE 754 浮点标准是现代计算机系统中最常用的实数表示形式。 posit 格式有几个优点，已被提议作为 IEEE 浮点数的直接替代品。许多著作将定点与浮点数在广泛的科学计算领域中的使用进行了比较。然而，还没有任何研究研究数据的可压缩性的工作。在本文中，我们比较了输入以 IEEE 格式和 posit 格式编码时不同算法的压缩率。我们评估了 5 个无损通用压缩器以及由我们的 LC 框架在来自 SDRBench 套件的 14 个单精度输入（以 float 和 posit 格式编码）上合成的几种新压缩算法。我们的结果表明，6 个压缩器中的 4 个压缩器对 posit 数据的压缩比平均降低了 2.59%，而 bzip2 的压缩比提高了 1.74%，其中 XZ 为两种编码提供了最高的压缩比。

papers.title: On the integration of lightweight tasks with MPI using the C++26 std: : execution 'Senders' API.
papers.abstract: Integrating asynchronous MPI messaging with tasking runtimes requires careful handling of request polling and dispatching of associated completions to participating threads. The new C++26 Senders (std::execution) library offers a flexible collection of interfaces and templates for schedulers, algorithms and adaptors to work with asynchronous functions—and it makes explicit the mechanism to transfer execution from one context to another—essential for high performance. We have implemented the major features of the Senders API in the pika tasking runtime and used them to wrap asynchronous MPI calls such that messaging operations become nodes in the execution graph with the same calling semantics as other operations. The API allows us to easily experiment with different methods of message scheduling and dispatching completions. We present insights from our implementation on how application performance is affected by design choices surrounding the placement, scheduling and execution of polling and completion tasks using Senders.
papers.abstract_zh: 将异步 MPI 消息传递与任务运行时集成需要仔细处理请求轮询并将相关完成分派给参与线程。新的 C++26 Senders (std::execution) 库为调度程序、算法和适配器提供了一组灵活的接口和模板，以便与异步函数配合使用，并且它明确了将执行从一个上下文转移到另一个上下文的机制，这对于高性能至关重要。我们在 pika 任务运行时实现了 Senders API 的主要功能，并使用它们来包装异步 MPI 调用，以便消息传递操作成为执行图中的节点，具有与其他操作相同的调用语义。该 API 使我们能够轻松尝试不同的消息调度和分派完成方法。我们展示了我们的实施中关于应用程序性能如何受到围绕使用发送器的轮询和完成任务的放置、调度和执行的设计选择的影响的见解。

papers.title: On the Performance and Scalability of Cloud Supercomputers: Insights from Eagle and Reindeer.
papers.abstract: The launch of Eagle, Azure’s hyper-scale supercomputer and the Number 3 system on the TOP500 list in November 2023, demonstrated the increasing role of cloud platforms in high-performance computing. Cloud providers employ a diverse set of deployment strategies in their system design and planning, ranging from hyper-scale, single-location supercomputers to widely replicated, smaller-scale systems.
papers.abstract_zh: Azure 超大规模超级计算机 Eagle 的推出以及 2023 年 11 月在 TOP500 榜单上排名第三的系统，证明了云平台在高性能计算中的作用日益增强。云提供商在其系统设计和规划中采用了多种部署策略，从超大规模、单位置超级计算机到广泛复制的小型系统。

papers.title: Open Composer: A Web-Based Application for Generating and Managing Batch Jobs on HPC Clusters.
papers.abstract: Submitting batch jobs on HPC clusters usually requires familiarity with Linux commands and job schedulers, posing a significant learning barrier for beginners. To address this issue, we have developed Open Composer, a web-based application that helps users generate and manage batch jobs on HPC clusters. Open Composer automatically generates shell scripts using web forms defined for each application while also providing a real-time preview of the generated shell scripts and allowing direct editing. This feature helps reduce both the learning curve and the risk of syntax errors while maintaining flexibility in script writing. Open Composer provides a unified interface for job submission and status monitoring, and supports reusable job parameters, dynamic form widgets, and preprocessing steps. By enhancing usability and accessibility, Open Composer aims to make HPC resources more approachable for both novice and experienced users. Built on top of Open OnDemand[3], a widely adopted web portal framework for HPC environments, Open Composer ensures portability across various HPC clusters and seamless integration with institutional infrastructure, including authentication mechanisms.
papers.abstract_zh: 在 HPC 集群上提交批处理作业通常需要熟悉 Linux 命令和作业调度程序，这对初学者来说是一个很大的学习障碍。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了 Open Composer，这是一个基于 Web 的应用程序，可以帮助用户在 HPC 集群上生成和管理批处理作业。 Open Composer 使用为每个应用程序定义的 Web 表单自动生成 shell 脚本，同时还提供生成的 shell 脚本的实时预览并允许直接编辑。此功能有助于减少学习曲线和语法错误的风险，同时保持脚本编写的灵活性。 Open Composer 为作业提交和状态监控提供统一的界面，并支持可重用的作业参数、动态表单小部件和预处理步骤。通过增强可用性和可访问性，Open Composer 旨在使新手和经验丰富的用户都更容易使用 HPC 资源。 Open Composer 建立在 Open OnDemand[3]（一种广泛采用的 HPC 环境 Web 门户框架）之上，可确保跨各种 HPC 集群的可移植性以及与机构基础设施（包括身份验证机制）的无缝集成。

papers.title: OpenSHMEM MLIR: A Dialect for Compile-Time Optimization of One-Sided Communications.
papers.abstract: Communication increasingly limits performance in high-performance computing (HPC), yet mainstream compilers focus on computation because communication intent is lost early in compilation. OpenSHMEM offers a one-sided Partitioned Global Address Space (PGAS) model with symmetric memory and explicit synchronization, but lowering to opaque runtime calls hides these semantics from analysis.
papers.abstract_zh: 通信日益限制高性能计算 (HPC) 的性能，但主流编译器专注于计算，因为通信意图在编译早期就丢失了。 OpenSHMEM 提供了一种单侧分区全局地址空间 (PGAS) 模型，具有对称内存和显式同步，但降低到不透明运行时调用会隐藏这些语义，使其无法分析。

papers.title: Optimizing Data Acquisitions in Multi-Robot Systems.
papers.abstract: We present ROSfs, a novel user-level file system designed to address critical data query inefficiencies in multi-robot systems (MRS). ROSfs introduces an innovative file organization model where robot data is structured as labeled sub-files, coupled with a time-indexed architecture that enables efficient querying of actively modified data. This design enables real-time cross-robot data acquisition and collaboration capabilities previously unattainable in MRS deployments. Our implementation integrates seamlessly with the Robot Operating System (ROS) and has been extensively evaluated using both physical UAV/UGV platforms and data servers. Experimental results demonstrate that ROSfs achieves a 7x reduction in online data query latency under wireless network conditions compared to conventional ROS storage methods, while simultaneously improving data freshness (Age of Information) by up to 271x. These advancements position ROSfs as a transformative solution for high-performance robotic data management in distributed systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了 ROSfs，这是一种新颖的用户级文件系统，旨在解决多机器人系统 (MRS) 中关键数据查询效率低下的问题。 ROSfs 引入了一种创新的文件组织模型，其中机器人数据被构造为带标签的子文件，再加上时间索引架构，可以有效查询主动修改的数据。这种设计实现了实时跨机器人数据采集和协作功能，这是以前在 MRS 部署中无法实现的。我们的实施与机器人操作系统 (ROS) 无缝集成，并已使用物理 UAV/UGV 平台和数据服务器进行了广泛评估。实验结果表明，与传统ROS存储方法相比，ROSfs在无线网络条件下实现了在线数据查询延迟降低7倍，同时将数据新鲜度（信息年龄）提高高达271倍。这些进步使 ROSfs 成为分布式系统中高性能机器人数据管理的变革性解决方案。

papers.title: Optimizing Microgrid Composition for Sustainable Data Centers.
papers.abstract: As computing energy demand continues to grow and electrical grid infrastructure struggles to keep pace, an increasing number of data centers are being planned with colocated microgrids that integrate on-site renewable generation and energy storage. However, while existing research has examined the tradeoffs between operational and embodied carbon emissions in the context of renewable energy certificates, there is a lack of tools to assess how the sizing and composition of microgrid components affects long-term sustainability and power reliability.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着计算能源需求持续增长，而电网基础设施难以跟上步伐，越来越多的数据中心正在规划采用托管微电网，整合现场可再生能源发电和能源存储。然而，虽然现有研究已经在可再生能源证书的背景下审查了运行碳排放和隐含碳排放之间的权衡，但缺乏工具来评估微电网组件的规模和组成如何影响长期可持续性和电力可靠性。

papers.title: Optimizing Network Resilience Using Domain-Specific Hardware Accelerator for Dynamic Programming.
papers.abstract: Dynamic programming accelerators (DPAs) are devices designed with an instruction set optimized for dynamic programming (DP) operations. DP is fundamental to solving complex networking problems, particularly those involving fault tolerance and routing under dynamic conditions. This paper explores the use of DPA to accelerate network resilience by implementing an optimal routing algorithm that efficiently identifies alternative paths in response to link failures. The system’s performance is evaluated by comparing DPA implementation against conventional GPU-based and CPU-based solutions. Results show that DPA provides significant performance improvements, enabling faster recovery and improved robustness in dynamic network environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 动态编程加速器 (DPA) 是采用针对动态编程 (DP) 操作而优化的指令集而设计的设备。 DP 是解决复杂网络问题的基础，特别是那些涉及动态条件下的容错和路由的问题。本文探讨了使用 DPA 通过实施最佳路由算法来加速网络恢复能力，该算法可有效识别替代路径以响应链路故障。通过将 DPA 实施与传统的基于 GPU 和 CPU 的解决方案进行比较来评估系统的性能。结果表明，DPA 提供了显着的性能改进，可以在动态网络环境中实现更快的恢复并提高稳健性。

papers.title: Optimizing Quantum Circuit Mapping to Reduce Inter-Module Communications in Distributed Architectures.
papers.abstract: Modular quantum architectures have emerged as a promising solution for scalable quantum computing systems. Executing circuits in such distributed systems necessitates non-local operations between modules, incurring significant communication overhead. In this work, an optimized quantum circuit mapping technique called DQTetris is proposed to reduce inter-module communications. DQTetris employs a hierarchical framework that first seeks a global communication-free qubit mapping assignment under module capacity constraints. If infeasible, it searches for subcircuits with local communication-free qubit assignments via layer-wise gate pruning. Executing adjacent subcircuits with different qubit assignments incurs inter-module data teleportation. DQTetris minimizes these overheads by reducing qubit reassignment events through optimal circuit segmentation, qubit assignment selection, and adaptive gate teleportation. Experiments show that compared with existing methods, DQTetris can achieve average reductions in communication costs ranging from 28% to 75% across various benchmarks.
papers.abstract_zh: 模块化量子架构已成为可扩展量子计算系统的一种有前景的解决方案。在此类分布式系统中执行电路需要模块之间的非本地操作，从而产生大量的通信开销。在这项工作中，提出了一种称为 DQTetris 的优化量子电路映射技术来减少模块间通信。 DQTetris 采用分层框架，首先在模块容量限制下寻求全局无通信的量子位映射分配。如果不可行，它会通过逐层门修剪来搜索具有本地无通信量子位分配的子电路。执行具有不同量子位分配的相邻子电路会导致模块间数据隐形传态。 DQTetris 通过优化电路分段、量子位分配选择和自适应门隐形传态减少量子位重新分配事件，从而最大限度地减少这些开销。实验表明，与现有方法相比，DQTetris 在各种基准测试中可以实现通信成本平均降低 28% 至 75%。

papers.title: ORBIT-2: Scaling Exascale Vision Foundation Models for Weather and Climate Downscaling.
papers.abstract: Sparse observations and coarse-resolution climate models limit effective regional decision-making, underscoring the need for robust downscaling. However, existing AI methods struggle with generalization across variables and geographies and are constrained by the quadratic complexity of Vision Transformer (ViT) self-attention. We introduce ORBIT-2, a scalable foundation model for global, hyper-resolution climate downscaling. ORBIT-2 incorporates two key innovations: (1) Residual Slim ViT (Reslim), a lightweight architecture with residual learning and Bayesian regularization for efficient, robust prediction; and (2) TILES, a tile-wise sequence scaling algorithm that reduces self-attention complexity from quadratic to linear, enabling long-sequence processing and massive parallelism. ORBIT-2 scales to 10 billion parameters across 65,536 GPUs, achieving up to 4.1 ExaFLOPS sustained throughput and 74–98% strong scaling efficiency. It supports downscaling to 0.9 km global resolution and processes sequences up to 4.2 billion tokens. On 7 km resolution benchmarks, ORBIT-2 achieves high accuracy with R2 scores in range of 0.98–0.99 against observation data.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏的观测和粗分辨率的气候模型限制了有效的区域决策，凸显了强有力的缩小尺度的必要性。然而，现有的人工智能方法难以实现跨变量和地域的泛化，并且受到视觉变换器（ViT）自注意力的二次复杂性的限制。我们推出了 ORBIT-2，这是一种用于全球超分辨率气候降尺度的可扩展基础模型。 ORBIT-2 融合了两项关键创新：(1) Residual Slim ViT (Reslim)，一种轻量级架构，具有残差学习和贝叶斯正则化功能，可实现高效、鲁棒的预测； (2) TILES，一种分块序列缩放算法，可将自注意力复杂度从二次降低到线性，从而实现长序列处理和大规模并行性。 ORBIT-2 可在 65,536 个 GPU 上扩展到 100 亿个参数，实现高达 4.1 ExaFLOPS 的持续吞吐量和 74-98% 的强大扩展效率。它支持缩小至 0.9 公里的全局分辨率，并处理多达 42 亿个令牌的序列。在 7 公里分辨率基准上，ORBIT-2 实现了高精度，相对于观测数据，R2 分数在 0.98-0.99 范围内。

papers.title: Orchestrating Quantum-HPC Workflows with Distributed Quantum Circuit Cutting.
papers.abstract: Most quantum computers today are constrained by hardware limitations, particularly the number of available qubits, causing significant challenges for executing large-scale quantum algorithms. Circuit cutting has emerged as a key technique to overcome these limitations by decomposing large quantum circuits into smaller subcircuits that can be executed independently and later reconstructed. In this work, we introduce Qdislib, a distributed and flexible library for quantum circuit cutting, designed to seamlessly integrate with hybrid quantum-classical high-performance computing (HPC) systems. Qdislib employs a graph-based representation of quantum circuits to enable efficient partitioning, manipulation and execution, supporting both wire cutting and gate cutting techniques. The library is compatible with multiple quantum computing libraries, including Qiskit and Qibo, and leverages distributed computing frameworks to execute subcircuits across CPUs, GPUs, and quantum processing units (QPUs) in a fully parallelized manner. We present a proof of concept demonstrating how Qdislib enables the distributed execution of quantum circuits across heterogeneous computing resources, showcasing its potential for scalable quantum-classical workflows.
papers.abstract_zh: 当今大多数量子计算机都受到硬件限制，特别是可用量子位数量的限制，这给执行大规模量子算法带来了重大挑战。电路切割已成为克服这些限制的关键技术，它可以将大型量子电路分解为可以独立执行并随后重建的较小子电路。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 Qdislib，一个用于量子电路切割的分布式灵活库，旨在与混合量子经典高性能计算（HPC）系统无缝集成。 Qdislib 采用基于图形的量子电路表示来实现高效的分区、操作和执行，支持线切割和门切割技术。该库与多个量子计算库兼容，包括 Qiskit 和 Qibo，并利用分布式计算框架以完全并行的方式跨 CPU、GPU 和量子处理单元 (QPU) 执行子电路。我们提出了一个概念证明，展示了 Qdislib 如何实现跨异构计算资源的量子电路的分布式执行，展示了其在可扩展的量子经典工作流程方面的潜力。

papers.title: Overcoming Dynamic I/O Boundaries: a Double-Sided Streaming Methodology with dispel4py and CAPIO.
papers.abstract: This work introduces a novel double-sided streaming methodology that combines control-plane and data-plane streaming. Our goal is to implement the long-advocated separation of concerns in workflow orchestration without introducing artificial boundaries in their execution. Our approach is exemplified by the integration of control-plane streaming provided by dispel4py and the transparent data-plane streaming provided by CAPIO. Our integration eliminates file synchronization barriers without requiring modifications to existing workflow logic. To support this, we extend CAPIO with a new commit rule that allows streaming over dynamically generated file sets, enabling hybrid workflows that blend in-memory dataflows with file-based communication. We validate our approach using a real-world seismic cross-correlation workflow, achieving performance improvements between 23% and 40%. Unlike previous solutions, our method supports streaming across the entire workflow, including phase boundaries where file I/O would typically enforce strict execution ordering. Therefore, our approach can be straightforwardly extended to other multi-stage streaming applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 这项工作引入了一种新颖的双面流式传输方法，该方法结合了控制平面和数据平面流式传输。我们的目标是在工作流程编排中实现长期倡导的关注点分离，而不会在执行中引入人为边界。我们的方法通过 dispel4py 提供的控制平面流和 CAPIO 提供的透明数据平面流的集成来举例说明。我们的集成消除了文件同步障碍，无需修改现有工作流程逻辑。为了支持这一点，我们使用新的提交规则扩展了 CAPIO，该规则允许流式传输动态生成的文件集，从而实现将内存中数据流与基于文件的通信混合在一起的混合工作流程。我们使用真实世界的地震互相关工作流程验证了我们的方法，实现了 23% 到 40% 的性能提升。与以前的解决方案不同，我们的方法支持跨整个工作流程的流式传输，包括文件 I/O 通常会强制执行严格执行顺序的阶段边界。因此，我们的方法可以直接扩展到其他多阶段流应用程序。

papers.title: Parallel Data Object Creation: Scalable Metadata Management in Parallel I/O Library.
papers.abstract: High-level I/O libraries, such as PnetCDF and HDF5, are commonly used by large-scale scientific applications to perform I/O tasks in parallel. These I/O libraries store the metadata of data objects in files along with their raw data. To ensure metadata consistency during parallel data object creation, they require applications to call the metadata APIs collectively using consistent metadata. Such a requirement can result in an expensive consistency check, as its cost increases with the metadata volume and the number of processes.
