To address this limitation, we propose a new file header format, which uses partitioned metadata blocks to enable independent data object creation and reduce the objects required for consistency check. Our performance evaluation shows that this new design achieves a scalable performance, cutting data object creation times by up to 196 × when running on 4096 MPI processes to create 5,684,800 data objects in parallel.
papers.abstract_zh: 高级 I/O 库（例如 PnetCDF 和 HDF5）通常被大型科学应用程序用来并行执行 I/O 任务。这些 I/O 库将数据对象的元数据及其原始数据存储在文件中。为了确保并行数据对象创建过程中元数据的一致性，它们要求应用程序使用一致的元数据来集体调用元数据API。这样的要求可能会导致昂贵的一致性检查，因为其成本随着元数据量和进程数量的增加而增加。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新的文件头格式，它使用分区元数据块来实现独立的数据对象创建并减少一致性检查所需的对象。我们的性能评估表明，这种新设计实现了可扩展的性能，在 4096 个 MPI 进程上运行以并行创建 5,684,800 个数据对象时，数据对象创建时间最多可减少 196 倍。

papers.title: Parallel Rank-Adaptive Higher Order Orthogonal Iteration.
papers.abstract: Higher Order Orthogonal Iteration (HOOI) is an iterative algorithm that computes a Tucker decomposition of fixed ranks of an input tensor. In this work we modify HOOI to determine ranks adaptively subject to a fixed approximation error, apply optimizations to reduce the cost of each HOOI iteration, and parallelize the method in order to scale to large dense datasets. We show that HOOI is competitive with the Sequentially Truncated Higher Order Singular Value Decomposition (STHOSVD) algorithm, particularly in cases of high compression ratios. Our proposed rank-adaptive HOOI can achieve comparable approximation error to STHOSVD in less time, sometimes achieving a better compression ratio. We demonstrate that our parallelization scales well over thousands of cores and show using three scientific simulation datasets that HOOI outperforms STHOSVD in high-compression regimes. For example, for a 3D fluid-flow simulation dataset, HOOI computed a Tucker decomposition 82x faster and achieved a compression ratio 50% better than STHOSVD’s.
papers.abstract_zh: 高阶正交迭代 (HOOI) 是一种迭代算法，用于计算输入张量固定秩的塔克分解。在这项工作中，我们修改 HOOI 来自适应地确定受固定近似误差影响的排名，应用优化来降低每次 HOOI 迭代的成本，并对方法进行并行化，以便扩展到大型密集数据集。我们表明，HOOI 与顺序截断高阶奇异值分解 (STHOSVD) 算法相比具有竞争力，特别是在高压缩比的情况下。我们提出的等级自适应 HOOI 可以在更短的时间内实现与 STHOSVD 相当的近似误差，有时还可以实现更好的压缩比。我们证明了我们的并行化可以扩展到数千个核心，并使用三个科学模拟数据集证明 HOOI 在高压缩状态下的性能优于 STHOSVD。例如，对于 3D 流体流动模拟数据集，HOOI 计算 Tucker 分解的速度比 STHOSVD 快 82 倍，压缩比提高 50%。

papers.title: Peachy Parallel Assignments (EduHPC 2025).
papers.abstract: Peachy Parallel Assignments are high-quality assignments that require students to practice concepts in parallel and distributed computing. They are selected competitively and published in the Edu* workshops to provide instructors with inspiration and easy-to-adopt assignments. The assignments must have been successfully tested with real students, easy to adopt by other instructors in a variety of contexts, and “cool and inspirational” for students completing them.
papers.abstract_zh: Peachy 并行作业是高质量的作业，要求学生练习并行和分布式计算中的概念。它们经过竞争选出并在 Edu* 研讨会上发布，为教师提供灵感和易于采用的作业。这些作业必须经过真实学生的成功测试，易于其他教师在各种情况下采用，并且对于完成作业的学生来说“很酷且鼓舞人心”。

papers.title: PEAK: Cost-Adaptive Profiling in a Heartbeat.
papers.abstract: Instrumentation-based profiling is essential for uncovering fine-grained optimization opportunities in High-Performance Computing (HPC) and cloud applications, yet static instrumentation methods often impose fixed profiling overheads that cannot adapt to the dynamic workloads from applications at runtime. We further develop PEAK, a Dynamic Binary Instrumentation (DBI)-based profiler with two complementary modes for overhead control: a static mode, which enforces an upper limit on the absolute instrumentation overhead, and a dynamic mode based on the heartbeat mechanism, which controls the relative overhead in real time to maintain a user-defined ratio. Evaluations of workloads ranging from compute-intensive kernels to lightweight functions show that the heartbeat mechanism effectively bounds overhead while improving profile accuracy compared to static methods, delivering predictable and adaptive profiling performance for long-running, dynamic workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于检测的分析对于发现高性能计算 (HPC) 和云应用程序中的细粒度优化机会至关重要，但静态检测方法通常会带来固定的分析开销，无法适应运行时应用程序的动态工作负载。我们进一步开发了 PEAK，一种基于动态二进制检测 (DBI) 的分析器，具有两种互补的开销控制模式：静态模式，强制绝对检测开销的上限；以及基于心跳机制的动态模式，实时控制相对开销以维持用户定义的比率。对从计算密集型内核到轻量级函数的工作负载的评估表明，与静态方法相比，心跳机制有效地限制了开销，同时提高了分析准确性，为长期运行的动态工作负载提供可预测和自适应的分析性能。

papers.title: PerfAnalyzer: Revealing Performance Trends using Version Oriented Visual Analysis of Scientific Software.
papers.abstract: Understanding the behavior of scientific software is essential in maintaining the integrity and transparency of computational research. Tracking the changes in computational parameters (input-output parameters, configuration parameters for hardware and software) across different versions of software executions helps in understanding by providing a context to correlate the outcomes with meaningful changes and to interpret the results reliably. Diverse computing environments and software platforms add complexity in tracking the evolution of computational parameters across multiple runs. We present PerfAnalyzer, an interactive dashboard to simplify the collection, management, and visual analysis of computational parameters across Git commits. We demonstrate the usefulness of the dashboard in identifying performance issues through a case study on collecting and analyzing computational parameters of the CloverLeaf mini-application. The results of the case study show PerfAnalyzer’s ability to highlight performance changes across versions and identify parameters related to the changes that are difficult to locate using isolated measurements.
papers.abstract_zh: 了解科学软件的行为对于维护计算研究的完整性和透明度至关重要。跟踪不同版本的软件执行的计算参数（输入输出参数、硬件和软件的配置参数）的变化有助于通过提供上下文将结果与有意义的变化相关联并可靠地解释结果，从而有助于理解。多样化的计算环境和软件平台增加了跟踪多次运行中计算参数演变的复杂性。我们推出了 PerfAnalyzer，这是一个交互式仪表板，用于简化 Git 提交中计算参数的收集、管理和可视化分析。我们通过收集和分析 CloverLeaf 迷你应用程序的计算参数的案例研究，展示了仪表板在识别性能问题方面的有用性。案例研究的结果表明，PerfAnalyzer 能够突出显示跨版本的性能变化，并识别与使用孤立测量难以定位的变化相关的参数。

papers.title: PerfDojo: Automated ML Library Generation for Heterogeneous Architectures.
papers.abstract: The increasing complexity of machine learning models and the proliferation of diverse hardware architectures (CPUs, GPUs, accelerators) make achieving optimal performance a significant challenge. Heterogeneity in instruction sets, specialized kernel requirements for different data types and model features (e.g., sparsity, quantization), and architecture-specific optimizations complicate performance tuning. Manual optimization is resource-intensive, while existing automatic approaches often rely on complex hardware-specific heuristics and uninterpretable intermediate representations, hindering performance portability. We introduce PerfLLM, a novel automatic optimization methodology leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) and Reinforcement Learning (RL). Central to this is PerfDojo, an environment framing optimization as an RL game using a human-readable, mathematically-inspired code representation that guarantees semantic validity through transformations. This allows effective optimization without prior hardware knowledge, facilitating both human analysis and RL agent training. We demonstrate PerfLLM’s ability to achieve significant performance gains across diverse CPU (x86, Arm, RISC-V) and GPU architectures.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习模型的日益复杂性和多样化硬件架构（CPU、GPU、加速器）的激增使得实现最佳性能成为一项重大挑战。指令集的异构性、不同数据类型和模型特征（例如稀疏性、量化）的专门内核要求以及特定于体系结构的优化使性能调整变得复杂。手动优化是资源密集型的，而现有的自动方法通常依赖于复杂的特定于硬件的启发式方法和无法解释的中间表示，从而阻碍了性能的可移植性。我们介绍 PerfLLM，这是一种利用大型语言模型 (LLM) 和强化学习 (RL) 的新型自动优化方法。其中的核心是 PerfDojo，这是一种作为 RL 游戏的环境框架优化，使用人类可读的、受数学启发的代码表示形式，通过转换保证语义有效性。这样无需事先了解硬件知识即可进行有效优化，从而促进人工分析和 RL 代理训练。我们展示了 PerfLLM 在不同的 CPU（x86、Arm、RISC-V）和 GPU 架构中实现显着性能提升的能力。

papers.title: Performance portable batched linear algebra kernels for transport sweeps using Kokkos.
papers.abstract: This paper describes the development of performance portable batched linear algebra kernels for SN-DG neutron transport sweeps using Kokkos. We establish a new sweep algorithm for GPUs that relies on batched linear algebra kernels. We implement an optimized batched gesv solver for small linear systems that builds upon state-of-the-art algorithms. Our implementation achieves high performance by minimizing global memory traffic and maximizing the amount of computations done at compile-time. We assess the performance of the batched gesv kernel on NVIDIA and AMD GPUs. We show that our custom implementation outperforms state-of-the-art linear algebra libraries on these architectures. The performance of the new GPU sweep implementation is assessed on the H100 and MI300A GPUs. We demonstrate that it is able to achieve high performance on both architectures, and is competitive with an optimized multithreaded CPU implementation on a 128-core AMD Genoa CPU node.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了使用 Kokkos 开发用于 SN-DG 中子传输扫描的高性能便携式批量线性代数内核。我们为 GPU 建立了一种新的扫描算法，该算法依赖于批量线性代数内核。我们为基于最先进算法的小型线性系统实现了优化的批量 gesv 求解器。我们的实现通过最小化全局内存流量和最大化编译时完成的计算量来实现高性能。我们评估了批处理 gesv 内核在 NVIDIA 和 AMD GPU 上的性能。我们表明，我们的自定义实现在这些架构上优于最先进的线性代数库。新 GPU 扫描实施的性能在 H100 和 MI300A GPU 上进行评估。 We demonstrate that it is able to achieve high performance on both architectures, and is competitive with an optimized multithreaded CPU implementation on a 128-core AMD Genoa CPU node.

papers.title: Performance-Portable Symbolic Factorization through Common Graph Operations.
papers.abstract: In lower-upper (LU) factorization of a sparse matrix in the form of A = LU, symbolic factorization is a pre-processing stage usually performed to discover the sparsity structure of the factors. A is usually not equal to L + U due to the fill-ins (the nonzeros that do not appear in A but element of L or U) introduced in the factorization. The symbolic factorization can be performed using only the pattern of A and the existing algorithms for that purpose usually utilize graphs by relying on the duality of graphs and matrices. In this work, we assess the viability of utilizing GraphBLAS for symbolic factorization. GraphBLAS defines a standard way to express operations on graphs in the language of linear algebra. We express edge-based and path-based symbolic factorization of the coefficient matrix using common graph operations and investigate utilization of masks and elimination trees for optimization. Our goal is to obtain a performant symbolic factorization, which can then be used on any hardware in a portable manner for which the GraphBLAS standard is realized. We demonstrate our approach on various non-symmetric sparse matrices by running symbolic factorization on multi-core and many-core architectures efficiently.
papers.abstract_zh: 在 A = LU 形式的稀疏矩阵的下上 (LU) 分解中，符号分解是一个预处理阶段，通常用于发现因子的稀疏结构。由于分解中引入了填充（A 中未出现的非零值，而是 L 或 U 的元素），A 通常不等于 L + U。符号分解可以仅使用 A 的模式来执行，并且用于此目的的现有算法通常通过依赖图和矩阵的对偶性来利用图。在这项工作中，我们评估了利用 GraphBLAS 进行符号分解的可行性。 GraphBLAS 定义了一种用线性代数语言表达图运算的标准方法。我们使用常见的图运算来表达系数矩阵的基于边缘和基于路径的符号分解，并研究如何利用掩码和消除树进行优化。我们的目标是获得高性能的符号分解，然后可以以可移植的方式在实现 GraphBLAS 标准的任何硬件上使用。我们通过在多核和众核架构上高效运行符号分解来演示我们在各种非对称稀疏矩阵上的方法。

papers.title: PGT-I: Scaling Spatiotemporal GNNs with Memory-Efficient Distributed Training.
papers.abstract: Spatiotemporal graph neural networks (ST-GNNs) are powerful tools for modeling spatial and temporal data dependencies. However, their applications have been limited primarily to small-scale datasets because of memory constraints. While distributed training offers a solution, current frameworks lack support for spatiotemporal models and overlook the properties of spatiotemporal data. Informed by a scaling study on a large-scale workload, we present PyTorch Geometric Temporal Index (PGT-I), an extension to PyTorch Geometric Temporal that integrates distributed data parallel training and two novel strategies: index-batching and distributed-index-batching. Our index techniques exploit spatiotemporal structure to construct snapshots dynamically at runtime, significantly reducing memory overhead, while distributed-index-batching extends this approach by enabling scalable processing across multiple GPUs. Our techniques enable the first-ever training of an ST-GNN on the entire PeMS dataset without graph partitioning, reducing peak memory usage by up to 89% and achieving up to a 11.78x speedup over standard DDP with 128 GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 时空图神经网络（ST-GNN）是用于建模空间和时间数据依赖性的强大工具。然而，由于内存限制，它们的应用主要限于小规模数据集。虽然分布式训练提供了一种解决方案，但当前的框架缺乏对时空模型的支持，并且忽视了时空数据的属性。根据大规模工作负载的扩展研究，我们提出了 PyTorch Geometric Temporal Index (PGT-I)，它是 PyTorch Geometric Temporal 的扩展，集成了分布式数据并行训练和两种新颖的策略：索引批处理和分布式索引批处理。我们的索引技术利用时空结构在运行时动态构建快照，显着减少内存开销，而分布式索引批处理通过支持跨多个 GPU 的可扩展处理扩展了这种方法。我们的技术首次在整个 PeMS 数据集上训练 ST-GNN，无需进行图形分区，从而将峰值内存使用量减少高达 89%，并比使用 128 个 GPU 的标准 DDP 实现高达 11.78 倍的加速。

papers.title: Phoenix: A Refactored I/O Stack for GPU Direct Storage without Phony Buffers.
papers.abstract: GPU Direct Storage (GDS) plays a vital role in GPU-based training and inference systems, leveraging Peer-to-Peer Direct Memory Access (P2P-DMA) to establish a direct data transfer path between the GPU and the storage device. The direct I/O path reduces GPU storage access latency and CPU overhead, thus improving the efficiency of data transfer. Currently, however, GDS employs a phony buffer in the host memory to interact with the Linux kernel, which results in suboptimal I/O performance, extra resource consumption, and high deployment complexity.
papers.abstract_zh: GPU 直接存储 (GDS) 在基于 GPU 的训练和推理系统中发挥着至关重要的作用，它利用点对点直接内存访问 (P2P-DMA) 在 GPU 和存储设备之间建立直接数据传输路径。直接I/O路径减少了GPU存储访问延迟和CPU开销，从而提高了数据传输效率。然而目前，GDS 在主机内存中使用虚假缓冲区与 Linux 内核交互，这会导致 I/O 性能欠佳、额外的资源消耗以及较高的部署复杂度。

papers.title: Physical System Study on Balancing Interactive and Batch Job Performance through Oversubscribing Scheduling.
papers.abstract: This paper evaluates oversubscribing in High-Performance Computing (HPC) systems as a solution to balance interactive and batch job performance. Using real workload traces and physical hardware experiments, we demonstrate that oversubscribing can reduce queue waiting times while maintaining overall system performance. Our results show this approach (1) decreases waiting times for interactive jobs, (2) has minimal impact on overall system throughput, and (3) effectively manages individual job turnaround times. Unlike traditional multiple queue approaches, oversubscribing provides these benefits with simpler configuration requirements. Additionally, through quantitative memory usage analysis, we provide insights into oversubscribing applicability for production capacity planning. Our research contributes empirical evidence of its effectiveness in real HPC environments, supported by comprehensive experimental data and practical implementation insights.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文评估了高性能计算 (HPC) 系统中的超额订阅作为平衡交互式和批处理作业性能的解决方案。使用真实的工作负载跟踪和物理硬件实验，我们证明超额订阅可以减少队列等待时间，同时保持整体系统性能。我们的结果表明，这种方法 (1) 减少了交互式作业的等待时间，(2) 对整体系统吞吐量的影响最小，(3) 有效管理单个作业的周转时间。与传统的多队列方法不同，超额订阅可以通过更简单的配置要求提供这些好处。此外，通过定量内存使用分析，我们可以深入了解生产能力规划的超额订阅适用性。我们的研究提供了其在真实 HPC 环境中有效性的经验证据，并得到全面的实验数据和实际实施见解的支持。

papers.title: Plexus: Taming Billion-edge Graphs with 3D Parallel Full-graph GNN Training.
papers.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) leverage the connectivity and structure of real-world graphs to learn intricate properties and relationships between nodes. Many real-world graphs exceed the memory capacity of a GPU due to their sheer size, and training GNNs on such graphs requires techniques such as mini-batch sampling to scale. The alternative approach of distributed full-graph training suffers from high communication overheads and load imbalance due to the irregular structure of graphs. We propose a three-dimensional (3D) parallel approach for full-graph training that tackles these issues and scales to billion-edge graphs. In addition, we introduce optimizations such as a double permutation scheme for load balancing, and a performance model to predict the optimal 3D configuration of our parallel implementation – Plexus. We evaluate Plexus on six different graph datasets and show scaling results on up to 2048 GPUs of Perlmutter, and 1024 GPUs of Frontier. Plexus achieves unprecedented speedups of 2.3 − 12.5 × over prior state of the art, and a reduction in time-to-solution by 5.2 − 8.7 × on Perlmutter and 7.0 − 54.2 × on Frontier.
papers.abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 利用现实世界图的连接性和结构来学习节点之间复杂的属性和关系。许多现实世界的图由于其庞大的尺寸而超出了 GPU 的内存容量，并且在此类图上训练 GNN 需要诸如小批量采样之类的技术来扩展。分布式全图训练的替代方法由于图的不规则结构而面临高通信开销和负载不平衡的问题。我们提出了一种用于全图训练的三维（3D）并行方法，可以解决这些问题并扩展到十亿边图。此外，我们还引入了优化，例如用于负载平衡的双排列方案，以及用于预测并行实现 Plexus 的最佳 3D 配置的性能模型。我们在六个不同的图形数据集上评估 Plexus，并在 Perlmutter 的多达 2048 个 GPU 和 Frontier 的 1024 个 GPU 上显示缩放结果。与现有技术相比，Plexus 实现了前所未有的加速 2.3 – 12.5 倍，并且在 Perlmutter 上将解决时间缩短了 5.2 – 8.7 倍，在 Frontier 上缩短了 7.0 – 54.2 倍。

papers.title: Porting a Fortran plasma simulation to Exascale on AMD GPUs using both OpenMP and Kokkos.
papers.abstract: This paper presents the 2-step work undertaken to port Gysela, a petascale Fortran simulation code for turbulence in tokamak plasmas, to GPUs. The initial porting process using OpenMP offloading allowed for good performance in most of the code with speedups ranging from × 1 to × 12.5, with the exception of the collision operator, which became a major bottleneck. This performance critical operator was then rewritten in C++ using Kokkos. The new version is known as KoLiOp, and is one of the code modules with the largest speedups relative to the CPU baseline. We explain our strategy in both phases of development and provide an in-depth analysis of how we leveraged each framework for overall performance. The techniques detailed are applicable to other codes seeking to use a portability layer. Finally, we present a comparative benchmark run on the CPU (AMD Genoa), GPU (MI250X) and APU (MI300A) partitions of the Adastra machine.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了将 Gysela（用于托卡马克等离子体湍流的千万亿级 Fortran 模拟代码）移植到 GPU 的两步工作。使用 OpenMP 卸载的初始移植过程在大多数代码中都实现了良好的性能，加速范围从 × 1 到 × 12.5，但碰撞运算符除外，它成为了主要瓶颈。然后使用 Kokkos 用 C++ 重写了这个性能关键运算符。新版本被称为 KoLiOp，是相对于 CPU 基准具有最大加速的代码模块之一。我们解释了我们在两个开发阶段的策略，并深入分析了我们如何利用每个框架来实现整体性能。详细介绍的技术适用于寻求使用可移植层的其他代码。最后，我们展示了在 Adastra 机器的 CPU (AMD Genoa)、GPU (MI250X) 和 APU (MI300A) 分区上运行的比较基准测试。

papers.title: Post-Variational Quantum Neural Networks on a Hybrid HPC-QC System.
papers.abstract: We implement a post-variational quantum neural network on a real HPC-QC system and show the feasibility of fully training this class of algorithms on current Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) devices, which are limited by noise, low number of qubits, and scarcity. Post-variational methods are hybrid classical-quantum Machine Learning algorithms that remove the need for quantum circuits evaluations during training, thus making them more suited to the availability constraints of physical quantum devices. We investigate the scalability of the algorithm to a higher number of qubits, larger datasets, and more elaborate models, giving insight for more efficient implementation. Experiments for an image classification task on a cutting-edge HPC-QC system show that post-variational quantum neural networks are fully trainable in reasonable times on a superconducting device. The models trained also show performance at least comparable to a variational approach, with one configuration showing a significant improvement in classification accuracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们在真实的 HPC-QC 系统上实现了后变分量子神经网络，并展示了在当前的噪声中尺度量子 (NISQ) 设备上充分训练此类算法的可行性，这些设备受到噪声、量子位数量少和稀缺性的限制。后变分方法是混合经典量子机器学习算法，无需在训练期间进行量子电路评估，从而使它们更适合物理量子设备的可用性限制。我们研究了该算法对更多数量的量子位、更大的数据集和更复杂的模型的可扩展性，为更有效的实施提供了见解。在尖端 HPC-QC 系统上进行的图像分类任务实验表明，后变分量子神经网络可以在合理的时间内在超导设备上进行完全训练。训练的模型还表现出至少与变分方法相当的性能，其中一种配置显示分类准确性显着提高。

papers.title: Preserving CUDA Syntax for SYCL Portability: A Thin C++ Abstraction without Kernel Migration.
papers.abstract: Preparing large-scale scientific applications for diverse GPU architectures requires strategies that balance performance, portability, and long-term maintainability. We introduce a unified kernel abstraction and evaluate it using CRK-HACC, a production N-body cosmology code, enabling single-source compilation through both CUDA and SYCL toolchains. Our approach introduces a thin C++ layer that preserves the original CUDA kernel syntax and launch style while providing SYCL compatibility through a mechanical “functorization” process. This method avoids the complexity of automated source translation, retains architecture-specific optimizations, and reduces maintenance effort by eliminating code duplication. We evaluate the implementation on two DOE leadership systems—Polaris (NVIDIA GPUs) and Aurora (Intel GPUs)—comparing kernel-level execution times across backends and architectures. Results show competitive performance for SYCL relative to native CUDA while preserving code clarity and portability. This case study demonstrates a practical path toward sustaining performance in complex, physics-rich codes as HPC hardware continues to evolve.
papers.abstract_zh: 为不同的 GPU 架构准备大规模科学应用程序需要平衡性能、可移植性和长期可维护性的策略。我们引入了统一的内核抽象，并使用 CRK-HACC（一种生产 N 体宇宙学代码）对其进行评估，从而通过 CUDA 和 SYCL 工具链实现单源编译。我们的方法引入了一个薄的 C++ 层，该层保留了原始 CUDA 内核语法和启动样式，同时通过机械“函子化”过程提供 SYCL 兼容性。此方法避免了自动源转换的复杂性，保留了特定于体系结构的优化，并通过消除代码重复来减少维护工作。我们评估了两个 DOE 领导系统（Polaris（NVIDIA GPU）和 Aurora（Intel GPU））上的实施情况，比较了后端和架构之间的内核级执行时间。结果显示 SYCL 相对于本机 CUDA 具有竞争性能，同时保持代码清晰度和可移植性。本案例研究展示了随着 HPC 硬件不断发展，在复杂、物理丰富的代码中维持性能的实用途径。

papers.title: Pretraining LLMs at Scale: Tuning Strategies and Performance Portability.
papers.abstract: Training large language models (LLMs) at scale presents challenges that demand careful co-design across software, hardware, and parallelization strategies. In this work, we introduce a communication-aware tuning methodology for optimizing LLM pretraining, and adapt the performance portability metric to evaluate LLM-training efficiency across our systems. Our methodology, validated through LLM pretraining workloads at a leading global technology enterprise, delivered up to 1.6x speedup over default configurations. We further provide six key insights that challenge prevailing assumptions in LLM training performance, including the trade-offs between ZeRO stages, the default DeepSpeed communication collectives, and the critical role of batch size choices. Our findings highlight the need for platform-specific tuning and advocate for a shift toward end-to-end co-design to unlock performance efficiency in LLM training.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模训练大型语言模型 (LLM) 面临着挑战，需要跨软件、硬件和并行化策略进行仔细的协同设计。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种用于优化 LLM 预训练的通信感知调整方法，并调整性能可移植性指标来评估我们系统中的 LLM 训练效率。我们的方法通过一家全球领先技术企业的 LLM 预训练工作负载进行了验证，与默认配置相比，速度提高了 1.6 倍。我们进一步提供了六个关键见解，挑战了 LLM 训练性能中的普遍假设，包括 ZeRO 阶段之间的权衡、默认的 DeepSpeed 通信集合以及批量大小选择的关键作用。我们的研究结果强调了针对特定平台进行调整的必要性，并提倡转向端到端协同设计，以释放法学硕士培训的性能效率。

papers.title: Profiling Application-Specific Properties of Irregular Graph Algorithms on GPUs.
papers.abstract: With the availability of sophisticated profiling tools for GPUs such as NVIDIA’s Nsight Compute and Nsight Systems, programmers tend to overlook the level of insight that can be gained from simple profiling techniques. For instance, the basic profiling approach of manually adding counters to source code is able to expose important application-specific behavior that general-purpose profilers cannot capture. Analyzing global or thread-local counts of certain events can help developers better reason about program behaviors that are crucial for detecting performance bottlenecks, validating key assumptions, and guiding effective optimizations. In this paper, we demonstrate on the example of 5 high-performance GPU graph-analytics codes how we used this profiling approach to uncover interesting application behaviors and to develop performance optimizations based on some of them.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着用于 GPU 的复杂分析工具（例如 NVIDIA 的 Nsight Compute 和 Nsight Systems）的出现，程序员往往会忽视从简单的分析技术中可以获得的洞察力。例如，手动向源代码添加计数器的基本分析方法能够公开通用分析器无法捕获的重要的特定于应用程序的行为。分析某些事件的全局或线程本地计数可以帮助开发人员更好地推理程序行为，这对于检测性能瓶颈、验证关键假设和指导有效优化至关重要。在本文中，我们以 5 个高性能 GPU 图形分析代码为例，演示了如何使用这种分析方法来发现有趣的应用程序行为，并基于其中的一些行为来开发性能优化。

papers.title: Programmer productivity and performance on AMD's AI Engines: Offloading Fortran intrinsics via MLIR a case-study.
papers.abstract: A major challenge the HPC community faces is how to deliver increased performance demanded by scientific programmers, whilst addressing an increased emphasis on sustainable operations. Specialised architectures, such as FPGAs and AMD’s AI Engines (AIEs), have demonstrated significant energy efficiency advantages, however a major challenge is that substantial expertise and investment of time is required to gain best performance from this hardware which is a major blocker.
papers.abstract_zh: HPC 社区面临的一个主要挑战是如何提供科学程序员所需的更高性能，同时解决对可持续运营的日益重视。 FPGA 和 AMD 的人工智能引擎 (AIE) 等专用架构已展现出显着的能效优势，但主要挑战是需要大量的专业知识和时间投入才能从该硬件中获得最佳性能，这是一个主要障碍。

papers.title: QDockBank: A dataset for Ligand Docking on Protein Fragments Predicted on Utility-Level Quantum Computers.
papers.abstract: Protein structure prediction is a core challenge in computational biology, particularly for fragments within ligand-binding regions, where accurate modeling is still difficult. Quantum computing offers a novel first-principles modeling paradigm, but its application is currently limited by hardware constraints, high computational cost, and the lack of a standardized benchmarking dataset. In this work, we present QDockBank—the first large-scale protein fragment structure dataset generated entirely using utility-level quantum computers, specifically designed for protein–ligand docking tasks. QDockBank comprises 55 protein fragments extracted from ligand-binding pockets. The dataset was generated through tens of hours of execution on superconducting quantum processors, making it the first quantum-based protein structure dataset with a total computational cost exceeding one million USD. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that structures predicted by QDockBank outperform those predicted by AlphaFold2 and AlphaFold3 in terms of both RMSD and docking affinity scores. QDockBank serves as a new benchmark for evaluating quantum-based protein structure prediction.
papers.abstract_zh: 蛋白质结构预测是计算生物学的核心挑战，特别是对于配体结合区域内的片段，准确的建模仍然很困难。量子计算提供了一种新颖的第一原理建模范式，但其应用目前受到硬件限制、高计算成本和缺乏标准化基准数据集的限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了 QDockBank——第一个完全使用实用级量子计算机生成的大规模蛋白质片段结构数据集，专门为蛋白质-配体对接任务而设计。 QDockBank 包含从配体结合口袋中提取的 55 个蛋白质片段。该数据集是通过超导量子处理器执行数十小时生成的，使其成为第一个总计算成本超过100万美元的基于量子的蛋白质结构数据集。实验评估表明，QDockBank 预测的结构在 RMSD 和对接亲和力得分方面均优于 AlphaFold2 和 AlphaFold3 预测的结构。 QDockBank 是评估基于量子的蛋白质结构预测的新基准。

papers.title: Qonductor: A Cloud Orchestrator for Quantum Computing.
papers.abstract: We describe Qonductor, a cloud orchestrator for hybrid quantum-classical applications that run on heterogeneous hybrid resources. Qonductor abstracts away the complexity of hybrid programming and resource management by exposing the Qonductor API, a high-level and hardware-agnostic API. The resource estimator strategically balances quantum and classical resources to mitigate resource contention and the effects of hardware noise. The hybrid scheduler automates job scheduling on hybrid resources and balances the tradeoff between users’ objectives of QoS and the cloud operator’s objective of resource efficiency.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们描述了 Qonductor，一个用于在异构混合资源上运行的混合量子经典应用程序的云编排器。 Qonductor 通过公开 Qonductor API（一种与硬件无关的高级 API），抽象化了混合编程和资源管理的复杂性。资源估计器策略性地平衡量子资源和经典资源，以减轻资源争用和硬件噪声的影响。混合调度器自动执行混合资源上的作业调度，并平衡用户的 QoS 目标和云运营商的资源效率目标之间的权衡。

papers.title: Quantifying AWS S3 I/O Performance Boundaries Using the Roofline Model.
papers.abstract: High-performance computing facilities increasingly form hybrid environments that integrate cloud services. To avoid cumbersome network transfers when sharing data, a new class of storage gateways map a subset of facility storage to a cloud counterpart and automatically manage data mirroring. However, the performance characteristics of accessing AWS’s S3 from HPC systems using different methods and patterns remains poorly understood. This paper presents a roofline-based analysis of three S3 integration approaches: NFS-mounted AWS Storage Gateway, data migration through Storage Gateway, and direct S3 API transfers. We extend I/O roofline modeling to characterize operational intensity and bandwidth ceilings across varying data sizes and access patterns. Our experimental evaluation demonstrates significant performance differences between access methods, with POSIX I/O on NFS Storage Gateway achieving up to 6.4× higher bandwidth than other approaches for large transfers. The roofline analysis reveals distinct characteristics for each method, enabling informed selection of S3 integration strategies.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算设施越来越多地形成集成云服务的混合环境。为了避免共享数据时繁琐的网络传输，一类新型存储网关将设施存储的子集映射到云对应部分并自动管理数据镜像。然而，人们对使用不同方法和模式从 HPC 系统访问 AWS S3 的性能特征仍然知之甚少。本文对三种 S3 集成方法进行了基于屋顶的分析：安装 NFS 的 AWS Storage Gateway、通过 Storage Gateway 进行数据迁移以及直接 S3 API 传输。我们扩展了 I/O 屋顶线建模，以描述不同数据大小和访问模式下的操作强度和带宽上限。我们的实验评估表明，访问方法之间存在显着的性能差异，NFS 存储网关上的 POSIX I/O 实现的带宽比其他大型传输方法高出 6.4 倍。屋顶线分析揭示了每种方法的独特特征，从而能够明智地选择 S3 集成策略。

papers.title: Rapid Quantum Network Simulation Design with a Path to Scalable Execution.
papers.abstract: As quantum networking grows in importance, its study is of interest to an ever wider community. Several simulation frameworks allow for testing such systems on commodity hardware, but can be difficult to work with and performance-limited due to their predominantly serial nature. The SeQUeNCe simulator addresses the latter issue, though has not been proven to work well across architectures or larger scales. For the former concern, we introduce BISQIT, a block-diagramme-based framework that models in terms of distinct components and the data flows between them. This provides a simple and modular approach to experimental design that allows for rapid iteration with a library of reusable parts. We demonstrate the flexibility of its design for prototyping and show a path for how to migrate designed experiments to SeQUeNCe for production-scale testing. Our results show the simplicity of the BISQIT model and provide new insight into SeQUeNCe’s scalability behaviour using ORNL’s Frontier.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着量子网络的重要性日益增强，它的研究引起了越来越广泛的社区的兴趣。一些模拟框架允许在商用硬件上测试此类系统，但由于其主要是串行性质，因此可能难以使用且性能受到限制。 SeQUeNCe 模拟器解决了后一个问题，但尚未被证明可以在跨架构或更大范围内正常工作。对于前一个问题，我们引入了 BISQIT，这是一个基于框图的框架，它根据不同的组件及其之间的数据流进行建模。这为实验设计提供了一种简单且模块化的方法，允许使用可重用部件库进行快速迭代。我们展示了其原型设计的灵活性，并展示了如何将设计的实验迁移到 SeQUeNCe 以进行生产规模测试的路径。我们的结果展示了 BISQIT 模型的简单性，并为使用 ORNL Frontier 的 SeQUeNCe 的可扩展性行为提供了新的见解。

papers.title: RAPTOR: Practical Numerical Profiling of Scientific Applications.
papers.abstract: The proliferation of low-precision units in modern high-performance architectures increasingly burdens domain scientists. Historically, the choice in HPC was easy: can we get away with 32 bit floating-point operations and lower bandwidth requirements, or is FP64 necessary? Driven by Artificial Intelligence, vendors introduce novel low-precision units for vector and tensor operations, and FP64 capabilities stagnate or are reduced. This forces scientists to re-evaluate their codes, but a trivial search-and-replace approach to go from FP64 to FP16 will not suffice.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代高性能架构中低精度单元的激增日益增加了领域科学家的负担。从历史上看，HPC 的选择很简单：我们可以摆脱 32 位浮点运算和较低的带宽要求，还是需要 FP64？在人工智能的推动下，供应商推出了用于矢量和张量运算的新型低精度单元，FP64 功能停滞或减少。这迫使科学家重新评估他们的代码，但从 FP64 到 FP16 的简单搜索和替换方法是不够的。

papers.title: Real-Time Bayesian Inference at Extreme Scale: A Digital Twin for Tsunami Early Warning Applied to the Cascadia Subduction Zone.
papers.abstract: We present a Bayesian inversion-based digital twin that employs acoustic pressure data from seafloor sensors, along with 3D coupled acoustic–gravity wave equations, to infer earthquake-induced spatiotemporal seafloor motion in real time and forecast tsunami propagation toward coastlines for early warning with quantified uncertainties. Our target is the Cascadia subduction zone, with one billion parameters. Computing the posterior mean alone would require 50 years on a 512 GPU machine. Instead, exploiting the shift invariance of the parameter-to-observable map and devising novel parallel algorithms, we induce a fast offline–online decomposition. The offline component requires just one adjoint wave propagation per sensor; using MFEM, we scale this part of the computation to the full El Capitan system (43,520 GPUs) with 92% weak parallel efficiency. Moreover, given real-time data, the online component exactly solves the Bayesian inverse and forecasting problems in 0.2 seconds on a modest GPU system, a ten-billion-fold speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于贝叶斯反演的数字孪生，它利用海底传感器的声压数据以及 3D 耦合声重力波方程来实时推断地震引起的时空海底运动，并预测海啸向海岸线的传播，以进行具有量化不确定性的早期预警。我们的目标是卡斯卡迪亚俯冲带，有十亿个参数。在 512 个 GPU 的机器上，仅计算后验平均值就需要 50 年。相反，利用参数到可观察映射的平移不变性并设计新颖的并行算法，我们引入了快速的离线-在线分解。离线组件只需要每个传感器进行一次伴随波传播；使用 MFEM，我们将这部分计算扩展到完整的 El Capitan 系统（43,520 个 GPU），弱并行效率为 92%。此外，在给定实时数据的情况下，在线组件可以在普通 GPU 系统上在 0.2 秒内准确解决贝叶斯逆和预测问题，加速了 100 亿倍。

papers.title: Redesigning GROMACS Halo Exchange: Improving Strong Scaling with GPU-initiated NVSHMEM.
papers.abstract: Improving time-to-solution in molecular dynamics simulations often requires strong scaling due to fixed-sized problems. GROMACS is highly latency-sensitive, with peak iteration rates in the sub-millisecond, making scalability on heterogeneous supercomputers challenging. MPI’s CPU-centric nature introduces additional latencies on GPU-resident applications’ critical path, hindering GPU utilization and scalability. To address these limitations, we present an NVSHMEM-based GPU kernel-initiated redesign of the GROMACS domain decomposition halo-exchange algorithm. Highly tuned GPU kernels fuse data packing and communication, leveraging hardware latency-hiding for fine-grained overlap. We employ kernel fusion across overlapped data forwarding communication phases and utilize the asynchronous copy engine over NVLink to optimize latency and bandwidth. Our GPU-resident formulation greatly increases communication-computation overlap, improving GROMACS strong scaling performance across NVLink by up to 1.5x (intra-node) and 2x (multi-node), and up to 1.3x multi-node over NVLink+InfiniBand. This demonstrates the profound benefits of GPU-initiated communication for strong-scaling a broad range of latency-sensitive applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于固定大小的问题，缩短分子动力学模拟的解决时间通常需要强大的缩放。 GROMACS 对延迟高度敏感，峰值迭代速率为亚毫秒级，这使得异构超级计算机的可扩展性面临挑战。 MPI 以 CPU 为中心的特性在 GPU 驻留应用程序的关键路径上引入了额外的延迟，从而阻碍了 GPU 的利用率和可扩展性。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种基于 NVSHMEM 的 GPU 内核发起的 GROMACS 域分解光环交换算法的重新设计。高度调优的 GPU 内核融合了数据打包和通信，利用硬件延迟隐藏实现细粒度重叠。我们在重叠的数据转发通信阶段采用内核融合，并利用 NVLink 上的异步复制引擎来优化延迟和带宽。我们的 GPU 驻留公式极大地增加了通信计算重叠，将 GROMACS 在 NVLink 上的强大扩展性能提高了高达 1.5 倍（节点内）和 2 倍（多节点），并且在 NVLink+InfiniBand 上将多节点提高了高达 1.3 倍。这证明了 GPU 发起的通信对于大力扩展各种延迟敏感应用程序的深远优势。

papers.title: RedSan: A Redundant Memory Instruction Sanitizer for GPU Programs.
papers.abstract: CUDA is the de facto programming model for GPUs, which is widely used in the domains of HPC and AI. To obtain bare-metal performance, vendors and academia develop various profiling tools to guide optimization. However, most existing tools focus on hotspot analysis with limited capabilities in identifying actionable opportunities. To complement existing tools, we present RedSan, a novel profiling tool that leverages binary instrumentation to identify redundant instructions in fully optimized CUDA programs. Guided by RedSan, we are able to optimize programs such as PolybenchGPU, Rodinia, PASTA, DARKNET, and LULESH, yielding up to a 6.27 × speedup and 3.00 × reduction in memory instructions.
papers.abstract_zh: CUDA是GPU事实上的编程模型，广泛应用于HPC和AI领域。为了获得裸机性能，供应商和学术界开发了各种分析工具来指导优化。然而，大多数现有工具侧重于热点分析，在识别可操作机会方面的能力有限。为了补充现有工具，我们推出了 RedSan，这是一种新颖的分析工具，它利用二进制检测来识别完全优化的 CUDA 程序中的冗余指令。在 RedSan 的指导下，我们能够优化 PolybenchGPU、Rodinia、PASTA、DARKNET 和 LULESH 等程序，从而实现高达 6.27 倍的加速和 3.00 倍的内存指令减少。

papers.title: Reduction-Aware Directive-Based Programming via Multi-Dimensional Homomorphisms.
papers.abstract: Directive-based programming models have established themselves as an effective and productive paradigm for exploiting parallel architectures such as GPUs and CPUs. Widely used solutions—such as OpenMP and OpenACC—are popular due to their simplicity and broad applicability to general-purpose codebases. However, these approaches often struggle to deliver consistently high and portable performance, especially for reduction-intensive computations.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于指令的编程模型已成为利用 GPU 和 CPU 等并行架构的有效且高效的范例。广泛使用的解决方案（例如 OpenMP 和 OpenACC）因其简单性和对通用代码库的广泛适用性而广受欢迎。然而，这些方法通常难以提供一致的高性能和可移植性能，特别是对于缩减密集型计算。

papers.title: Reproducible Performance Evaluation of OpenMP and SYCL Workloads under Noise Injection.
papers.abstract: Performance instability caused by unpredictable system noise remains a persistent challenge in high-performance and parallel computing. This work presents a reproducible methodology to characterize this variability through noise injection, tested using workloads implemented in OpenMP and SYCL to compare their performance resilience under noisy conditions. We design a noise injector that captures real system traces and replays the deltas as controlled noises. Using this approach, we evaluate multiple mitigation efforts, that is, thread pinning, housekeeping core isolation, and simultaneous multithreading (SMT) toggling, under both default and noise-injected executions. Experiments with two benchmarks (N-body, Babelstream) and one mini-application (MiniFE) across two processor platforms show that while OpenMP consistently achieves higher raw performance, SYCL tends to exhibit greater resilience in noisy environments. Mitigation effectiveness varies with workload characteristics, system configuration, and noise intensity, with housekeeping core isolation offering the clearest benefits, particularly in high-noise scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 由不可预测的系统噪声引起的性能不稳定仍然是高性能和并行计算中持续存在的挑战。这项工作提出了一种可重现的方法，通过噪声注入来表征这种可变性，并使用 OpenMP 和 SYCL 中实现的工作负载进行测试，以比较它们在噪声条件下的性能弹性。我们设计了一个噪声注入器，可以捕获真实的系统轨迹并将增量重放为受控噪声。使用这种方法，我们在默认执行和噪声注入执行下评估多种缓解措施，即线程固定、内务核心隔离和同时多线程 (SMT) 切换。跨两个处理器平台的两个基准测试（N-body、Babelstream）和一个迷你应用程序 (MiniFE) 的实验表明，虽然 OpenMP 始终如一地实现更高的原始性能，但 SYCL 往往在嘈杂的环境中表现出更大的弹性。缓解效果因工作负载特征、系统配置和噪声强度而异，而内务核心隔离可提供最明显的好处，特别是在高噪声场景中。

papers.title: RESILIO : A Scalable and Composable Architecture for Tomographic Reconstruction Workflows.
papers.abstract: Tomographic reconstruction (TR) aims to reconstruct a 3D object from a finite number of 2D projections. It is an important technique across domains such as medical imaging, materials science, and security, where high-resolution volumetric data is essential for decision-making. With advanced facilities such as the upgraded Advanced Photon Source enabling unprecedented data acquisition rates, TR pipelines struggle to handle large data volumes while maintaining low latency in time-sensitive domains, fault tolerance, and scalability. Traditional, tightly coupled, batch-oriented workflows are increasingly inadequate in such high-performance contexts. In response, we propose ResiliO , a composable, high-performance TR framework built atop the Mochi ecosystem that uses Mofka to improve resilience through persistent streaming and fully leverage high-performance computing platforms. Our design enables scalable and elastic execution across heterogeneous environments and programming models and languages. We contribute a reimagined TR pipeline architecture, its implementation using Mochi services, and an empirical evaluation showing up to 3490 × reduction in the per-event overhead compared to the original ZeroMQ implementation, and up to 3268 × improvement in throughput with performance-tuned configurations using Mofka.
papers.abstract_zh: 断层扫描重建 (TR) 旨在从有限数量的 2D 投影重建 3D 对象。它是跨医学成像、材料科学和安全等领域的一项重要技术，其中高分辨率体积数据对于决策至关重要。凭借升级后的高级光子源等先进设施，实现前所未有的数据采集速率，TR 管道难以处理大量数据，同时在时间敏感领域保持低延迟、容错和可扩展性。传统的、紧密耦合的、面向批处理的工作流程在这种高性能环境中越来越不够用。为此，我们提出了 ResiliO，这是一个构建在 Mochi 生态系统之上的可组合的高性能 TR 框架，它使用 Mofka 通过持久流传输来提高弹性，并充分利用高性能计算平台。我们的设计支持跨异构环境、编程模型和语言的可扩展和弹性执行。我们贡献了重新构想的 TR 管道架构，其使用 Mochi 服务实现，实证评估显示，与原始 ZeroMQ 实现相比，每个事件的开销减少了 3490 倍，使用 Mofka 进行性能调整的配置，吞吐量提高了 3268 倍。

papers.title: Rethinking Back Transformation in 2-stage Eigenvalue Decomposition on Heterogeneous Architectures.
papers.abstract: The 2-stage eigenvalue decomposition (EVD) method outperforms conventional 1-stage method on GPUs and heterogeneous architectures, especially when eigenvectors are not required. However, its performance advantage diminishes when performing back transformation to obtain eigenvectors. To address this, we propose two key solutions: 1) replacing BLAS3 operations with BLAS2 operations during the bulge-chasing back transformation for better performance, and 2) reordering the back transformation workflow from a backward pattern to a new parallelism-driven pattern to hide divide-and-conquer latency, at the cost of one additional GEMM computation. Experimentally, the proposed back transformation algorithm demonstrates significant performance improvements, outperforming the SOTA implementation in MAGMA by an average factor of 3.58x. For complete FP64 precision symmetric EVD with eigenvectors, the proposed algorithm, incorporating both solutions, surpasses the SOTA implementations in MAGMA and cuSOLVER by average factors of 2.62x and 2.21x, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 2 阶段特征值分解 (EVD) 方法在 GPU 和异构架构上优于传统的 1 阶段方法，特别是在不需要特征向量时。然而，当执行反向变换以获得特征向量时，其性能优势就会减弱。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了两个关键解决方案：1）在凸出追踪反向转换期间用 BLAS2 操作替换 BLAS3 操作，以获得更好的性能；2）将反向转换工作流程从向后模式重新排序为新的并行驱动模式，以隐藏分治延迟，但代价是额外的 GEMM 计算。通过实验，所提出的反向变换算法展示了显着的性能改进，平均优于 MAGMA 中的 SOTA 实现 3.58 倍。对于具有特征向量的完整 FP64 精度对称 EVD，所提出的算法结合了两种解决方案，分别超越了 MAGMA 和 cuSOLVER 中的 SOTA 实现，平均因子分别为 2.62 倍和 2.21 倍。

papers.title: RingX: Scalable Parallel Attention for Long-Context Learning on HPC.
papers.abstract: The attention mechanism has become foundational for remarkable AI breakthroughs since the introduction of the Transformer, driving the demand for increasingly longer context to power frontier models such as large-scale reasoning language models and high-resolution image/video generators. However, its quadratic computational and memory complexities present substantial challenges. Current state-of-the-art parallel attention methods, such as ring attention, are widely adopted for long-context training but utilize a point-to-point communication strategy that fails to fully exploit the capabilities of modern HPC network architectures. In this work, we propose ringX, a scalable family of parallel attention methods optimized explicitly for HPC systems. By enhancing workload partitioning, refining communication patterns, and improving load balancing, ringX achieves up to 3.4 × speedup compared to conventional ring attention on the Frontier supercomputer. Optimized for both bi-directional and causal attention mechanisms, ringX demonstrates its effectiveness through training benchmarks of a Vision Transformer (ViT) on a climate dataset and a Generative Pre-Trained Transformer (GPT) model, Llama3 8B. Our method attains an end-to-end training speedup of approximately 1.5 × in both scenarios. To our knowledge, the achieved 38% model FLOPs utilization (MFU) for training Llama3 8B with a 1M-token sequence length on 4,096 GPUs represents one of the highest training efficiencies reported for long-context learning on HPC systems. Our code implementation is available at https://github.com/jqyin/ringX-attention.
papers.abstract_zh: 自 Transformer 推出以来，注意力机制已成为人工智能取得显着突破的基础，推动了对越来越长的上下文的需求，以支持大规模推理语言模型和高分辨率图像/视频生成器等前沿模型。然而，其二次计算和内存复杂性提出了巨大的挑战。当前最先进的并行注意力方法（例如环注意力）被广泛用于长上下文训练，但采用的点对点通信策略无法充分利用现代 HPC 网络架构的功能。在这项工作中，我们提出了ringX，这是一个可扩展的并行注意力方法系列，专门针对 HPC 系统进行了优化。通过增强工作负载划分、改进通信模式和改善负载平衡，与 Frontier 超级计算机上的传统环关注相比，ringX 实现了高达 3.4 倍的加速。 ringX 针对双向和因果注意力机制进行了优化，通过在气候数据集上训练 Vision Transformer (ViT) 基准和生成预训练 Transformer (GPT) 模型 Llama3 8B 展示了其有效性。我们的方法在这两种情况下都实现了大约 1.5 倍的端到端训练加速。据我们所知，在 4,096 个 GPU 上训练具有 1M 令牌序列长度的 Llama3 8B 时，模型浮点运算利用率 (MFU) 达到了 38%，这是 HPC 系统上长上下文学习所报告的最高训练效率之一。我们的代码实现可在 https://github.com/jqyin/ringX-attention 获取。

papers.title: RISC-V Vectorization Coverage for HPC: A TSVC-Based Analysis.
papers.abstract: The RISC-V Vector Extension (RVV) introduces scalable, vector-length agnostic operations with strong potential for high-performance computing (HPC). This paper presents a TSVC-based instruction coverage analysis of RVV to evaluate current compiler auto-vectorization support. We compile TSVC with GNU and LLVM under both vector-length agnostic (VLA) and vector-length specific (VLS) modes and analyze the emitted instructions against the RVV 1.0 specification. Our results quantify instruction usage across key groups, identify missed instructions, and classify the causes of failed vectorization, including compiler backend limitations, absent use cases in TSVC, and nontrivial or unsupported patterns. We also highlight TSVC’s limitations, including ambiguous kernel vectorizability and missing representations of modern HPC-relevant patterns. Finally, we suggest directions for enhancing benchmark suites to better reflect RVV capabilities and guide compiler development for HPC workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: RISC-V 矢量扩展 (RVV) 引入了可扩展、矢量长度无关的操作，具有高性能计算 (HPC) 的强大潜力。本文提出了一种基于 TSVC 的 RVV 指令覆盖率分析，以评估当前编译器自动向量化支持。我们在向量长度不可知 (VLA) 和向量长度特定 (VLS) 模式下使用 GNU 和 LLVM 编译 TSVC，并根据 RVV 1.0 规范分析发出的指令。我们的结果量化了关键组中的指令使用情况，识别丢失的指令，并对矢量化失败的原因进行分类，包括编译器后端限制、TSVC 中缺少的用例以及不平凡或不受支持的模式。我们还强调了 TSVC 的局限性，包括模糊的内核可向量化性和缺少现代 HPC 相关模式的表示。最后，我们提出了增强基准测试套件的方向，以更好地反映 RVV 功能并指导 HPC 工作负载的编译器开发。

papers.title: RL4Sys: A Lightweight System-driven RL Framework for Drop-in Integration in System Optimization.
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has achieved notable success in complex decision-making tasks across various domains, including games, autonomous driving, and robotics. Motivated by these advances, systems researchers have explored RL for optimizing system behavior. However, practical deployment remains uncommon, as existing RL frameworks are ill-suited for system-oriented use cases, introducing substantial integration and runtime overhead in system software. To address this gap, we present RL4Sys, a lightweight RL framework designed specifically for seamless system-level integration. RL4Sys includes a minimal client that embeds easily within target systems to record trajectories and run inference from locally cached deep policies. RL4Sys’s remote RL trainers are executed asynchronously and distributed across servers, leveraging zero-copy gRPC and adaptive batching to update policies without blocking the original system. Our evaluation shows that RL4Sys matches the convergence behavior of conventional RL frameworks and achieves up to 220% higher throughput in environment-oriented settings compared to the state-of-the-art framework, RLlib, while incurring less than 6% runtime overhead relative to the original non-RL system. These results indicate that RL4Sys substantially lowers the barrier to deploying RL for real-world systems optimization.
papers.abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 在游戏、自动驾驶和机器人等各个领域的复杂决策任务中取得了显着的成功。受这些进步的推动，系统研究人员探索了强化学习来优化系统行为。然而，实际部署仍然不常见，因为现有的强化学习框架不适合面向系统的用例，在系统软件中引入了大量的集成和运行时开销。为了解决这一差距，我们推出了 RL4Sys，这是一种专为无缝系统级集成而设计的轻量级 RL 框架。 RL4Sys 包括一个最小的客户端，可以轻松嵌入目标系统中，以记录轨迹并根据本地缓存的深度策略进行推理。 RL4Sys 的远程 RL 训练器异步执行并分布在服务器上，利用零拷贝 gRPC 和自适应批处理来更新策略，而不会阻塞原始系统。我们的评估表明，RL4Sys 与传统 RL 框架的收敛行为相匹配，并且与最先进的框架 RLlib 相比，在面向环境的设置中实现了高达 220% 的高吞吐量，同时相对于原始非 RL 系统，运行时开销不到 6%。这些结果表明 RL4Sys 大大降低了部署 RL 进行现实系统优化的障碍。

papers.title: Roofline Analysis of Tightly-Coupled CPU-GPU Superchips: A Study on MI300A and GH200.
papers.abstract: The introduction of tightly-coupled heterogeneous architectures, such as AMD’s MI300A and NVIDIA’s Grace-Hopper (GH200), address a long-standing bottleneck in accelerated computing, namely the CPU-GPU interface. Whereas the GH200 can be seen as a technological leap in CPU-GPU connectivity greatly exceeding PCIe cadence, the unified memory architecture of the MI300A APU enables seamless communication through coherent caches. When the CPU and GPU execute concurrently, they contend not only for finite bandwidth on their shared memory interfaces, but they also contend for power in a power-constrained environment. Whereas the serialized producer-consumer, overlapped/pipelined producer-consumer, and multi-tenancy (i.e., shared virtualized hardware) execution models offer clear avenues for exploiting these architectures to increase HPC and ML/AI throughput, they come with clear risks associated with non-linear performance degradation arising from this contention. In this paper, we extend the well-established Roofline model to capture the performance implications of contention in concurrent execution modalities on the MI300A and GH200 architectures. We enhance this by quantifying the portability of different memory allocators using standard performance portability metrics, noting the impact of randomness of data as well as host and device arithmetic (compute) intensity. We conclude with a discussion on the evolution of GPU architectures and the impact in terms of performance, portability, and programmability that emerging tightly-coupled GPUs bring to the HPC landscape.
papers.abstract_zh: 紧耦合异构架构的引入，例如 AMD 的 MI300A 和 NVIDIA 的 Grace-Hopper (GH200)，解决了加速计算中长期存在的瓶颈，即 CPU-GPU 接口。 GH200 可以被视为 CPU-GPU 连接方面的技术飞跃，大大超过 PCIe 节奏，而 MI300A APU 的统一内存架构可通过一致缓存实现无缝通信。当 CPU 和 GPU 并发执行时，它们不仅会争夺共享内存接口上的有限带宽，还会争夺功率受限环境中的功率。尽管序列化生产者-消费者、重叠/流水线生产者-消费者和多租户（即共享虚拟化硬件）执行模型为利用这些架构来提高 HPC 和 ML/AI 吞吐量提供了明确的途径，但它们也带来了与这种争用引起的非线性性能下降相关的明显风险。在本文中，我们扩展了完善的 Roofline 模型，以捕获 MI300A 和 GH200 架构上并发执行模式中的争用对性能的影响。我们通过使用标准性能可移植性指标量化不同内存分配器的可移植性来增强这一点，并注意数据随机性以及主机和设备算术（计算）强度的影响。最后，我们讨论了 GPU 架构的演变以及新兴的紧耦合 GPU 给 HPC 领域带来的性能、可移植性和可编程性方面的影响。

papers.title: ROSE: RADICAL Orchestrator for Surrogate Exploration.
papers.abstract: Scientific computing increasingly relies on surrogate models to accelerate high-fidelity simulations, enable real-time predictions, and facilitate exploration of the design space. However, building effective surrogates at scale presents several challenges: simulations are computationally expensive, data generation must be carefully managed, and surrogate learning requires handling large, heterogeneous, and dynamically evolving workflows. These challenges are amplified in active learning contexts, where surrogate models guide further data acquisition, resulting in a tight coupling between simulation, inference, and model training. This paper introduces the ROSE (RADICAL Orchestrator for Surrogate Exploration) framework, a flexible, portable, and scalable software system designed to support the end-to-end lifecycle of surrogate modeling in high-performance computing environments. ROSE integrates active learning algorithms with scalable orchestration, managing asynchronous execution across diverse computing resources while minimizing user burden. It supports both in-situ and ex-situ workflows, online and offline training, and accommodates the dynamic structure of adaptive sampling and surrogate refinement. ROSE is used for three scientific use cases: electrolyte structure extraction, neutron diffraction structure recovery, and colloid phase classification. Across Polaris, Perlmutter, and Delta, ROSE sustains high throughput with low orchestration overhead, and delivers 4–8 × end-to-end speedups in our three use cases by exploiting parallel, pilot-based execution, where asynchronous orchestration typically yields 1.5–3 × versus synchronous baselines.
papers.abstract_zh: 科学计算越来越依赖代理模型来加速高保真模拟、实现实时预测并促进设计空间的探索。然而，大规模构建有效的代理面临着一些挑战：模拟的计算成本很高，数据生成必须仔细管理，代理学习需要处理大型、异构和动态发展的工作流程。这些挑战在主动学习环境中被放大，其中代理模型指导进一步的数据采集，导致模拟、推理和模型训练之间的紧密耦合。本文介绍了 ROSE（用于代理探索的 RADICAL Orchestrator）框架，这是一个灵活、可移植且可扩展的软件系统，旨在支持高性能计算环境中代理建模的端到端生命周期。 ROSE 将主动学习算法与可扩展的编排集成在一起，管理跨不同计算资源的异步执行，同时最大限度地减少用户负担。它支持原位和异位工作流程、在线和离线训练，并适应自适应采样和替代细化的动态结构。 ROSE 用于三个科学用例：电解质结构提取、中子衍射结构恢复和胶体相分类。在 Polaris、Perlmutter 和 Delta 中，ROSE 以低编排开销维持高吞吐量，并通过利用并行、基于试点的执行，在我们的三个用例中提供 4-8 倍的端到端加速，其中异步编排通常比同步基线产生 1.5-3 倍的加速。

papers.title: Run-time Energy-Efficiency Optimization for AI and HPC Workloads.
papers.abstract: Effective power management is crucial for balancing high performance and environmental impact in the exascale era, particularly for datacenters dominated by massively parallel GPU systems due to the rise of AI.
papers.abstract_zh: 有效的电源管理对于平衡百亿亿次时代的高性能和环境影响至关重要，特别是对于由于人工智能的兴起而以大规模并行 GPU 系统为主的数据中心。

papers.title: Scabbard: LLVM Instrumentation-aided Race Checking in CPU/GPU Unified Memory for AMD GPUs.
papers.abstract: Data Races are serious bugs whose occurrence in shared memory parallel and concurrent systems can cause unexpected non-deterministic outcomes and undermine the integrity of computational results. CPU/GPU systems that use Unified Heterogeneous Memory—for simplified memory sharing between GPUs and CPUs—are highly prone to data races. Unfortunately, none of the available data-race checkers are capable of detecting such data races. In this paper, we present Scabbard [18], the first tool that detects such races. Scabbard’s design is based on instrumenting the CPU and GPU codes by linking into LLVM’s compilation tool-chain as a pass plugin, to instrument the user’s code to to record writes, reads and synchronizations into trace files during execution, then subsequently performing offline trace analysis to report races. The main contribution of this paper is in detailing our algorithms and implementation challenges faced by us—newcomers to the LLVM’s and AMD’s ROCm/Hip ecosystems—that can help better the learning experience for future tool-builders who aim to use, improve and contribute to LLVM for the betterment of the GPU/CPU space.
papers.abstract_zh: 数据争用是严重的错误，其在共享内存并行和并发系统中发生可能会导致意外的非确定性结果并破坏计算结果的完整性。 CPU/GPU systems that use Unified Heterogeneous Memory—for simplified memory sharing between GPUs and CPUs—are highly prone to data races. Unfortunately, none of the available data-race checkers are capable of detecting such data races. In this paper, we present Scabbard [18], the first tool that detects such races. Scabbard 的设计基于通过作为 pass 插件链接到 LLVM 的编译工具链来检测 CPU 和 GPU 代码，以检测用户的代码以在执行期间将写入、读取和同步记录到跟踪文件中，然后执行离线跟踪分析以报告竞争。本文的主要贡献在于详细介绍了我们（LLVM 和 AMD ROCm/Hip 生态系统的新手）所面临的算法和实现挑战，这可以帮助未来旨在使用、改进 LLV​​M 并为改善 GPU/CPU 空间做出贡献的工具构建者提供更好的学习体验。

papers.title: Scalable Hydrodynamics on multiple Field-Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs).
papers.abstract: This paper presents scalable 2D and 3D Hydrodynamics solver implementations on FPGAs using Intel’s oneAPI framework, addressing challenges in porting stencil-based computations from CPU/GPU architectures on FPGAs. FPGAs offer customizable hardware with on-chip memory that can be custom-tailored for High Performance Computing (HPC) applications. Despite a much lower throughput, FPGAs achieve comparable energy efficiency with domain decomposition compared to NVIDIA A100 GPU. Optimizations leverage FPGA’s large cache to minimize data streaming and ensure data reuse, reducing memory bandwidth. Domain decomposition enabled pipeline duplication for scalable single FPGA workload, but also the distribution of the work on two Agilex 7 cards. This work demonstrates FPGA viability for computationally intensive simulations, contributing to scalable algorithms for heterogeneous HPC systems and offering insights for exascale computing.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了使用英特尔 oneAPI 框架在 FPGA 上实现可扩展的 2D 和 3D 流体动力学求解器，解决了从 FPGA 上的 CPU/GPU 架构移植基于模板的计算的挑战。 FPGA 提供带有片上存储器的可定制硬件，可针对高性能计算 (HPC) 应用进行定制。尽管吞吐量低得多，但与 NVIDIA A100 GPU 相比，FPGA 通过域分解实现了相当的能源效率。优化利用 FPGA 的大缓存来最大限度地减少数据流并确保数据重用，从而减少内存带宽。域分解不仅可以实现可扩展的单个 FPGA 工作负载的管道复制，还可以将工作分配到两个 Agilex 7 卡上。这项工作展示了 FPGA 在计算密集型仿真中的可行性，为异构 HPC 系统的可扩展算法做出了贡献，并为百亿亿次计算提供了见解。

papers.title: Scalable Neural Network Training: Distributed Data-Parallel Approaches.
papers.abstract: Training large neural networks is computationally demanding and often limited by synchronization overhead in distributed environments. Traditional data-parallel frameworks, such as Horovod or PyTorch DDP, average gradients at every batch, which can limit scalability due to communication bottlenecks. In this work, we propose two novel data-parallel strategies that reduce synchronization by averaging weights and biases only at the end of each epoch. These methods are implemented using the PyCOMPSs task-based programming model and integrated into dislib, enabled by a new distributed tensor abstraction (ds-tensor) that supports multidimensional data structures suitable for deep learning workloads.
papers.abstract_zh: 训练大型神经网络的计算要求很高，并且通常受到分布式环境中同步开销的限制。传统的数据并行框架（例如 Horovod 或 PyTorch DDP）在每个批次中平均梯度，这可能会由于通信瓶颈而限制可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们提出了两种新颖的数据并行策略，通过仅在每个时期结束时平均权重和偏差来减少同步。这些方法是使用 PyCOMPS 基于任务的编程模型实现的，并集成到 dislib 中，由支持适合深度学习工作负载的多维数据结构的新分布式张量抽象 (ds-tensor) 启用。

papers.title: Scalable, High-Fidelity Monitoring of Application Communication Patterns in Vernier.
papers.abstract: Understanding the irregular, dynamic communication patterns in HPC applications at scale is critical when evaluating potential software optimizations and hardware architectures. Current systems monitor communication behavior for entire applications as exhaustive traces or general-purpose aggregated statistics. Generally, these approaches often do not scale well and the data gathered is often too generic or inflexible to make specific hardware/software optimizations. This paper describes a new, configurable, histogram-based approach to gathering scalable, high-fidelity monitoring information about HPC communication that we implemented in the Vernier communication monitoring system. This approach enables targeted collection of statistical data about annotated communication patterns for online or offline analysis, benchmarking, or network simulations. We assess these capabilities by collecting communication patterns from several production HPC applications at scale, showing that the resulting statistical representations accurately characterize the communication patterns in these applications, and can be used to provide new insights into communication patterns of complex HPC applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 在评估潜在的软件优化和硬件架构时，了解大规模 HPC 应用程序中不规则的动态通信模式至关重要。当前系统以详尽的跟踪或通用聚合统计数据的形式监控整个应用程序的通信行为。一般来说，这些方法通常不能很好地扩展，并且收集的数据通常过于通用或不灵活，无法进行特定的硬件/软件优化。本文描述了一种新的、可配置的、基于直方图的方法，用于收集有关我们在 Vernier 通信监控系统中实现的 HPC 通信的可扩展、高保真监控信息。这种方法可以有针对性地收集有关带注释的通信模式的统计数据，以进行在线或离线分析、基准测试或网络模拟。我们通过从多个生产 HPC 应用程序中大规模收集通信模式来评估这些功能，结果表明所得到的统计表示准确地表征了这些应用程序中的通信模式，并且可用于提供对复杂 HPC 应用程序的通信模式的新见解。

papers.title: Scaling All-to-All Operations Across Emerging Many-Core Supercomputers.
papers.abstract: Performant all-to-all collective operations in MPI are critical to fast Fourier transforms, transposition, and machine learning applications. There are many existing implementations for all-to-all exchanges on emerging systems, with the achieved performance dependent on many factors, including message size, process count, architecture, and parallel system partition. This paper presents novel all-to-all algorithms for emerging many-core systems. Further, the paper presents a performance analysis against existing algorithms and system MPI, with novel algorithms achieving up to 3x speedup over system MPI at 32 nodes of state-of-the-art Sapphire Rapids systems.
papers.abstract_zh: MPI 中高性能的全面集体运算对于快速傅立叶变换、转置和机器学习应用至关重要。在新兴系统上有许多现有的全对全交换实现，所实现的性能取决于许多因素，包括消息大小、进程计数、体系结构和并行系统分区。本文提出了适用于新兴多核系统的新颖的全对全算法。此外，本文还针对现有算法和系统 MPI 进行了性能分析，在最先进的 Sapphire Rapids 系统的 32 个节点上，新算法比系统 MPI 实现了高达 3 倍的加速。

papers.title: Scaling Hybrid Quantum-HPC Applications with the Quantum Framework.
papers.abstract: Hybrid quantum-high performance computing (Q-HPC) workflows are emerging as a key strategy for running quantum applications at scale in current noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices. These workflows must operate seamlessly across diverse simulators and hardware backends since no single simulator offers the best performance for every circuit type. Simulation efficiency depends strongly on circuit structure, entanglement, and depth, making a flexible and backend-agnostic execution model essential for fair benchmarking, informed platform selection, and ultimately the identification of quantum advantage opportunities. In this work, we extend the Quantum Framework (QFw), a modular and HPC-aware orchestration layer, to integrate multiple local backends (Qiskit Aer, NWQ-Sim, QTensor, and TN-QVM) and a cloud-based quantum backend (IonQ) under a unified interface. Using this integration, we execute a number of non-variational as well as variational workloads. The results highlight workload-specific backend advantages: while Qiskit Aer’s matrix product state excels for large Ising models, NWQ-Sim not only leads on large-scale entanglement and Hamiltonian but also shows the benefits of concurrent subproblem execution in a distributed manner for optimization problems. These findings demonstrate that simulator-agnostic, HPC-aware orchestration is a practical path toward scalable, reproducible, and portable Q-HPC ecosystems, thereby accelerating progress toward demonstrating quantum advantage.
papers.abstract_zh: 混合量子高性能计算 (Q-HPC) 工作流程正在成为在当前嘈杂的中规模量子 (NISQ) 设备中大规模运行量子应用程序的关键策略。这些工作流程必须在不同的模拟器和硬件后端之间无缝运行，因为没有一个模拟器可以为每种电路类型提供最佳性能。仿真效率在很大程度上取决于电路结构、纠缠和深度，这使得灵活且与后端无关的执行模型对于公平基准测试、明智的平台选择以及最终识别量子优势机会至关重要。在这项工作中，我们扩展了量子框架（QFw），一个模块化和HPC感知的编排层，以在统一的接口下集成多个本地后端（Qiskit Aer、NWQ-Sim、QTensor和TN-QVM）和基于云的量子后端（IonQ）。使用这种集成，我们执行许多非变分和变分工作负载。结果突出了特定于工作负载的后端优势：虽然 Qiskit Aer 的矩阵乘积状态在大型 Ising 模型中表现出色，但 NWQ-Sim 不仅在大规模纠缠和哈密顿量方面领先，而且还显示了以分布式方式并发子问题执行对于优化问题的好处。这些发现表明，与模拟器无关的 HPC 感知编排是实现可扩展、可重复和便携式 Q-HPC 生态系统的实用途径，从而加速了展示量子优势的进展。

papers.title: Scaling LLM Training Using RDMA over Converged Ethernet.
papers.abstract: We present a comprehensive benchmarking study that evaluates the scaling performance of RDMA over Converged Ethernet (RoCE) and compares it with InfiniBand in the context of large-scale LLM training workloads. While InfiniBand is traditionally favored for its low-latency, high-bandwidth characteristics, it imposes significant infrastructure and operational costs. RoCE, leveraging commodity Ethernet and RDMA, offers a cost-effective alternative. Through extensive experiments on production clusters, we demonstrate that RoCE can achieve near-linear scaling performance comparable to InfiniBand when properly configured. Our analysis spans data sharding strategies, quantization and activation recomputation techniques, batch size tuning, and system-level optimizations, providing practical guidance for designing scalable and efficient AI infrastructure.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一项全面的基准测试研究，评估融合以太网上的 RDMA (RoCE) 的扩展性能，并将其与大规模 LLM 训练工作负载背景下的 InfiniBand 进行比较。虽然 InfiniBand 传统上因其低延迟、高带宽特性而受到青睐，但它带来了巨大的基础设施和运营成本。 RoCE 利用商用以太网和 RDMA，提供了一种经济高效的替代方案。通过对生产集群的大量实验，我们证明，在正确配置的情况下，RoCE 可以实现与 InfiniBand 相当的近线性扩展性能。我们的分析涵盖数据分片策略、量化和激活重新计算技术、批量大小调整和系统级优化，为设计可扩展且高效的人工智能基础设施提供实用指导。

papers.title: Scaling Out Chip Interconnect Networks with Implicit Sequence Numbers.
papers.abstract: As AI models outpace the capabilities of single processors, interconnects across chips have become a critical enabler for scalable computing. These processors exchange massive amounts of data at cache-line granularity, prompting the adoption of new interconnect protocols like CXL, NVLink, and UALink, designed for high bandwidth and small payloads. However, the increasing transfer rates of these protocols heighten susceptibility to errors. While mechanisms like Cyclic Redundancy Check (CRC) and Forward Error Correction (FEC) are standard for reliable data transmission, scaling chip interconnects to multi-node configurations introduces new challenges, particularly in managing silently dropped flits in switching devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着人工智能模型超越单个处理器的能力，跨芯片互连已成为可扩展计算的关键推动者。这些处理器以缓存行粒度交换大量数据，促使采用专为高带宽和小有效负载而设计的新互连协议，例如 CXL、NVLink 和 UALink。然而，这些协议不断提高的传输速率增加了出错的可能性。虽然循环冗余校验 (CRC) 和前向纠错 (FEC) 等机制是可靠数据传输的标准，但将芯片互连扩展到多节点配置会带来新的挑战，特别是在管理交换设备中静默丢弃的 flits 方面。

papers.title: Scaling the memory wall using mixed-precision - HPG-MxP on an exascale machine.
papers.abstract: Mixed-precision algorithms have been proposed as a way for scientific computing to benefit from some of the gains seen for artificial intelligence (AI) on recent high performance computing (HPC) platforms. A few applications dominated by dense matrix operations have seen substantial speedups by utilizing low precision formats such as FP16. However, a majority of scientific simulation applications are memory bandwidth limited. Beyond preliminary studies, the practical gain from using mixed-precision algorithms on a given HPC system is largely unclear.
papers.abstract_zh: 混合精度算法已被提议作为科学计算从人工智能 (AI) 在最新高性能计算 (HPC) 平台上取得的一些成果中获益的一种方式。通过使用低精度格式（例如 FP16），一些以密集矩阵运算为主的应用程序已经获得了显着的加速。然而，大多数科学模拟应用程序的内存带宽都受到限制。除了初步研究之外，在给定 HPC 系统上使用混合精度算法的实际收益在很大程度上尚不清楚。

papers.title: SDR-RDMA: Software-Defined Reliability Architecture for Planetary Scale RDMA Communication.
papers.abstract: RDMA is vital for efficient distributed training across datacenters, but millisecond-scale latencies complicate the design of its reliability layer. We show that depending on long-haul link characteristics, such as drop rate, distance and bandwidth, the widely used Selective Repeat algorithm can be inefficient, warranting alternatives like Erasure Coding. To enable such alternatives on existing hardware, we propose SDR-RDMA, a software-defined reliability stack for RDMA. Its core is a lightweight SDR SDK that extends standard point-to-point RDMA semantics - fundamental to AI networking stacks - with a receive buffer bitmap. SDR bitmap enables partial message completion to let applications implement custom reliability schemes tailored to specific deployments, while preserving zero-copy RDMA benefits. By offloading the SDR backend to NVIDIA's Data Path Accelerator (DPA), we achieve line-rate performance, enabling efficient inter-datacenter communication and advancing reliability innovation for inter-datacenter training.
papers.abstract_zh: RDMA 对于跨数据中心的高效分布式训练至关重要，但毫秒级的延迟使其可靠性层的设计变得复杂。我们表明，根据长距离链路特征，例如丢包率、距离和带宽，广泛使用的选择性重复算法可能效率低下，需要使用擦除编码等替代方案。为了在现有硬件上实现此类替代方案，我们提出了 SDR-RDMA，这是一种用于 RDMA 的软件定义的可靠性堆栈。其核心是一个轻量级 SDR SDK，它通过接收缓冲区位图扩展了标准点对点 RDMA 语义（AI 网络堆栈的基础）。 SDR 位图支持部分消息完成，让应用程序实现针对特定部署量身定制的自定义可靠性方案，同时保留零复制 RDMA 优势。通过将 SDR 后端卸载到 NVIDIA 的数据路径加速器 (DPA)，我们实现了线速性能，实现高效的数据中心间通信并推进数据中心间训练的可靠性创新。

papers.title: Seamless end-to-end containerized HPC environments.
papers.abstract: High-performance computing environments face increasing challenges from diverse scientific workflows, imposing conflicting demands for stability, customization, and reproducibility that traditional monolithic software stacks cannot accommodate. We present a comprehensive approach to seamless end-to-end containerized HPC environments which decomposes the technical challenge into five manageable areas: specification and construction of environments, session provisioning, scheduler integration, system integration, and security. We develop and evaluate prototypes across these five technical areas, demonstrating practical feasibility through Spack-based environment construction with CI/CD pipelines, transparent session access via PAM and Kubernetes, and flexible job execution using Slurm’s native container support. Through this work, we demonstrate that comprehensive containerization of HPC environments can be achieved using open standards, providing enhanced reproducibility and flexibility without sacrificing user experience.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算环境面临着来自不同科学工作流程的越来越多的挑战，对稳定性、定制性和可重复性提出了相互冲突的需求，而传统的整体软件堆栈无法满足这些需求。我们提出了一种无缝端到端容器化 HPC 环境的综合方法，将技术挑战分解为五个可管理的领域：环境的规范和构建、会话配置、调度程序集成、系统集成和安全性。我们开发和评估这五个技术领域的原型，通过基于 Spack 的 CI/CD 管道环境构建、通过 PAM 和 Kubernetes 的透明会话访问以及使用 Slurm 原生容器支持的灵活作业执行来展示实际可行性。通过这项工作，我们证明可以使用开放标准实现 HPC 环境的全面容器化，从而在不牺牲用户体验的情况下提供增强的可重复性和灵活性。

papers.title: Secure In-Storage Execution of VTK Workloads on Modern Parallel NFS Data Servers.
papers.abstract: As data volumes grow, the cost of moving large datasets increasingly limits scientific visualization performance. One promising solution is to analyze data where it is stored. This paper presents a pushdown architecture for pNFS-based storage systems that offloads early stages of a VTK pipeline—such as reading and filtering—to the pNFS data servers that hold the data. Using a FUSE-based interface, a pNFS client triggers remote processing and retrieves results by writing and reading special command and result files. Our design leverages pNFS clients’ ability to locate file-resident servers, along with a recent Linux enhancement that enables efficient local access to pNFS data without exposing filesystem internals. Offloaded code runs with the user’s credentials, preserving standard permission checks. Experiments with two real-world scientific datasets show up to 6.1× speedup in end-to-end visualization runtime and up to 7.1× in data loading, thanks to early data filtering that significantly reduces data movement.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着数据量的增长，移动大型数据集的成本越来越限制科学可视化性能。一种有前途的解决方案是在数据存储的地方对其进行分析。本文提出了一种基于 pNFS 的存储系统的下推架构，该架构将 VTK 管道的早期阶段（例如读取和过滤）卸载到保存数据的 pNFS 数据服务器。使用基于 FUSE 的接口，pNFS 客户端通过写入和读取特殊命令和结果文件来触发远程处理并检索结果。我们的设计利用了 pNFS 客户端定位文件驻留服务器的能力，以及最近的 Linux 增强功能，可以在不暴露文件系统内部的情况下高效地本地访问 pNFS 数据。卸载的代码使用用户的凭据运行，保留标准权限检查。对两个真实世界科学数据集的实验表明，由于早期数据过滤显着减少了数据移动，端到端可视化运行时速度提高了 6.1 倍，数据加载速度提高了 7.1 倍。

papers.title: Securing HDF5 Plugins with Digital Signatures.
papers.abstract: HDF5 is a popular data management and I/O library used by numerous scientific and industry applications. HDF5 has pluggable extensions to enhance its functionality, improve performance, and utilize underlying hardware and file systems. Plugins play a crucial role in adding custom features, such as compression filters, virtual file drivers (VFDs), and virtual object layer (VOL) connectors, without requiring extensive changes to the source code or modifications to the main library. While the plugin capability enables the extension of HDF5, plugins could be misused for malicious routing of HDF5 calls. To systematically improve the security of HDF5, this study explores the option of digitally signing plugins. This would help ensure the authenticity and integrity of any plugins that users may use. We discuss a few implementation scenarios in HDF5 and assess the accuracy and overhead associated with the plugin verification process.
papers.abstract_zh: HDF5 是一种流行的数据管理和 I/O 库，被众多科学和工业应用程序使用。 HDF5 具有可插拔扩展来增强其功能、提高性能并利用底层硬件和文件系统。插件在添加自定义功能（例如压缩过滤器、虚拟文件驱动程序 (VFD) 和虚拟对象层 (VOL) 连接器）方面发挥着至关重要的作用，而无需对源代码进行大量更改或对主库进行修改。虽然插件功能可以扩展 HDF5，但插件可能会被滥用来恶意路由 HDF5 呼叫。为了系统地提高 HDF5 的安全性，本研究探索了数字签名插件的选项。这将有助于确保用户可能使用的任何插件的真实性和完整性。我们讨论 HDF5 中的一些实现场景，并评估与插件验证过程相关的准确性和开销。

papers.title: Seeking Cost-Optimal Infrastructure Size for Distributed Filesystems: A Ceph Case Study.
papers.abstract: Distributed Filesystems (DFS) are a crucial component of modern computing environments, and their performance is critical to the success of all the facilities that rely on them. However, predicting the DFS I/O performance solely based on the storage system hardware is not trivial.
papers.abstract_zh: 分布式文件系统 (DFS) 是现代计算环境的重要组成部分，其性能对于所有依赖它们的设施的成功至关重要。然而，仅根据存储系统硬件来预测 DFS I/O 性能并非易事。

papers.title: SENSE in Practice: Quantifying the End-to-End Benefits of Intent-Based Bandwidth Reservation for Exascale Science Workflows.
papers.abstract: The escalating demands of scientific collaborations necessitate advanced networking for deterministic, secure, and orchestrated services across multiple administrative domains. The Software-Defined Network for End-to-end Networked Science at the Exascale (SENSE) paradigm addresses these needs through intent-based networking and multi-domain orchestration. This paper evaluates SENSE’s performance on a comprehensive multi-domain testbed, including GNA-G AutoGOLE, the National Research Platform (NRP), FABRIC, and production LHC CMS infrastructure. Our results demonstrate that intent-based service requests are successfully translated into network configurations, with average provisioning times of 183 seconds for simple services and 290 seconds for complex multi-domain workflows. Performance monitoring confirms that SENSE maintains guaranteed bandwidth allocations, enabling higher-priority data flows to complete significantly faster than in best-effort scenarios. This capability transforms the network into a first-class schedulable resource, optimizing scientific workflows by prioritizing data criticality and moving beyond best-effort limitations to achieve predictable and efficient data movement for data-intensive scientific endeavors.
papers.abstract_zh: 科学合作的需求不断增长，需要先进的网络来跨多个管理域提供确定性、安全和协调的服务。用于百万兆级端到端网络科学的软件定义网络 (SENSE) 范式通过基于意图的网络和多域编排满足了这些需求。本文评估了 SENSE 在综合多领域测试平台上的性能，包括 GNA-G AutoGOLE、国家研究平台 (NRP)、FABRIC 和生产 LHC CMS 基础设施。我们的结果表明，基于意图的服务请求已成功转换为网络配置，简单服务的平均配置时间为 183 秒，复杂的多域工作流的平均配置时间为 290 秒。性能监控确认 SENSE 维持有保证的带宽分配，使更高优先级的数据流能够比尽力而为场景更快地完成。此功能将网络转变为一流的可调度资源，通过优先考虑数据关键性并超越尽力而为的限制来优化科学工作流程，为数据密集型科学工作实现可预测且高效的数据移动。

papers.title: SIGMo: High-Throughput Batched Subgraph Isomorphism on GPUs for Molecular Matching.
papers.abstract: Subgraph isomorphism is a fundamental graph problem with applications in diverse domains from biology to social network analysis. Of particular interest is molecular matching, which uses a subgraph isomorphism formulation for the drug discovery process. While subgraph isomorphism is known to be NP-complete and computationally expensive, in the molecular matching formulation a number of domain constraints allow for efficient implementations. This paper presents SIGMo, a high-throughput, portable subgraph isomorphism framework for GPUs, specifically designed for batch molecular matching. SIGMo takes advantage of the specific domain formulation to provide a more efficient filter-and-join strategy: the framework introduces a novel multi-level iterative filtering technique based on neighborhood signature encoding to efficiently prune candidates prior to a GPU-optimized join phase using a stack-based DFS traversal. The GPU implementation is written in SYCL, allowing portable execution on AMD, Intel, and NVIDIA GPUs. Our experimental evaluation on a large dataset from ZINC demonstrates up to 1470 × speedup over state-of-the-art subgraph isomorphism frameworks, and achieves a throughput of 7.7 billion matches per second on a cluster with 256 GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 子图同构是一个基本的图问题，在从生物学到社交网络分析的各个领域都有应用。特别令人感兴趣的是分子匹配，它在药物发现过程中使用子图同构公式。虽然子图同构已知是 NP 完全的且计算成本昂贵，但在分子匹配公式中，许多域约束允许有效的实现。本文介绍了 SIGMo，一种用于 GPU 的高通量、便携式子图同构框架，专为批量分子匹配而设计。 SIGMo 利用特定的域公式来提供更有效的过滤和连接策略：该框架引入了一种基于邻域签名编码的新颖的多级迭代过滤技术，以使用基于堆栈的 DFS 遍历在 GPU 优化的连接阶段之前有效地修剪候选者。 GPU 实现是用 SYCL 编写的，允许在 AMD、Intel 和 NVIDIA GPU 上移植执行。我们对 ZINC 的大型数据集进行的实验评估表明，与最先进的子图同构框架相比，速度提高了 1470 倍，并在具有 256 个 GPU 的集群上实现了每秒 77 亿个匹配的吞吐量。

papers.title: Simulating Hybrid Analog + RISC-V Systems for HPC Applications.
papers.abstract: As digital scaling trends have slowed over the past decade, there has been renewed interest in new computing paradigms. Analog computing is one such alternative, and has the potential to provide performance and efficiency beyond what is achievable by digital systems, but many challenges remain. One important challenge is enabling complex applications to take advantage of analog components that only support a limited set of computational kernels. In this work, we examine one potential solution to this challenge, hybrid analog–digital systems in which analog accelerators function as tightly integrated coprocessors within each core. In this approach, the RISC-V ISA simplifies hybrid system design by providing a mature software stack for the digital components, enabling system designers to focus on the analog-specific aspects of the architecture and software. To investigate the viability of hybrid architectures for high-performance computing (HPC), we evaluate two iterative linear solvers on analog–digital RISC-V processors with the Structural Simulation Toolkit (SST). Our analysis shows that digital operations remain bottlenecks even in analog-dominated applications. This demonstrates the importance of further work on hybrid systems and on software to effectively balance analog and digital operations for large-scale applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着过去十年数字扩展趋势放缓，人们对新的计算范例重新产生了兴趣。模拟计算就是这样的一种替代方案，它有可能提供超出数字系统所能达到的性能和效率，但仍然存在许多挑战。一个重要的挑战是使复杂的应用程序能够利用仅支持一组有限的计算内核的模拟组件。在这项工作中，我们研究了应对这一挑战的一种潜在解决方案，即混合模拟数字系统，其中模拟加速器在每个内核中充当紧密集成的协处理器。在这种方法中，RISC-V ISA 通过为数字组件提供成熟的软件堆栈来简化混合系统设计，使系统设计人员能够专注于架构和软件的模拟特定方面。为了研究高性能计算 (HPC) 混合架构的可行性，我们使用结构仿真工具包 (SST) 评估了模拟数字 RISC-V 处理器上的两个迭代线性求解器。我们的分析表明，即使在模拟主导的应用中，数字操作仍然是瓶颈。这表明进一步研究混合系统和软件以有效平衡大规模应用的模拟和数字操作的重要性。

papers.title: Simulating many-engine spacecraft: Exceeding 1 quadrillion degrees of freedom via information geometric regularization.
papers.abstract: We present an optimized implementation of the recently proposed information geometric regularization (IGR) for unprecedented scale simulation of compressible fluid flows applied to multi-engine spacecraft boosters. We improve upon state-of-the-art computational fluid dynamics (CFD) techniques in terms of computational cost, memory footprint, and energy-to-solution metrics. Unified memory on coupled CPU–GPU or APU platforms increases problem size with negligible overhead. Mixed half/single-precision storage and computation are used on well-conditioned numerics. We simulate flow at 200 trillion grid points and 1 quadrillion degrees of freedom, exceeding the current record by a factor of 20. A factor of 4 wall-time speedup is achieved over optimized baselines. Ideal weak scaling is observed on OLCF Frontier, LLNL El Capitan, and CSCS Alps using the full systems. Strong scaling is near ideal at extreme conditions, including 80% efficiency on CSCS Alps with an 8 node baseline and stretching to the full system.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了最近提出的信息几何正则化（IGR）的优化实现，用于对应用于多引擎航天器助推器的可压缩流体流动进行前所未有的规模模拟。我们在计算成本、内存占用和能量解决方案指标方面改进了最先进的计算流体动力学 (CFD) 技术。 CPU-GPU 或 APU 耦合平台上的统一内存会增加问题的规模，而开销可以忽略不计。混合半/单精度存储和计算用于条件良好的数值。我们模拟了 200 万亿个网格点和 1 万亿个自由度的流动，比当前记录高出 20 倍。在优化的基线上实现了 4 倍的墙时间加速。使用完整系统在 OLCF Frontier、LLNL El Capitan 和 CSCS Alps 上观察到理想的弱缩放。在极端条件下，强大的扩展能力接近理想状态，包括在具有 8 个节点基线并扩展到整个系统的 CSCS Alps 上实现 80% 的效率。

papers.title: SIREN: Software Identification and Recognition in HPC Systems.
papers.abstract: HPC systems use monitoring and operational data analytics to ensure efficiency, performance, and orderly operations. Application-specific insights are crucial for analyzing the increasing complexity and diversity of HPC workloads, particularly through the identification of unknown software and recognition of repeated executions, which facilitate system optimization and security improvements. However, traditional identification methods using job or file names are unreliable for arbitrary user-provided names. Fuzzy hashing the content of executables detects similarities despite different code versions or compilation approaches while preserving privacy and file integrity, overcoming these limitations. We introduce SIREN, a process-level data collection framework for software identification and recognition. SIREN improves observability in HPC job execution by enabling analysis of process metadata, environment information, and executable fuzzy hashes. Findings from an opt-in deployment campaign on LUMI show SIREN’s ability to provide insights into software usage, recognition of repeated executions of known applications, and similarity-based identification of unknown applications.
papers.abstract_zh: HPC 系统使用监控和运营数据分析来确保效率、性能和有序运营。针对特定应用程序的洞察对于分析 HPC 工作负载日益增加的复杂性和多样性至关重要，特别是通过识别未知软件和识别重复执行，从而促进系统优化和安全性改进。然而，使用作业或文件名的传统识别方法对于任意用户提供的名称来说并不可靠。尽管代码版本或编译方法不同，但模糊散列可执行文件的内容可以检测相似性，同时保留隐私和文件完整性，克服这些限制。我们介绍 SIREN，一个用于软件识别和识别的过程级数据收集框架。 SIREN 通过对进程元数据、环境信息和可执行模糊哈希进行分析，提高了 HPC 作业执行的可观察性。 LUMI 上的选择加入部署活动的结果表明，SIREN 能够深入了解软件使用情况、识别已知应用程序的重复执行以及基于相似性识别未知应用程序。

papers.title: Slicing Is All You Need: Towards A Universal One-Sided Algorithm for Distributed Matrix Multiplication.
papers.abstract: Many important applications across science, data analytics, and AI workloads depend on distributed matrix multiplication.
