The proposed approach opens up possibilities for more complex setups, such as automatically scheduling jobs when energy is cheap and renewable, a practice already used in companies utilizing HPC.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通过特定于应用的能源模型在高性能计算 (HPC) 环境中实现节能作业调度的新方法。我们提出了一种架构，将调度启发式解耦到 HPC 调度程序 SLURM 的 Python 插件。该方法利用面向服务的架构和清洁架构的原则来创建一个适用于生产设置的概念验证系统，为集成各种节能调度模型提供了一个平台。我们在单节点 HPC 系统中演示了该方法，在高性能共轭梯度 (HPCG) 基准测试中节能 11%，该基准测试代表了现代应用程序的数据访问模式和计算。所提出的方法为更复杂的设置提供了可能性，例如在能源便宜且可再生时自动调度作业，这种做法已经在使用 HPC 的公司中使用。

papers.title: Automatic Generation of Distributed-Memory Mappings for Tensor Computations.
papers.abstract: While considerable research has been directed at automatic parallelization for shared-memory platforms, little progress has been made in automatic parallelization schemes for distributed-memory systems. We introduce an innovative approach to automatically produce distributed-memory parallel code for an important subclass of affine tensor computations common to Coupled Cluster (CC) electronic structure methods, neuro-imaging applications, and deep learning models.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管对共享内存平台的自动并行化进行了大量研究，但在分布式内存系统的自动并行化方案方面却进展甚微。我们引入了一种创新方法，可以自动生成分布式内存并行代码，用于耦合簇（CC）电子结构方法、神经成像应用和深度学习模型中常见的仿射张量计算的重要子类。

papers.title: Automatic Generation of Micro-kernels for Performance Portability of Matrix Multiplication on RISC-V Vector Processors.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose and evaluate several optimized implementations of the general matrix multiplication (gemm) on two different RISC-V architecture cores implementing the RISC-V vector extension (RVV): C906 and C910 from T-HEAD. Specifically, we address the performance portability problem across these processor cores by means of an automatic assembly code generator, written in Python, capable of emitting RVV code for high performance computing (HPC), with a variety of combinations of specific and general optimizations.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出并评估了在实现 RISC-V 向量扩展 (RVV) 的两个不同 RISC-V 架构核心上通用矩阵乘法 (gemm) 的几种优化实现：来自 T-HEAD 的 C906 和 C910。具体来说，我们通过使用 Python 编写的自动汇编代码生成器来解决这些处理器内核之间的性能可移植性问题，该生成器能够生成用于高性能计算 (HPC) 的 RVV 代码，并具有各种特定和通用优化的组合。

papers.title: Automatic Search Guided Code Optimization Framework for Mixed-Precision Scientific Applications.
papers.abstract: The rapid development in machine learning (ML) has prompted demand for low-precision arithmetic hardware that can deliver faster computing speed. Weather simulation applications typically exhibit higher sensitivity towards small perturbation on the input data, but the inherent uncertainty paves the way for opportunities in mixed-precision computing (MPC) by trading accuracy for performance. To determine an acceptable precision allocation for variables without degrading the simulation quality, challenges include exploring an exponential search space of mixed-precision configurations. We propose a mixed-precision code tuning framework for automatic search of suitable precision configurations for weather modeling applications with black-box optimization algorithms. These search algorithms demonstrate adequate sample efficiency with favorable optimality in the search space of two weather modeling miniapps, and the search results achieve up to 30% performance gain that stays within the tolerance level, offering a workflow to facilitate the identification of variables sensitive to precision change.
papers.abstract_zh: 机器学习（ML）的快速发展促进了对能够提供更快计算速度的低精度算术硬件的需求。天气模拟应用程序通常对输入数据的小扰动表现出更高的敏感性，但固有的不确定性通过牺牲精度来换取性能，为混合精度计算 (MPC) 的机会铺平了道路。为了在不降低仿真质量的情况下确定可接受的变量精度分配，挑战包括探索混合精度配置的指数搜索空间。我们提出了一种混合精度代码调整框架，用于通过黑盒优化算法自动搜索适合天气建模应用的精度配置。这些搜索算法在两个天气建模迷你应用程序的搜索空间中表现出足够的样本效率和良好的最优性，并且搜索结果实现了高达 30% 的性能增益，且保持在容差水平内，提供了一个工作流程，有助于识别对精度变化敏感的变量。

papers.title: Autotuning Apache TVM-based Scientific Applications Using Bayesian Optimization.
papers.abstract: Apache TVM (Tensor Virtual Machine), an open source machine learning compiler framework designed to optimize computations across various hardware platforms, provides an opportunity to improve the performance of dense matrix factorizations such as LU (Lower Upper) decomposition and Cholesky decomposition on GPUs, FPGAs, ASICs, and AI accelerators. In this paper, we propose a new TVM autotuning framework using Bayesian Optimization and use the TVM tensor expression language to implement linear algebra kernels such as LU, Cholesky, and 3mm. We use these scientific computation kernels to evaluate the effectiveness of our methods on a GPU cluster, called Swing, at Argonne National Laboratory. We compare the proposed autotuning framework with the TVM autotuning framework AutoTVM with four tuners and find that our framework outperforms AutoTVM in most cases.
papers.abstract_zh: Apache TVM（张量虚拟机）是一种开源机器学习编译器框架，旨在优化各种硬件平台上的计算，提供了提高密集矩阵分解性能的机会，例如 GPU、FPGA、ASIC 和 AI 加速器上的 LU（下上）分解和 Cholesky 分解。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用贝叶斯优化的新 TVM 自动调整框架，并使用 TVM 张量表达语言来实现 LU、Cholesky 和 ​​3mm 等线性代数内核。我们使用这些科学计算内核来评估我们的方法在阿贡国家实验室的 GPU 集群（称为 Swing）上的有效性。我们将所提出的自动调整框架与具有四个调谐器的 TVM 自动调整框架 AutoTVM 进行比较，发现我们的框架在大多数情况下优于 AutoTVM。

papers.title: BaRRT: Buildtime and Runtime Reproducibility Tool for Software Development and Testing.
papers.abstract: During software development, many aspects of the system and user state can change. Significant time can be spent tracking down the causes of these differences, rather than focusing on the main task of software development. This paper describes a tool to record the state at build-time and at runtime of an application to more easily investigate the cause(s) of differences in behavior. The added logging enables better software quality assurance by tracking code changes and their effects on runtime behavior. At a minimum, this tool only requires prepending one command at build-time and another at runtime. Project-level configurations can be set to enable the collection of additional information.
papers.abstract_zh: 在软件开发过程中，系统和用户状态的许多方面都可能发生变化。可以花费大量时间来追踪这些差异的原因，而不是专注于软件开发的主要任务。本文介绍了一种记录应用程序构建时和运行时状态的工具，以便更轻松地调查行为差异的原因。添加的日志记录可以通过跟踪代码更改及其对运行时行为的影响来实现更好的软件质量保证。至少，该工具只需要在构建时添加一个命令，并在运行时添加另一个命令。可以设置项目级配置来收集附加信息。

papers.title: Benchmarking a portable lattice quantum chromodynamics kernel written in Kokkos and MPI.
papers.abstract: Simulations of Lattice Quantum Chromodynamics (LQCD) are an important application (two digit percentage of cycles) on major High Performance Computing (HPC) installations, including systems high up on and leading the top500 list. In the rapidly changing hardware landscape of HPC, tying up manpower optimizing simulation software for every architecture becomes a sustainability issue. In this work we explore the feasibility of using performance portable parallel code for an important LQCD kernel. Fusing the Kokkos C++ Performance Portability EcoSystem with MPI allows applications to scale on massive parallel machines while still being able to target a plentitude of different architectures with the same simple code. We report on benchmarking results for a range of currently deployed and recently introduced systems, including AMD EPYC 7742, AMD MI250, Fujitsu A64FX, Nvidia A100 and Nvidia H100 components, with mostly encouraging results.
papers.abstract_zh: 晶格量子色动力学 (LQCD) 模拟是主要高性能计算 (HPC) 安装的重要应用（循环百分比为两位数），包括在 500 强列表中名列前茅并处于领先地位的系统。在快速变化的 HPC 硬件环境中，为每种架构占用人力优化仿真软件成为一个可持续性问题。在这项工作中，我们探讨了对重要的 LQCD 内核使用性能可移植并行代码的可行性。将 Kokkos C++ 性能可移植性生态系统与 MPI 相融合，使应用程序能够在大规模并行计算机上进行扩展，同时仍然能够使用相同的简单代码来针对大量不同的架构。我们报告了一系列当前部署和最近推出的系统的基准测试结果，包括 AMD EPYC 7742、AMD MI250、Fujitsu A64FX、Nvidia A100 和 Nvidia H100 组件，结果大多令人鼓舞。

papers.title: Benchmarking and In-depth Performance Study of Large Language Models on Habana Gaudi Processors.
papers.abstract: Transformer models have achieved remarkable success in various machine learning tasks but suffer from high computational complexity and resource requirements. The quadratic complexity of the self-attention mechanism further exacerbates these challenges when dealing with long sequences and large datasets. Specialized AI hardware accelerators, such as the Habana GAUDI architecture, offer a promising solution to tackle these issues. GAUDI features a Matrix Multiplication Engine (MME) and a cluster of fully programmable Tensor Processing Cores (TPC). This paper explores the untapped potential of using GAUDI processors to accelerate Transformer-based models, addressing key challenges in the process. Firstly, we provide a comprehensive performance comparison between the MME and TPC components, illuminating their relative strengths and weaknesses. Secondly, we explore strategies to optimize MME and TPC utilization, offering practical insights to enhance computational efficiency. Thirdly, we evaluate the performance of Transformers on GAUDI, particularly in handling long sequences and uncovering performance bottlenecks. Lastly, we evaluate the end-to-end performance of two Transformer-based large language models (LLM) on GAUDI. The contributions of this work encompass practical insights for practitioners and researchers alike. We delve into GAUDI’s capabilities for Transformers through systematic profiling, analysis, and optimization exploration. Our study bridges a research gap and offers a roadmap for optimizing Transformer-based model training on the GAUDI architecture.
papers.abstract_zh: Transformer 模型在各种机器学习任务中取得了显着的成功，但面临着高计算复杂性和资源需求的问题。在处理长序列和大数据集时，自注意力机制的二次复杂度进一步加剧了这些挑战。 Habana GAUDI 架构等专用人工智能硬件加速器为解决这些问题提供了一种有前途的解决方案。 GAUDI 具有矩阵乘法引擎 (MME) 和一组完全可编程的张量处理核心 (TPC)。本文探讨了使用 GAUDI 处理器加速基于 Transformer 的模型的未开发潜力，解决了该过程中的关键挑战。首先，我们对 MME 和 TPC 组件进行了全面的性能比较，阐明了它们的相对优势和劣势。其次，我们探索优化 MME 和 TPC 利用率的策略，为提高计算效率提供实用见解。第三，我们评估 Transformers 在 GAUDI 上的性能，特别是在处理长序列和发现性能瓶颈方面。最后，我们评估了两个基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型（LLM）在 GAUDI 上的端到端性能。这项工作的贡献包括对从业者和研究人员的实用见解。我们通过系统的剖析、分析和优化探索，深入研究 GAUDI 在 Transformers 方面的能力。我们的研究弥补了研究空白，并提供了在 GAUDI 架构上优化基于 Transformer 的模型训练的路线图。

papers.title: BGLS: A Python Package for the Gate-by-Gate Sampling Algorithm to Simulate Quantum Circuits.
papers.abstract: The classical simulation of quantum computers is in general a computationally hard problem. To emulate the behavior of realistic devices, it is sufficient to sample bitstrings from circuits. Recently, Ref. [5] introduced the so-called gate-by-gate sampling algorithm to sample bitstrings and showed it to be computationally favorable in many cases. Here we present bgls, a Python package which implements this sampling algorithm. bgls has native support for several states and is highly flexible for use with additional states. We show how to install and use bgls, discuss optimizations in the algorithm, and demonstrate its utility on several problems.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子计算机的经典模拟通常是一个计算难题。为了模拟现实设备的行为，从电路中采样位串就足够了。最近，参考文献。 [5]引入了所谓的逐门采样算法来对比特串进行采样，并表明它在许多情况下在计算上是有利的。在这里，我们介绍 bgls，一个实现此采样算法的 Python 包。 bgls 具有对多个状态的本机支持，并且对于与其他状态一起使用具有高度灵活性。我们展示了如何安装和使用 bgls，讨论算法的优化，并演示其在几个问题上的实用性。

papers.title: Big Data Assimilation: Real-time 30-second-refresh Heavy Rain Forecast Using Fugaku During Tokyo Olympics and Paralympics.
papers.abstract: Real-time 30-second-refresh numerical weather prediction (NWP) was performed with exclusive use of 11,580 nodes (~7%) of supercomputer Fugaku during Tokyo Olympics and Paralympics in 2021. Total 75,248 forecasts were disseminated in the 1-month period mostly stably with time-to-solution less than 3 minutes for 30-minute forecast. Japan's Big Data Assimilation (BDA) project developed the novel NWP system for precise prediction of hazardous rains toward solving the global climate crisis. Compared with typical 1-hour-refresh systems, the BDA system offered two orders of magnitude increase in problem size and revealed the effectiveness of 30-second refresh for highly nonlinear, rapidly evolving convective rains. To achieve the required time-to-solution for real-time 30-second refresh with high accuracy, the core BDA software incorporated single precision and enhanced parallel I/O with properly selected configurations of 1000 ensemble members and 500-m-mesh weather model. The massively parallel, I/O intensive real-time BDA computation demonstrated a promising future direction.
papers.abstract_zh: 2021 年东京奥运会和残奥会期间，独家使用超级计算机 Fugaku 的 11,580 个节点（约 7%）执行了实时 30 秒刷新数值天气预报 (NWP)。 1 个月内总共发布了 75,248 个预报，大部分稳定，30 分钟预报的解决时间小于 3 分钟。日本的大数据同化（BDA）项目开发了新型数值天气预报系统，用于精确预测危险降雨，以解决全球气候危机。与典型的 1 小时刷新系统相比，BDA 系统将问题规模增加了两个数量级，并揭示了 30 秒刷新对于高度非线性、快速演变的对流降雨的有效性。为了实现高精度实时 30 秒刷新所需的求解时间，核心 BDA 软件结合了单精度和增强型并行 I/O，以及正确选择的 1000 个集合成员和 500 米网格天气模型的配置。大规模并行、I/O 密集型实时 BDA 计算展示了一个有前途的未来方向。

papers.title: BLAD: Adaptive Load Balanced Scheduling and Operator Overlap Pipeline For Accelerating The Dynamic GNN Training.
papers.abstract: Dynamic graph networks are widely used for learning time-evolving graphs, but prior work on training these networks is inefficient due to communication overhead, long synchronization, and poor resource usage. Our investigation shows that communication and synchronization can be reduced by carefully scheduling the workload. And the execution order of operators in GNNs can be adjusted without hurting training convergence. We propose a system called BLAD to consider the above factors, comprising a two-level load scheduler and an overlap-aware topology manager. The scheduler allocates each snapshot group to a GPU, alleviating cross-GPU communication. The snapshots in a group are then carefully allocated to processes on a GPU, enabling overlap of compute-intensive NN operators and memory-intensive graph operators. The topology manager adjusts the operators' execution order to maximize the overlap. Experiments show that BLAD achieves 27.2% speed up on training time on average without affecting final accuracy, compared to state-of-the-art solutions.
papers.abstract_zh: 动态图网络广泛用于学习时间演化图，但由于通信开销、长时间同步和资源利用率低下，之前训练这些网络的工作效率低下。我们的调查表明，通过仔细安排工作量可以减少通信和同步。并且可以在不影响训练收敛的情况下调整 GNN 中算子的执行顺序。我们提出了一个名为 BLAD 的系统来考虑上述因素，包括一个两级负载调度程序和一个重叠感知拓扑管理器。调度程序将每个快照组分配给一个 GPU，从而减轻跨 GPU 通信。然后，组中的快照会被仔细分配给 GPU 上的进程，从而实现计算密集型 NN 运算符和内存密集型图运算符的重叠。拓扑管理器调整算子的执行顺序以最大化重叠。实验表明，与最先进的解决方案相比，BLAD 在不影响最终精度的情况下，训练时间平均加快了 27.2%。

papers.title: Breaking Boundaries: Distributed Domain Decomposition with Scalable Physics-Informed Neural PDE Solvers.
papers.abstract: Mosaic Flow is a novel domain decomposition method designed to scale physics-informed neural PDE solvers to large domains. Its unique approach leverages pre-trained networks on small domains to solve partial differential equations on large domains purely through inference, resulting in high reusability. This paper presents an end-to-end parallelization of Mosaic Flow, combining data parallel training and domain parallelism for inference on large-scale problems. By optimizing the network architecture and data parallel training, we significantly reduce the training time for learning the Laplacian operator to minutes on 32 GPUs. Moreover, our distributed domain decomposition algorithm enables scalable inferences for solving the Laplace equation on domains 4096× larger than the training domain, demonstrating strong scaling while maintaining accuracy on 32 GPUs. The reusability of Mosaic Flow, combined with the improved performance achieved through the distributed-memory algorithms, makes it a promising tool for modeling complex physical phenomena and accelerating scientific discovery.
papers.abstract_zh: Mosaic Flow 是一种新颖的域分解方法，旨在将物理信息神经偏微分方程求解器扩展到大域。其独特的方法利用小域上的预训练网络纯粹通过推理来求解大域上的偏微分方程，从而实现了高可重用性。本文提出了 Mosaic Flow 的端到端并行化，将数据并行训练和领域并行相结合，用于大规模问题的推理。通过优化网络架构和数据并行训练，我们将在 32 个 GPU 上学习拉普拉斯算子的训练时间显着减少到几分钟。此外，我们的分布式域分解算法支持可扩展的推理，可在比训练域大 4096 倍的域上求解拉普拉斯方程，在保持 32 个 GPU 上的准确性的同时，展现出强大的扩展能力。 Mosaic Flow 的可重用性，加上通过分布式内存算法实现的改进性能，使其成为建模复杂物理现象和加速科学发现的有前途的工具。

papers.title: Bringing Order to Sparsity: A Sparse Matrix Reordering Study on Multicore CPUs.
papers.abstract: Many real-world computations involve sparse data structures in the form of sparse matrices. A common strategy for optimizing sparse matrix operations is to reorder a matrix to improve data locality. However, it's not always clear whether reordering will provide benefits over the unordered matrix, as its effectiveness depends on several factors, such as structural features of the matrix, the reordering algorithm and the hardware that is used. This paper aims to establish the relationship between matrix reordering algorithms and the performance of sparse matrix operations. We thoroughly evaluate six different matrix reordering algorithms on 490 matrices across eight multicore architectures, focusing on the commonly used sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) kernel. We find that reordering based on graph partitioning provides better SpMV performance than the alternatives for a large majority of matrices, and that the resulting performance is explained through a combination of data locality and load balancing concerns.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多现实世界的计算涉及稀疏矩阵形式的稀疏数据结构。优化稀疏矩阵运算的常见策略是对矩阵重新排序以改善数据局部性。然而，并不总是清楚重新排序是否会比无序矩阵带来好处，因为其有效性取决于多个因素，例如矩阵的结构特征、重新排序算法和所使用的硬件。本文旨在建立矩阵重排序算法与稀疏矩阵运算性能之间的关系。我们在八个多核架构的 490 个矩阵上彻底评估了六种不同的矩阵重新排序算法，重点关注常用的稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 内核。我们发现基于图分区的重新排序比大多数矩阵的替代方案提供了更好的 SpMV 性能，并且结果性能是通过数据局部性和负载平衡问题的组合来解释的。

papers.title: Calculon: a methodology and tool for high-level co-design of systems and large language models.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a parameterized analytical performance model of transformer-based Large Language Models (LLMs) for guiding high-level algorithm-architecture codesign studies. This model derives from an extensive survey of performance optimizations that have been proposed for the training and inference of LLMs; the model's parameters capture application characteristics, the hardware system, and the space of implementation strategies. With such a model, we can systematically explore a joint space of hardware and software configurations to identify optimal system designs under given constraints, like the total amount of system memory. We implemented this model and methodology in a Python-based open-source tool called Calculon. Using it, we identified novel system designs that look significantly different from current inference and training systems, showing quantitatively the estimated potential to achieve higher efficiency, lower cost, and better scalability.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于 Transformer 的大型语言模型 (LLM) 的参数化分析性能模型，用于指导高级算法架构协同设计研究。该模型源自对针对法学硕士训练和推理提出的性能优化的广泛调查；该模型的参数捕获应用程序特征、硬件系统和实施策略的空间。通过这样的模型，我们可以系统地探索硬件和软件配置的联合空间，以确定给定约束（例如系统内存总量）下的最佳系统设计。我们在一个名为 Calculon 的基于 Python 的开源工具中实现了这个模型和方法。使用它，我们确定了与当前推理和训练系统显着不同的新颖系统设计，定量地显示了实现更高效率、更低成本和更好可扩展性的估计潜力。

papers.title: CARAT KOP: Towards Protecting the Core HPC Kernel from Linux Kernel Modules.
papers.abstract: Extending Linux through the kernel module interface can offer immense benefits and capabilities in high performance computing (HPC). These extensions can also be more readily deployed because Linux is the common, typically only, supported OS choice among supercomputing vendors. However, because Linux is monolithic, Linux kernel modules are free to read and write any address with kernel-level permissions. A poorly written—or untrustworthy—module can wreak havoc on the whole system. This unfortunately means that many production HPC systems often do not permit custom kernel modules to be inserted into the system, no matter the benefit.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过内核模块接口扩展 Linux 可以在高性能计算 (HPC) 方面提供巨大的优势和功能。这些扩展也可以更容易地部署，因为 Linux 是超级计算供应商中常见的、通常是唯一受支持的操作系统选择。然而，由于Linux是整体的，Linux内核模块可以自由地读写具有内核级权限的任何地址。编写不当或不值得信赖的模块可能会对整个系统造成严重破坏。不幸的是，这意味着许多生产 HPC 系统通常不允许将自定义内核模块插入到系统中，无论有什么好处。

papers.title: CaRV - Accelerating Program Optimization through Capture, Replay, Validate.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a new methodology and tool that speeds up the process of optimizing science and engineering programs. The tool, called CaRV (Capture, Replay, and Validate), enables users to experiment quickly with large applications, comparing individual program sections before and after optimizations in terms of efficiency and accuracy. Using language-level checkpointing techniques, CaRV captures the necessary data for replaying the experimental section as a separate execution unit after the code optimization and validating the optimization against the original program. The tool reduces the amount of time and resources spent on experimentation with long-running programs by up to two orders of magnitude, making program optimization more efficient and cost-effective.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的方法和工具，可以加快优化科学和工程项目的过程。该工具称为 CaRV（捕获、重放和验证），使用户能够快速试验大型应用程序，比较优化前后各个程序部分的效率和准确性。使用语言级检查点技术，CaRV 捕获必要的数据，以便在代码优化后将实验部分作为单独的执行单元重放，并根据原始程序验证优化。该工具可将长时间运行的程序实验所花费的时间和资源减少多达两个数量级，从而使程序优化更加高效且更具成本效益。

papers.title: Centralized provisioning of large language models for a research community.
papers.abstract: Local support for large language models (LLMs) in a research community can address unique technological and procedural challenges that arise in an academic setting. Platforms providing multi-GPU nodes, typically found in a centralized computational resource, such as a university datacenter, can manage the large memory footprint of the open-source LLMs. Customizations employing peripheral frameworks help extend the capabilities of these models. Further, the local implementation addresses the protection of researcher IP and control of restricted data sources. This report describes recent efforts toward provisioning this popular new tool and provides guidance for recreating our approach at Arizona State University.
papers.abstract_zh: 研究界对大型语言模型 (LLM) 的本地支持可以解决学术环境中出现的独特技术和程序挑战。提供多 GPU 节点的平台通常存在于集中式计算资源中，例如大学数据中心，可以管理开源 LLM 的大量内存占用。使用外围框架的定制有助于扩展这些模型的功能。此外，本地实施还解决了研究人员知识产权的保护和受限数据源的控制问题。本报告描述了最近为配置这种流行的新工具所做的努力，并为亚利桑那州立大学重新创建我们的方法提供了指导。

papers.title: Challenges and Opportunities in the Co-design of Convolutions and RISC-V Vector Processors.
papers.abstract: The RISC-V "V" extension introduces vector processing to the RISC-V architecture. Unlike most SIMD extensions, it supports long vectors which can result in significant improvement of multiple applications. In this paper, we present our ongoing research to implement and optimize a vectorized Winograd algorithm used in convolutional layers on RISC-V Vector(RISC-VV) processors. Our study identifies effective techniques for optimizing the kernels of Winograd on RISC-VV using intrinsic instructions, and showcases how certain instructions offer better performance. Our co-design findings suggest that the Winograd algorithm benefits from vector lengths up to 2048 bits and cache sizes up to 64MB.
papers.abstract_zh: RISC-V“V”扩展将矢量处理引入了 RISC-V 架构。与大多数 SIMD 扩展不同，它支持长向量，这可以显着改进多个应用程序。在本文中，我们介绍了我们正在进行的研究，以实现和优化 RISC-V Vector (RISC-VV) 处理器上卷积层中使用的矢量化 Winograd 算法。我们的研究确定了使用内在指令优化 RISC-VV 上的 Winograd 内核的有效技术，并展示了某些指令如何提供更好的性能。我们的协同设计结果表明，Winograd 算法受益于高达 2048 位的向量长度和高达 64MB 的缓存大小。

papers.title: Characterizing the Performance of Triangle Counting on Graphcore's IPU Architecture.
papers.abstract: In recent years, we have seen an emergence of novel spatial architectures to accelerate domain-specific workloads like Machine Learning. There is a need to investigate their performance characteristics for traditional HPC workloads for their tighter integration with current and future heterogeneous compute resources. In this work, we implement, optimize and evaluate a parallel algorithm for Triangle Counting for graphs in Bulk Synchronous Parallel (BSP) model for Graphcore’s IPU architecture as well as discuss lessons learned. This study demonstrates IPU’s competency in handling such irregular workloads by providing an average speedup of up to 5.3x over NVIDIA A100 GPU on real-world datasets.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，我们看到了新颖的空间架构的出现，可以加速机器学习等特定领域的工作负载。有必要研究它们对于传统 HPC 工作负载的性能特征，以便与当前和未来的异构计算资源更紧密地集成。在这项工作中，我们在 Graphcore 的 IPU 架构的批量同步并行 (BSP) 模型中实现、优化和评估了图形三角形计数的并行算法，并讨论了经验教训。这项研究证明了 IPU 在处理此类不规则工作负载方面的能力，在实际数据集上提供的平均加速比 NVIDIA A100 GPU 高达 5.3 倍。

papers.title: Charliecloud's layer-free, Git-based container build cache.
papers.abstract: A popular approach to deploying scientific applications in high performance computing (HPC) is Linux containers, which package an application and all its dependencies as a single unit. This image is built by interpreting instructions in a machine-readable recipe, which is faster with a build cache that stores instruction results for re-use. The standard approach (used e.g. by Docker and Podman) is a many-layered union filesystem, encoding differences between layers as tar archives. Our experiments show this performs similarly to layered caches on both build time and disk usage, with a considerable advantage for many-instruction recipes. Our approach also has structural advantages: better diff format, lower cache overhead, and better file de-duplication. These results show that a Git-based cache for layer-free container implementations is not only possible but may outperform the layered approach on important dimensions.
papers.abstract_zh: 在高性能计算 (HPC) 中部署科学应用程序的一种流行方法是 Linux 容器，它将应用程序及其所有依赖项打包为一个单元。该映像是通过解释机器可读配方中的指令来构建的，通过存储指令结果以供重用的构建缓存，速度更快。标准方法（例如由 Docker 和 Podman 使用）是一个多层联合文件系统，将层之间的差异编码为 tar 存档。我们的实验表明，这在构建时间和磁盘使用方面与分层缓存的性能相似，对于多指令配方具有相当大的优势。我们的方法还具有结构优势：更好的 diff 格式、更低的缓存开销和更好的文件去重。这些结果表明，用于无层容器实现的基于 Git 的缓存不仅是可能的，而且在重要维度上可能优于分层方法。

papers.title: CHARM-SYCL: New Unified Programming Environment for Multiple Accelerator Types.
papers.abstract: Addressing performance portability across diverse accelerator architectures has emerged as a major challenge in the development of application and programming systems for high-performance computing environments. Although recent programming systems that focus on performance portability have significantly improved productivity in an effort to meet this challenge, the problem becomes notably more complex when compute nodes are equipped with multiple accelerator types—each with unique performance attributes, optimal data layout, and binary formats. To navigate the intricacies of multi-accelerator programming, we propose CHARM-SYCL as an extension of our CHARM multi-accelerator execution environment [27]. This environment will combine our SYCL-based performance-portability programming front end with a back end for extremely heterogeneous architectures as implemented with the IRIS runtime from Oak Ridge National Laboratory. Our preliminary evaluation indicates potential productivity boost and reasonable performance compared to vendor-specific programming system and runtimes.
papers.abstract_zh: 解决不同加速器架构之间的性能可移植性已成为高性能计算环境的应用程序和编程系统开发中的主要挑战。尽管最近注重性能可移植性的编程系统已经显着提高了生产力，以应对这一挑战，但当计算节点配备多种加速器类型（每种加速器类型都具有独特的性能属性、最佳数据布局和二进制格式）时，问题变得更加复杂。为了解决多加速器编程的复杂性，我们建议 CHARM-SYCL 作为我们的 CHARM 多加速器执行环境的扩展 [27]。该环境将把我们基于 SYCL 的性能可移植性编程前端与极端异构架构的后端结合起来，如橡树岭国家实验室的 IRIS 运行时所实现的那样。我们的初步评估表明，与供应商特定的编程系统和运行时相比，潜在的生产力提升和合理的性能。

papers.title: Checkpoint/Restart for CUDA Kernels.
papers.abstract: In HPC clusters, it has become common to employ Checkpoint/Restart (C/R), that is, saving the execution state of applications in order to restore their computational progress at a later point in time. The benefits of this technique for clusters include more flexibility when reacting to changing workloads and an increased fault tolerance. While many clusters already benefit from C/R tools for traditional CPU applications, there is a lack of comparable tools enabling preemptive and transparent C/R for heterogeneous computing, where applications execute partly on accelerator devices, such as s. This is despite the increasing use of s as accelerators in High-Performance Computing (HPC) clusters. Therefore, we propose a novel C/R tool that enables saving the execution state of CUDA kernels, thus allowing preemptive C/R of applications without the need to wait for kernels to finish. We show that full-featured C/R for NVIDIA s is possible despite the proprietary nature of the hardware and software of these devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 在 HPC 集群中，采用检查点/重启 (C/R) 已变得很常见，即保存应用程序的执行状态，以便在以后的某个时间点恢复其计算进度。这种技术对集群的好处包括在响应不断变化的工作负载时具有更大的灵活性以及更高的容错能力。虽然许多集群已经受益于传统 CPU 应用程序的 C/R 工具，但缺乏支持异构计算的抢占式和透明 C/R 的类似工具，其中应用程序部分在加速器设备（例如 s）上执行。尽管在高性能计算 (HPC) 集群中越来越多地使用 s 作为加速器，但情况仍然如此。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的 C/R 工具，可以保存 CUDA 内核的执行状态，从而允许抢占式 C/R 应用程序，而无需等待内核完成。我们证明，尽管这些设备的硬件和软件具有专有性质，但 NVIDIA 的全功能 C/R 是可能的。

papers.title: Choosing the Best Parallelization and Implementation Styles for Graph Analytics Codes: Lessons Learned from 1106 Programs.
papers.abstract: Graph analytics has become a major workload in recent years. The underlying core algorithms tend to be irregular and data dependent, making them challenging to parallelize. Yet, these algorithms can be implemented and parallelized in many ways for CPUs and even more ways for GPUs. We took 6 key graph algorithms and created hundreds of CUDA, OpenMP, and parallel C++ versions of each of them, most of which have never been described or studied. To determine which parallelization and implementation styles work well and under what circumstances, we evaluated the resulting 1106 programs on 2 GPUs and 2 CPUs using 5 input graphs. Our results show which styles and combinations perform well and which ones should be avoided. We found that choosing the wrong implementation style can yield over a 10× slowdown on average. The worst combinations of styles can cost 6 orders of magnitude in performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，图分析已成为一项主要工作量。底层核心算法往往是不规则的且依赖于数据，这使得它们难以并行化。然而，这些算法可以通过 CPU 的多种方式实现和并行化，GPU 的实现和并行化方式甚至更多。我们采用了 6 种关键图算法，并为每种算法创建了数百个 CUDA、OpenMP 和并行 C++ 版本，其中大多数从未被描述或研究过。为了确定哪种并行化和实现方式以及在什么情况下效果良好，我们使用 5 个输入图在 2 个 GPU 和 2 个 CPU 上评估了生成的 1106 个程序。我们的结果表明哪些样式和组合表现良好，哪些样式和组合应该避免。我们发现，选择错误的实现方式平均会导致速度降低 10 倍以上。最差的样式组合可能会导致性能降低 6 个数量级。

papers.title: Cloud Computing to Enable Wearable-Driven Longitudinal Hemodynamic Maps.
papers.abstract: Tracking hemodynamic responses to treatment and stimuli over long periods remains a grand challenge. Moving from established single-heartbeat technology to longitudinal profiles would require continuous data describing how the patient's state evolves, new methods to extend the temporal domain over which flow is sampled, and high-throughput computing resources. While personalized digital twins can accurately measure 3D hemodynamics over several heartbeats, state-of-the-art methods would require hundreds of years of wallclock time on leadership scale systems to simulate one day of activity. To address these challenges, we propose a cloud-based, parallel-in-time framework leveraging continuous data from wearable devices to capture the first 3D patient-specific, longitudinal hemodynamic maps. We demonstrate the validity of our method by establishing ground truth data for 750 beats and comparing the results. Our cloud-based framework is based on an initial fixed set of simulations to enable the wearable-informed creation of personalized longitudinal hemodynamic maps.
papers.abstract_zh: 长期跟踪对治疗和刺激的血流动力学反应仍然是一个巨大的挑战。从已建立的单心跳技术转向纵向剖面将需要描述患者状态如何演变的连续数据、扩展流采样时域的新方法以及高吞吐量计算资源。虽然个性化数字双胞胎可以准确测量几次心跳的 3D 血流动力学，但最先进的方法需要领导规模系统上数百年的挂钟时间来模拟一天的活动。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一个基于云的并行时间框架，利用可穿戴设备的连续数据来捕获第一个 3D 患者特定的纵向血流动力学图。我们通过建立 750 次心跳的真实数据并比较结果来证明我们方法的有效性。我们的基于云的框架基于一组初始固定模拟，以实现基于可穿戴设备的个性化纵向血流动力学图的创建。

papers.title: Clover: Toward Sustainable AI with Carbon-Aware Machine Learning Inference Service.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a solution to the challenge of mitigating carbon emissions from hosting large-scale machine learning (ML) inference services. ML inference is critical to modern technology products, but it is also a significant contributor to carbon footprint. We introduce, Clover, a carbon-friendly ML inference service runtime system that balances performance, accuracy, and carbon emissions through mixed-quality models and GPU resource partitioning. Our experimental results demonstrate that Clover is effective in substantially reducing carbon emissions while maintaining high accuracy and meeting service level agreement (SLA) targets.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种解决方案，以应对通过托管大规模机器学习 (ML) 推理服务来减少碳排放的挑战。机器学习推理对于现代技术产品至关重要，但它也是碳足迹的重要贡献者。我们推出了 Clover，这是一种碳友好型 ML 推理服务运行时系统，通过混合质量模型和 GPU 资源分区来平衡性能、准确性和碳排放。我们的实验结果表明，Clover 可以有效大幅减少碳排放，同时保持高精度并满足服务水平协议 (SLA) 目标。

papers.title: Co-design Hardware and Algorithm for Vector Search.
papers.abstract: Vector search has emerged as the foundation for large-scale information retrieval and machine learning systems, with search engines like Google and Bing processing tens of thousands of queries per second on petabyte-scale document datasets by evaluating vector similarities between encoded query texts and web documents. As performance demands for vector search systems surge, accelerated hardware offers a promising solution in the post-Moore's Law era. We introduce FANNS, an end-to-end and scalable vector search framework on FPGAs. Given a user-provided recall requirement on a dataset and a hardware resource budget, FANNS automatically co-designs hardware and algorithm, subsequently generating the corresponding accelerator. The framework also supports scale-out by incorporating a hardware TCP/IP stack in the accelerator. FANNS attains up to 23.0× and 37.2× speedup compared to FPGA and CPU baselines, respectively, and demonstrates superior scalability to GPUs, achieving 5.5× and 7.6× speedup in median and 95th percentile (P95) latency within an eight-accelerator configuration. The remarkable performance of FANNS lays a robust groundwork for future FPGA integration in data centers and AI supercomputers.
papers.abstract_zh: 矢量搜索已成为大规模信息检索和机器学习系统的基础，Google 和 Bing 等搜索引擎通过评估编码查询文本和 Web 文档之间的矢量相似性，每秒处理 PB 级文档数据集上数万个查询。随着矢量搜索系统性能需求的激增，加速硬件在后摩尔定律时代提供了一个有前途的解决方案。我们介绍 FANNS，这是一种基于 FPGA 的端到端且可扩展的矢量搜索框架。给定用户提供的数据集召回要求和硬件资源预算，FANNS 自动协同设计硬件和算法，随后生成相应的加速器。该框架还通过在加速器中合并硬件 TCP/IP 堆栈来支持横向扩展。与 FPGA 和 CPU 基准相比，FANNS 分别实现了高达 23.0 倍和 37.2 倍的加速，并展示了对 GPU 的卓越可扩展性，在 8 个加速器配置中，中值和第 95 个百分点 (P95) 延迟实现了 5.5 倍和 7.6 倍的加速。 FANNS 的卓越性能为未来 FPGA 在数据中心和 AI 超级计算机中的集成奠定了坚实的基础。

papers.title: Comparative evaluation of bandwidth-bound applications on the Intel Xeon CPU MAX Series.
papers.abstract: In this paper we explore the performance of Intel® Xeon® MAX CPU Series, representing the most significant new variation upon the classical CPU architecture since the Intel® Xeon Phi™ Processor. Given the availability of a large on-package high-bandwidth memory, the bandwidth-to-compute ratio has significantly shifted compared to other CPUs on the market. Since a large fraction of HPC workloads are sensitive to the available bandwidth, we explore how this architecture performs on a selection of HPC proxies and applications that are mostly sensitive to bandwidth, and how it compares to the previous 3rd generation Intel® Xeon® Scalable processors (codenamed Ice Lake) and an AMD EPYC™ 7003 Series Processor with 3D V-Cache Technology (codenamed Milan-X). We explore performance with different parallel implementations (MPI, MPI+OpenMP, MPI+SYCL), compiled with different compilers and flags, and executed with or without hyperthreading. We show how performance bottlenecks are shifted from bandwidth to communication latencies for some applications, and demonstrate speedups compared to the previous generation between 2.0x-4.3x.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探讨了英特尔® 至强® MAX CPU 系列的性能，该系列代表了自英特尔® 至强融核™ 处理器以来经典 CPU 架构最重要的新变种。考虑到大容量封装高带宽内存的可用性，与市场上的其他 CPU 相比，带宽与计算之比发生了显着变化。由于大部分 HPC 工作负载对可用带宽都很敏感，因此我们探讨了该架构在对带宽最敏感的 HPC 代理和应用程序上的执行情况，以及它与之前的第三代 Intel® Xeon® 可扩展处理器（代号为 Ice Lake）和采用 3D V 缓存技术的 AMD EPYC™ 7003 系列处理器（代号为 Milan-X）的比较。我们探索不同并行实现（MPI、MPI+OpenMP、MPI+SYCL）的性能，使用不同的编译器和标志进行编译，并使用或不使用超线程执行。我们展示了某些应用程序的性能瓶颈如何从带宽转移到通信延迟，并展示了与上一代相比在 2.0 倍到 4.3 倍之间的加速速度。

papers.title: Comparing a Naive and a Tree-Based N-Body Algorithm using Different Standard SYCL Implementations on Various Hardware.
papers.abstract: N-body algorithms aim to calculate the interactions between n different bodies with the goal of obtaining their trajectories. Algorithms that solve the n-body problem can leverage significant amounts of parallelism. Today, s are commonly used besides s for the execution of parallel algorithms. However, targeting several hardware platforms at once often requires using different programming languages. In this work, we have implemented a naive and tree-based Barnes-Hut n-body algorithm using SYCL to target s and s with the same programming language. We compare both algorithms on heterogeneous hardware platforms and for different SYCL implementations, with respect to their runtime behavior and support for several performance optimizations. Our results show that some optimizations reveal unexpected behavior for different SYCL implementations. And even though data center s have a clear performance advantage for the naive algorithm, surprisingly consumer s offer competitive runtimes for the Barnes-Hut algorithm.
papers.abstract_zh: N-body algorithms aim to calculate the interactions between n different bodies with the goal of obtaining their trajectories.解决 n 体问题的算法可以利用大量的并行性。如今，除了 s 之外，s 还广泛用于执行并行算法。然而，同时针对多个硬件平台通常需要使用不同的编程语言。在这项工作中，我们使用 SYCL 实现了一种基于树的 Barnes-Hut n 体算法，以使用相同的编程语言来定位 s 和 s。我们比较了异构硬件平台上和不同 SYCL 实现上的两种算法的运行时行为和对多种性能优化的支持。我们的结果表明，一些优化揭示了不同 SYCL 实现的意外行为。尽管数据中心对于朴素算法具有明显的性能优势，但令人惊讶的是，消费者为 Barnes-Hut 算法提供了有竞争力的运行时间。

papers.title: Comparing Power Signatures of HPC Workloads: Machine Learning vs Simulation.
papers.abstract: Power is a limiting factor for supercomputers limiting their scale and operation. Characterizing the power signatures of different application types can enable data centers to operate efficiently, even when power constrained. This paper investigates power profiles of diverse scientific applications, spanning both traditional simulations and modern machine learning (ML) running on the Perlmutter supercomputer at the National Energy Research Scientific Computing Center (NERSC). Our findings indicate that traditional simulations typically consume more power on average than ML workloads. Furthermore, ML applications exhibit periodic power fluctuations attributed to epoch transitions during training. Finally, we discuss the potential implications of the research insights toward automatic demand response (ADR) and considerations for designing future systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 功率是超级计算机限制其规模和运行的限制因素。表征不同应用类型的功率特征可以使数据中心即使在功率受限的情况下也能高效运行。本文研究了不同科学应用的功率分布，涵盖传统模拟和在国家能源研究科学计算中心 (NERSC) 的 Perlmutter 超级计算机上运行的现代机器学习 (ML)。我们的研究结果表明，传统模拟通常比机器学习工作负载平均消耗更多电量。此外，机器学习应用程序会表现出由于训练期间历元转换而导致的周期性功率波动。最后，我们讨论了自动需求响应（ADR）研究见解的潜在影响以及设计未来系统的注意事项。

papers.title: Cross-Facility Orchestration of Electrochemistry Experiments and Computations.
papers.abstract: Instrument-computing ecosystems supporting automated electrochemical workflows typically require the integration of disparate instruments such as syringe pump, fraction collector, and potentiostat, all connected to an electrochemical cell. These specialized instruments with custom software and interfaces are not typically designed for network integration and remote automation. We developed a networked ecosystem of these instruments and computing platforms, which includes software to enable automated workflow orchestration from remote computers. Specifically, we developed Python wrappers of APIs and custom Pyro client-server modules to support remote operation of these instruments over the ecosystem network. Herein, we describe a specific workflow for generating and validating voltammogram (I-V) measurements of an electrolyte solution pumped into the electrochemical cell. We demonstrate the orchestration of this workflow which is composed using a Jupyter notebook and executed on a remote computer.
papers.abstract_zh: 支持自动化电化学工作流程的仪器计算生态系统通常需要集成不同的仪器，例如注射泵、馏分收集器和恒电位仪，所有这些仪器都连接到电化学电池。这些带有定制软件和接口的专用仪器通常不是为网络集成和远程自动化而设计的。我们开发了这些仪器和计算平台的网络生态系统，其中包括支持远程计算机自动工作流程编排的软件。具体来说，我们开发了 API 的 Python 包装器和自定义 Pyro 客户端-服务器模块，以支持通过生态系统网络对这些仪器进行远程操作。在此，我们描述了用于生成和验证泵入电化学电池的电解质溶液的伏安图 (I-V) 测量的具体工作流程。我们演示了此工作流程的编排，该工作流程使用 Jupyter 笔记本组成并在远程计算机上执行。

papers.title: cuAlign: Scalable Network Alignment on GPU Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Given two graphs, the objective of network alignment is to find a one-to-one mapping of vertices in one graph (A) to vertices in the other (B), such that the number of overlaps is maximized. We say that edges (i, j) ∈ A and (i′, j′) ∈ B are overlapped if i is mapped to i′ and j is mapped to j′. Network alignment is an important optimization problem with several applications in bioinformatics, computer vision and ontology matching. Since it is an NP-hard problem, efficient heuristics and scalable implementations are necessary. However, a combination of combinatorial and algebraic kernels within the network alignment algorithm poses significant hurdles for parallelization. Further, load imbalance and irregular DRAM traffic limit achievable performance on GPUs. In this work, we introduce a novel framework (cuAlign) that combines intra-network proximity using node (vertex) embedding, sparsification for computational efficiency, and belief propagation (BP) and approximate weighted matching for alignment. We demonstrate qualitative improvements up to over state-of-the-art approaches. We provide a scalable implementation targeting modern GPU accelerators. Our novel approach identifies and exploits unique structural properties of the BP-based algorithm and employs code fusion to reduce data movement between different steps of the algorithm. Using a diverse set of inputs, we demonstrate up to 19 × speedup for belief propagation, 3 × speedup for approximate weighted matching, and 15 × total, relative to a state-of-the-art multi-threaded implementation.
papers.abstract_zh: 给定两个图，网络对齐的目标是找到一个图 (A) 中的顶点到另一图 (B) 中的顶点的一对一映射，从而使重叠数量最大化。如果 i 映射到 i′ 并且 j 映射到 j′，则我们说边 (i, j) ∈ A 和 (i′, j′) ε B 重叠。网络对齐是一个重要的优化问题，在生物信息学、计算机视觉和本体匹配中有多种应用。由于这是一个 NP 难题，因此有效的启发式方法和可扩展的实现是必要的。然而，网络对齐算法中组合核和代数核的组合给并行化带来了重大障碍。此外，负载不平衡和不规则的 DRAM 流量限制了 GPU 的性能。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的框架（cuAlign），它结合了使用节点（顶点）嵌入的网络内邻近度、计算效率的稀疏化以及用于对齐的置信传播（BP）和近似加权匹配。我们展示了超过最先进方法的质量改进。我们提供针对现代 GPU 加速器的可扩展实施。我们的新颖方法识别并利用基于 BP 的算法的独特结构特性，并采用代码融合来减少算法不同步骤之间的数据移动。使用不同的输入集，相对于最先进的多线程实现，我们展示了信念传播高达 19 倍的加速、近似加权匹配的 3 倍加速以及总计 15 倍的加速。

papers.title: CuPBoP-AMD: Extending CUDA to AMD Platforms.
papers.abstract: The proliferation of artificial intelligence applications has underscored the need for increased portability among graphic processing units (GPUs) from different vendors. With CUDA as one of the most popular GPU programming languages, CuPBoP (CUDA for Parallelized and Broad-range Processors) aims to provide NVIDIA’s proprietary CUDA language support to a variety of GPU and CPU platforms by translating CUDA programs at the LLVM/NVVM IR level. Our work extends CuPBoP to AMD GPUs as CuPBoP-AMD. CuPBoP-AMD is a CUDA translator that translates CUDA programs at NVVM IR level to HIP-compatible IR that can run on AMD GPUs. Currently, CuPBoP-AMD translates a broader range of applications in the Rodinia benchmark suite while maintaining approximately equal performance than the existing state-of-the-art AMD-developed translator, HIPIFY, without requiring programmer intervention.
papers.abstract_zh: 人工智能应用程序的激增凸显了提高不同供应商的图形处理单元 (GPU) 之间的可移植性的需求。 CUDA 作为最流行的 GPU 编程语言之一，CuPBoP（CUDA for Parallelized and Broad-range Processors）旨在通过在 LLVM/NVVM IR 级别翻译 CUDA 程序，为各种 GPU 和 CPU 平台提供 NVIDIA 专有的 CUDA 语言支持。我们的工作将 CuPBoP 扩展到 AMD GPU，称为 CuPBoP-AMD。 CuPBoP-AMD 是一款 CUDA 转换器，可将 NVVM IR 级别的 CUDA 程序转换为可在 AMD GPU 上运行的 HIP 兼容 IR。目前，CuPBoP-AMD 在 Rodinia 基准测试套件中翻译了更广泛的应用程序，同时保持与现有最先进的 AMD 开发的翻译器 HIPIFY 大致相同的性能，而无需程序员干预。

papers.title: cuSZp: An Ultra-fast GPU Error-bounded Lossy Compression Framework with Optimized End-to-End Performance.
papers.abstract: Modern scientific applications and supercomputing systems are generating large amounts of data in various fields, leading to critical challenges in data storage footprints and communication times. To address this issue, error-bounded GPU lossy compression has been widely adopted, since it can reduce the volume of data within a customized threshold on data distortion. In this work, we propose an ultra-fast error-bounded GPU lossy compressor cuSZp. Specifically, cuSZp computes the linear recurrences with hierarchical parallelism to fuse the massive computation into one kernel, drastically improving the end-to-end throughput. In addition, cuSZp adopts a block-wise design along with a lightweight fixed-length encoding and bit-shuffle inside each block such that it achieves high compression ratios and data quality. Our experiments on NVIDIA A100 GPU with 6 representative scientific datasets demonstrate that cuSZp can achieve an ultra-fast end-to-end throughput (95.53x compared with cuSZ) along with a high compression ratio and high reconstructed data quality.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代科学应用和超级计算系统在各个领域产生大量数据，导致数据存储空间和通信时间面临严峻挑战。为了解决这个问题，错误限制的 GPU 有损压缩已被广泛采用，因为它可以在定制的数据失真阈值内减少数据量。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种超快误差有限 GPU 有损压缩器 cuSZp。具体来说，cuSZp 通过分层并行计算线性递归，将大量计算融合到一个内核中，从而极大地提高了端到端吞吐量。此外，cuSZp采用分块设计以及每个块内部的轻量级定长编码和位洗牌，从而实现高压缩比和数据质量。我们在 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上使用 6 个代表性科学数据集进行的实验表明，cuSZp 可以实现超快的端到端吞吐量（与 cuSZ 相比为 95.53 倍）以及高压缩比和高重建数据质量。

papers.title: CXL Memory as Persistent Memory for Disaggregated HPC: A Practical Approach.
papers.abstract: In the landscape of High-Performance Computing (HPC), the quest for efficient and scalable memory solutions remains paramount. The advent of Compute Express Link (CXL) introduces a promising avenue with its potential to function as a Persistent Memory (PMem) solution in the context of disaggregated HPC systems. This paper presents a comprehensive exploration of CXL memory’s viability as a candidate for PMem, supported by physical experiments conducted on cutting-edge multi-NUMA nodes equipped with CXL-attached memory prototypes. Our study not only benchmarks the performance of CXL memory but also illustrates the seamless transition from traditional PMem programming models to CXL, reinforcing its practicality.
papers.abstract_zh: 在高性能计算 (HPC) 领域，寻求高效且可扩展的内存解决方案仍然至关重要。 Compute Express Link (CXL) 的出现引入了一条有前途的途径，它具有在分解 HPC 系统环境中充当持久内存 (PMem) 解决方案的潜力。本文对 CXL 内存作为 PMem 候选者的可行性进行了全面的探索，并得到了在配备 CXL 连接内存原型的尖端多 NUMA 节点上进行的物理实验的支持。我们的研究不仅对 CXL 内存的性能进行了基准测试，还说明了从传统 PMem 编程模型到 CXL 的无缝过渡，增强了其实用性。

papers.title: Dask-Extended External Tasks for HPC/ML In transit Workflows.
papers.abstract: In situ workflows are inescapable to fully leverage exascale architectures. They can be complex to build, however, because simulation and data analytics come from two different software ecosystems with their own paradigms and programming models. This work extends the deisa bridging model between MPI+X simulations and distributed task-based analytics; it introduces the concept of external tasks to support the description of analytics graphs spanning multiple timesteps ahead of time while improving scalability. This new approach leads to a straightforward support for contracts between the simulation and analytics graph to limit the data transferred to that actually analyzed in a given execution. We implement this approach using Dask and MPI and evaluate it using an end-to-end in-transit workflow that uses an unsupervised ML model for dimensionality reduction. We compare our work with plain Dask postprocessing and with the previous version of deisa. Our work performs better, up to × 7 for the simulation and × 3 for the analytics compared with deisa, and is × 18 less costly compared with plain Dask—all of these with similar development efforts.
papers.abstract_zh: 现场工作流程是充分利用百亿亿级架构所不可避免的。然而，它们的构建可能很复杂，因为模拟和数据分析来自两个不同的软件生态系统，具有自己的范式和编程模型。这项工作扩展了 MPI+X 模拟和基于分布式任务的分析之间的 deisa 桥接模型；它引入了外部任务的概念，以支持提前跨越多个时间步的分析图的描述，同时提高可扩展性。这种新方法可以直接支持模拟和分析图之间的契约，以限制传输到给定执行中实际分析的数据。我们使用 Dask 和 MPI 实现此方法，并使用端到端在途工作流程对其进行评估，该工作流程使用无监督 ML 模型进行降维。我们将我们的工作与普通 Dask 后处理以及 deisa 的先前版本进行比较。与 deisa 相比，我们的工作表现更好，模拟最高可达 × 7，分析最高可达 × 3，并且与普通 Dask 相比成本低 × 18 — 所有这些都具有类似的开发工作。

papers.title: DASP: Specific Dense Matrix Multiply-Accumulate Units Accelerated General Sparse Matrix-Vector Multiplication.
papers.abstract: Sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) plays a key role in computational science and engineering, graph processing, and machine learning applications. Much work on SpMV was devoted to resolving problems such as random access to the vector x and unbalanced load. However, we have experimentally found that the computation of inner products still occupies much overhead in the SpMV operation, which has been largely ignored in existing work.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 在计算科学与工程、图形处理和机器学习应用中发挥着关键作用。 SpMV 的许多工作致力于解决诸如随机访问向量 x 和不平衡负载等问题。然而，我们通过实验发现，内积的计算在SpMV运算中仍然占据很大的开销，这在现有的工作中很大程度上被忽略了。

papers.title: Data Flow Lifecycles for Optimizing Workflow Coordination.
papers.abstract: A critical performance challenge in distributed scientific workflows is coordinating tasks and data flows on distributed resources. To guide these decisions, this paper introduces data flow lifecycle analysis. Workflows are commonly represented using directed acyclic graphs (DAGs). Data flow lifecycles (DFL) enrich task DAGs with data objects and properties that describe data flow and how tasks interact with that flow. Lifecycles enable analysis from several important perspectives: task, data, and data flow. We describe representation, measurement, analysis, visualization, and opportunity identification for DFLs. Our measurement is both distributed and scalable, using space that is constant per data file. We use lifecycles and opportunity analysis to reason about improved task placement and reduced data movement for five scientific workflows with different characteristics. Case studies show improvements of 15×, 1.9×, and 10--30×. Our work is implemented in the DataLife tool.
papers.abstract_zh: 分布式科学工作流程中的一个关键性能挑战是协调分布式资源上的任务和数据流。为了指导这些决策，本文引入了数据流生命周期分析。工作流通常使用有向无环图 (DAG) 来表示。数据流生命周期 (DFL) 通过描述数据流以及任务如何与该流交互的数据对象和属性来丰富任务 DAG。生命周期支持从几个重要角度进行分析：任务、数据和数据流。我们描述了 DFL 的表示、测量、分析、可视化和机会识别。我们的测量是分布式且可扩展的，每个数据文件使用恒定的空间。我们使用生命周期和机会分析来推理五个具有不同特征的科学工作流程的改进任务放置和减少数据移动。案例研究显示提高了 15 倍、1.9 倍和 10--30 倍。我们的工作是在 DataLife 工具中实现的。

papers.title: Data Race Detection Using Large Language Models.
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are demonstrating significant promise as an alternate strategy to facilitate analyses and optimizations of high-performance computing programs, circumventing the need for resource-intensive manual tool creation. In this paper, we explore a novel LLM-based data race detection approach combining prompting engineering and fine-tuning techniques. We create a dedicated dataset named DRB-ML, which is derived from DataRaceBench, with fine-grain labels showing the presence of data race pairs and their associated variables, line numbers, and read/write information. DRB-ML is then used to evaluate representative LLMs and fine-tune open-source ones. Our experiment shows that LLMs can be a viable approach to data race detection. However, they still cannot compete with traditional data race detection tools when we need detailed information about variable pairs causing data races.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 作为一种替代策略展现出了巨大的前景，可以促进高性能计算程序的分析和优化，从而避免创建资源密集型手动工具的需要。在本文中，我们探索了一种新颖的基于 LLM 的数据竞争检测方法，该方法结合了提示工程和微调技术。我们创建了一个名为 DRB-ML 的专用数据集，该数据集源自 DataRaceBench，具有细粒度标签，显示数据竞争对及其关联变量、行号和读/写信息的存在。然后使用 DRB-ML 评估代表性的法学硕士并对开源法学硕士进行微调。我们的实验表明，LLM 可以成为数据竞争检测的可行方法。然而，当我们需要有关引起数据竞争的变量对的详细信息时，它们仍然无法与传统的数据竞争检测工具竞争。

papers.title: Data-Driven Discovery of Anchor Points for PDC Content.
papers.abstract: The Parallel and Distributed Computing community has been interested in integrating PDC content into early CS curriculum to prime the students for more advanced materials and build a workforce able to leverage advanced computing infrastructure. To deploy this strategy at scale, it is important to identify anchor points in early CS courses where we can insert PDC content.
papers.abstract_zh: 并行和分布式计算社区一直有兴趣将 PDC 内容整合到早期的计算机科学课程中，以便为学生提供更先进的材料并建立一支能够利用先进计算基础设施的劳动力队伍。为了大规模部署此策略，重要的是在早期 CS 课程中确定我们可以插入 PDC 内容的锚点。

papers.title: DDStore: Distributed Data Store for Scalable Training of Graph Neural Networks on Large Atomistic Modeling Datasets.
papers.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) are a class of Deep Learning models used in designing atomistic materials for effective screening of large chemical spaces. To ensure robust prediction, GNN models must be trained on large volumes of atomistic data on leadership class supercomputers. Even with the advent of modern architectures that consist of multiple storage layers that include node-local NVMe devices in addition to device memory for caching large datasets, extreme-scale model training faces I/O challenges at scale.
papers.abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 是一类深度学习模型，用于设计原子材料以有效筛选大型化学空间。为了确保稳健的预测，GNN 模型必须在领先级超级计算机上接受大量原子数据的训练。即使出现了由多个存储层组成的现代架构，其中除了用于缓存大型数据集的设备内存之外，还包括节点本地 NVMe 设备，超大规模模型训练仍面临着大规模的 I/O 挑战。

papers.title: Delivering Rules-Based Workflows for Science.
papers.abstract: Rules-based workflow scheduling is a recently developed method for constructing an analysis structure, in a far more dynamic manner than traditional graph based systems. However, rules-based workflows are still in their relative infancy and lack the breadth of features available in traditional scientific workflow systems. This paper will address some of these missing features by introducing the new meow_base library for generic construction of rules-based systems while meeting the requirements of a scientific workflow management system. It will also present two example workflows, showing how rules-based systems can better enable analysis loops or human-in-the-loop interactions than more traditional workflow systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于规则的工作流调度是最近开发的一种用于构建分析结构的方法，其方式比传统的基于图形的系统更加动态。然而，基于规则的工作流程仍处于相对初级阶段，缺乏传统科学工作流程系统中可用的广泛功能。本文将通过引入新的 meow_base 库来解决其中一些缺失的功能，该库用于基于规则的系统的通用构建，同时满足科学工作流程管理系统的要求。它还将展示两个示例工作流程，展示基于规则的系统如何比更传统的工作流程系统更好地实现分析循环或人机交互。

papers.title: Democratizing HPC Access and Use with Knowledge Graphs.
papers.abstract: The field of High-Performance Computing (HPC) is undergoing rapid evolution, with an expanding and diverse user base harnessing its unparalleled computational capabilities. As the range of HPC applications grows, newcomers to the field are faced with the daunting task of optimizing their applications for efficient execution on HPC systems. Traditional documentation, often spanning dozens of pages, is cumbersome for finding answers and ill-suited for integration with emerging conversational AI-powered user interfaces like chatbots. Addressing this challenge, we propose a novel HPC ontology crafted to encapsulate HPC runtime relations in a scalable fashion. Our proposed ontology not only facilitates the transfer and querying of this knowledge but also serves as a foundational pillar for our AI-powered Speech Assistant Interface (SAI)[13]. This ensures reproducibility, reliability, and optimal performance when executing tasks. In this paper, we elucidate the relationships and properties underpinning our ontology and showcase how users can interact with knowledge graphs based on our proposed ontology to derive insights.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 领域正在快速发展，不断扩大且多样化的用户群利用其无与伦比的计算能力。随着 HPC 应用程序范围的扩大，该领域的新手面临着优化其应用程序以在 HPC 系统上高效执行的艰巨任务。传统文档通常长达数十页，对于寻找答案来说很麻烦，并且不适合与聊天机器人等新兴的对话式人工智能用户界面集成。为了解决这一挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的 HPC 本体，旨在以可扩展的方式封装 HPC 运行时关系。我们提出的本体不仅促进了这些知识的传输和查询，而且还作为我们人工智能驱动的语音助手界面（SAI）的基础支柱[13]。这确保了执行任务时的可重复性、可靠性和最佳性能。在本文中，我们阐明了支撑我们本体的关系和属性，并展示了用户如何根据我们提出的本体与知识图进行交互以获取见解。

papers.title: Demonstrating Cross-Facility Data Processing at Scale With Laue Microdiffraction.
papers.abstract: In February and April 2023 live, at-scale data processing demonstrations were conducted between the Advanced Photon Source (APS), a synchrotron light source, and the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility (ALCF). These tests were run as part of a novel beamline technique: coded aperture laue micro-diffraction. This technique requires a significant amount of compute to decode appeture patterns embedded in the detector stream. An autonomous system was able to send data to ALCF during an experiment, utilize 50 nodes of the Polaris supercomputer to process 6-12 hour scans, and return the data back to the APS within 12-15 minutes behind the detector. With scan points arriving every 72 seconds, the system kept up with the beamline, potentially enabling in-experiment analysis. The data processing system utilizes Globus infrastructure and an on-demand queue to dynamically acquire nodes on Polaris. The underlying reconstruction algorithms were parallelized via MPI and accelerated with custom CUDA kernels.
papers.abstract_zh: 2023 年 2 月和 4 月，先进光子源 (APS)、同步加速器光源和阿贡领导计算设施 (ALCF) 之间进行了现场大规模数据处理演示。这些测试是作为新型光束线技术的一部分进行的：编码孔径劳埃微衍射。该技术需要大量的计算来解码嵌入在检测器流中的孔径图案。自主系统能够在实验期间向 ALCF 发送数据，利用 Polaris 超级计算机的 50 个节点处理 6-12 小时的扫描，并在探测器后面 12-15 分钟内将数据返回到 APS。扫描点每 72 秒到达一次，系统可以跟上光束线，从而有可能实现实验中的分析。数据处理系统利用 Globus 基础设施和按需队列动态获取 Polaris 上的节点。底层重建算法通过 MPI 并行化，并通过自定义 CUDA 内核进行加速。

papers.title: Demonstration of Portable Performance of Scientific Machine Learning on High Performance Computing Systems.
papers.abstract: With the largest datasets to date and a diverse set of discoveries to be made, the current generation of scientific analyses are well poised to utilize artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) on high performance computing (HPC) resources. Like never before, these workflows can be written in one portable language, python, which thanks to highly-optimized ML libraries achieves excellent cross-platform performance with little to no intervention by the user. In this demonstration, we explore the performance of several scientific AI/ML applications across leading HPC resources and highlight best practices for portable performance.
papers.abstract_zh: 凭借迄今为止最大的数据集和一系列多样化的发现，当前一代的科学分析已准备好在高性能计算 (HPC) 资源上利用人工智能 (AI) 和机器学习 (ML)。这些工作流程前所未有地可以用一种可移植语言 Python 编写，得益于高度优化的 ML 库，它可以在几乎不需要用户干预的情况下实现出色的跨平台性能。在此演示中，我们跨领先的 HPC 资源探索了多个科学 AI/ML 应用程序的性能，并重点介绍了便携式性能的最佳实践。

papers.title: Demystifying and Mitigating Cross-Layer Deficiencies of Soft Error Protection in Instruction Duplication.
papers.abstract: Soft errors are prevalent in modern High-Performance Computing (HPC) systems, resulting in silent data corruptions (SDCs), compromising system reliability. Instruction duplication is a widely used software-based protection technique against SDCs. Existing instruction duplication techniques are mostly implemented at LLVM level and may suffer from low SDC coverage at assembly level. In this paper, we evaluate instruction duplication at both LLVM and assembly levels. Our study shows that existing instruction duplication techniques have protection deficiency at assembly level and are usually over-optimistic in the protection. We investigate the root-causes of the protection deficiency and propose a mitigation technique, Flowery, to solve the problem. Our evaluation shows that Flowery can effectively protect programs from SDCs evaluated at assembly level.
papers.abstract_zh: 软错误在现代高性能计算 (HPC) 系统中普遍存在，导致静默数据损坏 (SDC)，从而损害系统可靠性。指令重复是一种广泛使用的基于软件的 SDC 保护技术。现有的指令复制技术大多是在 LLVM 级别实现的，并且可能会受到汇编级别的低 SDC 覆盖率的影响。在本文中，我们评估了 LLVM 和汇编级别的指令重复。我们的研究表明，现有的指令复制技术在汇编级别的保护方面存在缺陷，并且通常在保护方面过于乐观。我们调查了保护缺陷的根本原因，并提出了一种缓解技术 Flowery 来解决该问题。我们的评估表明，Flowery 可以有效地保护程序免受在汇编级别评估的 SDC 的影响。

papers.title: Design and Analysis of the Network Software Stack of an Asynchronous Many-task System - The LCI parcelport of HPX.
papers.abstract: The HPX asynchronous many-task runtime system has been using TCP and MPI as its communication backends (parcelports). We developed a new HPX parcelport using a new communication library, the Lightweight Communication Interface (LCI) that was designed to better match the needs of systems such as HPX. We evaluate its performance with various microbenchmarks and a real-world astrophysics application, Octo-Tiger. Compared to the best configuration of the MPI parcelport, microbenchmarks show that the new LCI parcelport improves the message rate by up to 30x and decreases latencies by up to 5x. It also reduces the total execution time of Octo-Tiger by up to 1.175x compared to the best configuration of the MPI parcelport and up to 13.6x compared to the same configuration of the MPI parcelport. We discuss the performance impacts of different design choices.
papers.abstract_zh: HPX 异步多任务运行时系统一直使用 TCP 和 MPI 作为其通信后端 (parcelports)。我们使用新的通信库（轻量级通信接口 (LCI)）开发了新的 HPX Parcelport，该库旨在更好地满足 HPX 等系统的需求。我们使用各种微基准和现实世界的天体物理应用程序 Octo-Tiger 来评估其性能。与 MPI Parcelport 的最佳配置相比，微基准测试表明，新的 LCI Parcelport 将消息速率提高了 30 倍，并将延迟降低了 5 倍。与 MPI Parcelport 的最佳配置相比，Octo-Tiger 的总执行时间最多可缩短 1.175 倍，与相同配置的 MPI Parcelport 相比最多可缩短 13.6 倍。我们讨论不同设计选择对性能的影响。

papers.title: Design Considerations and Analysis of Multi-Level Erasure Coding in Large-Scale Data Centers.
papers.abstract: Multi-level erasure coding (MLEC) has seen large deployments in the field, but there is no in-depth study of design considerations for MLEC at scale. In this paper, we provide comprehensive design considerations and analysis of MLEC at scale. We introduce the design space of MLEC in multiple dimensions, including various code parameter selections, chunk placement schemes, and various repair methods. We quantify their performance and durability, and show which MLEC schemes and repair methods can provide the best tolerance against independent/correlated failures and reduce repair network traffic by orders of magnitude. To achieve this, we use various evaluation strategies including simulation, splitting, dynamic programming, and mathematical modeling. We also compare the performance and durability of MLEC with other EC schemes such as SLEC and LRC and show that MLEC can provide high durability with higher encoding throughput and less repair network traffic over both SLEC and LRC.
papers.abstract_zh: 多级纠删码 (MLEC) 已在该领域得到大规模部署，但尚未对大规模 MLEC 的设计考虑因素进行深入研究。 In this paper, we provide comprehensive design considerations and analysis of MLEC at scale.我们从多个维度介绍了MLEC的设计空间，包括各种代码参数选择、块放置方案和各种修复方法。我们量化了它们的性能和耐用性，并展示了哪些 MLEC 方案和修复方法可以提供针对独立/相关故障的最佳容错能力，并将修复网络流量减少几个数量级。为了实现这一目标，我们使用了各种评估策略，包括模拟、分裂、动态规划和数学建模。我们还将 MLEC 与其他 EC 方案（例如 SLEC 和 LRC）的性能和耐用性进行了比较，并表明 MLEC 可以通过 SLEC 和 LRC 提供更高的编码吞吐量和更少的修复网络流量来提供高耐用性。

papers.title: DGAP: Efficient Dynamic Graph Analysis on Persistent Memory.
papers.abstract: Dynamic graphs, featuring continuously updated vertices and edges, have grown in importance for numerous real-world applications. To accommodate this, graph frameworks, particularly their internal data structures, must support both persistent graph updates and rapid graph analysis simultaneously, leading to complex designs to orchestrate 'fast but volatile' and 'persistent but slow' storage devices. Emerging persistent memory technologies, such as Optane DCPMM, offer a promising alternative to simplify the designs by providing data persistence, low latency, and high IOPS together. In light of this, we propose DGAP, a framework for efficient dynamic graph analysis on persistent memory. Unlike traditional dynamic graph frameworks, which combine multiple graph data structures (e.g., edge list or adjacency list) to achieve the required performance, DGAP utilizes a single mutable Compressed Sparse Row (CSR) graph structure with new designs for persistent memory to construct the framework. Specifically, DGAP introduces a per-section edge log to reduce write amplification on persistent memory; a per-thread undo log to enable high-performance, crash-consistent rebalancing operations; and a data placement schema to minimize in-place updates on persistent memory. Our extensive evaluation results demonstrate that DGAP can achieve up to 3.2× better graph update performance and up to 3.77× better graph analysis performance compared to state-of-the-art dynamic graph frameworks for persistent memory, such as XPGraph, LLAMA, and GraphOne.
papers.abstract_zh: 动态图具有不断更新的顶点和边，对于许多现实世界的应用程序来说越来越重要。为了适应这一点，图形框架，特别是其内部数据结构，必须同时支持持久图形更新和快速图形分析，从而导致复杂的设计来协调“快速但易失”和“持久但缓慢”的存储设备。 Optane DCPMM 等新兴持久内存技术通过同时提供数据持久性、低延迟和高 IOPS，为简化设计提供了一种有前景的替代方案。鉴于此，我们提出了 DGAP，一种针对持久内存进行高效动态图分析的框架。与传统的动态图框架结合多个图数据结构（例如边列表或邻接列表）来实现所需的性能不同，DGAP 利用单个可变压缩稀疏行（CSR）图结构和新的持久内存设计来构建框架。具体来说，DGAP引入了每段边缘日志来减少持久内存上的写放大；每个线程的撤消日志可实现高性能、崩溃一致的重新平衡操作；以及数据放置模式，以最大限度地减少持久内存上的就地更新。我们广泛的评估结果表明，与最先进的持久内存动态图框架（例如 XPGraph、LLAMA 和 GraphOne）相比，DGAP 可以实现高达 3.2 倍的图形更新性能和高达 3.77 倍的图形分析性能。

papers.title: Disk Failure Trends in Alpine Storage System.
papers.abstract: Large-scale HPC systems demand extensive disk-based storage for data generated by HPC applications, necessitating scalable reliability, availability, and failure management. Extracted failure data from HPC storage offers valuable insights for preventing and managing failures, spanning understanding storage robustness, guiding system design and deployment, and creating durable data protection schemes. This paper introduces a failure dataset from OLCF’s Summit supercomputer’s file system, Alpine, encompassing 4000+ events over 2.75 years from 32000+ disks. Before analysis, we delve into Alpine’s components and introduce IBM Spectrum Scale technology, then assess collected data for failure distribution and burst correlations. We infer that, proximity to enclosure fan modules heightens disk failure rates. Also, burst failure analysis highlights 1/3rd of failures occurring in bursts, with 90% non-spatially correlated, impacting multiple racks.
papers.abstract_zh: 大型 HPC 系统需要大量基于磁盘的存储来存储 HPC 应用程序生成的数据，因此需要可扩展的可靠性、可用性和故障管理。从 HPC 存储中提取的故障数据为预防和管理故障、了解存储稳健性、指导系统设计和部署以及创建持久的数据保护方案提供了宝贵的见解。本文介绍了来自 OLCF Summit 超级计算机的文件系统 Alpine 的故障数据集，其中包含 2.75 年来来自 32000 多个磁盘的 4000 多个事件。在分析之前，我们深入研究 Alpine 的组件并介绍 IBM Spectrum Scale 技术，然后评估收集的数据的故障分布和突发相关性。我们推断，靠近机柜风扇模块会增加磁盘故障率。此外，突发故障分析强调了 1/3 的突发故障，其中 90% 不具有空间相关性，影响多个机架。

papers.title: Distributed Data Locality-Aware Job Allocation.
papers.abstract: Scheduling tasks close to their associated data is crucial in distributed systems to minimize network traffic and latency. Some Big Data frameworks like Apache Spark employ locality functions and job allocation algorithms to minimize network traffic and execution times. However, these frameworks rely on centralized mechanisms, where the master node determines data locality by allocating tasks to available workers with minimal data transfer time, ignoring variances in worker configurations and availability. To address these limitations, we propose a decentralized approach to locality-driven scheduling that grants workers autonomy in the job allocation process while factoring in workers’ configurations, such as network and CPU speed differences. Our approach is developed and evaluated on Crossflow, a distributed stream processing platform with data-aware independent worker nodes. Preliminary evaluation experiments indicate that our approach can yield up to 3.57x faster execution times when compared to the baseline centralized approach where the master controls data locality.
papers.abstract_zh: 在分布式系统中，将任务安排在靠近其关联数据的位置对于最大限度地减少网络流量和延迟至关重要。 Apache Spark 等一些大数据框架采用局部函数和作业分配算法来最大限度地减少网络流量和执行时间。然而，这些框架依赖于集中式机制，其中主节点通过以最少的数据传输时间将任务分配给可用的工作节点来确定数据局部性，忽略工作节点配置和可用性的差异。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种局部驱动调度的去中心化方法，该方法赋予工人在作业分配过程中的自主权，同时考虑工人的配置，例如网络和 CPU 速度差异。我们的方法是在 Crossflow 上开发和评估的，Crossflow 是一个具有数据感知独立工作节点的分布式流处理平台。初步评估实验表明，与主设备控制数据局部性的基线集中式方法相比，我们的方法可以将执行时间提高 3.57 倍。

papers.title: DistTGL: Distributed Memory-Based Temporal Graph Neural Network Training.
papers.abstract: Memory-based Temporal Graph Neural Networks are powerful tools in dynamic graph representation learning and have demonstrated superior performance in many real-world applications. However, their node memory favors smaller batch sizes to capture more dependencies in graph events and needs to be maintained synchronously across all trainers. As a result, existing frameworks suffer from accuracy loss when scaling to multiple GPUs. Even worse, the tremendous overhead of synchronizing the node memory makes it impractical to deploy the solution in GPU clusters. In this work, we propose DistTGL --- an efficient and scalable solution to train memory-based TGNNs on distributed GPU clusters. DistTGL has three improvements over existing solutions: an enhanced TGNN model, a novel training algorithm, and an optimized system. In experiments, DistTGL achieves near-linear convergence speedup, outperforming the state-of-the-art single-machine method by 14.5% in accuracy and 10.17× in training throughput.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于内存的时态图神经网络是动态图表示学习的强大工具，并且在许多实际应用中表现出了卓越的性能。然而，它们的节点内存倾向于较小的批量大小，以捕获图形事件中的更多依赖关系，并且需要在所有训练器之间同步维护。因此，现有框架在扩展到多个 GPU 时会出现精度损失。更糟糕的是，同步节点内存的巨大开销使得在 GPU 集群中部署该解决方案变得不切实际。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DistTGL——一种在分布式 GPU 集群上训练基于内存的 TGNN 的高效且可扩展的解决方案。 DistTGL 相对于现有解决方案有三项改进：增强的 TGNN 模型、新颖的训练算法和优化的系统。在实验中，DistTGL 实现了近线性收敛加速，其准确率比最先进的单机方法高 14.5%，训练吞吐量高 10.17 倍。

papers.title: Domain-Specific Energy Modeling for Drug Discovery and Magnetohydrodynamics Applications.
papers.abstract: Over the past few years, the adoption of energy efficiency techniques in modern computer systems is becoming increasingly relevant for sustainable computing. A well-known power management software technique for energy-efficient computing is frequency scaling which modulates the device frequency to explore the energy-performance trade-off. To achieve energy savings, a frequency tuning phase is required because different applications can have different energy and runtime behaviors depending on the frequency setting. Machine learning models can be used to predict energy and runtime, and therefore optimal frequency configurations, based on static or dynamic features extracted from the target application. While general-purpose energy models can be very accurate for a wide range of applications, their accuracy can be limited by the specific input of the target application. We present an energy characterization that spans the fields of drug discovery and magnetohydrodynamics by using two real-world applications as case studies: LiGen and Cronos. Additionally, to overcome the limitations of general-purpose approaches, we define two domain-specific energy models, which enhance the general-purpose energy models by leveraging the target application’s input parameter to increase the final accuracy. Experimental results show that for both applications, domain-specific models achieve a ten times lower error compared to the general-purpose energy models.
papers.abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，现代计算机系统中节能技术的采用与可持续计算变得越来越相关。用于节能计算的一种众所周知的电源管理软件技术是频率缩放，它可以调节设备频率以探索能源性能权衡。为了实现节能，需要频率调谐阶段，因为不同的应用根据频率设置可能具有不同的能量和运行时间行为。机器学习模型可用于根据从目标应用提取的静态或动态特征来预测能量和运行时间，从而预测最佳频率配置。虽然通用能源模型对于各种应用来说都非常准确，但其准确性可能受到目标应用的特定输入的限制。我们通过使用两个现实世界的应用作为案例研究：LiGen 和 Cronos，提出了跨越药物发现和磁流体动力学领域的能量表征。此外，为了克服通用方法的局限性，我们定义了两个特定领域的能量模型，它们通过利用目标应用程序的输入参数来提高最终精度，从而增强通用能量模型。实验结果表明，对于这两种应用，特定领域模型的误差比通用能源模型低十倍。

papers.title: DPS: Adaptive Power Management for Overprovisioned Systems.
papers.abstract: Maximizing performance under a power budget is essential for HPC systems and has inspired the development of many power management frameworks. These can be broadly characterized into two groups: model-based and stateless. Model-based frameworks use machine learning to achieve good performance under a power budget but are highly dependent on the quality of the learned model and the data used to train it. Stateless frameworks are more robust and require no training, but are generally lower performance. In this paper, we propose a new framework that does not require a model, but does track a small amount of state in the form of recent power dynamics. We implement this idea and test it on a public cloud running both Spark and HPC jobs. We find when total power demand is low, our framework achieves equivalent performance to prior work, but when power demand is high it achieves mean 8% performance improvement (with no reliance on a learned model).
papers.abstract_zh: 在功耗预算下最大化性能对于 HPC 系统至关重要，并且激发了许多电源管理框架的开发。这些可以大致分为两类：基于模型的和无状态的。基于模型的框架使用机器学习在功率预算下实现良好的性能，但高度依赖于学习模型的质量和用于训练模型的数据。无状态框架更健壮，不需要培训，但通常性能较低。在本文中，我们提出了一个不需要模型的新框架，但确实以最近的功率动态形式跟踪少量状态。我们实现了这个想法，并在运行 Spark 和 HPC 作业的公共云上对其进行了测试。我们发现，当总功耗较低时，我们的框架实现了与之前工作相当的性能，但当功耗较高时，它实现了平均 8% 的性能提升（不依赖于学习模型）。

papers.title: DPU Offloading Programming with the OpenMP API.
papers.abstract: Data processing units (DPUs) as network co-processors are an emerging trend in our community, with plenty of opportunities yet to be explored. These have been generally used as domain-specific accelerators transparent to application developers; In the HPC field, DPUs have been used as MPI accelerators, but also to offload some tasks from the general-purpose processor. However, the latter required application developers to deploy MPI ranks in the DPUs, as if they were remote (weak) compute nodes, hence considerably hindering programmability. The wide adoption of OpenMP as the threading model in the HPC arena, along with that of GPU accelerators, is making OpenMP offloading to GPUs a wide trend for HPC applications. In this paper we introduce, for the first time in the literature, OpenMP offloading support for network co-processor DPUs. We present our design in LLVM to support OpenMP standard offloading semantics and discuss the programming productivity advantages with respect to the existing MPI-based programming model. We also provide the corresponding performance analysis demonstrating competitive results in comparison with the MPI baseline.
papers.abstract_zh: 作为网络协处理器的数据处理单元 (DPU) 是我们社区中的一个新兴趋势，还有大量的机会有待探索。这些通常被用作对应用程序开发人员透明的特定领域加速器；在HPC领域，DPU已被用作MPI加速器，而且还可以从通用处理器上卸载一些任务。然而，后者要求应用程序开发人员在 DPU 中部署 MPI 等级，就好像它们是远程（弱）计算节点一样，因此极大地阻碍了可编程性。 OpenMP 作为 HPC 领域的线程模型以及 GPU 加速器的广泛采用，使得 OpenMP 卸载到 GPU 成为 HPC 应用程序的广泛趋势。在本文中，我们在文献中首次介绍了对网络协处理器 DPU 的 OpenMP 卸载支持。我们在 LLVM 中展示了我们的设计，以支持 OpenMP 标准卸载语义，并讨论了相对于现有的基于 MPI 的编程模型的编程生产力优势。我们还提供相应的性能分析，展示与 MPI 基线相比的竞争结果。

papers.title: Dragon Proxy Runtimes and Multi-system Workflows.
papers.abstract: We present a new method for obtaining proxy access to remote instances of the Dragon distributed runtime. Dragon is a composable distributed runtime for managing dynamic processes, high-performance communication objects, memory, and data at scale that is based on an abstraction of a distributed system. Proxy access to a remote instance of the Dragon runtime makes it possible for the client program to expand and contract its compute resources by extending into a remote instance of Dragon as needed. Compute to be run on a remote Dragon runtime is mediated by a Python object that acts as a proxy, which we call a proxy runtime. These proxy runtimes, combined with the ability to start and tear down remote Dragon runtimes both programmatically and via the command line interface, make a number of challenging workflows simple to program. Such workflows include edge-to-cloud scientific workflows, batch services, and scientific applications based on Python multiprocessing. The ability to program complex workflows on systems that span clusters, scientific instruments, and cloud resources is critical to the development of post-exascale applications, infrastructures and frameworks.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法来获取对 Dragon 分布式运行时远程实例的代理访问。 Dragon 是一个可组合的分布式运行时，用于基于分布式系统的抽象来大规模管理动态进程、高性能通信对象、内存和数据。对 Dragon 运行时的远程实例的代理访问使客户端程序可以根据需要扩展到 Dragon 的远程实例来扩展和收缩其计算资源。在远程 Dragon 运行时上运行的计算是通过充当代理的 Python 对象来协调的，我们将其称为代理运行时。这些代理运行时，与以编程方式和通过命令行界面启动和拆除远程 Dragon 运行时的能力相结合，使许多具有挑战性的工作流程变得易于编程。此类工作流程包括边缘到云的科学工作流程、批处理服务以及基于 Python 多处理的科学应用程序。在跨越集群、科学仪器和云资源的系统上对复杂工作流程进行编程的能力对于后百亿亿次应用程序、基础设施和框架的开发至关重要。

papers.title: Dynamic Memory Provisioning on Disaggregated HPC Systems.
papers.abstract: Disaggregated memory is under investigation as a way to break the rigid boundaries between node memory hierarchies in order to provide memory as a system-wide pooled resource. The resource manager allocates the system’s disaggregated memory to jobs, based on the memory requirements defined by the user at job submission time. It is hard for the user to know the job’s precise peak memory footprint, and prior work has shown that users have an incentive to overestimate their needs. This overestimation leads to a significant overallocation of memory, and the majority of the physical memory in the system is wasted. This paper presents a way to reclaim much of this overallocated memory. We extend the Slurm job scheduler to dynamically reallocate memory, according to the job’s current memory footprint. We enhance an existing Slurm simulator to model this situation and combine publicly available traces to model an HPC system on up to 1490 nodes. Our results show that the dynamic memory provisioning approach increases the throughput per dollar by up to 38%, compared to a system with static allocation of disaggregated memory.
papers.abstract_zh: 分解内存正在被研究作为打破节点内存层次结构之间严格界限的一种方法，以便将内存提供为系统范围的池化资源。资源管理器根据用户在作业提交时定义的内存需求，将系统的分解内存分配给作业。用户很难知道作业的精确峰值内存占用量，并且之前的工作表明用户有动机高估自己的需求。这种高估会导致内存严重过度分配，系统中的大部分物理内存都被浪费了。本文提出了一种回收大部分过度分配内存的方法。我们扩展了 Slurm 作业调度程序，以根据作业当前的内存占用动态地重新分配内存。我们增强了现有的 Slurm 模拟器来模拟这种情况，并结合公开可用的跟踪来对多达 1490 个节点上的 HPC 系统进行建模。我们的结果表明，与静态分配分解内存的系统相比，动态内存配置方法将每美元的吞吐量提高了 38%。

papers.title: Dynamic Selective Protection of Sparse Iterative Solvers via ML Prediction of Soft Error Impacts.
papers.abstract: Soft errors occur frequently on large computing platforms due to the increasing scale and complexity of HPC systems. Various resilience techniques (e.g., checkpointing, ABFT, and replication) have been proposed to protect scientific applications from soft errors at different levels. Among them, system-level replication often involves duplicating or even triplicating the entire computation, thus resulting in high resilience overhead. This paper proposes dynamic selective protection for sparse iterative solvers, in particular for the Preconditioned Conjugate Gradient (PCG) solver, at the system level to reduce the resilience overhead. For this method, we leverage machine learning (ML) to predict the impact of soft errors that strike different elements of a key computation (i.e., sparse matrix-vector multiplication) at different iterations of the solver. Based on the result of the prediction, we design a dynamic strategy to selectively protect those elements that would result in a large performance degradation if struck by soft errors. An experimental evaluation demonstrates that our dynamic protection strategy is able to reduce the resilience overhead compared to existing algorithms.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于 HPC 系统的规模和复杂性不断增加，大型计算平台上经常出现软错误。人们提出了各种弹性技术（例如检查点、ABFT 和复制）来保护科学应用程序免受不同级别的软错误的影响。其中，系统级复制往往涉及到整个计算的重复甚至三倍，从而导致较高的弹性开销。本文提出了在系统级别对稀疏迭代求解器（特别是预条件共轭梯度（PCG）求解器）进行动态选择性保护，以减少弹性开销。对于这种方法，我们利用机器学习 (ML) 来预测软错误的影响，这些软错误在求解器的不同迭代中对关键计算的不同元素（即稀疏矩阵向量乘法）造成影响。根据预测结果，我们设计了一种动态策略来选择性地保护那些如果受到软错误攻击会导致性能大幅下降的元素。实验评估表明，与现有算法相比，我们的动态保护策略能够降低弹性开销。

papers.title: EasyScale: Elastic Training with Consistent Accuracy and Improved Utilization on GPUs.
papers.abstract: Distributed synchronized GPU training is commonly used for deep learning. The resource constraint of using a fixed number of GPUs makes large-scale training jobs suffer from long queuing time for resource allocation, and lowers the cluster utilization. Adapting to resource elasticity can alleviate this but often introduces inconsistent model accuracy, due to lacking of capability to decouple model training procedure from resource allocation. We propose EasyScale, an elastic training system that achieves consistent model accuracy under resource elasticity for both homogeneous and heterogeneous GPUs. EasyScale preserves the data-parallel training behaviors strictly, traces the consistency-relevant factors carefully, utilizes the deep learning characteristics for EasyScaleThread abstraction and fast context-switching. To utilize heterogeneous cluster, EasyScale dynamically assigns workers based on the intra-/inter-job schedulers, minimizing load imbalance and maximizing aggregated job throughput. Deployed in an online serving cluster, EasyScale powers the training jobs to utilize idle GPUs opportunistically, improving overall cluster utilization by 62.1%.
