papers.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 有望彻底改变我们进行科学研究的方式。然而，模型的复杂性和预训练成本都阻碍了更广泛的科学界的有效采用。确定合适的科学用例、找到模型和数据大小之间的最佳平衡以及扩大模型训练是需要解决的最紧迫的问题。在这项研究中，我们提供了针对科学研究用例构建和使用基于法学硕士的基础模型的实用解决方案。我们对法学硕士在科学研究中的有效性进行了端到端的检查，包括它们的扩展行为和对第一台百兆级超级计算机 Frontier 的计算要求。我们还开发了一套名为 FORGE 的开放基础模型并向科学界发布，该模型具有多达 26B 的参数，使用来自超过 2 亿篇科学文章的 257B 代币，其性能与其他最先进的同类模型相当或优于其他模型。我们已经展示了 FORGE 在科学下游任务中的使用和有效性。我们的研究建立了可应用于各个领域的最佳实践，以利用法学硕士进行科学发现。

papers.title: Fortran performance optimisation and auto-parallelisation by leveraging MLIR-based domain specific abstractions in Flang.
papers.abstract: MLIR has become popular since it was open sourced in 2019. A sub-project of LLVM, the flexibility provided by MLIR to represent Intermediate Representations (IR) as dialects at different abstraction levels, to mix these, and to leverage transformations between dialects provides opportunities for automated program optimisation and parallelisation. In addition to general purpose compilers built upon MLIR, domain specific abstractions have also been developed.
papers.abstract_zh: MLIR 自 2019 年开源以来一直很受欢迎。作为 LLVM 的子项目，MLIR 提供的灵活性可将中间表示 (IR) 表示为不同抽象级别的方言、混合这些以及利用方言之间的转换，为自动化程序优化和并行化提供了机会。除了基于 MLIR 构建的通用编译器之外，还开发了特定领域的抽象。

papers.title: Frontier: Exploring Exascale.
papers.abstract: As the US Department of Energy (DOE) computing facilities began deploying petascale systems in 2008, DOE was already setting its sights on exascale. In that year, DARPA published a report on the feasibility of reaching exascale. The report authors identified several key challenges in the pursuit of exascale including power, memory, concurrency, and resiliency. That report informed the DOE's computing strategy for reaching exascale. With the deployment of Oak Ridge National Laboratory's Frontier supercomputer, we have officially entered the exascale era. In this paper, we discuss Frontier's architecture, how it addresses those challenges, and describe some early application results from Oak Ridge Leadership Computing Facility's Center of Excellence and the Exascale Computing Project.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着美国能源部 (DOE) 计算设施于 2008 年开始部署千万亿次系统，DOE 已将目光投向百万亿亿次。同年，DARPA 发布了一份关于达到百亿亿次尺度可行性的报告。该报告的作者指出了追求百万兆级计算的几个关键挑战，包括功耗、内存、并发性和弹性。该报告为美国能源部制定了达到百亿亿次计算的计算策略提供了信息。随着橡树岭国家实验室Frontier超级计算机的部署，我们正式进入了百亿亿次时代。在本文中，我们讨论了 Frontier 的架构、它如何应对这些挑战，并描述了橡树岭领导计算设施卓越中心和百亿亿次级计算项目的一些早期应用结果。

papers.title: FROOM: A Framework of Operators for OTF2 Modification.
papers.abstract: In recent years, High Performance Computing (HPC) has become increasingly important for many industries and research areas besides ‘classic’ applications. As new domains emerge, applications, implementations and frameworks become more diverse. Generic performance analysis tools often cannot keep up with the development speed of new approaches for workload distribution, offloading, and communication. Some of the new approaches employ their own performance monitoring, which is difficult to integrate into generic tools designed for traditional HPC. Performance measurements often result in a collection of separate performance logs that logically form a unit but cannot intuitively be investigated together with established performance tools. In this paper, we present a tool library that can be used to combine separate performance logs and separately recorded metrics into one single performance log, enabling investigation of such performance data as a unit. Use cases from Big Data processing and AI show the broad applicability of our approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，除了“经典”应用之外，高性能计算 (HPC) 对于许多行业和研究领域也变得越来越重要。随着新领域的出现，应用程序、实现和框架变得更加多样化。通用性能分析工具通常无法跟上工作负载分配、卸载和通信新方法的开发速度。一些新方法采用自己的性能监控，很难集成到为传统 HPC 设计的通用工具中。性能测量通常会产生一组单独的性能日志，这些日志在逻辑上形成一个单元，但无法与已建立的性能工具一起直观地进行调查。在本文中，我们提出了一个工具库，可用于将单独的性能日志和单独记录的指标合并为一个性能日志，从而能够将此类性能数据作为一个单元进行调查。大数据处理和人工智能的用例表明我们的方法具有广泛的适用性。

papers.title: FuzzyFlow: Leveraging Dataflow To Find and Squash Program Optimization Bugs.
papers.abstract: The current hardware landscape and application scale is driving performance engineers towards writing bespoke optimizations. Verifying such optimizations, and generating minimal failing cases, is important for robustness in the face of changing program conditions, such as inputs and sizes. However, isolation of minimal test-cases from existing applications and generating new configurations are often difficult due to side effects on the system state, mostly related to dataflow. This paper introduces FuzzyFlow: a fault localization and test case extraction framework designed to test program optimizations. We leverage dataflow program representations to capture a fully reproducible system state and area-of-effect for optimizations to enable fast checking for semantic equivalence. To reduce testing time, we design an algorithm for minimizing test inputs, trading off memory for recomputation. We demonstrate FuzzyFlow on example use cases in real-world applications where the approach provides up to 528 times faster optimization testing and debugging compared to traditional approaches.
papers.abstract_zh: 当前的硬件格局和应用规模正在推动性能工程师编写定制优化。验证此类优化并生成最少的失败案例对于面对不断变化的程序条件（例如输入和大小）时的稳健性非常重要。然而，由于对系统状态的副作用（主要与数据流相关），将最小测试用例与现有应用程序隔离并生成新配置通常很困难。本文介绍了 FuzzyFlow：一个旨在测试程序优化的故障定位和测试用例提取框架。我们利用数据流程序表示来捕获完全可重现的系统状态和优化效果区域，从而能够快速检查语义等效性。为了减少测试时间，我们设计了一种算法来最小化测试输入，权衡内存以进行重新计算。我们在实际应用程序中的示例用例中演示了 FuzzyFlow，与传统方法相比，该方法提供的优化测试和调试速度提高了 528 倍。

papers.title: GPU Acceleration in Unikernels Using Cricket GPU Virtualization.
papers.abstract: Today, large compute clusters increasingly move towards heterogeneous architectures by employing accelerators, such as GPUs, to realize ever-increasing performance. To achieve maximum performance on these architectures, applications have to be tailored to the available hardware by using special APIs to interact with the hardware resources, such as the CUDA APIs for NVIDIA GPUs. Simultaneously, unikernels emerge as a solution for the increasing overhead introduced by the complexity of modern operating systems and their inability to optimize for specific application profiles. Unikernels allow for better static code checking and enable optimizations impossible with monolithic kernels, yielding more robust and faster programs. Despite this, there is a lack of support for using GPUs in unikernels. Due to the proprietary nature of the CUDA APIs, direct support for interacting with NVIDIA GPUs from unikernels is infeasible, resulting in applications requiring GPUs being unsuitable for deployment in unikernels.
papers.abstract_zh: 如今，大型计算集群越来越多地转向异构架构，通过使用 GPU 等加速器来实现不断提高的性能。为了在这些架构上实现最大性能，必须通过使用特殊 API 与硬件资源交互（例如用于 NVIDIA GPU 的 CUDA API）来根据可用硬件定制应用程序。同时，unikernels 作为一种解决方案出现，解决了现代操作系统的复杂性及其无法针对特定应用程序配置文件进行优化所带来的不断增加的开销。 Unikernels 允许更好的静态代码检查，并实现单片内核不可能实现的优化，从而产生更健壮、更快的程序。尽管如此，在 unikernels 中仍缺乏对使用 GPU 的支持。由于 CUDA API 的专有性质，直接支持从 unikernels 与 NVIDIA GPU 交互是不可行的，导致需要 GPU 的应用程序不适合在 unikernels 中部署。

papers.title: GPU Graph Processing on CXL-Based Microsecond-Latency External Memory.
papers.abstract: In GPU graph analytics, the use of external memory such as the host DRAM and solid-state drives is a cost-effective approach to processing large graphs beyond the capacity of the GPU onboard memory. This paper studies the use of Compute Express Link (CXL) memory as alternative external memory for GPU graph processing in order to see if this emerging memory expansion technology enables graph processing that is as fast as using the host DRAM. Through analysis and evaluation using FPGA prototypes, we show that representative GPU graph traversal algorithms involving fine-grained random access can tolerate an external memory latency of up to a few microseconds introduced by the CXL interface as well as by the underlying memory devices. This insight indicates that microsecond-latency flash memory may be used as CXL memory devices to realize even more cost-effective GPU graph processing while still achieving performance close to using the host DRAM.
papers.abstract_zh: 在 GPU 图形分析中，使用主机 DRAM 和固态硬盘等外部存储器是一种经济高效的方法，可以处理超出 GPU 板载内存容量的大型图形。本文研究了使用 Compute Express Link (CXL) 内存作为 GPU 图形处理的替代外部内存，以了解这种新兴内存扩展技术是否能够实现与使用主机 DRAM 一样快的图形处理。通过使用 FPGA 原型进行分析和评估，我们表明，涉及细粒度随机访问的代表性 GPU 图形遍历算法可以容忍由 CXL 接口以及底层内存设备引入的高达几微秒的外部内存延迟。这一见解表明，微秒延迟闪存可以用作 CXL 存储设备，以实现更具成本效益的 GPU 图形处理，同时仍然实现接近使用主机 DRAM 的性能。

papers.title: GPU-based LU Factorization and Solve on Batches of Matrices with Band Structure.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a portable and performance-efficient approach to solve a batch of linear systems of equations using Graphics Processing Units (GPUs). Each system is represented using a special type of matrices with a band structure above and/or below the diagonal. Each matrix is factorized using an LU factorization with partial pivoting for numerical stability. Subsequently, the factors are used to find the solution for as many right hand sides as needed. The width of the band is often small enough that performing a fully dense LU factorization results in poor performance. We follow the standard LAPACK specifications for addressing this type of problems and develop a dedicated solver that runs efficiently on GPUs. No similar solver is currently available in the vendor’s software stack, so performance results are shown on both NVIDIA and AMD GPUs relative to a parallel CPU solution utilizing OpenMP for thread-level parallelization.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种便携式且高效的方法，用于使用图形处理单元 (GPU) 求解一批线性方程组。每个系统都使用特殊类型的矩阵来表示，该矩阵具有对角线上方和/或下方的能带结构。每个矩阵均使用 LU 分解进行分解，并采用部分主元旋转来实现数值稳定性。随后，使用这些因子来根据需要找到尽可能多的右侧的解决方案。带的宽度通常足够小，以至于执行完全密集的 LU 分解会导致性能不佳。我们遵循解决此类问题的标准 LAPACK 规范，并开发了在 GPU 上高效运行的专用求解器。目前供应商的软件堆栈中没有类似的求解器，因此相对于利用 OpenMP 进行线程级并行化的并行 CPU 解决方案，在 NVIDIA 和 AMD GPU 上显示了性能结果。

papers.title: GPUscout: Locating Data Movement-related Bottlenecks on GPUs.
papers.abstract: GPUs pose an attractive opportunity for delivering high-performance applications. However, GPU codes are often limited due to memory contention, resulting in overall performance degradation. Since GPU scheduling is transparent to the user, and GPU memory architectures are very complex compared to ones on CPUs, finding such bottlenecks is a very cumbersome process.
papers.abstract_zh: GPU 为交付高性能应用程序提供了诱人的机会。然而，GPU 代码常常由于内存争用而受到限制，导致整体性能下降。由于 GPU 调度对用户来说是透明的，而且 GPU 内存架构与 CPU 上的相比非常复杂，因此找到此类瓶颈是一个非常麻烦的过程。

papers.title: Graph3PO: A Temporal Graph Data Processing Method for Latency QoS Guarantee in Object Cloud Storage System.
papers.abstract: Object cloud storage systems are deployed with diverse applications that have varying latency service level objectives (SLOs), posting challenges for supporting quality of service with limited storage resources. Existing methods provide prediction-based recommendations for dispatching requests from applications to storage devices, but the prediction accuracy can be affected by complex system topology. To address this issue, Graph3PO is designed to combine storage device queue information with system topological information for forming a temporal graph, which can accurately predict device queue states. Additionally, Graph3PO contains the urgency degree model and cost model for measuring SLO violation risks and penalties of scheduling requests on storage device queues. When the urgency degree of a request exceeds a threshold, Graph3PO determines whether to schedule it in the queue or initiate a hedge request to another storage device. Experimental results show that Graph3PO outperforms its competitors, with SLO violation rates 2.8 to 201.1 times lower.
papers.abstract_zh: 对象云存储系统部署有不同的应用程序，这些应用程序具有不同的延迟服务级别目标 (SLO)，这给以有限的存储资源支持服务质量带来了挑战。现有方法提供基于预测的建议，用于将请求从应用程序分派到存储设备，但预测准确性可能会受到复杂系统拓扑的影响。为了解决这个问题，Graph3PO被设计为将存储设备队列信息与系统拓扑信息结合起来形成时间图，从而可以准确地预测设备队列状态。此外，Graph3PO 还包含紧急度模型和成本模型，用于衡量存储设备队列上的调度请求的 SLO 违规风险和惩罚。当请求的紧急程度超过阈值时，Graph3PO会决定是否将其调度到队列中或向另一个存储设备发起对冲请求。实验结果表明，Graph3PO 的性能优于竞争对手，SLO 违规率低 2.8 至 201.1 倍。

papers.title: GRAPHINE: Enhanced Neutral Atom Quantum Computing using Application-Specific Rydberg Atom Arrangement.
papers.abstract: Multiple technologies for realizing quantum computing are currently under development. Neutral atom quantum computing is one such promising technology; it offers advantages such as the ability to perform long-distance interactions and gates consisting of more than two qubits. A particular advantage it provides is the flexibility to arrange the qubits in different topologies by customizing atom layouts. We design Graphine, which, to the best of our knowledge, is the first technique to leverage this flexibility to design application-specific topologies for different quantum algorithms based on the structural characteristics of the algorithm circuits. This enables Graphine to improve key performance metrics like the number of gates and pulses by up to 56% and the probability of error by up to 42% on average over widely-used topology designs.
papers.abstract_zh: 目前正在开发多种实现量子计算的技术。中性原子量子计算就是这样一种有前景的技术。它具有许多优点，例如执行长距离交互的能力以及由两个以上量子位组成的门。它提供的一个特殊优势是通过定制原子布局灵活地将量子位安排在不同的拓扑中。据我们所知，我们设计的 Graphine 是第一种利用这种灵活性，根据算法电路的结构特征为不同量子算法设计特定于应用的拓扑的技术。与广泛使用的拓扑设计相比，这使得 Graphine 能够将门和脉冲数量等关键性能指标平均提高高达 56%，并将错误概率平均提高高达 42%。

papers.title: GraphSet: High Performance Graph Mining through Equivalent Set Transformations.
papers.abstract: Graph mining is of critical use in a number of fields such as social networks, knowledge graphs, and fraud detection. As an NP-complete problem, accelerating computation performance is the main target for current optimizations. Due to excellent performance, state-of-the-art graph mining systems mainly rely on pattern-aware algorithms. Despite previous efforts, complex control flows introduced by pattern-aware algorithms bring significant overhead and also impede further acceleration on heterogeneous hardware.
papers.abstract_zh: 图挖掘在社交网络、知识图和欺诈检测等许多领域具有重要用途。作为一个NP完全问题，加速计算性能是当前优化的主要目标。由于性能优异，最先进的图挖掘系统主要依赖于模式感知算法。尽管之前做出了努力，但模式感知算法引入的复杂控制流带来了巨大的开销，并且还阻碍了异构硬件的进一步加速。

papers.title: GreenNFV: Energy-Efficient Network Function Virtualization with Service Level Agreement Constraints.
papers.abstract: Network Function Virtualization (NFV) platforms consume significant energy, introducing high operational costs in edge and data centers. This paper presents a novel framework called GreenNFV that optimizes resource usage for network function chains using deep reinforcement learning. GreenNFV optimizes resource parameters such as CPU sharing ratio, CPU frequency scaling, last-level cache (LLC) allocation, DMA buffer size, and packet batch size. GreenNFV learns the resource scheduling model from the benchmark experiments and takes Service Level Agreements (SLAs) into account to optimize resource usage models based on the different throughput and energy consumption requirements. Our evaluation shows that GreenNFV models achieve high transfer throughput and low energy consumption while satisfying various SLA constraints. Specifically, GreenNFV with Throughput SLA can achieve 4.4× higher throughput and 1.5× better energy efficiency over the baseline settings, whereas GreenNFV with Energy SLA can achieve 3× higher throughput while reducing energy consumption by 50%.
papers.abstract_zh: 网络功能虚拟化 (NFV) 平台消耗大量能源，导致边缘和数据中心运营成本高昂。本文提出了一种名为 GreenNFV 的新颖框架，该框架使用深度强化学习来优化网络功能链的资源使用。 GreenNFV 优化 CPU 共享率、CPU 频率缩放、末级缓存 (LLC) 分配、DMA 缓冲区大小和数据包批量大小等资源参数。 GreenNFV从基准实验中学习资源调度模型，并考虑服务级别协议（SLA），根据不同的吞吐量和能耗需求优化资源使用模型。我们的评估表明，GreenNFV 模型在满足各种 SLA 约束的同时实现了高传输吞吐量和低能耗。具体而言，具有吞吐量 SLA 的 GreenNFV 可以实现比基准设置高 4.4 倍的吞吐量和 1.5 倍高的能源效率，而具有能源 SLA 的 GreenNFV 可以实现 3 倍高的吞吐量，同时降低 50% 的能耗。

papers.title: GrIOt: Graph-based Modeling of HPC Application I/O Call Stacks for Predictive Prefetch.
papers.abstract: International audience
papers.abstract_zh: 国际观众

papers.title: Hanayo: Harnessing Wave-like Pipeline Parallelism for Enhanced Large Model Training Efficiency.
papers.abstract: Large-scale language models have become increasingly challenging and expensive to train. Among various methods addressing this issue, Pipeline Parallelism has been widely employed to accommodate massive model weights within limited GPU memory. This paper introduces Hanayo, a wave-like pipeline parallelism strategy that boasts a concise structure and practical applicability, alongside a high-performance pipeline execution runtime to tackle the challenges of pipeline strategy implementation. Hanayo mitigates the issues of pipeline bubbles and excessive memory consumption prevalent in existing schemes, without resorting to model duplicates as in Chimera. Our evaluation, conducted on four distinct computing clusters and involving both GPT-like and BERT-like architectures with up to 32 GPUs, demonstrates up to a 30.4 % increase in throughput compared to the state-of-the-art approach.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模语言模型变得越来越具有挑战性且训练成本越来越高。在解决这个问题的各种方法中，管道并行性已被广泛采用，以在有限的 GPU 内存内容纳大量模型权重。本文介绍了Hanayo，一种类似波浪的流水线并行策略，具有简洁的结构和实用性，以及高性能的流水线执行运行时，以解决流水线策略实施的挑战。 Hanayo 缓解了现有方案中普遍存在的管道泡沫和内存消耗过多的问题，而无需像 Chimera 那样诉诸模型重复。我们的评估是在四个不同的计算集群上进行的，涉及具有多达 32 个 GPU 的类 GPT 和类 BERT 架构，结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，吞吐量提高了 30.4%。

papers.title: Hardware Specialization: Estimating Monte Carlo Cross-Section Lookup Kernel Performance and Area.
papers.abstract: Hardware specialization is one of the promising directions in the post-Moore era. It is imperative to understand how hardware specialization paradigms can benefit HPC. An essential question revolves around estimating the theoretical performance of an optimally specialized architecture without requiring extensive hardware development expertise and efforts. Focusing on the Monte Carlo cross-section lookup kernel, known for its notably low resource utilization, we develop a workflow to simulate a specialized architecture’s timing and estimate resource usage to answer these questions, leveraging open-source hardware tools. We implement building blocks of the kernel pipeline in the Chisel construction language and generate Verilog codes for resource estimation. Our late-breaking results show that the kernel latency is 46 cycles per lookup while the optimized CPU code takes 680 cycles, and a potential 15k pipeline copies within a 698 mm2 die, reflective of the Intel Xeon Platinum 8180 dimensions.
papers.abstract_zh: 硬件专业化是后摩尔时代最有前途的方向之一。必须了解硬件专业化范例如何使 HPC 受益。一个基本问题是在不需要大量硬件开发专业知识和努力的情况下估计最佳专业架构的理论性能。我们专注于以其资源利用率极低而闻名的蒙特卡洛横截面查找内核，利用开源硬件工具开发了一个工作流程来模拟专门架构的时序并估计资源使用情况来回答这些问题。我们用 Chisel 构建语言实现内核管道的构建块，并生成用于资源估计的 Verilog 代码。我们的最新结果显示，每次查找的内核延迟为 46 个周期，而优化的 CPU 代码需要 680 个周期，并且在 698 mm2 芯片内可能有 15k 个管道副本，反映了英特尔至强铂金 8180 的尺寸。

papers.title: HEAR: Homomorphically Encrypted Allreduce.
papers.abstract: Allreduce is one of the most commonly used collective operations. Its latency and bandwidth can be improved by offloading the calculations to the network. However, no way exists to conduct such offloading securely; in state-of-the-art solutions, the data is passed unprotected into the network. Security is a significant concern for High-Performance Computing applications, but achieving it while maintaining performance remains challenging. We present HEAR, the first high-performance system for securing in-network compute and Allreduce operations based on homomorphic encryption. HEAR implements carefully designed and modified encryption schemes for the most common Allreduce functions and leverages communication domain knowledge in MPI programs to obtain decryption and encryption routines with high performance. HEAR operates on integers and floats with no code base and no or little hardware changes. We design and evaluate HEAR, showing its minimal overhead, and open-source our implementation. HEAR represents the first step towards achieving confidential HPC.
papers.abstract_zh: Allreduce 是最常用的集体操作之一。通过将计算卸载到网络可以改善其延迟和带宽。然而，没有办法安全地进行此类卸载；在最先进的解决方案中，数据在不受保护的情况下传递到网络中。安全性是高性能计算应用程序的一个重要问题，但在保持性能的同时实现安全性仍然具有挑战性。我们推出了 HEAR，这是第一个基于同态加密保护网络内计算和 Allreduce 操作的高性能系统。 HEAR 为最常见的 Allreduce 函数实现了精心设计和修改的加密方案，并利用 MPI 程序中的通信领域知识来获得高性能的解密和加密例程。 HEAR 对整数和浮点数进行操作，无需代码库，也无需或很少有硬件更改。我们设计和评估 HEAR，展示其最小的开销，并将我们的实现开源。 HEAR 代表了实现保密 HPC 的第一步。

papers.title: Heterogeneous Syslog Analysis: There Is Hope.
papers.abstract: Identifying system hardware failures and anomalies is a unique challenge in heterogeneous testbed clusters because of variation in the ways that the system log reports errors and warnings. We present a novel approach for the real-time classification of syslog messages generated by a heterogeneous testbed cluster to proactively identify potential hardware issues and security events. By integrating machine learning models with high-performance computing systems, our system facilitates continuous system health monitoring. The paper introduces a taxonomy for classifying system issues into actionable categories of problems, while filtering out groups of messages that the system administrators would consider unimportant "noise". Finally, we experiment with using large language models as a message classifier, and share our results and experience with doing so. Results demonstrate promising performance, and more explainable results compared to currently available techniques, but the computational costs may offset the benefits.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于系统日志报告错误和警告的方式各不相同，因此识别系统硬件故障和异常是异构测试床集群中的一个独特挑战。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，用于对异构测试床集群生成的系统日志消息进行实时分类，以主动识别潜在的硬件问题和安全事件。通过将机器学习模型与高性能计算系统集成，我们的系统有助于持续的系统健康状况监控。本文介绍了一种分类法，用于将系统问题分类为可操作的问题类别，同时过滤掉系统管理员认为不重要的“噪音”的消息组。最后，我们尝试使用大型语言模型作为消息分类器，并分享我们的结果和经验。结果表明，与当前可用的技术相比，性能有希望，并且结果更容易解释，但计算成本可能会抵消收益。

papers.title: High Throughput Training of Deep Surrogates from Large Ensemble Runs.
papers.abstract: Recent years have seen a surge in deep learning approaches to accelerate numerical solvers, which provide faithful but computationally intensive simulations of the physical world. These deep surrogates are generally trained in a supervised manner from limited amounts of data slowly generated by the same solver they intend to accelerate. We propose an open-source framework that enables the online training of these models from a large ensemble run of simulations. It leverages multiple levels of parallelism to generate rich datasets. The framework avoids I/O bottlenecks and storage issues by directly streaming the generated data. A training reservoir mitigates the inherent bias of streaming while maximizing GPU throughput. Experiment on training a fully connected network as a surrogate for the heat equation shows the proposed approach enables training on 8TB of data in 2 hours with an accuracy improved by 47% and a batch throughput multiplied by 13 compared to a traditional offline procedure.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，加速数值求解器的深度学习方法激增，这些方法提供了对物理世界的忠实但计算密集型的模拟。这些深度代理通常以有监督的方式从有限数量的数据中进行训练，这些数据是由它们打算加速的同一求解器缓慢生成的。我们提出了一个开源框架，可以通过大型集成运行模拟来在线训练这些模型。它利用多个级别的并行性来生成丰富的数据集。该框架通过直接流式传输生成的数据来避免 I/O 瓶颈和存储问题。训练库可以减轻流式传输的固有偏差，同时最大化 GPU 吞吐量。训练全连接网络作为热方程替代的实验表明，与传统离线程序相比，所提出的方法可以在 2 小时内训练 8TB 数据，准确率提高了 47%，批量吞吐量提高了 13 倍。

papers.title: High-level GPU code: a case study examining JAX and OpenMP.
papers.abstract: In recent years, a new scientific software design pattern has emerged, pairing a Python interface with high-performance kernels in lower-level languages. The rise of general-purpose GPUs necessitates the rewriting of many such kernels, which poses challenges in GPU programming and ensures future portability and flexibility. This paper documents our experience and observations during the process of porting TOAST, a cosmology software framework designed to take full advantage of a supercomputer, to work with GPUs. This exploration led us to compare two different porting strategies: utilizing the JAX Python library and employing OpenMP Target Offload compiler directives. JAX allows kernel code to be written in pure Python, whereas OpenMP Target Offload is a directive-based strategy that integrates seamlessly with our existing OpenMP-accelerated C++ kernels. Both frameworks are high-level, abstracting system architecture details while aiming for straightforward, portable, yet performant GPU code. Through the porting of a dozen kernels, we delve into the analysis of development cost, performance, and the viability of employing either of these frameworks for complex numerical Python applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，出现了一种新的科学软件设计模式，将 Python 界面与低级语言的高性能内核配对。通用GPU的兴起需要重写许多此类内核，这对GPU编程提出了挑战，并确保了未来的可移植性和灵活性。本文记录了我们在移植 TOAST（一个旨在充分利用超级计算机的宇宙学软件框架）以与 GPU 配合使用的过程中的经验和观察。这种探索使我们比较了两种不同的移植策略：利用 JAX Python 库和使用 OpenMP Target Offload 编译器指令。 JAX 允许用纯 Python 编写内核代码，而 OpenMP Target Offload 是一种基于指令的策略，可与我们现有的 OpenMP 加速 C++ 内核无缝集成。这两个框架都是高层框架，抽象了系统架构细节，同时旨在实现简单、可移植且高性能的 GPU 代码。通过移植十几个内核，我们深入分析了开发成本、性能以及将这些框架用于复杂数值 Python 应用程序的可行性。

papers.title: High-Performance and Programmable Attentional Graph Neural Networks with Global Tensor Formulations.
papers.abstract: Graph attention models (A-GNNs), a type of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), have been shown to be more powerful than simpler convolutional GNNs (C-GNNs). However, A-GNNs are more complex to program and difficult to scale. To address this, we develop a novel mathematical formulation, based on tensors that group all the feature vectors, targeting both training and inference of A-GNNs. The formulation enables straightforward adoption of communication-minimizing routines, it fosters optimizations such as vectorization, and it enables seamless integration with established linear algebra DSLs or libraries such as GraphBLAS. Our implementation uses a data redistribution scheme explicitly developed for sparse-dense tensor operations used heavily in GNNs, and fusing optimizations that further minimize memory usage and communication cost. We ensure theoretical asymptotic reductions in communicated data compared to the established message-passing GNN paradigm. Finally, we provide excellent scalability and speedups of even 4--5x over modern libraries such as Deep Graph Library.
papers.abstract_zh: 图注意力模型 (A-GNN) 是图神经网络 (GNN) 的一种，已被证明比简单的卷积 GNN (C-GNN) 更强大。然而，A-GNN 的编程更加复杂并且难以扩展。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种新颖的数学公式，基于对所有特征向量进行分组的张量，针对 A-GNN 的训练和推理。该公式可以直接采用通信最小化例程，促进矢量化等优化，并实现与已建立的线性代数 DSL 或 GraphBLAS 等库的无缝集成。我们的实现使用了专门为 GNN 中大量使用的稀疏-密集张量运算而开发的数据重新分配方案，并融合了进一步最小化内存使用和通信成本的优化。与已建立的消息传递 GNN 范式相比，我们确保通信数据在理论上渐近减少。最后，我们提供了出色的可扩展性，速度比现代库（例如 Deep Graph Library）高出 4--5 倍。

papers.title: High-Performance Programming and Execution of a Coral Biodiversity Mapping Algorithm Using Chapel.
papers.abstract: This paper will demonstrate how the parallelism and expressiveness of the Chapel programming language are used to achieve an enormous improvement in computational speed for a problem related to coral reef conservation. Chapel’s concise syntax and versatile data structures enable this problem to be solved in under 300 lines of code, while reducing the time to solution from days down to the order of seconds. This improvement is so substantial that it represents a paradigm shift in the way biodiversity can be measured at scale, providing a wealth of novel information for marine ecosystem managers and opening up brand new avenues for scientific inquiry. This paper will review the solution strategy and data structures in Chapel that allowed these improvements to be realized, and will preview future extensions of this work that have been made possible by this drastic speedup.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文将演示如何利用 Chapel 编程语言的并行性和表达能力来大幅提高与珊瑚礁保护相关的问题的计算速度。 Chapel 简洁的语法和通用的数据结构使这个问题能够在 300 行代码内得到解决，同时将解决时间从几天缩短到几秒钟。这一进步是如此巨大，以至于它代表了大规模测量生物多样性的方式的范式转变，为海洋生态系统管理者提供了大量新颖的信息，并为科学探究开辟了全新的途径。本文将回顾 Chapel 中实现这些改进的解决方案策略和数据结构，并将预览通过这种大幅加速而实现的这项工作的未来扩展。

papers.title: High-Performance SVD Partial Spectrum Computation.
papers.abstract: We introduce a new singular value decomposition (SVD) solver based on the QR-based Dynamically Weighted Halley (QDWH) algorithm for computing the partial spectrum SVD (QDWHpartial-SVD) problems. By optimizing the rational function underlying the algorithms in the desired part of the spectrum only, the QDWHpartial-SVD algorithm efficiently computes a fraction (say 1--20%) of the leading singular values/vectors. We develop a high-performance implementation of QDWHpartial-SVD 1 on distributed-memory manycore systems and demonstrate its numerical robustness. We perform a benchmarking campaign against counterparts from the state-of-the-art numerical libraries across various matrix sizes using up to 36K MPI processes. Experimental results show performance speedups for QDWHpartial-SVD up to 6X and 2X against vendor-optimized PDGESVD from ScaLAPACK and KSVD on a Cray XC40 system using 1152 nodes based on two-socket 16-core Intel Haswell CPU, respectively. We also port our QDWHpartial-SVD software library to a system composed of 256 nodes with two-socket 64-Core AMD EPYC Milan CPU and achieve performance speedup up to 4X compared to vendor-optimized PDGESVD from ScaLAPACK. We also compare energy consumption for the two algorithms and demonstrate how QDWHpartial-SVD can further outperform PDGESVD in that regard by performing fewer memory-bound operations.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种基于 QR 动态加权哈雷 (QDWH) 算法的新奇异值分解 (SVD) 求解器，用于计算部分谱 SVD (QDWHpartial-SVD) 问题。通过仅在频谱的所需部分优化算法底层的有理函数，QDWHpartial-SVD 算法可以有效计算主要奇异值/向量的一小部分（例如 1--20%）。我们在分布式内存众核系统上开发了 QDWHpartial-SVD 1 的高性能实现，并展示了其数值鲁棒性。我们使用多达 36K MPI 进程，针对各种矩阵大小的最先进数值库中的对应项进行基准测试活动。实验结果表明，在使用基于两路 16 核 Intel Haswell CPU 的 1152 个节点的 Cray XC40 系统上，与 ScaLAPACK 和 KSVD 的供应商优化 PDGESVD 相比，QDWHpartial-SVD 的性能分别提高了 6 倍和 2 倍。我们还将 QDWHpartial-SVD 软件库移植到由 256 个节点组成的系统，该系统配备两路 64 核 AMD EPYC Milan CPU，与 ScaLAPACK 的供应商优化的 PDGESVD 相比，性能提升高达 4 倍。我们还比较了两种算法的能耗，并演示了 QDWHpartial-SVD 如何通过执行更少的内存限制操作来进一步超越 PDGESVD。

papers.title: Highlighting PARCOACH Improvements on MBI.
papers.abstract: PARCOACH is one of the few verification tools that mainly relies on a static analysis to detect errors in MPI programs. First focused on the detection of call ordering errors with collectives, it has recently been extended to detect local concurrency errors in MPI-RMA programs. Furthermore, the new version of the tool fixes multiple errors and is easier to use. This paper presents the improvements we made and the results we obtained on the MPI Bugs Initiative.
papers.abstract_zh: PARCOACH is one of the few verification tools that mainly relies on a static analysis to detect errors in MPI programs.首先专注于检测集合的调用顺序错误，最近已扩展到检测 MPI-RMA 程序中的本地并发错误。此外，新版本的工具修复了多个错误，并且更易于使用。本文介绍了我们在 MPI Bugs Initiative 上所做的改进和获得的结果。

papers.title: HPAC-Offload: Accelerating HPC Applications with Portable Approximate Computing on the GPU.
papers.abstract: The end of Dennard scaling and the slowdown of Moore's law led to a shift in technology trends towards parallel architectures, particularly in HPC systems. To continue providing performance benefits, HPC should embrace Approximate Computing (AC), which trades application quality loss for improved performance. However, existing AC techniques have not been extensively applied and evaluated in state-of-the-art hardware architectures such as GPUs, the primary execution vehicle for HPC applications today.
papers.abstract_zh: 登纳德缩放比例的结束和摩尔定律的放缓导致技术趋势转向并行架构，特别是在 HPC 系统中。为了继续提供性能优势，HPC 应采用近似计算 (AC)，它以应用程序质量损失换取性能的提高。然而，现有的 AC 技术尚未在最先进的硬件架构（例如 GPU（当今 HPC 应用程序的主要执行工具））中得到广泛应用和评估。

papers.title: HPC-GPT: Integrating Large Language Model for High-Performance Computing.
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs), including the LLaMA model, have exhibited their efficacy across various general-domain natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, their performance in high-performance computing (HPC) domain tasks has been less than optimal due to the specialized expertise required to interpret the model’s responses. In response to this challenge, we propose HPC-GPT, a novel LLaMA-based model that has been supervised fine-tuning using generated QA (Question-Answer) instances for the HPC domain. To evaluate its effectiveness, we concentrate on two HPC tasks: managing AI models and datasets for HPC, and data race detection. By employing HPC-GPT, we demonstrate comparable performance with existing methods on both tasks, exemplifying its excellence in HPC-related scenarios. Our experiments on open-source benchmarks yield extensive results, underscoring HPC-GPT’s potential to bridge the performance gap between LLMs and HPC-specific tasks. With HPC-GPT, we aim to pave the way for LLMs to excel in HPC domains, simplifying the utilization of language models in complex computing applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 包括 LLaMA 模型在内的大型语言模型 (LLM) 已在各种通用领域自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务中展示了其功效。然而，由于解释模型响应所需的专业知识，它们在高性能计算 (HPC) 领域任务中的性能并未达到最佳。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 HPC-GPT，这是一种基于 LLaMA 的新型模型，该模型已使用 HPC 领域生成的 QA（问题-答案）实例进行监督微调。为了评估其有效性，我们专注于两项 HPC 任务：管理 HPC 的 AI 模型和数据集以及数据竞争检测。通过采用 HPC-GPT，我们在这两项任务上展示了与现有方法相当的性能，体现了其在 HPC 相关场景中的卓越性能。我们在开源基准测试上的实验产生了广泛的结果，强调了 HPC-GPT 弥合法学硕士和 HPC 特定任务之间性能差距的潜力。通过 HPC-GPT，我们的目标是为法学硕士在 HPC 领域取得优异成绩铺平道路，简化复杂计算应用程序中语言模型的使用。

papers.title: I/O in WRF: A Case Study in Modern Parallel I/O Techniques.
papers.abstract: Large-scale parallel applications can face significant I/O performance bottlenecks, making efficient I/O crucial. This work presents a comparative study of several parallel I/O implementations in the Weather Research and Forecasting model, including PnetCDF blocking and non-blocking I/O options, netCDF4, HDF5 Log VOL, and ADIOS. For I/O methods creating files in a canonical data layout, PnetCDF's non-blocking option offers up to 2x improvement over its blocking option and up to 4.5x over HDF5 via netCDF4, demonstrating the effectiveness of the write request aggregation technique. The HDF5 Log VOL outperforms ADIOS with a 4x improvement in write performance when creating files in the log layout, although both require non-negligible time to convert the file back to canonical order for post-run analysis. From these results we extract some observations that can guide I/O strategies for modern parallel codes.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模并行应用程序可能面临严重的 I/O 性能瓶颈，因此高效的 I/O 至关重要。这项工作对天气研究和预报模型中的几种并行 I/O 实现进行了比较研究，包括 PnetCDF 阻塞和非阻塞 I/O 选项、netCDF4、HDF5 Log VOL 和 ADIOS。对于以规范数据布局创建文件的 I/O 方法，PnetCDF 的非阻塞选项比其阻塞选项提高了 2 倍，通过 netCDF4 比 HDF5 提高了 4.5 倍，这证明了写入请求聚合技术的有效性。在日志布局中创建文件时，HDF5 Log VOL 的写入性能比 ADIOS 提高了 4 倍，尽管两者都需要不可忽略的时间将文件转换回规范顺序以进行运行后分析。从这些结果中，我们提取了一些可以指导现代并行代码的 I/O 策略的观察结果。

papers.title: ICE 2.0: Restructuring and Growing an Instructional HPC Cluster.
papers.abstract: The Partnership for an Advanced Computing Environment (PACE) at Georgia Tech (GT) has been running two campus-wide cluster resources available for academic courses and workshops for five years. The initial design focused on creating a federated resource for a wide range of educational topics, based on a PACE and College of Computing (COC) partnership. Due to funding, this took the form of separate resources, one funded by PACE, and another by COC. These "Instructional Cluster Environments", PACE-ICE and COC-ICE, became very popular with instructors at GT but led to a high maintenance cost due to the split nature of the environments. With the transition to the Slurm scheduler, PACE collaborated with COC to merge the two clusters into one, ICE. This work details the strategies used to sensibly merge the two production systems, including the storage architecture, shared system policies, and scheduler priority configurations that honor funding complexities.
papers.abstract_zh: 佐治亚理工学院 (GT) 的高级计算环境合作伙伴 (PACE) 五年来一直在运行两个校园范围内的集群资源，可用于学术课程和研讨会。最初的设计重点是基于 PACE 和计算机学院 (COC) 的合作伙伴关系，为广泛的教育主题创建联合资源。由于资金原因，这采取了单独资源的形式，一个由 PACE 资助，另一个由 COC 资助。这些“教学集群环境”PACE-ICE 和 COC-ICE 非常受 GT 教师的欢迎，但由于环境的分裂性质，导致了高昂的维护成本。随着向 Slurm 调度程序的过渡，PACE 与 COC 合作将两个集群合并为一个集群，即 ICE。这项工作详细介绍了用于合理合并两个生产系统的策略，包括存储架构、共享系统策略和满足资金复杂性的调度程序优先级配置。

papers.title: Implementation-Oblivious Transparent Checkpoint-Restart for MPI.
papers.abstract: This work presents experience with traditional use cases of checkpointing on a novel platform. A single codebase (MANA) transparently checkpoints production workloads for major available MPI implementations: “develop once, run everywhere”. The new platform enables application developers to compile their application against any of the available standards-compliant MPI implementations, and test each MPI implementation according to performance or other features.
papers.abstract_zh: 这项工作展示了在新颖平台上检查点的传统用例的经验。单一代码库 (MANA) 透明地检查主要可用 MPI 实现的生产工作负载：“开发一次，到处运行”。新平台使应用程序开发人员能够针对任何可用的符合标准的 MPI 实现来编译其应用程序，并根据性能或其他功能测试每个 MPI 实现。

papers.title: Implementing scalable matrix-vector products for the exact diagonalization methods in quantum many-body physics.
papers.abstract: Exact diagonalization is a well-established method for simulating small quantum systems. Its applicability is limited by the exponential growth of the Hamiltonian matrix that needs to be diagonalized. Physical symmetries are usually utilized to reduce the matrix dimension, and distributed-memory parallelism is employed to explore larger systems. This paper focuses on an implementation of the core distributed algorithms, with a special emphasis on the matrix-vector product. Instead of the conventional MPI+X paradigm, Chapel is chosen as the language in this work.
papers.abstract_zh: 精确对角化是模拟小型量子系统的成熟方法。它的适用性受到需要对角化的哈密顿矩阵的指数增长的限制。通常利用物理对称性来减少矩阵维数，并利用分布式内存并行性来探索更大的系统。本文重点关注核心分布式算法的实现，特别强调矩阵向量积。本次工作中选择 Chapel 作为语言，而不是传统的 MPI+X 范例。

papers.title: Improve and Stabilize the Classification Results of DataRaceBench.
papers.abstract: DataRaceBench is a benchmark using small kernel applications to classify the detection capabilities of data race detection tools. During our experiments of applying Archer to the benchmark suite we observed different short-comings. With recently added kernels, the turn-around time of a basic benchmark run increased from several minutes to more than an hour. Furthermore, we observed non-deterministic and unexpected results. In this paper, we propose several changes to existing kernels to address these short-comings. In addition, we propose to use variants of the kernels with non-deterministic runtime schedules that explicitly enforce these different schedules. Finally, we provide an evaluation of the updated benchmark with Archer running in thread-centric and task-centric mode.
papers.abstract_zh: DataRaceBench 是一个使用小型内核应用程序对数据竞争检测工具的检测能力进行分类的基准测试。在我们将 Archer 应用于基准测试套件的实验中，我们观察到了不同的缺点。通过最近添加的内核，基本基准测试运行的周转时间从几分钟增加到一个多小时。此外，我们观察到非确定性和意外的结果。在本文中，我们建议对现有内核进行一些更改，以解决这些缺点。此外，我们建议使用具有非确定性运行时计划的内核变体，以显式强制执行这些不同的计划。最后，我们提供了对以线程为中心和以任务为中心模式运行的 Archer 的更新基准的评估。

papers.title: Infrastructure for Writing Fork-Join Tests.
papers.abstract: We have developed a software infrastructure for testing multi-threaded programs that implement the fork-join concurrency model. The infrastructure employs several key ideas: The student solutions use print statements to trace the execution of the fork-join phases. The test writer provides a high-level specification of the problem-specific aspects of the traces, which is used by the infrastructure to handle the problem-independent and low-level details of processing the traces. During performance testing, trace output is disabled automatically. During functionality testing, fine-grained feedback is provided to identify the correct and incorrect implementation of the various fork-join phases. Tests written using our infrastructure have been used in an instructor-training workshop as an instructor agent clarifying requirements and checking in-progress work. The size of the code to check the concurrency correctness of final and intermediate results was far smaller than the code to check the serial correctness of such results.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们开发了一个软件基础设施，用于测试实现 fork-join 并发模型的多线程程序。该基础设施采用了几个关键思想： 学生解决方案使用打印语句来跟踪 fork-join 阶段的执行。测试编写器提供了跟踪的特定于问题的方面的高级规范，基础设施使用它来处理处理跟踪的与问题无关的低级细节。在性能测试期间，跟踪输出会自动禁用。在功能测试期间，提供细粒度的反馈来识别各个 fork-join 阶段的正确和错误实现。使用我们的基础设施编写的测试已在讲师培训研讨会中使用，作为讲师代理澄清要求并检查正在进行的工作。检查最终结果和中间结果的并发正确性的代码的大小远远小于检查此类结果的串行正确性的代码的大小。

papers.title: Interference-aware Multiplexing for Deep Learning in GPU Clusters: A Middleware Approach.
papers.abstract: A common strategy for improving efficiency in training deep learning entails multiplexing tasks on a single GPU. To mitigate the interference caused by multiplexing, existing approaches primarily employ kernel-level solutions to regulate GPU kernel execution, or harness hardware-level techniques to explicitly restrict GPU streaming multiprocessors and memory. Nevertheless, none of them perform satisfactorily in optimizing the completion time of tasks.
papers.abstract_zh: 提高深度学习训练效率的常见策略是在单个 GPU 上复用任务。为了减轻多路复用造成的干扰，现有方法主要采用内核级解决方案来调节 GPU 内核执行，或利用硬件级技术来明确限制 GPU 流式多处理器和内存。然而，它们在优化任务完成时间方面都没有表现令人满意。

papers.title: Introducing Open OnDemand to Supercomputer Fugaku.
papers.abstract: One of the issues with high-performance computing (HPC) clusters is that the prerequisite knowledge required to use them is large, making the learning cost high for novice users. Moreover, it is desirable to run graphical user interface applications with interactive operations on the compute nodes, but the procedure is complicated. This paper describes how we introduced Open OnDemand, a web portal that enables easy use of the computing resources of an HPC cluster, to Fugaku, a Japanese flagship supercomputer. To introduce the resources to new users, we developed an adapter that enables the job scheduler used in Fugaku to be used from Open OnDemand. In addition, to further improve user convenience, we developed applications that enable data sharing between Open OnDemand and external storage, HPC infrastructure shared storage, and GakuNin Research Data Management. This paper describes the various features we have given to Open OnDemand for Fugaku and the development of the data sharing applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算（HPC）集群的问题之一是使用它们所需的必备知识较多，使得新手用户的学习成本较高。此外，希望在计算节点上运行具有交互操作的图形用户界面应用程序，但过程复杂。本文介绍了我们如何向日本旗舰超级计算机 Fugaku 引入 Open OnDemand（一个可以轻松使用 HPC 集群计算资源的门户网站）。为了向新用户介绍资源，我们开发了一个适配器，使 Fugaku 中使用的作业调度程序能够从 Open OnDemand 中使用。此外，为了进一步提高用户便利性，我们开发了支持 Open OnDemand 与外部存储、HPC 基础设施共享存储和 GakuNin Research Data Management 之间数据共享的应用程序。本文描述了我们为 Fugaku 提供的 Open OnDemand 的各种功能以及数据共享应用程序的开发。

papers.title: Investigating the Real-World Applicability of MPI Correctness Benchmarks.
papers.abstract: The MPI correctness benchmarks MPI-Corrbench and the MPI Bugs Initiative contain standardized test cases of correct and erroneous use of MPI, allowing MPI correctness tool developers to assess their tools’ performance and guide further development of their checking capabilities. Hence, the correctness benchmarks should encompass representative MPI (mis-)usage that mirrors real-world codes. To that end, we analyze the MPI usage of these correctness benchmarks at argument granularity and compare it to a previously collected data set of 96 HPC codes. This assessment measures the benchmarks’ proximity to real-world MPI usage patterns and offers insights for enhancing their coverage.
papers.abstract_zh: MPI 正确性基准 MPI-Corrbench 和 MPI Bugs Initiative 包含正确和错误使用 MPI 的标准化测试用例，允许 MPI 正确性工具开发人员评估其工具的性能并指导其检查功能的进一步开发。因此，正确性基准应该包含反映现实世界代码的代表性 MPI（错误）使用。为此，我们在参数粒度上分析了这些正确性基准的 MPI 使用情况，并将其与之前收集的 96 个 HPC 代码的数据集进行比较。该评估衡量基准与现实世界 MPI 使用模式的接近程度，并提供增强其覆盖范围的见解。

papers.title: IOMax: Maximizing Out-of-Core I/O Analysis Performance on HPC Systems.
papers.abstract: I/O analysis is an essential task for improving the performance of scientific applications on high-performance computing (HPC) systems. However, current analysis tools, which often use data drilling techniques (iterative exploration for deeper insights), treat every query independently and do not optimize column data for data-slicing (extracting specific data subsets), resulting in subpar querying performance. In this paper, we designed IOMax, a tool for efficient data drilling analysis on large-scale I/O traces. IOMax utilizes a novel query optimization technique to improve the query performance by 8.6x while reducing the memory footprint required for analysis by 11x. Additionally, it employs data transformation techniques to improve data-slicing performance by up to 11.4x. In conclusion, IOMax optimizes I/O analysis for scientific workflows on the Lassen supercomputer, resulting in up to 7x improvement.
papers.abstract_zh: I/O 分析是提高高性能计算 (HPC) 系统上科学应用程序性能的一项重要任务。然而，当前的分析工具通常使用数据钻取技术（迭代探索以获得更深入的见解），独立处理每个查询，并且不会优化列数据以进行数据切片（提取特定数据子集），从而导致查询性能不佳。在本文中，我们设计了 IOMax，这是一种对大规模 I/O 轨迹进行高效数据钻探分析的工具。 IOMax 利用新颖的查询优化技术将查询性能提高 8.6 倍，同时将分析所需的内存占用量减少 11 倍。此外，它还采用数据转换技术将数据切片性能提高高达 11.4 倍。总之，IOMax 优化了 Lassen 超级计算机上科学工作流程的 I/O 分析，实现了高达 7 倍的改进。

papers.title: Is RISC-V ready for HPC prime-time: Evaluating the 64-core Sophon SG2042 RISC-V CPU.
papers.abstract: The Sophon SG2042 is the world’s first commodity 64-core RISC-V CPU for high performance workloads and an important question is whether the SG2042 has the potential to encourage the HPC community to embrace RISC-V.
papers.abstract_zh: Sophon SG2042 是全球首款用于高性能工作负载的商用 64 核 RISC-V CPU，一个重要的问题是 SG2042 是否有潜力鼓励 HPC 社区采用 RISC-V。

papers.title: Itoyori: Reconciling Global Address Space and Global Fork-Join Task Parallelism.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces Itoyori, a task-parallel runtime system designed to tackle the challenge of scaling task parallelism (more specifically, nested fork-join parallelism) beyond a single node. The partitioned global address space (PGAS) model is often employed in task-parallel systems, but naively combining them can lead to poor performance due to fine-grained and redundant remote memory accesses. Itoyori addresses this issue by automatically caching global memory accesses at runtime, enabling efficient cache sharing among parallel tasks running on the same processor. As a real-world case study, we ported an existing task-parallel implementation of the Fast Multipole Method (FMM) to distributed memory with Itoyori and achieved a 7.5× speedup when scaled from a single node to 12 nodes and up to 6.0× faster performance than without caching. This study demonstrates that global-view fork-join programming can be made practical and scalable, while requiring minimal changes to the shared-memory code.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Itoyori，这是一个任务并行运行时系统，旨在解决将任务并行性（更具体地说，嵌套 fork-join 并行性）扩展到单个节点之外的挑战。分区全局地址空间（PGAS）模型通常用于任务并行系统，但天真地组合它们可能会由于细粒度和冗余的远程内存访问而导致性能不佳。 Itoyori 通过在运行时自动缓存全局内存访问来解决这个问题，从而在同一处理器上运行的并行任务之间实现高效的缓存共享。作为一个真实的案例研究，我们将快速多极方法 (FMM) 的现有任务并行实现移植到 Itoyori 的分布式内存中，当从单个节点扩展到 12 个节点时，速度提高了 7.5 倍，与没有缓存的情况相比，性能提高了 6.0 倍。这项研究表明，全局视图 fork-join 编程可以变得实用且可扩展，同时只需要对共享内存代码进行最小的更改。

papers.title: Julia as a unifying end-to-end workflow language on the Frontier exascale system.
papers.abstract: We evaluate Julia as a single language and ecosystem paradigm powered by LLVM to develop workflow components for high-performance computing. We run a Gray-Scott, 2-variable diffusion-reaction application using a memory-bound, 7-point stencil kernel on Frontier, the US Department of Energy’s first exascale supercomputer. We evaluate the performance, scaling, and trade-offs of (i) the computational kernel on AMD’s MI250x GPUs, (ii) weak scaling up to 4,096 MPI processes/GPUs or 512 nodes, (iii) parallel I/O writes using the ADIOS2 library bindings, and (iv) Jupyter Notebooks for interactive analysis. Results suggest that although Julia generates a reasonable LLVM-IR, a nearly 50% performance difference exists vs. native AMD HIP stencil codes when running on the GPUs. As expected, we observed near-zero overhead when using MPI and parallel I/O bindings for system-wide installed implementations. Consequently, Julia emerges as a compelling high-performance and high-productivity workflow composition language, as measured on the fastest supercomputer in the world.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们将 Julia 评估为由 LLVM 支持的单一语言和生态系统范式，用于开发高性能计算的工作流程组件。我们在美国能源部第一台百亿亿次超级计算机 Frontier 上使用内存限制的 7 点模板内核运行 Gray-Scott 2 变量扩散反应应用程序。我们评估了以下各项的性能、扩展和权衡：(i) AMD MI250x GPU 上的计算内核，(ii) 弱扩展至 4,096 个 MPI 进程/GPU 或 512 个节点，(iii) 使用 ADIOS2 库绑定的并行 I/O 写入，以及 (iv) 用于交互式分析的 Jupyter Notebook。结果表明，尽管 Julia 生成了合理的 LLVM-IR，但在 GPU 上运行时与本机 AMD HIP 模板代码相比，存在近 50% 的性能差异。正如预期的那样，当使用 MPI 和并行 I/O 绑定进行系统范围安装的实现时，我们发现开销接近于零。因此，根据世界上最快的超级计算机的测量，Julia 成为一种引人注目的高性能和高生产率的工作流组合语言。

papers.title: JuliQAOA: Fast, Flexible QAOA Simulation.
papers.abstract: We introduce JuliQAOA, a simulation package specifically built for the Quantum Alternating Operator Ansatz (QAOA). JuliQAOA does not require a circuit-level description of QAOA problems, or another package to simulate such circuits, instead relying on a more direct linear algebra implementation. This allows for increased QAOA-specific performance improvements, as well as improved flexibility and generality. JuliQAOA is the first QAOA package designed to aid in the study of both constrained and unconstrained combinatorial optimization problems, and can easily include novel cost functions, mixer Hamiltonians, and other variations. JuliQAOA also includes robust and extensible methods for learning optimal angles. Written in the Julia language, JuliQAOA outperforms existing QAOA software packages and scales well to HPC-level resources.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出 JuliQAOA，这是一个专门为量子交替算子 Ansatz (QAOA) 构建的模拟包。 JuliQAOA 不需要 QAOA 问题的电路级描述，也不需要另一个包来模拟此类电路，而是依赖于更直接的线性代数实现。这可以提高 QAOA 特定的性能改进，并提高灵活性和通用性。 JuliQAOA 是第一个 QAOA 包，旨在帮助研究约束和无约束组合优化问题，并且可以轻松包含新的成本函数、混合器哈密顿量和其他变体。 JuliQAOA 还包括用于学习最佳角度的稳健且可扩展的方法。 JuliQAOA 采用 Julia 语言编写，其性能优于现有的 QAOA 软件包，并且可以很好地扩展到 HPC 级资源。

papers.title: Laminar: A New Serverless Stream-based Framework with Semantic Code Search and Code Completion.
papers.abstract: This paper introduces Laminar, a novel serverless framework based on dispel4py, a parallel stream-based dataflow library. Laminar efficiently manages streaming workflows and components through a dedicated registry, offering a seamless serverless experience. Leveraging large lenguage models, Laminar enhances the framework with semantic code search, code summarization, and code completion. This contribution enhances serverless computing by simplifying the execution of streaming computations, managing data streams more efficiently, and offering a valuable tool for both researchers and practitioners.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Laminar，这是一种基于 dispel4py 的新型无服务器框架，dispel4py 是一个基于并行流的数据流库。 Laminar 通过专用注册表有效管理流式工作流程和组件，提供无缝的无服务器体验。利用大型语言模型，Laminar 通过语义代码搜索、代码摘要和代码完成增强了框架。这一贡献通过简化流计算的执行、更有效地管理数据流以及为研究人员和从业者提供有价值的工具来增强无服务器计算。

papers.title: Large-Scale Materials Modeling at Quantum Accuracy: Ab Initio Simulations of Quasicrystals and Interacting Extended Defects in Metallic Alloys.
papers.abstract: Ab initio electronic-structure has remained dichotomous between achievable accuracy and length-scale. Quantum many-body (QMB) methods realize quantum accuracy but fail to scale. Density functional theory (DFT) scales favorably but remains far from quantum accuracy. We present a framework that breaks this dichotomy by use of three interconnected modules: (i) invDFT: a methodological advance in inverse DFT linking QMB methods to DFT; (ii) MLXC: a machine-learned density functional trained with invDFT data, commensurate with quantum accuracy; (iii) DFT-FE-MLXC: an adaptive higher-order spectral finite-element (FE) based DFT implementation that integrates MLXC with efficient solver strategies and HPC innovations in FE-specific dense linear algebra, mixed-precision algorithms, and asynchronous compute-communication. We demonstrate a paradigm shift in DFT that not only provides an accuracy commensurate with QMB methods in ground-state energies, but also attains an unprecedented performance of 659.7 PFLOPS (43.1% peak FP64 performance) on 619,124 electrons using 8,000 GPU nodes of Frontier supercomputer.
papers.abstract_zh: 从头算起的电子结构在可实现的精度和长度范围之间仍然是二分法。量子多体（QMB）方法实现了量子精度，但无法扩展。密度泛函理论（DFT）可以很好地扩展，但距离量子精度还很远。我们提出了一个框架，通过使用三个互连的模块来打破这种二分法：（i）invDFT：将 QMB 方法与 DFT 连接起来的逆 DFT 的方法论进步； (ii) MLXC：使用 invDFT 数据训练的机器学习密度函数，与量子精度相当； (iii) DFT-FE-MLXC：一种基于自适应高阶谱有限元 (FE) 的 DFT 实现，它将 MLXC 与高效求解器策略以及 FE 特定密集线性代数、混合精度算法和异步计算通信方面的 HPC 创新相集成。我们展示了 DFT 的范式转变，它不仅提供了与基态能量中的 QMB 方法相当的精度，而且使用 Frontier 超级计算机的 8,000 个 GPU 节点在 619,124 个电子上获得了前所未有的 659.7 PFLOPS（43.1% 峰值 FP64 性能）性能。

papers.title: Large-Scale Simulation of Structural Dynamics Computing on GPU Clusters.
papers.abstract: Structural dynamics simulation plays an important role in research on reactor design and complex engineering. The Hybrid Total Finite Element Tearing and Interconnecting (HTFETI) method combined with Newmark method is an efficient way to solve large-scale structural dynamics problems. However, the sparse direct solver and the load imbalance caused by inconsistent density models are two critical issues limiting the performance and the scalability of structural dynamics computing. For the former, we propose an efficient variable-size batched method to accelerate SpMV on GPUs. For the latter, we establish an online performance prediction model, based on which we then design a novel inter-cluster subdomain fine-tuning algorithm to balance the workload of HTFETI parallel computing. We are the first to achieve the high-fidelity structural dynamics simulation of China Experimental Fast Reactor core assembly with up to 53.4 billion grids. The weak and strong scalability efficiencies reach 91.77% and 86.13% on 12,800 GPUs, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 结构动力学模拟在反应堆设计和复杂工程研究中发挥着重要作用。混合全有限元撕裂互连（HTFETI）方法与Newmark方法相结合是解决大规模结构动力学问题的有效方法。然而，稀疏直接求解器和密度模型不一致引起的负载不平衡是限制结构动力学计算性能和可扩展性的两个关键问题。对于前者，我们提出了一种有效的可变大小批处理方法来在 GPU 上加速 SpMV。对于后者，我们建立了在线性能预测模型，并在此基础上设计了一种新颖的簇间子域微调算法来平衡 HTFETI 并行计算的工作量。率先实现中国实验快堆堆芯组件高达534亿网格的高保真结构动力学模拟。在 12,800 个 GPU 上，弱扩展效率和强扩展效率分别达到 91.77% 和 86.13%。

papers.title: Latency and Bandwidth Microbenchmarks of US Department of Energy Systems in the June 2023 Top 500 List.
papers.abstract: As a rule, Top 500 class supercomputers are extensively benchmarked as part of their acceptance testing process. However, barring publicly posted LINPACK / HPCG results, most benchmark results are often inaccessible outside the hosting institution. Moreover, these higher level benchmarks do not provide easy answers to common questions such as “What is the realizable memory bandwidth?” or “What is the launch latency on the accelerator?” To partially address these issues, we executed selected single-node micro-benchmarks — focused on latencies and memory bandwidth — on every US Department of Energy system above rank 150 of the June 2023 Top 500 list, excepting NERSC’s Cori and ORNL’s Frontier TDS (now decommissioned or repurposed). We hope to provide an easy “first stop” reference for users of current Top 500 systems and inspire users and administrators of other Top 500 systems to similarly compile and make available benchmark results for their systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 通常，500 强级超级计算机都会在验收测试过程中进行广泛的基准测试。然而，除非公开发布 LINPACK / HPCG 结果，否则大多数基准测试结果通常无法在托管机构之外访问。此外，这些更高级别的基准测试并不能为诸如“可实现的内存带宽是多少？”等常见问题提供简单的答案。或“加速器的启动延迟是多少？”为了部分解决这些问题，我们对 2023 年 6 月 500 强排行榜中排名 150 名以上的每个美国能源部系统执行了选定的单节点微基准测试（重点关注延迟和内存带宽），但 NERSC 的 Cori 和 ORNL 的 Frontier TDS（现已退役或重新利用）除外。我们希望为当前 Top 500 系统的用户提供一个简单的“第一站”参考，并激励其他 Top 500 系统的用户和管理员以类似方式为其系统编译和提供可用的基准测试结果。

papers.title: Legate Sparse: Distributed Sparse Computing in Python.
papers.abstract: The sparse module of the popular SciPy Python library is widely used across applications in scientific computing, data analysis and machine learning. The standard implementation of SciPy is restricted to a single CPU and cannot take advantage of modern distributed and accelerated computing resources. We introduce Legate Sparse, a system that transparently distributes and accelerates unmodified sparse matrix-based SciPy programs across clusters of CPUs and GPUs, and composes with cuNumeric, a distributed NumPy library. Legate Sparse uses a combination of static and dynamic techniques to efficiently compose independently written sparse and dense array programming libraries, providing a unified Python interface for distributed sparse and dense array computations. We show that Legate Sparse is competitive with single-GPU libraries like CuPy and achieves 65% of the performance of PETSc on up to 1280 CPU cores and 192 GPUs of the Summit supercomputer, while offering the productivity benefits of idiomatic SciPy and NumPy.
papers.abstract_zh: 流行的 SciPy Python 库的稀疏模块广泛应用于科学计算、数据分析和机器学习领域。 SciPy 的标准实现仅限于单个 CPU，无法利用现代分布式和加速计算资源。我们推出了 Legate Sparse，这是一个跨 CPU 和 GPU 集群透明地分发和加速未经修改的基于稀疏矩阵的 SciPy 程序的系统，并与分布式 NumPy 库 cuNumeric 组合在一起。 Legate Sparse采用静态和动态相结合的技术，高效地组成独立编写的稀疏和稠密数组编程库，为分布式稀疏和稠密数组计算提供统一的Python接口。我们表明，Legate Sparse 与 CuPy 等单 GPU 库具有竞争力，并且在 Summit 超级计算机的多达 1280 个 CPU 内核和 192 个 GPU 上实现了 PETSc 65% 的性能，同时提供了惯用的 SciPy 和 NumPy 的生产力优势。

papers.title: Leveraging the Compute Power of Two HPC Systems for Higher-Dimensional Grid-Based Simulations with the Widely-Distributed Sparse Grid Combination Technique.
papers.abstract: Grid-based simulations of hot fusion plasmas are often severely limited by computational and memory resources; the grids live in four- to six-dimensional space and thus suffer the curse of dimensionality. However, high resolutions are required to fully capture the physics of interest. The sparse grid combination technique is a multi-scale method in which many anisotropically coarse resolved grids are used to approximate a fine-scale solution---and it alleviates the curse of dimensionality.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于网格的热聚变等离子体模拟通常受到计算和内存资源的严重限制；网格生活在四维到六维的空间中，因此遭受维度的诅咒。然而，需要高分辨率才能完全捕获感兴趣的物理现象。稀疏网格组合技术是一种多尺度方法，其中使用许多各向异性粗解析网格来近似精细尺度解，并且它减轻了维数灾难。

papers.title: LibPressio-Predict: Flexible and Fast Infrastructure For Inferring Compression Performance.
papers.abstract: Over recent years, substantial efforts have gone into developing systems to infer compression performance without running compressors. These efforts have driven down the error in the estimates, reduced their runtimes, and improved their generality. However, these efforts are uncoordinated increasing the efforts required to perform comparisons between them. There may be subtle differences in sampling approaches, and nuances to the interfaces requiring efforts to port applications between them and to reproduce experiments. Additionally, many of these methods call for substantial amounts of training data to produce reliable estimates, as well as scalable codes to perform the training. In this work, we present LibPressio-Predict – a scalable library for use in applications using predictions of compression performance and a scalable tool LibPressio-Bench to run these experiments quickly at scale. We use this tool to evaluate 3 recent compression prediction approaches systematically with all 48 timesteps and 13 fields from the Hurricane Issable dataset.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来，人们投入了大量精力来开发无需运行压缩机即可推断压缩性能的系统。这些努力降低了估计误差，减少了运行时间，并提高了通用性。然而，这些努力是不协调的，增加了在它们之间进行比较所需的努力。采样方法可能存在细微差别，并且接口的细微差别需要努力在它们之间移植应用程序并重现实验。此外，许多这些方法需要大量的训练数据来产生可靠的估计，以及可扩展的代码来执行训练。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LibPressio-Predict——一个可在使用压缩性能预测的应用程序中使用的可扩展库，以及一个可大规模快速运行这些实验的可扩展工具 LibPressio-Bench。我们使用该工具使用 Hurricane Issable 数据集中的所有 48 个时间步长和 13 个字段来系统地评估 3 种最新的压缩预测方法。

papers.title: Linking the Dynamic PicoProbe Analytical Electron-Optical Beam Line / Microscope to Supercomputers.
papers.abstract: The Dynamic PicoProbe at Argonne National Laboratory is undergoing upgrades that will enable it to produce up to 100s of GB of data per day. While this data is highly important for both fundamental science and industrial applications, there is currently limited on-site infrastructure to handle these high-volume data streams. We address this problem by providing a software architecture capable of supporting large-scale data transfers to the neighboring supercomputers at the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility. To prepare for future scientific workflows, we implement two instructive use cases for hyperspectral and spatiotemporal datasets, which include: (i) off-site data transfer, (ii) machine learning/artificial intelligence and traditional data analysis approaches, and (iii) automatic metadata extraction and cataloging of experimental results. This infrastructure supports expected workloads and also provides domain scientists the ability to reinterrogate data from past experiments to yield additional scientific value and derive new insights.
papers.abstract_zh: 阿贡国家实验室的动态 PicoProbe 正在进行升级，使其每天能够生成多达 100 GB 的数据。虽然这些数据对于基础科学和工业应用都非常重要，但目前处理这些大量数据流的现场基础设施有限。我们通过提供能够支持向阿贡领导计算设施的相邻超级计算机进行大规模数据传输的软件架构来解决这个问题。为了为未来的科学工作流程做好准备，我们针对高光谱和时空数据集实施了两个指导性用例，其中包括：（i）异地数据传输，（ii）机器学习/人工智能和传统数据分析方法，以及（iii）实验结果的自动元数据提取和编目。该基础设施支持预期的工作负载，还为领域科学家提供了重新询问过去实验中的数据的能力，以产生额外的科学价值并得出新的见解。

papers.title: Localization of Gamma-ray Bursts in a Balloon-Borne Telescope.
papers.abstract: Multi-messenger astrophysics combines observations from multiple instruments to study transient astrophysical phenomena, many occurring at seconds-level timescales. To identify and precisely localize these events in the sky, current systems often search through extensive sensor data, requiring resource-intensive computation to achieve results on the timescale of the events themselves. We seek to reduce computational requirements so as to perform real-time event localization with limited computational resources suitable for an orbital platform.
papers.abstract_zh: 多信使天体物理学结合了多种仪器的观测来研究瞬态天体物理现象，其中许多现象发生在秒级的时间尺度上。为了识别并精确定位天空中的这些事件，当前的系统通常会搜索大量传感器数据，需要资源密集型计算才能在事件本身的时间尺度上获得结果。我们寻求减少计算需求，以便利用适合轨道平台的有限计算资源来执行实时事件定位。

papers.title: Lossy and Lossless Compression for BioFilm Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT).
papers.abstract: Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) is a fast and non-destructive technology for bacterial biofilm imaging. However, OCT generates approximately 100 GB per flow cell, which complicates storage and data sharing. Data reduction reduces data complications by reducing overhead and the amount of data transferred. This work leverages the similarities between layers of OCT images to minimize data in order to improve compression. This paper evaluates 5 lossless and 2 lossy state-of-the-art compressors as well as 2 pre-processing techniques to reduce OCT data. Reduction techniques are evaluated to determine which compressor has the most significant compression ratio while maintaining a strong bandwidth and minimal image distortion. Results show SZ with frame before pre-processing is able to achieve the highest CR of 204.6 × on its higher error bounds. The maximum compression bandwidth SZ on higher error bounds is ∼ 41MB/s, for decompression bandwidth, it is able to outperform ZFP achieving ∼ 67MB/s.
papers.abstract_zh: 光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 是一种快速、无损的细菌生物膜成像技术。然而，OCT 每个流动池生成约 100 GB 的数据，这使存储和数据共享变得复杂。数据缩减通过减少开销和传输的数据量来减少数据复杂性。这项工作利用 OCT 图像层之间的相似性来最小化数据，从而提高压缩率。本文评估了 5 种无损和 2 种有损最先进的压缩器以及 2 种用于减少 OCT 数据的预处理技术。评估缩减技术以确定哪种压缩器具有最显着的压缩比，同时保持强大的带宽和最小的图像失真。结果表明，预处理前帧的 SZ 能够在其较高的误差范围内实现 204.6 × 的最高 CR。在较高误差范围上的最大压缩带宽 SZ 为 ∼ 41MB/s，对于解压缩带宽，它能够超越 ZFP，达到 ∼ 67MB/s。

papers.title: Machine Learning Applied to Single-Molecule Activity Prediction.
papers.abstract: Catalytic processes are used in about 1/3 of US manufacturing, from the field of chemical engineering to renewable energy. Assessing the activity of single-molecules, or individual molecules, is necessary to the development of efficient catalysts. Their heterogeneity structure leads to particle-specific catalytic activity. Experimentation with single-molecules can be time consuming and difficult. We purpose a Machine learning (ML) model that allows chemical researchers to run shorter single-molecule experiments to obtain the same level of results. We use common and widely understood ML methods to reduce complexity and enable accessibility to the chemical engineering community. We reduce the experiment time by up to 83%. Our evaluation shows that a small data set is sufficient to train an acceptable model. 300 experiments are needed, including the validation set. We use a well understood multilayer perceptron (MLP) model. We show that more complex models are not necessary and simpler methods are not sufficient.
papers.abstract_zh: 美国约 1/3 的制造业使用催化工艺，从化学工程领域到可再生能源领域。评估单分子或单个分子的活性对于开发高效催化剂是必要的。它们的异质结构导致颗粒特异性催化活性。单分子实验可能既耗时又困难。我们的目的是建立一种机器学习 (ML) 模型，使化学研究人员能够运行更短的单分子实验以获得相同水平的结果。我们使用常见且广泛理解的机器学习方法来降低复杂性并方便化学工程社区的使用。我们将实验时间缩短了 83%。我们的评估表明，小数据集足以训练可接受的模型。需要 300 个实验，包括验证集。我们使用众所周知的多层感知器（MLP）模型。我们表明，更复杂的模型是不必要的，更简单的方法也是不够的。

papers.title: Many Cores, Many Models: GPU Programming Model vs. Vendor Compatibility Overview.
papers.abstract: In recent history, GPUs became a key driver of compute performance in HPC. With the installation of the Frontier supercomputer, they became the enablers of the Exascale era; further largest-scale installations are in progress (Aurora, El Capitan, JUPITER). But the early-day dominance by NVIDIA and their CUDA programming model has changed: The current HPC GPU landscape features three vendors (AMD, Intel, NVIDIA), each with native and derived programming models. The choices are ample, but not all models are supported on all platforms, especially if support for Fortran is needed; in addition, some restrictions might apply. It is hard for scientific programmers to navigate this abundance of choices and limits. This paper gives a guide by matching the GPU platforms with supported programming models, presented in a concise table and further elaborated in detailed comments. An assessment is made regarding the level of support of a model on a platform.
papers.abstract_zh: 在最近的历史中，GPU 成为 HPC 计算性能的关键驱动因素。随着Frontier超级计算机的安装，他们成为了Exascale时代的推动者；更大规模的安装正在进行中（Aurora、El Capitan、JUPITER）。但 NVIDIA 及其 CUDA 编程模型的早期主导地位已经发生了变化：当前 HPC GPU 领域由三个供应商（AMD、Intel、NVIDIA）组成，每个供应商都有本机和派生编程模型。选择很充足，但并非所有平台都支持所有模型，特别是需要支持 Fortran 时；此外，可能还存在一些限制。对于科学程序员来说，要驾驭如此丰富的选择和限制是很困难的。本文通过将 GPU 平台与支持的编程模型相匹配来提供指导，以简洁的表格形式呈现，并以详细的注释进一步阐述。对平台上模型的支持级别进行评估。

papers.title: Mapping High-Level Concurrency from OpenMP and MPI to ThreadSanitizer Fibers.
papers.abstract: High-level parallel programming paradigms like MPI and OpenMP allow expressing concurrency independent from the execution unit finally executing the code. Most general-purpose data race detection tools perform thread-centric analyses with the operating system thread as the execution unit. ThreadSanitizer introduced the concept of software fibers as more fine-grained execution units. We use ThreadSanitizer fibers to model the concurrency semantics of OpenMP tasks, MPI non-blocking communication, and MPI one-sided communication. We propose different optimizations regarding handling ThreadSanitizer fibers, resulting in less runtime and memory overhead. In our experiment, we demonstrate how this augmented tool set can be applied to a highly asynchronous application using OpenMP tasking in combination with MPI non-blocking communication. For task-centric data race detection, we observe a moderate runtime overhead of up to 12%. Handling MPI non-blocking communication results in up to 3x runtime overhead. The holistic analysis of the code yields up to 10x runtime overhead. Experiments with existing classification quality benchmarks show that the fiber-based analysis does not introduce unexpected false positive reports but is able to detect more data races.
papers.abstract_zh: MPI 和 OpenMP 等高级并行编程范例允许独立于最终执行代码的执行单元来表达并发性。大多数通用数据竞争检测工具以操作系统线程作为执行单元来执行以线程为中心的分析。 ThreadSanitizer 引入了软件纤维的概念作为更细粒度的执行单元。我们使用 ThreadSanitizer 纤维对 OpenMP 任务、MPI 非阻塞通信和 MPI 单向通信的并发语义进行建模。我们提出了关于处理 ThreadSanitizer 纤维的不同优化，从而减少运行时间和内存开销。在我们的实验中，我们演示了如何使用 OpenMP 任务处理与 MPI 非阻塞通信相结合，将此增强工具集应用于高度异步应用程序。对于以任务为中心的数据竞争检测，我们观察到中等的运行时开销高达 12%。处理 MPI 非阻塞通信会导致高达 3 倍的运行时开销。对代码的整体分析会产生高达 10 倍的运行时开销。对现有分类质量基准的实验表明，基于光纤的分析不会引入意外的误报报告，但能够检测更多的数据竞争。

papers.title: Massively Distributed Finite-Volume Flux Computation.
papers.abstract: Designing large-scale geological carbon capture and storage projects and ensuring safe long-term CO2 containment – as a climate change mitigation strategy – requires fast and accurate numerical simulations. These simulations involve solving complex PDEs governing subsurface fluid flow using implicit finite-volume schemes widely based on Two-Point Flux Approximation (TPFA). This task is computationally and memory expensive, especially when performed on highly detailed geomodels. In most current HPC architectures, memory hierarchy and data management mechanisms are insufficient to overcome the challenges of large scale numerical simulations. Therefore, it is crucial to design algorithms that can exploit alternative and more balanced paradigms, such as dataflow and in-memory computing. This work introduces an algorithm for TPFA computations that exploits a dataflow architecture, such as Cerebras CS-2, which helps to significantly minimize memory bottlenecks. Our implementation achieves two orders of magnitude speedup compared to multiple reference implementations running on latest generations of NVIDIA GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 设计大规模地质碳捕获和封存项目并确保安全的长期二氧化碳遏制（作为气候变化缓解策略）需要快速而准确的数值模拟。这些模拟涉及使用广泛基于两点通量近似 (TPFA) 的隐式有限体积方案求解控制地下流体流动的复杂偏微分方程。此任务的计算量和内存消耗很大，尤其是在高度详细的地理模型上执行时。在大多数当前的 HPC 架构中，内存层次结构和数据管理机制不足以克服大规模数值模拟的挑战。因此，设计能够利用替代且更平衡的范式（例如数据流和内存计算）的算法至关重要。这项工作引入了一种利用数据流架构的 TPFA 计算算法，例如 Cerebras CS-2，有助于显着减少内存瓶颈。与在最新一代 NVIDIA GPU 上运行的多个参考实现相比，我们的实现实现了两个数量级的加速。

papers.title: MatRIS: Multi-level Math Library Abstraction for Heterogeneity and Performance Portability using IRIS Runtime.
papers.abstract: Vendor libraries are tuned for a specific architecture and are not portable to others. Moreover, they lack support for heterogeneity and multi-device orchestration, which is required for efficient use of contemporary HPC and cloud resources. To address these challenges, we introduce MatRIS—a multilevel math library abstraction for scalable and performance-portable sparse/dense BLAS/LAPACK operations using IRIS runtime. The MatRIS-IRIS co-design introduces three levels of abstraction to make the implementation completely architecture agnostic and provide highly productive programming. We demonstrate that MatRIS is portable without any change in source code and can fully utilize multi-device heterogeneous systems by achieving high performance and scalability on Summit, Frontier, and a CADES cloud node equipped with four NVIDIA A100 GPUs and four AMD MI100 GPUs. A detailed performance study is presented in which MatRIS demonstrates multi-device scalability. When compared, MatRIS provides competitive and even better performance than libraries from vendors and other third parties.
papers.abstract_zh: 供应商库针对特定架构进行了调整，并且不可移植到其他架构。此外，它们缺乏对异构性和多设备编排的支持，而这是高效利用当代 HPC 和云资源所必需的。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了 MatRIS——一个多级数学库抽象，用于使用 IRIS 运行时进行可扩展和性能可移植的稀疏/密集 BLAS/LAPACK 操作。 MatRIS-IRIS 协同设计引入了三个抽象级别，使实现完全与架构无关，并提供高效的编程。我们证明MatRIS是可移植的，无需更改源代码，并且可以通过在Summit、Frontier和配备四个NVIDIA A100 GPU和四个AMD MI100 GPU的CADES云节点上实现高性能和可扩展性来充分利用多设备异构系统。详细的性能研究中，MatRIS 展示了多设备可扩展性。相比之下，MatRIS 提供的性能比供应商和其他第三方的库具有竞争力，甚至更好。

papers.title: Maximizing Data Utility for HPC Python Workflow Execution.
papers.abstract: Large-scale HPC workflows are increasingly implemented in dynamic languages such as Python, which allow for more rapid development than traditional techniques. However, the cost of executing Python applications at scale is often dominated by the distribution of common datasets and complex software dependencies. As the application scales up, data distribution becomes a limiting factor that prevents scaling beyond a few hundred nodes. To address this problem, we present the integration of Parsl (a Python-native parallel programming library) with TaskVine (a data-intensive workflow execution engine). Instead of relying on a shared filesystem to provide data to tasks on demand, Parsl is able to express advance data needs to TaskVine, which then performs efficient data distribution at runtime. This combination provides a performance speedup of 1.48x over the typical method of on-demand paging from the shared filesystem, while also providing an average task speedup of 1.79x with 2048 tasks and 256 nodes.
papers.abstract_zh: 大规模 HPC 工作流程越来越多地使用 Python 等动态语言实现，这使得开发速度比传统技术更快。然而，大规模执行 Python 应用程序的成本通常主要由公共数据集的分布和复杂的软件依赖项决定。随着应用程序的扩展，数据分布成为阻止扩展超过数百个节点的限制因素。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Parsl（Python 原生并行编程库）与 TaskVine（数据密集型工作流执行引擎）的集成。 Parsl 不依赖共享文件系统按需向任务提供数据，而是能够向 TaskVine 表达预先的数据需求，然后 TaskVine 在运行时执行高效的数据分发。与从共享文件系统按需分页的典型方法相比，这种组合的性能加速了 1.48 倍，同时还为 2048 个任务和 256 个节点提供了 1.79 倍的平均任务加速。

papers.title: MBFGraph: An SSD-based External Graph System for Evolving Graphs.
papers.abstract: The challenge of executing extensive graph analyses in-memory intensifies with growing graph sizes. This has given rise to disk-based external graph analytics systems that prioritize cost-effective HDDs/SSDs over pricier memory solutions. In response to this issue, our paper introduces and assesses the MBFGraph external graph system. This system leverages millions of Bloom filters within 1KB or 2KB graph data blocks to diminish graph analysis execution delays. Through our innovative MBF-query and MBF-construct algorithms, MBFGraph utilizes these Bloom filters as approximate indices, enabling the reading of only pertinent sections of dynamic graph data, thereby facilitating scalable analytics. Our tests revealed that, on a 475GB graph, MBFGraph cut down the execution durations of BFS and Pagerank by 24% and 60% respectively, using a mere 4GB memory. This is in comparison to a sequential, tailored-for-workload, disk-based external graph analytics system.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着图形大小的增加，在内存中执行广泛的图形分析的挑战也会加剧。这催生了基于磁盘的外部图形分析系统，该系统优先考虑具有成本效益的 HDD/SSD，而不是昂贵的内存解决方案。针对这个问题，我们的论文介绍并评估了 MBFGraph 外部图系统。该系统利用 1KB 或 2KB 图形数据块内的数百万个布隆过滤器来减少图形分析执行延迟。通过我们创新的 MBF 查询和 MBF 构造算法，MBFGraph 利用这些 Bloom 过滤器作为近似索引，从而能够仅读取动态图数据的相关部分，从而促进可扩展的分析。我们的测试表明，在 475GB 的图上，MBFGraph 仅使用 4GB 内存，就将 BFS 和 PageRank 的执行持续时间分别减少了 24% 和 60%。这是与顺序的、针对工作负载定制的、基于磁盘的外部图形分析系统相比。

papers.title: Memory Transfer Decomposition: Exploring Smart Data Movement Through Architecture-Aware Strategies.
papers.abstract: Modern high-performance computing systems feature myriad compute units connected via a complex network of nonuniform links. While extensive connectivity can improve communication latency and bandwidth between components, it requires careful orchestration. However, heterogeneous programming models generally expose a flat view of the hardware where all components are connected in a star topology through a uniform, non-descriptive link to the central processing unit. This discrepancy between actual architecture and the simplified abstraction most often employed by programmers results in suboptimal utilization of the complex system interconnects.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代高性能计算系统具有通过复杂的非均匀链接网络连接的无数计算单元。虽然广泛的连接可以改善组件之间的通信延迟和带宽，但它需要仔细的编排。然而，异构编程模型通常公开硬件的平面视图，其中所有组件通过统一的、非描述性的链接以星形拓扑连接到中央处理单元。实际架构与程序员最常使用的简化抽象之间的差异导致复杂系统互连的利用率不高。

papers.title: MEMQSim: Highly Memory-Efficient and Modularized Quantum State-Vector Simulation.
papers.abstract: No abstract available.
papers.abstract_zh: 没有可用的摘要。

papers.title: Mirage: Towards Low-interruption Services on Batch GPU Clusters with Reinforcement Learning.
papers.abstract: Accommodating long-running deep learning (DL) training and inference jobs is challenging on GPU clusters that use traditional batch schedulers, such as Slurm. Given fixed wall clock time limits, DL researchers usually need to run a sequence of batch jobs and experience long interruptions on overloaded machines. Such interruptions significantly lower the research productivity and QoS for services that are deployed in production. To mitigate the issues from interruption, we propose the design of a proactive provisioner and investigate a set of statistical learning and reinforcement learning (RL) techniques, including random forest, xgboost, Deep Q-Network, and policy gradient. Using production job traces from three GPU clusters, we train each model using a subset of the trace and then evaluate their generality using the remaining validation subset. We introduce Mirage, a Slurm-compatible resource provisioner that integrates the candidate ML methods. Our experiments show that the Mirage can reduce interruption by 17--100% and safeguard 23%-76% of jobs with zero interruption across varying load levels on the three clusters.
papers.abstract_zh: 对于使用传统批处理调度程序（例如 Slurm）的 GPU 集群来说，适应长时间运行的深度学习 (DL) 训练和推理作业具有挑战性。鉴于固定的挂钟时间限制，深度学习研究人员通常需要运行一系列批处理作业，并在超载的机器上经历长时间的中断。此类中断会显着降低生产中部署的服务的研究效率和服务质量。为了缓解中断问题，我们提出了主动配置器的设计，并研究了一组统计学习和强化学习（RL）技术，包括随机森林、xgboost、深度 Q 网络和策略梯度。使用来自三个 GPU 集群的生产作业跟踪，我们使用跟踪的子集训练每个模型，然后使用剩余的验证子集评估其通用性。我们引入 Mirage，它是一个与 Slurm 兼容的资源提供器，集成了候选 ML 方法。我们的实验表明，Mirage 可以将三个集群上不同负载级别的中断减少 17--100%，并以零中断的方式保护 23%-76% 的作业。

papers.title: Mitigating Coupling Map Constrained Correlated Measurement Errors on Quantum Devices.
papers.abstract: We introduce a technique for the suppression of state-dependent and correlated measurement errors, which are commonly observed on modern superconducting quantum devices. Our method leverages previous results, establishing that correlated errors tend to be physically localised on quantum devices to perform characterisations over the coupling map of the device, and to join overlapping measurement calibrations as a series of sparse matrices. We term this 'Coupling Map Calibration'. We quantitatively demonstrate the advantages of our proposed error mitigation system design across a range of current IBM quantum devices. Our experimental results on common benchmark circuits demonstrate up to a 41% reduction in the error rate without increasing the number of executions of the quantum device required when compared to conventional error mitigation methods.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种抑制状态相关和相关测量误差的技术，这些误差在现代超导量子器件中常见。我们的方法利用之前的结果，确定相关误差往往物理上定位在量子设备上，以对设备的耦合图进行表征，并将重叠的测量校准作为一系列稀疏矩阵加入。我们将此称为“耦合图校准”。我们在一系列当前 IBM 量子设备上定量展示了我们提出的错误缓解系统设计的优势。我们在常见基准电路上的实验结果表明，与传统的错误缓解方法相比，在不增加所需量子器件执行次数的情况下，错误率降低了 41%。

papers.title: Mixed-Precision S/DGEMM Using the TF32 and TF64 Frameworks on Low-Precision AI Tensor Cores.
papers.abstract: Using NVIDIA graphics processing units (GPUs) equipped with Tensor Cores has enabled the significant acceleration of general matrix multiplication (GEMM) for applications in machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI) and in high-performance computing (HPC) generally. The use of such power-efficient, specialized accelerators can provide a performance increase between 8 × and 20 ×, albeit with a loss in precision. However, a high level of precision is required in many large scientific and HPC applications, and computing in single or double precision is still necessary for many of these applications to maintain accuracy. Fortunately, mixed-precision methods can be employed to maintain a higher level of numerical precision while also taking advantage of the performance increases from computing with lower-precision AI cores. With this in mind, we extend the state of the art by using NVIDIA’s new TF32 framework. This new framework not only burdens some constraints of the previous frameworks, such as costly 32 16-bit castings but also provides an equivalent precision and performance by using a much simpler approach. We also propose a new framework called TF64 that attempts double-precision arithmetic with low-precision Tensor Cores. Although this framework does not exist yet, we validated the correctness of this idea and achieved an equivalent of 64-bit precision on 32-bit hardware.
papers.abstract_zh: 使用配备 Tensor Core 的 NVIDIA 图形处理单元 (GPU)，可以显着加速机器学习 (ML) 和人工智能 (AI) 以及高性能计算 (HPC) 中应用的通用矩阵乘法 (GEMM)。使用这种高能效的专用加速器可以将性能提高 8 倍到 20 倍，但精度会有所损失。然而，许多大型科学和 HPC 应用程序需要高精度，并且许多此类应用程序仍然需要单精度或双精度计算来保持精度。幸运的是，可以采用混合精度方法来保持更高水平的数值精度，同时还可以利用低精度 AI 核心计算带来的性能提升。考虑到这一点，我们通过使用 NVIDIA 的新 TF32 框架来扩展最先进的技术。这个新框架不仅减轻了以前框架的一些限制，例如昂贵的 32 16 位转换，而且还通过使用更简单的方法提供了同等的精度和性能。我们还提出了一个名为 TF64 的新框架，尝试使用低精度 Tensor Core 进行双精度算术。尽管这个框架还不存在，但我们验证了这个想法的正确性，并在 32 位硬件上实现了相当于 64 位的精度。

papers.title: Modelling Data Locality of Sparse Matrix-Vector Multiplication on the A64FX.
papers.abstract: One of the novel features of the Fujitsu A64FX CPU is the sector cache. This feature enables hardware-supported partitioning of the L1 and L2 caches and allows the programmer control of which partition is used to place data in. This paper performs an in-depth study of how to apply the sector cache to a frequently used sparse matrix-vector multiplication (SpMV) kernel.
