A performance model based on reuse analysis is used to better understand situations where the sector cache leads to improved reuse and to predict the cache behavior. The model correctly predicts the number of L2 cache misses within 2–3 % for sequential and parallel SpMV with 48 threads using a collection of 490 sparse matrices. Further experiments show the effect of various sector cache configurations on performance. A median speedup of about 1.05 × is achieved, whereas the maximum speedup is about 1.6 ×.
papers.abstract_zh: Fujitsu A64FX CPU 的一项新颖功能是扇区缓存。此功能支持硬件支持的 L1 和 L2 缓存分区，并允许程序员控制使用哪个分区来放置数据。本文深入研究了如何将扇区缓存应用于常用的稀疏矩阵向量乘法 (SpMV) 内核。基于重用分析的性能模型用于更好地了解扇区缓存导致改进重用的情况并预测缓存行为。该模型使用 490 个稀疏矩阵的集合，正确预测具有 48 个线程的顺序和并行 SpMV 的 L2 缓存未命中次数在 2-3% 范围内。进一步的实验显示了各种扇区缓存配置对性能的影响。中值加速比约为 1.05 倍，而最大加速比约为 1.6 倍。

papers.title: Moment Representation of Regularized Lattice Boltzmann Methods on NVIDIA and AMD GPUs.
papers.abstract: The lattice Boltzmann method is a highly scalable Navier-Stokes solver that has been applied to flow problems in a wide array of domains. However, the method is bandwidth-bound on modern GPU accelerators and has a large memory footprint. In this paper, we present new 2D and 3D GPU implementations of two different regularized lattice Boltzmann methods, which are not only able to achieve an acceleration of ∼ 1.4 × w.r.t. reference lattice Boltzmann implementations but also reduce the memory requirements by up to 35% and 47% in 2D and 3D simulations respectively. These new approaches are evaluated on NVIDIA and AMD GPU architectures.
papers.abstract_zh: 格子玻尔兹曼方法是一种高度可扩展的纳维-斯托克斯求解器，已应用于广泛领域中的流动问题。然而，该方法在现代 GPU 加速器上受到带宽限制，并且内存占用较大。在本文中，我们提出了两种不同正则化格子玻尔兹曼方法的新 2D 和 3D GPU 实现，它们不仅能够实现 ∼ 1.4 × w.r.t 的加速。参考格子玻尔兹曼实现，而且在 2D 和 3D 模拟中分别将内存需求减少了 35% 和 47%。这些新方法在 NVIDIA 和 AMD GPU 架构上进行了评估。

papers.title: MPI-RICAL: Data-Driven MPI Distributed Parallelism Assistance with Transformers.
papers.abstract: Computational science has made rapid progress in recent years, leading to ever increasing demand for supercomputing resources. For scientific applications that leverage such resources, Message Passing Interface (MPI) plays a crucial role in enabling distributed memory parallelization across multiple nodes. However, parallelizing MPI code manually, and specifically, performing domain decomposition, is a challenging and error-prone task.
papers.abstract_zh: 近年来计算科学取得了快速发展，导致对超级计算资源的需求不断增加。对于利用此类资源的科学应用程序，消息传递接口 (MPI) 在实现跨多个节点的分布式内存并行化方面发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，手动并行化 MPI 代码，特别是执行域分解，是一项具有挑战性且容易出错的任务。

papers.title: MPI-xCCL: A Portable MPI Library over Collective Communication Libraries for Various Accelerators.
papers.abstract: The evolution of high-performance computing toward diverse accelerators, including NVIDIA, AMD, Intel GPUs, and Habana Gaudi Accelerators, demands a user-friendly and efficient utilization of these technologies. While both GPU-aware MPI libraries and vendor-specific communication libraries cater to communication requirements, trade-offs emerge based on library selection across various message sizes. Thus, prioritizing usability, we propose MPI-xCCL, a Message Passing Interface-based runtime with cross-accelerator support for efficient, portable, scalable, and optimized communication performance. MPI-xCCL incorporates vendor-specific libraries with GPU-aware MPI runtimes ensuring multi-accelerator compatibility while adhering to MPI standards. The proposed hybrid designs leverage the benefits of MPI and xCCL algorithms and transparently to the end user. We evaluated our designs on various HPC systems using OSU Micro-Benchmarks, and Deep Learning frameworks TensorFlow with Horovod. On NVIDIA-GPU-enabled ThetaGPU, our designs outperformed Open MPI by 4.6x. On emerging Habana Gaudi-based systems, MPI-xCCL was also able to deliver similar performance as vendor-provided communication runtimes.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算向各种加速器（包括 NVIDIA、AMD、Intel GPU 和 Habana Gaudi 加速器）发展，需要用户友好且高效地利用这些技术。虽然 GPU 感知的 MPI 库和特定于供应商的通信库都可以满足通信要求，但根据不同消息大小的库选择，会出现权衡。因此，为了优先考虑可用性，我们提出了 MPI-xCCL，这是一种基于消息传递接口的运行时，具有跨加速器支持，可实现高效、可移植、可扩展和优化的通信性能。 MPI-xCCL 将供应商特定的库与 GPU 感知的 MPI 运行时相结合，确保多加速器兼容性，同时遵守 MPI 标准。所提出的混合设计充分利用了 MPI 和 xCCL 算法的优势，并且对最终用户透明。我们使用 OSU Micro-Benchmarks 以及深度学习框架 TensorFlow 和 Horovod 在各种 HPC 系统上评估了我们的设计。在支持 NVIDIA GPU 的 ThetaGPU 上，我们的设计比 Open MPI 性能高出 4.6 倍。在新兴的基于 Habana Gaudi 的系统上，MPI-xCCL 还能够提供与供应商提供的通信运行时类似的性能。

papers.title: msr-genie: Navigating Model Specific Registers Across Processor Generations.
papers.abstract: Performance tuning of High-Performance Computing (HPC) applications depends on sophisticated tuning of parameters on diverse architectures. These parameters are made available by vendors through low-level dials such as model-specific registers (MSRs). While the MSRs themselves provide a powerful mechanism for users to monitor and control processor features, accessing them is laborious due to lack of standard interfaces and clear documentation. As a result, the burden of determining which MSRs to consider and how to fine-tune them for an application lies with the end user. In this paper, we present msr-genie, an efficient and extensible query tool that reduces this user-level burden. The tool allows them to query bi-directionally across MSR lists as well as processor families and models, and provides them with guidance on appropriate bitmasks. The msr-genie tool is open-source and easily extensible, and we demonstrate its effectiveness with over thirty Intel processor models and over two-thousand unique MSRs.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 应用程序的性能调整取决于不同架构上参数的复杂调整。这些参数由供应商通过低级拨号（例如特定于型号的寄存器（MSR））提供。虽然 MSR 本身为用户提供了强大的机制来监视和控制处理器功能，但由于缺乏标准接口和清晰的文档，访问它们很费力。因此，确定要考虑哪些 MSR 以及如何针对应用程序对其进行微调的责任由最终用户承担。在本文中，我们提出了 msr-genie，这是一种高效且可扩展的查询工具，可以减轻用户级的负担。该工具允许他们跨 MSR 列表以及处理器系列和型号进行双向查询，并为他们提供有关适当位掩码的指导。 msr-genie 工具是开源的且易于扩展，我们通过 30 多个英特尔处理器型号和 2000 多个独特的 MSR 展示了其有效性。

papers.title: NNQS-Transformer: an Efficient and Scalable Neural Network Quantum States Approach for Ab initio Quantum Chemistry.
papers.abstract: Neural network quantum state (NNQS) has emerged as a promising candidate for quantum many-body problems, but its practical applications are often hindered by the high cost of sampling and local energy calculation. We develop a high-performance NNQS method for ab initio electronic structure calculations. The major innovations include: (1) A transformer based architecture as the quantum wave function ansatz; (2) A data-centric parallelization scheme for the variational Monte Carlo (VMC) algorithm which preserves data locality and well adapts for different computing architectures; (3) A parallel batch sampling strategy which reduces the sampling cost and achieves good load balance; (4) A parallel local energy evaluation scheme which is both memory and computationally efficient; (5) Study of real chemical systems demonstrates both the superior accuracy of our method compared to state-of-the-art and the strong and weak scalability for large molecular systems with up to 120 spin orbitals.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经网络量子态（NNQS）已成为量子多体问题的有希望的候选者，但其实际应用往往受到采样和局部能量计算的高成本阻碍。我们开发了一种用于从头计算电子结构的高性能 NNQS 方法。主要创新包括：（1）基于变压器的量子波函数 ansatz 架构； （2）变分蒙特卡罗（VMC）算法的以数据为中心的并行化方案，保留数据局部性并很好地适应不同的计算架构； (3)并行批量采样策略，降低采样成本，实现良好的负载平衡； (4) 并行局部能量评估方案，既具有内存效率又具有计算效率； (5) 对真实化学系统的研究表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法具有更高的准确性，并且对于具有多达 120 个自旋轨道的大分子系统具有强和弱的可扩展性。

papers.title: Novel Approaches Toward Scalable Composable Workflows in Hyper-Heterogeneous Computing Environments.
papers.abstract: The annual Workshop on Workflows in Support of Large-Scale Science (WORKS) is a premier venue for the scientific workflow community to present the latest advances in research and development on the many facets of scientific workflows throughout their life-cycle. The Lightning Talks at WORKS focus on describing a novel tool, scientific workflow, or concept, which are work-in-progress and address emerging technologies and frameworks to foster discussion in the community. This paper summarizes the lightning talks at the 2023 edition of WORKS, covering five topics: leveraging large language models to build and execute workflows; developing a common workflow scheduler interface; scaling uncertainty workflow applications on exascale computing systems; evaluating a transcriptomics workflow for cloud vs. HPC systems; and best practices in migrating legacy workflows to workflow management systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 年度支持大规模科学的工作流程研讨会 (WORKS) 是科学工作流程社区展示科学工作流程整个生命周期各个方面的最新研究和开发进展的首要场所。 WORKS 的闪电演讲重点描述一种新颖的工具、科学工作流程或概念，这些工具、科学工作流程或概念正在开发中，并涉及新兴技术和框架，以促进社区讨论。本文总结了 2023 年版 WORKS 上的闪电演讲，涵盖五个主题：利用大型语言模型构建和执行工作流程；开发通用工作流调度程序接口；在百亿亿次计算系统上扩展不确定性工作流程应用程序；评估云与 HPC 系统的转录组学工作流程；以及将遗留工作流程迁移到工作流程管理系统的最佳实践。

papers.title: NPAT - A Power Analysis Tool at NERSC.
papers.abstract: Power has recently become a significant limiting factor in supercomputing. It is imperative that future high-performance computing (HPC) systems are energy-efficient. Efficient system designs necessitate understanding the power signature of current supercomputing workloads. Additionally, that understanding will enable power efficiency improvements in existing systems. With advancements in power measurement and data collection techniques, many computing centers, including NERSC, collect a vast amount of data every second, including power usage and other performance metrics. However, access is not straightforward, being a time-consuming process. In this paper, we propose NPAT, a power analysis tool that aims to provide easy access to power usage data on the web. It provides a quick and accessible way to view the power usage data of NERSC systems, jobs, and applications. Being implemented in PHP, Javascript, and Python with open-source libraries and modules, it promises effortless portability to other sites.
papers.abstract_zh: 功耗最近已成为超级计算的一个重要限制因素。未来的高性能计算 (HPC) 系统必须节能。高效的系统设计需要了解当前超级计算工作负载的功率特征。此外，这种理解将有助于提高现有系统的能效。随着电力测量和数据收集技术的进步，包括 NERSC 在内的许多计算中心每秒都会收集大量数据，包括电力使用情况和其他性能指标。然而，访问并不简单，这是一个耗时的过程。在本文中，我们提出了 NPAT，这是一种功耗分析工具，旨在提供对网络上功耗数据的轻松访问。它提供了一种快速且易于访问的方式来查看 NERSC 系统、作业和应用程序的用电数据。它通过 PHP、Javascript 和 Python 以及开源库和模块实现，可轻松移植到其他站点。

papers.title: OctoRay: Framework for Scalable FPGA Cluster Acceleration of Python Big Data Applications.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we introduce OctoRay, a Python framework that allows users to easily combine several FPGA and Python libraries to run their big data analytics pipelines in parallel on FPGA-enabled clusters. We show that OctoRay provides users with multiple levels of freedom, regarding the type of FPGA, the choice of the application and the number of available FPGAs per node, while illustrating the simplicity of the usage of the framework. Additionally, we evaluate the performance of the framework on two use cases that represent typical stages of many big data analytics pipelines. We show that the FPGA implementation outperforms the software baseline by 2x to 12x as the number of FPGAs scales from 1 to 6. This demonstrates that the speedup scales linearly with the number of FPGAs, indicating the speedup potential OctoRay offers and the low overhead of the framework. OctoRay is open source and publicly available at https://github.com/abs-tudelft/octoray
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 OctoRay，这是一个 Python 框架，允许用户轻松组合多个 FPGA 和 Python 库，在支持 FPGA 的集群上并行运行大数据分析管道。我们表明，OctoRay 为用户提供了多个级别的自由度，涉及 FPGA 类型、应用程序的选择以及每个节点可用 FPGA 的数量，同时说明了该框架使用的简单性。此外，我们还评估了框架在两个用例上的性能，这两个用例代表了许多大数据分析管道的典型阶段。我们表明，当 FPGA 数量从 1 增加到 6 时，FPGA 实现的性能优于软件基线 2 倍到 12 倍。这表明加速与 FPGA 数量成线性关系，表明 OctoRay 提供的加速潜力和框架的低开销。 OctoRay 是开源的，可在 https://github.com/abs-tudelft/octoray 上公开获取

papers.title: OpenMP Kernel Language Extensions for Performance Portable GPU Codes.
papers.abstract: In contemporary high-performance computing architectures, the integration of GPU accelerators has become increasingly prevalent. To harness the full potential of these accelerators, developers often resort to vendor-specific kernel languages, such as CUDA. While this approach ensures optimal efficiency, it inherently compromises portability and engenders vendor dependency. Existing portable programming models, such as OpenMP, while promising, demand extensive code rewriting due to their foundamental difference from kernel languages.
papers.abstract_zh: 在当代高性能计算架构中，GPU加速器的集成已经变得越来越普遍。为了充分利用这些加速器的潜力，开发人员通常求助于特定于供应商的内核语言，例如 CUDA。虽然这种方法可确保最佳效率，但它本质上会损害可移植性并产生供应商依赖性。现有的可移植编程模型（例如 OpenMP）虽然很有前途，但由于它们与内核语言的根本区别，需要大量的代码重写。

papers.title: OpenSHMEM Queues: An abstraction for enhancing message rate, bandwidth utilization, and reducing tail latency in OpenSHMEM Applications.
papers.abstract: The performance of OpenSHMEM applications is significantly influenced by the network message rate and the efficient utilization of bandwidth for small messages. While network hardware offers higher message rates, software overheads hinder the achievement of these rates within the programming model and applications. The absence of appropriate abstractions in the OpenSHMEM model exacerbates this challenge. For instance, message aggregation, which has been successful with MPI derived datatypes through user mode memory registration (UMR), encounters abstraction hurdles in the OpenSHMEM programming model. Although, such improvements can only be achieved using separate middleware built on top of OpenSHMEM and cannot be easily achieved natively. Furthermore, Quality of Service (QoS) for short messages under high loads is important for HPC applications, particularly in the case of OpenSHMEM. Congestion experienced in shared HPC systems due to contention for shared networks, I/O systems, etc., can create an adverse user experience and can impact overall system performance, leading to prolonged tail latencies. To address these issues, this paper introduces a Queues API abstraction for the OpenSHMEM programming model, enabling message aggregation and in-network prioritization for small data transfers. We present the OpenSHMEM API, build a prototype for OpenSHMEM queues, explore various message aggregation techniques, and evaluate NVIDIA InfiniBand virtual lanes for QoS in OpenSHMEM. Our results demonstrate a 2x-3x bandwidth improvement using OpenSHMEM queues with message aggregation. Additionally, we achieve a substantial reduction in tail latency, with improvements of up to 3.5x observed in congested scenarios for one-sided transfers.
papers.abstract_zh: OpenSHMEM 应用程序的性能很大程度上受到网络消息速率和小消息带宽的有效利用的影响。虽然网络硬件提供了更高的消息速率，但软件开销阻碍了编程模型和应用程序中这些速率的实现。 The absence of appropriate abstractions in the OpenSHMEM model exacerbates this challenge.例如，通过用户模式内存注册 (UMR) 成功使用 MPI 派生数据类型的消息聚合在 OpenSHMEM 编程模型中遇到了抽象障碍。尽管如此，此类改进只能使用构建在 OpenSHMEM 之上的单独中间件来实现，并且无法轻松地在本机实现。此外，高负载下短消息的服务质量 (QoS) 对于 HPC 应用程序非常重要，特别是在 OpenSHMEM 的情况下。由于共享网络、I/O 系统等的争用，共享 HPC 系统中出现的拥塞可能会造成不良的用户体验，并可能影响整体系统性能，导致尾部延迟延长。为了解决这些问题，本文引入了 OpenSHMEM 编程模型的队列 API 抽象，支持小数据传输的消息聚合和网络内优先级排序。我们介绍 OpenSHMEM API，构建 OpenSHMEM 队列原型，探索各种消息聚合技术，并评估 NVIDIA InfiniBand 虚拟通道的 OpenSHMEM 中的 QoS。我们的结果表明，使用具有消息聚合功能的 OpenSHMEM 队列可将带宽提高 2-3 倍。此外，我们还大幅减少了尾部延迟，在单侧传输的拥塞场景中观察到延迟延迟高达 3.5 倍。

papers.title: Optimization of Ported CFD Kernels on Intel Data Center GPU Max 1550 using oneAPI ESIMD.
papers.abstract: We describe our experience porting FUN3D’s CUDA-optimized kernels to Intel oneAPI SYCL. We faced several challenges, including foremost the suboptimal performance of the oneAPI code on Intel’s new data center GPU. Suboptimal performance of the oneAPI code was due primarily to high register spills, memory latency, and poor vectorization. We addressed these issues by implementing the kernels using Intel oneAPI’s Explicit SIMD SYCL extension (ESIMD) API. The ESIMD API enables the writing of explicitly vectorized kernel code, gives more precise control over register usage and prefetching, and better handles thread divergence compared to SYCL. The ESIMD code outperforms the optimized SYCL code by up to a factor of 3.6, depending on the kernel. We also compared the performance of three ESIMD kernels on the Intel Data Center Max 1550 GPU with the CUDA-optimized versions on NVIDIA V100 and A100 GPUs. We found the performance of a single tile of the Intel GPU using ESIMD greater than NVIDIA V100 and similar to NVIDIA A100.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们描述了将 FUN3D 的 CUDA 优化内核移植到英特尔 oneAPI SYCL 的经验。我们面临着多项挑战，其中最重要的是 oneAPI 代码在英特尔新数据中心 GPU 上的性能不佳。 oneAPI 代码的性能欠佳主要是由于高寄存器溢出、内存延迟和矢量化较差。我们通过使用 Intel oneAPI 的显式 SIMD SYCL 扩展 (ESIMD) API 实现内核来解决这些问题。与 SYCL 相比，ESIMD API 允许编写显式矢量化内核代码，对寄存器使用和预取进行更精确的控制，并更好地处理线程分歧。 ESIMD 代码的性能比优化的 SYCL 代码高出 3.6 倍，具体取决于内核。我们还将英特尔数据中心 Max 1550 GPU 上的三个 ESIMD 内核与 NVIDIA V100 和 A100 GPU 上的 CUDA 优化版本的性能进行了比较。我们发现使用 ESMD 的 Intel GPU 的单个图块的性能高于 NVIDIA V100，与 NVIDIA A100 相似。

papers.title: Optimization towards Efficiency and Stateful of dispel4py.
papers.abstract: Scientific workflows bridge scientific challenges with computational resources. While dispel4py, a stream-based workflow system, offers mappings to parallel enactment engines like MPI or Multiprocessing, its optimization primarily focuses on dynamic process-to-task allocation for improved performance. An efficiency gap persists, particularly with the growing emphasis on conserving computing resources. Moreover, the existing dynamic optimization lacks support for stateful applications and grouping operations.
papers.abstract_zh: 科学工作流程将科学挑战与计算资源联系起来。虽然 dispel4py 是一种基于流的工作流系统，提供了到 MPI 或多处理等并行执行引擎的映射，但其优化主要侧重于动态进程到任务分配，以提高性能。效率差距仍然存在，尤其是在人们越来越重视节约计算资源的情况下。而且，现有的动态优化缺乏对有状态应用和分组操作的支持。

papers.title: Optimized Patient-Specific Catheter Placement for Convection-Enhanced Nanoparticle Delivery in Recurrent Glioblastoma.
papers.abstract: No abstract available.
papers.abstract_zh: 没有可用的摘要。

papers.title: Optimized Uncertainty Estimation for Vision Transformers: Enhancing Adversarial Robustness and Performance Using Selective Classification.
papers.abstract: Deep Learning models often exhibit undue confidence when encountering out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs, misclassifying with high confidence. The ideal outcome, in these cases, would be an "I do not know" verdict. We enhance the trustworthiness of our models through selective classification, allowing the model to abstain from making predictions when facing uncertainty. Rather than a singular prediction, the model offers a prediction distribution, enabling users to gauge the model’s trustworthiness and determine the need for human intervention. We assess uncertainty in two baseline models: a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and a Vision Transformer (ViT). By leveraging these uncertainty values, we minimize errors by refraining from predictions during high uncertainty. Additionally, we evaluate these models across various distributed architectures, including new AI architectures, Cerebras CS-2, and SambaNova SN30.
papers.abstract_zh: 深度学习模型在遇到分布外（OOD）输入时通常会表现出过度的置信度，从而导致高置信度的错误分类。在这些情况下，理想的结果是“我不知道”的判决。我们通过选择性分类来增强模型的可信度，使模型在面临不确定性时避免做出预测。该模型提供的不是单一预测，而是预测分布，使用户能够衡量模型的可信度并确定是否需要人工干预。我们评估两个基线模型的不确定性：卷积神经网络（CNN）和视觉变换器（ViT）。通过利用这些不确定性值，我们可以在高度不确定性期间避免进行预测，从而最大限度地减少错误。此外，我们还跨各种分布式架构评估这些模型，包括新的 AI 架构、Cerebras CS-2 和 SambaNova SN30。

papers.title: Optimizing Direct Convolutions on ARM Multi-Cores.
papers.abstract: Convolution kernels are widely seen in deep learning workloads and are often responsible for performance bottlenecks. Recent research has demonstrated that a direct convolution approach can outperform the traditional convolution implementation based on tensor-to-matrix conversions. However, existing approaches for direct convolution still have room for performance improvement. We present nDirect, a new direct convolution approach that targets ARM-based multi-core CPUs commonly found in smartphones and HPC systems. nDirect is designed to be compatible with the data layout formats used by mainstream deep learning frameworks but offers new optimizations for the computational kernel, data packing, and parallelization. We evaluate nDirect by applying it to representative convolution kernels and demonstrating its performance on four distinct ARM multi-core CPU platforms. We compare nDirect against state-of-the-art convolution optimization techniques. Experimental results show that nDirect gives the best overall performance across evaluation scenarios and platforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 卷积核广泛应用于深度学习工作负载中，并且通常是造成性能瓶颈的原因。最近的研究表明，直接卷积方法可以优于基于张量到矩阵转换的传统卷积实现。然而，现有的直接卷积方法仍然有性能改进的空间。我们推出了 nDirect，这是一种新的直接卷积方法，针对智能手机和 HPC 系统中常见的基于 ARM 的多核 CPU。 nDirect 旨在与主流深度学习框架使用的数据布局格式兼容，但为计算内核、数据打包和并行化提供了新的优化。我们通过将 nDirect 应用于代表性卷积核并在四个不同的 ARM 多核 CPU 平台上展示其性能来评估 nDirect。我们将 nDirect 与最先进的卷积优化技术进行比较。实验结果表明，nDirect 在评估场景和平台上提供了最佳的整体性能。

papers.title: Optimizing High-Performance Linpack for Exascale Accelerated Architectures.
papers.abstract: We detail the performance optimizations made in rocHPL, AMD's open-source implementation of the High-Performance Linpack (HPL) benchmark targeting accelerated node architectures designed for exascale systems such as the Frontier supercomputer. The implementation leverages the high-throughput GPU accelerators on the node via highly optimized linear algebra libraries, as well as the entire CPU socket to perform latency-sensitive factorization phases. We detail novel performance improvements such as a multithreaded approach to computing the panel factorization phase on the CPU, time-sharing of CPU cores between processes on the node, as well as several optimizations which hide MPI communication. We present some performance results of this implementation of the HPL benchmark on a single node of the Frontier early access cluster at Oak Ridge National Laboratory, as well as scaling to multiple nodes.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们详细介绍了 rocHPL 中的性能优化，rocHPL 是 AMD 高性能 Linpack (HPL) 基准测试的开源实现，针对专为 Frontier 超级计算机等百亿亿级系统设计的加速节点架构。该实现通过高度优化的线性代数库利用节点上的高吞吐量 GPU 加速器以及整个 CPU 插槽来执行延迟敏感的分解阶段。我们详细介绍了新颖的性能改进，例如在 CPU 上计算面板分解阶段的多线程方法、节点上进程之间 CPU 核心的分时，以及隐藏 MPI 通信的多项优化。我们展示了在橡树岭国家实验室 Frontier 早期访问集群的单个节点上实施 HPL 基准测试以及扩展到多个节点的一些性能结果。

papers.title: Optimizing Irregular Communication with Neighborhood Collectives and Locality-Aware Parallelism.
papers.abstract: Irregular communication often limits both the performance and scalability of parallel applications. Typically, applications individually implement irregular communication as point-to-point, and any optimizations are integrated directly into the application. As a result, these optimizations lack portability. It is difficult to optimize point-to-point messages within MPI, as the interface for single messages provides no information on the collection of all communication to be performed. However, the persistent neighbor collective API, released in the MPI 4 standard, provides an interface for portable optimizations of irregular communication within MPI libraries.
papers.abstract_zh: 不规则的通信通常会限制并行应用程序的性能和可扩展性。通常，应用程序单独实现点对点的不规则通信，并且任何优化都直接集成到应用程序中。因此，这些优化缺乏可移植性。在 MPI 内优化点对点消息很困难，因为单个消息的接口不提供有关要执行的所有通信的集合的信息。然而，MPI 4 标准中发布的持久邻居集合 API 提供了一个接口，用于 MPI 库内不规则通信的可移植优化。

papers.title: Optimizing MPI Collectives on Shared Memory Multi-Cores.
papers.abstract: Message Passing Interface (MPI) programs often experience performance slowdowns due to collective communication operations, like broadcasting and reductions. As modern CPUs integrate more processor cores, running multiple MPI processes on shared-memory machines to take advantage of hardware parallelism is becoming increasingly common. In this context, it is crucial to optimize MPI collective communications for shared-memory execution. However, existing MPI collective implementations on shared-memory systems have two primary drawbacks. The first is extensive redundant data movements when performing reduction collectives, and the second is the ineffective use of non-temporal instructions to optimize streamed data processing. To address these limitations, this paper proposes two optimization techniques that minimize data movements and enhance the use of non-temporal instructions. We evaluated our techniques by integrating them into the OpenMPI library and tested their performance using micro-benchmarks and real-world applications running on two multi-core clusters. Experimental results show that our approach significantly outperforms existing techniques, yielding a 1.2--6.4x performance improvement.
papers.abstract_zh: 消息传递接口 (MPI) 程序经常会因集体通信操作（例如广播和缩减）而出现性能下降的情况。随着现代 CPU 集成了更多处理器内核，在共享内存计算机上运行多个 MPI 进程以利用硬件并行性变得越来越普遍。在这种情况下，优化共享内存执行的 MPI 集体通信至关重要。然而，共享内存系统上现有的 MPI 集体实现有两个主要缺点。第一个是执行归约集合时大量的冗余数据移动，第二个是无效地使用非临时指令来优化流数据处理。为了解决这些限制，本文提出了两种优化技术，最大限度地减少数据移动并增强非临时指令的使用。我们通过将我们的技术集成到 OpenMPI 库中来评估它们，并使用微基准测试和在两个多核集群上运行的实际应用程序测试它们的性能。实验结果表明，我们的方法明显优于现有技术，性能提高了 1.2--6.4 倍。

papers.title: Optimizing Reconfigurable Optical Datacenters: The Power of Randomization.
papers.abstract: Reconfigurable optical topologies are a promising new technology to improve datacenter network performance and cope with the explosive growth of traffic. In particular, these networks allow to directly and adaptively connect racks between which there is currently much traffic, hence making an optimal use of the bandwidth capacity by avoiding multi-hop forwarding.
papers.abstract_zh: 可重构光拓扑是一项有前途的新技术，可提高数据中心网络性能并应对流量的爆炸性增长。特别是，这些网络允许直接且自适应地连接当前存在大量流量的机架，从而通过避免多跳转发来最佳利用带宽容量。

papers.title: Optimizing Write Performance for Checkpointing to Parallel File Systems Using LSM-Trees.
papers.abstract: The widening gap between compute performance and I/O performance on modern HPC systems means that writing checkpoints to a parallel file system for fault tolerance is fast becoming a bottleneck to high-performance. It is therefore vital that software is engineered such that it can achieve the highest proportion of available performance on the underlying hardware; and this is a burden often carried by I/O middleware libraries. In this paper, we outline such an I/O library based on a Log-structured Merge Tree (LSM-Tree), not just for metadata, but also scientific data. We benchmark its performance using the IOR benchmark, demonstrating 2.4 to 76.7 × better performance than alternative file formats, such as ADIOS2, HDF5, and IOR baseline when running on a Lustre Parallel File System. We further demonstrate that when our LSM-Tree I/O library is used as a storage layer for ADIOS2, the resulting I/O library still outperforms the default ADIOS2 implementation by 1.5 ×.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代 HPC 系统上计算性能和 I/O 性能之间不断扩大的差距意味着将检查点写入并行文件系统以实现容错很快就会成为高性能的瓶颈。因此，软件设计必须能够在底层硬件上实现最高比例的可用性能；这是 I/O 中间件库经常承担的负担。在本文中，我们概述了这样一个基于日志结构合并树（LSM-Tree）的 I/O 库，不仅适用于元数据，还适用于科学数据。我们使用 IOR 基准对其性能进行基准测试，结果表明，在 Lustre 并行文件系统上运行时，性能比其他文件格式（例如 ADIOS2、HDF5 和 IOR 基准）高 2.4 至 76.7 倍。我们进一步证明，当我们的 LSM-Tree I/O 库用作 ADIOS2 的存储层时，生成的 I/O 库的性能仍然比默认的 ADIOS2 实现高 1.5 倍。

papers.title: Overcoming Active Directory Woes with Plain Text Caches and Replacing Passwords.
papers.abstract: Reliable authentication is a key component of all HPC systems. This paper discusses an approach that bypasses systemic authentication problems experienced by the authors to provide a simple and reliable manner of managing service accounts and user groups for HPC centers using plain text caches and alternatives to passwords.
papers.abstract_zh: 可靠的身份验证是所有 HPC 系统的关键组件。本文讨论了一种绕过作者遇到的系统身份验证问题的方法，使用纯文本缓存和密码替代方案，提供一种简单可靠的方式来管理 HPC 中心的服务帐户和用户组。

papers.title: PanguLU: A Scalable Regular Two-Dimensional Block-Cyclic Sparse Direct Solver on Distributed Heterogeneous Systems.
papers.abstract: Sparse direct solvers play a vital role in large-scale high performance computing in science and engineering. Existing distributed sparse direct methods employ multifrontal/supernodal patterns to aggregate columns of nearly identical forms and to exploit dense basic linear algebra subprograms (BLAS) for computation. However, such a data layout may bring more unevenness when the structure of the input matrix is not ideal, and using dense BLAS may waste many floating-point operations on zero fill-ins.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏直接求解器在科学和工程领域的大规模高性能计算中发挥着至关重要的作用。现有的分布式稀疏直接方法采用多额/超节点模式来聚合几乎相同形式的列，并利用密集的基本线性代数子程序（BLAS）进行计算。然而，当输入矩阵的结构不理想时，这样的数据布局可能会带来更多的不均匀性，并且使用密集BLAS可能会在零填充上浪费许多浮点运算。

papers.title: Parallel Symbolic Cholesky Factorization.
papers.abstract: We present a hybrid sequential/parallel symbolic Cholesky factorization algorithm that computes the sparsity pattern of the symbolic factors in parallel. We evaluate the performance on a large subset of the SuiteSparse matrix collection and multicore CPUs as well as flagship GPUs by AMD and NVIDIA, achieving speedups of an order of magnitude compared to a state-of-the-art sequential symbolic Cholesky factorization.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种混合顺序/并行符号 Cholesky 分解算法，该算法并行计算符号因子的稀疏模式。我们评估了 SuiteSparse 矩阵集合的一个大子集和多核 CPU 以及 AMD 和 NVIDIA 的旗舰 GPU 的性能，与最先进的顺序符号 Cholesky 分解相比，实现了一个数量级的加速。

papers.title: Parallel Top-K Algorithms on GPU: A Comprehensive Study and New Methods.
papers.abstract: The top-K problem is an essential part of many important applications in scientific computing, information retrieval, etc. As data volume grows rapidly, high-performance parallel top-K algorithms become critical. We propose two parallel top-K algorithms, AIR Top-K (Adaptive and Iteration-fused Radix Top-K) and GridSelect, for GPU. AIR Top-K employs an iteration-fused design to minimize CPU-GPU communication and device data access. Its adaptive strategy eliminates unnecessary device memory traffic automatically under various data distributions. GridSelect can process data on-the-fly. It adopts a shared queue and parallel two-step insertion to decrease the frequency of costly operations. We comprehensively compare 8 open-source GPU implementations and our methods for a wide range of problem sizes and data distributions. For batch sizes 1 and 100, respectively, AIR Top-K shows 1.98--21.48× and 8.01--574.78× speedup over previous radix top-K algorithm, and 1.44--7.34× and 1.38--31.91× speedup over state-of-the-art methods. GridSelect shows up to 882.29× speedup over its baseline.
papers.abstract_zh: top-K问题是科学计算、信息检索等许多重要应用的重要组成部分。随着数据量的快速增长，高性能并行top-K算法变得至关重要。我们提出了两种用于 GPU 的并行 top-K 算法：AIR Top-K（自适应和迭代融合的 Radix Top-K）和 GridSelect。 AIR Top-K 采用迭代融合设计，最大限度地减少 CPU-GPU 通信和设备数据访问。其自适应策略在各种数据分布下自动消除不必要的设备内存流量。 GridSelect 可以即时处理数据。它采用共享队列和并行两步插入来降低昂贵操作的频率。我们针对各种问题规模和数据分布全面比较了 8 种开源 GPU 实现和我们的方法。对于批量大小分别为 1 和 100，AIR Top-K 比以前的基数 top-K 算法分别显示 1.98--21.48× 和 8.01--574.78× 加速，比最先进的方法显示 1.44--7.34× 和 1.38--31.91× 加速。 GridSelect 的速度比其基线提高了 882.29 倍。

papers.title: Pareto Optimization of CNN Models via Hardware-Aware Neural Architecture Search for Drainage Crossing Classification on Resource-Limited Devices.
papers.abstract: Embedded devices, constrained by limited memory and processors, require deep learning models to be tailored to their specifications. This research explores customized model architectures for classifying drainage crossing images. Building on the foundational ResNet-18, this paper aims to maximize prediction accuracy, reduce memory size, and minimize inference latency. Various configurations were systematically probed by leveraging hardware-aware neural architecture search, accumulating 1,717 experimental results over six benchmarking variants. The experimental data analysis, enhanced by nn-Meter, provided a comprehensive understanding of inference latency across four different predictors. Significantly, a Pareto front analysis with three objectives of accuracy, latency, and memory resulted in five non-dominated solutions. These standout models showcased efficiency while retaining accuracy, offering a compelling alternative to the conventional ResNet-18 when deployed in resource-constrained environments. The paper concludes by highlighting insights drawn from the results and suggesting avenues for future exploration.
papers.abstract_zh: 嵌入式设备受到有限内存和处理器的限制，需要根据其规格定制深度学习模型。本研究探索了用于对排水交叉图像进行分类的定制模型架构。本文以基础 ResNet-18 为基础，旨在最大限度地提高预测精度、减少内存大小并最大限度地减少推理延迟。通过利用硬件感知神经架构搜索系统地探索了各种配置，在六个基准测试变体中积累了 1,717 个实验结果。由 nn-Meter 增强的实验数据分析提供了对四种不同预测变量的推理延迟的全面理解。值得注意的是，具有准确性、延迟和内存三个目标的帕累托前沿分析产生了五个非支配解决方案。这些出色的模型在保持准确性的同时展示了效率，在资源受限的环境中部署时为传统 ResNet-18 提供了令人信服的替代方案。本文最后强调了从结果中得出的见解，并提出了未来探索的途径。

papers.title: Peachy Parallel Assignments (EduHPC 2023).
papers.abstract: Peachy Parallel Assignments are model assignments for teaching parallel computing concepts. They are competitively selected for being adoptable by other instructors and “cool and inspirational” for students. Thus, they allow instructors to easily add high-quality assignments that will engage students to their classes.
papers.abstract_zh: Peachy 并行作业是用于教授并行计算概念的模型作业。他们经过竞争性选拔，可供其他教师采用，并对学生来说“很酷且鼓舞人心”。因此，教师可以轻松添加高质量的作业，吸引学生参与课堂。

papers.title: PEAK: a Light-Weight Profiler for HPC Systems.
papers.abstract: In the context of the expanding landscape of contemporary High-Performance Computing (HPC) applications from petascale to exascale, the pursuit of performance optimization emerges as a significant impediment within software development endeavors. In the meantime, the escalating intricacies inherent in parallel architectures and systems serve to compound the challenges associated with performance enhancement. Here, we introduce PEAK (Performance Evaluation and Analysis Kit), a light-weight profiling tool developed with a specific focus on large-scale HPC applications. Using Dynamic Binary Instrumentation, PEAK is able to profile large-scale multi-threaded, multi-process applications with low overhead and high accuracy. We analyzed the overhead and accuracy of PEAK using synthetic benchmarks and real applications and compared it against the other widely used HPC profiling tools available. Our demonstration underscores that PEAK exhibits comparable overhead and accuracy to alternative profiling tools, while preserving its inherent simplicity.
papers.abstract_zh: 在当代高性能计算 (HPC) 应用从千万亿级扩展到百亿亿级的背景下，对性能优化的追求成为软件开发工作中的一个重大障碍。与此同时，并行架构和系统固有的不断升级的复杂性加剧了与性能增强相关的挑战。在这里，我们介绍 PEAK（性能评估和分析套件），这是一款专门针对大规模 HPC 应用程序而开发的轻量级分析工具。使用动态二进制仪器，PEAK 能够以低开销和高精度分析大规模多线程、多进程应用程序。我们使用综合基准和实际应用程序分析了 PEAK 的开销和准确性，并将其与其他广泛使用的 HPC 分析工具进行了比较。我们的演示强调，PEAK 具有与其他分析工具相当的开销和准确性，同时保留了其固有的简单性。

papers.title: PeeK: A Prune-Centric Approach for K Shortest Path Computation.
papers.abstract: The K shortest path (KSP) algorithm, which finds the top K shortest simple paths from a source to a target vertex, has a wide range of real-world applications, e.g., routing, vulnerability detection, and biology analysis. While the top K shortest simple paths offer invaluable insights, computing them is time-consuming. For example, on a Twitter graph (61.6M vertices and 1.5B edges), the best parallel method needs about 20 minutes to get 128 shortest paths between two vertices. A key observation we made is existing works search K shortest paths from the original graph, while top K shortest paths only cover a meager portion of the original graph, e.g., less than 0.001% on a Twitter graph for K = 128.
papers.abstract_zh: K 最短路径 (KSP) 算法可找到从源到目标顶点的前 K 个最短简单路径，具有广泛的实际应用，例如路由、漏洞检测和生物学分析。虽然前 K 个最短简单路径提供了宝贵的见解，但计算它们非常耗时。例如，在 Twitter 图（61.6M 个顶点和 1.5B 个边）上，最佳并行方法需要大约 20 分钟才能获得两个顶点之间的 128 条最短路径。我们所做的一个关键观察是，现有的工作从原始图中搜索 K 个最短路径，而前 K 个最短路径仅覆盖原始图的一小部分，例如，在 Twitter 图上，K = 128 时，不到 0.001%。

papers.title: Performance Engineering for Graduate Students: a View from Amsterdam.
papers.abstract: HPC relies on experts to design, implement, and tune (computational science) applications that can efficiently use current (super)computing systems. As such, we strongly believe we must educate our students to ensure their ability to drive these activities, together with the domain experts. To this end, in 2017, we have designed a performance engineering course that, inspired by several conference-like tutorials, covers the principles and practice of performance engineering: benchmarking, performance modeling, and performance improvement. In this paper, we describe the goals, learning objectives, and structure of the course, share students feedback and evaluation data, and discuss the lessons learned. After teaching the course seven times, our results show that the course is tough (as expected) but very well received, with high-scores and several students continuing on the path of performance engineering during and after their master studies.
papers.abstract_zh: HPC 依靠专家来设计、实施和调整（计算科学）应用程序，以有效地使用当前（超级）计算系统。因此，我们坚信我们必须教育我们的学生，以确保他们有能力与领域专家一起推动这些活动。为此，2017年，我们设计了性能工程课程，受到几场会议式教程的启发，涵盖了性能工程的原理和实践：基准测试、性能建模和性能改进。在本文中，我们描述了课程的目标、学习目的和结构，分享学生的反馈和评估数据，并讨论所学到的经验教训。在教授该课程七次后，我们的结果表明，该课程很难（正如预期的那样），但很受欢迎，得分很高，并且一些学生在硕士学习期间和之后继续走上性能工程的道路。

papers.title: Performance Evaluation of Heterogeneous GPU Programming Frameworks for Hemodynamic Simulations.
papers.abstract: Preparing for the deployment of large scientific and engineering codes on upcoming exascale systems with GPU-dense nodes is made challenging by the unprecedented diversity of device architectures and heterogeneous programming models. In this work, we evaluate the process of porting a massively parallel, fluid dynamics code written in CUDA to SYCL, HIP, and Kokkos with a range of backends, using a combination of automated tools and manual tuning. We use a proxy application along with a custom performance model to inform the results and identify additional optimization strategies. At scale performance of the programming model implementations are evaluated on pre-production GPU node architectures for Frontier and Aurora, as well as on current NVIDIA device-based systems Summit and Polaris. Real-world workloads representing 3D blood flow calculations in complex vasculature are assessed. Our analysis highlights critical trade-offs between code performance, portability, and development time.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于设备架构和异构编程模型前所未有的多样性，在即将推出的具有 GPU 密集节点的百亿亿次系统上准备部署大型科学和工程代码变得充满挑战。在这项工作中，我们结合使用自动化工具和手动调整，评估了将 CUDA 编写的大规模并行流体动力学代码移植到具有一系列后端的 SYCL、HIP 和 Kokkos 的过程。我们使用代理应用程序和自定义性能模型来告知结果并确定其他优化策略。在 Frontier 和 Aurora 的预生产 GPU 节点架构以及当前基于 NVIDIA 设备的系统 Summit 和 Polaris 上评估了编程模型实现的规模性能。评估代表复杂脉管系统中 3D 血流计算的真实工作负载。我们的分析强调了代码性能、可移植性和开发时间之间的关键权衡。

papers.title: Performance Portability Evaluation of Blocked Stencil Computations on GPUs.
papers.abstract: In this new era where multiple GPU vendors are leading the supercomputing landscape, and multiple programming models are available to users, the drive to achieve performance portability across platforms faces new challenges. Consider stencil algorithms, where architecture-specific solutions are required to optimize for the parallelism hierarchy and memory hierarchy of emerging systems. In this work, we analyze performance portability of the BrickLib domain-specific library and vector code generator for stencils. BrickLib employs fine-grain data blocking to reduce the large amount of data movement associated with stencils. We compare different GPUs (NVIDIA, AMD and Intel) and their associated programming models (CUDA, HIP and SYCL). By testing a wide range of stencil configurations, we show that overall, BrickLib achieves good performance independent of machine or programming model. Moreover, we introduce correlation models as a new tool for comparing architectures and programming models from Roofline model data.
papers.abstract_zh: 在多个GPU供应商引领超级计算格局、用户可以使用多种编程模型的新时代，实现跨平台性能可移植性面临着新的挑战。考虑模板算法，其中需要特定于体系结构的解决方案来优化新兴系统的并行层次结构和内存层次结构。在这项工作中，我们分析了 BrickLib 特定领域库和模板矢量代码生成器的性能可移植性。 BrickLib 采用细粒度数据阻塞来减少与模板相关的大量数据移动。我们比较了不同的 GPU（NVIDIA、AMD 和 Intel）及其相关的编程模型（CUDA、HIP 和 SYCL）。通过测试各种模板配置，我们表明总体而言，BrickLib 实现了独立于机器或编程模型的良好性能。此外，我们引入相关模型作为一种新工具，用于比较 Roofline 模型数据的架构和编程模型。

papers.title: Performance Portability of Programming Strategies for Nearest-Neighbor Communication with GPU-Aware MPI.
papers.abstract: To better advise HPC application developers, we have implemented Faces, a nearest-neighbor microbenchmark that quantifies performance trade-offs. The Faces experiments presented here explore the following design choices: 1) fewer dependent messages versus more independent messages, 2) fewer fused GPU kernels versus more simple kernels, 3) number of GPU streams, 4) size of GPU thread blocks, and 5) linear versus blocked ordering of MPI ranks. We present weak-scaling performance of a latency-sensitive “small” per-rank domain and of a bandwidth-sensitive “large” per-rank domain, and we compare results for two high-performance computers with contrasting CPU, GPU, and interconnect architectures: Summit and Frontier. We find that using more independent messages tends to give better performance than using few dependent messages. We identify performance-portability recommendations for GPU streams and synchronization, but other aspects of performance show complicated dependence on problem size and computer.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了更好地为 HPC 应用程序开发人员提供建议，我们实施了 Faces，这是一种量化性能权衡的最近邻微基准测试。这里介绍的 Faces 实验探索了以下设计选择：1）更少的相关消息与更多的独立消息，2）更少的融合 GPU 内核与更简单的内核，3）GPU 流的数量，4）GPU 线程块的大小，以及 5）MPI 等级的线性排序与块排序。我们展示了延迟敏感的“小”每列域和带宽敏感的“大”每列域的弱扩展性能，并且我们比较了具有对比 CPU、GPU 和互连架构的两台高性能计算机的结果：Summit 和 Frontier。我们发现使用更多的独立消息往往比使用少量的相关消息具有更好的性能。我们确定了 GPU 流和同步的性能可移植性建议，但性能的其他方面显示出对问题大小和计算机的复杂依赖性。

papers.title: Performance-Portable GPU Acceleration of the EFIT Tokamak Plasma Equilibrium Reconstruction Code.
papers.abstract: This paper presents the steps followed to GPU-offload parts of the core solver of EFIT-AI, an equilibrium reconstruction code suitable for tokamak experiments and burning plasmas. For this work, we will focus on the fitting procedure that consists of a Grad–Shafranov (GS) equation inverse solver that calculates equilibrium reconstructions on a grid. We will show profiling results of the original code (CPU-baseline), as well as the directives used to GPU-offload the most time-consuming function, initially to compare OpenACC and OpenMP on NVIDIA and AMD GPUs and later on to assess OpenMP performance portability on NVIDIA, AMD and Intel GPUs. We will make a performance comparison for different spatial grid sizes and show the speedup achieved on NVIDIA A100 (Perlmutter-NERSC), AMD MI250X (Frontier-OLCF) and Intel PVC GPUs (Sunspot-ALCF). Finally, we will draw some conclusions and recommendations to achieve high-performance portability for an equilibrium reconstruction code on the new HPC architectures.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 EFIT-AI 核心求解器的 GPU 卸载部分所遵循的步骤，EFIT-AI 是一种适用于托卡马克实验和燃烧等离子体的平衡重建代码。在这项工作中，我们将重点关注由 Grad–Shafranov (GS) 方程逆求解器组成的拟合过程，该求解器计算网格上的平衡重建。我们将展示原始代码（CPU 基线）的分析结果，以及用于 GPU 卸载最耗时函数的指令，最初是为了比较 NVIDIA 和 AMD GPU 上的 OpenACC 和 OpenMP，然后评估 OpenMP 在 NVIDIA、AMD 和 Intel GPU 上的性能可移植性。我们将对不同空间网格大小进行性能比较，并展示在 NVIDIA A100 (Perlmutter-NERSC)、AMD MI250X (Frontier-OLCF) 和 Intel PVC GPU (Sunspot-ALCF) 上实现的加速。最后，我们将得出一些结论和建议，以实现新 HPC 架构上平衡重构代码的高性能可移植性。

papers.title: Perspectives and Experiences Supporting Containers for Research Computing at the Texas Advanced Computing Center.
papers.abstract: Containers are becoming essential to support the diversity of scientific computing workloads at academic computing centers. Here, we offer perspectives and experiences from the Texas Advanced Computing Center on: the installation, configuration, and support of select containerization platforms; incorporation of containers into the module system to improve their discoverability and usability; facilitation of advanced use cases including MPI containers, GPU containers, and support for multiple instruction set architectures; and finally instruction on best practices to end users through workshops and university courses. We will briefly discuss case studies that highlight the importance of supporting containers for research computing.
papers.abstract_zh: 容器对于支持学术计算中心科学计算工作负载的多样性变得至关重要。在这里，我们提供德克萨斯高级计算中心在以下方面的观点和经验：选定容器化平台的安装、配置和支持；将容器合并到模块系统中以提高其可发现性和可用性；促进高级用例，包括 MPI 容器、GPU 容器以及对多指令集架构的支持；最后通过研讨会和大学课程向最终用户提供最佳实践指导。我们将简要讨论强调支持研究计算容器重要性的案例研究。

papers.title: Phases, Modalities, Spatial and Temporal Locality: Domain Specific ML Prefetcher for Accelerating Graph Analytics.
papers.abstract: Memory performance is a key bottleneck in accelerating graph analytics. Existing Machine Learning (ML) prefetchers encounter challenges with phase transitions and irregular memory accesses in graph processing. We propose MPGraph, an ML-based Prefetcher for Graph analytics using domain specific models. MPGraph introduces three novel optimizations: soft detection of phase transitions, phase-specific multi-modality models for access delta and page predictions, and chain spatio-temporal prefetching (CSTP) for prefetch control.
papers.abstract_zh: 内存性能是加速图形分析的关键瓶颈。现有的机器学习 (ML) 预取器在图形处理中遇到相变和不规则内存访问的挑战。我们提出了 MPGraph，这是一种基于 ML 的预取器，用于使用特定领域模型进行图形分析。 MPGraph 引入了三种新颖的优化：相变的软检测、用于访问增量和页面预测的特定于阶段的多模态模型以及用于预取控制的链式时空预取 (CSTP)。

papers.title: Physical Oscillator Model for Supercomputing.
papers.abstract: A parallel program together with the parallel hardware it is running on is not only a vehicle to solve numerical problems, it is also a complex system with interesting dynamical behavior: resynchronization and desynchronization of parallel processes, propagating phases of idleness, and the peculiar effects of noise and system topology are just a few examples. We propose a physical oscillator model (POM) to describe aspects of the dynamics of interacting parallel processes. Motivated by the well-known Kuramoto Model, a process with its regular compute-communicate cycles is modeled as an oscillator which is coupled to other oscillators (processes) via an interaction potential. Instead of a simple all-to-all connectivity, we employ a sparse topology matrix mapping the communication structure and thus the inter-process dependencies of the program onto the oscillator model and propose two interaction potentials that are suitable for different scenarios in parallel computing: resource-scalable and resource-bottlenecked applications. The former are not limited by a resource bottleneck such as memory bandwidth or network contention, while the latter are. Unlike the original Kuramoto model, which has a periodic sinusoidal potential that is attractive for small angles, our characteristic potentials are always attractive for large angles and only differ in the short-distance behavior. We show that the model with appropriate potentials can mimic the propagation of delays and the synchronizing and desynchronizing behavior of scalable and bottlenecked parallel programs, respectively.
papers.abstract_zh: 并行程序及其运行的并行硬件不仅是解决数值问题的工具，而且还是具有有趣动态行为的复杂系统：并行进程的重新同步和去同步、空闲阶段的传播以及噪声和系统拓扑的特殊影响只是几个例子。我们提出了一个物理振荡器模型（POM）来描述相互作用的并行过程的动力学的各个方面。受著名的 Kuramoto 模型的启发，具有规则计算通信周期的过程被建模为一个振荡器，该振荡器通过交互势与其他振荡器（过程）耦合。我们采用稀疏拓扑矩阵来代替简单的全对全连接，从而将通信结构以及程序的进程间依赖关系映射到振荡器模型上，并提出了两种适用于并行计算中不同场景的交互势：资源可扩展和资源瓶颈应用程序。前者不受内存带宽或网络争用等资源瓶颈的限制，而后者则受到限制。与原始的仓本模型不同，原始的仓本模型具有对小角度有吸引力的周期性正弦势，而我们的特征势总是对大角度有吸引力，并且仅在短距离行为上有所不同。我们证明，具有适当势能的模型可以分别模拟延迟传播以及可扩展和瓶颈并行程序的同步和去同步行为。

papers.title: PM100: A Job Power Consumption Dataset of a Large-scale Production HPC System.
papers.abstract: The power requirements of modern High-Performance Computing (HPC) systems pose environmental and financial challenges, as they contribute to carbon emissions and strain power grids. Optimizing power consumption together with system performance has thus become a crucial goal for HPC centers. As jobs running on a system contribute to the whole system’s power usage, predicting their power requirements before execution on the system would allow to forecast the overall power consumption and perform techniques like power capping at the workload manager level. Such predictive studies need quality data, which is limited due to the inherent complexity of collecting structured data for job power characterization in a production system. This paper aims to fill the lack of resources for job power prediction and provide the HPC community with (i) a methodology to create a job power consumption dataset from workload manager data and node power metrics logs, and (ii) a novel and large dataset comprising around 230K jobs and their corresponding power consumption values. The dataset is derived from M100, a holistic dataset extracted from a production supercomputer hosted at the HPC centre CINECA in Italy.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代高性能计算 (HPC) 系统的电力要求带来了环境和财务挑战，因为它们会增加碳排放并给电网带来压力。因此，优化功耗和系统性能已成为 HPC 中心的一个重要目标。由于系统上运行的作业会影响整个系统的功耗，因此在系统上执行之前预测其功耗需求将允许预测总体功耗并在工作负载管理器级别执行功率上限等技术。此类预测研究需要高质量的数据，但由于收集结构化数据以描述生产系统中的工作能力特征的固有复杂性，质量数据受到限制。本文旨在填补作业功率预测资源的缺乏，并为 HPC 社区提供（i）一种根据工作负载管理器数据和节点功率指标日志创建作业功耗数据集的方法，以及（ii）一个包含约 23 万个作业及其相应功耗值的新颖的大型数据集。该数据集源自 M100，这是从意大利 HPC 中心 CINECA 托管的生产超级计算机中提取的整体数据集。

papers.title: PoliMOR: A Policy Engine "Made-to-Order" for Automated and Scalable Data Management in Lustre.
papers.abstract: Modern supercomputing systems are increasingly reliant on hierarchical, multi-tiered file and storage system architectures due to cost-performance-capacity trade-offs. Within such multi-tiered systems, data management services are required to maintain healthy utilization, performance, and capacity levels. We present PoliMOR, a pragmatic and reliable policy-driven data management framework. PoliMOR is composed of modular, single-purpose agents that gather file system metadata and enforce policies on storage systems. PoliMOR facilitates automated and scalable data management with customizable agents tailored to HPC facility-specific storage systems and policies. Our evaluations demonstrate the scalability and performance of PoliMOR both by its individual agents and as a collective entity. We believe PoliMOR is widely applicable across HPC facilities with large-scale data management challenges and will garner interest from the HPC community, given its flexible and open-source nature.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于成本性能容量权衡，现代超级计算系统越来越依赖分层、多层文件和存储系统架构。在此类多层系统中，需要数据管理服务来维持健康的利用率、性能和容量水平。我们推出 PoliMOR，一个务实且可靠的策略驱动数据管理框架。 PoliMOR 由模块化、单一用途的代理组成，用于收集文件系统元数据并在存储系统上实施策略。 PoliMOR 通过针对 HPC 设施特定存储系统和策略量身定制的可定制代理，促进自动化和可扩展的数据管理。我们的评估证明了 PoliMOR 的个体代理和集体实体的可扩展性和性能。我们相信 PoliMOR 广泛适用于面临大规模数据管理挑战的 HPC 设施，并且由于其灵活和开源的性质，将引起 HPC 社区的兴趣。

papers.title: Portable and Scalable All-Electron Quantum Perturbation Simulations on Exascale Supercomputers.
papers.abstract: Quantum perturbation theory is pivotal in determining the critical physical properties of materials. The first-principles computations of these properties have yielded profound and quantitative insights in diverse domains of chemistry and physics. In this work, we propose a portable and scalable OpenCL implementation for quantum perturbation theory, which can be generalized across various high-performance computing (HPC) systems. Optimal portability is realized through the utilization of a cross-platform unified interface and a collection of performance-portable heterogeneous optimizations. Exceptional scalability is attained by addressing major constraints on memory and communication, employing a locality-enhancing task mapping strategy and a packed hierarchical collective communication scheme. Experiments on two advanced supercomputers demonstrate that our implementation exhibits remarkably performance on various material systems, scaling the system to 200,000 atoms with all-electron precision. This research enables all-electron quantum perturbation simulations on substantially larger molecular scales, with a potentially significant impact on progress in material sciences.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子微扰理论对于确定材料的关键物理性质至关重要。这些性质的第一原理计算在化学和物理的不同领域产生了深刻的定量见解。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于量子微扰理论的可移植且可扩展的 OpenCL 实现，它可以推广到各种高性能计算 (HPC) 系统。通过利用跨平台的统一接口和一系列性能可移植的异构优化，实现了最佳的可移植性。通过解决内存和通信的主要限制、采用局部性增强任务映射策略和打包分层集体通信方案，实现了卓越的可扩展性。在两台先进超级计算机上进行的实验表明，我们的实现在各种材料系统上都表现出了显着的性能，以全电子精度将系统扩展到 200,000 个原子。这项研究能够在更大的分子尺度上进行全电子量子微扰模拟，对材料科学的进步可能产生重大影响。

papers.title: Porting and optimizing Meso-NH to AMD MI250X GPUs.
papers.abstract: This paper presents the results of our efforts to port Meso-NH, an atmospheric non-hydrostatic research model, to AMD MI250X GPUs using OpenACC on the ADASTRA Machine, a technology similar to the Frontier system [1]. Meso-NH is a versatile model that covers a wide range of resolutions from synoptic to turbulent scales, and is designed for studies of physics and chemistry. It can be used in 3D for storms and thunderstorms simulation, 2D or 1D for the simulation of academic studies.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们在 ADASTRA 机器上使用 OpenACC（一种类似于 Frontier 系统的技术）将 Meso-NH（一种大气非静水力研究模型）移植到 AMD MI250X GPU 的努力成果 [1]。 Meso-NH 是一种多功能模型，涵盖从天气尺度到湍流尺度的广泛分辨率，专为物理和化学研究而设计。它可以用于风暴和雷暴的 3D 模拟，也可以用于学术研究的 2D 或 1D 模拟。

papers.title: Porting Batched Iterative Solvers onto Intel GPUs with SYCL.
papers.abstract: Batched linear solvers play a vital role in computational sciences, especially in the fields of plasma physics and combustion simulations. With the imminent deployment of the Aurora Supercomputer and other upcoming systems equipped with Intel GPUs, there is a compelling demand to expand the capabilities of these solvers for Intel GPU architectures.
papers.abstract_zh: 批处理线性求解器在计算科学中发挥着至关重要的作用，特别是在等离子体物理和燃烧模拟领域。随着 Aurora 超级计算机和其他即将推出的配备英特尔 GPU 的系统即将部署，迫切需要扩展这些求解器针对英特尔 GPU 架构的功能。

papers.title: Power Analysis of NERSC Production Workloads.
papers.abstract: Power has become a key limiting factor in supercomputing. Understanding the power signatures of current production workloads is essential to address this limit and continue to advance scientific computing at scale. This paper analyzes the power characteristics of NERSC production workloads at the system and application levels. Our system-level analysis revealed a large gap between the average and peak power usage distribution, indicating a significant power swing from running various applications on the system. On the application level, we select four workflow benchmarks representing NERSC’s production workloads to analyze the power characteristics of applications and attempt to correlate the observed power timeline patterns with GPU performance metrics and application profiling data. We found different applications have distinct power usage patterns and widespread average and peak power usage. We discuss how these findings may help improve the current system’s operational power efficiency and the implications for future system procurement.
papers.abstract_zh: 功耗已成为超级计算的关键限制因素。了解当前生产工作负载的功率特征对于解决这一限制并继续大规模推进科学计算至关重要。本文分析了 NERSC 生产工作负载在系统和应用层面的功耗特性。我们的系统级分析显示，平均用电量分布与峰值用电量分布之间存在很大差距，这表明系统上运行各种应用程序会产生显着的功耗波动。在应用程序级别，我们选择代表 NERSC 生产工作负载的四个工作流程基准来分析应用程序的功耗特征，并尝试将观察到的功耗时间线模式与 GPU 性能指标和应用程序分析数据相关联。我们发现不同的应用程序具有不同的用电模式以及普遍的平均和峰值用电量。我们讨论这些发现如何帮助提高当前系统的运行电源效率以及对未来系统采购的影响。

papers.title: Precision and Performance Analysis of C Standard Math Library Functions on GPUs.
papers.abstract: With the advent of GPU computing, executing large program sections on accelerators has become increasingly important. Efforts are being made to support the C standard library, LIBC, on GPUs via LLVM machinery. Therefore, the C standard math library, LIBM, must be supported on GPUs. So far, LLVM frontends, such as Clang, have relied on GPU vendor implementations of LIBM functionality wrapped into (mostly) LIBM-compatible forwarding functions.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着 GPU 计算的出现，在加速器上执行大型程序部分变得越来越重要。人们正在努力通过 LLVM 机制在 GPU 上支持 C 标准库 LIBC。因此，GPU 必须支持 C 标准数学库 LIBM。到目前为止，LLVM 前端（例如 Clang）依赖于 GPU 供应商将 LIBM 功能实现封装到（大部分）与 LIBM 兼容的转发函数中。

papers.title: Principles for Automated and Reproducible Benchmarking.
papers.abstract: The diversity in processor technology used by High Performance Computing (HPC) facilities is growing, and so applications must be written in such a way that they can attain high levels of performance across a range of different CPUs, GPUs, and other accelerators. Measuring application performance across this wide range of platforms becomes crucial, but there are significant challenges to do this rigorously, in a time efficient way, whilst assuring results are scientifically meaningful, reproducible, and actionable. This paper presents a methodology for measuring and analysing the performance portability of a parallel application and shares a software framework which combines and extends adopted technologies to provide a usable benchmarking tool. We demonstrate the flexibility and effectiveness of the methodology and benchmarking framework by showcasing a variety of benchmarking case studies which utilise a stable of supercomputing resources at a national scale.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算 (HPC) 设施使用的处理器技术的多样性正在不断增长，因此应用程序的编写方式必须能够在各种不同的 CPU、GPU 和其他加速器上获得高水平的性能。在如此广泛的平台上测量应用程序性能变得至关重要，但要以省时的方式严格执行此操作，同时确保结果具有科学意义、可重复性和可操作性，存在重大挑战。本文提出了一种测量和分析并行应用程序性能可移植性的方法，并共享了一个软件框架，该框架结合并扩展了所采用的技术以提供可用的基准测试工具。我们通过展示各种在国家范围内利用稳定的超级计算资源的基准案例研究，展示了方法和基准框架的灵活性和有效性。

papers.title: Prodigy: Towards Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Production HPC Systems.
papers.abstract: Performance variations caused by anomalies in modern High Performance Computing (HPC) systems lead to decreased efficiency, impaired application performance, and increased operational costs. While machine learning (ML)-based frameworks for automated anomaly detection (often based on time series telemetry data) are gaining popularity in the literature, practical deployment challenges are often overlooked. Some ML-based frameworks require extensive customization, while others need a rich set of labeled samples, none of which are feasible for a production HPC system.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代高性能计算 (HPC) 系统中的异常引起的性能变化会导致效率降低、应用程序性能受损以及运营成本增加。虽然基于机器学习 (ML) 的自动异常检测框架（通常基于时间序列遥测数据）在文献中越来越受欢迎，但实际的部署挑战常常被忽视。一些基于 ML 的框架需要广泛的定制，而其他框架则需要一组丰富的标记样本，而这些对于生产 HPC 系统来说都不可行。

papers.title: Protein Generation via Genome-scale Language Models with Bio-physical Scoring.
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) trained on vast biological datasets can learn biological motifs and correlations across the evolutionary landscape of natural proteins. LLMs can then be used for de novo design of novel proteins with specific structures, functions, and physicochemical properties. We employ a pre-trained genome-scale language model that uses codons as tokens and integrate it into a workflow for targeted generation of sequences. Our framework suggests new gene sequences that are ranked for downstream evaluation by metrics that collectively capture extensive sequence-specific, biophysical, and biochemical properties. We demonstrate our integrated workflow to design novel variants of the enzyme, malate dehydrogenase (MDH), that exhibit more favorable activation energies than their natural counterparts (reduction of 4.01 kJ/mol) with sustained sequence generation rates of ∼ 104/hr and simulation rates of ∼ 102/hr on 64 nodes of Polaris with about 99.7 system utilization during the run.
papers.abstract_zh: 在大量生物数据集上训练的大型语言模型 (LLM) 可以学习天然蛋白质进化景观中的生物基序和相关性。然后，法学硕士可用于从头设计具有特定结构、功能和理化性质的新型蛋白质。我们采用预先训练的基因组规模语言模型，该模型使用密码子作为标记，并将其集成到工作流程中以有针对性地生成序列。我们的框架建议新的基因序列，通过共同捕获广泛的序列特异性、生物物理和生化特性的指标对下游评估进行排序。我们展示了我们的集成工作流程来设计苹果酸脱氢酶 (MDH) 的新变体，其比天然对应物表现出更有利的激活能（减少 4.01 kJ/mol），在 Polaris 的 64 个节点上持续序列生成速率为 ∼ 104/小时，模拟速率为 ∼ 102/小时，运行期间系统利用率约为 99.7。

papers.title: Prototype of a Batched Quantum Circuit Simulator for the Vector Engine.
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art quantum circuit simulators have mostly focused on scaling the number of qubits. However, we argue that studying current noisy quantum computers and variational quantum algorithms benefits from high-throughput simulation of intermediate-scale quantum circuits. We present the first implementation and evaluation of a batched quantum simulator on the NEC Vector Engine (VE), a vector processor with massive memory bandwidth that is ideal for memory-intensive state vector simulation. To take advantage of the long-vector architecture of VE, we design a parallelization strategy and memory layout suited for batched state vector simulation. Our evaluation shows that the latest-generation VE Type 30A achieves equal performance as the NVIDIA A100 80 GB model for single-qubit gates, but slightly underperforms A100 for two-qubit gates. Furthermore, our vector-friendly noise gate implementation offers a large speedup compared to that of cuStateVec. When simulating a noisy 16-qubit random circuit with our simulator, VE30 is up to 1.95 × faster than A100.
papers.abstract_zh: 最先进的量子电路模拟器主要专注于扩展量子位的数量。然而，我们认为研究当前的噪声量子计算机和变分量子算法受益于中等规模量子电路的高通量模拟。我们首次在 NEC 矢量引擎 (VE) 上实现和评估批处理量子模拟器，这是一种具有大内存带宽的矢量处理器，非常适合内存密集型状态矢量模拟。为了利用 VE 的长向量架构，我们设计了适合批量状态向量模拟的并行化策略和内存布局。我们的评估表明，最新一代 VE 30A 型在单量子位门方面的性能与 NVIDIA A100 80 GB 型号相当，但在两量子位门方面的性能略低于 A100。此外，与 cuStateVec 相比，我们的矢量友好噪声门实现提供了很大的加速。当使用我们的模拟器模拟噪声 16 量子位随机电路时，VE30 比 A100 快 1.95 倍。

papers.title: PTI-GPU: Kernel Profiling and Assessment on Intel GPUs.
papers.abstract: Modern supercomputing applications are complex programs built on optimized frameworks and accelerated on GPUs. As such, dedicated tools for profiling GPU kernel utilization and performance are needed to support development of these applications, which in turn accelerates progress for the scientific computing and machine learning communities. This paper presents the Oneprof and Onetrace tools from the Intel PTI-GPU framework. These tools are capable of profiling applications and different levels of the runtime stack executing on Intel GPUs. To demonstrate the features and utility of these tools, we examine one HPC and one AI application.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代超级计算应用程序是构建在优化框架上并在 GPU 上加速的复杂程序。因此，需要用于分析 GPU 内核利用率和性能的专用工具来支持这些应用程序的开发，从而加速科学计算和机器学习社区的进步。本文介绍了英特尔 PTI-GPU 框架中的 Oneprof 和 Onetrace 工具。这些工具能够分析在英特尔 GPU 上执行的应用程序和不同级别的运行时堆栈。为了演示这些工具的功能和实用性，我们研究了一款 HPC 和一款 AI 应用程序。

papers.title: QArchSearch: A Scalable Quantum Architecture Search Package.
papers.abstract: The current era of quantum computing has yielded several algorithms that promise high computational efficiency. While the algorithms are sound in theory and can provide potentially exponential speedup, there is little guidance on how to design proper quantum circuits to realize the appropriate unitary transformation to be applied to the input quantum state. In this paper, we present QArchSearch, an AI based quantum architecture search package with the QTensor library as a backend that provides a principled and automated approach to finding the best model given a task and input quantum state. We show that the search package is able to efficiently scale the search to large quantum circuits and enables the exploration of more complex models for different quantum applications. QArchSearch runs at scale and high efficiency on high-performance computing systems using a two-level parallelization scheme on both CPUs and GPUs, which has been demonstrated on the Polaris supercomputer.
papers.abstract_zh: 当前的量子计算时代已经产生了多种有望实现高计算效率的算法。虽然这些算法在理论上是合理的并且可以提供潜在的指数加速，但对于如何设计适当的量子电路以实现应用于输入量子态的适当的酉变换几乎没有指导。在本文中，我们提出了 QArchSearch，这是一种基于 AI 的量子架构搜索包，以 QTensor 库作为后端，它提供了一种有原则的自动化方法来寻找给定任务和输入量子状态的最佳模型。我们表明，该搜索包能够有效地将搜索扩展到大型量子电路，并能够为不同的量子应用探索更复杂的模型。 QArchSearch 在高性能计算系统上大规模且高效地运行，在 CPU 和 GPU 上使用两级并行化方案，这已在 Polaris 超级计算机上得到了演示。

papers.title: QASMTrans: A QASM Quantum Transpiler Framework for NISQ Devices.
papers.abstract: The success of a quantum algorithm hinges on the ability to orchestrate a successful application induction. Detrimental overheads in mapping general quantum circuits to physically implementable routines can be the deciding factor between a successful and erroneous circuit induction. In QASMTrans, we focus on the problem of rapid circuit transpilation. Transpilation plays a crucial role in converting high-level, machine-agnostic circuits into machine-specific circuits constrained by physical topology and supported gate sets. The efficiency of transpilation continues to be a substantial bottleneck, especially when dealing with larger circuits requiring high degrees of inter-qubit interaction. QASMTrans is a high-performance C++ quantum transpiler framework that demonstrates 3-1111 × speedups compared to the commonly used Qiskit transpiler. We observe speedups on large dense circuits such as ‘uccsd_n24’ which require gates. QASMTrans successfully transpiles the aforementioned circuits in 7.9s, whilst Qiskit needs 502 seconds with optimization 1 and exceeds an hour of transpilation time with optimization 3. With QASMTrans providing transpiled circuits in a fraction of the time of prior transpilers, potential design space exploration, and heuristic-based transpiler design becomes substantially more tractable. QASMTrans is released at http://github.com/pnnl/qasmtrans.
papers.abstract_zh: 量子算法的成功取决于协调成功的应用归纳的能力。将通用量子电路映射到物理上可实现的例程的有害开销可能是成功和错误的电路归纳之间的决定因素。在 QASMTrans 中，我们关注快速电路转译的问题。转换在将高级、与机器无关的电路转换为受物理拓扑和支持的门集约束的机器特定电路方面发挥着至关重要的作用。转译的效率仍然是一个重大瓶颈，特别是在处理需要高度量子位间交互的较大电路时。 QASMTrans 是一种高性能 C++ 量子转译器框架，与常用的 Qiskit 转译器相比，速度提升了 3-1111 倍。我们观察到需要门的大型密集电路（例如“uccsd_n24”）的加速。 QASMTrans 在 7.9 秒内成功转译了上述电路，而 Qiskit 优化 1 需要 502 秒，优化 3 则超过一小时的转译时间。 QASMTrans 提供转译电路的时间仅为先前转译器的一小部分，潜在的设计空间探索和基于启发式的转译器设计变得更加容易处理。 QASMTrans 发布于 http://github.com/pnnl/qasmtrans。

papers.title: Ramble: A flexible, extensible, and composable experimentation framework.
papers.abstract: Reproducibility and replicability are extremely important components of scientific computing, and any computational research. The ability to replicate a set of experiments aids many other computational use cases, such as systems acceptance where a compute center requires the ability to create and execute the same experiment as a hardware vendor. Several test harnesses and frameworks currently exist, with the aim of improving experiment replicability.
papers.abstract_zh: 再现性和可复制性是科学计算和任何计算研究极其重要的组成部分。复制一组实验的能力有助于许多其他计算用例，例如计算中心需要能够创建和执行与硬件供应商相同的实验的系统验收。目前存在多种测试工具和框架，旨在提高实验的可重复性。

papers.title: Rapid simulations of atmospheric data assimilation of hourly-scale phenomena with modern neural networks.
papers.abstract: Atmospheric data assimilation is essential for numerical weather prediction. Ensemble data assimilation connects multiple instances of an atmospheric model through a Kalman filter-based algorithm, which is regarded as a challenging computing task today. In this work, we build a fast, low-cost, and scalable atmospheric data assimilation prototype, DIDA, for the new-generation Sunway supercomputer, including: (1) a framework that enables flexible deployment of components, and manages and optimizes data communication among modules, achieving maximum resource efficiency; (2) an accurate, robust, UNet-based surrogate model for atmospheric dynamic simulation to generate the background ensemble; (3) a batch-LETKF algorithm with high-performance eigenvalue decomposition, which is up to 7.37 times faster than existing numerical libraries while exhibiting almost linear scalability. Experimental evaluations show that our AI-integrated ensemble data assimilation prototype can complete hour-cycle assimilation in minutes, maintain linear scalability, and save an order of magnitude of computing resources, compared with the traditional method.
papers.abstract_zh: 大气数据同化对于数值天气预报至关重要。集合数据同化通过基于卡尔曼滤波器的算法连接大气模型的多个实例，这在当今被认为是一项具有挑战性的计算任务。在这项工作中，我们为新一代神威超级计算机构建了一个快速、低成本、可扩展的大气数据同化原型DIDA，包括：（1）一个能够灵活部署组件的框架，并管理和优化模块之间的数据通信，实现最大的资源效率； (2) 准确、鲁棒、基于 UNet 的大气动态模拟替代模型，以生成背景系综； (3)具有高性能特征值分解的批处理LETKF算法，其速度比现有数值库快7.37倍，同时表现出几乎线性的可扩展性。实验评估表明，与传统方法相比，我们的人工智能集成集合数据同化原型可以在几分钟内完成小时周期同化，保持线性可扩展性，并节省一个数量级的计算资源。

papers.title: RDARuntime: An OS for AI Accelerators.
papers.abstract: Today’s supercomputers are more heterogeneous than ever before. As the share of AI workloads in data centers continues to grow, the share of GPUs and AI-specific hardware grows with it. AI accelerators are different from traditional hardware, affecting all aspects of system design, from data-center scale to single-chip scale. AI accelerators are much more efficient than CPUs or GPUs for some HPC workloads, especially in AI for Science. They also add complexity to system architecture, management, and programming. Although runtime frameworks are critical to reducing system complexity, there is little literature describing AI accelerator runtimes. In this paper, we introduce RDARuntime - an AI-specific OS tailored for the development and operation of SambaNova’s reconfigurable dataflow architecture. We discuss the architecture, our design decisions, and some of the results we have achieved, along with some lessons we have learned while helping to deploy the Reconfigurable Dataflow Unit (RDU) to production environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 今天的超级计算机比以往任何时候都更加异构。随着数据中心中人工智能工作负载的份额持续增长，GPU 和人工智能专用硬件的份额也随之增长。人工智能加速器不同于传统硬件，影响着系统设计的各个方面，从数据中心规模到单芯片规模。对于某些 HPC 工作负载，特别是在科学人工智能领域，人工智能加速器比 CPU 或 GPU 更高效。它们还增加了系统架构、管理和编程的复杂性。尽管运行时框架对于降低系统复杂性至关重要，但描述人工智能加速器运行时的文献却很少。在本文中，我们介绍 RDARuntime - 一款专为 SambaNova 可重构数据流架构的开发和操作而定制的 AI 专用操作系统。我们讨论了架构、我们的设计决策和我们取得的一些成果，以及我们在帮助将可重新配置数据流单元 (RDU) 部署到生产环境时学到的一些经验教训。

papers.title: ReAPER: Region Aware Power and Energy Regulator.
papers.abstract: Improving CPU power/energy efficiency without degrading performance requires an accurate application characterization. Rather than characterizing the application as a whole, we find that dividing the application into individual regions is much more effective. This fine-grained approach gives us the opportunity to save power/energy during memory-bound regions and MPI slack regions (time spent waiting on other processes) by lowering core frequency and during compute-bound regions by lowering uncore frequency. We propose an intuitive, lightweight, and portable algorithm for identifying these regions at runtime which relies only on the IPS (instructions per second) metric, rather than on performance counters that can differ across platforms. At the same time, we meet a user-specified level of acceptable performance degradation by adapting core and uncore frequencies to the application, achieving additional CPU power/energy savings. We evaluate our approach on the SPEC 2017 benchmarks and various MPI applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 在不降低性能的情况下提高 CPU 功率/能效需要准确的应用特征描述。我们发现，将应用程序划分为各个区域比将应用程序作为一个整体进行描述要有效得多。这种细粒度的方法使我们有机会在内存限制区域和 MPI 松弛区域（等待其他进程所花费的时间）期间通过降低核心频率来节省电力/能源，并在计算限制区域期间通过降低非核心频率来节省电力/能源。我们提出了一种直观、轻量级且可移植的算法，用于在运行时识别这些区域，该算法仅依赖于 IPS（每秒指令数）指标，而不依赖于跨平台不同的性能计数器。同时，我们通过根据应用程序调整核心和非核心频率来满足用户指定的可接受的性能下降水平，从而实现额外的 CPU 功率/能源节省。我们根据 SPEC 2017 基准和各种 MPI 应用程序评估我们的方法。

papers.title: Recovering Detectable Uncorrectable Errors via Spatial Data Prediction.
papers.abstract: High-performance computing applications are central to advancement in many fields of science and engineering. Central to this advancement is the supposed reliability of the HPC system. However, as system size grows and hardware components run with near-threshold voltages, transient upset events become more likely. Many works have explored the problem of correcting data corruption; however, recovery is often left to checkpoint-restart or application-specific techniques. Recovering from a checkpoint incurs overhead due to reading a checkpoint and recomputing lost work. Allowing the application to recover just the corrupted data enables faster and more efficient recovery. This paper explores using spatial similarities to recover detectable uncorrectable errors. We explore several reconstruction methods and evaluate their effectiveness at recovering corrupted entries in data arrays. Results show that the Lorenzo 1-Layer prediction method yields the best results, with over half of its reconstructions having less than 1% relative error across all applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算应用程序是许多科学和工程领域进步的核心。这一进步的核心是 HPC 系统的可靠性。然而，随着系统规模的增大和硬件组件以接近阈值的电压运行，瞬态扰乱事件变得更有可能。许多著作探讨了纠正数据损坏的问题；然而，恢复通常留给检查点重启或特定于应用程序的技术。由于读取检查点并重新计算丢失的工作，从检查点恢复会产生开销。允许应用程序仅恢复损坏的数据可以实现更快、更高效的恢复。本文探索使用空间相似性来恢复可检测的不可纠正的错误。我们探索了几种重建方法并评估了它们在恢复数据数组中损坏的条目方面的有效性。结果表明，Lorenzo 1 层预测方法产生了最佳结果，其一半以上的重建在所有应用中的相对误差均小于 1%。

papers.title: Reducing HPC energy footprint for large scale GPU accelerated workloads.
papers.abstract: As the energy cost continues to rise, High Performance Computing (HPC) centers may seek to reduce their energy footprint. This could be implemented as a temporary production shutdown or in a more scientific production friendly way where the machine is able to increase its viability through increased efficiency. In this document we examine the second approach using a French, production ready machine hosted at Centre Informatique National de l'Enseignement Supérieur (CINES) in Montpellier. This machine, Adastra, is based on the AMD MI250X GPU architecture and currently #3 in Green500. Adastra is used by hundreds of French researchers, representing dozens of different applications from different scientific fields. As a base for the study, we define a set of applications representative of our current HPC and AI production workload. In this parametric study, we characterize our very diverse workload by applying a range of frequency capping or power capping policies at the node level in order to build an efficiency profile of each application. Based on the collected results, we produce guidelines trading between pure energy savings (energy to solution) to pure performance (time to solution) for each applications and, more importantly, for the production workload as a whole. We hope the results of this study will be of help to accelerators enabled HPC centers seeking to reduce their energy footprint by applying policies on either accelerators frequency or power capping at the node level.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着能源成本持续上升，高性能计算 (HPC) 中心可能会寻求减少能源足迹。这可以通过临时生产关闭或以更科学的生产友好方式来实现，其中机器能够通过提高效率来提高其生存能力。在本文档中，我们使用位于蒙彼利埃国家信息中心 (CINES) 的法国生产就绪机器来研究第二种方法。这台机器 Adastra 基于 AMD MI250X GPU 架构，目前在 Green500 中排名第三。 Adastra 被数百名法国研究人员使用，代表了来自不同科学领域的数十种不同应用。作为研究的基础，我们定义了一组代表我们当前 HPC 和 AI 生产工作负载的应用程序。在这项参数研究中，我们通过在节点级别应用一系列频率上限或功率上限策略来描述我们非常多样化的工作负载，以便构建每个应用程序的效率概况。根据收集的结果，我们为每个应用程序，更重要的是，为整个生产工作负载，制定在纯节能（解决方案的能源）与纯性能（解决方案的时间）之间进行权衡的指南。我们希望这项研究的结果将对启用加速器的 HPC 中心有所帮助，这些中心寻求通过在节点级别应用加速器频率或功率上限政策来减少能源足迹。

papers.title: Reducing Memory Requirements for the IPU using Butterfly Factorizations.
papers.abstract: High Performance Computing (HPC) benefits from different improvements during last decades, specially in terms of hardware platforms to provide more processing power while maintaining the power consumption at a reasonable level. The Intelligence Processing Unit (IPU) is a new type of massively parallel processor, designed to speedup parallel computations with huge number of processing cores and on-chip memory components connected with high-speed fabrics. IPUs mainly target machine learning applications, however, due to the architectural differences between GPUs and IPUs, especially significantly less memory capacity on an IPU, methods for reducing model size by sparsification have to be considered. Butterfly factorizations are well-known replacements for fully-connected and convolutional layers. In this paper, we examine how butterfly structures can be implemented on an IPU and study their behavior and performance compared to a GPU. Experimental results indicate that these methods can provide 98.5% compression ratio to decrease the immense need for memory, the IPU implementation can benefit from 1.3x and 1.6x performance improvement for butterfly and pixelated butterfly, respectively. We also reach to 1.62x training time speedup on a real-word dataset such as CIFAR10.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算（HPC）受益于过去几十年的不同改进，特别是在硬件平台方面，以提供更多的处理能力，同时将功耗保持在合理的水平。智能处理单元（IPU）是一种新型大规模并行处理器，旨在通过与高速结构连接的大量处理核心和片上存储组件来加速并行计算。 IPU 主要针对机器学习应用，然而，由于 GPU 和 IPU 之间的架构差异，特别是 IPU 上的内存容量明显较小，必须考虑通过稀疏化来减小模型大小的方法。蝴蝶分解是全连接层和卷积层的众所周知的替代品。在本文中，我们研究了如何在 IPU 上实现蝶形结构，并研究其与 GPU 相比的行为和性能。实验结果表明，这些方法可以提供 98.5% 的压缩率，从而减少对内存的巨大需求，IPU 实现可以分别从蝴蝶和像素化蝴蝶的 1.3 倍和 1.6 倍性能改进中受益。我们还在 CIFAR10 等真实数据集上实现了 1.62 倍的训练时间加速。

papers.title: ReFloat: Low-Cost Floating-Point Processing in ReRAM for Accelerating Iterative Linear Solvers.
papers.abstract: Resistive random access memory (ReRAM) is a promising technology that can perform low-cost and in-situ matrix-vector multiplication (MVM) in analog domain. Scientific computing requires high-precision floating-point (FP) processing. However, performing floating-point computation in ReRAM is challenging because of high hardware cost and execution time due to the large FP value range. In this work we present ReFloat, a data format and an accelerator architecture, for low-cost and high-performance floating-point processing in ReRAM for iterative linear solvers. ReFloat matches the ReRAM crossbar hardware and represents a block of FP values with reduced bits and an optimized exponent base for a high range of dynamic representation. Thus, ReFloat achieves less ReRAM crossbar consumption and fewer processing cycles and overcomes the noncovergence issue in a prior work. The evaluation on the SuiteSparse matrices shows ReFloat achieves 5.02× to 84.28× improvement in terms of solver time compared to a state-of-the-art ReRAM based accelerator.
papers.abstract_zh: 电阻式随机存取存储器（ReRAM）是一种很有前途的技术，可以在模拟域中执行低成本、原位矩阵向量乘法（MVM）。科学计算需要高精度浮点（FP）处理。然而，由于 FP 值范围较大，硬件成本和执行时间都很高，因此在 ReRAM 中执行浮点计算具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ReFloat，一种数据格式和加速器架构，用于在 ReRAM 中进行迭代线性求解器的低成本和高性能浮点处理。 ReFloat 与 ReRAM 交叉开关硬件相匹配，并表示具有减少位数的 FP 值块和优化的指数基，以实现大范围的动态表示。因此，ReFloat 实现了更少的 ReRAM 交叉开关消耗和更少的处理周期，并克服了先前工作中的不可覆盖问题。对 SuiteSparse 矩阵的评估表明，与最先进的基于 ReRAM 的加速器相比，ReFloat 在求解器时间方面实现了 5.02 倍到 84.28 倍的改进。

papers.title: REMORA Resource Monitor: Usability, Performance and User Interface Improvements.
papers.abstract: As modern HPC systems grow in complexity, assessing the performance of an application in a user’s job may require collecting metrics about various system components, such as processors, memory, file systems, and the network. Although monitoring tools exist for system administrators and managers to collect such information, end users often have limited access to the system monitor of choice, or the user may be overloaded with interface access and performance metric selection. For novices and non-HPC experts, Remora (REsource Monitoring for Remote Applications) provides simple tools that allow quick diagnostic assessments of their jobs, and flexible tools that are adaptable to various types of workflow.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着现代 HPC 系统变得越来越复杂，评估用户工作中应用程序的性能可能需要收集有关各种系统组件（例如处理器、内存、文件系统和网络）的指标。尽管系统管理员和管理者可以使用监控工具来收集此类信息，但最终用户通常对所选系统监控器的访问权限有限，或者用户可能因界面访问和性能指标选择而不堪重负。对于新手和非 HPC 专家，Remora（远程应用程序资源监控）提供了允许对其作业进行快速诊断评估的简单工具，以及适用于各种类型工作流程的灵活工具。

papers.title: Report on Adaptable Open-Source Disaster Recovery Solution for Multi-Petabyte Storage Systems.
papers.abstract: The current generation of Research Data Store (RDS) at The University of Sydney comprises a pair of peta-scale data storage systems. We implemented a disaster recovery (DR) solution on both systems for data protection against catastrophic failure. To handle large amount of data transactions into RDS, we took an open-source approach to design an adaptable DR solution that enables parallelized data replication capability between the pair of storage systems. In the last three years of operations, the DR solution has gone through a few iterations which saw improvement in efficiency. In this paper, we present the findings and outcomes from our DR implementation.
papers.abstract_zh: 悉尼大学最新一代的研究数据存储 (RDS) 包括一对千万亿级数据存储系统。我们在两个系统上实施了灾难恢复 (DR) 解决方案，以保护数据免受灾难性故障的影响。为了处理 RDS 中的大量数据事务，我们采用开源方法来设计适应性强的 DR 解决方案，该解决方案可在存储系统对之间实现并行数据复制功能。在过去三年的运营中，灾难恢复解决方案经历了几次迭代，效率得到了提升。在本文中，我们介绍了灾难恢复实施的发现和结果。

papers.title: Rethinking Data Race Detection in MPI-RMA Programs.
papers.abstract: Supercomputers are capable of increasingly more computations, and nodes forming them need to communicate even more efficiently with each other. The Message Passing Interface (MPI) proposes a communication model based on one-sided communications called the MPI Remote Memory Access (MPI-RMA). Thanks to these operations, applications can improve the overlap of communications with computations. However, one-sided communications are complex to write since they are subject to data races. This paper rethinks an existing on-the-fly data race detection algorithm for MPI-RMA programs by improving the storage of memory accesses in a Binary Search Tree using a new insertion algorithm based on fragmentation and merging algorithms. Thus, experimental results on real-life applications show that this new insertion algorithm improves the accuracy of the data race detection and can reduce the overhead of the analysis at runtime by a factor up to two.
