papers.abstract_zh: 超级计算机能够进行越来越多的计算，构成超级计算机的节点需要更有效地相互通信。消息传递接口 (MPI) 提出了一种基于单侧通信的通信模型，称为 MPI 远程内存访问 (MPI-RMA)。由于这些操作，应用程序可以改善通信与计算的重叠。然而，单方面的通信编写起来很复杂，因为它们会受到数据竞争的影响。本文通过使用基于碎片和合并算法的新插入算法改进二叉搜索树中内存访问的存储，重新思考了 MPI-RMA 程序的现有动态数据竞争检测算法。因此，实际应用的实验结果表明，这种新的插入算法提高了数据竞争检测的准确性，并且可以将运行时的分析开销减少多达两倍。

papers.title: Rethinking Deployment for Serverless Functions: A Performance-First Perspective.
papers.abstract: Serverless computing commonly adopts strong isolation mechanisms for deploying functions, which may bring significant performance overhead because each function needs to run in a completely new environment (i.e., the "one-to-one" model). To accelerate the function computation, prior work has proposed using sandbox sharing to reduce the overhead, i.e., the "many-to-one" model. Nonetheless, either process-based true parallelism or thread-based pseudo-parallelism still causes high latency, preventing its adaptation for latency-sensitive web services.
papers.abstract_zh: 无服务器计算通常采用强隔离机制来部署功能，这可能会带来巨大的性能开销，因为每个功能都需要在全新的环境中运行（即“一对一”模型）。为了加速函数计算，先前的工作提出使用沙箱共享来减少开销，即“多对一”模型。尽管如此，基于进程的真并行或基于线程的伪并行仍然会导致高延迟，从而阻碍其适应延迟敏感的 Web 服务。

papers.title: RISA: Round-Robin Intra-Rack Friendly Scheduling Algorithm for Disaggregated Datacenters.
papers.abstract: Recent trends see a move away from a fixed-resource server-centric datacenter model to a more adaptable “disaggregated” datacenter model. These disaggregated datacenters can then dynamically group resources to the specific requirements of an incoming workload, thereby improving efficiency. To properly utilize these disaggregated datacenters, workload allocation techniques must examine the current state of the datacenter and choose resources that not only optimize the current workload request, but future ones. Since disaggregated datacenters are severely bottlenecked by the available network resources, our work proposes a heuristic-based approach called RISA, which significantly reduces the network usage of workload allocations in disaggregated datacenters. Compared to the state-of-the-art, RISA reduces the power consumption for optical components by and reduces the average CPU-RAM round-trip latency by . Additionally, RISA significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of execution time.
papers.abstract_zh: 最近的趋势是从以固定资源服务器为中心的数据中心模型转向适应性更强的“分解”数据中心模型。然后，这些分解的数据中心可以根据传入工作负载的特定要求动态地将资源分组，从而提高效率。为了正确利用这些分解的数据中心，工作负载分配技术必须检查数据中心的当前状态，并选择不仅优化当前工作负载请求而且优化未来工作负载请求的资源。由于分类数据中心受到可用网络资源的严重瓶颈，我们的工作提出了一种名为 RISA 的基于启发式的方法，该方法显着减少了分类数据中心中工作负载分配的网络使用量。与最先进的技术相比，RISA 将光学组件的功耗降低了 ，并将平均 CPU-RAM 往返延迟降低了 。此外，RISA 在执行时间方面显着优于最先进的技术。

papers.title: Risk-Aware Scheduling Algorithms for Variable Capacity Resources.
papers.abstract: The drive to decarbonize the power grid to slow the pace of climate change has caused dramatic variation in the cost, availability, and carbon-intensity of power. This has begun to shape the planning and operation of datacenters. This paper focuses on the design of scheduling algorithms for independent jobs that are submitted to a platform whose resource capacity varies over time. Jobs are submitted online and assigned on a target machine by the scheduler, which is agnostic to the rate and amount of resource variation. The optimization objective is the goodput, defined as the fraction of time devoted to effective computations (re-execution does not count). We introduce several novel algorithms that: (i) decide which fraction of the resources can be used safely; (ii) maintain a risk index associated to each machine; and (iii) achieves a global load balance while mapping longer jobs to safer machines. We assess the performance of these algorithms using one set of actual workflow traces together with three sets of synthetic traces. The goodput achieved by our algorithms increases up to 10% compared to standard first-fit approaches, while we never experience any loss in complementary metrics such as the maximum or average stretch.
papers.abstract_zh: 为了减缓气候变化的步伐而对电网进行脱碳的努力导致了电力成本、可用性和碳强度的巨大变化。这已经开始影响数据中心的规划和运营。本文重点关注提交到资源容量随时间变化的平台的独立作业的调度算法的设计。作业由调度程序在线提交并分配到目标计算机上，这与资源变化的速率和数量无关。优化目标是有效吞吐量，定义为用于有效计算的时间比例（重新执行不算在内）。我们引入了几种新颖的算法：（i）决定哪一部分资源可以安全使用； (ii) 维护与每台机器相关的风险指数； (iii) 实现全局负载平衡，同时将较长的工作映射到更安全的机器上。我们使用一组实际工作流程跟踪和三组合成跟踪来评估这些算法的性能。与标准的首次拟合方法相比，我们的算法实现的吞吐量提高了 10%，而我们从未经历过最大或平均拉伸等补充指标的任何损失。

papers.title: RMARaceBench: A Microbenchmark Suite to Evaluate Race Detection Tools for RMA Programs.
papers.abstract: Parallel programming models with Remote Memory Access (RMA), such as MPI RMA, OpenSHMEM, and GASPI, allow processes to modify the memory of other processes directly. Special care is required to avoid concurrent conflicting accesses that lead to data races across processes resulting in undefined behavior. To detect such RMA races, different race detection tools have been developed. However, there is currently no possibility to compare their effectiveness systematically. In this paper, we present RMARaceBench, a microbenchmark suite to evaluate the detection capabilities of RMA race detection tools for MPI RMA, OpenSHMEM, and GASPI. It consists of about 100 synthetic race test cases for each programming model, aiming to cover all possible race scenarios. Using RMARaceBench, we evaluate two MPI RMA race detectors implemented in the correctness tool suites MUST and PARCOACH. The evaluation shows that RMARaceBench can pinpoint the strengths and weaknesses of RMA race detectors.
papers.abstract_zh: 具有远程内存访问 (RMA) 的并行编程模型（例如 MPI RMA、OpenSHMEM 和 GASPI）允许进程直接修改其他进程的内存。需要特别注意避免并发冲突访问，从而导致跨进程的数据竞争，从而导致未定义的行为。为了检测此类 RMA 竞争，已经开发了不同的竞争检测工具。然而，目前还无法系统地比较它们的有效性。在本文中，我们提出了 RMARaceBench，这是一个微基准套件，用于评估 MPI RMA、OpenSHMEM 和 GASPI 的 RMA 竞争检测工具的检测能力。它由每个编程模型的约 100 个综合竞赛测试用例组成，旨在覆盖所有可能的竞赛场景。使用 RMARaceBench，我们评估了在正确性工具套件 MUST 和 PARCOACH 中实现的两个 MPI RMA 竞争检测器。评估表明 RMARaceBench 可以查明 RMA 竞赛检测器的优点和缺点。

papers.title: Runtime Composition of Iterations for Fusing Loop-carried Sparse Dependence.
papers.abstract: Dependence between iterations in sparse computations causes inefficient use of memory and computation resources. This paper proposes sparse fusion, a technique that generates efficient parallel code for the combination of two sparse matrix kernels, where at least one of the kernels has loop-carried dependencies. Existing implementations optimize individual sparse kernels separately. However, this approach leads to synchronization overheads and load imbalance due to the irregular dependence patterns of sparse kernels, as well as inefficient cache usage due to their irregular memory access patterns. Sparse fusion uses a novel inspection strategy and code transformation to generate parallel fused code optimized for data locality and load balance. Sparse fusion outperforms the best of unfused implementations using ParSy and MKL by an average of 4.2× and is faster than the best of fused implementations using existing scheduling algorithms, such as LBC, DAGP, and wavefront by an average of 4× for various kernel combinations.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏计算中迭代之间的依赖性导致内存和计算资源的低效使用。本文提出了稀疏融合，这是一种为两个稀疏矩阵内核的组合生成高效并行代码的技术，其中至少一个内核具有循环携带依赖性。现有的实现分别优化各个稀疏内核。然而，由于稀疏内核的不规则依赖模式，这种方法会导致同步开销和负载不平衡，并且由于其不规则的内存访问模式而导致缓存使用效率低下。稀疏融合使用新颖的检查策略和代码转换来生成针对数据局部性和负载平衡进行优化的并行融合代码。对于各种内核组合，稀疏融合的性能比使用 ParSy 和 MKL 的最佳未融合实现平均快 4.2 倍，并且比使用现有调度算法（例如 LBC、DAGP 和波前）的最佳融合实现平均快 4 倍。

papers.title: Scalable Lead Prediction with Transformers using HPC resources.
papers.abstract: A promising direction in cancer drug discovery is high-throughput screening of extensive compound datasets to identify advantageous properties, including their ability to interact with relevant biomolecules such as proteins. However, traditional structural approaches for assessing binding affinity, such as free energy methods or molecular docking, pose significant computational bottlenecks when dealing with such vast datasets. To address this, we have developed a docking surrogate called the SMILES transformer (ST), which learns molecular features from the SMILES representation of compounds and approximates their binding affinity. SMILES data is first tokenized using a well-established SMILES-pair tokenizer and fed into a BERT-like Transformer model to generate vector embeddings for each molecule, effectively capturing the essential information. These extracted embeddings are then fed into a regression model to predict the binding affinity. Leveraging the high-performance computing resources at Argonne National Lab, we devised a workflow to scale model training and inference across multiple supercomputing nodes. To evaluate the performance and accuracy of our workflow, we conducted experiments using molecular docking binding affinity data on multiple receptors, comparing ST with another state-of-the-art docking surrogate. Impressively, both surrogates yielded comparable val-r2 measurements of between 70 and 90%, affirming the capability of ST to learn molecular features directly from language-based data. Furthermore, one significant advantage of the ST approach is its notably faster tokenization preprocessing compared to the alternative method, which requires generating molecular descriptors using Mordred. Our workflow facilitated screening of ∼3 billion compounds on 48 nodes of the Polaris supercomputer in approximately an hour. In summary, our approach presents an efficient means to screen extensive compound databases for potential molecular properties that could serve as lead compounds targeting cancer. Looking ahead, an important future direction for our workflow involves integrating de-novo drug design, enabling us to scale our efforts to explore the limits of synthesizable compounds within chemical space.
papers.abstract_zh: 癌症药物发现的一个有前途的方向是对广泛的化合物数据集进行高通量筛选，以识别有利的特性，包括它们与相关生物分子（例如蛋白质）相互作用的能力。然而，用于评估结合亲和力的传统结构方法（例如自由能方法或分子对接）在处理如此庞大的数据集时会造成严重的计算瓶颈。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种称为 SMILES 转换器 (ST) 的对接替代物，它可以从化合物的 SMILES 表示中学习分子特征并近似其结合亲和力。 SMILES 数据首先使用完善的 SMILES 对标记器进行标记，然后输入类似 BERT 的 Transformer 模型，为每个分子生成向量嵌入，从而有效捕获基本信息。然后将这些提取的嵌入输入回归模型以预测结合亲和力。利用阿贡国家实验室的高性能计算资源，我们设计了一个工作流程来跨多个超级计算节点扩展模型训练和推理。为了评估我们工作流程的性能和准确性，我们使用多个受体上的分子对接结合亲和力数据进行了实验，将 ST 与另一种最先进的对接替代物进行了比较。令人印象深刻的是，两个替代物都产生了 70% 到 90% 之间的可比 val-r2 测量结果，证实了 ST 直接从基于语言的数据学习分子特征的能力。此外，ST 方法的一个显着优势是，与需要使用 Mordred 生成分子描述符的替代方法相比，它的标记化预处理速度明显更快。我们的工作流程在大约一个小时内，在 Polaris 超级计算机的 48 个节点上筛选了约 30 亿种化合物。总之，我们的方法提供了一种有效的方法来筛选广泛的化合物数据库，以寻找可作为靶向癌症的先导化合物的潜在分子特性。展望未来，我们工作流程的一个重要未来方向涉及整合从头药物设计，使我们能够扩大努力，探索化学空间内可合成化合物的极限。

papers.title: Scalable Tuning of (OpenMP) GPU Applications via Kernel Record and Replay.
papers.abstract: HPC is a heterogeneous world in which host and device code are interleaved throughout the application. Given the significant performance advantage of accelerators, device code execution time is becoming the new bottleneck. Tuning the accelerated parts is consequently highly desirable but often impractical due to the large overall application runtime which includes unrelated host parts.
papers.abstract_zh: HPC 是一个异构世界，其中主机和设备代码在整个应用程序中交织。鉴于加速器显着的性能优势，设备代码执行时间正在成为新的瓶颈。因此，调整加速部分是非常可取的，但由于包含不相关主机部分的整体应用程序运行时间很大，因此通常是不切实际的。

papers.title: Scale Composite BaaS Services With AFCL Workflows.
papers.abstract: Due to various restrictions in serverless computing, developers face significant challenges to pipeline multiple Backend-as-a-Service (BaaS) services, which is restricted by the maximum size of the serverless function’s deployment package, or by throughput and concurrency restrictions for functions and BaaS services.
papers.abstract_zh: 由于无服务器计算的各种限制，开发人员在管道化多个后端即服务（BaaS）服务时面临着巨大的挑战，这受到无服务器功能部署包的最大大小的限制，或者受到功能和BaaS服务的吞吐量和并发限制的限制。

papers.title: Scaling Computational Fluid Dynamics: In Situ Visualization of NekRS using SENSEI.
papers.abstract: In the realm of Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD), the demand for memory and computation resources is extreme, necessitating the use of leadership-scale computing platforms for practical domain sizes. This intensive requirement renders traditional checkpointing methods ineffective due to the significant slowdown in simulations while saving state data to disk. As we progress towards exascale and GPU-driven High-Performance Computing (HPC) and confront larger problem sizes, the choice becomes increasingly stark: to compromise data fidelity or to reduce resolution. To navigate this challenge, this study advocates for the use of in situ analysis and visualization techniques. These allow more frequent data "snapshots" to be taken directly from memory, thus avoiding the need for disruptive checkpointing. We detail our approach of instrumenting NekRS, a GPU-focused thermal-fluid simulation code employing the spectral element method (SEM), and describe varied in situ and in transit strategies for data rendering. Additionally, we provide concrete scientific use-cases and report on runs performed on Polaris, Argonne Leadership Computing Facility’s (ALCF) 44 Petaflop supercomputer and Jülich Wizard for European Leadership Science (JUWELS) Booster, Jülich Supercomputing Centre’s (JSC) 71 Petaflop High Performance Computing (HPC) system, offering practical insight into the implications of our methodology.
papers.abstract_zh: 在计算流体动力学 (CFD) 领域，对内存和计算资源的需求非常大，因此需要针对实际领域大小使用领先规模的计算平台。这种密集的要求使得传统的检查点方法变得无效，因为在将状态数据保存到磁盘时模拟速度显着减慢。随着我们向百亿亿级和 GPU 驱动的高性能计算 (HPC) 迈进，并面临更大的问题规模，选择变得越来越严峻：妥协数据保真度或降低分辨率。为了应对这一挑战，本研究提倡使用原位分析和可视化技术。这些允许直接从内存中获取更频繁的数据“快照”，从而避免了破坏性检查点的需要。我们详细介绍了 NekRS 的检测方法，NekRS 是一种采用谱元方法 (SEM) 的以 GPU 为中心的热流体模拟代码，并描述了各种数据渲染的原位和传输策略。此外，我们还提供了在 Polaris、阿贡领导计算设施 (ALCF) 44 Petaflop 超级计算机、Jülich Wizard for European Leadership Science (JUWELS) Booster、Jülich 超级计算中心 (JSC) 71 Petaflop 高性能计算 (HPC) 系统上执行的具体科学用例和报告，为我们的方法论的含义提供了实用的见解。

papers.title: Scaling the "Memory Wall" for Multi-Dimensional Seismic Processing with Algebraic Compression on Cerebras CS-2 Systems.
papers.abstract: We exploit the high memory bandwidth of AI-customized Cerebras CS-2 systems for seismic processing. By leveraging low-rank matrix approximation, we fit memory-hungry seismic applications onto memory-austere SRAM wafer-scale hardware, thus addressing a challenge arising in many wave-equation-based algorithms that rely on Multi-Dimensional Convolution (MDC) operators. Exploiting sparsity inherent in seismic data in the frequency domain, we implement embarrassingly parallel tile low-rank matrix-vector multiplications (TLR-MVM), which account for most of the elapsed time in MDC operations, to successfully solve the Multi-Dimensional Deconvolution (MDD) inverse problem. By reducing memory footprint along with arithmetic complexity, we fit a standard seismic benchmark dataset into the small local memories of Cerebras processing elements. Deploying TLR-MVM execution onto 48 CS-2 systems in support of MDD gives a sustained memory bandwidth of 92.58PB/s on 35, 784, 000 processing elements, a significant milestone that highlights the capabilities of AI-customized architectures to enable a new generation of seismic algorithms that will empower multiple technologies of our low-carbon future.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们利用 AI 定制 Cerebras CS-2 系统的高内存带宽进行地震处理。通过利用低秩矩阵近似，我们将需要大量内存的地震应用程序安装到内存要求严格的 SRAM 晶圆级硬件上，从而解决了许多依赖多维卷积 (MDC) 算子的基于波动方程的算法中出现的挑战。利用频域地震数据固有的稀疏性，我们实现了令人尴尬的并行瓦片低秩矩阵向量乘法（TLR-MVM），它占据了 MDC 操作中的大部分时间，成功解决了多维反褶积（MDD）逆问题。通过减少内存占用和算术复杂性，我们将标准地震基准数据集放入 Cerebras 处理元件的小型本地内存中。将 TLR-MVM 执行部署到 48 个 CS-2 系统上以支持 MDD，可在 35、784、000 个处理元件上提供 92.58PB/s 的持续内存带宽，这是一个重要的里程碑，突出了 AI 定制架构的功能，以实现新一代地震算法，从而为我们的低碳未来的多种技术提供支持。

papers.title: Scaling the Leading Accuracy of Deep Equivariant Models to Biomolecular Simulations of Realistic Size.
papers.abstract: This work brings the leading accuracy, sample efficiency, and robustness of deep equivariant neural networks to the extreme computational scale. This is achieved through a combination of innovative model architecture, massive parallelization, and models and implementations optimized for efficient GPU utilization. The resulting Allegro architecture bridges the accuracy-speed tradeoff of atomistic simulations and enables description of dynamics in structures of unprecedented complexity at quantum fidelity. To illustrate the scalability of Allegro, we perform nanoseconds-long stable simulations of protein dynamics and scale up to a 44-million atom structure of a complete, all-atom, explicitly solvated HIV capsid on the Perlmutter supercomputer. We demonstrate excellent strong scaling up to 100 million atoms and 70% weak scaling to 5120 A100 GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 这项工作将深度等变神经网络的领先精度、样本效率和鲁棒性提升到了极限计算规模。这是通过创新模型架构、大规模并行化以及针对高效 GPU 使用而优化的模型和实现的组合来实现的。由此产生的 Allegro 架构弥合了原子模拟的精度与速度权衡，并能够以量子保真度描述前所未有的复杂结构中的动力学。为了说明 Allegro 的可扩展性，我们对蛋白质动力学进行了纳秒长的稳定模拟，并在 Perlmutter 超级计算机上将完整的全原子、明确溶剂化的 HIV 衣壳扩展到 4400 万个原子结构。我们展示了高达 1 亿个原子的出色强扩展和 5120 个 A100 GPU 的 70% 弱扩展。

papers.title: Self-service Monitoring of HPC and Openstack Jobs for Users.
papers.abstract: Using an HPC or OpenStack cluster is a challenge for all new users, and even for experienced users. This is especially true for non-traditional domains where a cluster is only a tool and not the subject of their research.
papers.abstract_zh: 使用 HPC 或 OpenStack 集群对于所有新用户，甚至是经验丰富的用户来说都是一个挑战。对于非传统领域尤其如此，在这些领域中，集群只是一种工具，而不是研究的主题。

papers.title: shmem4py: High-Performance One-Sided Communication for Python Applications.
papers.abstract: This paper describes shmem4py, a Python wrapper for the OpenSHMEM application programming interface (API) which follows a design similar to that of the well-known mpi4py package. OpenSHMEM is a descendant of the one-sided communication library for the Cray T3D and it is known for its uncompromising performance for low-latency and high-throughput use cases involving one-sided and collective communication. OpenSHMEM is arguably one of the most efficient and portable abstractions for modern network architectures. Thanks to tight interoperability with NumPy, shmem4py provides a convenient parallel programming framework leveraging both the high-productivity NumPy feature set and the high-performance networking capabilities of OpenSHMEM. This paper discusses the design and performance characteristics of shmem4py in a variety of communication patterns relative to lower-level languages (C) as well as MPI and mpi4py.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 shmem4py，它是 OpenSHMEM 应用程序编程接口 (API) 的 Python 包装器，它遵循与著名的 mpi4py 包类似的设计。 OpenSHMEM 是 Cray T3D 的单侧通信库的后代，它以其在涉及单侧和集体通信的低延迟和高吞吐量用例方面的不折不扣的性能而闻名。 OpenSHMEM 可以说是现代网络架构最高效、最可移植的抽象之一。由于与 NumPy 的紧密互操作性，shmem4py 提供了一个方便的并行编程框架，利用了高生产力的 NumPy 功能集和 OpenSHMEM 的高性能网络功能。本文讨论了 shmem4py 在各种通信模式中相对于低级语言 (C) 以及 MPI 和 mpi4py 的设计和性能特征。

papers.title: Short Paper: Accelerating Hyperparameter Optimization Algorithms with Mixed Precision.
papers.abstract: Hyperparameter Optimization (HPO) of Neural Networks (NNs) is a computationally expensive procedure. On accelerators, such as NVIDIA Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) equipped with Tensor Cores, it is possible to speed-up the NN training by reducing the precision of some of the NN parameters, also referred to as mixed precision training. This paper investigates the performance of three popular HPO algorithms in terms of the achieved speed-up and model accuracy, utilizing early stopping, Bayesian, and genetic optimization approaches, in combination with mixed precision functionalities. The benchmarks are performed on 64 GPUs in parallel on three datasets: two from the vision and one from the Computational Fluid Dynamics domain. The results show that larger speed-ups can be achieved for mixed compared to full precision HPO if the checkpoint frequency is kept low. In addition to the reduced runtime, small gains in generalization performance on the test set are observed.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经网络 (NN) 的超参数优化 (HPO) 是一个计算成本高昂的过程。在加速器上，例如配备 Tensor Core 的 NVIDIA 图形处理单元 (GPU)，可以通过降低某些 NN 参数的精度来加速 NN 训练，也称为混合精度训练。本文利用早期停止、贝叶斯和遗传优化方法，结合混合精度功能，研究了三种流行的 HPO 算法在加速比和模型精度方面的性能。这些基准测试是在 64 个 GPU 上对三个数据集并行执行的：两个数据集来自视觉，一个来自计算流体动力学领域。结果表明，如果检查点频率保持较低，则与全精度 HPO 相比，混合可以实现更大的加速。除了减少运行时间之外，还观察到测试集上的泛化性能略有提高。

papers.title: Short Reasons for Long Vectors in HPC CPUs: A Study Based on RISC-V.
papers.abstract: For years, SIMD/vector units have enhanced the capabilities of modern CPUs in High-Performance Computing (HPC) and mobile technology. Typical commercially-available SIMD units process up to 8 double-precision elements with one instruction. The optimal vector width and its impact on CPU throughput due to memory latency and bandwidth remain challenging research areas. This study examines the behavior of four computational kernels on a RISC-V core connected to a customizable vector unit, capable of operating up to 256 double precision elements per instruction. The four codes have been purposefully selected to represent non-dense workloads: SpMV, BFS, PageRank, FFT. The experimental setup allows us to measure their performance while varying the vector length, the memory latency, and bandwidth. Our results not only show that larger vector lengths allow for better tolerance of limitations in the memory subsystem but also offer hope to code developers beyond dense linear algebra.
papers.abstract_zh: 多年来，SIMD/矢量单元增强了现代 CPU 在高性能计算 (HPC) 和移动技术方面的功能。典型的商用 SIMD 单元可使用一条指令处理多达 8 个双精度元素。最佳向量宽度及其因内存延迟和带宽而对 CPU 吞吐量的影响仍然是具有挑战性的研究领域。本研究检查了连接到可定制向量单元的 RISC-V 内核上的四个计算内核的行为，每条指令能够运行多达 256 个双精度元素。特意选择了四个代码来代表非密集工作负载：SpMV、BFS、PageRank、FFT。实验设置允许我们在改变向量长度、内存延迟和带宽的同时测量它们的性能。我们的结果不仅表明更大的向量长度可以更好地容忍内存子系统中的限制，而且还为代码开发人员提供超越密集线性代数的希望。

papers.title: Space Efficient Sequence Alignment for SRAM-Based Computing: X-Drop on the Graphcore IPU.
papers.abstract: Dedicated accelerator hardware has become essential for processing AI-based workloads, leading to the rise of novel accelerator architectures. Furthermore, fundamental differences in memory architecture and parallelism have made these accelerators targets for scientific computing.
papers.abstract_zh: 专用加速器硬件对于处理基于人工智能的工作负载至关重要，从而导致新型加速器架构的兴起。此外，内存架构和并行性的根本差异使这些加速器成为科学计算的目标。

papers.title: SPEChpc 2021 Benchmarks on Ice Lake and Sapphire Rapids Infiniband Clusters: A Performance and Energy Case Study.
papers.abstract: In this work, fundamental performance, power, and energy characteristics of the full SPEChpc 2021 benchmark suite are assessed on two different clusters based on Intel Ice Lake and Sapphire Rapids CPUs using the MPI-only codes’ variants. We use memory bandwidth, data volume, and scalability metrics in order to categorize the benchmarks and pinpoint relevant performance and scalability bottlenecks on the node and cluster levels. Common patterns such as memory bandwidth limitation, dominating communication and synchronization overhead, MPI serialization, superlinear scaling, and alignment issues could be identified, in isolation or in combination, showing that SPEChpc 2021 is representative of many HPC workloads. Power dissipation and energy measurements indicate that the modern Intel server CPUs have such a high idle power level that race-to-idle is the paramount strategy for energy to solution and energy-delay product minimization. On the chip level, only memory-bound code shows a clear advantage of Sapphire Rapids compared to Ice Lake in terms of energy to solution.
papers.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，使用仅 MPI 代码的变体，在基于 Intel Ice Lake 和 Sapphire Rapids CPU 的两个不同集群上评估了完整 SPEChpc 2021 基准套件的基本性能、功耗和能源特性。我们使用内存带宽、数据量和可扩展性指标来对基准进行分类，并查明节点和集群级别的相关性能和可扩展性瓶颈。可以单独或组合地识别内存带宽限制、主要通信和同步开销、MPI 序列化、超线性缩放和对齐问题等常见模式，这表明 SPEChpc 2021 代表了许多 HPC 工作负载。功耗和能量测量表明，现代英特尔服务器 CPU 具有如此高的空闲功率水平，以至于“竞赛到空闲”是能源解决方案和能源延迟产品最小化的首要策略。在芯片层面，只有内存限制的代码在解决方案的能源方面与 Ice Lake 相比，才显示出 Sapphire Rapids 的明显优势。

papers.title: Specialized Kernels for Optimizing GPU Offload in OpenMP.
papers.abstract: Programming models for general purpose GPU (GPGPU) computing include grid and non-grid languages. Grid languages like CUDA and HIP map directly to the GPU hardware and can extract high performance from applications. However, this low-level programming approach makes them more difficult to program than non-grid languages such as C, C++, and Fortran with OpenMP target offload. Furthermore, grid languages often have more portability issues than non-grid languages. However, code generated from non-grid languages using automatic compiler and runtime techniques often incur higher overhead while generating GPU kernels for target regions.
papers.abstract_zh: 通用 GPU (GPGPU) 计算的编程模型包括网格和非网格语言。 CUDA 和 HIP 等网格语言直接映射到 GPU 硬件，可以从应用程序中获取高性能。然而，这种低级编程方法使得它们比非网格语言（例如具有 OpenMP 目标卸载的 C、C++ 和 Fortran）更难编程。此外，网格语言通常比非网格语言有更多的可移植性问题。然而，使用自动编译器和运行时技术从非网格语言生成的代码在为目标区域生成 GPU 内核时通常会产生更高的开销。

papers.title: Stencil-HMLS: A multi-layered approach to the automatic optimisation of stencil codes on FPGA.
papers.abstract: The challenges associated with effectively programming FPGAs have been a major blocker in popularising reconfigurable architectures for HPC workloads. However new compiler technologies, such as MLIR, are providing new capabilities which potentially deliver the ability to extract domain specific information and drive automatic structuring of codes for FPGAs.
papers.abstract_zh: 与有效编程 FPGA 相关的挑战一直是 HPC 工作负载可重构架构普及的主要障碍。然而，新的编译器技术（例如 MLIR）正在提供新功能，有可能提供提取领域特定信息并驱动 FPGA 代码自动构建的能力。

papers.title: Streaming Data from Experimental Facilities to Supercomputers for Real-Time Data Processing.
papers.abstract: In this paper we demonstrate direct data streaming from instruments and detectors at a large-scale experimental facility to a supercomputer for real-time data processing and feedback. Streaming data to supercomputers introduces the potential for novel scientific applications and workflow models, including the ability to provide real-time feedback from very large datasets during an experiment and the integration of real-time ML training and inference at scale. We discuss a successful demonstration for real-time processing of data from the Advanced Photon Source (APS) on the Polaris supercomputer using an EPICS-based streaming framework. We describe the capabilities of the streaming framework itself, and outline the architecture that allows us to process experimentally derived data on a supercomputer without file-based data transfers. We present throughput measurements that are indicative of system performance capable of sustaining the expected data production rates of the facility, as well as discuss some outstanding challenges and our future directions.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们演示了从大型实验设施的仪器和探测器到超级计算机的直接数据流，以进行实时数据处理和反馈。将数据流式传输到超级计算机引入了新颖的科学应用和工作流程模型的潜力，包括在实验期间从非常大的数据集提供实时反馈的能力以及大规模实时机器学习训练和推理的集成。我们讨论了使用基于 EPICS 的流框架在 Polaris 超级计算机上实时处理来自高级光子源 (APS) 的数据的成功演示。我们描述了流框架本身的功能，并概述了允许我们在超级计算机上处​​理实验得出的数据而无需基于文件的数据传输的架构。我们提供了吞吐量测量结果，这些测量结果表明系统性能能够维持设施的预期数据生产率，并讨论了一些突出的挑战和我们未来的方向。

papers.title: Streaming Hardware Compressor Generator Framework.
papers.abstract: The interest in and strong demand for application-specific accelerators in computing and sensor data processing are rising. Simultaneously, data movement bottlenecks are increasingly becoming a significant limiting factor for these accelerators. Integrating an extremely resource-efficient, ultra-low-latency compressor block into their data path or pipeline could solve or mitigate data movement bottlenecks and enhance the performance of these accelerators. However, workflows for hardware compressor architecture exploration are little studied. We introduce a generator framework for designing, verifying, and estimating resources in streaming hardware compressor architectures to fill the gap. This framework assists users in exploring different compressor architectures with different compressor building blocks, evaluating their characteristics (latency, throughput, gate counts), and generating RTL code for integrating them into custom accelerator designs. Our motivation is to bridge the gap between software and hardware experts through this proposed framework as a co-design tool.
papers.abstract_zh: 人们对计算和传感器数据处理领域专用加速器的兴趣和强烈需求正在不断上升。同时，数据移动瓶颈日益成为这些加速器的重要限制因素。将资源效率极高、超低延迟的压缩器块集成到数据路径或管道中可以解决或减轻数据移动瓶颈并增强这些加速器的性能。然而，硬件压缩器架构探索的工作流程却很少被研究。我们引入了一个生成器框架，用于设计、验证和估计流硬件压缩器架构中的资源，以填补空白。该框架可帮助用户探索具有不同压缩器构建块的不同压缩器架构，评估其特性（延迟、吞吐量、门数），并生成 RTL 代码以将其集成到自定义加速器设计中。我们的动机是通过这个提议的框架作为协同设计工具来弥合软件和硬件专家之间的差距。

papers.title: Structural Coding: A Low-Cost Scheme to Protect CNNs from Large-Granularity Memory Faults.
papers.abstract: The advent of High-Performance Computing has led to the adoption of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in safety-critical applications such as autonomous vehicles. However, CNNs are vulnerable to DRAM errors corrupting their parameters, thereby degrading their accuracy. Existing techniques for protecting CNNs from DRAM errors are either expensive or fail to protect from large-granularity, multi-bit errors, which occur commonly in DRAMs.
papers.abstract_zh: 高性能计算的出现导致卷积神经网络 (CNN) 在自动驾驶汽车等安全关键应用中得到采用。然而，CNN 很容易受到 DRAM 错误的影响，从而破坏其参数，从而降低其准确性。用于保护 CNN 免受 DRAM 错误影响的现有技术要么成本高昂，要么无法防止 DRAM 中常见的大粒度、多位错误。

papers.title: Sunfish: An Open Centralized Composable HPC Management Framework.
papers.abstract: Traditional HPC systems are provisioned with static fixed quantities of memory, storage, accelerators, and CPU resources to execute requested computation. This is not sufficient for today’s datacenters that are running modern dynamic workloads, resulting in workloads executing on systems that are not optimized for their needs. Datacenters often end up over-provisioning hardware resources to attempt enabling any workload to run on any server in the cluster. Composable Disaggregated Infrastructure (CDI) enables servers to be composed out of physically disaggregated resources to support the requirements of a given workload. Resource management, using a standardized interface, can enable clients to monitor, compose, and intelligently provision resources, in beneficial ways. The OpenFabrics Alliance in collaboration with DMTF, SNIA, and the CXL Consortium, is developing the Sunfish Management Framework. The goal of Sunfish is to enable interoperability through common interfaces for connecting workloads with resources, without having to worry about the underlying network technology.
papers.abstract_zh: 传统 HPC 系统配备静态固定数量的内存、存储、加速器和 CPU 资源来执行请求的计算。对于当今运行现代动态工作负载的数据中心来说，这还不够，导致工作负载在未针对其需求进行优化的系统上执行。数据中心通常会过度配置硬件资源，以尝试使任何工作负载能够在集群中的任何服务器上运行。可组合分解基础设施 (CDI) 使服务器能够由物理分解的资源组成，以支持给定工作负载的要求。使用标准化接口的资源管理可以使客户端以有益的方式监控、组合和智能地配置资源。 OpenFabrics 联盟与 DMTF、SNIA 和 CXL 联盟合作，正在开发 Sunfish 管理框架。 Sunfish 的目标是通过通用接口实现互操作性，将工作负载与资源连接起来，而不必担心底层网络技术。

papers.title: Survey of adaptive containerization architectures for HPC.
papers.abstract: Containers offer an array of advantages that benefit research reproducibility and portability. As container tools mature, container security improves, and high-performance computing (HPC) and cloud system tools converge, supercomputing centers are increasingly integrating containers into their workflows. Despite this, most research into containers remains focused on cloud environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 容器具有一系列优势，有利于研究的可重复性和可移植性。随着容器工具的成熟、容器安全性的提高以及高性能计算（HPC）和云系统工具的融合，超级计算中心越来越多地将容器集成到其工作流程中。尽管如此，大多数对容器的研究仍然集中在云环境上。

papers.title: Sustainability in HPC: Vision and Opportunities.
papers.abstract: Tackling climate change by reducing and eventually eliminating carbon emissions is a significant milestone on the path toward establishing an environmentally sustainable society. As we transition into the exascale era, marked by an increasing demand and scale of HPC resources, the HPC community must embrace the challenge of reducing carbon emissions from designing and operating modern HPC systems. In this position paper, we describe challenges and highlight different opportunities that can aid HPC sites in reducing the carbon footprint of modern HPC systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 通过减少并最终消除碳排放来应对气候变化是建立环境可持续社会道路上的一个重要里程碑。随着我们进入百亿亿次时代，高性能计算资源的需求和规模不断增加，高性能计算社区必须迎接减少设计和运营现代高性能计算系统碳排放的挑战。在本立场文件中，我们描述了挑战并强调了可以帮助 HPC 站点减少现代 HPC 系统碳足迹的不同机遇。

papers.title: symPACK: A GPU-Capable Fan-Out Sparse Cholesky Solver.
papers.abstract: Sparse symmetric positive definite systems of equations are ubiquitous in scientific workloads and applications. Parallel sparse Cholesky factorization is the method of choice for solving such linear systems. Therefore, the development of parallel sparse Cholesky codes that can efficiently run on today’s large-scale heterogeneous distributed-memory platforms is of vital importance. Modern supercomputers offer nodes that contain a mix of CPUs and GPUs. To fully utilize the computing power of these nodes, scientific codes must be adapted to offload expensive computations to GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 稀疏对称正定方程组在科学工作量和应用中无处不在。并行稀疏 Cholesky 分解是求解此类线性系统的首选方法。因此，开发能够在当今大规模异构分布式内存平台上高效运行的并行稀疏 Cholesky 代码至关重要。现代超级计算机提供包含 CPU 和 GPU 混合的节点。为了充分利用这些节点的计算能力，必须调整科学代码以将昂贵的计算卸载到 GPU。

papers.title: SYnergy: Fine-grained Energy-Efficient Heterogeneous Computing for Scalable Energy Saving.
papers.abstract: Energy-efficient computing uses power management techniques such as frequency scaling to save energy. Implementing energy-efficient techniques on large-scale computing systems is challenging for several reasons. While most modern architectures, including GPUs, are capable of frequency scaling, these features are often not available on large systems. In addition, achieving higher energy savings requires precise energy tuning because not only applications but also different kernels can have different energy characteristics. We propose SYnergy, a novel energy-efficient approach that spans languages, compilers, runtimes, and job schedulers to achieve unprecedented fine-grained energy savings on large-scale heterogeneous clusters. SYnergy defines an extension to the SYCL programming model that allows programmers to define a specific energy goal for each kernel. For example, a kernel can aim to minimize well-known energy metrics such as EDP and ED2P or to achieve predefined energy-performance tradeoffs, such as the best performance with 25% energy savings. Through compiler integration and a machine learning model, each kernel is statically optimized for the specific target. On large computing systems, a SLURM plug-in allows SYnergy to run on all available devices in the cluster, providing scalable energy savings. The methodology is inherently portable and has been evaluated on both NVIDIA and AMD GPUs. Experimental results show unprecedented improvements in energy and energy-related metrics on real-world applications, as well as scalable energy savings on a 64-GPU cluster.
papers.abstract_zh: 节能计算使用频率缩放等电源管理技术来节省能源。由于多种原因，在大规模计算系统上实施节能技术具有挑战性。虽然大多数现代架构（包括 GPU）都能够进行频率缩放，但这些功能通常在大型系统上不可用。此外，实现更高的节能需要精确的能量调整，因为不仅应用程序而且不同的内核都可能具有不同的能量特性。我们提出了 SYnergy，一种新颖的节能方法，涵盖语言、编译器、运行时和作业调度程序，以在大规模异构集群上实现前所未有的细粒度节能。 SYnergy 定义了 SYCL 编程模型的扩展，允许程序员为每个内核定义特定的能源目标。例如，内核的目标是最小化 EDP 和 ED2P 等众所周知的能源指标，或实现预定义的能源性能权衡，例如节省 25% 能源的最佳性能。通过编译器集成和机器学习模型，每个内核都针对特定目标进行静态优化。在大型计算系统上，SLURM 插件允许 SYnergy 在集群中的所有可用设备上运行，从而提供可扩展的节能效果。该方法本质上是可移植的，并且已在 NVIDIA 和 AMD GPU 上进行了评估。实验结果表明，实际应用中的能源和能源相关指标得到了前所未有的改进，并且 64-GPU 集群上的可扩展能源节省也得到了改善。

papers.title: TANGO: A GPU optimized traceback approach for sequence alignment algorithms.
papers.abstract: Sequence alignment algorithms play a central role in most bioinformatics software. However, porting these algorithms to GPUs can be challenging due to their reliance on irregular memory access patterns and integer-heavy operations. Here we present TANGO, an optimized GPU implementation of the Smith-Waterman (SW) algorithm with a focus on the traceback phase. We leverage stacked diagonal-major indexing and compressed binary representation for efficient adaptation of the traceback phase to GPUs. Our proposed implementation achieves speedups of 12.6 × and 9.9 × compared to state-of-the-art CPU libraries for DNA and protein alignments, respectively. It is the fastest SW library for protein alignments on GPU while providing comparable performance to other GPU libraries for DNA. Finally, we integrate TANGO into a large-scale metagenome assembly software to speed up a production workflow.
papers.abstract_zh: 序列比对算法在大多数生物信息学软件中发挥着核心作用。然而，将这些算法移植到 GPU 可能具有挑战性，因为它们依赖于不规则的内存访问模式和整数密集型操作。在这里，我们介绍 TANGO，这是 Smith-Waterman (SW) 算法的优化 GPU 实现，重点关注回溯阶段。我们利用堆叠对角主索引和压缩二进制表示来有效地将回溯阶段适应 GPU。与最先进的 DNA 和蛋白质比对 CPU 库相比，我们提出的实现分别实现了 12.6 倍和 9.9 倍的加速。它是 GPU 上最快的蛋白质比对软件库，同时提供与其他 DNA GPU 库相当的性能。最后，我们将 TANGO 集成到大规模宏基因组组装软件中，以加快生产工作流程。

papers.title: TANGO: re-thinking quantization for graph neural network training on GPUs.
papers.abstract: Graph learning is becoming increasingly popular due to its superior performance in tackling many grand challenges. While quantization is widely used to accelerate Graph Neural Network (GNN) computation, quantized training faces remarkable roadblocks. Current quantized GNN training systems often experience longer training time than their full-precision counterparts for two reasons: (i) addressing the quantization accuracy challenge leads to excessive overhead, and (ii) the optimization potential exposed by quantization is not adequately leveraged. This paper introduces Tango which re-thinks quantization challenges and opportunities for graph neural network training on GPUs with three contributions: Firstly, we introduce efficient rules to maintain accuracy during quantized GNN training. Secondly, we design and implement quantization-aware primitives and inter-primitive optimizations to speed up GNN training. Finally, we integrate Tango with the popular Deep Graph Library (DGL) system and demonstrate its superior performance over the state-of-the-art approaches on various GNN models and datasets.
papers.abstract_zh: 图学习因其在应对许多重大挑战方面的卓越性能而变得越来越受欢迎。虽然量化被广泛用于加速图神经网络（GNN）计算，但量化训练面临着显着的障碍。当前的量化 GNN 训练系统通常比全精度训练系统经历更长的训练时间，原因有两个：(i) 解决量化精度挑战会导致过多的开销，(ii) 量化所暴露的优化潜力没有得到充分利用。本文介绍了 Tango，它重新思考了 GPU 上图神经网络训练的量化挑战和机遇，具有以下三个贡献：首先，我们引入了有效的规则来在量化 GNN 训练期间保持准确性。其次，我们设计并实现了量化感知原语和原语间优化，以加速 GNN 训练。最后，我们将 Tango 与流行的深度图库 (DGL) 系统集成，并在各种 GNN 模型和数据集上展示其优于最先进方法的卓越性能。

papers.title: Task-Based Polar Decomposition Using SLATE on Massively Parallel Systems with Hardware Accelerators.
papers.abstract: We investigate a new task-based implementation of the polar decomposition on massively parallel systems augmented with multiple GPUs using SLATE. We implement the iterative QR Dynamically-Weighted Halley (QDWH) algorithm, whose building blocks mainly consist of compute-bound matrix operations, allowing for high levels of parallelism to be exploited on various hardware architectures, such as NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel GPU-based systems. To achieve both performance and portability, we implement our QDWH-based polar decomposition in the SLATE library, which uses efficient techniques in dense linear algebra, such as 2D block cyclic data distribution and communication-avoiding algorithms, as well as modern parallel programming approaches, such as dynamic scheduling and communication overlapping, and uses OpenMP tasks to track data dependencies.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们研究了一种新的基于任务的极分解在使用 SLATE 通过多个 GPU 增强的大规模并行系统上的实现。我们实现了迭代 QR 动态加权哈雷 (QDWH) 算法，其构建块主要由计算绑定矩阵运算组成，允许在各种硬件架构（例如 NVIDIA、AMD 和基于 Intel GPU 的系统）上利用高水平的并行性。为了实现性能和可移植性，我们在 SLATE 库中实现了基于 QDWH 的极分解，该库使用密集线性代数中的高效技术，例如 2D 块循环数据分布和通信避免算法，以及现代并行编程方法，例如动态调度和通信重叠，并使用 OpenMP 任务来跟踪数据依赖性。

papers.title: TaskVine: Managing In-Cluster Storage for High-Throughput Data Intensive Workflows.
papers.abstract: Many scientific applications are expressed as high-throughput workflows that consist of large graphs of data assets and tasks to be executed on large parallel and distributed systems. A challenge in executing these workflows is managing data: both datasets and software must be efficiently distributed to cluster nodes; intermediate data must be conveyed between tasks; output data must be delivered to its destination. Scaling problems result when these actions are performed in an uncoordinated manner on a shared filesystem. To address this problem, we introduce TaskVine: a system for exploiting the aggregate local storage and network capacity of a large cluster. TaskVine tracks the lifetime of data in a workflow –from archival sources to final outputs– making use of local storage to distribute, and re-use data wherever possible. We describe the architecture and novel capabilities of TaskVine, and demonstrate its use with applications in genomics, high energy physics, molecular dynamics, and machine learning.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多科学应用程序都表示为高吞吐量工作流程，其中包含要在大型并行和分布式系统上执行的大型数据资产图和任务。执行这些工作流程的一个挑战是管理数据：数据集和软件都必须有效地分发到集群节点；任务之间必须传送中间数据；输出数据必须传送到目的地。当这些操作在共享文件系统上以不协调的方式执行时，就会出现扩展问题。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 TaskVine：一个用于利用大型集群的聚合本地存储和网络容量的系统。 TaskVine 跟踪工作流程中数据的生命周期（从存档源到最终输出），尽可能利用本地存储来分发和重用数据。我们描述了 TaskVine 的架构和新颖功能，并展示了其在基因组学、高能物理、分子动力学和机器学习中的应用。

papers.title: Teaching Heterogeneous and Parallel Computing with Google Colab and Raspberry Pi Clusters.
papers.abstract: In this paper, we describe the process and evaluation results of teaching Heterogeneous and Parallel Computing with Google Colab and Raspberry Pi Clusters in a senior elective course in Spring 2023. The course began with an introduction to the fundamentals of designing and building parallel programs. Then, while the whole class went on to learn and practice CUDA on Google Colab for around five and half weeks, in parallel, a team of two students spearheaded a pilot project as their undergraduate research project to build, configure, and test a cluster of four Raspberry Pi’s. Then the rest of the class was divided into seven teams and spent one and half weeks to build their own Raspberry Pi clusters using the instructions and tutorials developed through the pilot project. Now that each team had a Raspberry Pi cluster fully functional and accessible through WiFi, in the next seven weeks, the class went on to learn OpenMP and MPI and developed shared-memory and message-passing based programs on various scales. In this paper, students’ performance on the course labs and assignments, their end-of-semester evaluations, and three anonymous surveys were collected as data to produce an analysis of the course. The lessons we learned from this offering of the course are: 1) Google Colab is a great and cost-saving platform for students to work on real-world alike parallel programs with modern CPUs and GPUs; 2) Students benefit substantially from the hands-on experience of building and configuring a physical cluster of Raspberry Pi’s; 3) Heterogeneous and Parallel Computing has a positive impact on student learning and gives them a new perspective on how to organize and process data in an efficient way therefore should be offered at a higher frequency to a broader range of students.
papers.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了在 2023 年春季高级选修课中使用 Google Colab 和 Raspberry Pi Clusters 教授异构和并行计算的过程和评估结果。该课程首先介绍了设计和构建并行程序的基础知识。然后，当全班继续在 Google Colab 上学习和练习 CUDA 大约五周半的时间时，同时，一个由两名学生组成的团队带头开展了一个试点项目，作为他们的本科生研究项目，以构建、配置和测试由四个 Raspberry Pi 组成的集群。然后，班级的其余成员被分成七个小组，花了一个半星期的时间，使用通过试点项目开发的说明和教程来构建自己的 Raspberry Pi 集群。现在每个团队都有一个功能齐全并可通过 WiFi 访问的 Raspberry Pi 集群，在接下来的七周内，全班同学继续学习 OpenMP 和 MPI，并开发了各种规模的基于共享内存和消息传递的程序。在本文中，收集了学生在课程实验室和作业中的表现、学期末评估以及三项匿名调查作为数据，以对课程进行分析。我们从这门课程中学到的经验教训是： 1) Google Colab 是一个出色且节省成本的平台，学生可以使用现代 CPU 和 GPU 开发类似现实世界的并行程序； 2) 学生可以从构建和配置 Raspberry Pi 物理集群的实践经验中受益匪浅； 3）异构和并行计算对学生的学习有积极的影响，并为他们提供了如何以有效的方式组织和处理数据的新视角，因此应该以更高的频率向更广泛的学生提供。

papers.title: Tencoder: tensor-product encoder-decoder architecture for predicting solutions of PDEs with variable boundary data.
papers.abstract: It is widely hoped that artificial intelligence will boost data-driven surrogate models in science and engineering. However, fundamental spatial aspects of AI surrogate models remain under-studied. We investigate the ability of neural-network surrogate models to predict solutions to PDEs under variable boundary values. We do not wish to retrain the model when the boundary values change but to make them inputs to the model and infer the solution of the PDE under those boundary conditions. Such a capability is essential to making AI-based surrogate models practically useful. While simple feedforward networks are used for one-dimensional (1D) Poisson equation, an encoder-decoder architecture with a tensor-product layer is developed for the two-dimensional Poisson equation posed on a rectangular domain. We show that it is indeed possible to infer solutions to PDEs from variable boundary data using neural networks in this relatively simple setting, and point to future directions. 1
papers.abstract_zh: 人们普遍希望人工智能将推动科学和工程领域数据驱动的替代模型。然而，人工智能替代模型的基本空间方面仍未得到充分研究。我们研究了神经网络代理模型在可变边界值下预测偏微分方程解的能力。我们不希望在边界值发生变化时重新训练模型，而是希望将它们输入到模型中并推断出这些边界条件下偏微分方程的解。这种能力对于使基于人工智能的替代模型发挥实际作用至关重要。虽然简单的前馈网络用于一维 (1D) 泊松方程，但针对矩形域上提出的二维泊松方程，开发了具有张量积层的编码器-解码器架构。我们证明，确实可以在这种相对简单的设置中使用神经网络从可变边界数据中推断出偏微分方程的解，并指出未来的方向。 1

papers.title: The Graph Database Interface: Scaling Online Transactional and Analytical Graph Workloads to Hundreds of Thousands of Cores.
papers.abstract: Graph databases (GDBs) are crucial in academic and industry applications. The key challenges in developing GDBs are achieving high performance, scalability, programmability, and portability. To tackle these challenges, we harness established practices from the HPC landscape to build a system that outperforms all past GDBs presented in the literature by orders of magnitude, for both OLTP and OLAP workloads. For this, we first identify and crystallize performance-critical building blocks in the GDB design, and abstract them into a portable and programmable API specification, called the Graph Database Interface (GDI), inspired by the best practices of MPI. We then use GDI to design a GDB for distributed-memory RDMA architectures. Our implementation harnesses onesided RDMA communication and collective operations, and it offers architecture-independent theoretical performance guarantees. The resulting design achieves extreme scales of more than a hundred thousand cores. Our work will facilitate the development of next-generation extreme-scale graph databases.
papers.abstract_zh: 图数据库（GDB）在学术和行业应用中至关重要。开发 GDB 的主要挑战是实现高性能、可扩展性、可编程性和可移植性。为了应对这些挑战，我们利用 HPC 领域的既定实践来构建一个系统，该系统在 OLTP 和 OLAP 工作负载方面的性能均优于文献中介绍的所有过去的 GDB。为此，我们首先确定并具体化 GDB 设计中的性能关键构建块，并将它们抽象为可移植且可编程的 API 规范，称为图形数据库接口 (GDI)，其灵感来自 MPI 的最佳实践。然后，我们使用 GDI 为分布式内存 RDMA 架构设计 GDB。我们的实现利用单边 RDMA 通信和集体操作，并提供独立于架构的理论性能保证。最终的设计实现了超过十万个核心的极限规模。我们的工作将促进下一代超大规模图数据库的开发。

papers.title: The I/O Trace Initiative: Building a Collaborative I/O Archive to Advance HPC.
papers.abstract: HPC application developers and administrators need to understand the complex interplay between compute clusters and storage systems to make effective optimization decisions. Ad hoc investigations of this interplay based on isolated case studies can lead to conclusions that are incorrect or difficult to generalize. The I/O Trace Initiative aims to improve the scientific community’s understanding of I/O operations by building a searchable collaborative archive of I/O traces from a wide range of applications and machines, with a focus on high-performance computing and scalable AI/ML. This initiative advances the accessibility of I/O trace data by enabling users to locate and compare traces based on user-specified criteria. It also provides a visual analytics platform for in-depth analysis, paving the way for the development of advanced performance optimization techniques. By acting as a hub for trace data, the initiative fosters collaborative research by encouraging data sharing and collective learning.
papers.abstract_zh: HPC 应用程序开发人员和管理员需要了解计算集群和存储系统之间复杂的相互作用，才能做出有效的优化决策。基于孤立案例研究对这种相互作用进行的特别调查可能会得出不正确或难以概括的结论。 I/O 跟踪计划旨在通过构建来自各种应用程序和机器的 I/O 跟踪的可搜索协作档案，提高科学界对 I/O 操作的理解，重点关注高性能计算和可扩展的 AI/ML。该举措使用户能够根据用户指定的标准定位和比较跟踪，从而提高了 I/O 跟踪数据的可访问性。它还提供了一个用于深入分析的可视化分析平台，为高级性能优化技术的开发铺平了道路。通过充当追踪数据的中心，该计划通过鼓励数据共享和集体学习来促进协作研究。

papers.title: The Simple Cloud-Resolving E3SM Atmosphere Model Running on the Frontier Exascale System.
papers.abstract: We present an efficient and performance portable implementation of the Simple Cloud Resolving E3SM Atmosphere Model (SCREAM).SCREAM is a full featured atmospheric global circulation model with a nonhydrostatic dynamical core and state-of-the-art parameterizations for microphysics, moist turbulence and radiation.It has been written from scratch in C++ with the Kokkos library used to abstract the on-node execution model for both CPUs and GPUs.SCREAM is one of only a few global atmosphere models to be ported to GPUs.As far as we know, SCREAM is the first such model to run on both AMD GPUs and NVIDIA GPUs, as well as the first to run on nearly an entire Exascale system (Frontier).On Frontier, we obtained a record setting performance of 1.26 simulated years per day for a realistic cloud resolving simulation.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了简单云解析 E3SM 大气模型 (SCREAM) 的高效且高性能的可移植实现。SCREAM 是一个全功能的大气全球环流模型，具有非静水动力核心和最先进的微物理、潮湿湍流和辐射参数化。它是用 C++ 编写的，用于抽象 CPU 和 GPU 的节点上执行模型。SCREAM 是为数不多的全球大气环流模型之一。据我们所知，SCREAM 是第一个同时在 AMD GPU 和 NVIDIA GPU 上运行的此类模型，也是第一个在几乎整个 Exascale 系统（Frontier）上运行的模型。在 Frontier 上，我们获得了每天 1.26 模拟年的真实云解析模拟性能记录。

papers.title: Throughput Optimization with a NUMA-Aware Runtime System for Efficient Scientific Data Streaming.
papers.abstract: With the surge in data generation rates from advanced scientific instruments, there is an urgent need for effective network management and resource utilization strategies for data streaming. Present strategies often lag behind hardware advancements, leading to resource underutilization. Modern servers typically employ non-uniform memory access (NUMA) multiprocessors, which, despite their benefits, can pose performance challenges. This paper presents a novel runtime system tailored for efficient multi-stream data management, optimizing both its compression and decompression phases, and enhancing network I/O based on the server’s unique hardware design. Our system coordinates parallel tasks for data compression, decompression, and transfer, aiming to reduce network data influx. Empirical tests show that aligning streaming tasks with the right NUMA domain results in a 1.48X throughput boost compared to cutting-edge methods and a 2.6X improvement over standard techniques.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着先进科学仪器的数据生成率激增，迫切需要有效的数据流网络管理和资源利用策略。目前的策略往往落后于硬件进步，导致资源利用不足。现代服务器通常采用非均匀内存访问 (NUMA) 多处理器，尽管有其优点，但可能会带来性能挑战。本文提出了一种专为高效多流数据管理而定制的新型运行时系统，优化其压缩和解压缩阶段，并基于服务器独特的硬件设计增强网络 I/O。我们的系统协调数据压缩、解压缩和传输的并行任务，旨在减少网络数据流入。实证测试表明，将流任务与正确的 NUMA 域结合起来，与尖端方法相比，吞吐量提高了 1.48 倍，与标准技术相比，吞吐量提高了 2.6 倍。

papers.title: TISCC: A Surface Code Compiler and Resource Estimator for Trapped-Ion Processors.
papers.abstract: We introduce the Trapped-Ion Surface Code Compiler (TISCC), a software tool that generates circuits for a universal set of surface code patch operations in terms of a native trapped-ion gate set. To accomplish this, TISCC manages an internal representation of a trapped-ion system where a repeating pattern of trapping zones and junctions is arranged in an arbitrarily large rectangular grid. Surface code operations are compiled by instantiating surface code patches on the grid and using methods to generate transversal operations over data qubits, rounds of error correction over stabilizer plaquettes, and/or lattice surgery operations between neighboring patches. Beyond the implementation of a basic surface code instruction set, TISCC contains corner movement functionality and a patch translation that is implemented using ion movement alone. Except in the latter case, all TISCC functionality is extensible to alternative grid-like hardware architectures. TISCC output has been verified using the Oak Ridge Quasi-Clifford Simulator (ORQCS).
papers.abstract_zh: 我们推出了捕获离子表面代码编译器 (TISCC)，这是一种软件工具，可根据本机捕获离子门集生成用于通用表面代码修补操作集的电路。为了实现这一目标，TISCC 管理捕获离子系统的内部表示，其中捕获区域和连接点的重复图案排列在任意大的矩形网格中。表面代码操作是通过在网格上实例化表面代码补丁并使用生成数据量子位上的横向操作、稳定器斑块上的多轮纠错和/或相邻补丁之间的晶格手术操作的方法来编译的。除了基本表面代码指令集的实现之外，TISCC 还包含角运动功能和仅使用离子运动实现的补丁转换。除了后一种情况之外，所有 TISCC 功能都可以扩展到替代的类似网格的硬件架构。 TISCC 输出已使用 Oak Ridge Quasi-Clifford Simulator (ORQCS) 进行验证。

papers.title: Tournament-Based Pretraining to Accelerate Federated Learning.
papers.abstract: Advances in hardware, proliferation of compute at the edge, and data creation at unprecedented scales have made federated learning (FL) necessary for the next leap forward in pervasive machine learning. For privacy and network reasons, large volumes of data remain stranded on endpoints located in geographically austere (or at least austere network-wise) locations. However, challenges exist to the effective use of these data. To solve the system and functional level challenges, we present an three novel variants of a serverless federated learning framework. We also present tournament-based pretraining, which we demonstrate significantly improves model performance in some experiments. Overall, these extensions to FL and our novel training method enable greater focus on science rather than ML development.
papers.abstract_zh: 硬件的进步、边缘计算的激增以及前所未有的规模的数据创建使得联邦学习（FL）成为普及机器学习的下一次飞跃所必需的。出于隐私和网络原因，大量数据仍然滞留在位于地理位置严峻（或至少在网络方面严峻）的端点上。然而，有效利用这些数据存在挑战。为了解决系统和功能级别的挑战，我们提出了无服务器联邦学习框架的三种新颖变体。我们还提出了基于锦标赛的预训练，我们在一些实验中证明它显着提高了模型性能。总体而言，FL 的这些扩展和我们新颖的训练方法使我们能够更加关注科学而不是 ML 开发。

papers.title: Toward Exascale Computation for Turbomachinery Flows.
papers.abstract: A state-of-the-art large eddy simulation code has been developed to solve compressible flows in turbomachinery. The code has been engineered with a high degree of scalability, enabling it to effectively leverage the many-core architecture of the new Sunway system. A consistent performance of 115.8 DP-PFLOPs has been achieved on a high-pressure turbine cascade consisting of over 1.69 billion mesh elements and 865 billion Degree of Freedoms (DOFs). By leveraging a high-order unstructured solver and its portability to large heterogeneous parallel systems, we have progressed towards solving the grand challenge problem outlined by NASA [1], which involves a time-dependent simulation of a complete engine, incorporating all the aerodynamic and heat transfer components.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们开发了最先进的大涡模拟代码来解决涡轮机械中的可压缩流动。该代码经过精心设计，具有高度的可扩展性，使其能够有效利用新Sunway系统的众核架构。由超过 16.9 亿个网格单元和 8,650 亿个自由度 (DOF) 组成的高压涡轮叶栅实现了 115.8 DP-PFLOP 的一致性能。通过利用高阶非结构化求解器及其对大型异构并行系统的可移植性，我们已经朝着解决 NASA [1] 概述的重大挑战问题取得了进展，其中涉及对完整发动机的时间相关模拟，其中包含所有空气动力学和传热组件。

papers.title: Toward Sustainable HPC: Carbon Footprint Estimation and Environmental Implications of HPC Systems.
papers.abstract: The rapid growth in demand for HPC systems has led to a rise in carbon footprint, which requires urgent intervention. In this work, we present a comprehensive analysis of the carbon footprint of highperformance computing (HPC) systems, considering the carbon footprint during both the hardware manufacturing and system operational stages. Our work employs HPC hardware component carbon footprint modeling, regional carbon intensity analysis, and experimental characterization of the system life cycle to highlight the importance of quantifying the carbon footprint of HPC systems.
papers.abstract_zh: 对 HPC 系统的需求快速增长导致碳足迹增加，需要紧急干预。在这项工作中，我们对高性能计算 (HPC) 系统的碳足迹进行了全面分析，考虑了硬件制造和系统运行阶段的碳足迹。我们的工作采用 HPC 硬件组件碳足迹建模、区域碳强度分析和系统生命周期的实验表征，以强调量化 HPC 系统碳足迹的重要性。

papers.title: Towards A Massive-scale Distributed Neighborhood Graph Construction.
papers.abstract: Graph-based approximate nearest neighbor algorithms have shown high performance and quality. However, such approaches require a large amount of memory and still take a long time to construct high-quality nearest neighbor graphs (NNGs). Using distributed memory systems is important when data is large or a shorter indexing time is desired.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于图的近似最近邻算法已显示出高性能和质量。然而，此类方法需要大量内存，并且仍然需要很长时间才能构建高质量的最近邻图（NNG）。当数据很大或需要更短的索引时间时，使用分布式内存系统非常重要。

papers.title: Towards Collaborative Continuous Benchmarking for HPC.
papers.abstract: Benchmarking is integral to procurement of HPC systems, communicating HPC center workloads to HPC vendors, and verifying performance of the delivered HPC systems. Currently, HPC benchmarking is manual and challenging at every step, posing a high barrier to entry, and hampering reproducibility of the benchmarks across different HPC systems. In this paper, we propose collaborative continuous benchmarking to enable functional reproducibility, automation, and community collaboration in HPC benchmarking. Recent progress in HPC automation allows us to consider previously unimaginable large-scale improvements to the HPC ecosystem. We define the minimal requirements for collaborative continuous benchmarking and develop a common language to streamline the interactions between HPC centers, vendors, and researchers. We demonstrate the initial implementation of collaborative continuous benchmarking, and introduce an open source continuous benchmarking repository, Benchpark, for community collaboration. We believe collaborative continuous benchmarking will help overcome the human bottleneck in HPC benchmarking, enabling better evaluation of our systems and enabling a more productive collaboration within the HPC community.
papers.abstract_zh: 基准测试对于 HPC 系统的采购、向 HPC 供应商传达 HPC 中心工作负载以及验证所交付的 HPC 系统的性能至关重要。目前，HPC 基准测试是手动的，每一步都具有挑战性，构成了很高的进入壁垒，并阻碍了不同 HPC 系统之间基准测试的可重复性。在本文中，我们提出协作式连续基准测试，以实现 HPC 基准测试中的功能可重复性、自动化和社区协作。 HPC 自动化的最新进展使我们能够考虑对 HPC 生态系统进行以前难以想象的大规模改进。我们定义了协作持续基准测试的最低要求，并开发了一种通用语言来简化 HPC 中心、供应商和研究人员之间的交互。我们演示了协作式连续基准测试的初步实施，并引入了一个开源连续基准测试存储库 Benchpark，用于社区协作。我们相信协作式连续基准测试将有助于克服 HPC 基准测试中的人力瓶颈，从而更好地评估我们的系统并在 HPC 社区内实现更高效的协作。

papers.title: Towards Correctness Checking of MPI Partitioned Communication in MUST.
papers.abstract: The partitioned point-to-point communication concept introduced with the MPI-4.0 standard can improve the communication efficiency of hybrid parallel execution models. It allows threads on the sender and the receiver side to start working on parts of a communication buffer before the communication operation is fully completed. This new concept, however, also comes with new possible programming mistakes. In this paper, we discuss erroneous usage patterns in MPI partitioned communication and provide a set of example test cases to be integrated in future classification quality benchmark suites. The tests include invalid arguments, erroneous partition activations, deadlocks, and local buffer races. Further, we explain how we implemented first basic checks specific to partitioned communication in our correctness checking tool MUST and discuss required extensions for existing analyses. The evaluation on the example test cases shows that MUST can correctly pinpoint bugs in applications using partitioned communication.
papers.abstract_zh: MPI-4.0标准引入的分区点对点通信概念可以提高混合并行执行模型的通信效率。它允许发送方和接收方的线程在通信操作完全完成之前开始处理通信缓冲区的部分内容。然而，这个新概念也带来了新的可能的编程错误。在本文中，我们讨论了 MPI 分区通信中的错误使用模式，并提供了一组示例测试用例以集成到未来的分类质量基准套件中。测试包括无效参数、错误的分区激活、死锁和本地缓冲区竞争。此外，我们解释了如何在正确性检查工具中实现特定于分区通信的第一个基本检查，并讨论现有分析所需的扩展。对示例测试用例的评估表明，必须能够使用分区通信正确查明应用程序中的错误。

papers.title: Towards Foundation Models for Materials Science: The Open MatSci ML Toolkit.
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence and machine learning have shown great promise in their ability to accelerate novel materials discovery. As researchers and domain scientists seek to unify and consolidate chemical knowledge, the case for models with potential to generalize across different tasks within materials science—so-called “foundation models”—grows with ambitions. This manuscript reviews our recent progress with development of Open MatSci ML Toolkit, and details experiments that lay the groundwork for foundation model research and development with our framework. First, we describe and characterize a new pretraining task that uses synthetic data generated from symmetry operations, and reveal complex training dynamics at large scales. Using the pretrained model, we discuss a number of use cases relevant to foundation model development: semantic architecture of datasets, and fine-tuning for property prediction and classification. Our key results show that for simple applications, pretraining appears to provide worse modeling performance than training models from random initialization. However, for more complex instances, such as when a model is required to learn across multiple datasets and types of targets simultaneously, the inductive bias from pretraining provides significantly better performance. This insight will hopefully inform subsequent efforts into creating foundation models for materials science applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 人工智能和机器学习在加速新材料发现方面表现出了巨大的潜力。随着研究人员和领域科学家寻求统一和巩固化学知识，具有泛化材料科学中不同任务潜力的模型（所谓的“基础模型”）的需求与日俱增。本手稿回顾了我们最近在 Open MatSci ML Toolkit 开发方面取得的进展，并详细介绍了为使用我们的框架进行基础模型研究和开发奠定基础的实验。首先，我们描述并表征了一种新的预训练任务，该任务使用对称操作生成的合成数据，并揭示了大规模的复杂训练动态。使用预训练模型，我们讨论了与基础模型开发相关的许多用例：数据集的语义架构以及属性预测和分类的微调。我们的主要结果表明，对于简单的应用程序，预训练似乎提供比随机初始化训练模型更差的建模性能。然而，对于更复杂的实例，例如当模型需要同时学习多个数据集和目标类型时，预训练的归纳偏差可提供明显更好的性能。这一见解有望为后续为材料科学应用创建基础模型的努力提供信息。

papers.title: Towards Rapid Autonomous Electron Microscopy with Active Meta-Learning.
papers.abstract: We introduce a novel approach, Active Meta-learning, to improve computational control across various scientific experiments. It's particularly valuable for spectral reconstruction in STEM EELS nanoparticle plasmonic images. Traditionally, separate AI models were trained for each experiment via active learning, but this approach could face scalability issues with high-resolution data and the need for complex AI models due to intricate structure-property relationships. In this work we demonstrate the feasibility of learning AI structural representations across multiple experiments. We train a meta model from 10 prior experiments carried out such that the model can adapt to new unseen conditions in considerably less time than when trained from scratch. We utilize the Reptile algorithm, a first-order, model-agnostic meta-learning approach. To enhance and expand the meta-training dataset, conventional computer vision methods are applied to augment images from previous experiments. We observe up to ∼30-40% reduction in the number of training epochs for active learning exploration. The approach will be extended to distributed meta-learning workflows; meta-model trained in HPC datacenter using data from different microscopy sites and pushed to individual sites for active learning.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新颖的方法，即主动元学习，来改善各种科学实验的计算控制。它对于 STEM EELS 纳米颗粒等离子体图像的光谱重建特别有价值。传统上，通过主动学习为每个实验训练单独的人工智能模型，但这种方法可能面临高分辨率数据的可扩展性问题，以及由于复杂的结构-属性关系而需要复杂的人工智能模型。在这项工作中，我们展示了通过多个实验学习人工智能结构表示的可行性。我们根据之前进行的 10 次实验来训练元模型，以便该模型能够在比从头开始训练时少得多的时间内适应新的未见条件。我们利用 Reptile 算法，这是一种一阶、模型无关的元学习方法。为了增强和扩展元训练数据集，应用传统的计算机视觉方法来增强先前实验中的图像。我们观察到主动学习探索的训练周期数量减少了 30-40%。该方法将扩展到分布式元学习工作流程；元模型使用来自不同显微镜站点的数据在 HPC 数据中心进行训练，并推送到各个站点进行主动学习。

papers.title: Trigger Smart Data Saving Applied to CO2 Capture in Metal-Organic Frameworks.
papers.abstract: Facing the need for carbon emission reduction, processes such as CO2 capture in nanoporous Metal-Organic Frameworks (MOFs) have emerged. However, such processes still need to be improved, by understanding the dynamic properties of CO2 molecules when confined in MOF nanopores. To do so, molecular dynamics (MD) simulations are run for several millions of iterations, enabling to accurately compute the CO2 residency time. Nevertheless, this dynamical parameter remains challenging to compute by standard post-processing approaches and may require terabytes of memory when data are saved after each iteration. To tackle this issue, we developed a trigger-based in situ approach that saves only the relevant data. We implement it by instrumenting the LAMMPS MD code with the SENSEI/Python in situ API. We show that this approach reduces the quantity of data saved by 4 orders of magnitude and can be up to 14% faster than traditional MD simulations without in situ processing.
papers.abstract_zh: 面对减少碳排放的需求，纳米多孔金属有机框架（MOF）中二氧化碳捕获等工艺应运而生。然而，通过了解 CO2 分子被限制在 MOF 纳米孔中时的动态特性，此类过程仍需要改进。为此，分子动力学 (MD) 模拟会运行数百万次迭代，从而能够准确计算二氧化碳停留时间。然而，通过标准后处理方法计算该动态参数仍然具有挑战性，并且在每次迭代后保存数据时可能需要数 TB 的内存。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种基于触发器的原位方法，仅保存相关数据。我们通过使用 SENSEI/Python 现场 API 检测 LAMMPS MD 代码来实现它。我们证明，这种方法将保存的数据量减少了 4 个数量级，并且比无需原位处理的传统 MD 模拟快 14%。

papers.title: TrivialSpy: Identifying Software Triviality via Fine-grained and Dataflow-based Value Profiling.
papers.abstract: Trivial operations cause software inefficiencies that waste functional units and memory bandwidth for executing useless instructions. Although previous works have identified a significant amount of trivial operations in widely used programs, the proposed solutions only provide useful observations, other than actionable guidance to eliminate trivial operations for better performance. In this paper, we propose TrivialSpy - a fine-grained and dataflow-based value profiler to effectively identify software triviality with optimization potential estimation. With the help of dataflow analysis, TrivialSpy can detect software trivialities of heavy operation, trivial chain, and redundant backward slice. In addition, TrivialSpy can identify trivial breakpoints that combine multiple trivial conditions for more optimization opportunities. The evaluation results demonstrate TrivialSpy is capable of identifying software triviality in highly optimized programs. Based on the optimization guidance provided by TrivialSpy, we can achieve 52.09% performance speedup at maximum after eliminating trivial operations.
papers.abstract_zh: 琐碎的操作会导致软件效率低下，从而浪费功能单元和内存带宽来执行无用的指令。尽管以前的工作已经在广泛使用的程序中识别出大量的琐碎操作，但所提出的解决方案仅提供有用的观察结果，而不是消除琐碎操作以获得更好性能的可行指导。在本文中，我们提出了 TrivialSpy - 一种细粒度且基于数据流的价值分析器，可通过优化潜力估计来有效识别软件的琐碎性。借助数据流分析，TrivialSpy 可以检测繁重操作、琐碎链和冗余向后切片等软件琐事。此外，TrivialSpy 可以识别结合多个琐碎条件的琐碎断点，以获得更多优化机会。评估结果表明 TrivialSpy 能够识别高度优化的程序中的软件琐碎性。基于TrivialSpy提供的优化指导，在消除琐碎操作后，我们最多可以实现52.09%的性能加速。

papers.title: Tydi-lang: A Language for Typed Streaming Hardware.
papers.abstract: Transferring composite data structures with variable-length fields often requires designing unique protocols, causing incompatibility issues and decreased collaboration among hardware developers, especially in the open-source community. Because the high-level meaning of a protocol is often lost in translation to low-level languages when a custom protocol needs to be designed, extra documentation is required, the interpretation of which introduces new opportunities for errors.
papers.abstract_zh: 传输具有可变长度字段的复合数据结构通常需要设计独特的协议，这会导致不兼容问题并减少硬件开发人员之间的协作，尤其是在开源社区中。由于当需要设计自定义协议时，协议的高级含义通常会在翻译为低级语言时丢失，因此需要额外的文档，而这些文档的解释会带来新的错误机会。

papers.title: Uncertainty Quantification of Metal Additive Manufacturing Processing Conditions Through the use of Exascale Computing.
papers.abstract: Metal additive manufacturing (AM) is a disruptive manufacturing technology that opens the design space for parts outside those possible from traditional manufacturing methods. In order to accelerate industry and R&D needs to certify AM parts, the Exascale Additive Manufacturing project (ExaAM) has developed a suite of exascale-ready computational tools to model the process-to-structure-to-properties (PSP) relationship for additively manufactured metal components. One such tool is an uncertainty quantification (UQ) pipeline to quantify the effect that uncertainty in processing conditions has on local mechanical responses. We present an overview of this pipeline and its required simulation and workflow codes. Using the Oak Ridge National Laboratory’s (ORNL) exascale computer, Frontier, we utilize this pipeline to cross multiple length and time scales to predict the local mechanical response of a location within a complex AM bridge part, AMB2018-01 produced by the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST) as part of their 2018 AM-Bench test series. Our results are then compared to experimental mechanical tests of parts from the NIST build to quantify the error in the ExaAM UQ workflow.
papers.abstract_zh: 金属增材制造 (AM) 是一种颠覆性制造技术，它为传统制造方法之外的零件开辟了设计空间。为了加速行业和研发需求来认证增材制造零件，百亿亿次增材制造项目 (ExaAM) 开发了一套百亿亿次级计算工具，用于对增材制造金属部件的工艺-结构-性能 (PSP) 关系进行建模。其中一种工具是不确定性量化 (UQ) 管道，用于量化加工条件的不确定性对局部机械响应的影响。我们概述了该管道及其所需的模拟和工作流程代码。使用橡树岭国家实验室 (ORNL) 的百亿亿级计算机 Frontier，我们利用该管道跨越多个长度和时间尺度来预测复杂 AM 桥梁部件内某个位置的局部机械响应，AMB2018-01 由美国国家标准与技术研究所 (NIST) 制作，作为其 2018 年 AM-Bench 测试系列的一部分。然后将我们的结果与 NIST 构建的零件的实验机械测试进行比较，以量化 ExaAM UQ 工作流程中的错误。

papers.title: Uncertainty Quantification of Reduced-Precision Time Series in Turbulent Channel Flow.
papers.abstract: With increased computational power through the use of arithmetic in low-precision, a relevant question is how lower precision affects simulation results, especially for chaotic systems where analytical round-off estimates are non-trivial to obtain. In this work, we consider how the uncertainty of the time series of a direct numerical simulation of turbulent channel flow at Reτ = 180 is affected when restricted to a reduced-precision representation. We utilize a non-overlapping batch means estimator and find that the mean statistics can, in this case, be obtained with significantly fewer mantissa bits than conventional IEEE-754 double precision, but that the mean values are observed to be more sensitive in the middle of the channel than in the near-wall region. This indicates that using lower precision in the near-wall region, where the majority of the computational efforts are required, may benefit from low-precision floating point units found in upcoming computer hardware.
papers.abstract_zh: 随着通过使用低精度算术来提高计算能力，一个相关的问题是较低的精度如何影响模拟结果，特别是对于获得分析舍入估计并不容易的混沌系统。在这项工作中，我们考虑了当限制于降低精度的表示时，Reτ = 180 时湍流通道流的直接数值模拟的时间序列的不确定性如何受到影响。我们利用非重叠批量均值估计器，发现在这种情况下，可以用比传统 IEEE-754 双精度少得多的尾数位来获得均值统计数据，但观察到平均值在通道中间比在近壁区域更敏感。这表明，在需要大部分计算工作的近壁区域使用较低精度可能会受益于即将推出的计算机硬件中的低精度浮点单元。

papers.title: Understanding Energy Performance of Containers Deployment on HPC-Based post-Moore Platforms.
papers.abstract: HPC platforms seek to ensure peak computing performance with minimal energy cost searching sustainability. Considering different cases of use and implementation, both post-Moore hardware elements and software deployment (as virtualization or containerization) are incorporated. However, as the number of devices proliferates, managing applications has become intricate, prompting the adoption of containerization methods for simplification. Then, understanding the performance of the deployment strategy to propose an adequate implementation and integration of HPC-based post-Moore architectures is important to guarantee efficiency. This study evaluates the containerization strategies on a cost-effective post-Moore device suitable for an HPC platform. Factors like ease of use, reproducibility, and compatibility examine the deployment methods. The evaluation process employs metrics establishment and stress tests to appraise application-specific aspects. The obtained insights are categorized to address deployment mechanisms, performance implications, execution duration, and energy consumption impacts.
papers.abstract_zh: HPC 平台力求以最低的能源成本确保峰值计算性能，并寻求可持续性。考虑到不同的使用和实施情况，后摩尔硬件元素和软件部署（如虚拟化或容器化）都被纳入其中。然而，随着设备数量的激增，管理应用程序变得复杂，促使采用容器化方法来简化。然后，了解部署策略的性能以提出基于 HPC 的后摩尔架构的充分实施和集成对于保证效率非常重要。本研究评估了适用于 HPC 平台的经济高效的后摩尔设备的容器化策略。易用性、可重复性和兼容性等因素考察部署方法。评估过程采用指标建立和压力测试来评估应用程序特定的方面。获得的见解被分类以解决部署机制、性能影响、执行持续时间和能耗影响。

papers.title: Understanding the Effects of Permanent Faults in GPU's Parallelism Management and Control Units.
papers.abstract: Modern Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) demand life expectancy extended to many years, exposing the hardware to aging (i.e., permanent faults arising after the end-of-manufacturing test). Hence, techniques to assess permanent fault impacts in GPUs are strongly required, especially in safety-critical domains.
papers.abstract_zh: 现代图形处理单元 (GPU) 要求预期寿命延长至多年，从而使硬件容易老化（即在制造结束测试后出现永久性故障）。因此，强烈需要评估 GPU 中永久性故障影响的技术，尤其是在安全关键领域。

papers.title: Unified Communication Optimization Strategies for Sparse Triangular Solver on CPU and GPU Clusters.
papers.abstract: This paper presents a unified communication optimization framework for sparse triangular solve (SpTRSV) algorithms on CPU and GPU clusters. The framework builds upon a 3D communication-avoiding (CA) layout of Px × Py × Pz processes that divides a sparse matrix into Pz submatrices, each handled by a Px × Py 2D grid with block-cyclic distribution. We propose three communication optimization strategies: First, a new 3D SpTRSV algorithm is developed, which trades the inter-grid communication and synchronization with replicated computation. This design requires only one inter-grid synchronization, and the inter-grid communication is efficiently implemented with sparse allreduce operations. Second, broadcast and reduction communication trees are used to reduce message latency of the intra-grid 2D communication on CPU clusters. Finally, we leverage GPU-initiated one-sided communication to implement the communication trees on GPU clusters. With these nested inter- and intra-grid communication optimization strategies, the proposed 3D SpTRSV algorithm can attain up to 3.45x speedups compared to the baseline 3D SpTRSV algorithm using up to 2048 Cori Haswell CPU cores. In addition, the proposed GPU 3D SpTRSV algorithm can achieve up to 6.5x speedups compared to the proposed CPU 3D SpTRSV algorithm with Pz up to 64. Finally it is remarkable that the proposed GPU 3D SpTRSV can scale to 256 GPUs using the Perlmutter system while the existing 2D SpTRSV algorithm can only scale up to 4 GPUs.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 CPU 和 GPU 集群上稀疏三角求解 (SpTRSV) 算法的统一通信优化框架。该框架建立在 Px × Py × Pz 进程的 3D 避免通信 (CA) 布局之上，将稀疏矩阵划分为 Pz 子矩阵，每个子矩阵由具有块循环分布的 Px × Py 2D 网格处理。我们提出了三种通信优化策略：首先，开发了一种新的 3D SpTRSV 算法，该算法用复制计算来交换网格间通信和同步。该设计仅需要一次网格间同步，并且通过稀疏allreduce操作有效地实现了网格间通信。其次，使用广播和缩减通信树来减少CPU集群上网格内2D通信的消息延迟。最后，我们利用 GPU 发起的单向通信在 GPU 集群上实现通信树。通过这些嵌套的网格间和网格内通信优化策略，与使用多达 2048 个 Cori Haswell CPU 内核的基准 3D SpTRSV 算法相比，所提出的 3D SpTRSV 算法可以获得高达 3.45 倍的加速。此外，与 Pz 高达 64 的 CPU 3D SpTRSV 算法相比，所提出的 GPU 3D SpTRSV 算法可实现高达 6.5 倍的加速。最后值得注意的是，所提出的 GPU 3D SpTRSV 可以使用 Perlmutter 系统扩展到 256 个 GPU，而现有的 2D SpTRSV 算法只能扩展到 4 个 GPU。

papers.title: Unity ECC: Unified Memory Protection Against Bit and Chip Errors.
papers.abstract: DRAM vendors utilize On-Die Error Correction Codes (OD-ECC) to correct random bit errors internally. Meanwhile, system companies utilize Rank-Level ECC (RL-ECC) to protect data against chip errors. Separate protection increases the redundancy ratio to 32.8% in DDR5 and incurs significant performance penalties. This paper proposes a novel RL-ECC, Unity ECC, that can correct both singlechip and double-bit error patterns. Unity ECC corrects doublebit errors using unused syndromes of single-chip correction. Our evaluation shows that Unity ECC without OD-ECC can provide the same reliability level as Chipkill RL-ECC with OD-ECC. Moreover, it can significantly improve system performance and reduce DRAM energy and area by eliminating OD-ECC.
papers.abstract_zh: DRAM 供应商利用片上纠错码 (OD-ECC) 在内部纠正随机位错误。同时，系统公司利用Rank-Level ECC (RL-ECC)来保护数据免受芯片错误的影响。单独的保护将 DDR5 的冗余率提高到 32.8%，但会带来严重的性能损失。本文提出了一种新颖的 RL-ECC Unity ECC，它可以纠正单芯片和双位错误模式。 Unity ECC 使用未使用的单芯片校正综合症来校正双位错误。我们的评估表明，不带 OD-ECC 的 Unity ECC 可以提供与带 OD-ECC 的 Chipkill RL-ECC 相同的可靠性级别。此外，它还可以通过消除 OD-ECC 显着提高系统性能并减少 DRAM 能耗和面积。

papers.title: Using Azure Quantum Resource Estimator for Assessing Performance of Fault Tolerant Quantum Computation.
papers.abstract: The automatic resource estimation tools provided by Azure Quantum and Microsoft Quantum Development Kit are described, which enable the evaluation of the resources required to run algorithms on fault-tolerant quantum computers. An example is given of obtaining resource estimates for quantum fault-tolerant implementations of several multiplication algorithms.
papers.abstract_zh: 介绍了 Azure Quantum 和 Microsoft Quantum 开发套件提供的自动资源估计工具，该工具可以评估在容错量子计算机上运行算法所需的资源。给出了获取几种乘法算法的量子容错实现的资源估计的示例。

papers.title: Using Benford's Law to Identify Unusual Failure Regions.
papers.abstract: Fault tolerance remains a key challenge for current high performance computing systems. Effective and efficient scheduling of mitigation methods continues to be a critical issue in the face of dynamic and difficult-to-predict error rates found on many systems. Using failure data from the Astra supercomputer, we examine the efficacy of a simple method to determine if a sliding window of recent failures contains an unusual pattern of errors. Specifically, we investigate using Benford’s Law to predict the likelihood that the system is currently in a period of unusual failure occurrences. While still in its initial stages, this work provides critical analysis of failure status for extreme-scale systems and a simple form of prediction for determining when the scheduling of failure mitigation may be suboptimal and needs to be reevaluated due to the unusual pattern of errors that are occurring.
papers.abstract_zh: 容错仍然是当前高性能计算系统的一个关键挑战。面对许多系统上发现的动态且难以预测的错误率，有效且高效的缓解方法调度仍然是一个关键问题。使用来自 Astra 超级计算机的故障数据，我们检查了一种简单方法的有效性，以确定最近故障的滑动窗口是否包含不寻常的错误模式。具体来说，我们研究使用本福德定律来预测系统当前处于异常故障发生时期的可能性。虽然仍处于初始阶段，但这项工作提供了对极端规模系统的故障状态的关键分析，并提供了一种简单的预测形式，用于确定故障缓解的调度何时可能不是最佳的，并且由于正在发生的异常模式而需要重新评估。

papers.title: Using Mixed-Radix Decomposition to Enumerate Computational Resources of Deeply Hierarchical Architectures.
papers.abstract: Current HPC architectures are deeply hierarchical (racks, nodes, sockets, NUMA domains, caches,...), and the mapping of MPI processes to cores can significantly influence application performance. To study hierarchy effects on MPI application performance, we propose a procedure for expressing mappings by enumerating cores in the hierarchy in different orders. We explore two use cases: MPI rank reordering for applications using subcommunicators, and core selection for applications not using all cores on a node.
papers.abstract_zh: 当前的 HPC 架构具有很深的层次结构（机架、节点、套接字、NUMA 域、缓存等），MPI 进程到内核的映射可以显着影响应用程序性能。为了研究层次结构对 MPI 应用程序性能的影响，我们提出了一种通过以不同顺序枚举层次结构中的核心来表达映射的过程。我们探讨了两个用例：使用子通信器的应用程序的 MPI 排名重新排序，以及不使用节点上所有核心的应用程序的核心选择。

papers.title: Value-Based Resource Management at SoC Scale.
papers.abstract: Value-based resource management heuristics, which are traditionally deployed in heterogeneous HPC systems, maximize system productivity by assigning resources to each job based on its priority and estimated value gain relative to each job’s completion time. We investigate the utility of value-based resource management at heterogeneous SoC scale and demonstrate its ability to make effective scheduling decisions for time-constrained jobs in oversubscribed systems where system resources are shared by multiple users and applications arrive dynamically. The proposed value-based resource management approach drops tasks that are estimated to result with lower-value gain dynamically with the aim of completing more number of high-value jobs with a scheduling decision time at 120μ s scale. The value-based resource management treats scheduling as a global optimization problem, therefore this study sets a path forward for deploying a unified value-based resource management on a system composed of front-end SoC-based edge devices and a back-end HPC system.
papers.abstract_zh: 基于价值的资源管理启发式传统上部署在异构 HPC 系统中，通过根据每个作业的优先级和相对于每个作业完成时间的估计价值增益向每个作业分配资源，从而最大限度地提高系统生产力。我们研究了异构 SoC 规模上基于价值的资源管理的实用性，并展示了其在超额订阅系统中为时间受限的作业做出有效调度决策的能力，其中系统资源由多个用户共享，并且应用程序动态到达。所提出的基于价值的资源管理方法动态地丢弃估计会产生较低价值增益的任务，目的是在 120μs 规模的调度决策时间下完成更多数量的高价值作业。基于价值的资源管理将调度视为全局优化问题，因此本研究为在由前端基于 SoC 的边缘设备和后端 HPC 系统组成的系统上部署统一的基于价值的资源管理指明了道路。

papers.title: VENOM: A Vectorized N: M Format for Unleashing the Power of Sparse Tensor Cores.
Verifying Performance Guidelines for MPI Collectives at Scale.
papers.abstract: MPI collective communication operations are crucial for high-performance computing, making the efficient implementation of collective algorithms essential for optimal application performance. While most MPI libraries provide several algorithms for a specific collective operation, each may work better in a specific scenario. Therefore, selecting the most suitable algorithm for each use case is important. However, even the best algorithm in a given MPI library’s set may deliver suboptimal performance.
papers.abstract_zh: MPI 集体通信操作对于高性能计算至关重要，因此集体算法的高效实施对于优化应用程序性能至关重要。虽然大多数 MPI 库为特定的集体操作提供了多种算法，但每种算法在特定场景中可能效果更好。因此，为每个用例选择最合适的算法非常重要。然而，即使给定 MPI 库集中最好的算法也可能提供次优的性能。
